Matthew1:1 Bukuit ne bo oretab Jesu Kristo, weritab Daudi, weritab Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 Kisich Abraham Isak; ak kisich Isak Jakobo; ak kisich Jakobo Juda ak che tupcho; 
Matthew1:3 ak kisich Juda Pares ak Zera eng’ Tamar; ak kisich Pares Hesron; ak kisich Hesron Ram; 
Matthew1:4 ak kisich Ram Aminadab; ak kisich Aminadab Nason; ak kisich Nason Salmon; 
Matthew1:5 ak kisich Salmon Boas eng’ Rahab; ak kisich Boas Obed eng’ Ruth; ak kisich Obed Jesii; 
Matthew1:6 ak kisich Jesii laitoriat Daudi. Ak kisich Daudi Solomon eng’ ne ki bo Uria; 
Matthew1:7 ak kisich Solomon Reoboam; ak kisich Reoboam Abija; ak kisich Abija Asa; 
Matthew1:8 ak kisich Asa Jeosabat; ak kisich Jeosabat Joram; ak kisich Joram Usia; 
Matthew1:9 ak kisich Usia Jotam; ak kisich Jotam Ahas; ak kisich Ahas Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 ak kisich Hesekia Manase; ak kisich Manase Amon; ak kisich Amon Josia; 
Matthew1:11 ak kisich Josia Jekonia ak che tupcho, eng’ betusiek che kiga kimut bik koba Babulon." 
Matthew1:12 Ak kingo kagimut koba Babulon, kosich Jekonia Sealtiel; ak kisich Sealtiel Serubabel;" 
Matthew1:13 ak kisich Serubabel Abiud; ak kisich Abiud Eliakim; ak kisich Eliakim Asor; 
Matthew1:14 ak kisich Asor Sadok; ak kisich Sadok Akim; ak kisich Akim Eliud; 
Matthew1:15 ak kisich Eliud Eleasar; ak kisich Eleasar Matan; ak kisich Matan Jakobo; 
Matthew1:16 ak kisich Jakobo Josep manong’otiotab Maria, ne kisich Jesu ne kiguure Kristo." 
Matthew1:17 Kiek ibinwek tugul taman ak ang’wan koboch Abraham agoi Daudi; ak kiek ibinwek taman ak ang’wan koboch Daudi agoi kamutet ne kigimut bik koba Babulon; ak kiek ibinwek taman ak ang’wan koboch ngab kimut koba Babulon agoi Kristo. 
Matthew1:18 Ki u ni sigetab Jesu Kristo: ye kingo kagochamnyechi Josep kotungei ak Maria kametab Jesu, ye kitomo kotuiyo, kotook kele managat inendet eng’ Tamiririet ne Tilil." 
Matthew1:19 Ak kimachei Josep manong’otiondennyi kole kobagakta eng’ ung’ot amu kima cham konai chi, ak amu ki chi ne bo imanda." 
Matthew1:20 Ago ye kingota kobwati tuguchu, ogeero, kimong’ji inendet malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat eng’ karuotitoet, kole, Josep, weritab Daudi, ameiywei imutyige Maria osotiondeng’ung’: amu managat inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Matthew1:21 Ak tun sichei werit; ak iguure kainennyi JESU; amu inendet ne soru bikyik eng’ tengekwogikwak. 
Matthew1:22 Ak kagoyaak tuguchu tugul, si kobiit kosulda ne kiga mwa Kiptaiyat eng’ maotiot, kole," 
Matthew1:23 Ogeero, manachi bergeiyat, ak kosich werit, ak keguure kainennyi Imanuel; ye kiweech ko ni, Mi Jehovah kobotech." 
Matthew1:24 Ak king’eet Josep eng’ ruandanyi, ak koyai ko u ye king’at malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat, ak kiimutyigei osotiondennyi;" 
Matthew1:25 ak kima rikyi inendet kot kosich werit: ak koguure kainennyi JESU. 
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jesu eng’ Betlehem ne bo Judea eng’ betusiek che bo laitoriat Herod, ogeero, kibwa Jerusalem bik che ng’omen kobunu kong’asis," 
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jesu eng’ Betlehem ne bo Judea eng’ betusiek che bo laitoriat Herod, ogeero, kibwa Jerusalem bik che ng’omen kobunu kong’asis," 
Matthew2:2 koteeboti kole, Mi ano inendet laitoriatab Yahudik ne kigesich? Amu kigigeer kecheiyandennyi eng’ kong’asis, ak kagibwa kilosu inendet." 
Matthew2:3 Ak ye kingogas noto laitoriat Herod, koarogen, koboto Jerusalem komugul." 
Matthew2:4 Ak ye kingoyum inendet tisiik che eechen tugul ak sirik che bo bik, koteebe ole kigisikyi Kristo." 
Matthew2:5 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Kigisikyi Betlehem ne bo Juda: amu kisir maotiot ko u noto, kole," 
Matthew2:6 Ak inye, Betlehem, emetab Juda: Ma i ming’in mising’ eng’ kandoikab Juda, Amu mong’unenen bounindet, Ne tun egu mestowotab bikyuk Israel." 
Matthew2:7 Kiguur anyun Herod eng’ ung’ot bik che ng’omen, si kogine kole kitoogu au kecheiyat." 
Matthew2:8 Ak kiiyokto koba Betlehem, ak kilenji, Oba ocheng’ komie lakwet ne ming’in; ak ye kaonyoru inendet, obwa omwawa, si anyo agane alos inendet." 
Matthew2:9 Ak kingo kagogas ng’alekab laitoriat, koba bandanywa; ak ogeero, kiindoe ichek kecheiyat, ne kiga kogeer eng’ kong’asis, kot koit ak kotonon eng’ baragutab ye kimi lakwet ne ming’in." 
Matthew2:10 Ak ye kingogeer kecheiyat, koboiboitu eng’ boiboiyet ne o mising’." 
Matthew2:11 Ak kiba go orit ak kigeer lakwet ne ming’in koboto kamennyi Maria; ak kiibutyi ng’ony kolos inendet; ak kotiach konoraikwak che bo kamanutiet ne o, kogochi inendet kagochinoik, tahabu, tuguk che nyamdut ak tuguk che u igomoik." 
Matthew2:12 Ak kingo kagoteechi Jehovah eng’ karuotitoet kolenji, Amoweekyige Herod, konam anyun oret age koba emenywa." 
Matthew2:13 Ak kingo kagoba ichek, ogeero, komong’ji malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat Josep eng’ karuotitoet, kolenji, Ng’eet, imut lakwet ne ming’in ak kamennyi, mwechi Misri, ak itebe oloto agoi tun amwaun: amu cheng’ei Herod kobar lakwet ne ming’in." 
Matthew2:14 King’eet anyun kemoi komut lakwet ne ming’in ak kamet, koba Misri;" 
Matthew2:15 ak kitebe oloto agoi kome Herod: si kosulda ne kimwa Kiptaiyat eng’ maotiot, kole, Kiaguur werinnyu komong’ eng’ Misri." 
Matthew2:16 Kingogeer Herod anyun, kole, kigong’al inendet bik che ng’omen, konerech mising’, ak kiiyokto, kebar lagok tugul che ng’etik che mi Betlehem, ak eng’ tabanwekyik tugul, koboch che bo kenyisiek aeng’ ak che tomo koit choto, eng’ betut ne kigine bik che ng’omen." 
Matthew2:17 Kiisulda anyun eng’ betunoto ne kiga mwa maotiot Jeremia, kole," 
Matthew2:18 Kigegas kutit eng’ Rama, Rirek ak kateiyet ne o, Rirjin Rael lagokyik; Ak kima cham kigaigai, amu ma komi." 
Matthew2:19 Ago kingo kagome Herod, ogeero, komong’ji malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat Josep eng’ Misri eng’ karuotitoet," 
Matthew2:20 kolenji, Ng’eet, imut lakwet ne ming’in ak kamet, oba emetab Israel; amu kogobek che kicheng’ei kobar lakwanato ming’in." 
Matthew2:21 Ak king’eet, komut lakwet ne ming’in ak kamet, kobwa emetab Israel." 
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingogas kole bou Arkelau Judea eng’ bounatet ne ki bo kwandanyi Herod, koiywei kwo oloto; ak ye kiiteechi Jehovah eng’ karuotitoet, koweekyigei komoswekab Galili," 
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingogas kole bou Arkelau Judea eng’ bounatet ne ki bo kwandanyi Herod, koiywei kwo oloto; ak ye kiiteechi Jehovah eng’ karuotitoet, koweekyigei komoswekab Galili," 
Matthew2:23 ak kinyo kotebe nganaset ne kiguure Nasaret: si kobiit kosulda ne kiga mwa maotik, kole, kiguure inendet Nasaretindet." 
Matthew3:1 Ak kinyo eng’ betusiechoto Johana Kabatisanindet koamdaati eng’ surkwenetab Judea," 
Matthew3:1 Ak kinyo eng’ betusiechoto Johana Kabatisanindet koamdaati eng’ surkwenetab Judea," 
Matthew3:2 kolen, Osigu; amu kagorik bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew3:3 Amu inendet ni ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia, kole, Kutitab chi ne ititeni eng’ surkwen, kolen, Ochob oretab Kiptaiyat, Olititoti ole bunoti." 
Matthew3:4 Ak kiilaachi Johana inendet sambutab tambesik, ak kirategei birenetab muito; ak amitwogikyik ko ki chereng’endet ak kumikab timin." 
Matthew3:5 Ak ngunoto anyun, koba ole mi inendet bikab Jerusalem ak Judea komugul, ak komoswek tugul che negite Jordan;" 
Matthew3:5 Ak ngunoto anyun, koba ole mi inendet bikab Jerusalem ak Judea komugul, ak komoswek tugul che negite Jordan;" 
Matthew3:6 ak kiibatisan inendet ichek eng’ ainet ne kiguure Jordan, kong’anyei tengekwogikwak." 
Matthew3:7 Ago ye kingogeer kobwanji kabatisanennyi che chang’ che bo Parisaik ak Sadukaik, kolenji, Okwek lagokab erenok che ng’wonen, ng’o ne kiiteeywok omwee nereknatet ne nyonei?" 
Matthew3:8 Oi anyun logoek che nyoljin sigunet: 
Matthew3:9 amat obwat eng’ oring’wong’ ole, Kitinye kwandanyo Abraham: amu amwawok ale, imuchi Jehovah kong’eetyi Abraham lagok eng’ koichu." 
Matthew3:10 Agot nguno ko kaginde aiywet tigitikab ketik: kiebei anyun ketit age tugul ne maiyiei logoek che miach, ak kewirji ma." 
Matthew3:11 Abatisanok iman eng’ beek amu sigunet: ago tinyei kimnatet kosiira inendet ne isubwa, ma nyolu aipchinot kweonikyik: ibatisanok inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak mat:" 
Matthew3:12 tinyei eng’ eunnyi keibennyi, ak kotilili komie ruanyut; ak koyumji nganok chogennyi, ak kobeele metetek mat ne ma misoksei." 
Matthew3:13 Kinyo anyun Jesu kobunu Galili konyo Jordan ole mi Johana, si kibatisan." 
Matthew3:14 Ago kimachei Johana koesio, kole, Kanyol ibatisana, ago kenyonja ane?" 
Matthew3:15 Ago kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Cham nguno: amu kanyoljech kigesu imanda tugul ko u noto. Kocham anyun." 
Matthew3:16 Ak ye kingo kagibatisan Jesu, kotogos ngunoto eng’ beek: ogeero, kigiyatyi kipsengwetisiek, ak kogeer inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah kochorugei ko u cheptuget, ak konyonji baragunnyi;" 
Matthew3:17 ogeero, kimong’une kutit kipsengwet, kole, Ni ko Werinnyu, chamanennyu, abaibai mising’ eng’ inendet." 
Matthew4:1 Kiimut anyun Tamirmiriet Jesu kotogosta kwo surkwen si koyom oindet. 
Matthew4:2 Ak ye kingo kagorugutgei betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam eng’ let koam rubet. 
Matthew4:3 Ak kinyo yomindet ak kolenji, Ngo i Weritab Jehovah, ing’at koichu koek makatinik." 
Matthew4:4 Ago kiwolji kole, Sirat, Masobei chi eng’ makatiat inegei, ago eng’ ng’olyot age tugul ne mong’une kutitab Jehovah." 
Matthew4:5 Yeityo komut oindet inendet kwo nganaset ne tilil; kiimut kwo kimonjogut ne bo hekalut," 
Matthew4:6 ak kolenji, Ngo i Weritab Jehovah, iwirjige ng’ony: amu sirat kole, Iyogu malaikaisiekyik agobo inye: Ak kotaachin eng’ eunekwak, Si marus koita keldang’ung’." 
Matthew4:7 Kilenji Jesu, Sirat kogeny kole, Meyom Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’." 
Matthew4:8 Kiimut kogeny oindet inendet kwo tulwet ne koi mising’, ak koborji bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, ak telunatet ne bo choto," 
Matthew4:9 ak kolenji, Agonin tuguchu tugul, ngibutya iloswa." 
Matthew4:10 Kilenji Jesu anyun, Ui eng’ oli, Setani: amu sirat kole, Ilosu Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’, ak iboisiechi inendet inegei." 
Matthew4:11 Kibagach oindet anyun inendet; ak ogeero, kibwa malaikaisiek si koboisiechi." 
Matthew4:12 Ak ye kingogas Jesu kole ki kerat Johana, kwo inendet Galili;" 
Matthew4:13 ak kiwa eng’ Nasaret, kwo kotebe Kapernaum, ne mi ye negite araraita, eng’ tabanwek che bo Sebulun ak Naptali:" 
Matthew4:14 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia, kole," 
Matthew4:15 Emetab Sebulun ak emetab Naptali, Oret ne negit araraita, Jordan bitonin, Galili ne bo Bororiosiek," 
Matthew4:16 Kigeer bik che kitebe mesundeito Lapkeiyet ne o, Ak kichorjigei lapkeiyet, Che kitebe koret ak uruet ne bo meet." 
Matthew4:17 Koboch yoto kotoi Jesu koamda, ak kole, Osigu; amu kagorik bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew4:18 Ak ye kiwendote ngegutab araraita ne bo Galili, kogeer bik aeng’ che tupcho, Simon ne kiguure Petero, ak Andrea ng’etab kamet, kowirjinoti regereiywot ne kiname njirenik araraita; amu ki ramikab njirenik." 
Matthew4:19 Ak kolenji, Obwa osubwa, si ayaak oegu ramikab bik." 
Matthew4:20 Ak kibagach ngunoto regereiywekwak, ak kosub inendet." 
Matthew4:21 Ak ye kingota kowendi eng’ oloto, kogeer bik aeng’ alak che tupcho, Jakobo weritab Sebedi, ak Johana ng’etab kamet, komitei moingetab beek koboto Sebedi kwandanywa, konabei regereiywekwak; ak koguur ichek." 
Matthew4:22 Ak kibagach ngunoto moinget ak kwandanywa, ak kosub inendet." 
Matthew4:23 Ak kiwendoti Jesu eng’ Galili komugul, konetisioti eng’ sunagogisiekwak, ak koamdaati logoiywek che miach che bo bounatet, ak kosobooti che tinyei korotwek alak tugul ak mianwek alak tugul eng’ bik." 
Matthew4:24 Ak kiyesta ng’alek agobo inendet eng’ Suria komugul, ak kigimutyi inendet bik tugul che miandos, che kinam korotwek ak ng’woninwek che terotin, ak che kitinyei oik, ak che kitanuitos, ak che ki meiyotin borwek; ak kiisoob ichek." 
Matthew4:25 Ak kiisub inendet tuiyosiek che eechen che kibunu Galili ak Dekapoli ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan bitonin. 
Matthew4:25 Ak kiisub inendet tuiyosiek che eechen che kibunu Galili ak Dekapoli ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan bitonin. 
Matthew5:1 Ak kingogeer tuiyosiek, kotogosta tulwet: ak kingo kagoteb ng’ony, kobwanji alamalyennyi:" 
Matthew5:2 ak kiyat kutinnyi, ak konet ichek kolenji," 
Matthew5:3 Boiboen che bonon eng’ tamirmiriet: amu nenywa bounatetab kipsengwet. 
Matthew5:4 Boiboen che arogendos: amu tun kigoigoi. 
Matthew5:5 Boiboen che taloen: amu tun bunjin ng’ony. 
Matthew5:6 Boiboen che amei rubo ak melelda agobo imanda: amu tun biyong’dos. 
Matthew5:7 Boiboen che riregei: amu tun nyoru agichek rirenetab ge. 
Matthew5:8 Boiboen che tililen mugulelwek: amu tun keerei Jehovah. 
Matthew5:9 Boiboen che yaei kalyet: amu kiguure werikab Jehovah. 
Matthew5:10 Boiboen che kageusaus agobo imanda: amu nenywa bounatetab kipsengwet. 
Matthew5:11 Oboiboi ye churok bik, ak ye usausok, ak ye mwaitaenak yaitiet age tugul kong’ochok agobo ane." 
Matthew5:12 Oboiboitu, ak ogasge mising’: amu o melektang’wong’ eng’ kipsengwet: amu kigiusaus ko u noto maotik che kiindounenok." 
Matthew5:13 O munyukab ng’ony: ago ngo bet anyinyindab munyuk, ko ta kenyorundo ano anyinyindo? Koboch yoto ko ma kotilei kiy, ago ketumda ak kotiegat bik." 
Matthew5:14 O lapkeiyatab ng’ony. Magimuchi keuny nganaset ne mi tulwet barak. 
Matthew5:15 Ak mainaami bik tait, ak konde kitonget orit, ago indoi kit ne tonone; ak kokweng’ji bik tugul che mi go." 
Matthew5:16 Ongoluu lapkeiyeng’wong’ ko u noto eng’ taitab bik, si komuch kogeer boisionikwok che miach, si kolos Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:17 Molen kianyo abut Ng’atutiet anan maotik: kima anyo abut, ago ayai kosulda." 
Matthew5:18 Amu amwawok iman ale, Agoi kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ko masiirtoi agot tisiet anan kiy ne ming’in eng’ Ng’atutiet, agoi kosulda tuguk tugul." 
Matthew5:19 Noto anyun, chi age tugul ne butei ng’atutiet agenge ne ming’in kot, eng’ ng’atutichu, ak koneti bik ko u noto, keguure inendet ne ming’in eng’ tugul eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet: ago chi tugul ne yaei ak koneti choto, keguure inendet ne o eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:20 Amu amwawok ale, ngot ko masiir imandang’wong’ imanda ne bo sirik ak Parisaik, ko moite bounatetab kipsengwet matiny." 
Matthew5:21 Kiogas kele, kigilenji ichek che bo keny, Merumisie; ak age tugul ne rumisiei ko kagorikyi kiruoget:" 
Matthew5:22 ago amwawok ale, Age tugul ne nerekyin ne tupcho ko kagorikyi kiruoget; ak age tugul ne lenji ne tupcho, Raca, ko kagorikyi kapkiruoget; ak age tugul ne mwaei kole, Abusanani, ko kagorikyi Gehenna, oldab mat." 
Matthew5:23 Noto anyun ngigoite kagochineng’ung’ eng’ kaptisisiet, ak ibwat eng’ oloto ile, ting’enen ne otupche ng’olyot," 
Matthew5:24 ibagakte eng’ oloto kagochineng’ung’ eng’ taitab kaptisisio ak iwe anyun, ochamnyege korok ak ne otupche, si inyo igoite kagochinengung’." 
Matthew5:25 Osib ochamnyege ak bunyondeng’ung’, kota imi oret koboto inendet; si maimutyin bunyondeng’ung’ kiruogindet, ak komutyin kiruogindet ribindet, ak ketoorjin korgoret." 
Matthew5:26 Amwaun iman, Memong’u eng’ oloto matiny, agoi iyaakte sendeiyot ne bo let." 
Matthew5:27 Kiogas kele kigimwa kele, Moipge:" 
Matthew5:28 ago amwawok ale, age tugul ne keerei kobogorio ak kogase miat inendet, ko kagoipgei ak inendet eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Matthew5:29 Ak ngo riichin kondang’ung’ ne bo tai, ibalu, ak iwirte: amu kaigai eng’ inye ngo betenen kebeberta agenge eng’ borto kosiir ketoorji Gehenna bortang’ung’ komugul." 
Matthew5:30 Ak ngo riichin eung’ung’ ne bo tai, itil, ak iwirte: amu kaigai eng’ inye ngo betenen kebeberta agenge eng’ borto, kosiir kwo Gehenna bortang’ung’ komugul." 
Matthew5:31 Kigimwa kogeny kele, Age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi, ko ingogochi anyun siret ne bo besiet:" 
Matthew5:32 ago amwawok ale, Age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi, ama eng’ sokset, ko kayai inendet koegunot chebaigeiyat: ak age tugul ne ituni kobogoriondonoto ne kigeon, ko kabaigei." 
Matthew5:33 Kiogas kogeny kele kigemwachi ichek che bo keny, kelenji, Ameyosiechigei eng’ lembech, ago yachi Kiptaiyat kayosiosieguk:" 
Matthew5:34 ago amwawok ale, Amoyosie agot kitigin; agot agobo kipsengwet, amu ng’echeretab Jehovah noto;" 
Matthew5:35 anan agobo ng’ony, amu keldebesaikab kelyekyik; anan agobo Jerusalem, amu nganasetab Laitoriat ne o." 
Matthew5:36 Anan iyosie agobo meting’ung’, amu memuchi iyai sumeiyot agenge koleelit anan kotuuit." 
Matthew5:37 Ago ingoek ng’alaleng’wong’, Ee ko ee; Achicha ko achicha; ak kiy age tugul ne siirei chuto kobunu inendet ne ya." 
Matthew5:38 Kiogas kele, kigimwa kele, Konda eng’ konda, ak keldet eng’ keldet;" 
Matthew5:39 ago amwawok ale, Amogirinde ne ya; ago age tugul ne irabachin matandab tai, iweekyi age agine." 
Matthew5:40 Ak ngomutyin age tugul kapkiruok, komachei korebenen sumeng’ung’, ko ingoib ngorieng’ung’ agine." 
Matthew5:41 Ak age tugul ne birjinin iwe mailit agenge, obe tuwai mailisiek aeng’." 
Matthew5:42 Igochi inendet ne somin, ametuktochi batai inendet ne machei kobesenin." 
Matthew5:43 Kiogas kele kigimwa kele, Cham chitab kokweng’ung’, ak iwech bunyondeng’ung’:" 
Matthew5:44 ago amwawok ale, Ocham bunikwok, ak osachi ichek che usok;" 
Matthew5:45 si oegu werikab Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet; amu igochin asistanyi kochorji che yaach ak che miach, ak iyokyin ropta che bo imanda ak che ma bo imanda." 
Matthew5:46 Amu ngot ochame ichek che chamok, ko nee melekto ne otinye? Mayaei ko u noto agot taagikab aisurut?" 
Matthew5:47 Ak ngot ogati che otupche kityo, ko koyai nee ne siirei alak? Tos mayaei ko u noto agot Bororiosiek?" 
Matthew5:48 Noto anyun, oegu okwek che igesunotgei ko u ye igesunotgei Kwandang’wong’ ne bo kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:1 Oripge si moyai imandang’wong’ eng’ taitab bik, si kogeerok ichek; ngoyai ko u noto ko monyoru melekto eng’ Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:2 Noto anyun, ye igoite kagochinoiguk che bo rirenetab ge, ko mat iguut igondit eng’ taing’ung’, ko u ye yaei chombilik eng’ sunagogisiek ak ortinwek, si kobiit konyor kalosunet eng’ bik. Amwawok, iman, ale, Kagonyor ichek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:3 Ago ye igoite kagochinoik, ko mat konai eung’ung’ ne bo katam ne yaei eung’ung’ ne bo tai;" 
Matthew6:4 si kobiit kobunji ung’ot kagochinoiguk; ak kogonin melekto Kwandang’ung’ ne keerei eng’ ung’ot. 
Matthew6:5 Ak ye osae, ko moige chombilik; amu chamei ichek kosaei kotonondos eng’ sunagogisiek ak besiebor si kobiit kogeer bik ichek. Amwawok, iman, ale, Kagonyor ichek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:6 Ago inye, ye imache isa, iwe gong’ung’ orit, ak ye kaiger kurgeng’ung’, isa Kwandang’ung’ ne mi eng’ ung’ot, ak kogonin melekto Kwandang’ung’ ne keerei eng’ ung’ot." 
Matthew6:7 Ak ye osae, ko mat kotes ng’alekab buch, ko u ye yaei Bororiosiek; amu len kigasyin ichek amu chang’indab ng’alekwak." 
Matthew6:8 Noto anyun amoige ichek; amu ingen Kwandang’wong’ tuguk che obononi, kotom osom." 
Matthew6:9 Noto anyun osa ko u ni: Kwandanyo ne mi kipsengwet, Ingotililit kaineng’ung’." 
Matthew6:10 Ingonyo bounateng’ung’. Ingoyaak eng’ ng’ony mageng’ung’, ko u ye kiyaei eng’ kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:11 Konech rani amitwogikyok che bo ra. 
Matthew6:12 Ak inyoiywech kaat lelutikyok, ko u ye kinyochini kaat che lelwech." 
Matthew6:13 Amemutech ole mi yomset, ago soruech eng’ ne ya. [Amu neng’ung’ bounatet, ak kamuktaet, ak torornatet, agoi koigeny. Amen.]" 
Matthew6:14 Amu ngonyochini kaat bik kachiliilutikwak, konyoiywok kaat agine Kwandang’wong’ ne bo kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:15 Ago ngo monyochini kaat bik kachiliilutikwak, ko manyoiywok kaat agine Kwandang’wong’ kachiliilutikwok." 
Matthew6:16 Kogeny ye orugutge, ko moige chombilik, eng’ togochik che bo arogenet; amu walei togochikwak, si kogeer bik kole, koirugutgei. Amwawok, iman, ale, Kagonyor ichek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:17 Ago ye irugutge inye, iil meting’ung’ ak iun togeng’ung’:" 
Matthew6:18 si mageer bik kole irugutige, ago keerei Kwandang’ung’ ne mi eng’ ung’ot; ak kogonin melekto Kwandang’ung’ ne keerei eng’ ung’ot." 
Matthew6:19 Amogonorjige konoraik eng’ ng’ony, ole amei kiptorotinik ak karuotitoet, ak ole butei chorik ak kochor;" 
Matthew6:20 ago ogonorjige konoraik eng’ kipsengwet, ole maamei kiptorotinik anan karuotitoet, ak ole mabutei chorik ak kochor;" 
Matthew6:21 amu ole mi konorueng’ung’, komitei oloto muguleldang’ung’ agine." 
Matthew6:22 Taitab borto konda; noto anyun, ngo mie kondang’ung’, ko nyiitat bortang’ung’ komugul lapkeiyet." 
Matthew6:23 Ago ngo ya kondang’ung’, ko nyiitat bortang’ung’ komugul mesundeito. Noto anyun, ngot koek mesundeito lapkeiyet ne mi oring’ung’, ko o mesundeoto ne tia anyun!" 
Matthew6:24 Mami chi ne imuchi koot kiptainik aeng’; amu wechei age, ak kocham age: anan konamgei ak age, ak kosas age. Momuchi oot Jehovah ak magornatosiek." 
Matthew6:25 Amwawok anyun ale, Mogerer met agobo sobeng’wong’ eng’ che oame, anan che oee: anan agobo borwekwok, che olaachi. Tos masiirei sobondo amitwogik, ak masiirei borto ngoroik?" 
Matthew6:26 Ogeer taritik che bo barak: magolsei, ama kesisiei, ama iyumjin choge: ak kobaei ichek Kwandang’wong’ ne bo kipsengwet. Tos ma o koigoi okwek mising’ osiir ichek?" 
Matthew6:27 Ak imuchi ng’o ne kereri met eng’ okwek kotesyi koindanyi kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut? 
Matthew6:28 Ak amu nee anyun si ogerer met agobo ngoroik? Obwat taptok che bo kewet, ole bititoi; maboisiei, anan koletis:" 
Matthew6:29 ago amwawok ale, agot Solomon eng’ talbistanyi tugul ko kima kolumegei ko u age eng’ chu." 
Matthew6:30 Ago ngolaakyin Jehovah ko u noto suswek che bo kewet, che mi rani, ak mutai kewirji ma, ko tos, mayaiywok ko u noto kosiir, okwek che otinye kayanet ne ming’in?" 
Matthew6:31 Noto anyun amogerer met, ole, Kiame nee? Anan, Kiee nee? Anan, Kilaachi nee?" 
Matthew6:32 Amu cheng’ei tuguchu tugul Bororiosiek; amu ingen Kwandang’wong’ ne bo kipsengwet kole, obononi tuguchu tugul." 
Matthew6:33 Ago ocheng’ korok bounatennyi, ak imandanyi; si keteswok tuguchu tugul." 
Matthew6:34 Noto anyun amogerer met agobo mutai: amu kerere met mutaut agobo ge. Yamei betut yaitiennyi. 
Matthew7:1 Amoruoch, si magiruokwok." 
Matthew7:2 Amu kiruoget ne oruochi, ko tun kiruogunenok noto: ak eng’ kerutiet ne ogere, ko tun kigerunenok noto." 
Matthew7:3 Ak kalya si igeer betbetiat ne mi kondab ne otupche, ago ma ibwat bambaniat ne mi kondang’ung’ inyendet?" 
Matthew7:4 Anan imwachindoi ano ne otupche ilenjini, Inganemun betbetiat eng’ kondang’ung’; ak keero, mi kondang’ung’ inyendet bambaniat?" 
Matthew7:5 Ee, chombilindoni, icheru korok bambaniat eng’ kondang’ung’; si igeer anyun komie inemu betbetiat eng’ kondab ne otupche." 
Matthew7:6 Amogochi sesenik kit ne itabanat, anan owirji torok sonoek che tinyei kamanutiet ne o, si matiech eng’ kelyekwak, ak koweeigei kogererak." 
Matthew7:7 Osom, si kegonok; ocheng’, si onyoru; ogongony, si keyatwok:" 
Matthew7:8 amu age tugul ne somei, kigonin; ak ne cheng’ei, konyoru; ak inendet ne igongonyi, keyatyin." 
Matthew7:9 Anan mi ng’o eng’ okwek, ne ngo som werinnyi makatiat, kogochi koita;" 
Matthew7:10 anan ngo som njiriot, ko tos igochi erenet?" 
Matthew7:11 Ngot ongen okwek anyun, che o yaach, ogochi lagokwok kagochinoik che miach, ko tos siirei mising’ ne tia Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet, tos maigochin che somei inendet tuguk che miach?" 
Matthew7:12 Noto anyun tuguk tugul che omache koyaiywok bik, ko kanyol oyachi agichek ko u noto: amu chuto Ng’atutik ak maotik." 
Matthew7:13 Obun okwek kurget ne mariich: amu kurget ne baraa, ak oret ne tebees, noto ne wendi ng’emisiet, ak chang’ che bunei noto kot koit oloto." 
Matthew7:14 Amu marich kurget, ak ko bichii oret, ne wendi sobondo, ak ng’ering’ che nyoru." 
Matthew7:15 Oribege maotik che bo lembech, che bwanjinok eng’ ngoroik che bo kechirek, ago suik che amei bich." 
Matthew7:16 Onae ichek logoekwak. Tos iyumi bik sabibuk eng’ katok, anan logoekab mogoonik eng’ katablelinik?" 
Matthew7:17 U noto ketit age tugul ne mie, yiei logoek che miach; ago ketit ne ya koyiei logoek che yaach." 
Matthew7:18 Maimuchi ketit ne mie koi logoek che yaach, amaimuchi ketit ne ya koi logoek che miach." 
Matthew7:19 Ketit age tugul ne mayiei logoek che miach keebei, ak kewirji ma." 
Matthew7:20 Noto anyun onae ichek logoekwak. 
Matthew7:21 Maitei age tugul bounatetab kipsengwet ne lenjina, Kiptaiyandani, Kiptaiyandani; ago inendet ne yaei magetab Baba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew7:22 Lenjina che chang’ betunoto, Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, kima kiyai maonatet eng’ kaineng’ung’, ak kigion oik eng’ kaineng’ung’, ak kigiyai eng’ kaineng’ung’ boisionik che chang’ che bo kimnatet?" 
Matthew7:23 Ak amwachi anyun ichek eng’ yoto kotook, alenji, Mangenok koboch agoi: oistoenage okwek che oyae yaitio." 
Matthew7:24 Noto anyun age tugul ne kasei ng’alechuchuk, ak koyai, kiyanie chito ne ng’om, ne kiteech gonnyi ruandet barak:" 
Matthew7:25 ak kirobon, ak kibwa mogochek, ak kius usonaik, ak korieb goyoto; ama iluul: amu kigiteech ruandet barak." 
Matthew7:26 Ak age tugul ne kasei ng’alechuchuk, ama yaei, kiyanie chito ne berber, ne kiteech gonnyi ng’aniek:" 
Matthew7:27 ak kirobon, ak kibwa mogochek, ak kius usonaik, ak korieb goyoto; ak kiluul: ak kieet lulennyi." 
Matthew7:28 Ak ye kingoges Jesu ng’alechu, kokwong’io tuiyosiek amu konetisiennyi:" 
Matthew7:29 amu kiinet ko u ne tinyei kimnatet, ama u sirikwak." 
Matthew8:1 Ak ye kingochorgei eng’ tulwet, kosub inendet tuiyosiek che eechen." 
Matthew8:2 Ak ogeero, kinyonji chi ne kiamei mogondosik ak kogutung’ji kole, Kiptaiyandani, ngicham, imuchi itilila." 
Matthew8:3 Ak kiito eunnyi, ak kotwa inendet, kole, Kaacham; tililitu. Ak kitililit chichoto eng’ sainato eng’ mogondosik." 
Matthew8:4 Ak kimwachi Jesu kolenji, Ripge si memwachi chi; ago ui, iborjige tisiindet, ak igoite kagochinet ne king’at Musa, si koek baornatet eng’ ichek." 
Matthew8:5 Ak ye kingo kagomong’ji Kapernaum, konyonji kiptaiyatab bogol kogaigai," 
Matthew8:6 kole, Kiptaiyandani, miani otwogindennyu eng’ ga, kasat mising’, meat borto." 
Matthew8:7 Ak kilenji, Si anyo asoob inendet." 
Matthew8:8 Ak kiwolji kiptaiyandanato bo bogol kole, Kiptaiyandani, manyoljina inyo gonnyu: ago mwa ng’olyot kityo, si kosob otwogindennyu." 
Matthew8:9 Amu a chi agane ne kiboiywa, ak atinye askarik che abou: ak ngamwachi ni, alenji, Ui, kwo; ak ngamwachi age, alenji, Nyo, konyo; ak ngamwachi otwogindennyu, alenji, Yai ni, koyai." 
Matthew8:10 Ak ye kingogas Jesu, kokwong’, ak kolenji ichek che kiisubi, Amwawok, iman, ale, Tom anyoru kayanet ne te ni agot eng’ Israel." 
Matthew8:11 Ak amwawok ale, bwanei che chang’ eng’ kong’asis ak cherongo, kobwa kotebi ak Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo, eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet:" 
Matthew8:12 ago kitoorjin werik che bo bounatet mesundeito ne bo sang’: ole mi rirek ak nyeetab kelek. 
Matthew8:13 Kilenji anyun Jesu kiptaiyandanato, Ui oldang’ung’, ingeyaun ko u ye kaiyan. Ak kisob eng’ sainato otwogindennyi." 
Matthew8:14 Ak ye kingo kakwo Jesu gotab Petero, kogeer kametab osotiotab Petero koruei koamei eset." 
Matthew8:15 Ak kitwa eunnyi, ak kobagakta eset inendet; ak king’eet koboisiechi." 
Matthew8:16 Ak ye kimachei koimen, komutyi ichek che chang’ che tinyei oik: ak koon tamirmirik eng’ ng’olyot, ak kosoob tugul che kimiandos:" 
Matthew8:17 si kobiit kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia, kole, Kinam inendet nyalulnatennyo ak koib mianwekyok." 
Matthew8:18 Ak kingogeer Jesu tuiyosiek che eechen koga yiem inendet, kong’at kolanda bitonin." 
Matthew8:19 Ak kinyo sirindet age, ak kolenji, Konetindoni, asubin eng’ ui tugul ole iwendi." 
Matthew8:20 Ak kilenji Jesu, Tinyei lelwek keringonik, ak tinyei taritik che bo barak kesonok; ago matinyei Weritab chi ole indoi metinnyi." 
Matthew8:21 Ak kimwachi age ne bo alamalyet kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, chamwa korok awa atub baba." 
Matthew8:22 Ago kilenji Jesu, Isubwa, bagakte che begu kotub chechuak che begu." 
Matthew8:23 Ak kingo kagolany moingetab beek, kosub inendet alamalyennyi." 
Matthew8:24 Ak ogeero, king’eet usonet ne o eng’ nyanjet, kot komaluuch mildaetab ge ne bo beek moinget: ago kiinuuchi inendet." 
Matthew8:25 Kibwa anyun kong’eet inendet, kolenji, Soruech, Kiptaiyandani; kagibegu." 
Matthew8:26 Ak kilenji, Kalya si oiywei, okwek che otinye kayanet ne ming’in? King’eet anyun koger kong’ usonaik ak nyanjet; ak kiimung’do anyun mising’ nyanjet." 
Matthew8:27 Ago kikwong’io bik, kole, Chi nee chichi, amu kase it inendet agot usonaik ak nyanjet?" 
Matthew8:28 Ak ye kingo kagoit bitonin emetab Gadarenes, kotuiyo ak inendet bik aeng’ che kitinyei oik, kobunu oldab kererisiek; ki koromen mising’, kot ko kima komuchi chi kosiir oranato." 
Matthew8:29 Ak ogeero, kiwaach, kole, Kiting’ege nee ak inye, Weritab Jehovah? Kenyo yu inyalilech kotom koit betut?" 
Matthew8:30 Ak kiagete ole kima ko negite ichek akwet ne bo torok che chang’. 
Matthew8:31 Ak kisom inendet oik, kole, Ngionech kemande, iyoktech kechut akwet ne bo torok." 
Matthew8:32 Ak kilenji ichek, Oba. Ak kimanda koba kochut torok: ak ogeero, kiruai mising’ akwet komugul kochortaegei chemng’esut koba nyanjet, ak kobekyi beek." 
Matthew8:33 Ak kimwei che kiiyagi torochoto koba nganaset, ak komwaita kiy age tugul, ak kit ne kiga keyachi che kitinyei oik." 
Matthew8:34 Ak ogeero, kimong’ sang’ nganaset komugul kotuiyo ak Jesu: ak kingogeer inendet, kosom kwo eng’ tabanwekwak." 
Matthew9:1 Kilany anyun moingetab beek, ak kolanda, koit nganasennyi." 
Matthew9:2 Ak ogeero, kigimutyi inendet chito ne miani, ne meat borto, korue itogut: ak ye kigeer Jesu kayanenywa, kolenji ne meat borto, Weri, nyiganitu; kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk." 
Matthew9:3 Ak ogeero, kimwa alak che bo sirik eng’ mugulelwekwak kole, Mwaei chichi ng’alek che yaachen agobo Jehovah." 
Matthew9:4 Kole Jesu, Kalya si obwat yaitiet eng’ mugulelwekwok? Amu kiingen kabwatutikwak." 
Matthew9:5 Amu, nee ne nyamnyum, ngemwa kele, Kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk; anan ngemwa kele, Ng’eet, ak iwendote?" 
Matthew9:6 Ago si onai ole tinyei kimnatet Weritab chi eng’ ng’ony konyochi kaat bik tengekwogik (kolenji anyun ne meat borto), Ng’eet, ib itogung’ung’ ak iwe gong’ung’." 
Matthew9:7 King’eet anyun, ak kwo gonnyi." 
Matthew9:8 Ago ye kingogeer tuiyosiek, koiywei, ak kolos Jehovah, ne igochin chi kimnatet ne u noto." 
Matthew9:9 Ak kingosiirto Jesu eng’ oloto, kogeer chito, ne kiguure Matayo, kotebe ole kitaage aisurut: ak kilenji, Isubwa. Kong’eet anyun, ak kosub." 
Matthew9:10 Ye kiamisiei Jesu eng’ go, ogeero, kobwa taagik che chang’ che bo aisurut ak kiptengeginik, ak kotebi koboto Jesu ak alamalyennyi." 
Matthew9:11 Ak ye kingogeer Parisaik, kolenji alamalyennyi, Amu nee si koamisiei Konetindeng’wong’ ak taagik che bo aisurut ak kiptengeginik?" 
Matthew9:12 Ago kingogas, kolenji, Mamachei che chamegei chepkerichot, ago che miandos." 
Matthew9:13 Ago oba okwek, si onetge ole teptoi ng’olyondoni, Amache rirenetab ge, mamache tiseiywo: amu kima anyo aguur che bo imanda, ago kiptengeginik." 
Matthew9:14 Kibwanji anyun alamalyetab Johana ak kolenji, Amu nee si kirugutige achek ak Parisaik konyil che chang’, ago mairugutegei alamalyeng’ung’?" 
Matthew9:15 Ak kilenji Jesu, Imuchi ichek che kogiguurji katunisiet koarogenso, kota komi ak sandet? Ago bwanei betusiek, che tun kiistoe sandet ichek, ak korugutgei anyun." 
Matthew9:16 Ak maindoi chi akwot ne leel ngoriet ne os; amu kereri akwot ne leel ngoriet ne os, ak koyait kosiir ole kagerer." 
Matthew9:17 Amaindoi bik divaik che leelach lolotinwek che osen: amu kereri lolotinwek, ak kotumdagei divaik, ak kobek lolotinwek: ago kindoi divaik lolotinwek che leelach, ak kotebi tuwai." 
Matthew9:18 Kingota komwachin ichek ng’alechu, ogeero, kinyo bounindo, ak kong’urukyi inendet, ak kole, Kagome cheptanyu ngunito: ago nyo igonoor inendet eung’ung’, si kosob." 
Matthew9:19 Ak king’eet Jesu, kosub inendet, ak kiisub alamalyennyi agichek." 
Matthew9:20 Ogeero, kobogoriot, ne kimandae korotik eng’ kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, kiisubu Jesu eng’ let, ak kotwa tabandab ngoriennyi:" 
Matthew9:21 amu kimwa eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Ngot atwa kityo ngoriennyi, asobe." 
Matthew9:22 Ago kiwelelgei Jesu kogeer inendet, ak kole, Chebi, nyiganitu; kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’. Ak kisob kobogoriot koboch sainato." 
Matthew9:23 Ak kingoit Jesu gotab bounindet, ak kogeer bik che kuutei ndurerusiek, ak bik che sololendos," 
Matthew9:24 kolenji, Oistege: amu ma me chepto, ago inuuchi. Ak kirorechi inendet kochot." 
Matthew9:25 Ago kingo kageon tuiyet koba sang’, kwo go, ak konam eutab cheboto; ak kong’eet inendet." 
Matthew9:26 Ak kiyesto ng’olyondonoto eng’ emonoto komugul. 
Matthew9:27 Ak kingosiirto Jesu kwo eng’ oloto, kosub inendet kipkoratinik aeng’, kowaagoti kolen, Rireneige, ee weritab Daudi." 
Matthew9:28 Ak kingo kakwa go, kobwanji inendet kipkoratinichoto: ak kolenji Jesu, Oyani ole amuchi ayai nito? Kolenji, Wei, Kiptaiyandani." 
Matthew9:29 Kotwa anyun konyekwak, ak kole, Ingoyaak eng’ okwek ko u kayaneng’wong’." 
Matthew9:30 Ak kiyatogis konyekwak. Ak king’at Jesu mising’, kolenji, Orib amongonai chi." 
Matthew9:31 Ago kiba, ak koiyestaat ng’olyot agobo inendet eng’ emonoto komugul." 
Matthew9:32 Ak ye kita kobendi, ogeero, kigimutyi inendet chi ne namat kut ne kitinyei oindet." 
Matthew9:33 Ak kingo kageon oindet, kotwek ne namat kut: ak kikwong’io tuiyosiek, kole, Kitom kegeerei ne u ni eng’ Israel." 
Matthew9:34 Ago kimwa Parisaik, kole, Onei oik eng’ ne o ne bo oik." 
Matthew9:35 Ak kiwendote Jesu nganasok tugul, che eechen ak che mengechen, konetisioti eng’ sunagogisiekwak, ak koamdaati logoiywek che miach che bo bounatet, ak kosobooti che miandos eng’ koroito age tugul, ak eng’ nyalulnatet age tugul." 
Matthew9:36 Ago ye kingogeer tuiyosiek, koriregei ichek, amu ki nyerotin ak koiyestootin, ko u kechirek che matinyei mestowot." 
Matthew9:37 Kilenji anyun alamalyennyi, O kesisiet iman, ago ng’ering’ kiboitinik." 
Matthew9:38 Noto anyun osa Kiptaiyat ne bo kesisiet, si kobiit koyokyi kiboitinik kesisiennyi." 
Matthew10:1 Ak kiguur alamalyennyi taman ak aeng’ kobwanji inendet, ak kogochi kimnatet si koon tamirmirik che muruonen, ak kosoob che miandos eng’ koroito age tugul ak eng’ nyalulnatet age tugul." 
Matthew10:2 Chu kainaik che bo che kiyoktoi taman ak aeng’: Ne bo tai ko Simon ne kiguure Petero, ak Andrea ng’etab kamet; Jakobo weritab Sebedi, ak Johana ng’etab kamet;" 
Matthew10:3 Pilipu, ak Bartolamayo; Tomas, ak Matayo taagindetab aisurut; Jakobo weritab Alpayo, ak Tadayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simon Kananindet, ak Judas Iskariot, ne king’wektoi inendet." 
Matthew10:5 Kiiyokto Jesu chuto taman ak aeng’, ak kong’at ichek, kolenji, Amobe oret age tugul ne bo Bororiosiek, amobe nganaset age tugul ne bo bikab Samaria:" 
Matthew10:6 ago kaigai obe ole mi kechirek che betyotin che bo gotab Israel. 
Matthew10:7 Ak ye obendi, oamde ole, Kagorik bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew10:8 Osoob che miandos, ong’eet che kigobek, otilil che tinyei mogondosik, oon oik: kaonyoru buch, ogoite buch." 
Matthew10:9 Amocheng’jige tahabu, anan feda, anan senteisiek eng’ lolotinwekwok;" 
Matthew10:10 anan lolet ne bo oret, anan sumotik aeng’, anan kweonik, anan kirokto: amu nyoljin kiboitiot amitwogikyik." 
Matthew10:11 Ak ocheng’ chito ne nyolu eng’ nganaset age tugul, ne o anan ne ming’in, ne omong’jini; si otebe oloto agoi obe." 
Matthew10:12 Ak ye obe go, ogat." 
Matthew10:13 Ak ngo nyolu goyoto, ongotebe kalyeng’wong’: ago ngo ma nyolu, ko ingoweekyogei kalyeng’wong’." 
Matthew10:14 Ak age tugul ne mataachok, anan kogas ng’alekwok, ko ye omande eng’ goyoto anan nganasanato, olelekte temburiek eng’ kelyekwok." 
Matthew10:15 Amwawok, iman, ale, Kaigaitu emetab Sodom ak Gomora eng’ betutab kiruoget kosiir nganasanato." 
Matthew10:16 Ogeero, ayoktook ko u kechirek eng’ kwenutab suik: noto anyun ong’omegitu ko u erenok, ak otaloitu ko u cheptugenik." 
Matthew10:17 Ago oribege bik: amu imutyinok kapkiruoget, ak kobirenok kipcharitisiek eng’ sunagogisiekwak;" 
Matthew10:18 ak kimutyinok taitab bounik ak laitorinik agobo ane, si koek baornatet eng’ ichek ak eng’ Bororiosiek." 
Matthew10:19 Ago ye igoitook, ko mogerer met agobo ole ong’alaldoi, ak kit ne omwae: amu kigonok eng’ sainato ne omwae." 
Matthew10:20 Amu ma okwek che ong’alali, ago Tamirmirietab Kwandang’wong’ ne ng’alali eng’ okwek." 
Matthew10:21 Ak kong’wekta chito ng’etab kamet kong’wekyi meet, ak kong’wekta kwanda lakwennyi: ak kong’eetyi lagok sigikwak, ak kogoito kebar." 
Matthew10:22 Ak kowechok bik tugul agobo kainennyu: ago inendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet kesoru. 
Matthew10:23 Ago ye usok eng’ nganasani omwechi age: amu amwawok iman ale, Mobendi ogesu nganasok che bo Israel, ama it Weritab chi." 
Matthew10:24 Masiirei ne kineti, konetindennyi, ama siirei otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi." 
Matthew10:25 Yamei koteb ne kineti ko u konetindennyi, ak kotebi otwogindet ko u kiptaiyandennyi. Ak ngo kuure ichek Beelsebul chitab kobo got, kotam nee ichek che bo gonnyi!" 
Matthew10:26 Moiywei ichek anyun amu noto: amu mami kiy ne tugot, ne matun king’anyei; ama mi kiy ne ung’at ne matun naoksei." 
Matthew10:27 Ne amwawok eng’ mesundeito, ong’alalde eng’ lapkeiyet: ak kit ne ogase eng’ itit, omwaite eng’ gorik barak." 
Matthew10:28 Amoiywei ichek che barei borto, ago maimuchi kobar sobondo: ago kaigai oiywei inendet ne imuchi kong’em sobondo koboto borto eng’ Gehenna." 
Matthew10:29 Magialdae taritik aeng’ che mengechen kebebertab taman ne bo denarit? Amaibutyin ng’ony agenge eng’ ichek ama chamji Kwandang’wong’: 
Matthew10:30 ago iitotin agot sumeek tugul che bo metowekwok. 
Matthew10:31 Noto anyun amoiywei; osiire taritik che mengechen che chang’. 
Matthew10:32 Noto anyun age tugul ne ibortoa eng’ taitab bik, abortoi agine eng’ taitab Baba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew10:33 Ago age tugul ne esioa eng’ taitab bik, aesioi inendet agine eng’ taitab Baba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew10:34 Molen kianyo aipchi ng’ony kalyet: kima anyo aipchi kalyet, ago rotwetab chok." 
Matthew10:35 Amu kianyo atoiye chi ak kwanda, ak chepto ak kamet, ak osotiotab werit ak kametab werit:" 
Matthew10:36 egu bunikab chi bikyik. 
Matthew10:37 Inendet ne chamei kwanda anan kamet kosiira ko manyoljina; ak inendet ne chamei werit anan cheptanyi kosiira ko manyoljina. 
Matthew10:38 Ak inendet ne maibei kimurtoiyondennyi ak kosubwa, ko manyoljina." 
Matthew10:39 Inendet ne ribei sobondanyi kobeeti; ak inendet ne ibeeti sobondanyi agobo ane ko tun nyoru. 
Matthew10:40 Inendet ne taachok ko kataacha, ak inendet ne taacha ko kataach ne kiiyokwa." 
Matthew10:41 Inendet ne taachei maotio eng’ kainetab maotio konyoru melektab maotio; ak inendet ne taachei chi ne bo iman eng’ kainetab chito ne bo iman konyoru melektab chito ne bo iman. 
Matthew10:42 Ak age tugul ne igochin agenge eng’ chu mengechen kikombet ne bo beek che kaitit kityo eng’ kainetab alamalyet, amwawok, iman, ale, Mabetyin melektanyi matiny." 
Matthew11:1 Ak ye kingo kagong’at Jesu alamalyennyi taman ak aeng’ koges, kwo eng’ oloto konetisiot ak koamdoi eng’ nganasokwak." 
Matthew11:2 Ak kingogas Johana eng’ korgoret boisiosiek che bo Kristo, koyoktae alamalyennyi aeng’ ng’olyo," 
Matthew11:3 ak koteebe inendet kole, Tos i inendet ne nyonei, anan kiganye age?" 
Matthew11:4 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Oba bandang’wong’, ak omwachi Johana tuguk che ogase ak che ogeere:" 
Matthew11:5 keertoi che koriotin, ak kobendoti che solomonik, kitilili che amei mogondosik, ak kastoi che ming’otin, ak king’eeti che kigobek, ak keamjin kibananok logoiywek che miach." 
Matthew11:6 Ak baibai age tugul ne manyorunena kanagut eng’ ui tugul. 
Matthew11:7 Ak ye kita kobendi chu bandanywa, kotoi Jesu komwachi tuiyosiek agobo Johana kolenji, Kiomande surkwen ogeer nee? Tegat ne itumdumi usonet?" 
Matthew11:8 Kiomande ogeer nee? Chito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero, ichek che ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen komi gorikab laitorinik." 
Matthew11:9 Ago kilya si omande? Si kobiit ogeer maotiot? Ee, amwawok ale, siirei inendet maotiot." 
Matthew11:10 Nito ko inendet, ne kigisir kele, Keero, ayoktoi kiboitiondennyu kondoenen, Ne chobei oreng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’." 
Matthew11:11 Amwawok, iman, ale, Tom kobiit ne siirei Johana Kabatisanindet eng’ che kisich kobogorisiek: ago inendet ne ming’in mising’ eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet ko o kosiir inendet." 
Matthew11:12 Ak koboch betusiek che bo Johana Kabatisanindet agoi nguno koruachin bik bounatetab kipsengwet, ak namei bik che koromen eng’ kimnatet." 
Matthew11:13 Amu kimaotenso maotik tugul ak Ng’atutik agoi koit betusiekab Johana. 
Matthew11:14 Ak ngochame otaach ko u noto, ko Elija nito, ne nyonei." 
Matthew11:15 Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Matthew11:16 Ago aroge nee ibini? Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet, che kuurei siritoikwak," 
Matthew11:17 ak kole, Kigeguutwak ndurerusiek, ak kima oureren; kigiteeye ak kima oririe." 
Matthew11:18 Amu kinyo Johana ak kima amis anan koeeiso, ak kole bik, Tinyei oindet." 
Matthew11:19 Kinyo Weritab chi koamis ak koeeiso, ak kole bik, Ogeero, chito ne kipkeiya, ak eeindetab divaik, choruetab taagikab aisurut ak kiptengeginik. Ak naat ng’omnatet kele bo iman eng’ boisionikyik." 
Matthew11:20 Kitoi anyun koger kong’ nganasok che kigiyae boisionikyik che bo kamuktaet, che chang’ kosiir, amu kima sik." 
Matthew11:21 Bwa we, Korasin! Bwa we, Betsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng’ Turo ak Sidon boisionik che bo kamuktaet che kigiyai eng’ okwek, ta kiga kosik keny, kolaach kuniok ak koiilegei orek." 
Matthew11:22 Ago amwawok ale, kaigaitu tun Turo ak Sidon eng’ betutab kiruoget, kosiirok." 
Matthew11:23 Ak inye, Kapernaum, ko tos kitororin agoi kipsengwet? Ichortoige agoi oldab che kigobek: amu nda kiga kiyai eng’ Sodom boisionik che bo kamuktaet che kigiyai eng’ inye, ko ta mi agoi rani." 
Matthew11:24 Ago amwawok ale, tun kaigaitu emetab Sodom eng’ betutab kiruoget, kosiirin." 
Matthew11:25 Eng’ betusiechoto kowol Jesu kole, Amwaun kongoi, we Baba, Kiptaiyatab kipsengwet ak ng’ony, amu kiiung’e tuguchu che ng’omen ak che iguitos, ak kiing’ang’ji manyurunik:" 
Matthew11:26 ee, Baba, amu kiicham inye ko u noto." 
Matthew11:27 Kigogona tuguk tugul Baba: ama mi ne ingen Werit, kobate Kwanda; ama mi ne ingen Kwanda kobate Werit, ak chi age tugul ne chamei Werit kong’ang’jin." 
Matthew11:28 Obwanja, okwek tugul che oiimige, ak che olae tuguk che nyigisen, si amuung’wok." 
Matthew11:29 Otiiny kaat choginnyu ak onetenage; amu a tala ak aming’inige eng’ muguleldo: si osich kamuung’et eng’ sobonwekwok. 
Matthew11:30 Amu nyamnyum choginnyu, ak wisis milennyu." 
Matthew12:1 Eng’ betusiechoto kobun Jesu mbarenikab bek eng’ betutab sabato; ak kiamei rubet alamalyennyi, ak kitoi kobach mesisekab bek, koam." 
Matthew12:2 Ago ye kingogeer Parisaik, kolenji inendet, Keero, yaei alamalyeng’ung’ ne ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik keyai eng’ sabato." 
Matthew12:3 Ago kilenji ichek, Tom osoman kit ne kiyai Daudi ye kiamei rubo, ak che kimi ak inendet:" 
Matthew12:4 ye kingwo gotab Jehovah, ak koam makatinikab kabartaet, che kima ko chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik koam inendet, agot che kimi koboto inendet, kobate tisiik ichegei?" 
Matthew12:5 Anan tom osoman eng’ Ng’atutik, kele, ing’waniti tisiik sabato eng’ betutab sabato eng’ hekalut, ama kiityin ichek tengekto?" 
Matthew12:6 Ago amwawok ale, mi eng’ oli ne o kosiir hekalut." 
Matthew12:7 Ago ngo kionai ole teptoi ni, Amache rirenetab ge, mamache tiseiywo, ta kama ogikyini che matinyei tengek." 
Matthew12:8 Amu kiptaiyat ne bo sabato Weritab chi. 
Matthew12:9 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto, agoi sunagoginywa orit:" 
Matthew12:10 ak ogeero, kimi chi ne resot eut. Ak kiteebe ichek inendet, kolenji, Tos chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik kisoob chi eng’ betutab sabato? Si kobiit kong’ach inendet." 
Matthew12:11 Ak kilenji ichek, Ngoro chi eng’ okwek, ne tinyei kechiriet agenge, ak ngot kororokyi keringet betutab sabato, ko tos masutu komong’?" 
Matthew12:12 Siirtoot anyun ne tia chito eng’ kechiriet! Noto anyun, chamdaat keyai ne mie eng’ betutab sabato." 
Matthew12:13 Kimwachi anyun chito kolenji, Iite eung’ung’. Ak kiito: ak kosob, koigei eut nin age." 
Matthew12:14 Ago kimanda anyun Parisaik, ak koruoch agobo inendet, ole bartoi." 
Matthew12:15 Ak kingonai Jesu, kwo eng’ oloto: ak kiisub inendet che chang’; ak kiisoob ichek tugul," 
Matthew12:16 ak king’at ichek kole, si maibarta inendet:" 
Matthew12:17 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot Isaia, kole," 
Matthew12:18 Ogeero, otwogindennyu ne kialewen; Chamanennyu ne baibai sobondanyu eng’ inendet: Andoi inendet Tamirmiriennyu, Si komwachi Bororiosiek kiruoget." 
Matthew12:19 Matiitos, anan kobol; Ama kasei chi kutinnyi eng’ ortinwekab nganaset." 
Matthew12:20 Mairiei tegat ne chisot, Ama imisi inendet kitambit ne iyeni, Kot koyokto kiruoget ne iterterisie." 
Matthew12:21 Ak imang’u Bororiosiek kainennyi. 
Matthew12:22 Kigimutyi anyun chito ne kitinyei oindet, ne korat ak ko namat kut: ak kiisoob inendet, kot kong’alal ak kogeerto chito ne namat kut." 
Matthew12:23 Kokwong’io anyun tuiyosiek tugul, ak kole, Tos weritab Daudi nito?" 
Matthew12:24 Ago kingogas Parisaik, kole, Maonei chichi oik, kobate eng’ Beelsebul ne o ne bo oik." 
Matthew12:25 Ak kingonai inendet kabwatutikwak kolenji, Ng’emaksei bororiet age tugul ne pchegei; ama tononi nganaset anan got age tugul ne pchegei:" 
Matthew12:26 ak ngo on Setani Setani, ko kapcheigei inegei; tonondoi ano anyun bororiennyi?" 
Matthew12:27 Ak ndaone oik eng’ Beelsebul, koonei eng’ ng’o werikwok? Noto anyun egu ichek che iruokwok." 
Matthew12:28 Ago ngaone oik eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ko kagoitwak anyun bounatetab Jehovah." 
Matthew12:29 Anan imuktoi ano kwo chi gotab chito ne kim, si korebe tugukyik ngot ko ma rat korok chito ne kim? Si kouur anyun gonnyi." 
Matthew12:30 Inendet ne magimi tuwai kogirindaa; ak inendet ne magiyumi tuwai koiyestooti. 
Matthew12:31 Noto anyun amwawok ale, Kinyochin kaat bik tengekto age tugul ak ng’olyot age tugul ne ya, ago che mwaei ng’olyo ne ya agobo Tamirmiriet, ko maginyochin kaat." 
Matthew12:32 Ak age tugul ne mwaitoe yaitio Weritab chi, kenyochin kaat; ago age tugul ne mwaitoe yaitio Tamirmiriet, ko maginyochin kaat, agot eng’ ng’onyuni anan eng’ noto nyonei." 
Matthew12:33 Anan oyai ketit komieit, ak logoekyik; anan oyai ketit koyait, ak logoekyik; amu kinae ketit logoekyik." 
Matthew12:34 Okwek lagokab erenok che ng’wonen, omuktoi ano okwek, che o yaach, omwa tuguk che miach? Amu ng’alali kutit che nyiitat muguleldo." 
Matthew12:35 Ibune chi ne mie tuguk che miach konoruennyi ne mie: ak ibune chi ne ya tuguk che yaach konoruennyi ne ya. 
Matthew12:36 Ak amwawok ale, ng’olyot age tugul ne bo buch ne mwaei bik, ko tun tetu tuguchoto eng’ betutab kiruoget." 
Matthew12:37 Amu kiityinin imanda eng’ ng’aleguk, ak kigikyinin eng’ ng’aleguk." 
Matthew12:38 Kiwolji anyun alak che bo sirik ak Parisaik, kolenji, Konetindoni, kimache kegeer kaborunet ne iboruech." 
Matthew12:39 Ago kiwolji kolenji, Ibinda ne ya ne bo ibetab ge ne cheng’ei kaborunet; ak magigochin kaborunet kobate kaborunetab maotiot Jona:" 
Matthew12:40 amu ko u ye kimi Jona betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok moetab njiriot ne o mising’: ko u noto tun tebe Weritab chi betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok eng’ muguleldo ne bo ng’ony. 
Matthew12:41 Tun tonondos murenik che bo Ninebe koboto ibini eng’ kiruoget, ak kogikyi: amu kisik eng’ mwaitaet ne bo Jona; ak ogeero, mi yu ne o kosiir Jona." 
Matthew12:42 Ng’eetei tun laitoriat kobogoriot ne bo murot komostab tai koboto ibini eng’ kiruoget, ak kogikyi: amu kibun tabanwekab ng’ony si kogas ng’omnatetab Solomon; ak ogeero, mi yu ne o kosiir Solomon." 
Matthew12:43 Ago ye kagomong’une chi tamirmiriet ne muruon, kwo kobunot oldinwek che yaamnyotin, kocheng’oti ole imuung’e, amanyor." 
Matthew12:44 Yeityo komwa kole, Kaweekyigei gonnyu ole kiamong’une: ak ye kingonyo, konyor ko mami kiy, ak kobugot, ak ko chobot." 
Matthew12:45 Kwo anyun komut tamirmirik alak tisab che yaach kosiir inendet, ak kochut ak komeny oloto: ak eng’ let koyaitu atebetab chichoto kosiir ne ki bo tai. Egu ko u noto agine eng’ ibini ya." 
Matthew12:46 Kingota kong’alaljin tuiyosiek, ogeero, kitonondos eng’ sang’ kamet ak che tupcho, kocheng’ei kong’alalji inendet." 
Matthew12:47 Ak kimwachi anyun chito age kolenji, Keero, tononi eng’ sang’ komet ak che otupche, cheng’ei kong’alalun." 
Matthew12:48 Ago kiwolji chito ne kimwachin inendet, kolenji, Ng’o kamennyu ak che kitupche?" 
Matthew12:49 Ak koiito eunnyi kotokyi alamalyennyi, ak kole, Ogeero, chu kamennyu ak che kitupche!" 
Matthew12:50 Amu age tugul ne yaei magetab Baba ne mi kipsengwet, noto werit ne kitupche ak chepto ne kitupche, ak kamennyu." 
Matthew13:1 Kiwa Jesu betunoto komanda eng’ got, kwo kotebe ngegutab araraita." 
Matthew13:2 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet tuiyosiek che eechen, kolany moingetab beek anyun, ak koteb ng’ony: ak kitonone tuiyet komugul ngegut." 
Matthew13:3 Ak kimwachi ichek tuguk che chang’ eng’ kalewenaik, kolenji, Ogeero, kiwa kolindet koleta;" 
Matthew13:4 ak kingota koletoi, kobutyi keswek alak tabandab oret, ak kibwa taritik koam:" 
Matthew13:5 ak kiibutyi alak ole mi koik, ole kima kotinyei ng’ung’unyek che chang’: ak kobityo ngunoto amu kima ko tia ng’ung’unyek." 
Matthew13:6 Ak kingochor asista, komel; ak kiresyo amu kima kotinyei tigitik." 
Matthew13:7 Ak kiibutyi alak katok; ak kobityo katok, ak kogiich:" 
Matthew13:8 ak kiibutyi alak ng’ung’unyek che miach, ak koiyo, alak bogol, alak tamanwogik lo, ak alak sosom." 
Matthew13:9 Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoi, kogas." 
Matthew13:10 Ak kibwa alamalyet, ak kolenji, Kalya si ing’alalji ichek eng’ kalewenaik?" 
Matthew13:11 Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji, Kagegonok onai ung’otik che bo bounatetab kipsengwet, ago ma kigochi ichek." 
Matthew13:12 Amu age tugul ne tinyei, ko tun kigochin, si konyor che chang’ kosiir: ago age tugul ne matinyei, kerebe agot che katinyei." 
Matthew13:13 Noto anyun ang’alaljini eng’ kalewanaik; amu nganda keertoi, ko mageerei kiy, ak kastoi, ama kasei kiy, anan koguiyo." 
Matthew13:14 Ak isuldaat eng’ ichek maoinatetab Isaia, ne len, Eng’ kaset ogase, ago moguitosi agot kitigin; Ak eng’ keeret ogeere, ago mobestosi agot kitigin:" 
Matthew13:15 Amu kwalilenotin mugulelwekab bichu, Ak magastoi komie itikwak, Ak kiger ichek konyekwak; Si mageer eng’ konyekwak, Anan kogas eng’ itikwak, Anan koguiyo eng’ mugulelwekwak, Si koweek kogeny, Ak asoob ichek." 
Matthew13:16 Ago boiboen konyekwok, amu keertoi; ak itikwok, amu kastoi." 
Matthew13:17 Amu amwawok iman, ale, kimach maotik che chang’ ak bik che chang’ che bo imanda kogeer tuguk che ogeere, ago kima keer; ak kimach kogas ng’alek che ogase, ago kima kas." 
Matthew13:18 Ogas anyun okwek kalewenet ne bo kolindet. 
Matthew13:19 Ye kasei chi age tugul ng’olyotab bounatet, ama iguiyo, konyo anyun inendet ne ya, ak korebe ne kaga kelechi muguleldanyi. Nito ne kigilechi tabandab oret." 
Matthew13:20 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ole mi koik, nito inendet ne kasei ng’olyot ak kotaach ngunoto eng’ boiboiyet;" 
Matthew13:21 ago matinyei tigitik inendet, ago tebyei ne matia; ak ye kanyo nyalilda anan usisiet agobo ng’olyot, kinach anyun ngunoto." 
Matthew13:22 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ole mi katok, ko inendet ne kasei ng’olyot; ak kogiich ng’olyot kererwekab met che bo ng’ony, ak kaberberisiet ne bo magornatet, si mai." 
Matthew13:23 Ak inendet ne kigilechi ng’ung’unyek che miach, ko inendet ne kasei ng’olyot, ak koguiyo; ne yiei logoek iman, alak bogol, alak tamanwogik lo, alak sosom." 
Matthew13:24 Kiiborji kalewenet age kolenji, Kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak chito ne kigolji keswek che miach mbarennyi:" 
Matthew13:25 ago, ye kita koruitos bik, konyo bunyondennyi ak kogolji chemulbainik ole mi bek, ak kwo." 
Matthew13:26 Ago kingobit suswot, ak koi bek, kotook agichek chemulbainik." 
Matthew13:27 Ak kibwa otwogik che bo chitab got ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, kima igolji keswek che miach mbareng’ung’? Kibun ano anyun chemulbainik?" 
Matthew13:28 Ak kilenji ichek, Kiyaei noto bunyot. Ak kilenji otwogik, Tos imache kebe kitutote?" 
Matthew13:29 Ago kile, Achicha; si ma ye otuti chemulbainik, otutunde bek." 
Matthew13:30 Ingobityo tugul agoi kesisiet; ak eng’ betutab kesisiet amwachi kesik, alenji, Oyum korok chemulbainik, ak orat ratutik si obeel: ak oyumji chogennyu bek." 
Matthew13:31 Kiiborji kalewenet age kolenji, Kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak keswotab karadali, ne kiib chito ak kominji mbarennyi:" 
Matthew13:32 ne ming’in iman eng’ keswek tugul; ago ye kagoeet, ko o eng’ ngwek tugul, ak egu ketit, ne tebe taritik temenikyik." 
Matthew13:33 Kimwachi kalewenet age kolenji, Kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak mermerek, che kinam kobogoriot, ak koburukto busiek che bo kitongok somok, agoi kogut tugul." 
Matthew13:34 Kimwachi Jesu tuiyosiek tuguchuto tugul eng’ kalewenaik; ak kima ng’alalji ichek ama eng’ kalewenet: 
Matthew13:35 si kosulda ne kiga mwa maotiot, kole, Ayate kutinnyu eng’ kalewenaik; Amwae tuguk che kigiuny koboch koga kelumda ng’ony." 
Matthew13:36 Kibagakta anyun tuiyosiek, ak kwo go: ak kibwanji alamalyennyi kolenji, Iboruech kalewenetab chemulbainikab mbaret." 
Matthew13:37 Ak kiwol kole, Inendet ne kileta keswek che miach ko Weritab chi;" 
Matthew13:38 ak mbaret ko ng’ony; ak keswek che miach ko werik che bo bounatet; ak chemulbainik ko werikab inendet ne ya; 
Matthew13:39 ak bunyot ne kigolei choto ko oindet; ak kesisiet ko kagesunetab ng’ony; ak kesik ko malaikaisiek. 
Matthew13:40 Ko u ye kiyumi chemulbainik ak kebeel eng’ mat; egu ko u noto eng’ kagesunetab ng’ony. 
Matthew13:41 Iyoktoi Weritab chi malaikaisiekyik, koba koyum komong’une bounatennyi tuguk tugul che inachi bich, ak ichek che yaei tengekto," 
Matthew13:42 ak kowirji mat ne o: egu eng’ oloto kateeiyet ak nyeetab kelek. 
Matthew13:43 Iluu anyun che bo imanda ko u asista eng’ bounatetab Kwandanywa. Inendet ne tinyei itik, kogas." 
Matthew13:44 Kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak kit ne bo magornatet ne ung’at eng’ mbar: ne kinyor chi, ak kouny; ak kwo kogasotegei koalda tugul che kitinyei, ak koale mbaranato." 
Matthew13:45 Kogeny, kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak chemung’araiyat, ne cheng’ei sonoek che kororon:" 
Matthew13:46 ak ye kingo kagonyor sonoiyat agenge ne bo alyet ne o, kwo koalda tugul che kitinyei; ak koale sonoiyandanato." 
Matthew13:47 Kogeny, kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak regereiywot ne kiname njirenik, ne kigiwirji nyanjet, ak koyum alak tugul che terotin." 
Matthew13:48 Ak ye kingo kagonyi kochuut konyo ngegut; ak koteb ng’ony, koyumji che miach kitongok, ago kolakta che yaach." 
Matthew13:49 Egu ko u noto eng’ kagesunetab ng’ony: tun bwanei malaikaisiek, ak kobesio che yaachen eng’ kwenutab che bo imanda," 
Matthew13:50 ak kowirji mat ne o: egu eng’ oloto kateeiyet ak nyeetab kelek. 
Matthew13:51 Kaoguiye tuguchuto tugul? Kolenji, Ee." 
Matthew13:52 Ak kilenji ichek, Amu noto anyun, sirindet age tugul ne kiginet komie ng’alekab bounatetab kipsengwet, ko kergei ak chito ne bo got, ne inemu tuguk che leelach ak che bo keny, eng’ ole konore tugukyik che bo magornatet." 
Matthew13:53 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jesu kalewenaichu, kwo eng’ oloto." 
Matthew13:54 Ak kiit emennyi ak konet ichek eng’ sunagoginywa, kot kokwong’io, kole, Kanyorune ano chichi ng’omnatoni, ak boisionichu kimen?" 
Matthew13:55 Tos ma weritab musogindet nito? Magiguure kamet Maria? Ak werik che tupcho ko Jakobo, Josep, Simon, ak Judas?" 
Matthew13:56 Ak chepkametwagik, ko magimi tugul ak ichek? Kinyorune ano anyun chichi tuguchuto tugul?" 
Matthew13:57 Ak kiinach ichek ng’alekyik. Ago kilenji Jesu ichek, Mabetyin maotio teegisto, kobate eng’ emennyi, ak eng’ gonnyi." 
Matthew13:58 Ak kima yai boisionik che chang’ che bo kimnatet eng’ oloto amu bistoenywa. 
Matthew14:1 Kigas eng’ betusiechoto Herod bounindet logoiywek agobo Jesu," 
Matthew14:2 ak kolenji otwogikyik, Johana Kabatisanindet nito, kagong’eet eng’ che kigobek; noto anyun boisiei eng’ inendet kimnatosiechu." 
Matthew14:3 Amu kiga konam Herod Johana, korat, ak konde korgoret agobo Herodia, osotiotab Pilipu ng’etab kam." 
Matthew14:4 Amu kilenji Johana inendet, Etat eng’ ng’atutik obaige ak kwonyito." 
Matthew14:5 Ak ye kimachei kobar inendet, koiywei tuiyet, amu kigiit kele inendet ko matio." 
Matthew14:6 Ago ye kingoit betut ne bo sigetab Herod, kour cheptab Herodia eng’ kwen, ak kiibaibai Herod." 
Matthew14:7 Ak kiiyosiechi kogochi kiy age tugul ne kasom. 
Matthew14:8 Ak ye kingo kagonet kamet, komwa kole, Kona metitab Johana Kabatisanindet eng’ tageito." 
Matthew14:9 Kiarogen laitoriat; ago, amu kayosiosiekyik, ak amu ichek che kitebyei ak inendet eng’ amisiet, kong’at kigochi;" 
Matthew14:10 ak kiiyokto anyun ketil metitab Johana eng’ korgoret. 
Matthew14:11 Ak kigiib metinnyi eng’ tageito, kigochi cheboto: ak koipchi kamet." 
Matthew14:12 Kibwa anyun alamalyennyi, koib musto ak kotub; ak kiba komwachi Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Ak ye kingogas Jesu, kwo eng’ oloto kolany moingetab beek, agoi surkwen kotabangei, ak ye kingogas tuiyosiek, kosub inendet kobun kelyek kong’eetye nganasok che eechen." 
Matthew14:14 Ak kimong’, ak kogeer tuiyet ne o, ak koriregei ichek, ak kosoob bikwak che miandos." 
Matthew14:15 Ak kingoek koskoleny, kobwanji alamalyennyi kolenji, Surkwen koroni, ak kagoimen; unde tuiyet koba nganasok, si koaljigei amitwogik." 
Matthew14:16 Ago kilenji Jesu, Manyoljin koba: obai okwek ichek." 
Matthew14:17 Ak kilenji, Kitinye eng’ yu makatinik mut kityo, ak njirenik aeng’." 
Matthew14:18 Ak kole, Oibwa." 
Matthew14:19 Ak king’at tuiyosiek kobuur eng’ suswek; ak kinam makatinichato mut, ak njirenik aeng’, ak kingonyal kipsengwet, koberur, ak kobutul, ak kogochi alamalyennyi makatinik ak kogochi alamalyennyi tuiyosiek." 
Matthew14:20 Ak kiamis tuguk, kobiyong’so: ak kiiyum katuganik che kinyi kerebonik taman ak aeng’." 
Matthew14:21 Ak icheget che kiam ko ki negit murenik elfusiek mut ama kiit kobogorisiek ak lagok. 
Matthew14:22 Ak kiichirjir eng’ yoto alamalyennyi kolany moingetab beek, ak koba bitonin kondoe inendet, ye kita koyomisi tuiyosiek koba." 
Matthew14:23 Ak kingo kagoyomis tuiyosiek koba, kotogosta inendet tulwet kwo kosa: ak koimenji oloto komi inegei." 
Matthew14:24 Ago kiga it moingetab beek araraita kwen, kolungulegei eng’ mildaetab ge ne bo beek; amu kigirindoi icheget usonet." 
Matthew14:25 Ak eng’ ripset ne bo ang’wan ne bo kemoi kwo ole mi icheget, kobunei araraita barak." 
Matthew14:26 Ak ye kingogeer alamalyennyi inendet kobunei araraita barak, koiyweis, ak kole, Nito ko tamirmiriet; ak kowaach amu kaiyweisiet." 
Matthew14:27 Ago king’alalji Jesu ichek eng’ yoto kolenji, Onyiganitu; ane; amoiyweisie." 
Matthew14:28 Ak kiwolji Petero kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, ngo inye, ing’ata anyonjin abun beek barak." 
Matthew14:29 Ak kile, Nyo. Ak kichortagei Petero eng’ moingetab beek, kobun beek barak kwo ole mi Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Ago ye kingogeer usonet, koiywei; ak kinegit kolis beek kowaach kole, Kiptaiyandani, sorua." 
Matthew14:31 Ak kiito Jesu ngunoto eunnyi, konam inendet, ak kolenji, Ee inye ne tinyei kayanet ne ming’in, kalya si isage?" 
Matthew14:32 Ak ye kingo kagolany ichek moinget, kosis usonet." 
Matthew14:33 Ak kiilos inendet ichek che kimi moinget, kole, Iman i Weritab Jehovah." 
Matthew14:34 Ak ye kingo kagolanda, koit emetab Genesaret." 
Matthew14:35 Ak ye kingonai bikab koronoto inendet, koyokto emonoto komugul, komutyi inendet tugul che kimiandos;" 
Matthew14:36 ak kiigaigai inendet kole kotwa agot tabandab ngoriennyi: ak kisopchi tugul che kitwa. 
Matthew15:1 Kibwanji anyun Jesu Parisaik ak sirik che kibunu Jerusalem, kolenji," 
Matthew15:2 Amu nee si kobistoe alamalyeng’ung’ bitonwekab boisiek? Amu amisiei kotom koun eunekwak. 
Matthew15:3 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Amu nee si obistoe ak okwek ng’atutietab Jehovah amu bitonwekwok?" 
Matthew15:4 Amu king’at Jehovah kole, Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet: ak, Inendet ne mwaei ne ya agobo kwandanyi anan kamet, komeei iman." 
Matthew15:5 Ago omwae ole, Age tugul ne lenjin kwandanyi anan kamet, Kit age tugul ne kota nyolu atoretenen, ko koagochi Jehovah;" 
Matthew15:6 ko mateechei inendet kwanda ak kamet; kaowal anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah koek buch amu bitonwekwok. 
Matthew15:7 Okwek chombilik! Kimaoten Isaia komie agobo okwek, kole," 
Matthew15:8 Teecha bichu eng’ kutuswekwak: Ago looen mugulelwekwak eng’ ane. 
Matthew15:9 Ago iloswa buch: Ng’atutikab bik konetisiosiek che inetisie. 
Matthew15:10 Ak kiguur inendet tuiyet kobwa ole mi, ak kolenji, Ogas, ak oguiye:" 
Matthew15:11 ma che bunei kutit che imuruoni chito; ago che mong’une kutit, choto che imuruoni chito." 
Matthew15:12 Kibwa anyun alamalyennyi kolenji, Ingen ile kaginach Parisaik, ye kangogas mwaoni?" 
Matthew15:13 Ago kiwol kole, Keswot age tugul ne kima kol Baba ne mi kipsengwet, kitutu." 
Matthew15:14 Obagakte ichek: kandoik che koriotin. Ak ngondochi kipkoratiat kipkoratiat, kororokyin tuwai keringet." 
Matthew15:15 Ak kiwolji Petero kolenji, Mwawech kalewenonoto." 
Matthew15:16 Ak kile, Kaga agot kora kotom oguiye ak okwek?" 
Matthew15:17 Ma onai ole, kiy age tugul ne bunei kutit kowendi moet, komandoi sang’?" 
Matthew15:18 Ago tuguk che mong’une kutit kobunu muguleldo; choto che ing’waniti chito. 
Matthew15:19 Amu mong’une muguleldo kabwatutik che yaach, rumisiosiek, ibetab ge, soksosiek, chorsosiek, baornatosiekab lembech, ng’alek che yaachen:" 
Matthew15:20 chuto tuguk che ing’waniti chito: ago ngeamisie eunek che ma kiun ko maing’wanitu chi. 
Matthew15:21 Ak kiwa Jesu eng’ oloto, kwo komoswek che bo Turo ak Sidon." 
Matthew15:22 Ak ogeero, kimong’ eng’ komoswechoto kobogoriot ne bo Kanan, korir, kole, Rirena, ee Kiptaiyandani, inye weritab Daudi; riachei oindet cheptanyu mising’." 
Matthew15:23 Ago kima kwolji ng’olyo. Ak kibwa alamalyennyi, ak kogaigai inendet, kolenji, On kwo: amu karirjinotech." 
Matthew15:24 Ago kiwol kole, Kima kiyokwa kobate anyonji kechirek che lusyotin che bo gotab Israel." 
Matthew15:25 Ago kinyo kogutung’ji inendet, kole, Kiptaiyandani, toretan." 
Matthew15:26 Ago kiwol kole, Ma mie kerebe lagok kimoikwak ak kewirji sesenik." 
Matthew15:27 Ago kile, Ee, Kiptaiyandani: agot sesenik koamei che ibutye mesetab bikab kobo." 
Matthew15:28 Kiwolji Jesu anyun kolenji, Chebiosoni, o kayaneng’ung’! Ingoyaak ko u noto imache. Ak kisob cheptanyi koboch sainato." 
Matthew15:29 Ak kiwa Jesu eng’ oloto, agoi ole negite araraitab Galili; ak kitogosta tulwet, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ oloto." 
Matthew15:30 Ak kibwanji inendet tuiyosiek che eechen, komutu solomonik, ak che koriotin, che namotin kut, che bo mugungon; ak alak che chang’, ak konde ole bo kelyekyik; ak kiisob ichek:" 
Matthew15:31 kot kokwong’ tuiyet, ye kingogeer kong’alaldos che namotin kut, ko kagosopcho che bo mugungon, ak kobendoti solomonik, ak kogeertoi che koriotin: ak kiilos Kiptaiyatab Israel." 
Matthew15:32 Ak kiguurjigei Jesu alamalyennyi, kolenji, Atinye rirenetab ge agobo tuiyet, amu kogetebi tugul betusiek somok ama tinye kiy ne amei: amamache agochi koba koamoti rubo, si matanuiso eng’ oret." 
Matthew15:33 Ak kilenji alamalyet inendet, Kinyorjini ano makatinik che te cho eng’ emoni surkwen, si kigochi kobiyong’so tuiyet ne te ni?" 
Matthew15:34 Ak kilenji Jesu, Otinye makatinik ata? Ak kile, Tisab, ak njirenik che mengechen che ng’ering’." 
Matthew15:35 King’at anyun tuiyet kobuur; 
Matthew15:36 ak konam makatinichoto tisab ak njirenik; ak komwa kongoi ak kobutul, ak kogochi alamalyet, si kogochi alamalyet tuiyosiek." 
Matthew15:37 Ak kiam tugul, kobiyong’so: ak kiiyum katuganik, che yamei mesendoik tisab." 
Matthew15:38 Ak kiek murenik che kiam elfusiek ang’wan, ama kiit kobogorisiek ak lagok." 
Matthew15:39 Ak kiunda tuiyosiek koba, ak kilany moingetab beek, kwo tabanwek che bo Magadan." 
Matthew16:1 Kibwa anyun Parisaik ak Sadukaik, ak kotiem inendet kosom koborji kaborunet ne bunu kipsengwet." 
Matthew16:2 Ago kiwolji kolenji, [Ye kagoek koskoleny, omwae ole, Moeni mutai: amu birir barak." 
Matthew16:3 Ak karon, omwae ole, Usei ra: amu birir ak kotulungenot barak. Ongen obesie ole teptoi togetab kipsengwet; ago momuchi obesie kaborunoikab betusiechu.]" 
Matthew16:4 Cheng’ei kaborunet ibinda ne ya ne bo ibetab ge; ago magiborjin kaborunet, kobate kaborunetab Jona. Ak kibagakta ichek ak kwo." 
Matthew16:5 Ak kiit alamalyet bitet age ak kiutie koib makatinik. 
Matthew16:6 Ak kilenji Jesu, Oeb it, oribege mermerek che bo Parisaik, ak Sadukaik." 
Matthew16:7 Ak king’alaljigei ichegei, kole, Amu ma kiibu makatinik." 
Matthew16:8 Ak kingonai Jesu, komwa kole, Ee okwek che bo kayanet ne ming’in, kalya si ong’alaljige, amu motinye makatinik?" 
Matthew16:9 Maonai anan mobwati makatinik mut eng’ bik elfusiek mut, ak kerebonik che te che kioyumji?" 
Matthew16:10 Anan makatinik tisab eng’ bik elfusiek ang’wan, ak mesendoik che te che kioyumji?" 
Matthew16:11 Lyon si monai ole mang’alalwok agobo makatinik? Ago oribege mermerek che bo Parisaik ak Sadukaik. 
Matthew16:12 Konai anyun kole kamaiyomis ichek koribegei mermerekab makatiat, ago konetisietab Parisaik ak Sadukaik." 
Matthew16:13 Ak ye kingonyo Jesu komoswekab Kaisarea Pilipi, koteebe alamalyennyi kole, Mwaei bik kole ng’o Weritab chi?" 
Matthew16:14 Kole, Mwaei alak kole, Johana Kabatisanindet; len alak, Elija: kolen alak, Jeremia, anan age eng’ maotik." 
Matthew16:15 Kolenji, Ago olen okwek a ng’o?" 
Matthew16:16 Ak kiwol Simon Petero kole, I Kristo, Weritab Jehovah ne sobei." 
Matthew16:17 Ak kiwol Jesu kolenji, Iberurot inye, Simon Barjona: amu kama ng’ang’un borto anan korotik, ago Baba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew16:18 Ak amwaun agane ale, i Petero, ak ateeche kanisennyu ruandani; ak maneneti kimnatosiekab oldab che kigobek." 
Matthew16:19 Agonin yateiywek che bo bounatetab kipsengwet: ak kiy tugul ne irate eng’ ng’ony keratei eng’ kipsengwet: ak kiy tugul ne itiachi eng’ ng’ony kitiachi eng’ kipsengwet. 
Matthew16:20 King’at mising’ anyun alamalyet kole ama mwachi chi kole inendet ko Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Koboch yoto kotoi Jesu koborji alamalyennyi, kole, kanyol kwo Jerusalem, ak konyor nyalilda eng’ tuguk che chang’ eng’ boisiek ak tisiik che eechen ak sirik, ak kebar, ak king’eet eng’ betutab somok." 
Matthew16:22 Ak kinam Petero inendet, ak kotoi koger kong’, kole, Ingolooit eng’ inye, Kiptaiyandani; manyonjin nito agoi." 
Matthew16:23 Ago kiwelelgei, ak kolenji Petero, Ui let eng’ ane, Setani: i kanagutiet eng’ ane: amu maibwati inye tugukab Jehovah, ago tuguk che bo bik." 
Matthew16:24 Kilenji Jesu anyun alamalyennyi, Ngo machei chi kosubwa, ko kanyol koesiogei, ak kosut kimurtoiyondennyi, ak kosubwa." 
Matthew16:25 Amu age tugul ne machei kosor sobondanyi kobeeti: ak age tugul ne ibeeti sobondanyi agobo ane konyoru. 
Matthew16:26 Amu keljin nee chi, ngonyor ng’ony komugul, ak kobeet sobondanyi? Anan tos igoito nee chi kowale sobondanyi?" 
Matthew16:27 Amu tun nyonei Weritab chi eng’ lilindab Kwandanyi koboto malaikaisiekyik; ak koyaakyi anyun chi age tugul ko u boisionikyik. 
Matthew16:28 Amwawok, iman, ale, Mi alak eng’ che tonondos eng’ yu, che machamjami meet matiny, kot kogeer konyonei Weritab chi eng’ bounatennyi." 
Matthew17:1 Ak kingobata betusiek lo komut Jesu Petero, ak Jakobo, ak Johana ng’etab kam, kolany tulwet ne koi koba uwak ichegei:" 
Matthew17:2 ak kiwalak eng’ tainywa: ak kiiluu togennyi ko u asista, ak kileelagitu ngoroikyik ko u lapkeiyet." 
Matthew17:3 Ak ogeero, kitook eng’ tainywa Musa ak Elija kong’alaljindos koboto inendet." 
Matthew17:4 Ak kiwolji Petero Jesu, kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, mie eng’ achek amu kimi yu: ngichame, amuchi ateech eng’ oli keriosiek somok, neng’ung’ age, bo Musa age ak bo Elija age." 
Matthew17:5 Kingota kong’alali, ogeero, kouur ichek boldet ne iluu: ak ogeero, kimong’une kutit boldet, kole, Ni ko Werinnyu, chamanennyu, abaibai mising’ eng’ inendet; ogas okwek inendet." 
Matthew17:6 Ak ye kingogas alamalyet, kobutyo kot koit togochikwak ng’ony, koiyweis mising’." 
Matthew17:7 Ak kinyo Jesu ak kotwa ichek kolenji, Ong’eetye, amoiyweisie." 
Matthew17:8 Ak kingoyot met, ko ma keer chi, kobate Jesu inegei." 
Matthew17:9 Ak kingota kochorugei eng’ tulwet, kong’at Jesu ichek, kolenji, Amomwachi chi kaborunonito, agoi tun kong’eet Weritab chi eng’ che kibek." 
Matthew17:10 Ak kiteebe alamaluyennyi inendet, kole, Amu nee anyun si komwaei sirik kole, Nyonei Elija korok kondou?" 
Matthew17:11 Ak kiwol Jesu kole, Iman indou Elija, ak koweech tuguk tugul:" 
Matthew17:12 ago amwawok ale, kigonyo Elija, ak kima nai ichek inendet, ago kiyachi inendet kiy age tugul ne kimach. Agot ko u noto tun nyalili Weritab chi agine eng’ ichek." 
Matthew17:13 Konai anyun alamalyet kole king’alaljin ichek agobo Johana Kabatisanindet. 
Matthew17:14 Ak ye kingo kagobwa ole mi tuiyet, konyonji inendet chito, ak kogutung’ji, ak kole," 
Matthew17:15 Kiptaiyandani, rirege werinnyu: amu amei iywek, ak nyalili mising’: amu ibutyin ma konyil che chang’, ak kobutyin beek konyil che chang’." 
Matthew17:16 Ak koamutyi alamalyeng’ung’, ak ma imuch kosoob inendet." 
Matthew17:17 Ak kiwol Jesu kole, Ee ibinda ne matinyei kayanet ak komaasat, atebye ak okwek kot kotianit? Amuitoi kot kotianit agobo okwek? Imutwa inendet." 
Matthew17:18 Ak kiger kong’ Jesu oindet; ak komanda oindet eng’ inendet: ak kosob weroto koboch sainato. 
Matthew17:19 Kibwanji anyun alamalyet Jesu eng’ taban, ak kole, Kalya si ma kimuch achek keon komanda?" 
Matthew17:20 Ak kilenji, Amu kayaneng’wong’ ne ming’in: amu amwawok iman ale, Ndotinye kayanet ne te keswotab karadali, ta ngomwachi tulwoni olenji, Inakte ui olin; konaktoi; ta mami kiy ne maimugaksei eng’ okwek." 
Matthew17:21 Ago mamandoi ne u ni kobate eng’ saet ak karugutetab ge. 
Matthew17:22 Ak ye kingota kobeniei ichek eng’ Galili, kolenji Jesu ichek, Kindoi Weritab chi eunekab bik;" 
Matthew17:23 ak kobar ichek inendet, ak king’eet kogeny eng’ betutab somok. Kiarogenso anyun mising’." 
Matthew17:24 Ak ye kingo kagoit Kapernaum kobwanji Petero ichek che kitaachei kebebertab sekel, ak kole, Magonu konetindeng’wong’ kebebertab sekel?" 
Matthew17:25 Ak kole, Ee. Ak ye kingowo go, kosib kong’alalji Jesu inendet kolenji, Ibwati nee, inye, Simon? Laitorinik che bo ng’ony, konyorune ng’o aisurut anan kodi? Eng’ werikwak anan eng’ toek?" 
Matthew17:26 Ak ye kingomwa kole, Eng’ toek, kolenji Jesu inendet, Noto anyun itiogotin werik." 
Matthew17:27 Ago, si ma kinach ichek, iwe araraita, ak iwirji katet, ak njiriot ne kamong’ eng’ tai, inam; ak ye kaiyat kutinnyi, inyoru sekel: nam noto, ak igoite agobo ane ak inye." 
Matthew18:1 Kibwanji alamalyet Jesu eng’ sainato, kolenji, Ng’o anyun ne o eng’ tugul eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet?" 
Matthew18:2 Ak kiguur lakwet ne ming’in konyo ole mi inendet, ak kotonone kwenunywa," 
Matthew18:3 ak kole, Amwawok, iman, ale, Ngot ko mowalage, oige lagok che mengechen, ko moite bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:4 Noto anyun age tugul ne iming’inegei ko u lakwani ming’in, ko o noto eng’ tugul eng’ bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:5 Ak age tugul ne taachei lakwet agenge ne ming’in ne u ni eng’ kainennyu ko kataacha: 
Matthew18:6 ago age tugul ne inachi age eng’ chu mengech che iyana, ko kaigai eng’ inendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitab bai ne o, ak kechoorji riretab nyanjet." 
Matthew18:7 Bwa ng’ony amu kanagutik! Amu bwanei kanagutik iman; ago bwa eng’ chichoto bunu kanagutiet! 
Matthew18:8 Ak ngonachin eung’ung’ anan keldang’ung’, itil ak iwirte: mie eng’ inye imong’ji sobondo i bo mugung’ anan i bo kelok kosiir itinye eunek aeng’ anan kelyek aeng’ ak kewirjin mat ne bo koigeny." 
Matthew18:9 Ak ngonachin kondang’ung’, ibalu ak iwirte: mie eng’ inye imong’ji sobondo i bo kong’ak, kosiir itinye konyek aeng’ ak kewirjin Gehenna, oldab mat." 
Matthew18:10 Orib si mosas age eng’ chu mengech; amu amwawok ale, keerei eng’ kipsengwet malaikaisiek kotugul togetab Baba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:11 Amu kinyo Weritab chi kosor ne kiga kobet. 
Matthew18:12 Olen nee okwek? Ngo tinyei chi kechirek bogol, ak kwo age kobetot, ko tos mabagaktoi chun tamanwogik sogol ak sogol, ak kwo tulonok, ak kocheng’at ne kaga betot?" 
Matthew18:13 Ak ngonyor, amwawok, iman, ale, Boiboitu agobo noto kosiir chun tamanwogik sogol ak sogol che ma betyo." 
Matthew18:14 Agot ko u noto ma magetab Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet, kolus age eng’ chu mengech." 
Matthew18:15 Ak ngo chalwogenjin ne otupche, iwe, iborji lelutiennyi omi tuwai okwege: ngo kasin, ko kagogelun ne otupche." 
Matthew18:16 Ago ngo magasin, imut agenge anan aeng’ alak, si kogimit ng’olyot age tugul eng’ kutuswekab baorinik aeng’ anan somok." 
Matthew18:17 Ak ngo esio kogas ichek, imwachi kaniset: ak ngo esio kogas kaniset agine, ingoigei kipsagarin eng’ inye anan taagindetab aisurut." 
Matthew18:18 Amwawok, iman, ale, Tuguk alak tugul che orate eng’ ng’ony keratei eng’ kipsengwet: ak tuguk alak tugul che otiachi eng’ ng’ony kitiachi eng’ kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:19 Amwawok kogeny, ale, ngo chamnyechi aeng’u eng’ okwek eng’ ng’ony agobo kiy age tugul ne somei, koyachin Baba anyun ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:20 Amu ole katuiyechi aeng’u anan somok eng’ kainennyu, ami kwenunywa eng’ oloto." 
Matthew18:21 Kinyo anyun Petero, ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, chalwogenjina ne kitupche konyil ata, ak anyochini kaat? Agoi konyil tisab?" 
Matthew18:22 Kilenji Jesu, Mamwaun ale, konyil tisab; ago, agoi tamanwogik tisab konyil tisab." 
Matthew18:23 Noto anyun kiyanie bounatetab kipsengwet laitoriat anum, ne machei koiit tuguk koboto otwogikyik." 
Matthew18:24 Ak ye kingotoi koiit, kimutyi agenge, ne kibesen talentaisiek elfusiek taman." 
Matthew18:25 Ak amu kima kotinyei kiy ne yaaktae, kong’at kiptaiyandennyi kealda inendet, ak osotiondennyi, ak lagokyik, ak tugul che kitinyei, si koyaakta." 
Matthew18:26 Kiibutyi ng’ony anyun otwogindonoto kosa inendet, kole, Kiptaiyandani, kang’wa korok, si ayaagun tugul." 
Matthew18:27 Ak, kirirge kiptaiyatab otwogindonoto, kotiach inendet, ak konyochi kaat eng’ besendo." 
Matthew18:28 Ago kimanda otwogindonoto, ak konyor age ne kiboisiei tuwai, ne kibesen inendet denarisiek bogol: ak kinam inendet kaatit, ak kole, Yaakwa che kiibesena." 
Matthew18:29 Kiibutyi ng’ony anyun ne kiboisiei tuwai, kosom inendet, kole, Kang’wa korok, si ayaagun." 
Matthew18:30 Ak kima cham: ago kiwa kotoorji korgoret, agoi koyaak tugul che kiga besen." 
Matthew18:31 Ak ye kingogeer anyun che kiboisiei tugul, tuguk che kagoyaagis, koarogenso mising’, ak kobwa komwachi kiptaiyandenywa tuguk tugul che kagoyaagis." 
Matthew18:32 Yeityo koguur anyun kiptaiyandennyi inendet konyo, ak kolenji, Ee otwogindet ne kimegeiya, kianyoun kaat eng’ besenoto tugul, amu kiisoma:" 
Matthew18:33 tos kima nyoljin aginye irire ne kiboisiei tuwai, ko u ye kiarirenen?" 
Matthew18:34 Ak kinerech kiptaiyandennyi, ak konde inendet eunekab bik che birei, agoi koyaak tugul che kiga besen." 
Matthew18:35 U noto yaiywok agine Baba ne bo kipsengwet, ngo monyochi kaat age tugul eng’ mugulelwekwok ne otupche." 
Matthew19:1 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jesu ng’alechu, kwo eng’ Galili agoi koit tabanwekab Judea, Jordan komosin;" 
Matthew19:1 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jesu ng’alechu, kwo eng’ Galili agoi koit tabanwekab Judea, Jordan komosin;" 
Matthew19:2 ak kiisub inendet tuiyosiek che eechen; ak kiisoob ichek eng’ oloto. 
Matthew19:3 Ak kibwanji inendet Parisaik, ak kotiem, kole, Tos chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik koon chi osotiondennyi agobo kiy age tugul?" 
Matthew19:4 Ak kiwol kole, Tom osoman, ole, inendet ne kiyai ichek eng’ taunet ko kiyai muren ak tie," 
Matthew19:5 ak kile, Agobo nito anyun bagaktoi mureno kwanda ak kamet, ak konamgei ak osotiondennyi; ak koek tuwai borto agenge?" 
Matthew19:6 Si ma ko aeng’ ago borto agenge. Noto anyun, che kigotuiyo Jehovah, komat kobesio chi." 
Matthew19:7 Kilenji anyun bichoto inendet, Kilya anyun si kong’at Musa kole, Kigochin siret ne bo besiet ak koon kwo?" 
Matthew19:8 Kimwachi ichek kolenji, Kichamwok Musa oon osotikwok, amu uuindab mugulelwekwok: ago kima ko u noto koboch taunet." 
Matthew19:9 Ak amwawok ale, Chi age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi, ama eng’ ng’olyotab sokset, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei: ak inendet ne ituni ne kigeon ko kabaigei." 
Matthew19:10 Kolenji alamalyennyi inendet, Ngot ko u noto ateptab muren ak osotiondennyi, ko manyolu kitunis." 
Matthew19:11 Ago kilenji ichek, Temene bik tugul kotaach mwaoni, kobate ichek che kigochin." 
Matthew19:12 Amu mitei sirorinik che kigisich ko u noto koboch mootinwekab kametwagikwak: ak mitei bik che kigimoch: ak mitei bik che kiimoigei agobo bounatetab kipsengwet. Inendet ne imuchi kotaach ni, kotaach." 
Matthew19:13 Kigimutyi anyun lagok che mengech, si kobiit kogonoor eunekyik ichek ak kosa: ak kiger kong’ alamalyet ichek." 
Matthew19:14 Ago kile Jesu, Ochamji lagok che mengech, kobwanja, amoete: amu bo che u chuto bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew19:15 Ak kiigonoor eunekyik ichek, ak kwo eng’ oloto." 
Matthew19:16 Ak ogeero, kinyonji chi ak kole, Konetindoni, nee kiy ne mie ne kanyol ayai si anyor sobondab koigeny?" 
Matthew19:17 Ak kolenji, Kalya si iteebena agobo noto mie? Mi agenge ne mie: ago ngimache imong’ji sobondo, inam ng’atutik." 
Matthew19:18 Kilenji inendet, Che u nee? Ak kile Jesu, Merumisie, Moipge, Mechorse, Mebaorianji lembech." 
Matthew19:19 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet: ak, Cham chitab kokwet ko u ye ichamdoige." 
Matthew19:20 Kolenji murenonoto, Kiarib tuguchu tugul: ta ko ng’etunot nee eng’ ane?" 
Matthew19:21 Kolenji Jesu inendet, Ngimache iegu ne igesunotgei, iwe, ialde che itinye, ak igochi kibananok, si inyoru magornatet eng’ kipsengwet: ak inyo, isubwa." 
Matthew19:22 Ago ye kingogas murenonoto mwaonato, kwo eng’ arogenet: amu kitinyei tuguk che chang’." 
Matthew19:23 Ak kilenji Jesu alamalyennyi, Amwawok, iman, ale, Uui eng’ magoriot komong’ji bounatetab kipsengwet." 
Matthew19:24 Ak kogeny amwawok ale, Nyamnyum eng’ tambesiet kochut kondab katet, kosiir komong’ji magoriot bounatetab Jehovah." 
Matthew19:25 Ak ye kingogas alamalyet ng’olyondonoto, kokwong’io mising’, kole, Ng’o anyun ne imuchi konyor sorunet?" 
Matthew19:26 Ak kogeer Jesu ichek ak kolenji, Maimugaksei ni eng’ bik; ago imugaksei tuguk tugul eng’ Jehovah." 
Matthew19:27 Kiwolji Petero anyun kolenji, Keero, kigebagakte tuguk tugul, ak kigisubun; kinyoru nee anyun achek?" 
Matthew19:28 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Amwawok, iman, ale, Okwek che koosubwa, eng’ yaet ne leel ye tun tebe Weritab chi ng’echeretab torornatennyi, otebe ak okwek ng’echerok taman ak aeng’ che bo laitornatet, oruokyini ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo Israel." 
Matthew19:29 Ak age tugul ne kigobagakta gorik, anan ng’etab kametwagik, anan chepkametwagik, anan kwanda, anan kamet, anan lagok, anan mbarenik, agobo kainennyu, kotaachei konyil bogol, ak kobor eng’ sobondab koigeny." 
Matthew19:30 Ago tun egu che chang’ che bo tai che bo let; ak koegu che bo let che bo tai. 
Matthew20:1 Amu kergei bounatetab kipsengwet ak chitab kobo got, ne kimusta karon koguur meek kobwa mbarennyi ne bo sabibuk." 
Matthew20:2 Ak ye kingo kagochamnyechi ak meechoto kogochi denarit agenge eng’ betut agenge, koyokto koba mbarennyi." 
Matthew20:3 Ak kimanda ko negit sait somok, ak kogeer alak kotonondos eng’ oldab aldaisiet ama tinyei boisiet;" 
Matthew20:4 ak kilenji, Oba ak okwek mbaretab sabibuk si agonok ne nyolu. Ak kiba anyun." 
Matthew20:5 Kimanda kogeny ko negit sait lo ak eng’ sait sogol, ak kiyai ko u noto." 
Matthew20:6 Ak kimanda kogeny olo bo sait taman ak agenge, ak konyor alak kotonondos; ak kilenji ichek, Kalya si otonone oli betut komugul amotinye boisio?" 
Matthew20:7 Kolenji anyun bichoto inendet, Amu ma kuurech chi. Kolenji, Oba ak okwek mbaretab sabibuk." 
Matthew20:8 Ak ye kingoek koskoleny, komwachi chitab kobo mbaretab sabibuk kiboitiondennyi ne o kolenji, Kuur meek, si igochi melekwekwak, itaune ne bo let agoi ne bo tai." 
Matthew20:9 Ak ye kingobwa ichek che kiga kiguur ko negit sait taman ak agenge, konyor chi tugul denarit agenge." 
Matthew20:10 Ak ye kingobwa che bo tai, kolen nyoru che siirei; ak kinyor agichek denarit agenge chi tugul." 
Matthew20:11 Ak ye kingotaach, kong’unyng’ung’ji chitab kobo got," 
Matthew20:12 kole, Kabois chu bo let sait agenge kityo, ak kairogenech bichoto achek che kagibirtege betut komugul eng’ asista ne ng’wan." 
Matthew20:13 Ago kiwolji kolenji age eng’ ichek, Choruani, ma ayaun kiy ne ya: kama kichamnyechi tuwai denarit agenge?" 
Matthew20:14 Nam neng’ung’, ak iwe oreng’ung’; magennyu agochi chichito bo let ko u ye kagonin inye." 
Matthew20:15 Tos manyoljina ayai ne amache eng’ tugukyuk? Anan ya kondang’ung’, amu a mie?" 
Matthew20:16 Egu anyun che bo let che bo tai, ak egu che bo tai che bo let."
