Matthew20:17 Ak ye kitogostoi Jesu kowendi Jerusalem, komut alamalyet taman ak aeng’ koba taban ichegei, ak kolenji ichek eng’ oret," 
Matthew20:18 Ogeero, kitogosyini Jerusalem; si kinde Weritab chi eunekab tisiik che eechen ak sirik; ak kiruokyi kome," 
Matthew20:19 ak kogoito kochurachur Bororiosiek, ak kobire kipcharitit, ak kogartat eng’ kimurtoiyot: ak king’eet inendet eng’ betutab somok." 
Matthew20:20 Kinyonji anyun inendet kametab werikab Sebedi koboto werikyik, ak kogutung’ji, ak kosom inendet kiy." 
Matthew20:21 Ak kilenji, Imache nee? Kolenji, Ng’at ile kotebe werichuchuk aeng’u, age eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak age eung’ung’ ne bo katam, eng’ bounateng’ung’." 
Matthew20:22 Ago kiwol Jesu kole, Mongen ne osome. Omuchi okwek oee kikombet ne negit aee? Kolenji inendet, Kimuchi." 
Matthew20:23 Kolenji ichek, Oee iman kikombennyu: ago ma nenyu agochi kotebe eunnyu ne bo tai, ak eunnyu ne bo katam, ago bo ichek che kachopchi Baba." 
Matthew20:24 Ak ye kingogas chun tamanu, konyit agobo choto aeng’ che tupcho." 
Matthew20:25 Ago kiguur Jesu kobwanji inendet, ak kole, Ongen ole bou eng’ kimnatet bounikab Bororiosiek, ak bou ichek bikwak che eechen." 
Matthew20:26 Ma u noto eng’ okwek: ago age tugul ne machei koek ne o eng’ kwenung’wong’ koek kiboitiondeng’wong’; 
Matthew20:27 ak age tugul ne machei koek ne bo tai eng’ kwenung’wong’ koek otwogindeng’wong’: 
Matthew20:28 agot ko u noto, kima nyo Weritab chi keboisiechi, ago si kobois inendet, ak kogoito sobondanyi koek kit ne kitiage che chang’." 
Matthew20:29 Ak kingomandoi ichek eng’ Jeriko, kosubi inendet tuiyet ne o." 
Matthew20:30 Ogeero, kipkoratinik aeng’ che kitebyei eng’ oret taban, ye kingogas kole siirtoi Jesu, kowaach, kole, Kiptaiyandani, rireneige, ee weritab Daudi." 
Matthew20:31 Kiger kong’ tuiyet bichoto kole, kosisyo: ago kites kowaach, kole, Kiptaiyandani, rireneige, ee weritab Daudi." 
Matthew20:32 Kotonon Jesu, ak koguur ichek, ak kolenji, Omache ayaiywok nee?" 
Matthew20:33 Kolenji inendet, Kiptaiyandani, kimache keyatwech konyekyok." 
Matthew20:34 Ak kirirge Jesu, ak kitwa konyekwak: ak kogeerto eng’ yoto ak kosub inendet." 
Matthew21:1 Ak ye kingorikta ichek Jerusalem, koit Betpage, agoi tulwetab Emitik, koyokto Jesu aeng’ che bo alamalyet," 
Matthew21:2 kolenji, Oba agoi nganaset ne mi taing’wong’, ak onyoru ngunoto sigiriet ne ratat, komi ak moitanyi: otiach tuwai ak ogetwa." 
Matthew21:3 Ak ngo mwawok chi kiy, olenji, Makyingei Kiptaiyat choto; ak kogonok ngunoto." 
Matthew21:4 Kayaak ni, si kobiit kosulda ne kimwa maotiot, kole," 
Matthew21:5 Omwachi cheptab Sion, Keero, nyonjinin Laitoriandeng’ung’, Ne tala, ak kolong’onu sigiriet, Ak moitab sigiriet, barnotiot." 
Matthew21:6 Ak kiba alamalyet, koyai ko u ye kiiarorji Jesu ichek," 
Matthew21:7 ak kiget sigiriet ak moitanyi, ak koiitochi ngoroikwak; ak kotebe inendet barak." 
Matthew21:8 Ak kiito che chang’ che bo tuiyet ngoroikwak eng’ oret; ak kieb alak temenikab ketik, ak koiito eng’ oret." 
Matthew21:9 Ak kimwaoti eng’ kutit ne o tuiyosiek che kiindoe inendet, ak che kiisubi, kolen, Hosanna weritab Daudi: iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat; Hosanna eng’ ole toror mising’." 
Matthew21:10 Ak ye kingoit Jerusalem, kochirjiren nganaset komugul, kole, Ng’o ni?" 
Matthew21:11 Ak kimwa tuiyosiek kole, Ni ko maotiot Jesu, ne bunu Nasaret ne bo Galili." 
Matthew21:12 Ak kiwa Jesu hekalutab Jehovah, ak koon tugul che kialdoisiei ak che kialisiei eng’ goyoto, ak kogabui mesosiek che bo walikab siling’isiek, ak ng’echerokab che kialdoi cheptugenik;" 
Matthew21:13 ak kolenji ichek, Sirat kele, Kiguure gonnyu gotab saet: ago kaowal koek kebenetab rebik." 
Matthew21:14 Ak kibwanji inendet eng’ hekalut ichek che ki koriotin ak che ing’waldos: ak kiisoob ichek. 
Matthew21:15 Ago ye kingogeer tisiik che eechen ak sirik tuguk che kiyai che bo kwong’et, ak lagok che kimwaei eng’ kutit ne o eng’ hekalut, kole, Hosanna weritab Daudi; konerekso mising’," 
Matthew21:16 ak kolenji, Igase ne mwaei chu? Kolenji Jesu ichek, Ee: kima osoman kele, Kiiyai inye kalosunet kosulda eng’ kutuswekab lagok ak che reritos?" 
Matthew21:17 Ak kibagakta ichek, ak kwo komanda eng’ nganaset kwo Betania, ak kiru oloto." 
Matthew21:18 Ak karon, ye kiweeksei kowendi nganaset, koam rubet." 
Matthew21:19 Ak kingogeer eng’ tabandab oret mogoiywet, kwo ole mi, amanyorji kiy, kobate sogek kityo; ak kilenji ketoto, Koboch ra, ko ma iyie logoek agoi koigeny. Ak kires ngunoto mogoiywondonoto." 
Matthew21:20 Ak ye kingogeer alamalyet, kokwong’io, kole, Katepto ano si kores mogoiywet ngunoto?" 
Matthew21:21 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Amwawok, iman, ale, Ngotinye kayanet, amosage, ko moyae ne kageyachi mogoiywondoni kityo, ago agot ngomwachi tulwoni, olenji Ngesutin ak kewirjin nyanjet, koyaaksei." 
Matthew21:22 Ak tuguk alak tugul che osome eng’ saet, oyani, otaache." 
Matthew21:23 Ak ye kingwo hekalut orit, ye kita konetisiei, kobwanji inendet tisiik che eechen ak boisiekab bichoto, ak kolenji, Nee kimnatet ne iyae tuguchu? Ak kigonin ng’o kimnatoni?" 
Matthew21:24 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Amache agane ateebenak ng’olyot agenge, ne ngomwawa, amwawok agane kimnatonoto ayae tuguchu." 
Matthew21:25 Kibunu ano kabatisanetab Johana? Bunu kipsengwet anan kibunu bik? Ak kichaamjigei, kole, Ngot kemwa kele, Kibunu kipsengwet; komwawech inendet kole, Kilya anyun si moyan inendet?" 
Matthew21:26 Ago ngemwa, kele, Kibunu bik; kiiywei tuiyet, amu iyani bik tugul kole, Maotiot Johana." 
Matthew21:27 Ak kiwolji bik Jesu, kolenji, Magingen. Komwachi ichek agine kolenji, Mamwawok agane kimnatet ne ayae tuguchu." 
Matthew21:28 Ago olen nee? Kitinye chi werik aeng’; ak kiwa ole mi werit ne bo tai, ak kolenji, Weri, ui boisie rani eng’ mbaretab sabibuk." 
Matthew21:29 Ak kiwol kole, Mawendi: ago eng’ let kosik, ak kwo." 
Matthew21:30 Yeityo kwo ole mi ne bo aeng’, ak komwachi ko u noto. Ak kiwol kole, Baba, awendi: ago mawo." 
Matthew21:31 Ng’o eng’ choto aeng’ ne kiyai magetab kwandanywa? Kole, Ne bo tai. Kimwachi Jesu ichek kolenji, Amwawok, iman, ale, Sib kondoenak koitei bounatetab Jehovah taagikab aisurut ak chepkugonik." 
Matthew21:32 Amu kinyonjok Johana eng’ oretab imanda, ago ma oyan inendet: ago kiiyan inendet taagikab aisurut ak chepkugonik: ago okwek, ye kingogeer, ko ma osigu si kobiit oyan inendet." 
Matthew21:33 Ogas kalewenet age: Kimi chito age ne kitinyei got, ne kiminji sabibuk mbaret, ak kong’ot, ak kobal keringet ole kirurung’e logoek, ak koteech got ne koi, ak komanakyi meek ak kwo emet age." 
Matthew21:34 Ak ye kingo kagorik ruratetab logoek, koyokto otwogikyik koba ole mi meek, si koib logoekyik." 
Matthew21:35 Ak kinam meek otwogikyik, ak kibir age, ak kibar age, ak kilach age eng’ koik." 
Matthew21:36 Kiiyokto kogeny otwogik alak che siirei che bo tai: ak kiyachi ichek ko u noto. 
Matthew21:37 Ak eng’ let koyokyi werinnyi, kole, Teechei werinnyu." 
Matthew21:38 Ago ye kingogeer meek werit, komwachigei, kole, Ni ne bo tuguk; obwa, kebar inendet, ak kenyaban tuguk che kata tun bunjin inendet." 
Matthew21:39 Ak kinam inendet, ak kotoorta komanda eng’ mbar, ak kobar." 
Matthew21:40 Noto anyun ye nyo chitab kobo mbaretab sabibuk, koyachin nee meechoto?" 
Matthew21:41 Kilenji, Barei chichoto bo mbaret bichoto yaachen eng’ baret ne ya, ak komanakyi mbaretab sabibuk meek alak, che igochin inendet logoek eng’ ruratenywa." 
Matthew21:42 Kilenji Jesu ichek, Tom osoman sirutik kele, Koita ne kiesio teegik, Kigeyai noto koek metit ne bo luita: Kibunu ni Kiptaiyat Ak kiek kwong’utiet eng’ konyekyok?" 
Matthew21:43 Noto anyun amwawok ale, kirebenok bounatetab Jehovah, ak kigochi bororiet age ne yiei logoekyik." 
Matthew21:44 Ak inendet ne ibutyin koi barak koilei konyaknyaksei: ago age tugul ne tururjingei koiito, konyinyirsei." 
Matthew21:45 Ak ye kingogas tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik kalewenaikyik, konai kole kang’alali agobo ichek." 
Matthew21:46 Ak ye kingocheng’ konam inendet, koiywei tuiyosiek, amu kiiyani kole maotiot inendet." 
Matthew22:1 Ak king’alalji Jesu ichek kogeny eng’ kalewenaik, kolenji," 
Matthew22:2 Kiyanie bounatetab kipsengwet laitoriat anum, ne kiyachi werinnyi igortab katunisiet," 
Matthew22:3 ak kiiyokto otwogikyik koguur ichek che kiga kemwachi agobo igortab katunisiet: ak kima cham kobwa. 
Matthew22:4 Kiiyokto kogeny otwogik alak, kole, Omwachi ichek che kiga kemwachi, olenji, Kaachob amitwogikyuk: kageeny eikyuk ak alak che akwaen, ak chobotin tuguk tugul: obwa igortab katunisiet." 
Matthew22:5 Ago ma iit ng’alekyik, ak koba ortinwekwak, kwo age mbarennyi, kwo age boisiennyi ne bo mung’aret;" 
Matthew22:6 ko che king’et, konam otwogikyik, ak konyalil, ak kobar." 
Matthew22:7 Ago kinerech laitoriat; ak kiiyokto lugosiekyik, kobar rumichoto, ak kobeel nganasenywa." 
Matthew22:8 Kimwachi anyun otwogikyik kolenji, Chobot katunisiet, ago ma nyolji che kiga kemwachi." 
Matthew22:9 Noto anyun, oba ole besiechin ortinwek, ak oguurji igorta ne bo katunisiet tugul che konyoru." 
Matthew22:10 Kiba anyun otwogichoto ortinwek, ak koyum tugul che kinyor, che yaach koboto che miach: ak kinyi toek gotab katunisiet." 
Matthew22:11 Ago ye kingomong’ laitoriat kogeer toek, kogeer chito eng’ oloto ne kima ilaach ngorietab katunisiet:" 
Matthew22:12 ak kilenji, Choruani, kenyonunde ano oli ametinye ngorietab katunisiet? Ak kinam kut, ma twek." 
Matthew22:13 Kilenji anyun laitoriat kiboitinik, Orat inendet eunek ak kelyek, ak owirji mesundeito eng’ oli bo sang’; egu eng’ oloto rirek ak nyeetab kelek." 
Matthew22:14 Amu kiguurei che chang’, ago kileweni che ng’ering’." 
Matthew22:15 Kiba anyun Parisaik, koruoch ole namdoi inendet eng’ ng’alekyik." 
Matthew22:16 Ak kiiyokto alamalyenywa koba ole mi inendet, koboto Herodik, kolenji, Konetindoni, kingen kele i bo iman, ak ineti oretab Jehovah eng’ iman, ameiti chi tugul: amu megeere togochikab bik." 
Matthew22:17 Mwawech anyun, Ibwati nee inye? Tos chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik kigochi kodi Kaisari, anan achicha?" 
Matthew22:18 Ago kinai Jesu yaitienywa, ak kole, Amu nee si otiema, okwek chombilichu?" 
Matthew22:19 Oborua feda ne bo kodi. Ak kiipchi denarit. 
Matthew22:20 Ak kilenji, Itondab ng’o ni, ak siret?" 
Matthew22:21 Kolenji, Bo Kaisari. Kolenji anyun, Ogochi Kaisari tuguk che bo Kaisari; ak ogochi Jehovah tuguk che bo Jehovah." 
Matthew22:22 Ak ye kingogas, kokwong’io, ak kobagach inendet, koba orenywa." 
Matthew22:23 Kibwanji inendet betunoto Sadukaik, che mwaei kole, mami ng’eetyetab che kigobek: ak koteebe," 
Matthew22:24 kole, Konetindoni, kimwa Musa kole, Ngo me chi, ama tinyei lagok, kondi ng’etab kam osotiondonoto, si kolalji mat ng’etab kam." 
Matthew22:25 Kimi kobotech murenik tisabu che tupcho: ak kiitunis ne bo tai, ak kime, ama sich lakwa. Kondi osotiondennyi ng’etab kamet;" 
Matthew22:26 kiyai ko u noto ne bo aeng’ agine, ak ne bo somok, agoi ne bo tisab." 
Matthew22:27 Ak kingogesgei tugul, kome kobogoriot agine." 
Matthew22:28 Noto anyun eng’ ng’eetyet kobunji ng’o osotiondonoto eng’ choto tisab? Amu kiga kotun tugul. 
Matthew22:29 Ago kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Olele, amu mongen sirutik, anan kimnatetab Jehovah." 
Matthew22:30 Amu eng’ ng’eetyet ko maitunisiei, ama kigoitoi kitun, ago kergeitu ak malaikaisiek che mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew22:31 Noto anyun, agobo ng’eetyetab bik che kigobek, ko kima osoman ne kimwawok Jehovah kole," 
Matthew22:32 A Jehovah ne bo Abraham, a Jehovah ne bo Isak, a Jehovah ne bo Jakobo? Jehovah ko ma Jehovah ne bo che kigobek, ago bo che soptos." 
Matthew22:33 Ak ye kingogas tuiyosiek, kokwong’io agobo konetisiennyi." 
Matthew22:34 Ago ye kingogas Parisaik kole kagonam kut ng’alekyik Sadukaik, koyumgei." 
Matthew22:35 Ak kiteebe inendet age eng’ ichek, ng’omotiotab ng’atutik, kotiemei inendet," 
Matthew22:36 kole, Konetindoni, ngoro ng’atutiet ne o eng’ Ng’atutik?" 
Matthew22:37 Ak kilenji, Cham Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ komugul." 
Matthew22:38 Nito ng’atutiet ne o ak ko ne bo tai. 
Matthew22:39 Ak ne bo aeng’ ne kergei ak nito ko ni, Cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ole ichamdoige." 
Matthew22:40 Tononie Ng’atutik tugul ak maotik, ng’atutichu aeng’." 
Matthew22:41 Ak kingota koyumigei Parisaik, koteebe Jesu ichek ng’olyo," 
Matthew22:42 kole, Obwati nee okwek agobo Kristo? Weritab ng’o inendet? Kolenji, Weritab Daudi." 
Matthew22:43 Kolenji ichek, Amu nee anyun si koguure Daudi inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet, Kiptaiyat, kole," 
Matthew22:44 Kilenji Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, Tebe eunnyu ne bo tai, Agoi ande buniguk keldebesaikab kelyeguk?" 
Matthew22:45 Ngo kuure anyun Daudi inendet Kiptaiyat, ko werinnyi eng’ nee?" 
Matthew22:46 Ak kima imuch age tugul kowolji inendet ng’olyo, ak koboch betunoto agoi, ko mata kogany chi koteebe inendet ng’olyo kogeny." 
Matthew23:1 Kimwachi Jesu anyun tuiyosiek ak alamalyennyi," 
Matthew23:2 kolenji, Tebe sirik ak Parisaik ng’echeretab Musa:" 
Matthew23:3 noto anyun oyai ak orib tuguk alak tugul che ng’atok; ago amoyai ko u boisionikwak; amu mwaei ichek ama yaei. 
Matthew23:4 Ee, ratei lautik che nyigisen ak ko bichien eng’ laiset, ak konde tigigoikab bik; ama istoi icheget eng’ mornet agenge." 
Matthew23:5 Ago yaei boisionikwak tugul si kogeer bik: amu yaei kotebeesitu lolotinwekab sirutik; ak kobaroi tabanwekab ngoroikwak," 
Matthew23:6 ak kochamei ole toogunot eng’ igorwek, ak ng’echerok che eechen eng’ sunagogisiek," 
Matthew23:7 ak kagatosiek eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet, ak koguure bik icheget, Rabbi." 
Matthew23:8 Ago amongeguurenok Rabbi: amu agenge konetindeng’wong’, ak otupche okwek tugul." 
Matthew23:9 Amoguure chi eng’ ng’ony, baba: amu agenge Kwandang’wong’, inendet ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew23:10 Amocham keguurenok kandoik: amu agenge kandoindeng’wong’, Kristo noto." 
Matthew23:11 Ago inendet ne o eng’ kwenung’wong’ koegu kiboitiondeng’wong’. 
Matthew23:12 Ak age tugul ne ieetegei kiming’ini; ak age tugul ne iming’inigei kieeti. 
Matthew23:13 Ago bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu ogere bik bounatetab kipsengwet: amu moite okweget oloto, amochamjini che machei koit oloto, koba." 
Matthew23:14 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu oame gorikab mosogik, ak osae sautik che koen eng’ ng’alseng’wong’: noto anyun onyoru kiruoget ne siirtoot." 
Matthew23:15 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu omuuti nyanjet ak emet owale chito kobunjok; ak ye kagobunjok, oyai inendet koek lakwetab Gehenna konyil aeng’ kosiirok." 
Matthew23:16 Bwa okwek, kandoik che o koriotin, che omwae ole, Age tugul ne iyosie hekalut, ko ma kiy; ago age tugul ne iyosie tahabu che bo hekalut, ko besenindet." 
Matthew23:17 Okwek che o berber ak o koriotin: ngoro ne o, tahabu, anan hekalut ne kiitilili tahabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ak, Age tugul ne iyosie kaptisisiet, ko ma kiy; ago age tugul ne iyosie kagochinet ne mi kaptisisiet, ko besinindet inendet." 
Matthew23:19 Okwek kipkoratinik: ngoro ne o, kagochinet, anan kaptisisiet, ne itilili kagochinet?" 
Matthew23:20 Noto anyun inendet ne iyosie kaptisisiet, koyosie kaptisisionoto, ak tuguk tugul che mitei yoto." 
Matthew23:21 Ak inendet ne iyosie hekalut, koyosie oloto tilil, ak inendet ne menyei oloto." 
Matthew23:22 Ak inendet ne iyosie kipsengwet, koyosie ng’echeretab Jehovah, ak inendet ne tebe ng’echeranato." 
Matthew23:23 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu ogoitoi kebebertab taman ne bo heduosmon ak bisalik ak kamon, amoyae ng’alek che eechen che bo Ng’atutik, choto ko kiruoget, ak rirenetab ge, ak kayanet; ago kanyoljinok oyai chuto, amobagach chun alak." 
Matthew23:24 Ee, okwek kandoik che o koriotin, ogeneni tingwichet, ak olugui tambesiet." 
Matthew23:25 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu otilili kikombet ak sanit barak, ago nyiitotin orit rebisiet ak keiyandit." 
Matthew23:26 Inye Parisaindet ne korat, itilil korok kikombet ak sanit orit, si kobiit kotililitu barak agichek." 
Matthew23:27 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu o kerge ak kererisiek che kigesal koleelagitu, che kororon iman barak eng’ keeret, ago nyiitotin orit kowek che bo bik che kigobek, ak muruonindo tugul." 
Matthew23:28 O u noto ak okwek, otoogu ko u bikab imanda eng’ taitab bik, ago nyiitat oring’wong’ chombilisiet ak tengekto." 
Matthew23:29 Bwa okwek, sirik ak Parisaik, chombilik! Amu oteeche kererisiek che bo maotik, ak olelesanjini kererisiekab che bo imanda." 
Matthew23:30 Ak omwae ole, Nda kigimi eng’ betusiek che bo kwanisiekyok, ta kima keyamdoi ak icheget korotikab maotik." 
Matthew23:31 Noto obaorianjinige ole, o werikab ichek che kibar maotik." 
Matthew23:32 Onyiit anyun kerutiet ne bo kwanisiekwok. 
Matthew23:33 Okwek erenok, o lagokab erenok che ng’wonen, ochilildoi ano eng’ kiruogetab Gehenna!" 
Matthew23:34 Noto anyun, ogeero, ayokwok maotik, ak bik che ng’omen, ak sirik: obare alak eng’ ichek ak ogartoti alak, ak obire kipcharitit alak eng’ ichek eng’ sunagogisiekwok, ak ousoti kong’eete nganaset age agoi nganaset age:" 
Matthew23:35 si kobwanjok korotik tugul che bo imanda che kigetumda eng’ ng’ony, koboch korotikab Abil ne ki bo iman agoi korotikab Sakaria weritab Barakia, ne kiobar eng’ kwenutab hekalut ak kaptisisiet." 
Matthew23:36 Amwawok, iman, ale, Bwanjin ibini tuguchu tugul." 
Matthew23:37 Ee Jerusalem, Jerusalem, ne barei maotik, ak kolage koik ichek che kigiyokyi! Kiamach konyil ata ayum lagoguk, agot ko u ye iyumi ngogiet arekyik eng’ kebebaikyik, ago ma ocham!" 
Matthew23:38 Ogeero, kagebagakwok gong’wong’ koek kipkubere." 
Matthew23:39 Amu amwawok ale, Ma ogeera kogeny, agoi omwa ole, Iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat." 
Matthew24:1 Ak kimanda Jesu eng’ hekalut, kwo bandanyi, ak kibwanji alamalyennyi ak koborji inendet teeksosiekab hekalut." 
Matthew24:2 Ago kiwolji kole, Mogeere tuguchu tugul? Amwawok, iman, ale, Mang’etune koita agenge baragutab age, ne ma kiwirjin ng’ony." 
Matthew24:3 Ak ye kitebye ng’ony eng’ tulwetab Emitik, kobwanji inendet alamalyet komi inegei, ak kole, Mwawech, egu au tuguchu? Ak tun u nee kaborunetab nyonuneng’ung’, ak kagesunetab ng’ony?" 
Matthew24:4 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Oripge si maibeetok chi." 
Matthew24:5 Amu bwanei che chang’ eng’ kainennyu kolen, A Kristo; ak kobeet che chang’." 
Matthew24:6 Tun ogase agobo lugosiek ak ng’alek agobo baretab ge: oripge si moarogense: amu bwanei tuguchu matiny; ago kotom koit kagesunet. 
Matthew24:7 Amu setyin bororiet age bororiet age, ak setyin bounatet age bounatet age: ak kobiit rubosiek ak botanetab ng’ony eng’ oldinwek che terotin." 
Matthew24:8 Ago tuguchu tugul ko taunetab ng’woninwek. 
Matthew24:9 Ak kondeak anyun ole mi nyalilda, ak kobarak; ak kowechok bororiosiek tugul agobo kainennyu." 
Matthew24:10 Ak kinach che chang’ anyun, ak kong’wektagei, ak kosurio ichegei eng’ ichegei." 
Matthew24:11 Ak tun ng’eetos maotik che chang’ che bo lembech, ak kobeet che chang’." 
Matthew24:12 Ak amu tesoksei yaitiet, kogaitititu chamnyetab che chang’." 
Matthew24:13 Ago inendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet, kesoru." 
Matthew24:14 Ak keamdaati logoiywechu miach bo bounatet eng’ ng’ony komugul koek baornatet eng’ bororiosiek tugul; ak koit anyun kagesunet. 
Matthew24:15 Ye ogeer anyun kit ne kiwechei ne bo ng’emisiet, ne kimwa maotiot Daniel, kotonone ole tilil (ingoguiyo inendet ne somani)," 
Matthew24:16 ingomwechi tulonok anyun ichek che mi Judea: 
Matthew24:16 ingomwechi tulonok anyun ichek che mi Judea: 
Matthew24:17 ama chorugei inendet ne mi got barak si konem tuguk che mi gonnyi: 
Matthew24:18 ama weekyingei let ne mi mbar si koib ngoriennyi. 
Matthew24:19 Ago bwa eng’ ichek che chio ak che reritos eng’ betusiechoto! 
Matthew24:20 Osa anyun si mabiit mweeng’wong’ eng’ betusiekab kaititindo, anan eng’ betutab sabato:" 
Matthew24:21 amu egu anyun nyalilda ne o, ne kitom kobiitu koboch taunetab ng’ony agoi nguno, ama koegu kogeny." 
Matthew24:22 Ak nda ma kiga ketil konwagitu betusiechoto, ta magisoru chi: ago kitilei betusiechoto agobo che lewenotin." 
Matthew24:23 Ngo mwawok chi age tugul eng’ betunoto kole, Ogeero, mi oli Kristo, anan olo; ko mat oyan." 
Matthew24:24 Amu ng’eetos Kristoisiek che bo lembech, ak maotik che bo lembech, ak kobortoi kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che eechen; si kobeet, agot che lewenotin, nda imugaksei." 
Matthew24:25 Ogeero, kaasib amwawok." 
Matthew24:26 Noto anyun ngo mwawok kole, Ogeero, mitei inendet surkwen; ko mat obe: Ogeero, mitei inendet got ne bo orit; ko mat oyan." 
Matthew24:27 Amu u ye mong’u kalyelet eng’ kong’asis, ak kegeerot agoi cherongo; egu ko u noto nyonunetab Weritab chi." 
Matthew24:28 Oldo age tugul ole mi musto, koyumjingei oloto motong’wek." 
Matthew24:29 Ak ne ma tianit, ko kagogesgei nyalilda ne bo betusiechoto, koimenit asista, ama koluu arawet, ak kororok kecheik eng’ kipsengwet, ak kitumdum kimnatosiek che bo kipsengwet;" 
Matthew24:30 ak kotook anyun eng’ kipsengwet kaborunetab Weritab chi: ak koteiyo anyun bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, ak kogeer konyonei Weritab chi eng’ baragutab bolik che bo kipsengwet ak kimnatet ak lilindo ne o." 
Matthew24:31 Ak koyokto malaikaisiekyik ak cheet ne o ne bo iriaget, ak koyum lewenikyik kobunu usonaik ang’wan, koboch tabandab kipsengwet agoi tabanda age." 
Matthew24:32 Onetge anyun kalewenetab mogoiywet: ye kang’arng’aritu temenikyik, ak kong’atyo sogek, onai ole negit kesisiet;" 
Matthew24:33 o u noto ak okwek ye ogeer tuguchu tugul, onai ole kagorik inendet, mi kurgotik." 
Matthew24:34 Amwawok, iman, ale, Masiirtoi ibini, ama isulda tuguchuto tugul." 
Matthew24:35 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ago masiirtoi ng’alekyuk." 
Matthew24:36 Ago manaei chi age tugul agobo betunoto ak sainato, manaei agot malaikaisiek che bo kipsengwet, anan Werit, ago Kwanda inegei." 
Matthew24:37 Ko u ole kiteptoi betusiechu ki bo Noa, egu ko u noto nyonunetab Weritab chi." 
Matthew24:38 Amu u eng’ betusiechoto ye kitom kobiit maranet kiamisiei ak kieeisei, kiitunisiei ak kiigoitoi kitun, agoi betut ne kiwa Noa melit orit," 
Matthew24:39 ak kima nai ichek agoi koit maranet, ak koges ichek tugul; egu ko u noto nyonunetab Weritab chi." 
Matthew24:40 Tun boisiei murenik aeng’u eng’ mbar; kimuti age, kebagakta age:" 
Matthew24:41 ng’aisei kobogorisiek aeng’u eng’ koita agenge; kimuti age, kebagakta age." 
Matthew24:42 Oripse anyun: amu mongen betut ne nyonei Kiptaiyandeng’wong’. 
Matthew24:43 Ago onai ni, ole, nda kiga nai chitab kobo got kole, sait ngoro ne nyonei chorindet, ta kiripsei, ak ta kima kochamdoi kebut gonnyi." 
Matthew24:44 Noto anyun ochoboge ak okwek: amu nyonei Weritab chi eng’ sait ne mobwati ole nyonei. 
Matthew24:45 Ng’o anyun otwogindet ne kiyani ak ko ng’om, ne kiinde kiptaiyandennyi kotononji gonnyi, ak kogochi bik amitwogikwak eng’ betut ne yamei?" 
Matthew24:46 Baibai otwogindonoto, ye weeigei kiptaiyandennyi konyor koyaei ko u noto." 
Matthew24:47 Amwawok, iman, ale, Indoi inendet koboi tuguk tugul che tinyei." 
Matthew24:48 Ago ngo mwa otwogindet ne ya eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Ta kogaegei kiptaiyandennyu:" 
Matthew24:49 ak kotoi kobir che otwogik koboto inendet, ak koamisiei ak koeeisei koboto che bogitos;" 
Matthew24:50 nyonei anyun kiptaiyatab otwogindonoto eng’ betut ne len inendet manyonei, ak eng’ sait ne manaei," 
Matthew24:51 ak kobir mising’ ak kogochi kebebertanyi koboto chombilik: egu eng’ oloto rirek ak nyeetab kelek. 
Matthew25:1 Kiyanie anyun bounatetab kipsengwet bergeinik taman, che kiib taisiekwak, koba kotorokta sandetab katunisiet." 
Matthew25:2 Ki berberen mutu eng’ ichek, ak ki ng’omen mutu." 
Matthew25:3 Amu ye kingoib che berber taisiekwak, ko ma ipto ichek mwanik:" 
Matthew25:4 ago kiib che ng’omen mwanik eng’ chuboisiekwak koboto taisiekwak. 
Matthew25:5 Ak kingota kogaegei sandet, kobirto met tugul ak koruiyo." 
Matthew25:6 Ago kibiit waagat kemoi kwen, Ogeero, kagoit sandet! Omong’u otoroch inendet." 
Matthew25:7 King’eetyo anyun bergeinichato tugul, kochob taisiekwak." 
Matthew25:8 Ak kilenji anyun che berber che ng’omen, Onagech mwanikwok; amu machei komisogis taisiekyok." 
Matthew25:9 Ago kiwolji che ng’omen, kolenji, Abere mayamech achek ak okwek: kaigai obe ole mi che aldoi, ak oaljige." 
Matthew25:10 Ak kingota kobendi koalisiei, koit sandet; ak komong’ji anyun che chobotin igortab katunisiet ak inendet: ak kigiger kurget." 
Matthew25:11 Ak eng’ let kobwa bergeinik chugai agichek, ak kole, Kiptaiyandani, Kiptaiyandani, yatwech." 
Matthew25:12 Ago kiwolji kolenji, Amwawok, iman, ale, Mangenok." 
Matthew25:13 Noto anyun oripse, amu mongen betut anan sait." 
Matthew25:14 Amu u ye wendi chi emet age, ak koguur otwogikyik, ak kogochi tugukyik." 
Matthew25:15 Kiigochi age talentaisiek mut, kogochi age aeng’, kogochi age agenge: age tugul ko u kamugennyi; ak kwo bandanyi." 
Matthew25:16 Kiwa anyun inendet ne kitaach talentaisiek mut kwo koboisie, ak kinyor talentaisiek alak mut." 
Matthew25:17 Kiigei noto agine ne kitaach aeng’; kinyor aeng’ alak. 
Matthew25:18 Ago kiwa ne kitaach agenge kwo kobalji ng’ony, ak kiuny feda ne bo kiptaiyandennyi." 
Matthew25:19 Ye kingobata betusiek che chang’, konyo kiptaiyatab otwogichoto, ak koiit koboto icheget." 
Matthew25:20 Ak kinyo inendet ne kiga taach talentaisiek mut koibu talentaisiek mut alak, ak kole, Kiptaiyandani, kiigona talentaisiek mut: keero, kianyoru talentaisiek mut alak." 
Matthew25:21 Kilenji kiptaiyandennyi, Kiiyai ne mie, otwogindoni mie ak ne kiyani: koiegu ne bo iman eng’ tuguk che ng’ering’, kandein ibou tuguk che chang’: mong’ji anyun boiboiyetab kiptaiyandeng’ung’." 
Matthew25:22 Ak kinyo agine ne kiga taach talentaisiek aeng’ ak kole, Kiptaiyandani, kiigona talentaisiek aeng’: keero, kianyoru talentaisiek alak aeng’." 
Matthew25:23 Kilenji kiptaiyandennyi, Kiiyai ne mie, otwogindoni mie ak ne kiyani; koiegu ne bo iman eng’ tuguk che ng’ering’, kandein ibou tuguk che chang’: mong’ji anyun boiboiyetab kiptaiyandeng’ung’." 
Matthew25:24 Ak kinyo agine ne kiga taach talentait agenge ak kole, Kiptaiyandani, kiangenin ale, i chi ne kolgol, igese eng’ ole ma igolji, ak iyumi eng’ ole ma ilechi:" 
Matthew25:25 ak kiaiywei, ak kiawe auny talentaing’ung’ eng’ ng’ony: keero, ee, nam king’ung’." 
Matthew25:26 Ago kiwolji kiptaiyandennyi ak kolenji, Inye otwogindet ne ya ak ko choriren, kiinai ile agese eng’ ole ma agol, ak ayumi eng’ ole kima alechi;" 
Matthew25:27 kiga nyoljin anyun inde fedaisiekyuk ole tesoksei fedaisiek, ta kaataach ko kaweege chechuk koboto che kitesak." 
Matthew25:28 Noto anyun orebe inendet talentait, ak ogochi inendet ne tinyei talentaisiek taman." 
Matthew25:29 Amu kigochin age tugul ne tinyei, si kosich che chang’: ago kirebe inendet ne matinyei, agot ne tinyei." 
Matthew25:30 Ak otoorji otwogindet ne manyolu mesundeito ne bo sang’, ole egu rirek ak nyeetab kelek." 
Matthew25:31 Ago ye nyo Weritab chi eng’ torornatennyi, koboto malaikaisiek tugul, kotebe anyun ng’echeretab torornatennyi:" 
Matthew25:32 ak kiyumji tainnyi bororiosiek tugul: ak kokwei ichek kobesio, ko u ye ibestos mestowot kechirek ak ng’ororek:" 
Matthew25:33 ak konde kechirek eunnyi ne bo tai, ak ng’ororek eng’ katam." 
Matthew25:34 Yeityo komwachi Laitoriat ichek che mi eunnyi ne bo tai, kolenji, Obwa, okwek che oberurotin che o bo Baba, onam bounatet ne kigechobwok koboch ko kagilumda ng’ony:" 
Matthew25:35 amu kiama rubet, ak kiogona aam: kiama melel, ak kionaga aee: kia too ak kiotaacha;" 
Matthew25:36 kiami ach ngor, ak kiolaaksewa: kiamiani, ak kiobwa ogeera: kiami korgoret, ak kiobwanja." 
Matthew25:37 Kowolji anyun che bo imanda, kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, kigigeerin au koamin rubet, ak kebain? Anan koamin melel, ak kinagin iee?" 
Matthew25:38 Ak kigigeerin au ko i too, ak ketaachin? Anan imi ach ngor, ak kilaakseun?" 
Matthew25:39 Ak kigigeerin au imiani, anan eng’ korgoret, ak kebwanjin?" 
Matthew25:40 Ak kowolji Laitoriat kolenji, Amwawok, iman, ale, Ko u ye kioyachi agenge eng’ tupchosiechuchuk, agot che mengechen eng’ tugul, ko kioyaiywa." 
Matthew25:41 Kolenji anyun ichek che mi eutab katam, Oba eng’ ole ami, okwek che o chubotin, oba mat ne bo koigeny ne kigechopchi oindet ak malaikaisiekyik:" 
Matthew25:42 amu kiama rubet, ak kima ogona aam: kiama melel, ak kima onaga aee:" 
Matthew25:43 kia too, ak kima otaacha: kiami ach ngor, ak kima olaaksewa; kiamiani, ak eng’ korgoret, ak kima obwa ogeera." 
Matthew25:44 Kowol anyun agichek, ak kole, Kiptaiyandani, kigigeerin au koamin rubet, anan melel, anan ko i too, anan imi ach kngor, anan imiani, anan imi korgoret, ama kiboisieun?" 
Matthew25:45 Kowolji anyun kole, Amwawok, iman, ale, Ko u ye ma oyachi agenge eng’ chu mengech eng’ tugul, ko ma oyaiywa." 
Matthew25:46 Ak bendi chu ole mi nyalilda ne bo koigeny: ago bendi che bo imanda ole mi sobondab koigeny. 
Matthew26:1 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jesu ng’alechu tugul, kolenji alamalyennyi," 
Matthew26:2 Ongen ole ye ibata betusiek aeng’u koek paska, ak keng’wekta Weritab chi kigartat eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Matthew26:3 Kiiyumgei anyun tisiik che eechen, ak boisiekab bichoto, eng’ seremutab gotab tisiindet ne o, ne kiguure Kaiapa;" 
Matthew26:4 ak kitet ichek ng’alek kole si kobiit konam Jesu eng’ ng’alset, ak kobar inendet." 
Matthew26:5 Ago kimwa kole, Ma eng’ betusiekab igorta, si mang’eet bolatet eng’ bik." 
Matthew26:6 Ak ye kimi Jesu Betania, eng’ gotab Simon ne kiamei mogondosik," 
Matthew26:7 konyonji inendet kobogoriot ne kitinyei chubait ne mi mwaita ne nyandut ne bichii mising’ alyennyi, ak korong’ji metitab Jesu, ye kita koamisiei." 
Matthew26:8 Ago ye kingogeer alamalyet, konerekso kole, Bo nee kaseroni?" 
Matthew26:9 Amu kota kialdoe mwai tuguk che chang’, ak kigochi kibananok." 
Matthew26:10 Ago ye kingonai Jesu, kolenji, Kalya si oiim kobogoriondoni? Amu kayaiywa boisiet ne mie." 
Matthew26:11 Amu otinye kotugul kibananok; ago mami ane kobotok kotugul. 
Matthew26:12 Amu ye rong’ji mwaita bortanyu, ko kachopcha tubet." 
Matthew26:13 Amwawok, iman, ale, Ui tugul ole tun kiamdaate logoiywechu miach eng’ ng’ony komugul, kemwaei agine ne kagoyai kobogoriondonito koek ne kibwate inendet." 
Matthew26:14 Kiwa anyun age eng’ choto taman ak aeng’ ne keguure Judas Iskariot, ole mi tisiik che eechen," 
Matthew26:15 ak kole, Ochame ogona nee, si ande inendet eunekwok? Ak kigamanji inendet fedaisiek sosom." 
Matthew26:16 Ak koboch yoto kocheng’ boroindo ne ng’wektoe inendet. 
Matthew26:17 Ak kibwanji alamalyet Jesu eng’ betutab tai ne bo betusiekab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ak kolenji, Imache kechobun ano ole iame paska?" 
Matthew26:18 Ak kile, Oba nganaset ole mi chi anum, ak olenji, Kale Konetindet, Kagorik sainnyu; ayaei paska eng’ gong’ung’ koboto alamalyennyu." 
Matthew26:19 Ak kiyai alamalyet ko u ye king’at Jesu; ak kichob paska. 
Matthew26:20 Ak ye kingoek koskoleny kotebi eng’ amisiet koboto alamalyet taman ak aeng’; 
Matthew26:21 ak ye kita koamisiei, kole, Amwawok, iman, ale, Ng’wektaa agenge eng’ okwek." 
Matthew26:22 Ak kiarogenso mising’, ak kotoi komwachi inendet age tugul kolenji, Tos ane, Kiptaiyandani?" 
Matthew26:23 Ak kiwol ak kole, Inendet ne kagiburburtoi tuwai eng’ tabet, noto ne ng’wektaa." 
Matthew26:24 Wendi Weritab chi, ko u ye kigisir agobo inendet: ago bwa chichoto ne king’wektoe Weritab chi! Kita mie eng’ chichoto nda kima kisich." 
Matthew26:25 Ak kiwol Judas, ne king’ektoi inendet, kole, Tos ane, Rabbi? Kolenji, Kaimwa." 
Matthew26:26 Ak ye kiamisiei, konam Jesu makatiat ak koberur, ak kobutul, ak kogochi alamalyet, kole, Onam, oam; ni ko bortanyu." 
Matthew26:27 Ak kinam kikombet, ak komwa kongoi, ak kogochi ichek, ak kolenji, Oee okwek tugul chuto;" 
Matthew26:28 amu chuto korotikyuk che bo arorutiet, che kitumdoi agobo che chang’ che bo nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik." 
Matthew26:29 Ago amwawok ale, koboch nguno ko ma aee che bo logoechu bo sabibuk, agoi betunoto ne aee che leelach kobotok eng’ bounatetab Baba." 
Matthew26:30 Ak ye kingo kagotien tiendo komanda koba tulwetab Emitik. 
Matthew26:31 Yeityo komwachi Jesu ichek kolenji, Kinachok okwek tugul agobo ane kemouni: amu sirat kole, Tun abire mestowot, ak koyesta kechirek che bo akwet." 
Matthew26:32 Ago ye tun king’eeta, andoenok awendi Galili." 
Matthew26:33 Ago kiwol Petero kolenji, Agot nginach tugul agobo inye, ko magoi kinacha ane." 
Matthew26:34 Kolenji Jesu, Amwaun iman, ale, kotom kote kipsoiywet kemouni, iesioa konyil somok." 
Matthew26:35 Kolenji Petero, Agot ngo nyolu ame koboten, ko maesioin. Kimwa ko u noto alamalyet tugul." 
Matthew26:36 Kinyo anyun Jesu koboto icheget ole kiguure Getsemane, ak kolenji alamalyennyi, Otebi eng’ yu, si ko ta awa yun asa." 
Matthew26:37 Ak kiimut Petero ak werik aeng’ che bo Sebedi, ak kotoi koarogen, ak konyigisit muguleldanyi mising’." 
Matthew26:38 Kimwachi ichek anyun, kolenji, Arogeni mising’ sobondanyu, agoi meet: otebe yu; ak oripse kobota." 
Matthew26:39 Ak kiwa tai kitigin, ak kobutyi ng’ony, ak kosa, kole, Ee Baba, ngomugaksei, kosiirtoena kikombani: ago, ma ko u ye amache ane, ago ko u ye imache inye." 
Matthew26:40 Ak kinyo ole mi alamalyet, ak konyor ichek koruitos, ak kolenji Petero, Nee, kaga momuchi oripse kobota agot sait agenge?" 
Matthew26:41 Oripse ak osae, si mochut yomset: chamei tamirmiriet iman, ago nyaluli borto." 
Matthew26:42 Kiwa kogeny ne bo aeng’, ak kisa, kole, Ee Baba, ngo ma chamdaat kosiirtoena kikombani, ama aee, ingoyaak anyun mageng’ung’." 
Matthew26:43 Ak kinyo kogeny ak konyor ichek koruitos, amu ki nyigisen konyekwak." 
Matthew26:44 Ak kibagach ichek kogeny, kwo, ak kisa ne bo somok, komwa ng’alechugaita." 
Matthew26:45 Kinyonji anyun alamalyet, ak kolenji, Oruiye nguno, omuuny: ogeero, kait sait, ak kageng’wekyi Weritab chi eunekab kiptengeginik." 
Matthew26:46 Ong’eetye, kebe: ogeero, kagoit inendet ne ng’wektaa." 
Matthew26:47 Ak kingota kong’alali, ogeero, konyo Judas, age eng’ taman ak aeng’, koboto bik che chang’ che tinyei rotokab chok ak siarisiek, kobunu oldab tisiik che eechen ak boisiekab bichoto." 
Matthew26:48 Ak kiiborji ichek kaborunet, inendet ne king’wektoi Jesu, kole, Inendet ne ang’ututi ko inendet noto: onam." 
Matthew26:49 Ak kinyonji Jesu eng’ yoto, ak kole, Chamge, Rabbi; ak kong’utut inendet." 
Matthew26:50 Ak kilenji Jesu, Choruani, yai kit ne kenyonjini. Kibwa anyun bichoto ak koyogoito eunekwak konam Jesu." 
Matthew26:51 Ak ogeero, kiiyogoito eunnyi age eng’ ichek che kimi koboto Jesu, ak kong’us rotwennyi bo chok, ak koeb otwogindetab tisiindet ne o, kong’eti itinnyi." 
Matthew26:52 Kolenji Jesu anyun, Iweekyi rotweng’ung’ ole kami: amu begu eng’ rotokab chok tugul che namei rotokab chok." 
Matthew26:53 Anan ilen mamuchi asom Baba, ak koyokwa agot nguno malaikaisiek che siirei lugosiek taman ak aeng’?" 
Matthew26:54 Isuldoitoi ano anyun sirutik, che len egu ko u nito matiny?" 
Matthew26:55 Kilenji Jesu tuiyosiek eng’ sainato, Komong’u ko u ye osetyini rebindet, otinye rotokab chok ak siarisiek si onama? Kiatebye betusiek tugul eng’ hekalut anetisiei ak kima onama." 
Matthew26:56 Ago kabwa chu tugul, si kobiit kosulda sirutik che bo maotik. Kibagakta inendet anyun alamalyet tugul, ak komwei." 
Matthew26:57 Ak icheget che kiga nam Jesu ko kiimut kwo gotab tisiindet ne o ne kiguure Kaiapa, ole kiga koyumjigei sirik ak boisiek." 
Matthew26:58 Ago kiisubot Petero inendet eng’ ye loo kot koit seremutab gotab tisiindet ne o, ak kiwa go, ak kiteb ng’ony koboto askarik, kole, si kogeer ole igesundogei." 
Matthew26:59 Ak kicheng’ tisiik che eechen ak kapkiruoget komugul baornatet ne bo lembech agobo Jesu, si kobiit kobar inendet;" 
Matthew26:60 ak kimanyor, agot nganda kibwa baorinik che chang’ che bo lembech. Ago eng’ let kobwa aeng’u," 
Matthew26:61 ak kole, Kimwa chichi kole, Amuchi ang’em hekalut, ak ateech eng’ betusiek somok." 
Matthew26:62 Ak kitonon tisiindet ne o, ak kolenji, Mewolu kiy? Nee baornatani baorianjinin bichu?" 
Matthew26:63 Ago kisis Jesu. Ak kilenji tisiindet ne o, Ayosieun eng’ Jehovah ne sobei, ale, mwawech ngo i Kristo, Weritab Jehovah." 
Matthew26:64 Kolenji Jesu, Kaimwa: ago amwawok ale, Koboch nguno kotun ogeere Weritab chi kotebyei eng’ eutab tai ne bo kamuktaet, ak konyonei eng’ baragutab bolik che bo kipsengwet." 
Matthew26:65 Kigerer anyun tisiindet ne o ngoroikyik, kole, Kagomwa ne ya: ta kemage nee baorinik alak? Ogeero, kaogas nguno mwaet ne ya:" 
Matthew26:66 olen nee? Kowol kole, Nyoljin kome." 
Matthew26:67 Yeityo kosing’ilji togennyi ak koluch: ak korabach alak," 
Matthew26:68 kole, Ng’ang’wech, inye Kristo: iboruech ne kakwerin." 
Matthew26:69 Ak kitebyei Petero eng’ seremutab got: ak kiwa chepto ye mi inendet, ak kolenji, Koimi aginye koboto Jesu Galilindet." 
Matthew26:70 Ago kitiiyo eng’ taitab tugul, kole, Mangen noto imwae." 
Matthew26:71 Ak kingo kagomanda kwo keter, kogeer chepto age inendet, ak kolenji ichek che kimi oloto, Kimi chichi agine koboto Jesu Nasaretindet." 
Matthew26:72 Ak kitiiyo kogeny eng’ kayosiet kole, Mangen chichoto." 
Matthew26:73 Ak ne ma tia kobwa che kitonondos eng’ ye negit ak kolenji Petero, Iman, i bo bichoto: amu ng’andoin ng’aleguk." 
Matthew26:74 Kitoi anyun kochubis ak koyosio kole, Mangen chichoto. Ak ngunoto kote kipsoiywet." 
Matthew26:75 Ak kiibwat Petero ng’olyot ne kiga komwa Jesu, kole, Kotom kote kipsoiywet, iesioa konyil somok. Ak kimanda sang’, ak korir eng’ ng’wanindo." 
Matthew27:1 Ak ye kingo kagoeech, koruoch tisiik tugul che eechen ak boisiekab bichoto agobo Jesu, si kobar inendet:" 
Matthew27:2 ak kirat inendet ak komut kwo kogochi Pilato, bounindet." 
Matthew27:3 Ak ye kingogeer Judas anyun, ne king’wektoi inendet, kole, kagiruokyi Jesu, komwa ndara, ak koweekyi tisiik che eechen ak boisiek fedaisiek sosom," 
Matthew27:4 kole, Kaayai tengekto amu kaang’wekte korotik che matinyei tengek. Ago kile ichek, Botech eng’ nee? Yaoti inyege." 
Matthew27:5 Ak kiwirji fedaisiek hekalut, ole tilil, ak komanda; ak kiwa anyun kogetgei." 
Matthew27:6 Ak kinam tisiik che eechen fedaisiek, ak kole, Ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutiet kinde chu ole kiyumjin tuguk che kigoitoi, amu bo alyetab korotik." 
Matthew27:7 Ak kiiruoch, ak kial mbaretab cheptereniot, si ketupchin toek." 
Matthew27:8 Noto anyun, kigiguure mbaranato, Mbaretab korotik, agoi rani." 
Matthew27:9 Kiisulda anyun ne kiga kimwa eng’ Jeremia maotiot, kole, Kiib ichek fedaisiek sosom, alyetab inendet ne kiga kigamanji, ne kigaman alak eng’ lagokab Israel:" 
Matthew27:10 ak kiigoito ichek koale mbaret ne bo cheptereniot ko u ye king’ata Kiptaiyat. 
Matthew27:11 Ak kitonon Jesu anyun eng’ taitab bounindet: ak koteebe bounindet inendet, kolenji, I Laitoriatab Yahudik? Ak kolenji Jesu, Kaimwa." 
Matthew27:12 Ak ye kingotaam inendet tisiik che eechen ak boisiek, ko ma wol kiy." 
Matthew27:13 Komwachi anyun Pilato inendet kolenji, Megase ole te baornatet ne baorianjinin bichu?" 
Matthew27:14 Ak kima wolji kiy, agot ng’olyot agenge: kot kokwong’ mising’ bounindet." 
Matthew27:15 Ak kicham kotiakyin bounindet tuiyet kimonjororiot agenge, ne kacham ichek eng’ betutab igorta." 
Matthew27:16 Ak kitinyei kimonjororiot age ne toogunot, ne kiguure Baraba." 
Matthew27:17 Ye kingo kagoyumgei anyun, kolenji Pilato, Ng’o ne omache atiakwok? Baraba, anan Jesu ne kiguure Kristo?" 
Matthew27:18 Amu kinai kole, kagigoito inendet eng’ ng’etkonda." 
Matthew27:19 Ak kingota kotebe ng’echeretab kiruoget, koyokyi osotiondennyi ng’olyo, kole, Ameite kiy chicho bo imanda: amu kaanyoru nyalilwogik che chang’ rani eng’ karuotitoet agobo inendet." 
Matthew27:20 Ak kibirji tisiik che eechen ak boisiek tuiyosiek, kole, kosom Baraba, ak kebar Jesu." 
Matthew27:21 Ago kiwolji bounindet ichek, kolenji, Omache atiakwok ngoro eng’ chu aeng’? Ak kile, Baraba." 
Matthew27:22 Kilenji Pilato, Ayachini nee anyun Jesu ne kiguure Kristo? Kole anyun tugul, Ingigartat inendet." 
Matthew27:23 Ak kile, Amu nee, kayai nee ne ya? Ago kibolyo mising’ kot kole, Ingigartat." 
Matthew27:24 Noto anyun, ye kingogeer Pilato kole, mata komuch kiy, ago kitesak bolatet, konam beek, ak koun eunekyik eng’ taitab tuiyet kole, Matinye tengek eng’ korotikab chichi bo iman: oyaoti okwege." 
Matthew27:25 Ak kiwol bik tugul kole, Ingotebenech korotikyik, ak eng’ lagokyok." 
Matthew27:26 Kiitiakyi anyun Baraba: ago kibire Pilato Jesu kipcharitit ak kogoito kigartat. 
Matthew27:27 Kiimut anyun askarikab bounindet Jesu kwo Praitorium, ak koyumjigei inendet askarik tugul." 
Matthew27:28 Ak kiireegune ngoroikyik, ak kolaakyi sambut ne birir." 
Matthew27:29 Ak kitaa ngatiet ne bo katok ak konde metinnyi, konde tegat eunnyi ne bo tai; ak kigutung’so eng’ tainnyi, ak kochot, kole, Kigatin, Laitoriatab Yahudik!" 
Matthew27:30 Ak kising’ilji inendet, ak konam tegat ak kokwer metinnyi." 
Matthew27:31 Ak ye kingo kagochot inendet, koreegune ngorionoto, ak kolaakyi inendet ngoroikyik, ak komut kwo kigartat." 
Matthew27:32 Ak ye kingomong’, konyor chitab Kurene, ne kiguure Simon: ak kibirji inendet koib kimurtoiyondennyi." 
Matthew27:33 Ak ye kingoit ole kiguure Golgota, ye kiweech kele, Oldab terta," 
Matthew27:34 kogochi ichek inendet siki koee che kigiburukto tuguk che ng’wonen: ak ye kingo kagochamjam, koesio koee." 
Matthew27:35 Ak ye kingo kagogartat inendet, kopchechigei ngoroikyik eng’ seretab barbarek:" 
Matthew27:36 ak kiteb ng’ony korib inendet eng’ oloto. 
Matthew27:37 Ak kiinde metinnyi barak kataamset agobo inendet ne kigisir, kele, NI KO JESU LAITORIAT NE BO YAHUDIK." 
Matthew27:38 Kigigartat anyun eng’ yoto koboto inendet, rebik aeng’, age eng’ eut ne bo tai, ak age eng’ eut ne bo katam." 
Matthew27:39 Ak kichurachur inendet che kisiirtoi, koleglegoti metowekwak," 
Matthew27:40 kolen, Inye ne ing’eme hekalut, ak iteech eng’ betusiek somok, soruge: ngo i Weritab Jehovah, choruge eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Matthew27:41 Kichurachur ko u noto agichek tisiik che eechen koboto sirik ak boisiek, kolen," 
Matthew27:42 Kisor alak; ama imuch kosorgei. Inendet Laitoriatab Israel; ingochorgei nguno eng’ kimurtoiyot, si kiyan inendet." 
Matthew27:43 Kiimang’u Jehovah; ingosor inendet nguno, ngot komachei: amu kile, A Weritab Jehovah." 
Matthew27:44 Ak kichurachur agichek ko u noto rebik che kiga kigartat koboto inendet. 
Matthew27:45 Kiimenit anyun emonoto komugul kong’eete sait lo agoi sait sogol. 
Matthew27:46 Ak ye kingo olo bo sait sogol koguurso Jesu eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani? Noto ko, Jehovah nenyu, Jehovah nenyu, kalya si ibagakta?" 
Matthew27:47 Ak kingogas alak eng’ ichek che kitonondos eng’ oloto, kole, Kuurei chichi Elija." 
Matthew27:48 Ak ngunoto kolabat age eng’ ichek, kwo konem sibonjit, ak konyiit siki, ak konde tegat, ak kogochi koee." 
Matthew27:49 Ak kimwa chun alak kole, Obagakte; ongegeer ngo nyonei Elija si kosor inendet." 
Matthew27:50 Ak kiguurso Jesu kogeny, eng’ kutit ne o, ak kogoito tamirmiriennyi." 
Matthew27:51 Ak ogeero, kigerer anget ne kigioiye hekalut koek aeng’ koboch barak agoi ng’ony; ak kibetogis ruandosiek;" 
Matthew27:52 ak kiyatogis kererisiek; ak kiging’eet borwekab bik che chang’ che tililen che kiruitos; 
Matthew27:53 ak ye kingo kagong’eet Jesu, komong’ bichoto agichek eng’ kererisiekwak komong’ji nganaset ne tilil, koborjigei che chang’." 
Matthew27:54 Ak ye kingogeer kiptaiyatab bogol ak icheget che kimi koboto inendet koribei Jesu, botanetab ng’ony ak tuguk che kayaagis, koiywei mising’, kole, Iman Weritab Jehovah chichi." 
Matthew27:55 Ak kimi eng’ oloto kobogorisiek che chang’ che kigeerei eng’ ye loo, che kiga kosubot Jesu koboch Galili, koboisiechinoti inendet:" 
Matthew27:56 ki Maria Magdalene, age eng’ kobogorisiechoto, koboto Maria kametab Jakobo ak Joses, ak kametab werik che bo Sebedi." 
Matthew27:57 Ak ye kingo kagoek lagat, konyo magoriot ne bo Arimatea, ne keguure Josep, ne ki alamalyetab Jesu agine." 
Matthew27:58 Kiwa chichoto ole mi Pilato, kwo kosom mustab Jesu. King’at Pilato anyun kole, kigochi." 
Matthew27:59 Ak kiib Josep musto, ak kotaae angetab katanit ne tilil," 
Matthew27:60 ak konde kererinnyi ne leel, ne kiga kobal eng’ ruandet; ak komilji koita ne o kurget ne bo kererit, ak kwo." 
Matthew27:61 Ak kimi yoto Maria Magdalene, ak Maria age, kotebyei eng’ taitab kererit." 
Matthew27:62 Eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ noto betut ne kiisubi Chobet, koyumjigei Pilato tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik," 
Matthew27:63 ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, kibwati kele, kimwa kenindonoto, kota kosobei, kole, Ye ibata betusiek somogu ang’eet kogeny." 
Matthew27:64 Ng’at anyun kerib kererit komie agoi betut ne bo somok, si mabwa alamalyennyi kochor inendet koib, ak komwachi bik kolenji, Kagong’eet inendet eng’ che kigobek: si mayait lelutiet ne bo let kosiir ne bo tai." 
Matthew27:65 Kolenji Pilato ichek, Otinye ribik: oba oreng’wong’, ak orib komie ko u ye omuchi." 
Matthew27:66 Koba anyun, ak korib kererit komie, kong’och koita, komi ribik koboto ichek." 
Matthew28:1 Kingo negit kogesgei betutab sabato, ko katoi koeech emet eng’ betutab tai ne bo wigit, kobwa Maria Magdalene ak Maria age kogeer kererit." 
Matthew28:2 Ak ogeero, kibotan ng’ony mising’; amu kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat, ak kinyo komilda koita, ak kotebe koyata." 
Matthew28:3 Ki u kalyelet itondanyi, ak ki leelach mising’ ngoroikyik ko u teluji:" 
Matthew28:4 kibotanso ribik, amu kiiywei inendet, koigei bik che kagobek." 
Matthew28:5 Ak kiwolji malaikaiyat kobogorisiek kolenji, Amoiywei okwek: amu angen ale, ocheng’e Jesu, ne kigigartat." 
Matthew28:6 Ma komi yu; amu kagong’eet, ko u ye kiga mwa. Obwa, ogeer ole korue Kiptaiyat." 
Matthew28:7 Ak obe ochakte omwachi alamalyennyi olenji, Kagong’eet eng’ che kigobek; ak ogeero, indoenok kowendi Galili; ogeere inendet eng’ oloto: ogaso, kaamwawok." 
Matthew28:8 Ak kiba kochakta eng’ kererit eng’ kaiyweisiet ak boiboiyet ne o, kiruai koba komwachi alamalyennyi." 
Matthew28:9 Ak ogeero, kituiye Jesu ichek, ak kolenji, Chamge. Ak kobwa konam kelyekyik, ak kolos inendet." 
Matthew28:10 Kilenji Jesu anyun ichek, Amoiywei: oba omwachi che kitupche koba Galili, ak kogeera eng’ olindo." 
Matthew28:11 Ak ye kita kobendi, ogeero, komong’ji nganaset alak eng’ ribik, ak komwachi tisiik che eechen tuguk tugul che kagoyaagis." 
Matthew28:12 Ak ye kingo kagoyumgei koboto boisiek, ak koruoch, kogochi askarik fedaisiek che chang’," 
Matthew28:13 kolenji, Omwa okwek, ole, Kobwa alamalyennyi kemoi, ak kochor inendet koib kota keruitosi." 
Matthew28:14 Ak ngo kas bounindet ng’olyondonito, kigaigai inendet, ak kesoruok eng’ nyalilda." 
Matthew28:15 Kotaach anyun fedaisiek, ak koyai ko u ye kaginet: ak kiyom ng’olyondonito Yahudik, agoi ra." 
Matthew28:16 Ago kiba Galili alamalyet tamanu ak agenge, agoi tulwet ole kiga koarorji Jesu." 
Matthew28:17 Ak ye kingogeer inendet, kolos: ago kisage alage." 
Matthew28:18 Ak kinyonji Jesu ichek ak kong’alalji, kolenji, Kigegona kimnatet tugul eng’ kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Matthew28:19 Noto anyun oba, ak oyai bikab bororiosiek tugul koek alamalaik, obatisan ichek eng’ kainetab Kwanda ak ne bo Werit ak ne bo Tamirmiriet ne Tilil;" 
Matthew28:20 onet ichek kosub tuguk tugul che kaang’atak: ak ogeero, ami kobotok eng’ betusiek tugul, agoi kagesunetab ng’ony." 
Mark1:1 Taunetab logoiywek che miach che bo Jesu Kristo, Weritab Jehovah." 
Mark1:2 Ko u ye kigisir eng’ maotiot Isaia kole, Keero, ayoktoi kiboitiondennyu kondoenen, Ne chobei oreng’ung’;" 
Mark1:3 Kutitab chi ne ititeni eng’ surkwen, kolen, Ochob oretab Kiptaiyat, Olititoti ole bunoti;" 
Mark1:4 Kinyo Johana, kobatisanis eng’ surkwen ak koamdoi kabatisanet ne bo sigunet agobo nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik." 
Mark1:5 Ak kiba ole mi inendet emet komugul ne bo Judea, ak tugul che bo Jerusalem; ak kiibatisan ichek eng’ ainet ne kiguure Jordan, kong’anyei tengekwogikwak." 
Mark1:5 Ak kiba ole mi inendet emet komugul ne bo Judea, ak tugul che bo Jerusalem; ak kiibatisan ichek eng’ ainet ne kiguure Jordan, kong’anyei tengekwogikwak." 
Mark1:6 Ak kiilaachi Johana sambut ne bo tambesik, ak kirategei birenetab muito, ak kiamei chereng’endet ak kumikab timin." 
Mark1:7 Ak kiamda, kole, Isubwa inendet ne kim kosiira, ak manyoljina ang’uruk atiach anokab kweonikyik." 
Mark1:8 Kiabatisanak eng’ beek; ago ibatisanok inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil. 
Mark1:9 Kinyo anyun Jesu eng’ betusiechoto, kobunu Nasaret ne bo Galili, ak kiibatisan Johana inendet eng’ Jordan." 
Mark1:10 Yeityo, ko katogos eng’ beek, kogeer kipsengwetisiek koyatogis, ak kochorjigei inendet Tamirmiriet ko u cheptuget:" 
Mark1:11 Ak kimong’ kutit eng’ kipsengwet kole, Inyendet ko i Werinnyu, chamanennyu, abaibai mising’ eng’ inye." 
Mark1:12 Ak ngunoto kochirjir Tamirmiriet inendet kwo surkwen. 
Mark1:13 Ak kitebi eng’ surkwen betusiek artam koyomei Setani; ak kitebyei ak tiong’ik che bo timin; ak kiboisiechin inendet malaikaisiek. 
Mark1:14 Ak kingo kagenam Johana, konyo Jesu Galili, koamdooti logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah," 
Mark1:15 kolen, Kagosulda betusiek, ak kagorik bounatetab Jehovah: osigu, ak oyan logoiywek che miach." 
Mark1:16 Ak ye kiwendi kobunei tabandab araraita ne bo Galili, kogeer Simon ak Andrea ng’etab kametab Simon kowirjinoti araraita regereiywot ne kiname njirenik: amu ki ramikab njirenik." 
Mark1:17 Ak kilenji Jesu, Obwa osubwa, si ayaak oegu ramikab bik." 
Mark1:18 Yeityo kobagakta regereiywekwak ak kosub inendet. 
Mark1:19 Ak kiba kitigin, kogeer Jakobo weritab Sebedi, ak Johana ng’etab kamet, che kimi moinget agichek kochobei regereiywekwak." 
Mark1:20 Yeityo koguur ichek: ak kibagakta kwandanywa Sebedi komi moinget koboto otwogik, ak kosub inendet." 
Mark1:21 Kiba anyun Kapernaum; ak kiwa inendet ngunoto sunagogit orit betunoto bo sabato ak konetis. 
Mark1:22 Ak kikwong’io eng’ konetisiennyi: amu kiineti ichek ko u ne tinyei kimnatet, ama ko u sirik." 
Mark1:23 Ak kimi ngunoto eng’ sunagoginywa chi ne kitinyei tamirmiriet ne muruon, ak kiwaach," 
Mark1:24 kole, Kiting’ege nee ak inye, Jesu ne bo Nasaret? Kenyo ing’emech? Angenin ale, i Ne Tilil ne bo Jehovah." 
Mark1:25 Ak kiger kong’ Jesu inendet kole, Sis, ak imong’u eng’ inendet." 
Mark1:26 Ak ye kimandoi tamirmiriet ne muruon eng’ inendet, kobirabirto inendet, ak kowaachei eng’ kutit ne o." 
Mark1:27 Ak kitang’any tugul, ak koteebegei ichegei, kole, Nee ni? Konetisiet ne leel! Ng’atei eng’ kimnatet agot tamirmirik che muruonen, ak kasei it inendet." 
Mark1:28 Ak kiyom ng’alekyik ngunoto oldo tugul agoi korotinwek tugul che bo Galili. 
Mark1:29 Ak ngunoto, ye kingomong’ eng’ sunagogit, kobwa gotab Simon ak Andrea, koboto Jakobo ak Johana." 
Mark1:30 Kiamei eset kametab osotiot ne bo Simon; kiruei; kemwachi ngunoto Jesu agobo chebiosonato. 
Mark1:31 Ak kinyo konam eunnyi, ak kong’eet inendet; ak kimeto eset inendet, ak koboisiechi." 
Mark1:32 Ak koskoleny, ko karorokto asista, komutyi inendet tugul che kimiandos, ak che kitinyei oik." 
Mark1:33 Ak kiiyumjigei nganaset komugul kurgat. 
Mark1:34 Ak kiisoob che chang’ che kimiandos eng’ mianwek che terotin, ak koon oik che chang’ komanda; ak kima chamji oik kong’alal, amu kiingen oichoto inendet." 
Mark1:35 Ak karon mising’ kota koimen, kong’eet ak komanda sang’, kwo surkwen, kwo kosa eng’ oloto." 
Mark1:36 Kiisub anyun Jesu, Simon, ak che kimi koboto inendet;" 
Mark1:37 ak kinyor inendet, ak kolenji, Cheng’in bik tugul." 
Mark1:38 Ak komwachi ichek kole, Ongebe oldo age nganasok alak, si kobiit aamda eng’ oloto agine; amu kianyo agobo nito." 
Mark1:39 Ak kiwa sunagogisiekwak che bo Galili komugul, koamdooti ak koonei oik." 
Mark1:40 Kinyonji anyun inendet chito ne kitinyei mogondosik kosaisai, kogutung’ji, ak kolenji, Ngicham, imuchi itilila." 
Mark1:41 Ak kirirge inendet, ak kiiyogoito eunnyi, kotwa inendet, ak kolenji, Kaacham; tililitu." 
Mark1:42 Ak ngunoto kobagakta mogondosik chichoto, ak kotililit." 
Mark1:43 Ak king’at inendet mising’, ak ngunoto koyokto kwo;" 
Mark1:44 ak kilenji, Amat imwachi chi ng’olyo: ago ui bandang’ung’, iborjige tisiindet, ak igoite agobo tililindang’ung’ tuguk che king’at Musa, si koek baornatet eng’ ichek." 
Mark1:45 Ago kiwa, ak kotoi komwaitaat mising’, ak kobartaat ng’olyondonoto, kot ko mata komuch Jesu kwo nganaset, kegeeroti, ago kitebote sang’ eng’ komoswekab surkwen: kibwanji anyun inendet che bunu komosta age tugul." 
Mark2:1 Kingobata betusiek alage, komong’ji kogeny Kapernaum, ak kogas bik kole, mitei go." 
Mark2:2 Ak kiiyumgei bik che chang’, kot ko ma ng’et boroindo, agot eng’ kurgat: ak komwachi ng’olyot." 
Mark2:3 Ak kibwa, komutu chito ne tinyei miando ne meat borto, konyo ole mi inendet, kolau bik ang’wanu." 
Mark2:4 Ago kingab mata komuch korikyi inendet amu tuiyet, kong’any got barak, kotokyi ole mi inendet: ak kingo kagobut, kochoortae itogut ne kirue chito ne tinyei miando ne meat borto." 
Mark2:5 Ak kingogeer Jesu kayanenywa, kolenji chito ne tinyei miando ne meat borto, Weri, kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk." 
Mark2:6 Ago kimitei oloto sirik alak che kitebyei, che kiibwati eng’ mugulelwekwak kolen," 
Mark2:7 Amu nee si komwaei chichi ko u ni? Mwaei ne ya: ng’o ne imuchi konyochi chi kaat tengekwogik kobate agenge, inendet Jehovah?" 
Mark2:8 Ak eng’ yoto, konai Jesu eng’ tamirmiriennyi, kole, ibwati ko u noto ichegei, kolenji, Kalya si obwat tuguchu eng’ mugulelwekwok?" 
Mark2:9 Nee ne nyamnyum, ngemwachi chito ne tinyei miando ne meat borto kele, Kaginyoun kaat tengekwogiguk; anan ngele, Ng’eet, ib itogung’ung’, ak iwendote?" 
Mark2:10 Ago si onai ole, tinyei Weritab chi kimnatet eng’ ng’ony ne nyochin kaat amu tengekwogik (kolenji chito ne tinyei miando ne meat borto)," 
Mark2:11 Amwaun ale, Ng’eet, ib itogung’ung’, ak iwe gong’ung’." 
Mark2:12 King’eet anyun, ak ngunoto koib itogunnyi, ak komanda eng’ taitab bik tugul; kot kokwong’io tugul, ak kolos Jehovah, kole, Tom kegeere ne u nito." 
Mark2:13 Ak kiwa kogeny tabandab araraita; ak kibwa tuiyet komugul ye mi inendet, ak konet ichek." 
Mark2:14 Ak ye kisiirtoi, kogeer Lawi weritab Alpayo kotebyei eng’ ole kitaage aisurut, ak kolenji inendet, Isubwa. Ak king’eet ak kosub inendet." 
Mark2:15 Ak kingotebyei eng’ amisiet eng’ gonnyi, kotebi taagikab aisurut che chang’ ak kiptengeginik koboto Jesu ak alamalyennyi: amu kimi che chang’, ak kiisub inendet." 
Mark2:16 Ak kingogeer sirik che bo Parisaik koamisiei inendet koboto kiptengeginik ak taagikab aisurut, kolenji alamalyennyi, Lyon si koamisiei ak koeeisei inendet koboto taagikab aisurut ak kiptengeginik?" 
Mark2:17 Ak ye kingogas Jesu, kolenji ichek, Mamachei che chamegei chepkerichot, kobate che miandos: kima anyo aguur che bo imanda, ago kiptengeginik." 
Mark2:18 Ak kiirugutegei alamalyetab Johana ak ne bo Parisaik: ak kibwa anyun kolenji inendet, Lyon si korugutegei alamalyetab Johana ak alamalyetab Parisaik ago mairugutegei alamalyeng’ung’?" 
Mark2:19 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Imuktoi ano korugutgei che kogiguurjin katunisiet, ye ta komi sandet koboto icheget? Ko ta komi sandet koboto ichek, ko maimuchi korugutgei." 
Mark2:20 Ago bwanei betusiek che keistoe sandet ichek, korugutgei anyun eng’ betunoto." 
Mark2:21 Mami chi ne napchin akwot ne leel ngoriet ne os, si magerer ne leel ne os, ak kotesak ole kagerer." 
Mark2:22 Ama mi chi ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che osen: amu ngo yai ko u noto, kogereri divaik lolotinwek, ak kobetyo koboto lolotinwek: ago kindoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelach." 
Mark2:23 Ak ye kibunei mbarenikab bek eng’ betutab sabato, kotoi alamalyennyi kobagat mesisiekab bek." 
Mark2:24 Ak kilenji Parisaik inendet, Keero, kalya si koyai eng’ betutab sabato kit ne etat eng’ ng’atutik?" 
Mark2:25 Ak kilenji icheget, Tos, kitom osoman kit ne kiyai Daudi, ye kima kotinyei kiy, ak kiamei rubo, inendet, ak che kimi koboto inendet?" 
Mark2:26 Ko u ye kiwa gotab Jehovah eng’ betusiek che bo tisiindet ne o Abiatar, ak koam makatinikab kabartaet, che etat eng’ ng’atutik kele, magiamei, kobate tisiik ichegei, ak kogochi che kimi koboto inendet agichek?" 
Mark2:27 Ak kilenji ichek, Kigiyai sabato agobo chi, kima kiyai chi agobo sabato:" 
Mark2:28 Kiek anyun Weritab chi kiptaiyat agot ne bo sabato. 
Mark3:1 Ak kiwa sunagogit kogeny; ak kimi chito ne resot eut. 
Mark3:2 Ak kirib ichek inendet, kole kogeer, ngo tos isoob chichoto eng’ betutab sabato; si kobiit komwaita." 
Mark3:3 Ak kilenji chito ne resot eut, Tonon eng’ kwen." 
Mark3:4 Ak kilenji ichek, Tos, chamdoi ng’atutik keyai ne mie eng’ betutab sabato, anan keyai ne ya? Kisoob chi, anan kebar? Ago kisisyo." 
Mark3:5 Ak ye kiga kogeerot komoswek tugul eng’ neregek, koarogen amu uuindab mugulelwekwak, kolenji chichoto, Chuul eung’ung’. Kichuul anyun: ak kisob eunnyi." 
Mark3:6 Ak kimanda sang’ Parisaik, ak ngunoto anyun kochob ng’alek ak Herodik agobo inendet, si konai ole bartoi." 
Mark3:7 Kiitabangei Jesu ak alamalyennyi ak koba araraita; ak kiisub inendet tuiyet ne o ne kibunu Galili: ak ne kibunu Judea," 
Mark3:7 Kiitabangei Jesu ak alamalyennyi ak koba araraita; ak kiisub inendet tuiyet ne o ne kibunu Galili: ak ne kibunu Judea," 
Mark3:8 ak Jerusalem, ak Idumea, ak bitetab Jordan, ak komoswekab Turo ak Sidon, kibwanji inendet tuiyet ne o ye kingogas agobo tuguk che eechen che kiyai." 
Mark3:9 Ak kimwachi alamalyennyi kochob moinget ne ming’in ne bo beek, amu chang’indab bik, si machiil inendet:" 
Mark3:10 amu kiga kosoob che chang’; kot koriich inendet tugul che kitinyei korotwek che yaachen, si kobiit kotwa inendet." 
Mark3:11 Ak eng’ ui tugul ye kageer inendet tamirmirik che muruonen, kobutyi ng’ony eng’ tainnyi, ak koteiyo kole, Inye ko i Weritab Jehovah." 
Mark3:12 Ak king’at ichek mising’ si mang’anda inendet. 
Mark3:13 Ak kitogosta tulwet anyun, ak kiguurjigei che kimach: ak kiba ole mi inendet." 
Mark3:14 Ak kilewen taman ak aeng’, si kotebi ak inendet, si kobiit koyoktoi ichek koba amdaet," 
Mark3:15 ak konyor kimnatet ne one oik: 
Mark3:16 ak Simon ne kiigochi kainet age koguure Petero; 
Mark3:17 ak Jakobo weritab Sebedi, ak Johana ng’etab kametab Jakobo; kiigochi ichek kainet koguure Boanerges, ye kiweech kele, Weritab tulet:" 
Mark3:18 ak Andrea, Pilipu, Bartolomayo, Matayo, Tomas, Jakobo ne bo gab Alpayo, ak Tadayo, ak Simon Kananindet," 
Mark3:19 ak Judas Iskariot, ne king’wektoi inendet." 
Mark3:20 Ak kiiyumgei tuiyet kogeny kot ko mata komuch agot koamis. 
Mark3:21 Ak ye kingogas choronokyik, koba konam inendet: amu kimwa kole, Kagobet met." 
Mark3:22 Ak kimwa sirik che kichorunegei Jerusalem, kole, Tinyei inendet Beelsebul, ak, Onei oik eng’ kimnatetab ne o ne bo oik." 
Mark3:23 Ak kiguur ichek kobwa ye mi, ak kolenji eng’ kalewenaik, Imuktoi ano Setani koon Setani?" 
Mark3:24 Ak ngo pcheak bororiet inegei, ko maimuchi bororionoto kotonon." 
Mark3:25 Ak ngo pcheak got inegei, ko maimuchi goyoto kotonon." 
Mark3:26 Ak ngo ng’eet Setani koboriegei inegei ak ngo pcheak inegei, ko maimuchi kotonon, ago tinyei ole igesyingei." 
Mark3:27 Ago maimuchi chi kwo got orit ne bo chito ne kim, ak korebe tugukyik, ngot ko ma rat korok chichoto kim; si kouur gonnyi anyun." 
Mark3:28 Amwawok iman ale, Kinyochin kaat werikab bik tengekwogikwak tugul, ak ng’alek alak tugul che yaachen che mwaei:" 
Mark3:29 Ago age tugul ne chubei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ko magoi kinyochi kaat koigeny, ago tinyei ng’ogisto ne bo koigeny:" 
Mark3:30 amu kimwa kole, Tinyei inendet tamirmiriet ne muruon." 
Mark3:31 Kibwa anyun kamet ak che tupcho; ak kotononso eng’ sang’, ak kigiyokto keguur inendet." 
Mark3:32 Ak kitebyei tuiyet ko kayiem inendet; ak kilenji, Keero, mi sang’ komet ak che otupche kocheng’in." 
Mark3:33 Ak kiwolji ichek, kolenji, Ng’o kamennyu ak che kitupche?" 
Mark3:34 Ak kigeerot che kayiem inendet, ak kolenji, Ogeero, kamennyu ak che kitupche!" 
Mark3:35 Amu chi age tugul ne yaei magetab Jehovah, noto werit ne kitupche, ak chepto ne kitupche, ak kamennyu." 
Mark4:1 Ak kitoi kogeny konetis eng’ tabandab araraita. Ak kiiyumjigei inendet tuiyet ne o mising’, kot kolany moingetab beek, kotebe araraita; ak kotebe tuiyet tugul ngegutab araraita." 
Mark4:2 Ak kiinet ichek tuguk che chang’ eng’ kalewenaik, ak kilenji ichek eng’ konetisiennyi," 
Mark4:3 Oeb it: ogeero, kiwa letaindet koletais:" 
Mark4:4 ak kingoleta, kobutyi keswek alak oret taban, ak kibwa taritik koam." 
Mark4:5 Ak kiibutyi alage ole mi koik, ole kima ko tia ng’ung’unyek; ak kibityo anyun, kochok, amu ng’ering’ ng’ung’unyek:" 
Mark4:6 ak kingochor asista, komel; ak kiyaamnyo, amu kima kotinyei tigitik." 
Mark4:7 Ak kiibutyi alage kole mi katok, ak kibityo katok, ak kogiich, si maiiyo logoek." 
Mark4:8 Ak kiibutyi alage ng’ung’unyek che miach, ak koiiyo logoek, ak koeegitu ak kotesak; ak kiiyo sosom, ak tamanwogik lo, ak bogol." 
Mark4:9 Ak kimwa kole, Ne tinyei itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Mark4:10 Ak ye kimi inegei, koteebe inendet agobo kalewenaichoto, icheget che kigaiyiem inendet koboto taman ak aeng’." 
Mark4:11 Ak kilenji, Kagegonok okwek onai ung’otiet ne bo bounatetab Jehovah: ago ichek che mitei sang’, keyachin tuguk tugul eng’ kalewenaik:" 
Mark4:12 si eng’ keeret kogeerei, ama ibestos; ak eng’ kaset kogasei, ama iguitos; si maweek, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Mark4:13 Ak kilenji ichek, Tos mongen okwek kalewenoni? Onaitoi ano kalewenaik tugul?" 
Mark4:14 Letoi letaindet ng’olyot. 
Mark4:15 Ak chuto che mitei tabandab oret, ole kiletae ng’olyot; ak ye kagogas, konyo ngunoto Setani, ak konem ng’olyot ne kagogolji icheget." 
Mark4:16 Ak chu agichek ko choto che kagilechi ole mi koik, ak ye kagogas ng’olyot, konam ngunoto eng’ boiboindo;" 
Mark4:17 matinyei choto tigitik, ak tebyei eng’ betusiek che matia, ak, ye ng’eet nyalilda anan usisiet agobo ng’olyot, ngunoto anyun kinach." 
Mark4:18 Ak alak che kagilechi ole mi katok; choto ko icheget che kagogas ng’olyot," 
Mark4:19 ak kogiich ng’olyot kaiimutikab ng’ony, ak kaberberisiet ne bo magornatet, ak magutik che bo tuguk alak che bwanei, si mai logoek." 
Mark4:20 Ak choto che kagilechi ng’ung’unyek che miach; ko icheget che kasei ng’olyot, ak kotaach, ak koiiyo logoek, sosom, ak tamanwogik lo, ak bogol." 
Mark4:21 Ak kolenji ichek, Tos kiibu tait si kinde kitonget orit, anan kureretab itogut, ama kindoi kit ne tonone?" 
Mark4:22 Amu mami kiy ne keunyei, ne matun ng’ang’aksei; ng’olyo ne bo ung’ot, ne matun toogu." 
Mark4:23 Ngo tinyei chi itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Mark4:24 Ak kimwachi ichek kolenji, Oribege tuguk che ogase: kerutiet ne ogere ko tun kegerunenok noto: ak keteswok alak." 
Mark4:25 Amu inendet ne tinyei, kigochin: ak inendet ne matinyei, keibe agot che tinyei." 
Mark4:26 Ak kile, U noto bounatetab Jehovah, u chito ne iserjin keswek ng’ony." 
Mark4:27 Ak koru ak kong’eet kemoi ak bet, ak kobityo keswek ak koeegitu, amaingen ole bititoi." 
Mark4:28 Yiei ng’ony inegei; indou suswot, yeityo konyo metit, yeityo koiywa bek." 
Mark4:29 Ago ye kagorurio bek, eng’ yoto anyun koib chepkeswet, amu kait kesisiet." 
Mark4:30 Ak kile, Kiroge nee bounatetab Jehovah? Anan nee kalewenet ne kibortoe?" 
Mark4:31 Kergei ak keswotab karadali, ne, ye kageminji ng’ung’unyek, ko agot nganda ming’in eng’ keswek tugul che mi ng’ony," 
Mark4:32 ko ye kagemin, kobit koeet, kosiir ketik tugul che bo ngwek, ak kosamumit kot komuch kouure uruennyi taritikab barak." 
Mark4:33 Ak kimwachi ng’olyot eng’ kalewenaik che chang’ che u choto, ko u ye kiimuchi kogas:" 
Mark4:34 Ak kima mwachi bichoto kiy ama eng’ kalewenet: ago kitetyi alamalyennyi ng’alek tugul komi taban ichegei. 
Mark4:35 Ak kingo kagoek koskoleny eng’ betunoto, kolenji ichek, Ongelande bitonin." 
Mark4:36 Ak kingobagakta tuiyet, komut inendet, ko u ole kiteptoi, eng’ moingetab beek. Ak kimi moingonik alak che mengech koboto ne kibunei inendet." 
Mark4:37 King’eet anyun usonet ne korom, ak korieb moinget beek che mildogei, kot komach konyi beek moinget." 
Mark4:38 Ak kimi inendet moinget ole bo let, korue kit ne kitiie metit: kiing’eet anyun inendet, ak kolenji, Konetindoni, meitech ago kagibegu?" 
Mark4:39 Kong’eet anyun, ak koger kong’ usonet, ak kolenji araraita, Imutyon, sis. Kisis anyun usonet, ak komung’do anyun mising’." 
Mark4:40 Ak kilenji ichek, Kalya si oiyweisie? Tom onyoru kayanet?" 
Mark4:41 Ak kiiyweis mising’, ak kolenjigei ichegei, Ng’o nito, ne kase it inendet agot usonet ak araraita?" 
Mark5:1 Ak kiit bitet age ne bo araraita, agoi emetab Gerasenik." 
Mark5:2 Ak kingo kagolong’ eng’ moingetab beek, eng’ yoto anyun kotuiyo ak chito ne bunu oldab kererisiek ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne muruon," 
Mark5:3 ne kimenyei oldab kererisiek: ak kima komi chi ne kita komuchi korat inendet, agot eng’ sirimdo;" 
Mark5:4 amu kiga kerate inendet mugurek ak sirimwek konyil che chang’, ak king’etyei sirimwek ak kotonaton mugurek: ak kima komi chi ne kiimuchi koboi inendet." 
Mark5:5 Ak kiwaagoti betusiek tugul, kemoi ak bet, eng’ kererisiek ak tulonok, ak kotilegei koik." 
Mark5:6 Ak kingogeer Jesu eng’ ye loo, kolabat ole mi ak kogutung’ji inendet;" 
Mark5:7 ak kowaach eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ating’enen nee inye, Jesu, Weritab Jehovah ne Toror Mising’? Ayosieun eng’ Jehovah, ale, amenyalila." 
Mark5:8 Amu kilenji inendet, Mong’une chichi, inye tamirmiriet ne muruon." 
Mark5:9 Ak kiteebe inendet, kolenji, Kiguurenen nee? Ak kilenji inendet, Kainennyu ko Chang’indo; amu ki chang’." 
Mark5:10 Ak kisom inendet mising’ kole, ama on komanda eng’ emonoto." 
Mark5:11 Ak kimi tegeiyatab tulwet akwet ne o ne bo torok che kiagetos. 
Mark5:12 Ak kisom kolenji, Chamwech kechut torok." 
Mark5:13 Kichamji anyun. Ak kimanda tamirmirik che muruonen koba kochut torok: ak kiruai akwet kochortaegei chemng’esut koba araraita; ki olo bo elfusiek aeng’ torochoto; ak kibekyi araraita. 
Mark5:14 Ak kimwei anyun che kiiyagi, komwaita eng’ nganaset ak eng’ emet. Ak kibwa anyun kogeer kit ne kagoyaak." 
Mark5:15 Kibwa ole mi Jesu, ak kogeer inendet ne kiga konam oik, kotebyei ko kagolaach ngoroik, ko kagong’omit, inendet ne kitinyei chang’indab oik: ak kiiyweis bichoto." 
Mark5:16 Ak kimwachi ichek che kigeerei, tuguk che kayaak eng’ inendet ne kiga konam oik, ak ole katepto torok." 
Mark5:17 Ak kitoi kogaigai inendet kole kwo eng’ kiwotosiekwak. 
Mark5:18 Ak kingota kolanyei moingetab beek, kogaigai inendet ne kiga konam oik kole, kotebi tuwai." 
Mark5:19 Ago kima chamji, ago kilenji, Ui gong’ung’ ole mi choronoguk, ak iborji tuguk che eechen che kagoyaun Kiptaiyat, ak ko u ye kagorirenen." 
Mark5:20 Ak kinam bandanyi anyun, ak kotoi koamda eng’ Dekapoli tuguk che eechen che kayachi Jesu inendet: ak kikwong’io bik tugul." 
Mark5:21 Ak ye kingo kagolanda Jesu kogeny eng’ moinget kwo bitonin, koyumjigei inendet tuiyet ne o: ak ki negite araraita." 
Mark5:22 Ak kinyo age eng’ bounikab sunagogit, ne kiguure Jairo; ak kingab kageer, kobutyi kelyekyik," 
Mark5:23 ak kisom inendet mising’, kolenji, Negit kome cheptanyu ne ming’in: nyo igonoor inendet euneguk, si kosob ak kotebi kochamegei." 
Mark5:24 Ak kiba koboto inendet; ak kiisub inendet tuiyet ne o, ak kiigiich inendet." 
Mark5:25 Kimi kobogoriot age ne kimandae korotik kenyisiek taman ak aeng’," 
Mark5:26 ak kiga konyalil eng’ tuguk che chang’ agobo chepkerichinik che chang’, ak kiga kogoito tugukyik tugul che kitinyei, ama toret kiy, ago kitesak miando koyait," 
Mark5:27 ak kingogas agobo Jesu, kobwa ak tuiyet ne kimi let, ak kotwa ngoriennyi." 
Mark5:28 Amu kile, Ngatwa agot ngoroikyik, kisooba." 
Mark5:29 Yeityo anyun kosis ole kabunu korotik; ak kigas eng’ bortanyi kole, kagisoob eng’ koroitanyi." 
Mark5:30 Ak ngunoto anyun, kingo kagonai Jesu inegei kole, kagomong’une kimnatet, kowelelgei eng’ tuiyet, ak kole, Ng’o ne katwa ngoroikyuk?" 
Mark5:31 Ak kilenji alamalyuennyi inendet, Igeere ko kaigiichin tuiyet, ak ilen, Ng’o ne katwaa?" 
Mark5:32 Ak kigusgong’ si kobiit kogeer kobogoriondonoto kayai kioto. 
Mark5:33 Ago kinyo kobogoriondonoto ak kobutyi tainnyi, koiyweisiei ak kobotani, ko kagonai kit ne kageyachi, ak komwachi ng’alek tugul che bo iman." 
Mark5:34 Ak kilenji inendet, Chebi, kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’; ui eng’ kalyet, ak isob eng’ miandang’ung’." 
Mark5:35 Kingota kong’alali inendet, kobwa bik che bunu oldab bounindet ne bo sunagogit, ak kole, Kagome cheptang’ung’: kata iimji nee Konetindet?" 
Mark5:36 Ago ma mage kiy Jesu ng’olyot ne kagimwa, kolenji bounindetab sunagogit, Ameiywei, iyan kityo." 
Mark5:37 Ak ma chamji chi kosub inendet kobate Petero, ak Jakobo, ak Johana ng’etab kametab Jakobo." 
Mark5:38 Kiit anyun gotab bounindetab sunagogit; ak kigeer bik che sololendos, koboto che rirtos ak koteeitos mising’." 
Mark5:39 Ak ye kingo kakwa go, kolenji bichoto, Kalya si owasege ak orirtosi? Ma me lakwet, ago inuuchi." 
Mark5:40 Ak kirorechi inendet kochot. Ago ye kingo kagoon inendet bichoto tugul koba sang’, komut kwandab lakwet ak kamet koboto che kimi ak inendet, ak kwo go ole mi lakwet." 
Mark5:41 Ak ye kingo kagonam eutab lakwet, kolenji, Talita kumi; ye kiweech ko, Chebi, amwaun ale, Ng’eet." 
Mark5:42 Yeityo kong’eet cheboto, ak kowendot; amu ki bo kenyisiek taman ak aeng’. Eng’ yoto anyun kokwong’io eng’ kwong’et ne o." 
Mark5:43 Ak king’at ichek mising’ kole, amat konai chi ng’olyondonito: ak king’at kigochi tuguk che amei." 
Mark6:1 Ak kimong’ eng’ oloto; ak konyo agoi emennyi; ak kiisub inendet alamalyennyi. 
Mark6:2 Ak kingoit sabato, kotoi konetis eng’ sunagogit: ak kingogas che chang’ kokwong’io, kolen, Nyorune ano chichi tuguchu? Ak, Nee ng’omnatoni kigigochi chichi, ak, Nee boisionichu kimen yaoksei eng’ eunekyik?" 
Mark6:3 Tos ma musogindet nito, weritab Maria, ne tupcho ak Jakobo, Joses, Juda, ak Simon? Ak tos mami kobotech eng’ olinyo chepkametisiekyik? Ak kinyor kanagutiet eng’ inendet." 
Mark6:4 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Mabetyin maotio teegisto, kobate eng’ emennyi, ak eng’ che bo orennyi, ak eng’ gonnyi." 
Mark6:5 Ak kimata komuch koyai boisiet age tugul ne kimi eng’ oloto, kobate bik che ng’ering’ che kimiandos che kigonoor eunekyik, ak kiisoob ichek." 
Mark6:6 Ak kikwong’ inendet amu bistoenywa. Ak kiwendote nganasok konetisioti. 
Mark6:7 Ak kiguurjigei anyun taman ak aeng’, ak kotoi koyokto kobee aeng’ aeng’; ak kiigochi kimnatet koterter tamirmirik che muruonen;" 
Mark6:8 ak king’at ichek kole, amat koib kiy ne bo bandanywa, agot makatiat, anan suberet, anan senteisiek eng’ lolet; kobate kirokto kityo;" 
Mark6:9 ago oba olaachi kweonik; ak amat olaach sumotik aeng’. 
Mark6:10 Ak kilenji ichek, Got age tugul ne obendi, otebi eng’ yoto agoi obe eng’ oloto." 
Mark6:11 Ak oldo age tugul ne mataachak, ama cham kogasak, ye omande eng’ oloto, olelekte temburiek che mi kelyekwok si kobiit koek baornatet eng’ ichek." 
Mark6:12 Kimanda anyun, koba koamdaat kole kanyol kosik bik." 
Mark6:13 Ak kion oik che chang’, ak koile mwaita che chang’ che kimiandos, ak kosoob ichek." 
Mark6:14 Ak kigas laitoriat Herod agobo noto; amu kiga konaak kainennyi; ak kole, Kagong’eet Johana Kabatisanindet eng’ che kibek, noto anyun boisiei kimnatosiechu eng’ orinnyi." 
Mark6:15 Ago kimwaei alak kole, Elija inendet. Ak kile alak, Maotio inendet, anan u age eng’ maotik." 
Mark6:16 Ago ye kingogas Herod, kole, Johana nito, ne kiatile metit; kagong’eet." 
Mark6:17 Amu kiga koyokto Herod inendet bik, koba konam Johana, ak korat eng’ korgoret, amu Herodia osotiotab Pilipu ng’etab kamet: amu kiga kobaigei inendet ak kwonyoto." 
Mark6:18 Amu kimwachi Johana Herod, kolenji, Etei ng’atutik otebi ak osotiotab ng’etab komet." 
Mark6:19 Ak kiwech Herodia inendet, ak kimach kobar; ago ma imuch;" 
Mark6:20 amu kiiywei Herod Johana, amu kiingen kole, inendet ko chi ne bo imanda, ak ko tilil, ak kirib. Ak ye kingogas Herod ng’alekyik, koiimgei mising’: ago kigasyi inendet eng’ boiboiyet." 
Mark6:21 Ak ye kingoit betut ne nyolu, koyai Herod igorta ne bo betutab sigennyi, koyachi bikyik che eechen, kiptainik, ak che toogunotin che bo Galili." 
Mark6:22 Ak kingonyo go cheptab Herodia ak koureren, kobaibai Herod ak ichek che kitebyei eng’ amisiet koboto inendet; kolenji anyun laitoriat cheboto, Soma kiy age tugul ne imache si agonin." 
Mark6:23 Ak kiiyosiechi kole, Kiy age tugul ne isoma agonin, agot kebebertab bounatennyu." 
Mark6:24 Ak kimanda, ak kolenji kamet, Asom nee? Ak kilenji, Metit ne bo Johana Kabatisanindet." 
Mark6:25 Ak yeityo konyo kochok agoi ole mi laitoriat, ak kosom kole, Amache ale igona nguno metit ne bo Johana Kabatisanindet eng’ tageito." 
Mark6:26 Kiarogen anyun mising’ laitoriat; ago amu kayosiautikyik, ak amu icheget che kitebyei eng’ amisiet, ko mata koete inendet." 
Mark6:27 Ak ngunoto koyokto laitoriat askarindet age eng’ che kiripsei, ak kong’at keib konyo metitab Johana: kiwa anyun kotil metit eng’ korgoret," 
Mark6:28 ak kiib metoto bo Johana eng’ tageito, ak kogochi cheboto; ak kogochi cheboto kamet." 
Mark6:29 Ak ye kingogas alamalyennyi agobo ng’olyondonoto, kobwa kosut mustanyi, ak konde kererit." 
Mark6:30 Ak kiiyumjigei Jesu che kiyoktoi; ak komwachi inendet tuguk tugul, kit age tugul ne kiga koyai, ak kit age tugul ne kiga konet." 
Mark6:31 Ak kimwachi ichek kolenji, Obwa okwege taban ole surkwen, si omuuny kitigin. Amu ki chang’ che kibwanei ak kobendi, ak kima kotinyei agot boroindo ne amisie." 
Mark6:32 Ak kiba ichegei eng’ moingetab beek kolang’ji surkwen. 
Mark6:33 Ak kigeeroti bik kobendi, ak kinai che chang’, ak kiruai koba oloto kibagenge kobunu nganasok tugul, ak kondoe icheget." 
Mark6:34 Ak kingolang’ Jesu kogeer tuiyet ne o, ak koriregei ichek, amu ki u kechirek che matinyei mestowo: ak kitoi konet ichek tuguk che chang’." 
Mark6:35 Ak ye kimachei koimen, kobwanji inendet alamalyennyi, ak kole, Surkwen oli, ak machei koimen nguno:" 
Mark6:36 unde bik koba emet ak nganasok che mi komoswek ole negit, si koaljigei tuguk che amei." 
Mark6:37 Ago kiwolji kolenji, Ogochi okwek amitwogik. Ak kilenji, Kibe keal makatinik che bo denarisiek bogol aeng’, si kigochi koam?" 
Mark6:38 Ak kilenji ichek, Otinye makatinik ata? Oba ogeer. Ak kingo kagonai, kole, Mut, ak njirenik aeng’." 
Mark6:39 Ak king’at kole kobuur bik eng’ suswek che nyalilen, korurugotgei." 
Mark6:40 Ak kiteb ng’ony kotetatgei, kobee bogol ak kobee konom." 
Mark6:41 Ak kinam makatinichoto mut ak njirenik aeng’, ak konyal kipsengwet, koberur, ak kotonaton makatinik; ak kiigochi alamalyennyi si konde tainywa; ak kipchechi icheget tugul njirenichoto aeng’." 
Mark6:42 Ak kiamis tugul, kobiyong’so." 
Mark6:43 Ak koyum katuganik, konyi kerebonik taman ak aeng’, ak che bo njirenik agichek." 
Mark6:44 Ak icheget che kiam makatinichoto ko ki murenik elfusiek mut. 
Mark6:45 Yeityo kochiich alamalyennyi kolany moingetab beek, kondoe inendet koba bitonin agoi Betsaida, ak kiigochi inendet tuiyet koba." 
Mark6:46 Ak ye kingo kagobagakta ichek, kwo tulwet kosa." 
Mark6:47 Kimi moinget kwenutab araraita koskoleny, ak kimi inegei emet ne yaamat." 
Mark6:48 Ak kingogeer icheget konyalildos eng’ boisietab mugangok che kikwerie moinget, amu kigirindoi usonet icheget, konyo ole mi icheget eng’ ripset ne bo ang’wan ne bo kemoi, kowendote araraita barak: ak kimachei kosiirtoe icheget:" 
Mark6:49 ago kingogeer ichek inendet kowendoti eng’ araraita barak, kolen icheget abere tamirmiriet, ak kiwaach:" 
Mark6:50 amu kigeer ichek tugul inendet, ak kiiyweis. Ak ngunoto anyun kotwekyi ichek, kolenji, Onyiganitu: a inendet; amoiyweisie." 
Mark6:51 Ak kilany moinget kwo ole mi ichek; ak kisis usonet: ak kikwong’io mising’ bichoto; 
Mark6:52 amu kima nai ichek agobo makatinik, amu ki uuen mugulelwekwak." 
Mark6:53 Ak ye kingo kagolanda, koit emetab Genesaret, korat moinget eng’ ngegut." 
Mark6:54 Ak ye kingomong’ eng’ moinget, konai bik inendet eng’ sainato," 
Mark6:55 ak koruaat eng’ koronoto komugul, ak kotoi komut che miandos eng’ itogusiekwak, koba ole kiga kasyi inendet." 
Mark6:56 Ak oldo tugul ole kimong’ji nganasok che mengechen, anan che eechen, anan emet, kiinde che miandos oldab sirosiek, ak kisaisai inendet kole tamangab kocham kotwa agot tabandab ngoriennyi: ak kisopcho tugul che kitwa inendet." 
Mark7:1 Kiiyumjigei inendet Parisaik, ak alak eng’ sirik, che kiga bun Jerusalem," 
Mark7:2 ak kiga keer alak eng’ alamalyennyi koamei makatinik eng’ eunek che muruonen, noto ko, eunek che ma kiun." 
Mark7:3 Amu ngot ko maiun eunekwak komie Parisaik, ak Yahudik tugul, ko maamisiei, kosubi biteetab boisiek:" 
Mark7:4 ak ye bunu oldab aldaisiet, ko ngot ko maiungei, ko maamisiei: ak mitei bitonwek alak che chang’, che kitaach si korib komie, ko u kaunetab kikombok, ak terenik, ak tuguk che bo sugunwet." 
Mark7:5 Ak kiteebe inendet Parisaik ak sirik kole, Lyon si mabendoti alamalyeng’ung’ kosubi biteetab boisiek, ago amisie eunek ko muruonen?" 
Mark7:6 Kimwachi ichek kolenji, Kisib komwa Isaia iman agobo okwek chombilik, ko u ye sirat, kole, Teecha bichu eng’ kutuswekwak, Ago looen mugulelwekwak eng’ ane." 
Mark7:7 Ago iloswa buch. Ng’atutikab bik konetisiosiek che inetisie. 
Mark7:8 Obagaktoi ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak onam mising’ biteetab bik." 
Mark7:9 Ak kilenji ichek, Oesioi iman ng’atutietab Jehovah, si kobiit orib biteeng’wong’." 
Mark7:10 Amu kile Musa, Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet; ak, Inendet ne mwaei yaitiet agobo kwandanyi anan kamet, komeei iman:" 
Mark7:11 ago omwae okwek ole, Ngolenji chi kwandanyi anan kamet, Kit ne kata atoretenen ko Korban, ye kiweech ko, Kagochinet," 
Mark7:12 amata ochamji anyun inendet kotoret kwandanyi anan kamet; 
Mark7:13 oyae ng’olyotab Jehovah koek buch eng’ biteeng’wong’, ne kiong’at: ak oyae tuguk alak che chang’ che u choto." 
Mark7:14 Ak kiguur tuiyet kogeny kobwa ye mi inendet, ak kolenji, Ogasa okwek tugul si oguiye:" 
Mark7:15 Mami kiy ne mi chi sang’, ne ngwo orinnyi komuchi kong’wanit inendet: ago tuguk che mong’une chi ko choto che ing’waniti chi." 
Mark7:16 Ngo tinyei chi itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Mark7:17 Ak ye kingobagakta tuiyet kwo go, koteebe alamalyennyi agobo kalewenonoto." 
Mark7:18 Ak kilenji ichek, Tos motinye kaguiyet, ak okwek? Mogeere ole, kiy tugul ne mi chi sang’ ak kwo orit, ko magoi imuch kong’wanit chi;" 
Mark7:19 amu ma chut muguleldanyi, ago chutei moet, si komanda koba timin? U noto, kiitilil amitwogik tugul." 
Mark7:20 Ak kile, Kit ne mong’une chi, ko noto ne ing’waniti chi." 
Mark7:21 Amu mong’une orit, eng’ muguleldab chi, kabwatutik che yaach, sokset, chorsosiek, rumisiosiek, ibetab ge," 
Mark7:22 kasetab miat, yaitiet, ng’alset, maget ne ya, kong’ ne ya, ng’alek che yaach, menotet, ak berberindo:" 
Mark7:23 mong’une orit tuguchuto tugul yaachen ak kong’wanit chito. 
Mark7:24 Ak king’eet eng’ oloto, kwo tabanwekab Turo ak Sidon. Kiwa got age, ak kima mach konai chi: ak kima imuch koung’ak." 
Mark7:25 Ak ngunoto konyo kobogoriot age, ne kitinyei chepto ne ming’in ne kiga nam tamirmiriet ne muruon, kingogas agobo inendet, konyo kobutyi kelyekyik." 
Mark7:26 Ki bo Yunanik kobogoriondonoto, ne kisalu bororietab Suropoinike. Ak kisom inendet kole, koon oindet eng’ cheptanyi." 
Mark7:27 Ak kilenji inendet, Ingobiyong’so lagok korok: amu ma nyolu kenam amditab lagok ak kewirji sesenik." 
Mark7:28 Ago kiwolji inendet kolenji, Wei, Kiptaiyandani: agot sesenik koamei eng’ kureretab meset, amitwogik che iroroi che bo lagok." 
Mark7:29 Ak kilenji kobogoriondonoto, Ui anyun amu mwaoni; kagomong’une oindet cheptang’ung’." 
Mark7:30 Ak kiwa agoi gonnyi, konyor lakwet koruei eng’ itok, ko kagomong’une oindet." 
Mark7:31 Ak kimanda kogeny eng’ tabanwekab Turo, ak kiiwerta agoi Sidon kot koit araraita ne bo Galili, ak kibun kwenutab tabanwekab Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Ak kigimutyi inendet chi ne ming’at, ak ko uui kut; ak kosom si kobiit kogonoor inendet eunnyi." 
Mark7:33 Ak kiimut chichoto kwo taban eng’ tuiyet, ak kiirooch morikyik itikab chichoto, ak kong’utyi, ak kotwa ng’elyeptanyi;" 
Mark7:34 ak konyal kipsengwet, kobus, ak kolenji, Epata, noto ko, Yatage." 
Mark7:35 Ak kiyatogis anyun itikyik, ak kotiagak kit ne kirati ng’elyeptanyi, ak kong’alal komie." 
Mark7:36 Ak king’at ichek kole, amat omwachi chi: ago ye kites kong’at ichek, kotes anyun bichoto komwaitaat." 
Mark7:37 Ak kikwong’io mising’ ne siirei, kolen, Kagoyai tuguk tugul komie: igochin kogasta agot che ming’otin, ak kong’alal che namotin kut." 
Mark8:1 Eng’ betusiechoto, ye kimi kogeny tuiyet ne o, ak kima kotinyei kiy ne amei, koguur Jesu alamalyennyi kobwa ole mi inendet, ak kolenji," 
Mark8:2 Arire tuiyet, amu kagotebi kobota nguno betusiek somok, ama tinyei kiy ne amei:" 
Mark8:3 ak ngot aunde koba oldanywa ama am kiy, kotanuitos eng’ oret; ak kibunu alak ole loo." 
Mark8:4 Ak kiwolji alamalyennyi kole, Imuchi konyorune ano chi makatinik eng’ emoni surkwen kobae bichu kot kobiyong’so?"
