Mark8:5 Ak kiteebe ichek kolenji, Otinye makatinik ata? Ak kole, Tisab." 
Mark8:6 Ak king’at tuiyet kobuur: ak kinam makatinichoto tisab, ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kobutul, ak kogochi alamalyennyi, si konde tainywa, ak kogochinot tuiyet." 
Mark8:7 Ak kitinyei njirenik che mengechen che ng’ering’: ak kingo kagoberur, kong’at konde choto agichek tainywa." 
Mark8:8 Kiamis anyun, kobiyong’so: ak kiiyum katuganik, ak kiyam mesendoik tisab." 
Mark8:9 Ak icheget ko ki olo bo elfusiek ang’wan: ak kiunda koba. 
Mark8:10 Ak yeityo anyun kolany moingetab beek koboto alamalyennyi, koba komoswekab Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Ak kibwa Parisaik, ak kotoi koteepse inendet, komage kaborunet ne bunu kipsengwet, kotiemei inendet," 
Mark8:12 ak kiibus ne nyigis eng’ tamirmiriennyi, ak kole, Amu nee si kocheng’ei ibini kaborunet? Amwawok iman ale, Magoi kigochi ibini kaborunet." 
Mark8:13 Ak kibagakta ichek, ak kolany moingetab beek kogeny kolanda bitet age." 
Mark8:14 Ak kiutie ichek koib makatinik: kima kotinye kiy eng’ moinget kobate makatiat agenge kityo. 
Mark8:15 Ak kiitigon ichek, kolenji, Oripge, ak oribege mermerekab Parisaik ak mermerek che bo Herod." 
Mark8:16 Ak king’alaljingei ichegei, kolen, Magitinye makatinik." 
Mark8:17 Ak kingonai Jesu, kolenji, Kalya si oteebege, amu motinye makatinik? Tom onai, anan tom oguiye? Ta ko uuen mugulelwekwok?" 
Mark8:18 Otinye konyek, amogeere kiy? Ak otinye itik, amogastoi? Amobwati?" 
Mark8:19 Yu kingabutulji makatinik mut bik elfusiek mut, ko kitinye kerebonik ata katuganik che kigoyum? Kolenji inendet, Taman ak aeng’." 
Mark8:20 Ak tisab eng’ bik elfusiek ang’wan, ko kinyi mesendoik ata katuganik che kigoyum? Ak kolenji, Tisab." 
Mark8:21 Ak kolenji ichek, Tom oguiye?" 
Mark8:22 Ak kiit anyun Betsaida. Ak kimutyi inendet chi ne korat, ak kosom kotwa inendet." 
Mark8:23 Ak kinam eutab kipkoratiandanato, ak komut komandae nganaset; ak ye kingo kagong’utyi konyekyik, ak kogonoor eunekyik inendet, koteebe kole, Igeere kiy?" 
Mark8:24 Ak kiinyal barak, ak kole, Ageere bik; amu ageere ichek ko u ketik, kobendi." 
Mark8:25 Yeityo kotwa eunekyik kogeny konyekyik; ak kiichiil konyek, ak kisob, ak kogeer tuguk tugul komie." 
Mark8:26 Ak kiunda kwo ga, ak kolenji, Amewe nganaset agot kitigin." 
Mark8:27 Ak kiba anyun Jesu ak alamalyennyi agoi nganasok che bo Kaisaria Pilipi: ak kiteebe alamalyennyi eng’ oret, kolenji, Mwaei bik kole a ng’o?" 
Mark8:28 Ak kimwachi inendet kolenji, Len, i Johana Kabatisanindet: kolen alak, i Elija; ak len alak, i agenge ne bo maotik." 
Mark8:29 Ak kiteebe icheget kole, Ago olen okwek a ng’o? Kowolji Petero kolenji, I Kristo." 
Mark8:30 Ak king’at ichek kole, amat komwachi chi agobo inendet." 
Mark8:31 Ak kitoi konet ichek, kole, kanyol konyalil Weritab chi eng’ tuguk che chang’, ak koesio boisiek, ak tisiik che eechen, ak sirik ak kebar, ak ye igesgei betusiek somogu, kong’eet kogeny." 
Mark8:32 Ak kimwa ng’olyondonoto kotook. Ak kinam Petero inendet ak kotoi koger kong’. 
Mark8:33 Ago kiwelelgei, ak kogeer alamalyennyi, ak koger kong’ Petero, ak kolenji, Ui let eng’ ane, Setani: amu mebwati tugukab Jehovah, ago tugukab bik." 
Mark8:34 Kiguur anyun tuiyet koboto alamalyennyi kobwa ole mi inendet, ak kolenji ichek, Ngo machei chi age tugul kosubwa, koesiogei, ak kosut kimurtoiyondennyi, ak kosubwa." 
Mark8:35 Amu age tugul ne machei kosor sobondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti sobondanyi agobo ane ak logoiywek che miach kosoru. 
Mark8:36 Amu nyoru borot nee chi, ngonyor ng’ony komugul, ak kobeet sobondanyi?" 
Mark8:37 Amu igoitoi nee chi kowale sobondanyi? 
Mark8:38 Amu age tugul ne ililani agobo ane koboto ng’alekyuk eng’ ibinita bo sokset ak tengek, ko tun ililanjin agine Weritab chi inendet, ye tun nyonei eng’ lilindab Kwandanyi koboto malaikaisiek che tililen." 
Mark9:1 Ak kilenji ichek, Amwawok iman ale, Mi yu alak eng’ chu tonondos, che magoi chamjam meet, agoi kogeer bounatetab Jehovah konyonei eng’ kamuktaet." 
Mark9:2 Ak kingobata betusiek lo komut Jesu Petero, ak Jakobo, ak Johana, kotogosta tulwet ne koi koba uwak ichegei: ak kiwalak eng’ tainywa:" 
Mark9:3 ak kilil bich ngoroikyik mising’, ko u teluchi; mami mwetindet ng’ony ne imuchi komwet koleelagitu ko u choto." 
Mark9:4 Ak kitook eng’ tainywa Elija ak Musa: ak king’alaljindos koboto Jesu. 
Mark9:5 Ak kiwol Petero kolenji Jesu Konetindoni, mie ketebi eng’ yu: mie keteech keriosiek somok; neng’ung’ age, ko bo Musa age, ko bo Elija age." 
Mark9:6 Amu kima kongen kit ne wolu; amu kiiyweis mising’. 
Mark9:7 Ak kinyo boldet kotuch ichek: ak kimong’ kutit eng’ boldet, kole, Ni ko Werinnyu, chamanennyu: ogas okwek inendet." 
Mark9:8 Ak kigusgong’ ngunoto kogeer komoswek tugul, ko mata kogeer chi, kobate Jesu inegei ak icheget." 
Mark9:9 Ak kingota kochorugei eng’ tulwet, koete ichek, kolenji, amat komwachi chi tuguk che kagogeer agoi kong’eet Weritab chi eng’ che kibek." 
Mark9:10 Ak kirib ng’olyondonoto koteebegei ichegei agobo kaguiyetab ng’eetyet. 
Mark9:11 Ak kiteebe inendet kole, Mwaei sirik kole, kanyol konyo Elija korok." 
Mark9:12 Ak kilenji ichek, Iman, nyonei Elija korok, ak koweech tuguk tugul ko u ye kinye: ak kiteptoi ano si kesir agobo Weritab chi kele nyalili eng’ tuguk che chang’ ak kiit koek buch?" 
Mark9:13 Ago amwawok ale, kigonyo Elija, ak kiyachi agine kit age tugul ne kimachei ichek ko u ye kigisir agobo inendet." 
Mark9:14 Ak ye kigabwa ole mi alamalyet, kogeer tuiyet ne o ko kayiem ichek, ak sirik che kiteepse ichek." 
Mark9:15 Ak yeityo anyun, ye kingogeer tuiyet komugul inendet, kokwong’io mising’, ak koruai ole mi, kogat." 
Mark9:16 Ak kiteebe ichek kole, Oteebege nee ak icheget?" 
Mark9:17 Kowolji chito age eng’ tuiyet, kolenji, Konetindoni, kaamutun werinnyu, ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne namat kut;" 
Mark9:18 ak oldo tugul ole namjin eng’ kimnatet, kowirjinoti ng’ony: ak kotabugoni, ak konyeei kelek, ak kochuchui: ak kaamwachi alamalyeng’ung’ koon komanda; ago ma imuch." 
Mark9:19 Ak kiwolji anyun ichek kolenji, Ee, ibinda ne matinyei kayanet, atebye kobotok kot kotianit? Amuitoiywok kot kotianit? Omutwa inendet." 
Mark9:20 Ak kiimutyi ichek inendet Jesu: ak ye kingogeer inendet, kobirabirto ngunoto tamirmiriet mising’; ak kobutyi ng’ony, komelmelgei ak kotabugan." 
Mark9:21 Ak kiteebe kwandanyi, kolenji, Kinamei koboch au kiito? Ak kile, Koboch ko lakwa." 
Mark9:22 Ak kigowirji konyil che chang’ ma ak ole mi beek, komachei kobar inendet: ak ngimuchi iyai kiy age tugul, irirenech ge, ak itoretech." 
Mark9:23 Ak kilenji Jesu, Ngimuchi! Imugaksei tuguk tugul eng’ inendet ne iyani." 
Mark9:24 Yeityo anyun kowaach kwandab lakwanato, ak kole, Ayani; toreta eng’ bistoennyu." 
Mark9:25 Ak kingogeer Jesu tuiyet koruou tugul, koger kong’ tamirmiriet ne muruon, kolenji, Inye, tamirmiriet ne namat kut ak ko i ming’at, kang’atin ale, mong’u eng’ inendet, ak amatata ichut inendet kogeny." 
Mark9:26 Ak kingo kagowaach ak kobirto inendet mising’, komanda: ak koigei lakwet ne kagome; kot komwa che chang’ kole, Kagome." 
Mark9:27 Ago kinam Jesu eut, ak kong’eet; kotonon anyun." 
Mark9:28 Ak ye kingo kakwo go, koteebe alamalyennyi inendet komi ichegei, kole, Amu nee si ma kimuch achek keon?" 
Mark9:29 Ak kilenji ichek, Maimuchi komanda ne u ni eng’ kiy tugul, kobate saet." 
Mark9:30 Kiba anyun eng’ oloto, ak kobun kwenutab Galili; ak kima mach konai chi age tugul." 
Mark9:31 Amu kiineti alamalyennyi kolenjin, kindoi Weritab chi eunekab bik, ak kobar inendet; ak ye kagebar, kong’eet kogeny, ko kagobata betusiek somogu." 
Mark9:32 Ago kima nai ichek ng’olyondonoto, ak kiiywei koteebe inendet." 
Mark9:33 Ak kibwa Kapernaum: ak ye kimi go koteebe ichek kole, Ka nee ng’alek che komwaonu eng’ oret?" 
Mark9:34 Ago kisisyo: amu kitiitos ichegei eng’ ichegei eng’ oret kolen ng’o ne o. 
Mark9:35 Kiteb ng’ony anyun, ak koguur choto taman ak aeng’; ak kolenji, Ngo machei chi koek ne bo tai, koegu ne bo let eng’ tugul, ak koek otwogindetab tugul." 
Mark9:36 Ak kinam lakwet ne ming’in ak konde kwenunywa: ak koganab eng’ eunekyik, ak kolenji," 
Mark9:37 Age tugul ne taachei age eng’ lagochu mengech eng’ kainennyu, ko kataacha: ak age tugul ne taacha, ko mataacha ane, ago inendet ne kiiyokwa." 
Mark9:38 Kilenji Johana inendet, Konetindoni, kogigeer chi koonei oik eng’ kaineng’ung’: ak kogiete, amu koma kosubwech." 
Mark9:39 Ago kile Jesu, Amoete: amu mami chi ne yaei boisiet ne bo kimnatet eng’ kainennyu, ak komuch kochepchebit komwaitaena yaitio." 
Mark9:40 Amu inendet ne magirindoech ko nenyo. 
Mark9:41 Amu age tugul ne inagok beekab kikombet oee, amu o bo Kristo, amwawok iman, ale, mabetyin melektanyi." 
Mark9:42 Ak age tugul ne inachi age eng’ chu mengech che iyana, ko kaigai eng’ inendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitab bai ne o, ak kewirji nyanjet." 
Mark9:43 Ak ngonachin eung’ung’, itil: kaigai eng’ inye imong’ji sobondo i bo mugung’, kosiir itinye eunek aeng’ ak iwe Gehenna, mat ne ma misoksei." 
Mark9:44 Ole mabegu kutikwak, ama misoksei mat." 
Mark9:45 Ak ngonachin keldang’ung’, itil: kaigai eng’ inye imong’ji sobondo i bo kelok, kosiir kewirjin Gehenna i bo kelyek aeng’." 
Mark9:46 Ole mabegu kutikwak, ama misoksei mat." 
Mark9:47 Ak ngonachin kondang’ung’, ibalu: kaigai eng’ inye iit bounatetab Jehovah i bo kong’ak, kosiir kewirjin Gehenna itinye konyek aeng’;" 
Mark9:48 ole mabegu kutikwak, ama misoksei mat." 
Mark9:49 Amu kindoi chi age tugul munyuk eng’ mat. 
Mark9:50 Miachen munyuk: ago ngo bet anyinyindab munyuk, ko ta ondoi nee si kochom? Ingotebe munyuk mugulelwekwok, ak otebi eng’ kalyet okwege eng’ okwege." 
Mark10:1 King’eet anyun eng’ oloto, konyo tabanwekab Judea ak bitetab Jordan: ak kiiyumjigei inendet tuiyosiek kogeny; ak kiinet ichek kogeny, ko u ye kicham koyaei." 
Mark10:1 King’eet anyun eng’ oloto, konyo tabanwekab Judea ak bitetab Jordan: ak kiiyumjigei inendet tuiyosiek kogeny; ak kiinet ichek kogeny, ko u ye kicham koyaei." 
Mark10:2 Ak kibwanji inendet Parisaik, koteebe inendet koyomei, kole, Tos chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik koon chi osotiondennyi?" 
Mark10:3 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Nee ne king’atak Musa?" 
Mark10:4 Ak kile ichek, Kicham Musa kesir siret ne bo besiet, si koon kwo." 
Mark10:5 Ago kilenji Jesu ichek, Kisirwak ng’atutionoto Musa amu uuindab mugulelwekwok." 
Mark10:6 Ago koboch taunetab yaetab ng’ony, ko kiyai Jehovah ichek muren ak tie." 
Mark10:7 Amu ng’olyondoni kobagaktoi chi kwanda ak kamet, ak konamgei ak osotiondennyi;" 
Mark10:8 ak koek choto aeng’ borto agenge: si ma ko aeng’, ago egu borto agenge." 
Mark10:9 Choto anyun che kagotuiyo Jehovah, ko mat kobesio chi." 
Mark10:10 Ak kiteebe alamalyennyi inendet kogeny eng’ go, agobo ng’olyondonoto." 
Mark10:11 Ak kilenji ichek, Chi age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei." 
Mark10:12 Agot kobogoriot agine ngo bagakta manong’otiondennyi, ak kotun chito age, ko kabaigei." 
Mark10:13 Ak kigimutyi inendet lagok che mengechen, si kobiit kotwa ichek: ago kiger kong’ alamalyennyi ichek." 
Mark10:14 Ago ye kingogeer Jesu, konyit, ak kolenji ichek, Ochamji lagok che mengech kobwanja; amoete ichek: amu bo bounatetab Jehovah che u chu." 
Mark10:15 Amwawok iman ale, Chi age tugul ne mataachei bounatetab Jehovah ko u lakwet ne ming’in, ko maitei oloto matiny." 
Mark10:16 Ak kiganab icheget eng’ eunekyik, ak koberur, kogonoor eunekyik ichek." 
Mark10:17 Ak ye kiwendi eng’ oret, kolabatyi chito age inendet, ak kogutung’ji, ak koteebe kole, Konetindoni mie, ayai nee si anyor sobondo ne bo koigeny?" 
Mark10:18 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Kalya si iguurena ne mie? Mami chi ne mie, kobate agenge, inendet Jehovah." 
Mark10:19 Ingen inye ng’atutik, Amerumisie, Amoipge, Amechorse, Amebaorianji lembech, Ameng’alse, Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet." 
Mark10:20 Ago kilenji, Konetindoni, kiarib tuguchuto tugul koboch ko a ming’in." 
Mark10:21 Kigeer anyun Jesu inendet, ak kocham, ak kolenji, Ta ko rartaat kit agenge eng’ inye: ui, ialde tuguk tugul che itinye, ak igochi kibananok, si inyoru magornatet eng’ kipsengwet: ak inyo isubwa." 
Mark10:22 Ago kigerer met agobo ng’olyondonoto, ak kwo eng’ arogenet: amu kitinyei inendet tuguk che chang’." 
Mark10:23 Ak kigeer Jesu komoswek tugul, ak kolenji alamalyennyi, Bichii ne tia koit bounatetab Jehovah che tinyei magornatosiek!" 
Mark10:24 Ak kikwong’io alamalyennyi eng’ ng’alekyik. Ago kiwol Jesu kogeny, kolenji, Lagochu, bichii ne tia eng’ ichek che tiiegei magornatosiek koit bounatetab Jehovah!" 
Mark10:25 Nyamnyum eng’ tambesiet kochut kondab katet, kosiir komong’ji magoriot bounatetab Jehovah." 
Mark10:26 Ak kikwong’io ichek mising’, ak kolenji, Ara ng’o anyun ne imuchi konyor sorunet?" 
Mark10:27 Ak kingogeer Jesu ichek, kole, Maimugaksei eng’ bik, ago ma u noto eng’ Jehovah: amu imugaksei tuguk tugul eng’ Jehovah." 
Mark10:28 Kitoi anyun Petero kolenji, Keero, kigebagakte tuguk tugul ak kigisubun." 
Mark10:29 Kile Jesu, Amwawok iman ale, mami chi ne kibagach got, anan ng’etab kametwagik, anan chepkametwagik, anan kamet, anan kwanda, anan lagok, anan mbarenik, agobo ane, ak logoiywek che miach," 
Mark10:30 ne manyoru konyil bogol nguno eng’ betusiechu, gorik, ak ng’etab kametwagik, ak chepkametwagik, ak kametwagik, ak lagok, ak mbarenik, koboto usisiosiek; ak eng’ betusiek che tun bwanei, sobondab koigeny." 
Mark10:31 Ago tun egu che chang’ che bo tai che bo let; ak koek che bo let che bo tai. 
Mark10:32 Ak kimi ichek eng’ oret kotogostoi Jerusalem; ak kiindoi Jesu: ak kikwong’io, ak koiyweis che kiisubi. Ak kiitaban kogeny choto taman ak aeng’, kotoi komwachi ichek tuguk che tun ityin inendet," 
Mark10:33 kole, Ogeero, kitogostoi Jerusalem; ak kindoi Weritab chi eunekab tisiik che eechen ak sirik; ak koruokyi kiruoget ne bo meet, ak konde inendet eunekab bororiosiek:" 
Mark10:34 ak kochurochur inendet, ak kong’utyi, ak kobire kipcharitit, ak kobar; ak ye ibata betusiek somogu kong’eet kogeny." 
Mark10:35 Ak kirikyi inendet Jakobo ak Johana, werikab Sebedi, ak kolenji, Konetindoni, kimache iyaiywech kiy age tugul ne kisomin." 
Mark10:36 Ak kilenji ichek, Omache ayaiywok nee?" 
Mark10:37 Ak kilenji, Konech ketebe, age eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak age eung’ung’ ne bo katam, eng’ telunateng’ung’." 
Mark10:38 Ago kilenji Jesu ichek, Mongen kit ne osome. Tos omuchi oee kikombet ne aee? Anan kibatisanenak kabatisanet ne kibatisanena?" 
Mark10:39 Ak kilenji, Kimuchi. Kolenji anyun Jesu ichek, Kikombet ne aee ko tun oee ak okwek; ak kabatisanet ne kibatisanena ko tun kibatisanenok ak okwek noto:" 
Mark10:40 ago ma ane ne igoitoi kotebe chi eunnyu ne bo tai anan eunnyu ne bo katam: ago bo icheget che kigechopchi. 
Mark10:41 Ak ye kingogas chun tamanu, kotoi bichoto konerekyi mising’ Jakobo ak Johana." 
Mark10:42 Ak kiguur Jesu icheget kobwa ole mi, ak kolenji ichek, Ongen ole icheget che kiiti kele bou Bororiosiek, koyaegei koek kiptainik eng’ ichek; ak chechuak che eechen kobou ichek." 
Mark10:43 Ago ma u noto eng’ okwek: ago chi age tugul ne machei koek ne o eng’ okwek, koek ne boisiewok:" 
Mark10:44 ak chi age tugul ne machei koek ne bo tai eng’ okwek, koek otwogindetab tugul." 
Mark10:45 Amu kima nyo agot Weritab chi si keboisiechi, ago si kobois inendet, ak kogoito sobondanyi koek kit ne kitiage che chang’." 
Mark10:46 Ak kiit anyun Jeriko: ak kingomandae Jeriko, koboto alamalyennyi ak tuiyet ne o, ko kitebyei eng’ oret taban, Bartimayo, weritab Timayo, inendet kipkoratiat ne somsei." 
Mark10:47 Ak ye kingogas kole, nito ko Jesu ne bo Nasaret, kotoi kowaach ak kole, Jesu, Weritab Daudi, rirena." 
Mark10:48 Ak kiger kong’ che chang’ kole, kosis: ago kites kowaach mising’ kole, Weritab Daudi, rirena." 
Mark10:49 Ak kitonon Jesu, ak kole, Oguur inendet. Ak keguur kipkoratiandanato, kelenji, Baibaitu: ng’eet, kuurin inendet." 
Mark10:50 Ak kiwirta ngoriennyi, ak koriakta, kwo ole mi Jesu." 
Mark10:51 Ak kiwolji Jesu inendet kolenji, Imache ayaun nee? Ak kole chito ne korat, Rabboni, amache ageerto." 
Mark10:52 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Ui bandang’ung’; kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’. Ak kigeerto ngunoto anyun, ak kosub inendet eng’ oret." 
Mark11:1 Ak ye kingorikta Jerusalem, ak Betpage ak Betania, eng’ tulwetab Emitik, koyokto aeng’ eng’ alamalyennyi," 
Mark11:2 ak kolenji, Oba nganaset ne mi taing’wong’: ak onyoru eng’ sainato oite, moitab sigiriet ko ratat, ne tom kolany chi; otiach, ak ogetu." 
Mark11:3 Ak ngo teebenak chi kole, Kalya si oyai ko u ni? Olenji, Makyingei Kiptaiyat; ak kogonok ogetu anyun ngunoto." 
Mark11:4 Kiba anyun, ak konyor moitab sigiriet ko ratat, eng’ sang’utab ormarich, eng’ ole besiechin ortinwek; kotiach." 
Mark11:5 Ak kiteebe alak che kitonondos eng’ oloto kolenji, Olyon, ngotiachi moitab sigiriet?" 
Mark11:6 Komwachi ichek ko u ye kiga mwachi Jesu: ak kiunda bichoto icheget koba. 
Mark11:7 Ak kiget moitab sigiriet konyo ole mi Jesu, ak kiito ngoroikwak eng’ sigiriet; ak kitebe Jesu sigirionoto." 
Mark11:8 Ak kiito bik che chang’ ngoroikwak eng’ oret; ak kiindooti alage temenikab ketik, che kiebei eng’ mbarenik." 
Mark11:9 Ak kimwaoti eng’ kutit ne o che kiindoi, ak che kiisubi, kolen Hosanna: Iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat:" 
Mark11:10 Iberurot laitornatet ne nyonei, ne bo kwandanyo Daudi: Hosanna eng’ ole toror mising’." 
Mark11:11 Ak kimong’ji Jerusalem, ak kwo hekalut orit; ak ye kingo kagogeerot tuguk tugul, ak kiga koek koskoleny, kwo anyun Betania koboto taman ak aeng’." 
Mark11:12 Ak kingomong’ icheget karon eng’ Betania, koam rubet inendet." 
Mark11:13 Ak kingogeer eng’ ole loo mogoiywet ne tinyei sogek, konyo, kolen tamangab konyorji kiy: ak kingoit ye mi ketoto, ko ma konyorji kiy kobate sogek kityo; amu kitom koit ye rure logoekab mogoonik." 
Mark11:14 Ak kilenji ketoto, Koboch nguno ko ma koamenen chi logoek agoi koigeny. Ak kigasei alamalyennyi." 
Mark11:15 Ak kiit Jerusalem: ak kiwa hekalut orit, ak kotoi koon che kialdaisiei ak che kialisie hekalut, ak kogabui mesosiek che bo walikab siling’isiek, ak ng’echerok che bo che kialdoi cheptugenik;" 
Mark11:16 ak kima chamji chi age tugul kobun hekalut koibei kiy. 
Mark11:17 Ak kiinet, kolenji ichek, Tos ma sirat kele, Kiguure gonnyu gotab saet ne bo bororiosiek tugul? Ago kaoyai okwek koek kebenetab rebik." 
Mark11:18 Ak kigas tisiik che eechen ak sirik, ak kocheng’ ole bartoi inendet: amu kiiywei inendet, amu kiga kwong’ tuiyet komugul agobo konetisiennyi." 
Mark11:19 Ak kingoek lagat komanda eng’ nganaset. 
Mark11:20 Ak ye kisiirtoi ichek karon, kogeer mogoiywonoto ko kogores kot koit tigitik." 
Mark11:21 Kobwat anyun Petero, kolenji, Konetindoni, keero, kogores mogoiywondoni koichube." 
Mark11:22 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Oyan Jehovah." 
Mark11:23 Amwawok iman ale, Chi age tugul ne lenjin tulwoni, Kitutin ak kewirjin araraita; ko mabistoe eng’ muguleldanyi, ago koyan kole, isuldoi tuguk che kamwa; konyoru tuguchoto." 
Mark11:24 Noto anyun amwawok ale, Tuguk alak tugul che osome eng’ saet, oyan ole kaotaach, ak onyoru." 
Mark11:25 Ak ngoting’e chi ng’olyo, ko ye otonon osae, onyochi kaat, si konyoiywok kaat lelutikwok Kwandang’wong’ agine ne mi kipsengwet." 
Mark11:26 Ago ngo monyochi kaat okwek, ko manyoiywok kaat lelutikwok Kwandang’wong’ agine ne mi kipsengwet." 
Mark11:27 Ak kibwa kogeny Jerusalem: ak kingota kowendoti eng’ hekalut, kobwanji inendet tisiik che eechen, ak sirik, ak boisiek;" 
Mark11:28 ak kiteebe kole, Nee kimnatet ne iyae tuguchu? Anan ng’o ne kigonin kimnatoni iyae tuguchuto?" 
Mark11:29 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Ateebenok ak ane ng’olyot agenge, ak owolwa, si amwawok kimnatet ne ayae tuguchuto." 
Mark11:30 Tos kibunu kabatisanetab Johana kipsengwet, anan kibunu bik? Owolwa." 
Mark11:31 Ak kiteebegei ichegei kole, Ngele, Kibunu kipsengwet; kole inendet, Kilya anyun si moyan?" 
Mark11:32 Ago ngot kele, Kibunu bik- amu kiiywei ichek bik: amu kiga koyan bik tugul kole maotiot Johana iman." 
Mark11:33 Ak kiwolji Jesu kole, Magingen. Ak kilenji Jesu anyun, Mamwawok agane kimnatet ne ayae tuguchuto." 
Mark12:1 Ak kitoi kong’alalji ichek eng’ kalewenaik kole, Kiminji chito age sabibuk mbaret, ak kong’ot, ak kobal keringet ole kirurung’e sabibuk, ak koteech got ne koi, ak komanakyi meek, ak kwo emet age." 
Mark12:2 Ak kingoit betusiekab kesisiet, koyokto otwogindet kwo ole mi meek, si kobiit konyorune meechoto logoek che bo mbaretab sabibuk." 
Mark12:3 Ak kinam inendet, ak kobir, ak koon kwo buch." 
Mark12:4 Ak kiiyokyi kogeny otwogindet age; ak kibir metinnyi, ak kotewer." 
Mark12:5 Ak kiiyokto age; ak kobar inendet: ak kiiyokto alak che chang’; kobir alak, kobar alak." 
Mark12:6 Kita kotinyei anyun agenge, noto werinnyi ne chamat: kiiyokto inendet eng’ let kwo ole mi ichek, kole, Teechei werinnyu." 
Mark12:7 Ago king’alalso meechoto ichegei, kolen, Nito ne namei tuguk; obwa, kebar inendet, si kindii tuguk." 
Mark12:8 Ak kinam inendet, ak kobar, ak kowirta komanda eng’ mbaret ne bo sabibuk." 
Mark12:9 Yaei nee anyun chitab kobo mbaret ne bo sabibuk? Nyonei anyun kobarei meechoto, ak komanakyi meek alak mbaranato bo sabibuk." 
Mark12:10 Tom osoman sirutichu; Koita ne kiesio teegik, Kigiyai noto koek metitab luita:" 
Mark12:11 Kibunu ng’olyondoni Kiptaiyat, ak ko kwong’ut eng’ konyekyok?" 
Mark12:12 Ak kicheng’ei ole namdoi inendet; ago kiiywei tuiyet; amu kinai kole kamwa kalewenoni agobo ichek: ak kibagakta inendet, ak koba." 
Mark12:13 Ak kiiyokyi Parisaik alak ak che bo Herodik, si korate ng’alekyik." 
Mark12:14 Ak kingobwa, kolenji inendet, Konetindoni, kingen kele i bo iman, ameiti chi age tugul: amu megeere itondab chi, ago ineti iman oretab Jehovah: Tos chamdoi ng’atutik kigochi kodi Kaisari, anan machamdoi?" 
Mark12:15 Kigoite anan acha? Ago kinai inendet chombilenywa, ak kolenji ichek, Kalya si otiema? Oibwa denarit ageer." 
Mark12:16 Ak kiipchi. Ak kilenji ichek, Bo ng’o itoni ak sironi? Ak kolenji, Bo Kaisari." 
Mark12:17 Ak kilenji Jesu, Ogochi Kaisari tuguk che bo Kaisari, ak ogochi Jehovah tuguk che bo Jehovah. Ak kikwong’io mising’ agobo inendet." 
Mark12:18 Ak kibwanji inendet Sadukaik, che mwaei kole, mami ng’eetyet, ak koteebe inendet, kole," 
Mark12:19 Konetindoni, kisirwech Musa kole, Ngo me ng’etab kametab chi, ak kobagakta osotiondennyi, ama sich lakwa, kondii ng’etab kamet osotiondonoto, si kobiit kolalji mat ng’etab kamet." 
Mark12:20 Kimi werik tisabu che kitupcho: ak kiitunis werit ne o, kome ama sich lakwa;" 
Mark12:21 ak kiindi agine ne bo aeng’, kome ama sich lakwa; ak kiigei noto agine ne bo somok:" 
Mark12:22 ak ma biitune tugul tisab lakwa. Let kome agine kobogoriondonoto. 
Mark12:23 Tun eng’ ng’eetyet kobunjin ng’o eng’ ichek osotiondonoto? Amu kiga kobunji choto tisab. 
Mark12:24 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Ma noto ne kigonok olel, amu mongen sirutik, anan kimnatetab Jehovah?" 
Mark12:25 Amu ye tun ng’eetyo ichek komong’ eng’ che kibek, ko maitunisiei, ama kituni; ago tebyei ko u malaikaisiek eng’ kipsengwet." 
Mark12:26 Ago agobo bik che kigobek, kele tun ng’eetos, ko tom osoman eng’ bukuitab Musa, eng’ ole kimi Ketit, ko u ye kimwachi Jehovah inendet, kolenji, A Jehovah ne bo Abraham, ak a Jehovah ne bo Isak, ak a Jehovah ne bo Jakobo?" 
Mark12:27 Inendet ko ma Jehovah ne bo che kigobek, ago bo che soptos: olele mising’." 
Mark12:28 Ak kinyo age eng’ sirik, ak kogas koteebegei, ak kingonai kole kawolji ichek komie, koteebe inendet, kole, Nee ng’atutiet ne bo tai eng’ tugul?" 
Mark12:29 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Ne bo tai ni, Ogaso, ee, Israel; Kiptaiyat Jehovah nenyo, ko Kiptaiyat agenge:" 
Mark12:30 ak icham Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ kimnateng’ung’ komugul." 
Mark12:31 Ne bo aeng’ ko ni, Cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ole ichamdoige. Mamitei ng’atutiet age ne o kosiir chu." 
Mark12:32 Ak kilenji sirindet, Iman, Konetindoni, kaimwa komie, ile, inendet ko agenge; ama mi age kobate inendet:" 
Mark12:33 ak ngocham inendet eng’ muguleldo komugul, ak eng’ kaguiyet komugul, ak eng’ kimnatet komugul, ak ngo cham chitab kokwet ko u ole chamdogei, kosiirei noto kagochinoik tugul che kibeelei ak tiseiywek." 
Mark12:34 Ak kingogeer Jesu kole kawol eng’ ng’omnatet, kolenji, Ma i loo eng’ bounatetab Jehovah. Ak mata kogany chi koteebe ng’olyo age tugul." 
Mark12:35 Ak ye kiinetisiei Jesu eng’ hekalut, komwa kole, Lyon si komwaei sirik kole, Kristo ko weritab Daudi?" 
Mark12:36 Kimwa Daudi inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, kole, Kimwachi Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, kole, Tebe eunnyu ne bo tai, Agoi ande buniguk keldebesaikab kelyeguk." 
Mark12:37 Kuure Daudi inendet Kiptaiyat; koegundoi ano anyun werinnyi? Ak kiepchin it tuiyet ne o inendet eng’ boiboindo. 
Mark12:38 Ak eng’ konetisiennyi, kolenji, Oribege sirik, che chamei kobendat kolaachi ngoroik che koen, ak kagatosiek eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet," 
Mark12:39 ak ng’echerok che bo tai eng’ sunagogisiek, ak oldinwek che bo tai eng’ igorwek:" 
Mark12:40 ak korebe ichek mosogik gorikwak, ak kosaei sautik che koen kong’alsei; nyoru bichu kiruoget ne o kosiir." 
Mark12:41 Ak kiteb ng’ony kotokyigei ole kiyumjin tuguk che kigoitoi, kogeer ole indoitoi tuiyet sendeisiek ole kiyumjin: ak kiinde magorek alak sendeisiek che chang’." 
Mark12:42 Ak kinyo mosoget age ne kibanania, ak konde sendeisiek aeng’, che u kebeberta ne ming’in ne bo denarit." 
Mark12:43 Ak kiguur alamalyennyi anyun kobwa ole mi inendet, ak kolenji, Amwawok iman ale, Kagonde mosogani banan che siirei che kagonde bik tugul che indoi tugukwak ole kiyumjin:" 
Mark12:44 amu kagonde ichek tugul che bo chang’indab tugukwak; ago kagonde inendet che bo banandanyi, tugul che katinyei, agot che kosobe." 
Mark13:1 Ak ye kimandoi eng’ hekalut, kolenji age eng’ alamalyennyi, Konetindoni, keero, kie u koichu ak kie u teeksoni!" 
Mark13:2 Ak kilenji Jesu, Tos igeere teeksosiechu eechen? Matun ng’etu koita agenge eng’ baragutab age, ne magiwirjin ng’ony." 
Mark13:3 Ak kingotebyei ng’ony eng’ tulwetab Emitik ye tokyindos ak hekalut, koteebe inendet Petero ak Jakobo ak Johana ak Andrea komi ichegei, kole," 
Mark13:4 Mwawech, yaoksei tuguchuto auiyo? Ak nee kaborunet ne tun iboru kole karik kosulda tuguchuto tugul?" 
Mark13:5 Ak kitoi Jesu kolenji, Oripge si maibeetok chi." 
Mark13:6 Bwanei tun che chang’ eng’ kainennyu, kolen, A inendet; ak kobeet che chang’." 
Mark13:7 Ak ye tun ogas agobo lugosiek ak ng’alek agobo baretab ge, ko moarogense: kanyol koek ko u noto; ago tom koit kagesunet." 
Mark13:8 Amu setyin bororiet age bororiet age, ak setyin bounatet age bounatet age: ak kobiit botanetab ng’ony eng’ oldinwek che terotin; ak kobiit rubosiek: tuguchuto ko taunetab ng’woninwek." 
Mark13:9 Ago oripge okwek: amu tun kimutyinok kapkiruok; ak kebirok eng’ sunagogisiek; ak oteleli eng’ taitab bounik ak laitorinik agobo ane, si koek baornat eng’ ichek." 
Mark13:10 Ak kanyol keamji korok logoiywek che miach bororiosiek tugul. 
Mark13:11 Ak ye tun kimutak kapkiruok, ak kindeak eunekab bik, ko mat ogerer met agobo kit ne tun omwae: ago kit age tugul ne kigonok eng’ sainato, ko noto ne omwae: amu ma okwek che ong’alali, ago Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Mark13:12 Ak kong’wekta chi ng’etab kamet kebar, ak kong’wekta kwanda lakwennyi; ak kong’eetyi lagok sigikwak, ak kogoito kebar." 
Mark13:13 Ak kowechok bik tugul amu kainennyu: ago ne muitoi agoi let, kesoru noto." 
Mark13:14 Ago ye tun ogeer kit ne kiwechei ne bo ng’emisiet kotonone ole ma nyoljin kotonone (ingoguiyo ne somani), ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tolonok:" 
Mark13:14 Ago ye tun ogeer kit ne kiwechei ne bo ng’emisiet kotonone ole ma nyoljin kotonone (ingoguiyo ne somani), ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tolonok:" 
Mark13:15 ama chortagei chi ne mi got barak anan kwo go, si kobiit konem kiy eng’ gonnyi:" 
Mark13:16 amat koweek chi ne mi mbar kwo koib ngoriennyi. 
Mark13:17 Bwa eng’ ichek che chio ak che reritos eng’ betusiechoto! 
Mark13:18 Ak osa si matun yaak choto eng’ betusiek che bo kaititindo. 
Mark13:19 Amu egu nyalilda eng’ betusiechoto, ne kitom koegu ko u noto koboch taunetab yaetab ng’ony ne kiyai Jehovah, agoi nguno, ama kobiitu ko u noto kogeny agoi." 
Mark13:20 Ak nda kima til Kiptaiyat betusiek konwagitu, ta ma kisoru chi: ago kitil betusiek amu che lewenotin che kilewen." 
Mark13:21 Ak ngo lenjok chi eng’ betusiechoto, Ogeero, mi Kristo oli; anan, Ogeero, mitei olo; ko mat oyan:" 
Mark13:22 amu ng’eetos Kristoisiek che bo lembech, ak maotik che bo lembech, ak kobortoi kaborunoik ak kwong’utik, si kobeet, agot che kigelewen nda imugaksei." 
Mark13:23 Ago oripge: ogeero, kasib amwawok tuguk tugul." 
Mark13:24 Ago eng’ betusiechoto, ko kagobata nyalilata, koimenit asista, kama koluu arawet," 
Mark13:25 ak kororok kecheik eng’ kipsengwet, ak kotumdumgei kimnatosiek che mi kipsengwetisiek." 
Mark13:26 Eng’ sainoto kogeer anyun Weritab chi konyonei eng’ bolik koboto kimnatet ne o ak lilindo ne o. 
Mark13:27 Yeityo koyokto malaikaisiek, ak koyum lewenikyik, kobun usonaik ang’wan, kobunu tabandab ng’ony agoi tabandab kipsengwet." 
Mark13:28 Onetge kalewenetab mogoiywet: ye kang’arng’aritu temenikyik, ak kong’atyo sogek, onai ole karik kesisiet;" 
Mark13:29 u noto ak okwek ye ogeer kosuldoi tuguchu, onai ole kagorik inendet, mi kurgotik." 
Mark13:30 Amwawok iman ale, Masiirtoi ibini, ama isulda tuguchuto tugul." 
Mark13:31 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ago masiirtoi ng’alekyuk." 
Mark13:32 Ago mami chi ne naei agobo betunoto anan sainato, agot malaikaisiek che mi kipsengwet, agot Werit, kobate Kwanda inegei." 
Mark13:33 Oripse anyun, ogenisie ak kosae: amu mongen ye egune." 
Mark13:34 U chi, ne kibagach gonnyi, ak koruto emet age, ak kogochi otwogikyik kimnatet, chi age tugul ak boisiennyi, ak kong’at ribindet koripso." 
Mark13:35 Oripse anyun: amu mongen ye itu chitab kobo got, ngo lagat, anan kemoi kwen, anan ye iteei kipsoiywet, anan karon;" 
Mark13:36 si macheak ak konyoruok oruitosi. 
Mark13:37 Ak ng’olyot ne amwawok okwek amwachini tugul, ale, Oripse." 
Mark14:1 Ak kingobata betusiek aeng’u kobiit igortab paska ak makatinik che ma kinde mermerek: ak kicheng’ tisiik che eechen ak sirik ole imuktoi konam eng’ ng’alset, si kobiit kobar inendet:" 
Mark14:2 amu kile icheget, Amat ongenam eng’ igorta, si mabolyo bik." 
Mark14:3 Ak ye kimi inendet Betania eng’ gotab Simon ne kiamei mogondosik, kota kotebyei eng’ amisiet, konyo kobogoriot ne tinyei chubait ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut ne bo kamanutiet ne o; ak kotui chubainato, ak korong’ji metinnyi." 
Mark14:4 Ak kimi alage che kinerektos eng’ orit kolen, Amu nee si kibeet buch mwai?" 
Mark14:5 Amu kata yamei kealdae mwai che siirei denarisiek bogol somok, ak kigochi kibananok. Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji inendet." 
Mark14:6 Ago kile Jesu, Obagakte; kalya si oiim inendet? Kayaiywa boisiet ne mie." 
Mark14:7 Amu otinye kotugul kibananok, ak eng’ ui tugul ye omache, omuchi oyachi ne mie: ago mami ane kotugul kobotok." 
Mark14:8 Kagoyai ne imuchi: kasib koiil bortanyu agobo tubet. 
Mark14:9 Ak amwawok iman ale, Ui tugul ole kiamjin logoiywek che miach eng’ ng’ony komugul, kemwaitoi agine ne kayai kobogoriondoni si kobiit koek kabwatet agobo inendet." 
Mark14:10 Ak kiwa Judas Iskariot, ne ki age eng’ taman ak aeng’, ole mi tisiik che eechen, si kobiit kong’wekyi icheget." 
Mark14:11 Ak kingab kagas ichek, koboiboitu, ak koarorji kole, kogochi fedaisiek. Ak kicheng’ sait ne yamei si kong’wekta inendet." 
Mark14:12 Ak eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ye kienyei aruetab paska, kolenji alamalyennyi, Imache kebe ano si kechobun ole iame paska?" 
Mark14:13 Ak kiiyokto aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi, kolenji, Oba nganaset, ak otuiye chito ne ibu teretab beek: osub inendet;" 
Mark14:14 ak oldo tugul ole mong’jin inendet, olenji chitab kobo got, Kale Konetindet, Mi ano gonnyu ne bo toek, ole anyone aame igortab paska koboto alamalyennyu?" 
Mark14:15 Ak koboruok inendet got ne o ne bo barak ne tetat tuguk, ak ko chobot: ak ochobwech oloto." 
Mark14:16 Kiba anyun alamalyet, kot koit nganaset, konyor ko u ye kaga kemwachi: ak kichob anyun paska." 
Mark14:17 Ak kingoek koskoleny konyo koboto taman ak aeng’. 
Mark14:18 Ak ye kitebyei eng’ amisiet, kole Jesu, Amwawok iman, ale, Ng’wektoa age eng’ okwek, inendet ne kiamisiei tuwai." 
Mark14:19 Kotoi anyun koarogenso, ak kolenji inendet agenge agenge, Tos ane?" 
Mark14:20 Ak kilenji ichek, Noto ko agenge eng’ taman ak aeng’, ne kiburburtoi tuwai eng’ tabet." 
Mark14:21 Amu wendi Weritab chi, ko u ye sirat agobo inendet: ago bwa eng’ chichoto king’wektae Weritab chi! Kita mie eng’ chichoto ko ma kisich." 
Mark14:22 Ak ye kiamisiei icheget, konam makatiat, ak kingo kagoberur, kobutul, ak kogochi, ak kole, Onam: ni ko bortanyu." 
Mark14:23 Ak kinam kikombet, ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kogochi ichek: ak koee tugul." 
Mark14:24 Ak kilenji, Chu korotikyuk che bo arorutiet, che tumdogei agobo che chang’." 
Mark14:25 Amwawok iman ale, Ma aee kogeny che bo logoekab sabibuk, agoi betunoto ne aee che leelach eng’ bounatetab Jehovah." 
Mark14:26 Ak kingo kagotien tiendo, komanda koba tulwet ne bo Emitik." 
Mark14:27 Kolenji Jesu ichek, Kinachok okwek tugul: amu kigisir kele, Abire mestowot, ak koiyesta kechirek." 
Mark14:28 Ago, ye kaging’eeta, andoenak awe Galili." 
Mark14:29 Ago kilenji Petero, Agot nginach tugul agobo inye, ko maginacha." 
Mark14:30 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Amwaun iman ale, rani, kemouni, kotom kote kipsoiywet konyil aeng’, iesioa konyil somok." 
Mark14:31 Ak kimwa eng’ kimnatet ne o kole, Ngo nyolu kebegu tuwai, ko magoi aesien. Ak kimwa agichek tugul ko u noto." 
Mark14:32 Ak kiit koret ne kiguure Getsemane, ak kilenji alamalyennyi, Otebe yu, ye asae." 
Mark14:33 Ak kiimut Petero ak Jakobo ak Johana, ak kotoi kokwong’io mising’ ak koarogenso." 
Mark14:34 Ak kilenji ichek, Kaarogen sobondanyu mising’ agoi meet: otebe yu ak oripse." 
Mark14:35 Ak kiwa tai kitigin, ak kobutyi ng’ony, ak kosa kole, ngomugaksei, ko mie kosiirtoena sainito." 
Mark14:36 Ak kimwa kole, Aba, Baba, imugaksei tuguk tugul eng’ inye; istaena kikombani: ago, ma ko u ye amache, ago ko u ye imache." 
Mark14:37 Ak kinyo ak konyor ichek koruitos, ak kolenji Petero, Simon, irue? Ma imuch iripse agot sait agenge?" 
Mark14:38 Oripse ak osae, si mochut yomset: chamei tamirmiriet iman, ago nyaluli borto." 
Mark14:39 Ak kiwa kogeny, ak kosa komwa ng’alechugaita." 
Mark14:40 Ak kinyo kogeny, ak konyor koruitos, amu kiga nyigisitu mising’ konyekwak; ak kima kongen kit ne woljin inendet." 
Mark14:41 Ak kinyo ne bo somok, ak kolenji ichek, Oruiye anyun nguno, omuuny: kagoyam; kagoit sait; ogeero, kageng’wekyi Weritab chi eunekab kiptengeginik." 
Mark14:42 Ong’eetye, kebe: ogeero, kagorik inendet ne ng’wektaa." 
Mark14:43 Ak ngunoto, kota kong’alali, konyo Judas, age eng’ taman ak aeng’, koboto tuiyet che tinyei rotokab chok ak siarisiek, kobunu ole mi tisiik che eechen ak sirik ak boisiek." 
Mark14:44 Ak kiga koarorji ng’wektaindet ichek, kolenji, Inendet ne ang’ututi ko inendet noto; onam, ak omut ak oribote." 
Mark14:45 Ak kingoit, kwo eng’ sainato ole mi inendet, ak kole, Rabbi; ak kong’utut." 
Mark14:46 Ak kiiyogoito bichoto eunekwak ak konam inendet. 
Mark14:47 Ago king’us rotwennyi bo chok age eng’ che kitonondos eng’ ye negit, ak koeb ititab otwogindetab tisiindet ne o." 
Mark14:48 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Komong’u ak rotokab chok ak siarisiek, ko u ye osetyini rebindet, si onama?" 
Mark14:49 Kiami kobotok betusiek tugul eng’ hekalut anetisiei, ak kima onama: ago kayaak ni si kobiit kosulda sirutik." 
Mark14:50 Ak kibagakta ichek tugul inendet, ak komwei." 
Mark14:51 Ak kiisub inendet mureno age, ne kiilaachi anget inegei ne bo katanit, ak konam bichoto inendet;" 
Mark14:52 ak kometo ngorionoto bo katanit, komwei ach ngor." 
Mark14:53 Kiimut Jesu anyun kwo ole mi tisiindet ne o: ak koyumjigei inendet tisiik tugul che eechen ak boisiek ak sirik. 
Mark14:54 Ak kiisub Petero inendet eng’ ye loo, agoi koit seremutab gotab tisiindet ne o; ak kitebyei koboto ng’atik, koyue mat." 
Mark14:55 Kicheng’ anyun tisiik che eechen ak kapkiruoget komugul baornatet eng’ Jesu si kobiit kobar; ago kimanyor. 
Mark14:56 Amu kibaorianji che chang’ lembech agobo inendet, ak ma namgei baornatenywa." 
Mark14:57 Ak kitononso alak, kobaorian lembech agobo inendet, kole," 
Mark14:58 Kigegas komwaei inendet kolen, Ang’eme hekaluni kigiyae eunek, ak ateech age eng’ betusiek somok ne magiyae eunek." 
Mark14:59 Agot eng’ noto ko ma namgei baornatenywa. 
Mark14:60 Kitonon anyun tisiindet ne o eng’ kwenunywa, koteebe Jesu, kole, Mewolu kiy? Nee ni baorianjinin bichu?" 
Mark14:61 Ago kisis, ama wol kiy. Kiteebe kogeny tisiindet ne o, kole, I Kristo inye, Weritab Ne Iberurot?" 
Mark14:62 Ak kile Jesu, A inendet: ak tun ogeere Weritab chi kotebyei eng’ eutab tai ne bo kamuktaet, konyonei eng’ bolik che bo kipsengwet." 
Mark14:63 Ak kigerer ngoroikyik tisiindet ne o, kolen, Ta kemage nee baorinik alak?" 
Mark14:64 Kaogas ng’alek che yaach che mwaei: obwati nee? Ak kiiruokyi tugul kole nyoljin meet. 
Mark14:65 Ak kitoi alak kosing’ilji inendet, ak kotuch togennyi, ak koluch, ak kolenji, Ng’orse: ak kinam ng’atik inendet ak korabach." 
Mark14:66 Ak kingota komi Petero seremut ole bo ng’ony, konyo age eng’ tibik che otwogikab tisiindet ne o;" 
Mark14:67 ak kingogeer Petero koyue mat, kochiilji kong’ inendet, ak kolenji, Kiimi aginye koboto Nasaretindonoto, Jesu." 
Mark14:68 Ago kitiiyo kole, Mangen, amaguitosi choto imwae: ak komanda kwo keter; ak kiito anyun kipsoiywet." 
Mark14:69 Ak kigeer cheboto inendet, ak kotoi kogeny komwachi che tonondos eng’ ye negit, kolenji, Ni ko agenge eng’ icheget." 
Mark14:70 Ak kitiiyo kogeny. Ak ne matia kolenji ichek kogeny che kitonondos eng’ ye negit Petero, Iman i agenge eng’ ichek amu i Galilindet." 
Mark14:71 Ak kitoi kochubis, ak koyosio, kole, Mangen chichi omwae." 
Mark14:72 Ak ngunoto kote kipsoiywet ne bo aeng’. Ak kiibwat anyun Petero ng’olyondonoto, ko u ye kiga komwachi Jesu inendet kole, Kotom kote kipsoiywet konyil aeng’, iesioa konyil somok. Ak kingobwat ng’olyondonoto, korir." 
Mark15:1 Ak yeityo ko kaech kotet ng’alek tisiik che eechen koboto boisiek ak sirik, ak kapkiruoget komugul, ak korat Jesu, ak komut kwo, ak kogochi Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Ak kiteebe Pilato kole, Tos i Laitoriatab Yahudik? Ak kiwolji kolenji, Kaimwa." 
Mark15:3 Ak kiitaam inendet tisiik che eechen eng’ tuguk che chang’. 
Mark15:4 Ak kiteebe Pilato kogeny, kole, Mewolu kiy? Keero tuguk che chang’ che kagotaamjin bichu." 
Mark15:5 Ago mata kowol ng’olyo Jesu, kot kokwong’ Pilato." 
Mark15:6 Kicham kotiakyin Pilato bik kimonjororiot agenge eng’ betutab igorta, ne kagosom ichek inendet." 
Mark15:7 Ak kimi chito age ne kigiguure Baraba, ne ki ratat koboto ichek che kichaamsei, icheget che kiga rumis eng’ chaamsonoto." 
Mark15:8 Kitogosta tuiyet ak kotoi kosom inendet koyachi ko u ye cham koyaei kotugul. 
Mark15:9 Ak kiwolji Pilato ichek, kolenji, Tos omache atiakwok Laitoriatab Yahudik?" 
Mark15:10 Amu kiga nai kole, kiigoito tisiik che eechen inendet amu ng’etkong’." 
Mark15:11 Ak kicheer tisiik che eechen tuiyet kole, kitiakyi Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Ak kiwol Pilato kogeny kole, Aite nee anyun chichi oguure Laitoriatab Yahudik?" 
Mark15:13 Ak kibolyo ichek kogeny, kole, Igartat inendet eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Mark15:14 Ak kilenji Pilato ichek, Kalya, koyai yaitiet nee? Ago kibolyo ichek mising’ kole, Igartat inendet eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Mark15:15 Ak kimach Pilato kobaibai tuiyet, kotiakyi anyun Baraba, ak kogoito Jesu, ko kagobire kipcharitit, si kobiit kigartat." 
Mark15:16 Ak kiimut askarik inendet kwo kapkiruok orit, ne kiguure Praitorium; ak kiguur askarik tugul kobwa." 
Mark15:17 Ak kiilaakyi ngoriet ne arus ne birir, ak kila ngatietab katok, ak konde metinnyi;" 
Mark15:18 ak kitoi kogat inendet kole, Kigatin, Laitoriatab Yahudik!" 
Mark15:19 Ak kikwer metinnyi eng’ tegat, ak kosing’ilji, ak kogutuny kolos inendet." 
Mark15:20 Ak kingo kagochotachot inendet, koreegune ngoriet ne arus ne birir, ak kolaakyi ngoroikyik. Ak kiimut kwo sang’ kogartat eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Mark15:21 Ak kibirji chito ne kisiirtoi, Simon ne bo Kurene, kwandab Aleksandro ak Rupo, kobunu koret age, koib kimurtoiyotab Jesu." 
Mark15:22 Ak kimut inendet kwo oldo ne kiguure Golgota, ye kiweech kelen, Oldab terta." 
Mark15:23 Ak kiigochi divaik che burugot ak tuguk che u igomoik: ago ma taach. 
Mark15:24 Ak kogartat, ak kopchechigei ngoroikyik, ak koser barbarek, konai ne te ne ibei chi tugul." 
Mark15:25 Ak kiigartat inendet, ko kaek sait somok." 
Mark15:26 Ak kigisirji ng’alekab kataamset agobo inendet metinnyi barak kele, LAITORIAT NE BO YAHUDIK." 
Mark15:27 Ak kiigartat rebik aeng’ koboto inendet; age eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai, ak age eng’ eunnyi ne bo katam." 
Mark15:28 [Ak kiisulda anyun siret ne mwaei kole, Ak kigiit inendet koboto kiptengeginik.]" 
Mark15:29 Ak kichurochur che kisiirtoi, kolelegoti metowekwak, ak kolen, Haa! Inye ne ing’eme hekalut, ak iteech eng’ betusiek somok," 
Mark15:30 soruge, ak ichoruge eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Mark15:31 Ak kichurochur inendet ko u noto tisiik che eechen agichek, koboto sirik kole, Kigosor alak; maimuchi kosorgei." 
Mark15:32 Ingochorgei nguno Kristo, Laitoriatab Israel, eng’ kimurtoiyot, si kobiit kegeer ak kiyan. Ak kigengenie inendet agichek che kiga kigartat koboto inendet." 
Mark15:33 Ak kingoit sait lo, koimenit emet komugul agoi sait sogol." 
Mark15:34 Ak eng’ sait sogol kotwek Jesu eng’ kutit ne o kole, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabaktani? Ye kiweech kelen, Jehovah nenyu, Jehovah nenyu, kebagakta amu nee?" 
Mark15:35 Ak kingogas alak eng’ che kitonondos eng’ ye negit, kole, Ogeero, kuurei Elija." 
Mark15:36 Ak kilabat chito age, konyiit siki sibonjit ak konde tegat, ak kogochi koee, ak kole, Ingotebi ko u noto; ongegeer ngo nyonei Elija kochoor konyo ng’ony." 
Mark15:37 Kotwek anyun Jesu eng’ kutit ne o, ak kochamji tamirmiriet kwo." 
Mark15:38 Kigerer anget ne kiga kioiye hekalut kwen koboch barak agoi ng’ony. 
Mark15:39 Ak kingogeer kiptaiyatab bogol, ne kitononi eng’ ye negit inendet, kogoitoi tamirmiriet kwo ko u noto, kole, Iman ko Weritab Jehovah chichi." 
Mark15:40 Ak kimi agichek kobogorisiek che kigeerei eng’ ye loo: kimi eng’ icheget Maria Magdalene, ak Maria kametab Jakobo ne ming’in ak ne bo Joses, ak Salome;" 
Mark15:41 che kiisubi ak koboisiechin inendet ye kimi Galili; koboto kobogorisiek alak che chang’ che kitogosu Jerusalem koboto inendet. 
Mark15:42 Ak kingoek koskoleny, amu ki Chobet, ki noto betut ne indoune sabato," 
Mark15:43 konyo Josep ne bo Arimatea, chito ne konyitot ne bo kapkiruok, ne kiigeni agine bounatetab Jehovah; ak kwo gab Pilato eng’ nyiganatet kosom mustab Jesu." 
Mark15:44 Ak kikwong’ Pilato amu kaga kome: ak koguur kiptaiyatab bogol, koteebe ngo kagome keny." 
Mark15:45 Ak kingo kagonai eng’ kiptaiyandanato, kogochi anyun Josep musto." 
Mark15:46 Ak kial anget ne bo katanit, ak kochoor inendet, ak kotaae anganato bo katanit, ak konde kererit, ne kiga kebal eng’ koita ne o; ak kimilji koita kogere kurgetab kererit." 
Mark15:47 Ak kigeerei Maria Magdalene ak Maria kametab Joses ole kaginde inendet. 
Mark16:1 Ak kingo kagosiirto sabato koal Maria Magdalene, ak Maria kametab Jakobo, ak Salome, nyamdutik, si kobwa koiil inendet." 
Mark16:2 Ak eng’ karon inne, eng’ betutab tai ne bo wigit, koit kererit ko kachor asista." 
Mark16:3 Ak kong’alaljigei ichegei kole, Mildaiywech ng’o koita eng’ kurgetab kererit?" 
Mark16:4 Ak kingoyot met, kogeer ko kagemilda koita: amu ki o mising’." 
Mark16:5 Ak kingochut kererit, kogeer muren kotebyei eng’ komostab tai, ne ilaachi ngoriet ne leel; ak kikwong’io." 
Mark16:6 Ak kilenji ichek, Amokwong’ie: ocheng’e Jesu, Nasaretindet, ne kiga kigartat: kagong’eet; ma komi yu: ogeer ole kiga kinde inendet!" 
Mark16:7 Ago, oba, omwachi alamalyennyi ak Petero, olenji, Kagondoenak kwo Galili: ogeere inendet eng’ oloto, ko u ye kiga komwawok." 
Mark16:8 Ak kimanda sang’ eng’ kererit, ak komwei; amu kiga botanso ak kokwong’io: ak ma mwachi chi kiy; amu kiiyweis. [" 
Mark16:9 Ak kingong’eet Jesu anyun karon mising’ eng’ betutab tai ne bo wigit, kochunji korok Maria Magdalene, inendet ne kiga kocherune Jesu oik tisab." 
Mark16:10 Kiwa komwachi icheget che kimi koboto inendet, ye kita koarongendos ak korirtos." 
Mark16:11 Ak kingogas ichek kole sobei, ak kole, kagogeer inendet chebiosonato, ko ma iyan." 
Mark16:12 Ak kingobata tuguchu, kong’ang’jigei eng’ itondo age aeng’ eng’ ichek kobendi eng’ oret koret age." 
Mark16:13 Kiba anyun ak komwachi chun alak: ak kima iyan choto agichek. 
Mark16:14 Ak kingobata noto, kong’ang’jigei icheget taman ak aeng’ kotebyei eng’ amisiet; ak koger kong’ amu bistoenywa ak uuindab mugulelwekwak, amu kima iyan icheget che kigeer inendet ko kagong’eet." 
Mark16:15 Ak kilenji, Oba ng’ony komugul, oamjinote logoiywek che miach bik tugul." 
Mark16:16 Inendet ne iyani ak kibatisan kesoru; ago inendet ne maiyani ko tun kiruokyin. 
Mark16:17 Ak isubi kaborunoichu ichek che iyani: onei oik eng’ kainennyu; ak kong’alali ng’alalet ne leel; 
Mark16:18 namei erenok, ak ngo ee tuguk che barei bich, ko manyoru ng’wanindo matiny; igonoori eunekwak bik che miandos ak kosopcho." 
Mark16:19 Ye kingo kagong’alal ak icheget Kiptaiyat Jesu, kimut anyun inendet kwo kipsengwet, ak kotebe eutab tai ne bo Jehovah." 
Mark16:20 Ak kiba anyun, koamdaat eng’ oldo tugul, kobois Kiptaiyat koboto ichek, ak kogimit ng’olyot eng’ kaborunoik che kiisuboti. Amen.]" 
Luke1:1 Amu kigonde eunekwak che chang’ kotet ng’alek agobo tuguchoto kigosulda eng’ kwenunnyo," 
Luke1:2 ko u ye kigogonech, che ki baorinik che kigeer koboch taunet, ak che ki kiboitinik che bo ng’olyot," 
Luke1:3 kiageer agane ale, mie atetun eng’ siret, ko kaanai agane ole kibiitunda tuguk tugul koboch taunet, ee, inye, ne i toogunot Teopilo;" 
Luke1:4 si kobiit inai eng’ iman, ng’alechato kiginetin." 
Luke1:5 Kimi eng’ betusiek che bo Herod, laitoriatab Judea, tisiindet age ne kigiguure Sakaria, ne bo ripsetab Abija: ak kitinyei osotiot ne kisalu gab Aron, ak kigiguure kainennyi Elisabet." 
Luke1:5 Kimi eng’ betusiek che bo Herod, laitoriatab Judea, tisiindet age ne kigiguure Sakaria, ne bo ripsetab Abija: ak kitinyei osotiot ne kisalu gab Aron, ak kigiguure kainennyi Elisabet." 
Luke1:6 Ak ki bo iman ichek tuwai eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kibendate ng’atutik tugul ak karureiywek che bo Kiptaiyat, ama tinyei lelut." 
Luke1:7 Ak kima kotinyei lakwa, amu ki son Elisabet, ak kiga koosegitu tuwai." 
Luke1:8 Ak ye kita koyaei boisietab tiseinatet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tetetab ripsennyi," 
Luke1:9 ko u biteetab boisietab tiseinatet, ko kigilewen inendet kwo hekalutab Kiptaiyat kobeel nyamdutik." 
Luke1:10 Ak kimi sang’ tuiyet komugul ne bo bik, kosaei eng’ sait ne kibeele nyamdutik." 
Luke1:11 Ak kimong’ji malakaiyatab Kiptaiyat kotonone komostab tai ne bo kapkorosut ne kibeele nyamdutik. 
Luke1:12 Ak kingogeer Sakaria inendet koarogen ak koiyweis. 
Luke1:13 Ago kilenji malaikaiyat inendet, Ameiyweisie, Sakaria: amu kogegasun someng’ung’, ak ta kosigun osotiondeng’ung’ Elisabet werit, ak iguure kainennyi Johana." 
Luke1:14 Ak inyoru boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge; ak boiboitu bik che chang’ eng’ sigennyi. 
Luke1:15 Amu tun egu ne o eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat, ama eei divaik anan maiyek; ago kinyiiti Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, koboch komi moetab kamet." 
Luke1:16 Ak koweekyi lagokab Israel che chang’ Kiptaiyat Jehovah nenywa. 
Luke1:17 Ak kowendot eng’ taitab togennyi eng’ tamirmiriet ak kimnatetab Elija, si koweech mugulelwek che bo kwanisiek kotokyigei lagok, ak kowelel ngelelik si kobendat eng’ ng’omnatetab che bo iman; si kochopchi Kiptaiyat bik che chobotin." 
Luke1:18 Ak kilenji Sakaria malaikaiyat, Anae nee ng’olyondonito? Amu koaositu, ak kigotar kenyisiek che chang’ osotiondennyu." 
Luke1:19 Ak kiwolji malaikaiyat kolenji, A Gabriel, ne atononi eng’ taitab Jehovah; kagiyokwa ang’alalun, ak aibun logoiywechu miachen." 
Luke1:20 Ak keero, namoksein kut, amemuchi ing’alal, agoi tun betut ne biitu ng’alechu, amu ma iyan ng’alekyuk, che tun isuldoi eng’ betusiekwak." 
Luke1:21 Ak kiigen bik Sakaria, kot kokwong’io, amu kiigagei eng’ hekalut." 
Luke1:22 Ak ye kingomong’ sang’, koma komuch kong’alalji ichek, ak kinai ichek kole, kagogeer kaborunet ne bo kwong’et eng’ hekalut: ak king’alaljine bichoto eut, ak kiteb ko namat kut." 
Luke1:23 Ak ye kingogesgei betusiekab otisiennyi, kwo ga." 
Luke1:24 Ak ye kingogesgei betusiechoto komanach osotiondennyi Elisabet; ak kiunygei arawek mut, ak komwa kole," 
Luke1:25 Koyaiywa ko u nito Kiptaiyat eng’ betusiek che kiibwata, si koistoena reng’sennyu eng’ bik." 
Luke1:26 Kiiyokto Jehovah malaikaiyat Gabriel eng’ arawetab lo kwo nganaset ne bo Galili, ne kiguure Nasaret," 
Luke1:27 kwo oldab chepto bergeiyat ne kiga kechamji murenet age ne kiguure Josep, ne bo gotab Daudi; ak kigiguure bergeiyandanato Maria." 
Luke1:28 Ak kinyo ole mi cheboto, ak kolenji, Chamge, inye ne i chamat mising’, mi Kiptaiyat koboten." 
Luke1:29 Ago kiimgei mising’ inendet eng’ mwaonato, ak kiibwat kole, egu nee kagatoni." 
Luke1:30 Ak kilenji malaikaiyat inendet, Ameiywei, Maria: amu kainyoru chamet eng’ Jehovah." 
Luke1:31 Ak keero, imanachi, ak isich werit, ak tun iguure kainennyi JESU." 
Luke1:32 Egu ne o inendet, ak tun kiguure Weritab Inendet ne Toror Mising’: ak kigochin Kiptaiyat Jehovah ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo kwandanyi Daudi:" 
Luke1:33 ak tun laitorane gotab Jakobo koigeny; ama tinyei ole igesunegei bounatennyi. 
Luke1:34 Ak kilenji Maria malaikaiyat, Egundoi ano ng’olyondoni, amu mangen muren?" 
Luke1:35 Ak kiwolji malaikaiyat kolenji, Nyonjinin Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak kouurin kamuktaetab Inendet ne Toror Mising’: noto anyun kiguure ne tilil, Weritab Jehovah, inendet ne tun kisichei." 
Luke1:36 Ak keero, managat agine Elisabet tupcheng’ung’, tun sichei werit eng’ osindanyi: ne bo lo arawani eng’ inendet ne kigiguure son." 
Luke1:37 Amu mami ng’olyo ne bunu Jehovah ne ma kim. 
Luke1:38 Ak kile Maria, Keero, a chepto ne otwogindetab Kiptaiyat; ingeyaiywa ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. Ak kiwa malaikaiyat kobagakta inendet." 
Luke1:39 King’eet anyun Maria eng’ betusiechoto kwo kochakta emetab tulonok, agoi nganasetab Juda;" 
Luke1:40 ak kiwa agoi gotab Sakaria ak kogat Elisabet. 
Luke1:41 Ak ye kingogas Elisabet kagatetab Maria, koureren lakwet eng’ moennyi; kinyi anyun Tamirmiriet ne Tilil Elisabet;" 
Luke1:42 ak komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Iberurot inye eng’ kobogorisiek, ak iberurot inendet ne isiche." 
Luke1:43 Ak katepto ano kot anyoru nito, kot konyonja kametab Kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Luke1:44 Amu, keero, ye kangoit itikyuk kutitab kagateng’ung’, koureren lakwet eng’ moennyu eng’ boiboiyet." 
Luke1:45 Ak baibai kobogoriondonoto iyani; amu tun isuldoi tuguk che kigemwachi inendet che bunu Kiptaiyat. 
Luke1:46 Ak kile Maria, Itorori sobondanyu Kiptaiyat," 
Luke1:47 Ak kagobaibait tamirmiriennyu eng’ Jehovah Yetindennyu. 
Luke1:48 Amu kagogeer nyerotietab otwogindennyi ne chepto: Amu, ogeero, koboch ra koguurena ibinwek tugul ne baibai." 
Luke1:49 Amu kagoyaiywa inendet ne bo kamuktaet tuguk che eechen; Ak tilil kainennyi. 
Luke1:50 Tebyei rirenennyi eng’ ibinwek agoi ibinwek Eng’ icheget che konyiti inendet. 
Luke1:51 Kigobor kimnatet eng’ eunnyi; Ak kigoiyesta che menotik eng’ kabwatutikab mugulelwekwak. 
Luke1:52 Kagochoor bounik eng’ ng’echerokwak, Ak kagoeet che nyerotin." 
Luke1:53 Kagobae che amei rubet tuguk che miachen: Ak kagoon magorek koba buch. 
Luke1:54 Kagotoret otwogindennyi Israel, Si kobwat rirenetab ge," 
Luke1:55 Ko u ye king’alalji kwanisiekyok, Eng’ Abraham ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny." 
Luke1:56 Ak kitebi Maria koboto Elisabet ne negit arawek somok; yeityo koweek kwo ga. 
Luke1:57 Kiit anyun betut ne sigisie Elisabet; kosich werit. 
Luke1:58 Ak kogas bikab kokwennyi ak bikab orennyi kole kagotesyi Kiptaiyat rirenennyi kwonyoto; ak kiboiboitu koboto inendet. 
Luke1:59 Ak kingoit betut ne bo sisiit, kobwa ichek koyatita lakwet; kimachei koguure Sakaria, kemwaitae kainetab kwandanyi." 
Luke1:60 Ak kiwol kamet kole, Achicha; kiguure Johana." 
Luke1:61 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Mami chi eng’ oreng’wong’ ne keguure kainanato." 
Luke1:62 King’alaljine ichek eut kwanitab lakwet, koteebe kainet ne machei ketochi." 
Luke1:63 Kosom kit ne kisirei, ak kisir, kole, Johana kainennyi. Ak kikwong’io tugul." 
Luke1:64 Koyatak anyun kutinnyi ngunoto, ak kotiagak ng’elyeptanyi, ak kitwek kolos Jehovah." 
Luke1:65 Ak kinyonji kaiyweisiet tugul che kimenyei komoswekwak; ak kigimwaita ng’alechuto tugul koyom emetab tulonok ne bo Judea. 
Luke1:65 Ak kinyonji kaiyweisiet tugul che kimenyei komoswekwak; ak kigimwaita ng’alechuto tugul koyom emetab tulonok ne bo Judea. 
Luke1:66 Ak kigonore mugulelwekwak ng’alechato ichek tugul che kigas, kole, Tun egu nee anyun lakwani? Amu kimi koboto inendet eutab Kiptaiyat." 
Luke1:67 Kinyi anyun Tamirmiriet ne Tilil kwandanyi Sakaria, ak kimaoten, kole," 
Luke1:68 Iberurot Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo Israel; Amu kagorutochi bikyik ak koyachi katiaget ichek," 
Luke1:69 Kagong’eetwech kuinetab yetunet Eng’ gotab Daudi kiboitiondennyi 
Luke1:70 (Ko u ye kimwa eng’ kutuswekab maotikyik che tililen che kimi koboch ko kagitoi ng’ony)," 
Luke1:71 Si kosoruech eng’ bunikyok, ak eng’ eunekab tugul che wechech;" 
Luke1:72 Si korire kwanisiekyok, Ak kobwat kayomisennyi ne tilil;" 
Luke1:73 Kayosiet ne kiiyosiechi kwandanyo Abraham," 
Luke1:74 Si kobiit kogonech, ko kagosoruech eng’ eunekab bunikyok, Keboisiechi inendet ama eng’ kaiyweisiet," 
Luke1:75 Eng’ tililindo ak eng’ imanda eng’ tainnyi eng’ betusiekyok tugul. 
Luke1:76 Ee lakwani, kiguurenen maotiotab Inendet ne Toror Mising’: Amu iwendi eng’ taitab Kiptaiyet indoi, si kobiit ichob ortinwekyik;" 
Luke1:77 Si igochi bikyik naet ne bo yetunet Eng’ nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogikwak," 
Luke1:78 Amu muguleldo ne riregei ne bo Jehovah nenyo, Si kochorjech lapkeiyet ne bunu barak," 
Luke1:79 Si koluuchi icheget che tebyei eng’ mesundeito ak che mi uruetab meet; Si kondochi kelyekyok kot koit oretab kalyet. 
Luke1:80 Ak kiner lakwanato, ak kotesak kimnatet eng’ tamirmiriet, ak kimeng’oti surkwen agoi betut ne kiiborjigei Israel." 
Luke2:1 Kibun anyun ng’atutiet Kaisari Agusto eng’ betusiechoto, kole, kesir kainaikab bik tugul." 
Luke2:2 Ne bo tai sirisioni ye ki bounindetab Suria, Kurenio." 
Luke2:3 Kiba anyun tugul si kesir, chi tugul eng’ nganasennyi." 
Luke2:4 Kitogos agine Josep eng’ Galili, kobunu nganasetab Nasaret, agoi Judea, kot koit nganasetab Daudi, ne kiguure Betlehem, amu ki bo inendet gotab Daudi, ak ki bo orennyi;" 
Luke2:4 Kitogos agine Josep eng’ Galili, kobunu nganasetab Nasaret, agoi Judea, kot koit nganasetab Daudi, ne kiguure Betlehem, amu ki bo inendet gotab Daudi, ak ki bo orennyi;" 
Luke2:5 si kobiit kesir inendet koboto murerennyi Maria, ne ki chio." 
Luke2:6 Ak kiit sigetab lakwet, kota komi oloto." 
Luke2:7 Ak kisich werinnyi ne bo tai; ak kolaakyi ngoroikab lakwandit, ak komogonji kaptugut, amu kima komi boroindo eng’ gotab toek." 
Luke2:8 Ak kimi emonoto mestowek che kitebyei eng’ kewet koribei akwenywa ne bo kechirek kemoi. 
Luke2:9 Ak kitonon malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat eng’ ole negite ichek, ak kiiluuchi lilindab Kiptaiyat komoswekwak tugul: koiyweis anyun mising’." 
Luke2:10 Ak kilenji malaikaiyat ichek, Amoiyweisie; ogeero, aibwok logoiywek che miach che bo boiboiyet ne o ne ityin bik tugul:" 
Luke2:11 amu kagisikwok Yetindet rani, eng’ nganaset ne bo Daudi, noto Kristo Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:12 Ak nit kaborunet eng’ okwek: Onyoru lakwet ko kagilaakyi ngoroikab lakwandit, korue moinget ne amisie tuga." 
Luke2:13 Ak kimi eng’ sainato koboto malaikaiyandanato chang’indab lugosiekab kipsengwet che kiilosu Jehovah kolen," 
Luke2:14 Bo teegisto Jehovah, eng’ ole toror mising’, Ak kalyet eng’ ng’ony eng’ bik che chamotin eng’ inendet." 
Luke2:15 Ak kingo kagoweek malaikaisiek koba kipsengwet, kolenjigei mestowechoto, Ongebe nguno agoi Betlehem, si kobiit kegeer ng’olyondonito kagoyaak, ne kagoboruech Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:16 Ak kibwa anyun kochok, ak kinyor Maria ak Josep, ak lakwet korue moinget ne amisie tuga." 
Luke2:17 Ak ye kingogeer kobarta mwaet ne kaga kemwachi agobo lakwanato. 
Luke2:18 Ak kikwong’io tugul che kigas ng’alechato kimwachi mestowek. 
Luke2:19 Ago kirib Maria ng’alechato tugul, kobwatoti eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Luke2:20 Ak kiweek anyun mestowek, kotorori Jehovah ak kolosunoti eng’ tuguk tugul che kagogas ak che kagogeer, ko u ye kaga kemwachi." 
Luke2:21 Ak kingoit betusiek sisiit che kiyatitoe inendet, keguure kainennyi JESU, ko u ye kiga kotochi malaikaiyat kotomo kemanach." 
Luke2:22 Ak kingo kagobata betusiekab katililenywa ko u Ng’atutietab Musa, komut inendet konyo Jerusalem, si kogochi Kiptaiyat" 
Luke2:23 (ko u ye kigisir eng’ Ng’atutietab Kiptaiyat, kele, Kiguure ne itabanat agobo Kiptaiyat werit age tugul ne yatei iyotet)," 
Luke2:24 ak kogoito korosiot ko u ye kigimwa eng’ Ng’atutietab Kiptaiyat, kele, Cheptugenik aeng’, anan arek aeng’ che bo cheptugenik." 
Luke2:25 Ogeero, kimi chito age Jerusalem, ne kigiguure Simeon; ak ki chito ne bo iman ak kigonyiti Jehovah, ne kiigeni kagaigaetab Israel: ak kitebe Tamirmiriet ne Tilil inendet." 
Luke2:26 Ak kiga kong’ang’ji inendet Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, kole, mageerei meet, kotom kogeer Kristo ne bo Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:27 Kinyo anyun hekalut eng’ Tamirmiriet: ak ye kingomut sigik lakwet Jesu, si kobiit koyachi inendet ko u biteetab Ng’atutiet," 
Luke2:28 konam anyun lakwet eng’ eunekyik, ak kolos Jehovah, kole," 
Luke2:29 Ee, Kiptaiyat, ichamjini nguno otwogindeng’ung’ kwo Eng’ kalyet, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’;" 
Luke2:30 Amu kagogeer konyekyuk yetuneng’ung’," 
Luke2:31 Ne kiichob eng’ taitab bik tugul; 
Luke2:32 Lapkeiyet ne bo ng’ang’utiet ne king’ang’jin Bororiosiek, Ak torornatetab biguk Israel." 
Luke2:33 Ak kikwong’io Josep ak kametab lakwet agobo tuguchoto kagimwa agobo inendet; 
Luke2:34 ak kiiberur Simeon ichek, ak kolenji Maria kamennyi, Keero, kaginde lakwani si kobutyo che chang’ ak kong’eetyo che chang’ eng’ Israel; asi koek kaborunet ne tun kiesioi;" 
Luke2:35 (ee agot inyendet ko tun torei rotwetab chok muguleldang’ung’;) si kobiit kong’ang’ogis kabwatutikab mugulelwekab bik che chang’. 
Luke2:36 Ak kimitei agine Ana, chebo Panuel, ne ki maotio, ne bo oretab Aser (ne kiga koosit mising’; kitebi ak manong’otiot kenyisiek tisab koboch ngitun." 
Luke2:37 Ak kitebi ko mosok kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit ak ang’wan), ko mamandoi eng’ hekalut, ak kolosu, koboto karugutetab ge, ak somutik, kemoi ak bet." 
Luke2:38 Ak kinyo eng’ sainato ak kogochi Jehovah kongoi, ak king’alalji tugul che kiigeni katiaget eng’ Jerusalem agobo inendet." 
Luke2:39 Ak kingo kagoges tugul ko u Ng’atutietab Kiptaiyat, koweektagei koba Galili, agoi nganasenywa Nasaret." 
Luke2:40 Ak kiner lakwet, ak kotesak kimnatet, ak kinyi ng’omnatet: ak kimi mieindab Jehovah koboto inendet." 
Luke2:41 Kicham kobendi sigikyik kenyit age tugul Jerusalem eng’ igorta ne bo paska. 
Luke2:42 Ak ye ki bo kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, kotogosta ichek koba Jerusalem ko u biteet ne bo igorta;" 
Luke2:43 ak ye kingowong’ betusiek, ye kiweeksei, kong’et lakwet Jesu eng’ Jerusalem: ak kima nai sigikyik;" 
Luke2:44 ago kilen mi koboto bik che kibendi tugul, koba anyun bandab betut komugul; ak kicheng’ inendet eng’ kwenutab bikab orenywa ak che kiingengei:" 
Luke2:45 ak ye kimanyor inendet, koweektagei Jerusalem, kocheng’at." 
Luke2:46 Ak ye kingogesgei betusiek somogu, konyorji inendet hekalut, kotebyei eng’ kwenutab konetik, koepchin it ng’alekwak, ak koteepse icheget:" 
Luke2:47 ak kikwong’io ichek tugul che kiepchin it inendet amu naennyi ak wolunaikyik. 
Luke2:48 Ak ye kingogeer inendet, kokwong’io: ak kilenji kamennyi inendet, Lakwani, kalya si iyaiywech ko u ni? Keero, kogicheng’in ane ak kwandang’ung’ eng’ arogenet." 
Luke2:49 Ak kilenji ichek, Amu nee si ocheng’a? Ma onai ole kanyolja atebe boisietab Baba?" 
Luke2:50 Kima iguiyo ichek ng’olyondonoto kamwachi. 
Luke2:51 Kichorgei anyun koboto icheget, ak kiit Nasaret; ak kigase it ichek: ak kigonor kamet ng’alechato tugul eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Luke2:52 Kitesak ng’omnatetab Jesu, ak etunatet, ak mieindo eng’ Jehovah ak eng’ bik." 
Luke3:1 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Tiberio Kaisari, ye ki bounindet ne bo Judea Pontio Pilato, ak Herod ko ki kiruogindet ne bo Galili, ak ki kiruogindetab Iturea ak Trakoniti Pilipu ng’etab kametab Herod, ak ki Lusania kiruogindet ne bo Abilene," 
Luke3:1 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Tiberio Kaisari, ye ki bounindet ne bo Judea Pontio Pilato, ak Herod ko ki kiruogindet ne bo Galili, ak ki kiruogindetab Iturea ak Trakoniti Pilipu ng’etab kametab Herod, ak ki Lusania kiruogindet ne bo Abilene," 
Luke3:2 eng’ betusiek che bo tiseinatet ne o ne bo Anas ak Kaiapa, koityi anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Johana weritab Sakaria eng’ surkwen." 
Luke3:3 Ak kinyo komoswek tugul che bo tabanwekab Jordan, koamdooti kabatisanetab sigunet agobo nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik;" 
Luke3:4 ko u ye kigisir eng’ bukuitab ng’alekab maotiot Isaia, kele, Kutitab chi ne ititeni eng’ surkwen kolen, Ochob oretab Kiptaiyat, Olititoti ole bunoti." 
Luke3:5 Tun kilong’u atebwet age tugul, Ak tun kiribribi tulwet age tugul ne o ak ne ming’in: Ak tun kilititi che kunuren, Ak kichaboi ortinwek che sing’ortot:" 
Luke3:6 Ak tun keerei bik tugul yetunetab Jehovah. 
Luke3:7 Kimwachi anyun tuiyosiek che kibendi ole mi inendet, si kobatisan, kolenji, Ee okwek lagokab erenokab ng’wonet, ng’o ne kagoteeiywok omweune nereknatet ne tun nyonei?" 
Luke3:8 Oii anyun logoek che nyoljin sigunet, amotau omwa eng’ mugulelwekwok ole, Kitinye kwandanyo Abraham: amu amwawok ale, eng’ koichu komuchi Jehovah kong’eetyi Abraham lagok." 
Luke3:9 Agot nguno ko kaginde aiywet tigitikab ketik: noto anyun, ketit age tugul ne maiyei logoek che miach, keebei, ak kewirji ma." 
Luke3:10 Ak kiteebe inendet tuiyosiek kole, Kiyai nee anyun?" 
Luke3:11 Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji, Inendet ne tinyei sumotik aeng’, kogochi ne matinyei; ak ingoyai ko u noto agine ne tinyei amitwogik." 
Luke3:12 Ak kibwa agichek taagikab aisurut si kibatisan, ak kolenji inendet, Konetindoni, kiyai nee?" 
Luke3:13 Ak kimwachi ichek kolenji, Amomage bik tuguk che siirei che kiging’at." 
Luke3:14 Ak kiteebe askarik agichek kolenji, Kiyai nee anyun achek? Ak kilenji, Amomu chi age tugul, anan orebe chi kiy; ago ingoyamak melekwekwok." 
Luke3:15 Ak kingota kogeni bik kit ne biitu, ak kogereri met eng’ mugulelwekwak bik tugul agobo Johana, kolen ngo tos Kristo inendet;" 
Luke3:16 kowolji Johana ichek tugul kolenji, Abatisanok eng’ beek iman; ago nyonei inendet ne kim kosiira, ne manyoljina atiach anokab kweonikyik: ibatisanok inendet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak mat:" 
Luke3:17 tinyei keibet eng’ eunnyi, ak kotilili komie ruanyut, ak koyumji nganok chogennyi; ago beelei metetek eng’ mat ne ma misoksei." 
Luke3:18 Kiamji anyun bik logoiywek che miach koboto kotigonutik alak che chang’. 
Luke3:19 Ago ye kingo kagoger kong’ Johana kiruogindet Herod agobo Herodia, osotiotab ng’etab kam, ak agobo tuguk tugul che yaachen che kiga koyai Herod," 
Luke3:20 kotesyi nito anyun chun tugul, noto ko kiger Johana eng’ korgoret." 
Luke3:21 Ak ye kingo kagibatisan bik tugul, ak ko kagibatisan Jesu agine, ak ye kisaei, koyatak kipsengwet," 
Luke3:22 ak kochorjigei inendet Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, eng’ kergeindab cheptuget, ak komong’une kutit kipsengwet kole, Inyendet ko i Werinnyu, chamanennyu; abaibai mising’ eng’ inye." 
Luke3:23 Ak kingotau Jesu konetisiei, ko ki negit kenyisiek sosom, (kolen ichek abere) weritab Josep, weritab Heli," 
Luke3:24 weritab Matat, weritab Lawi, weritab Melki, weritab Janai, weritab Josep," 
Luke3:25 weritab Matatia, weritab Amos, weritab Nahum, weritab Esli, weritab Nagai," 
Luke3:26 weritab Maat, weritab Matatia, weritab Semein, weritab Josek, weritab Joda," 
Luke3:27 weritab Joanan, weritab Resa, weritab Serubabel, weritab Sealtiel, weritab Neri," 
Luke3:28 weritab Melki, weritab Adi, weritab Kosam, weritab Elmadam, weritab Er," 
Luke3:29 weritab Jose, weritab Elieser, weritab Jorim, weritab Matat, weritab Lawi," 
Luke3:30 weritab Simeon, weritab Juda, weritab Josep, weritab Jonam, weritab Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 weritab Melea, weritab Mena, weritab Matata, weritab Natan, weritab Daudi," 
Luke3:32 weritab Jesii, weritab Obed, weritab Boas, weritab Salmon, weritab Nason," 
Luke3:33 weritab Aminadab, weritab Armi, weritab Hesron, weritab Peres, weritab Juda," 
Luke3:34 weritab Jakobo, weritab Isak, weritab Abraham, weritab Tera, weritab Nahor," 
Luke3:35 weritab Serug, weritab Reu, weritab Peleg, weritab Eber, weritab Sela," 
Luke3:36 weritab Kainan, weritab Arpaksad, weritab Sem, weritab Noa, weritab Lamek," 
Luke3:37 weritab Metusela, weritab Enok, weritab Jared, weritab Maalaleel, weritab Kainan," 
Luke3:38 weritab Enos, weritab Set, weritab Adam, weritab Jehovah." 
Luke4:1 Ak kiweek Jesu kobunu Jordan ko nyiitat Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, ak kiimut Tamirmiriet kwo surkwen" 
Luke4:2 ak kotebi betusiek artam koyomei oindet. Ak ma am kiy eng’ betusiechoto: ak ye kingogesgei betusiechoto, koam rubet." 
Luke4:3 Ak kilenji oindet, Ngo i Weritab Jehovah, ing’at koi koek makatiat." 
Luke4:4 Ak kiwolji Jesu inendet kolenji, Kigisir kele, Masobei chi eng’ makatiat inegei." 
Luke4:5 Ak kiimut anyun oindet kotogosta, kwo koborji bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ sainato." 
Luke4:6 Ak kilenji anyun oindet inendet, Agonin kimnatoni tugul, ak telunatenywa tugul; amu kigigona; ak agochini age tugul ne amakyini." 
Luke4:7 Ngot iloswa anyun, eng’ tainnyu, kobunjinin tugul." 
Luke4:8 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Kigisir kele, Ilosu Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’, ak iboisiechi inendet inegei." 
Luke4:9 Kiimut anyun inendet Jerusalem, kwo kotonone kimonjogutab hekalut, ak kolenji, Ngo i Weritab Jehovah, iwirjige ng’ony eng’ yu:" 
Luke4:10 amu kigisir kele, Iyogu malaikaisiekyik agobo inye, si koribin:" 
Luke4:11 ak Kotaachin eng’ eunekwak, Si marus koita keldang’ung’." 
Luke4:12 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Kigimwa kele, Meyom Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’." 
Luke4:13 Ak ye kingoges oindet yomset age tugul, kobagakta inendet ne matia." 
Luke4:14 Koweek anyun Jesu Galili eng’ kimnatetab Tamirmiriet: ak kiyom logoiywek korotinwek tugul agobo inendet eng’ ole negite oloto. 
Luke4:15 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ sunagogisiekwak, ak kiilos inendet bik tugul." 
Luke4:16 Kinyo anyun Nasaret, ole kinerjin: kiwa sunagogit, eng’ betutab sabato, ko u ye kicham kowendi, ak kotonon si kobiit kosoman." 
Luke4:17 Ak kigigochi inendet bukuit ne mamanat ne bo maotiot Isaia. Ak king’any bukuit, konyor ole kigisir kele," 
Luke4:18 Mi Tamirmirietab Kiptaiyat kobota, Ami kiila si kobiit aamji kibananok logoiywek che miach: Kiiyokwa si kobiit aamji luulenik katiaget, Asi kobiit kogeerto kipkoratinik, Ak atiach che kigiguoten." 
Luke4:19 Si kobiit aamda kenyit ne chamat eng’ Kiptaiyat. 
Luke4:20 Ak kimaman bukuit, ak koweekyi kogeny kiboitiot, ak koteb ng’ony: ak kiichiilji kong’ inendet bik tugul che kimi sunagogit." 
Luke4:21 Ak kitoi kolenji bichoto, Kagosulda rani sirutioni eng’ itikwok." 
Luke4:22 Ak kibaorianji tugul inendet, ak kokwong’io eng’ ng’alek che bo mieindo che kamong’une kutinnyi: ak kile ichek, Tos ma weritab Josep nito?" 
Luke4:23 Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji, Iman omwawa kalewenoni, Isoopge inye, chepkerichot: tuguk tugul che kigegas kele kiyaak eng’ Kapernaum, iyai choto agichek eng’ yu eng’ emoning’ung’." 
Luke4:24 Ak kilenji, Amwawok iman, ale, Mami maotiondo ne chamaksei eng’ emennyi." 
Luke4:25 Ago amwawok iman ale, Kimi mosogik che chang’ Israel eng’ betusiek che bo Elija, yu kiga kiger kipsengwet kenyisiek somok ak arawek lo, yu kiga nyo rubet ne o emet tugul;" 
Luke4:26 ago ma kiyokto Elija kwo oldab age eng’ ichek, kobate kiwa Sarepta eng’ emetab Sidon agoi oldab kwondo age ne ki mosok." 
Luke4:27 Ak kimi che chang’ che kitinyei mogondosik eng’ Israel eng’ betusiekab maotiot Elisha; ak kima kisoob chi eng’ ichek kobate Naaman inegei, Suriaindet." 
Luke4:28 Ak kinyi neregek ichek tugul eng’ sunagogit ye kingogas ng’alechuto; 
Luke4:29 ak king’eetyo kotoorta inendet komanda eng’ nganaset, ak kiimut kwo tulwet barak ole kigiteech nganasenywa, kolen kotoortae chemng’esut." 
Luke4:30 Ago kisiirtoe kwenunywa kwo. 
Luke4:31 Ak kichorjigei anyun Kapernaum, nganaset ne bo Galili. Ak kiinet bik eng’ betutab sabato:" 
Luke4:32 ak kikwong’io eng’ konetisiennyi; amu kitinyei kimnatet ng’olyondennyi. 
Luke4:33 Ak kimi chi sunagogit, ne kitinyei tamirmirietab oindet ne muruon; ak kiwaach eng’ waagat ne o," 
Luke4:34 kole, Bagaktech! Kiting’ege nee ak inye, Jesu ne bo Nasaret? Kenyo inye si ibarech? Kaanain inye ale i Ne Tilil ne bo Jehovah." 
Luke4:35 Ak kiger kong’ Jesu inendet, ak kolenji, Sis, ak imong’u eng’ inendet. Ak kingo kagowirji oindet kwenunywa, komong’une inendet anyun, komata koita kiy." 
Luke4:36 Ak kikwong’io bichoto tugul, ak kong’alaljigei ichegei kole, Nee ng’olyondoni? Amu kang’at eng’ kimnatet ak kamuktaet tamirmirik che muruonen, si komong’." 
Luke4:37 Ak kiyom anyun logoiywek komoswek tugul che bo emonoto agobo inendet. 
Luke4:38 Ak kimanda eng’ sunagogit ak kwo gab Simon. Kiamei kametab osotiotab Simon eset ne korom; ak kisaisai bik Jesu agobo inendet. 
Luke4:39 Ak kotonon eng’ ye negit, ak koger kong’ eset; kibagakta anyun eset inendet: ak ngunoto kong’eet ak koboisiechi ichek." 
Luke4:40 Ak ye ki negit kororokta asista, komutyi bik tugul bikwak che kimiandos eng’ korotwek che terotin: ak kiigonoor eunekyik age tugul eng’ ichek, ak kosoob." 
Luke4:41 Komong’une anyun oik bik che chang’, kowaachei kolen, Inyendet ko i Weritab Jehovah. Koger kong’ Jesu icheget, ma chamji kotwek, amu kiingen ichek kole, inendet ko Kristo." 
Luke4:42 Ak ye kingo kagoeech, komong’ eng’ oloto kwo surkwen: ak kicheng’at tuiyosiek inendet, koba ole mi, komach icheget korany inendet kole, amat kwo kobagakta ichek." 
Luke4:43 Ago kilenji ichek, Kanyolja aamda logoiywek che miach che bo bounatetab Jehovah eng’ nganasok alak agichek: amu kigiyokwa agobo noto." 
Luke4:44 Ak kiamdaat anyun eng’ sunagogisiek che bo Galili. 
Luke5:1 Ak ye kingota kogiichi tuiyet inendet, ak kogasei ng’olyotab Jehovah, kotonon inendet eng’ ngegutab araraita ne bo Genesaret;" 
Luke5:2 ak kigeer moingonik aeng’ che bo beek kotonondos eng’ ngegutab araraita: ago kiga kochorgei ramik koba komwet regereiywekwak che kiname njirenik. 
Luke5:3 Ak kilany moinget age, ne ki bo Simon, kosom kole, konaktae kolooit kitigin eng’ ngegut. Ak kiteb ng’ony anyun ak konet tuiyosiek komi moinget." 
Luke5:4 Ak ye kingo kagoges ng’alalennyi, kolenji Simon, Ta ikweri moinget kwo ole chang’ beek, ak ochoorte regereiywekwok oramisie." 
Luke5:5 Ak kiwol Simon kole, Kiptaiyandani, kogiboisie kemout komugul, ama kinyoru kiy: ago achoortoi regereiywot amu ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Luke5:6 Ak ye kingo kagoyai ko u noto, konam njirenik ng’isiat; kot kotoi kong’etyo regereiywekwak;" 
Luke5:7 ak king’wech bik che kiboisiei tugul che kimi moinget age, kole kobwa kotoret. Kobwa anyun, ak konyiit moingonik tuwai, kot kotoi moingonik kosu." 
Luke5:8 Ago ye kingogeer Simon Petero, kobutyi kotung’oikab Jesu, ak kole, Istoenage, amu a chi ne bo tengek, ee Kiptaiyandani." 
Luke5:9 Amu kikwong’, ak tugul che kimi koboto inendet, agobo njirenik che kiga nam;" 
Luke5:10 kikwong’io agichek Jakobo ak Johana, werikab Sebedi, che kiboisiei tugul koboto Simon. Ak kilenji Jesu Simon, Ameiyweisie; koboch nguno iegu ne irame bik." 
Luke5:11 Ak ye kingo kagoget moingonikwak kobwa ngegut, kobagakta tugul, ak kosub inendet." 
Luke5:12 Ak kingota komitei nganaset age, ogeero, chito ne ki nyiitat mogondosik: ak ye kingogeer inendet Jesu, kobut kosieb mo, ak kosaisai kole, Kiptaiyandani, ngicham, imuchi itilila." 
Luke5:13 Ak kiiyogoito Jesu anyun eunnyi, ak kotwa ak kole, Kaacham; tililitu. Ak ngunoto kobagakta mogondosik inendet." 
Luke5:14 Ak king’at anyun kolenji, Amat imwachi chi: ago ui ak iborjige tisiindet, ak igoite che bo katilileng’ung’, ko u ye king’at Musa, koek baornatet eng’ icheget." 
Luke5:15 Ak kitesak mising’ koiyesta logoiywekyik: ak kiiyumgei tuiyosiek che chang’ kobwa si kogas ng’alekyik ak kisoob eng’ mianwekwak. 
Luke5:16 Ago kiitabangei inegei kwo surkwen kosa. 
Luke5:17 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ betut age eng’ betusiechoto; ak kimi Parisaik ak konetik che bo ng’atutik kotebyei eng’ oloto, che kibunu nganaset age tugul ne bo Galili ak ne bo Judea ak ne bo Jerusalem: ak kimi kamuktaetab Kiptaiyat koboto inendet kosoobe bik." 
Luke5:17 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ betut age eng’ betusiechoto; ak kimi Parisaik ak konetik che bo ng’atutik kotebyei eng’ oloto, che kibunu nganaset age tugul ne bo Galili ak ne bo Judea ak ne bo Jerusalem: ak kimi kamuktaetab Kiptaiyat koboto inendet kosoobe bik." 
Luke5:18 Ak ogeero, kilau bik chito eng’ itogut ne ki meat borto: ak kicheng’ oret ne imute kwo go, ak konde inendet tainnyi." 
Luke5:19 Ak ye kimata konyor ole imute kwo go amu chang’indab bik, kolany got barak, ak kochoortae inendet itogunnyi kobun ole kigisieb, agoi kwenut eng’ taitab Jesu." 
Luke5:20 Ak kingogeer Jesu kayanenywa, kolenji, Chichi, kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk." 
Luke5:21 Ak kitoi sirik ak Parisaik kobwat agobo ng’olyondonoto kole, Ng’o nito mwaei ng’alechu yaachen? Ng’o ne imuchi konyochi chi kaat tengekwogik kobate Jehovah inegei?" 
Luke5:22 Ago ye kingonai Jesu anyun kabwatutikwak, kowolji kolenji, Obwati nee eng’ mugulelwekwok?" 
Luke5:23 Nee ne nyamnyum, ngele, Kaginyoun kaat tengekwogiguk; anan ngele, Ng’eet ak iwendote?" 
Luke5:24 Ago si kobiit onai ole tinyei kimnatet Weritab chi eng’ ng’ony konyochi kaat bik tengekwogik (kolenji chito ne ki meat borto), Amwaun ale, Ng’eet, ib itogung’ung’ ak iwe gong’ung’." 
Luke5:25 Ak king’eet ngunoto anyun eng’ tainywa, ak kiib kit ne karue, ak kwo gonnyi, kolosunoti Jehovah." 
Luke5:26 Ak kokwong’io ichek tugul ak kolos Jehovah; ak kinyi ichek kaiyweisiet, ak kole, Kagegeer rani tuguk che kikwong’e." 
Luke5:27 Ak kingobata tuguchu kwo kogeer taagindetab aisurut, ne kiguure Lawi, kotebyei eng’ ole kitaage aisurut, ak kilenji, Isubwa." 
Luke5:28 Ak kibagakta tugul, ak kong’eet kosub inendet." 
Luke5:29 Ak kichopchi Lawi inendet igorta ne o eng’ gonnyi; ak kimi tuiyet ne o ne bo taagikab aisurut ak bik alak che kitebyei eng’ amisiet koboto inendet. 
Luke5:30 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji Parisaik ak sirikwak alamalyennyi, kole, Kalya si oamisiei ak oeeisei koboto taagikab aisurut ak kiptengeginik?" 
Luke5:31 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Mamage kiy chepkerichot bik che chamegei; kobate che miandos." 
Luke5:32 Kima anyo aguur che bo iman, ago kiptengeginik, si kosik." 
Luke5:33 Ak kilenji inendet, Irugutegei konyil che chang’ alamalyetab Johana, ak kosaei, ak yaei ko u noto agichek che bo Parisaik; ago amisiei cheguk ak koeeisei." 
Luke5:34 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Tos omuchi ogochi korugutgei che kogiguurji katunisiet, kota komi sandet koboto icheget?" 
Luke5:35 Ago bwanei betusiek che tun kiistoe ichek sandet, korugutgei anyun eng’ betusiechoto." 
Luke5:36 Ak kimwachi ichek anyun kalewenet kogeny kolenji, Mami chi ne kerei akwot ne bo ngoriet ne leel ak konapchi ngoriet ne os; amu ngo yai ko u noto ko kereri noto leel, ak kogeny, manamegei akwot ne leel ak ne os." 
Luke5:37 Ama mi chi ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che osen; ngo yai ko u noto ko kereri divaik lolotinwek, ak kotumdagei, ak kong’emogis lolotinwek." 
Luke5:38 Ago kanyol kinde divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelachen. 
Luke5:39 Ama mi chi ne ngo kagoee divaik che bo keny ko ta komach che leelach: amu mwaei kole, Miachen che bo keny." 
Luke6:1 Ak kibunei mbarenikab bek eng’ betutab sabato; ak kibagat alamalyennyi mesisekab bek, kobirir ak konyei." 
Luke6:2 Ago kimwa alage che bo Parisaik kole, Amu nee si oyai eng’ betutab sabato ne ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik?" 
Luke6:3 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Tom osoman agot ng’olyondoni, ne kiyai Daudi, ye kingoam rubet, koboto che kimitei ak inendet;" 
Luke6:4 ak kiwa gotab Jehovah ak kocher makatinik che bo kabartaet, koam ak kobutyi che kimi koboto inendet agichek; che ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik koam chi kobate tisiik ichegei?" 
Luke6:5 Ak kimwachi ichek kolenji, Weritab chi ko kiptaiyatab sabato." 
Luke6:6 Ak kiwa sunagogit eng’ sabato age, ak konetis: ak kimi chi oloto, ne ki resot eunnyi ne bo tai." 
Luke6:7 Ak kirib inendet sirik ak Parisaik kole, kogeer ngo tos isoob chi eng’ betutab sabato; si konyor oret ne itaame." 
Luke6:8 Ago kinai kabwatutikwak; ak kolenji chichoto ne kitinyei eut ne resot, Ng’eet, tonon eng’ kwen. Ak king’eet kotonon." 
Luke6:9 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Ateebenok, ale, Tos, chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik keyai ne mie eng’ sabato, anan keyai ne ya? Kesor sobon, anan kebar?" 
Luke6:10 Ak kigeerot Jesu bik tugul, yeityo kolenji chichoto, Chuul eung’ung’. Ak kiyai ko u noto: ak kimieit eunnyi ko u ye konye." 
Luke6:11 Ak kinerekso mising’: ak king’alaljigei ichegei agobo kit ne itoi Jesu. 
Luke6:12 Kiwa Jesu anyun eng’ betusiechoto, tulwet kosa; ak kisa Jehovah kemout komugul." 
Luke6:13 Ak ye kingoeech, koguur alamalyennyi: ak kilewen eng’ choto taman ak aeng’, che kiguure kainenywa che kiyoktoi;" 
Luke6:14 Simon, ne kiguure kainennyi ne bo aeng’ Petero, ak Andrea ng’etab kamet, ak Jakobo ak Johana, ak Pilipu ak Bartolomayo," 
Luke6:15 ak Matayo ak Tomas, ak Jakobo weritab Alpayo ak Simon ne kigiguure Selote," 
Luke6:16 Judas weritab Jakobo, ak Judas Iskariot, ne ki ng’wektaindet;" 
Luke6:17 ak kichortagei koboto icheget, ak kotonone ye ribrib, koboto tuiyet ne o ne bo alamalyennyi, ak bik che chang’ che kibunu Judea komugul ak Jerusalem, ak ngegutab nyanjet ole bo komostab Turo ak Sidon, che kibwanei kogasei inendet, ak kisoob eng’ mainwekwak;" 
Luke6:17 ak kichortagei koboto icheget, ak kotonone ye ribrib, koboto tuiyet ne o ne bo alamalyennyi, ak bik che chang’ che kibunu Judea komugul ak Jerusalem, ak ngegutab nyanjet ole bo komostab Turo ak Sidon, che kibwanei kogasei inendet, ak kisoob eng’ mainwekwak;" 
Luke6:18 ak kigisoob icheget che kiinyalili tamirmirik che muruonen. 
Luke6:19 Ak kicheng’ tuiyet komugul kotwa inendet: amu kibunu inendet kamuktaet, ak kosoob ichek tugul." 
Luke6:20 Ak kigeerot alamalyennyi, ak kole, O boiboen okwek che o bonon: amu neng’wong’ bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke6:21 O boiboen okwek che amok rubet nguno: amu tun obiyong’dosi. O boiboen okwek che orirtosi nguno: amu tun ororitosi. 
Luke6:22 O boiboen okwek, ye wechok bik, ak kobesienogei, ak kochurok, ak kowirta kaineng’wong’ kole ya, agobo Weritab chi." 
Luke6:23 Oboiboitu eng’ betunoto, ak otorombense eng’ boiboindo: amu, ogeero, o melektang’wong’ eng’ kipsengwet: amu kiyachi kwanisiekwak maotik ko u noto." 
Luke6:24 Ago bwa okwek che o magore! Amu kaotaach kagaigaeng’wong’. 
Luke6:25 Bwa okwek, che o biyong’otin nguno! Amu tatun koamok rubet. Bwa okwek, che ororitosi nguno! Amu tatun oteitosi ak orirtosi." 
Luke6:26 Bwa okwek, ye mwaei bik tugul che miach agobo okwek! Amu kigoyachi ko u noto kwanisiekwak maotik che bo lembech." 
Luke6:27 Ago amwawok okwek che ogase, ale, Ocham bunikwok, oyachi che miach ichek che wechok," 
Luke6:28 oberur ichek che chubok, ak osachi ichek che usok." 
Luke6:29 Ak inendet ne irabachin matanda age igochi matanda age; ak inendet ne rebenen ngorieng’ung’ ko meete agot sumeng’ung’. 
Luke6:30 Igochi chi age tugul ne somin; ak inendet ne rebenen tuguguk ko matata isom kogeny. 
Luke6:31 Ak ko u ye omache koyaiywok bik, oyachi ak okwek ko u noto." 
Luke6:32 Ngocham anyun icheget che chamok, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik kochamei agichek icheget che chamei." 
Luke6:33 Ak ngoyachi che miach icheget che yaiywok che miach, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik koyaei ko u noto." 
Luke6:34 Ak ngobesendochi bik che omang’u ole tun onyorune, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik ko besendochin kiptengeginik alak, si konyor che te chugicheta." 
Luke6:35 Ago ocham bunikwok, ak oyai ne mie, ak obesende, amongen onyoru kogeny; si koeet melektang’wong’, ak oegu werikab Inendet ne Toror Mising’: amu tala inendet eng’ icheget che matinyei kongoi ak che yaachen." 
Luke6:36 Oegu che tinyei rirenetab ge, ko u Kwandang’wong’ ne tinyei rirenetab ge." 
Luke6:37 Amoruokyi, si tun koma kiruokwok: amogikyi, si tun koma kigikyok: otiach, si tun kitiachak:"
