Luke6:38 ogoite, si tun kegonok; kerutiet ne mie, ne kigigony, ne kigisaisach, kot korara, choto che tun indoi bik tegetikwok. Amu kerutiet ne ogere ko noto ne tun kigerunenok ak okwek." 
Luke6:39 Ak kimwachi kalewenet kolenji, Imuchi kipkoratiat kondochi kipkoratiat? Tos marorokyin tuwai keringet?" 
Luke6:40 Masiirei alamalyet konetindennyi: ago inendet ne kigonetak kogergeitu ak konetindennyi. 
Luke6:41 Ak amu nee si igeere betbetiat ne mitei kondab ng’etab komet, ago mebwati bambaniat ne mi kondang’ung’ inyendet?" 
Luke6:42 Anan imuktoi ano ilenji ng’etab komet, Tupchennyu, inganemun betbetiat ne mitei kondang’ung’, ago mebwati inye bambaniat ne mi kondang’ung’ inyendet? Ee, chombilindoni, inemu korok bambaniat ne mi kondang’ung’ inyendet, si ye kaigeerte komie imuch anyun inemu betbetiat ne mi kondab ng’etab komet." 
Luke6:43 Amu mami ketit ne mie ne yiei logoek che yaach; ama mi ketit ne ya ne yiei logoek che miach. 
Luke6:44 Amu kinae ketit age tugul logoekyik. Amu mabutei bik logoekab mogoonik eng’ katok, ak mabutei bik logoekab sabibuk eng’ ketitab katok." 
Luke6:45 Inemu chito ne mie kit ne mie kobunu konoruet ne mie ne mi muguleldanyi; ak inemu chito ne ya kit ne ya kobunu konoruet ne ya ne mi muguleldanyi: amu che mwaei kutinnyi ko che nyiitat muguleldo. 
Luke6:46 Amu nee si oguurena Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, amoyae tuguk che amwae?" 
Luke6:47 Chi age tugul ne nyonjina, ak kogas ng’alekyuk, ak koyai, aboruok chito ne kergei:" 
Luke6:48 kergei inendet ak chito ne teechei got, ne kibal kororokto mising’, ak konde lumeiywot ruandet: ak ye kingo chang’a beek, korieb beekab mogoch goyoto, ama imuch kotumdum: amu kiga kiteech komie." 
Luke6:49 Ago inendet ne kasei, ama yaei, ko kergei ak chito ne kiteech got ng’ung’unyek ama lumji ng’ony lumeiywot; ak kirieb beekab mogoch, ak kilul ngunoto; ak kieet luletab goyoto." 
Luke7:1 Ak kingo kagogesyi ng’alekyik tugul itikab bik, kwo anyun Kapernaum." 
Luke7:2 Kimi kiptaiyatab bogol, ne kitinyei otwogindet ne kichamei kot, ak kimiani otwogindonoto ne ki negit kome." 
Luke7:3 Ak ye kingogas agobo Jesu, koyokto inendet boisiekab Yahudik, koba komwachi konyo kosoob otwogennyi." 
Luke7:4 Ak ye kingoit icheget ole mi Jesu, kosaisai inendet mising’, kolenji, Nyoljin inendet iyachi ko u noto:" 
Luke7:5 amu chamei bororiennyo, ak kiteekwech inendet sunagoginnyo." 
Luke7:6 Kwo anyun Jesu koboto icheget. Ak ye kima kota ko loo eng’ goyoto, koyokto kiptaiyandanato choronokyik koba ole mi inendet ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, amata iimge: amu ane, ko ma a chito ne nyolu inyo gonnyu:" 
Luke7:7 noto anyun, agot ane, ko ma aiitge ale nyolu anyonjin: ago mwa ng’olyot kityo, ak kosob otwogindennyu." 
Luke7:8 Agot ane, nganda a chi ne kiboiywa, atinye askarik che abou, ak ngalenji ni, Ui, kwo; ak ngalenji age, Nyo, konyo; ak ngalenji otwogindennyu, Yai ni, koyai." 
Luke7:9 Ak ye kingogas Jesu ng’alechuto, kokwong’ agobo inendet, ak kiwelelgei ak kolenji tuiyet ne kiisubi inendet, Amwawok ale, tom anyoru kayanet ne o ne te ni, achicha, agot eng’ Israel." 
Luke7:10 Ak kingoweek anyun che kiga kiyokto, koba ga, konyor otwogindonoto ko kagosob." 
Luke7:11 Ak ye kingo kagobata betunoto, kwo nganaset ne kiguure Nain; ak kiba alamalyennyi koboto inendet, ak tuiyet ne o." 
Luke7:12 Ak ye kiga rikta ormarichetab nganaset, ogeero, kigisutei musto, ne ki werit ne kii kamet inegei, ak ki mosok chebiosonato: ak kimi koboto inendet bik che chang’ che bo nganaset." 
Luke7:13 Ak ye kingogeer Kiptaiyat inendet, korire, ak kolenji, Amat irir." 
Luke7:14 Ak kirikta ye negit ak kotwa kit ne kigisute inendet: ak kitononso anyun che kisutei. Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Neranani, kamwaun ale, Ng’eet." 
Luke7:15 Ak king’eet anyun ne koga kome, ak kotoi kong’alal. Ak kiigochi kamet." 
Luke7:16 Ak kiiyweis tugul: ak kolos Jehovah, kole, Kagong’eet eng’ kwenunnyo maotiot ne o: ak, Kagorutochi Jehovah bikyik." 
Luke7:17 Ak kiyom ng’olyondonito agobo inendet Judea komugul, ak korotinwek tugul che kiyiem oloto." 
Luke7:17 Ak kiyom ng’olyondonito agobo inendet Judea komugul, ak korotinwek tugul che kiyiem oloto." 
Luke7:18 Ak kimwachi alamalyetab Johana inendet tuguchuto tugul. 
Luke7:19 Ak kiguurjigei Johana aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi ak koyokto koba ole mi Kiptaiyat, koteebe kole, Tos inyendet ni nyonei, anan kigeni age?" 
Luke7:20 Ak ye kiga it bik ole mi inendet, kolenji, Kagoyokwech Johana Kabatisanindet kebwa ole imi, kole, Tos inyendet ne nyonei, anan kigeni age?" 
Luke7:21 Eng’ sainato kosoob che chang’ che kitinyei mianwek ak korotwek ak tamirmirik che yaachen; ak kiigochi kipkoratinik che chang’ kogeerto. 
Luke7:22 Kowolji kolenji, Oba omwachi Johana tuguk che kaogeer ak che kaogas; kigochin kipkoratinik kogeerto, ak bendoti che koing’waldos, kitilili che tinyei mogondosik, ak kastoi che ming’otin, king’eeti che kigobek, kiamjin kibananok logoiywek che miach." 
Luke7:23 Ak baibai age tugul ne manyorunena kanagut. 
Luke7:24 Kingo kagoba che kiga koyokto Johana, kotoi komwachi tuiyosiek agobo Johana, kole, Kiomande surkwen ogeer nee? Tegat ne itumdumi usonet?" 
Luke7:25 Ago kiomande ogeer nee okwek? Chito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero, icheget che ilaachi ngoroik che bo lelesta, ak che meng’isiei eng’ talbisto, komitei gorikab laitorinik." 
Luke7:26 Ago kiomande ogeer nee? Maotiot? Ee, amwawok ale, siirei maotiot." 
Luke7:27 Nito ne kigisir agobo inendet, kele, Ogeero, ayoktoi kiboitiondennyu kondoenen, Ne chobei oreng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’." 
Luke7:28 Amwawok ale, Eng’ che kisich kobogorisiek ko mami ne o ne siirei Johana: kobate inendet ne ming’in eng’ bounatetab Jehovah ko o kosiir inendet." 
Luke7:29 Ak ye kingogas bik tugul, koboto taagikab aisurut, koiityi imanda Jehovah, amu kiga kibatisan eng’ kabatisanetab Johana." 
Luke7:30 Ago kiesio Parisaik ak ng’omotikab Ng’atutik, kiruogutikab Jehovah, ma makyigei, amu kima ibatisan inendet icheget." 
Luke7:31 Ak kile Kiptaiyat, Aroge nee bikab ibini, ak kergei ak nee?" 
Luke7:32 Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng’ oldab aldaisiet, ak koguuregei; kolen, Kigegutwak ndurerusiek, ak ma oureren; kigirirjok, ak ma oririe." 
Luke7:33 Amu kinyo Johana Kabatisanindet ama am makatia anan divaik; ak omwae anyun ole, Tinyei oindet." 
Luke7:34 Kinyo Weritab chi koamis ak koeeiso; ak omwae ole, Ogeero, kipkeiya chichi, ak eeindetab divaik, choruetab taagikab aisurut ak kiptengeginik!" 
Luke7:35 Ak naat ng’omnatet kele bo iman, eng’ lagokyik tugul." 
Luke7:36 Ak kimach age eng’ Parisaik kole koamis ak inendet. Ak kiwa gotab Parisaindonoto, ak koteb ng’ony koamis." 
Luke7:37 Ak ogeero, kobogoriot age ne kimi nganaset, ne ki kiptengekyo; ye kingonai kole, tebyei ng’ony Jesu koamisiei eng’ gotab Parisaindonoto, koib chubait ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut," 
Luke7:38 ak kitonon eng’ let ole negite kelyekyik, korirei, ak kitoi kosachi beekab kong’ kelyekyik, ak kouuse sumeekyik, ak kong’utut kelyekyik ak koiile mwaata." 
Luke7:39 Ak ye kingogeer noto Parisaindonoto ne kiguurei inendet, komwa eng’ orinnyi, kole, Nda ka maotio chichi, ta kagonai kole ng’o kobogoriondoni katwa inendet, ak chi ne u nee, kole kiptengekyot." 
Luke7:40 Ak kiwolji Jesu inendet kolenji, Simon, atinye ng’olyot ne amache amwaun. Ak kile, Konetindoni, mwa anyun." 
Luke7:41 Kole, Kimi besendoindet anum ne kitinyei besenikyik aeng’: kibesen age denarisiek bogol mut, ak kibesen age konom." 
Luke7:42 Ak ye kima kotinyei kiy ne yaakyin, konyochi kaat ichek tuwai. Ng’o anyun eng’ ichek tuwai ne chamei inendet kosiir?" 
Luke7:43 Kowol Simon kole, Alen inendet ne kiginyochi kaat che chang’. Ak kilenji, Kairuoch komie." 
Luke7:44 Ak kingoweleljigei kobogoriot, kolenji Simon, Igeere kobogoriondoni? Kaanyo gong’ung’ ama inaga beek aune kelyekyuk: ago kagosachi kelyekyuk beekyik bo kong’ kobogoriondoni, ak kouuse sumeekyik." 
Luke7:45 Ma ing’ututa; ago inendet, koboch ngab anyo, kotomo kobagakta kong’utut kelyekyuk." 
Luke7:46 Ma iile metinnyu mwaita: ago kagoiile ine kelyekyuk mwaita ne nyamdut. 
Luke7:47 Noto anyun ne kamwaun ale, kagenyochi kaat tengekwogikyik, che ka chang’; amu chamei mising’: ago inendet ne kinyochin kaat kitigin, kochamei agine kitigin." 
Luke7:48 Kolenji kobogoriondonoto, Kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk." 
Luke7:49 Ak kitoi icheget che kimitei amisiet koboto inendet, komwa eng’ orinywa, kole, Ng’o ni kot konyochi kaat bik tengekwogik?" 
Luke7:50 Ak kilenji kobogoriot, Kagosorun kayaneng’ung’; ui eng’ kalyet." 
Luke8:1 Ak kingobata noto, ne matianit, kowendote nganasok che eechen ak che mengechen koamdaati ak komwaitaati logoiywek che miach che bo bounatetab Jehovah, ak kimi tamanu ak aeng’ koboto inendet," 
Luke8:2 ak kobogorisiek alak che kiga kosoob eng’ tamirmirik che yaachen ak mianwek, Maria ne kiguure Magdalene, ne kimandae oik tisabu," 
Luke8:3 ak Joana osotiotab Kusa kiboitiotab Herod, ak Susana, ak kobogorisiek alak che chang’, che kiboisiechin inendet eng’ tugukwak." 
Luke8:4 Ak kingo yomogei tuiyet ne o, ak kobwanji inendet che kibunu nganaset age tugul, kong’alal eng’ kalewenet kole:" 
Luke8:5 Kiwa kolindet koleta keswekyik: ak ye kita koletoi, kobutyi alak oret taban; ak kigitiegat, ak koam taritik che bo barak." 
Luke8:6 Ak kiibutyi alak ruandet; ak ye kingobityo, koyaamnyo, amu manyor beek." 
Luke8:7 Ak kiibutyi alak kwenutab katok; ak kibityo katok koboto keswechoto, ak kogiich." 
Luke8:8 Ak kiibutyi alak ng’ung’unyek che miach, ak kobityo, ak koi age tugul bogol. Ak ye kita komwaei tuguchu, komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Luke8:9 Ak kiteebe alamalyennyi ole teptoi kalewenoni. 
Luke8:10 Ak kile, kagigonok okwek onai ung’otik che bo bounatetab Jehovah: ago kimwachin alak eng’ kalewenaik; si ye keertoi ko mageerei kiy, si ye kasei ko manaei." 
Luke8:11 Kalewenonoto ko ni: Keswek ko ng’olyotab Jehovah. 
Luke8:12 Ak choto mi oret taban ko icheget che kigogas; yeityo konyo oindet, ak konem ng’olyot eng’ mugulelwekwak, si manyor kayanet ak kesor." 
Luke8:13 Ak icheget che mi ruandet barak, ko ye kagas ng’alek, koyan eng’ boiboiyet, ak matinyei tigitik, iyani ne matia, ak kochuchuigei eng’ betutab yomset." 
Luke8:14 Ak che kiibutyi katok, ko icheget che kigas, ak ye kaba kogiich kererwekab met ak magornatosiek, ak boiboiyetab tugukab soboni, ama iyo logoek che nyiitotin." 
Luke8:15 Ak che mi ng’ung’unyek che miach, ko icheget, che ye kagogas ng’olyot, konam komie, eng’ mugulelwek che bo telunatet ak ko miachen, ak koiiyo logoek eng’ kagiiletab ge." 
Luke8:16 Mami chi, ne, ye kagonaam tait, kotuge kiy, anan konde kureretab itogut; ago indoi kit ne tonone tait, si kobiit kogeer lapkeiyet bik che bwanei go." 
Luke8:17 Amu mami kiy ne keunyei, ne matun ng’ang’oksei; ama mi kiy ne bo ung’ot, ne matun naaksei eng’ ole lapkei." 
Luke8:18 Oripge anyun eng’ ole ogastoi: amu age tugul ne tinyei, ko tun kigochin; ak inendet ne matinyei, ko tun kirebe agot ne len tinyei." 
Luke8:19 Ak kibwanji inendet kamet ak che tupcho, ago kima imuch korikyi amu chang’indab bik." 
Luke8:20 Ak kigimwachi kelenji, Tonondos komet ak che otupche eng’ sang’, machei kogeerin." 
Luke8:21 Ago kiwolji kolenji, Kamennyu ak che kitupche ko chu kasei ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak koyai." 
Luke8:22 Ak kilany moingetab beek eng’ betut age eng’ betusiechoto, koboto alamalyennyi; ak kilenji, Ongelandae araraita kebe bitonin: kotoi anyun koba." 
Luke8:23 Ak kingota kobendi, koru Jesu konuuch: kochorjigei anyun usonet ne o araraita; kot komachei konyi beek moinget ak kinyonji ng’oiyondit." 
Luke8:24 Ak kibwa ole mi inendet, ak kong’eet, kolenji, Konetindoni, konetindoni, kagibegu. Kong’eet anyun, ak koger kong’ usonet ak wasetab ge ne bo beek: kosis anyun araraita komung’do." 
Luke8:25 Ak kilenji ichek, Mi ano kayaneng’wong’? Kiiyweis ak kokwong’io, kolenjigei ichegei, Ng’o chichi anyun, ne ng’atei agot usonet ak beek, kot kogas it inendet?" 
Luke8:26 Kiit anyun emetab Gerasenik, ne tokyingei Galili." 
Luke8:27 Ak ye kingonyo ngegutab araraita, kotuiyo ak inendet chito age ne kibunu nganaset, ne kitinyei oik; ak kima kolaachi ngoroik koboch betusiek che chang’, ak kima komenyei go, ago kitebote kererisiek." 
Luke8:28 Ak kingogeer Jesu, kowaach ak kobutyi tainnyi, ak kimwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ating’enen nee, Jesu Weritab Jehovah ne toror Mising? Kasomin ale, amenyalila." 
Luke8:29 Amu king’at tamirmiriet ne muruon komong’ eng’ chichoto. Amu kiga nam eng’ betusiek che chang’: ak kigiribei mising’, ak kiga kirate sirimwek ak mugurek; ak king’etyei tuguk che kirate, ak kionei oindet inendet kwo surkwen." 
Luke8:30 Ak kiteebe Jesu, kolenji, Kiguurenen nee? Ak kile, Chang’indo; amu kiga chut oik che chang’ inendet." 
Luke8:31 Ak kisom kole, si mang’at koba keringet ne matinyei ole bochin." 
Luke8:32 Ak kimi oloto akwet ne o ne bo torok che kiagetos eng’ tulwet: ak kisom ichek mising’ kole, kochamji kochut torochoto. Kochamji anyun." 
Luke8:33 Ak kimong’ anyun oik eng’ chichoto, ak kochut torok: ak kiruai akwet kochortaegei chemng’esut koba araraita, ak kobek." 
Luke8:34 Ak kingogeer che kiiyagisiei tuguk che kabiit, komwaei, ak koba komwaita eng’ nganaset ak eng’ emet agobo noto." 
Luke8:35 Ak kiba kogeer kit ne kagoyaak; ak kibwa ole mi Jesu, konyor chichoto ne kamandae oik, kotebyei eng’ kelyekab Jesu, kolaagat, ak kotinyei ng’omnatennyi: ak kiiywei." 
Luke8:36 Ak kimwachi ichek che kageerei tuguk che kabiit, ole kagisoopto chito ne katinyei oik." 
Luke8:37 Ak kisom anyun bik tugul che bo ole negite emetab Gerasenik kole, kwo kobagakta ichek: amu kiga nam ichek kaiyweisiet ne o: ak kilany moingetab beek, ak koweektagei." 
Luke8:38 Ago kisom inendet chito ne kamandae oik kole, kotebi tuwai: ago kimwachi kwo, kolenji," 
Luke8:39 Iweekyigei gong’ung’, ak imwaite tuguk che eechen che kagoyaun Jehovah. Ak kiwa anyun, komwaitaat eng’ nganaset komugul tuguk che eechen che kagoyachi Jesu." 
Luke8:40 Ak ye kiweeksei Jesu, kotaach tuiyet; amu kiigeni bik tugul inendet." 
Luke8:41 Ak ogeero, kinyo chito age ne keguure Jairo; ki bounindetab sunagogit: ak kiibutyi kelyekab Jesu, ak kosom inendet kole, konyo gonnyi:" 
Luke8:42 amu kitinyei chepto ne kigii inegei, ne ki bo olo bo kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, ak ki negit kome. Ago kiigiigoti tuiyosiek inendet kowendi." 
Luke8:43 Ak kimi kobogoriot age ne kimandae korotik kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, ne kiga koboisie tugukyik tugul eng’ chepkerichinik, ama imuch kosoob inendet age tugul eng’ ichek." 
Luke8:44 Kinyo anyun kobun let eng’ inendet, ak kotwa tabandab ngoriennyi: ak ngunoto kosisyo korotik." 
Luke8:45 Ak kile Jesu, Ng’o ne katwaa? Ak kingotiiyo tugul, kolenji Petero ak che kimi koboto inendet, Konetindoni, kariichin tuiyosiek ak kagogiichin." 
Luke8:46 Ago kile Jesu, Kagotwaa chi: amu kaanai ale, kagomandaena kimnatet." 
Luke8:47 Ak ye kingogeer kobogoriot kole, ma imuch koung’ak, konyo kobotanonu, ak kobutyi ng’ony eng’ tainnyi ak komwaita eng’ taitab bik tugul kit ne kaigochi kotwa inendet, ak ole kagisoopto ngunoto." 
Luke8:48 Ak kilenji, Chebi, kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’; ui eng’ kalyet." 
Luke8:49 Ak ye kita kong’alali, konyo chi ne kibunu oldab bounindetab sunagogit, kole, Kagome cheptang’ung’ amatata iim Konetindet." 
Luke8:50 Ago kingogas Jesu, kowolji kolenji, Ameiywei: iyan kityo, si kisoob." 
Luke8:51 Ak ye kingo kagoit got, koma kochamji chi age tugul kwo go koboto inendet, kobate Petero, ak Johana, ak Jakobo, ak kwandab cheboto ak kamet." 
Luke8:52 Ak kirirtos bik tugul, ak koteeitos agobo inendet: ago kile, Morirtosi; amu ma me inendet, ago inuuchi." 
Luke8:53 Ak kirorechi inendet anyun kochot, amu kiingen kole kagome." 
Luke8:54 Ago kinam inendet eutab cheboto, ak koguur, kole, Chebi, ng’eet." 
Luke8:55 Koweek anyun tamirmiriennyi, ak kong’eet ngunoto: ak king’at kole, kigochi kiy ne amei." 
Luke8:56 Ak kikwong’io mising’ sigikyik: ak king’at inendet ichek kolenji, amomwachi chi age tugul kit ne kagoyaak." 
Luke9:1 Kiguur anyun taman ak aeng’ koyumgei, ak kogochi kimnatet ak bounatet koboi oik tugul, ak kosoob che miandos." 
Luke9:2 Ak kiiyokto koamda bounatetab Jehovah, ak kosoob che miandos." 
Luke9:3 Kolenji, Amoib kiy ne bo bandang’wong’, agot kirokto, anan lolet, anan makatiat, anan fedaisiek; amoibote sumotik aeng’." 
Luke9:4 Ak got age tugul ne omong’jini, otebe oloto agoi obe." 
Luke9:5 Ak alak tugul che mataachak, ye omande eng’ nganasanato, olelekte temburiek eng’ kelyekwok si koek baornatet agobo ichek." 
Luke9:6 Koba anyun kobunot nganasok, koamdaati logoiywek che miach, ak kosooboti eng’ oldo tugul." 
Luke9:7 Ak kigas anyun kiruogindet Herod tuguk tugul che kigoyaak: kiimgei mising’, amu kimwaei alak, kole, kagong’eet Johana eng’ che kibek;" 
Luke9:8 ak kilen alak, kogotook Elija: kolen alak, kong’eet age eng’ maotik chu ki bo keny." 
Luke9:9 Ak kile Herod, Kiatil metitab Johana: ago ng’o anyun chichi, ne agase tuguk che u choto agobo inendet? Ak kicheng’ kole kogeer inendet." 
Luke9:10 Ak ye kingoweek che kiyoktoi, komwachi inendet tuguk che kogoyai. Ak kiimut ichek koba taban ichegei agoi nganaset ne kiguure Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Ago kingonai tuiyosiek kosub: ak kitaach icheget, ak kong’alalji agobo bounatetab Jehovah, ak kiisoob ichek che kimachei kisoob." 
Luke9:12 Ak ye kimachei koimen, kobwa anyun tamanu ak aeng’ kolenji inendet, Ilenji tuiyet koba, si koit nganasok ak emet, si konyor ole ruitos, ak amitwogik: amu kimi surkwen." 
Luke9:13 Ago kilenji ichek, Ogochi okwek amitwogik. Ak kile, Magitinye kiy kobate makatinik mut ak njirenik aeng’; kobate kebe kealji amitwogik bichu tugul." 
Luke9:14 Amu ki olo bo murenik elfusiek mut. Ak kilenji alamalyennyi, Ochob kobuur ak ingobeate konom." 
Luke9:15 Ak kiyai anyun ko u noto, ak kichob tugul koteb ng’ony." 
Luke9:16 Ak kinam makatinichoto mut ak njirenichoto aeng’, ak kiinyal kipsengwet, ak koberur, ak kotonaton; ak kogochi alamalyet si kobiit kogochi kabuureito." 
Luke9:17 Ak kiamis, kot kobiyong’so: ak kigiyum katuganik che king’et eng’ kererutik, ak kiek kerebonik taman ak aeng’." 
Luke9:18 Ak ye kisaei inegei, ko kimi alamalyet koboto inendet: ak kiteebe icheget kolenji, Mwaei tuiyosiek kole a ng’o?" 
Luke9:19 Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji, Len Johana Kabatisanindet; kolen alage, Elija; kolen alak, kagong’eet maotiot age eng’ chu ki bo keny." 
Luke9:20 Ak kilenji ichek, Ago olen okwek a ng’o? Ak kiwol Petero kole, I Kristo ne bo Jehovah." 
Luke9:21 Ago kiitigon ichek, ak kong’at kolenji, Amomwachi chi ng’olyondonito;" 
Luke9:22 kole, Kanyolji Weritab chi konyalil eng’ tuguk che chang’, ak koesio boisiek inendet ak tisiik che eechen ak sirik, ak kebar, ak king’eet eng’ betutab somok." 
Luke9:23 Kimwachi tugul kolenji, Ngo machei chi age tugul kosubwa, ko ingoesiogei, ak koib kimurtoiyondennyi betut age tugul, ak kosubwa." 
Luke9:24 Amu age tugul ne machei kosor sobondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti sobondanyi agobo ane, ko noto ne soru." 
Luke9:25 Amu keljin nee chi, ngonyor ng’ony komugul ak kobeetgei anan kerebe sobondanyi?" 
Luke9:26 Amu age tugul ne ililanjina ak ng’alekyuk ko tun ililanjin agine Weritab chi chichoto, ye tun nyonei eng’ torornatennyi, ak ne bo Kwanda, ak ne bo malaikaisiek che tililen." 
Luke9:27 Ago amwawok iman ale, Mitei alak eng’ che tonondos eng’ yuto che magoi chamjam meet matiny, kot kogeer bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke9:28 Ak kingogesgei olo bo betusiek sisiit, koboch ngomwa ng’alechato, komut Petero ak Johana ak Jakobo, kotogosta tulwet koba kosa." 
Luke9:29 Ak ye kita kosaei, kowalak itondab togennyi, ak koleelagitu ngoroikyik kot kolil bich." 
Luke9:30 Ak ogeero, king’alalyo ak inendet bik aeng’u; ki Musa ak Elija;" 
Luke9:31 che kigotook eng’ lilindo, ak kiga ng’alal agobo meenyi ne kimachei kosulda eng’ Jerusalem." 
Luke9:32 Ak kiga birto met Petero koboto icheget che kimi ak inendet: ago ye kingogos, kogeer lilindanyi, ak bichoto aeng’ che kitonondos koboto inendet." 
Luke9:33 Ak ye kimachei kobesio ak inendet, kolenji Petero Jesu, Konetindoni, mie amu kimi yuto: si keteech keriosiek somok; neng’ung’ age, ko bo Musa age, ko bo Elija age: kimwaei ama nai kit ne mwaei." 
Luke9:34 Ak ye kita komwaei tuguchuto, konyo boldet, ak kotuch icheget: ak kiiyweis ye kingochut boldet." 
Luke9:35 Ak kimong’ kutit eng’ boldet, ak kole, Ni Werinnyu, ne kialewen: ogas inendet." 
Luke9:36 Ak ye kingobata kutinato, kotook Jesu inegei. Ak kosisyo anyun, ama mwachi chi eng’ betusiechoto kit age tugul ne kiga kogeer." 
Luke9:37 Ak betut ne kiisubi betunoto, ye kingochorugei eng’ tulwet, kotuiyo ak inendet tuiyet ne o." 
Luke9:38 Ak ogeero, kibol chito age eng’ tuiyet, kole, Konetindoni, asain ale, rire werinnyu; amu kigii inegei:" 
Luke9:39 ak keero, namei inendet tamirmiriet, ak ngunoto kowaach; ak kobirabirto kot kobun bugat kutinnyi, konyalili mising’ ama chamei komanda." 
Luke9:40 Ak koarirji alamalyeng’ung’ ale koon; ago ma imuch. 
Luke9:41 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Ee ibini matinyei kayanet ak komaasat, atebye kobotok, ak amuitoi agobo okwek kot kotianit? Imutu wering’ung’ konyo yu." 
Luke9:42 Ak kingota konyonei, kowirji ng’ony oindet inendet, ak kobirabirto mising’. Ago kiger kong’ Jesu tamirmiriet ne muruon, ak kosoob lakwet, ak koweekyi kwanda." 
Luke9:43 Ak kikwong’io tugul agobo oindab Jehovah. Ago kingota kokwong’dos tugul agobo tuguk che kayai Jesu, kolenji alamalyennyi," 
Luke9:44 Ongochut ng’alechu itikwok: amu tun kigoitoi Weritab chi kwo eunekab bik. 
Luke9:45 Ago ma iguiyo ichek mwaonato; kiung’ak eng’ icheget, si manai: ak kiiywei koteebe inendet agobo mwaonato." 
Luke9:46 Kotoi anyun koteebegei kole, Ng’o ne egu ne o eng’ achek?" 
Luke9:47 Ak kingonai Jesu kabwatutikab mugulelwekwak, konam lakwet ne ming’in, ak konde ye negit inendet," 
Luke9:48 ak kilenji ichek, Chi age tugul ne taachei lakwani ming’in eng’ kainennyu ko kataacha: ak chi age tugul ne taacha ko kataach inendet ne kiiyokwa: amu inendet ne ming’in eng’ okwek tugul, ko noto ne o." 
Luke9:49 Ak kiwolji Johana kolenji, Konetindoni, kogigeer chi koonei oik eng’ kaineng’ung’; ak kogiete, amu magibendoti tugul." 
Luke9:50 Ago kilenji Jesu inendet, Amoete inendet: amu inendet ne magirindook ko neng’wong’." 
Luke9:51 Ak ye ki negit mising’ koit betusiek che kitaage inendet eng’ barak, kogiiljigei kotokyi togennyi Jerusalem;" 
Luke9:52 koyokto che ibei ng’alek koba kondoe inendet: koba anyun, komong’ji nganaset age ne bo Samarik, ak kochopchi oldo." 
Luke9:53 Ak ma taach inendet, amu kiga kotokyi togennyi Jerusalem." 
Luke9:54 Ak ye kingogeer noto alamalyennyi Jakobo ak Johana, kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, tos imache keng’at mat kochorgei eng’ kipsengwet, si kowong’ icheget [ko u ye kiyai Elija]?" 
Luke9:55 Ago kiweleljigei ichek, ak koger kong’." 
Luke9:56 Koba anyun nganaset age. 
Luke9:57 Ak kingota kobendi eng’ oret, kolenji chito age, Asubun eng’ oldo tugul ole iwendi." 
Luke9:58 Kolenji Jesu inendet, Tineyi lelwek keringonik, ak kotinyei taritik che bo barak kesonok; ago matinyei Weritab chi ole indoi metinnyi." 
Luke9:59 Ak kilenji age, Isubwa. Ago kilenji chichoto, Kiptaiyandani, chamwa awa korok atub baba." 
Luke9:60 Ago kilenji, Bagakte che begu kotub chechuak che begu; ago ui inye ak iamdaate ng’alekab bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke9:61 Kole age agine, Tun asubun, Kiptaiyat; ago chamwa korok awa agochi bikab gonnyu saisere." 
Luke9:62 Ago kilenji Jesu inendet, Mami chi ne namei mogombetab tuga, ak kogusgong’ kogeer let, ne nyoljin bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke10:1 Kingobata tuguchu kolewen Kiptaiyat bik alak tamanwogik tisab agichek, ak koyokto kobee aeng’ kole, kondoe inendet koba nganaset age tugul ak komosta age tugul ole tun bunoti." 
Luke10:2 Ago kilenji ichek, O kesisiet ago ng’ering’ kesik: noto anyun osom Kiptaiyat ne bo kesisiet, si kobiit koyokyi kesik kesisiennyi." 
Luke10:3 Oba: ogeero kaayoktok ko u arekab kechirek eng’ kwenutab suik. 
Luke10:4 Amoib lolet, anan suberet, anan kweonik: amogat chi eng’ oret." 
Luke10:5 Ak got age tugul ne omong’jini, omwa ole, Ingoteb kalyet eng’ goi." 
Luke10:6 Ak ngo mitei weritab kalyet yoto, kotebe kalyeng’wong’ inendet: ak ngo mami, koweekyinogei okwek." 
Luke10:7 Ak otebe goyoto anyun, ak tuguk che konok, oam ak oee: amu nyoljin kiboitiot melektanyi. Amoitote gorik." 
Luke10:8 Ak nganaset age tugul ne omong’jini, ak kotaachak, oam tuguk che kindoi taing’wong;" 
Luke10:9 ak osoob che miandos eng’ oloto, ak olenji ichek, Kagorikyok bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke10:10 Ago nganaset age tugul ne omong’jini, ama taachak, omande obe ortinwekyik ak omwa ole," 
Luke10:11 kagibukyok temburiek che bo nganaseng’wong’, che kanam kelyekyok; ago onai ni, ole, kagorik bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke10:12 Ago amwawok ale, Tun kaigaitu Sodom eng’ betunoto, kosiir nganasanato." 
Luke10:13 Bwa we, Korasin! Bwa we, Betsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng’ Turo ak Sidon boisionik che bo kamuktaet ko u che kogiyai eng’ okwek, ta kiga kosik keny, ak kotebe orek kolaachi kuniok." 
Luke10:14 Ago tun kaigaitu Turo ak Sidon eng’ kiruoget, kosiirok." 
Luke10:15 Ak inye Kapernaum, tos tun kitororin iwe kipsengwet? Kiwirjinin ng’ony kot iit oldab che kigobek." 
Luke10:16 Inendet ne kasok kogasa agane; ak inendet ne esiok koesioa agane; ak inendet ne esioa koesioi inendet ne kiiyokwa. 
Luke10:17 Kiweek anyun bichoto tamanwogik tisabu eng’ boiboindo, ak komwa kole, Kiptaiyandani, agot oik kogasech it eng’ kaineng’ung’." 
Luke10:18 Ak kilenji, Kiageer Setani kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet ko u kalyelet." 
Luke10:19 Ogeero, kaagonok kamuget si kobiit otiech erenok ak melmelwek, ak oterter kimnatet tugul ne bo bunyot: ak mami kiy ne imuchi kong’emak." 
Luke10:20 Ago amoboiboitu amu ng’olyondoni, amu kasok it oik; ago oboiboitu amu sirotin kainaikwok eng’ kipsengwet." 
Luke10:21 Eng’ sainato kobaibait Jesus eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, ak kole, Aweegun kongoi, ee Baba, Kiptaiyat ne bo kipsengwet ak ng’ony, amu kiiung’e tuguchu che ng’omen ak che ingen, ak kiing’ang’ji manyurunik: ee, Baba; amu kichamak ko u noto eng’ taing’ung’." 
Luke10:22 Kigogona tuguk tugul Baba: ak mami chi ne ingen Werit kole ng’o, kobate Kwanda; ama nai chi Kwanda kole ng’o, kobate Werit, ak chi age tugul ne chamei Werit, kong’ang’jin." 
Luke10:23 Ak kiweleljigei alamalyet, ak kolenji eng’ ung’ot, Iberurotin konyek che keerei tuguk che ogeere:" 
Luke10:24 amu amwawok ale, kimachei maotik che chang’ ak laitorinik kogeer tuguk che ogeere, ago kima keer; ak kimachei kogas tuguk che ogase, ago kima kas." 
Luke10:25 Ogeero, kitonon ng’omotiot age ne bo ng’atutik koyom inendet, kole, Konetindoni, ayai nee si tun anyoru sobondab koigeny?" 
Luke10:26 Ak kilenji, Kigisir nee eng’ Ng’atutik? Isomandoi ano?" 
Luke10:27 Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji, Cham Kiptaiyat Jehovah neng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ kimnateng’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ komugul; ak icham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ye ichamdoige." 
Luke10:28 Ak kilenji, Kewolu komie: yai ko u noto, si isob." 
Luke10:29 Ago ye kimachei komieitgei, kolenji Jesu, Ng’o chitab kokwennyu?" 
Luke10:30 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Kichortaegei chito age Jerusalem kwo Jeriko; ak kotuiyo ak rebik, che kirebe ngoroik ak kobir, ak koba, kobagakta ko negit kome." 
Luke10:31 Ak kichortaegei tisiindet age oranato: ak kingogeer inendet korob taban. 
Luke10:32 Ak ye kingoit Lawindet yoto, ak kogeer, korob taban agine ko u noto." 
Luke10:33 Ago ye kita kowendi Samarindet age eng’ bandanyi, koit ye mi chichoto: ak ye kingogeer inendet, korire," 
Luke10:34 kwo ole mi inendet, koratyi ole kagibir, ak kosachinot mwaita ak divaik; ak kiganapchi chichoto sigiriennyi, ak komut kwo gotab toek, ak korib inendet." 
Luke10:35 Ak mutai konem denarisiek aeng’, kogochi chitab kobo got, ak kolenji, Rib inendet; ak tuguk alak tugul che inyae che siirei chu, kotun kaweege, anyo ayaagun." 
Luke10:36 Eng’ chuto somok, ilen ng’o ne kiek chitab kokwennyi eng’ chichoto kituiye rebik?" 
Luke10:37 Ak kile, Inendet ne kiriregei chichoto. Ak kilenji Jesu, Ui, iyai ko u noto." 
Luke10:38 Ak ye kita komi bandanywa, komong’ji anyun nganaset age: ak kitaach eng’ gonnyi kobogoriot age ne keguure Marta." 
Luke10:39 Ak kitinyei chepkamet ne kiguure Maria, ne kitebyei eng’ ole bo kelyekab Kiptaiyat, kogasei ng’olyondennyi." 
Luke10:40 Ago kiimgei Marta eng’ boisionik che chang’; ak konyonji inendet ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, meiti kiy ak kabagakta tupchennyu abois anege? Mwachi anyun kotoreta." 
Luke10:41 Ago kiwolji Kiptaiyat kolenji, Marta, Marta, igereri met ak iimige agobo tuguk che chang’:" 
Luke10:42 ago kit agenge ne kemachei: amu kagolewen Maria kebeberta ne mie, ne magirebe." 
Luke11:1 Ak ye kita kosaei eng’ oldo age, ak kingoges, kolenji age eng’ alamalyennyi, Kiptaiyandani, inetech kesa, ko u ye kiineti Johana alamalyennyi." 
Luke11:2 Ak kilenji ichek, Ye osae, omwa ole, Kwandanyo, ingotililit kaineng’ung’. Ingonyo bounateng’ung’. [Ingoyaak mageng’ung’ ko u eng’ kipsengwet, ko u noto eng’ ng’ony.]" 
Luke11:3 Konech amitwogikyok eng’ betut age tugul. 
Luke11:4 Ak inyoiywech kaat tengekwogikyok; amu achek kenyochini kaat besenikyok. Amemutech ole mi yomset. 
Luke11:5 Ak kilenji, Ng’o eng’ okwek ne tinyei choruet, ak kwo ole mi kemoi kwen, ak kolenji, Choruani, kona makatinik somok abesen;" 
Luke11:6 amu kagoit choruennyu ne bunu rutoi, amatinye kiy ne agochini;" 
Luke11:7 kowolji ne mi go, kolenji, Amat iima: kaager kurget, ak kageruiye ak lagokyuk; ma amuchi ang’eet agonin?" 
Luke11:8 Amwawok ale, agot ngo mang’eet kogochi, amu choruennyi, ko amu somsennyi ko noto ne igochin kong’eet kogochi kiy tugul ne machei." 
Luke11:9 Ak amwawok agane ale, Osom, si kegonok; ocheng’, si onyoru; ogongony, si keyatwok." 
Luke11:10 Amu age tugul ne somei, kigochin; ak nyoru ne cheng’ei; ak inendet ne igongonyi keyatyin." 
Luke11:11 Ak ng’o eng’ okwek kwanda ne ngo som werit makatiat, ko tos igochi koita? Anan ngo som njiriot, ko tos igochi erenet kogeere njiriot?" 
Luke11:12 Anan ngo som koitab ingok, ko tos igochi melmeldo?" 
Luke11:13 Ngongen okwek che o yaach ogochi lagokwok tuguk che miach, siirei anyun ne tia kagoitoet ne igochin Kwandang’wong’ ne mi kipsengwet Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ichek che somei inendet!" 
Luke11:14 Ak kion inendet oindet ne namat kut. Ak ye kingo kagomanda oindet, kong’alal anyun ne ki namat kut; ak kikwong’io tuiyosiek." 
Luke11:15 Ago kile alak, Onei oik eng’ Beelsebul, laitoriat ne bo oik." 
Luke11:16 Ak kitiem alak inendet komage kaborunet ne bunu kipsengwet. 
Luke11:17 Ago kinai inendet kabwatutikwak, kolenji, Bororiet age tugul ne pchegei ko ng’emaksei; ak got age tugul ne pchegei kolulei." 
Luke11:18 Ak ngo pchegei agine Setani, kotonondoi ano bororiennyi? Amu omwae ole, aone oik eng’ Beelsebul." 
Luke11:19 Ngot aone oik eng’ Beelsebul, koonei werikwok eng’ ng’o? Noto anyun ne igochin icheget koek kiruogikwok." 
Luke11:20 Ago ngot aone oik eng’ mornetab Jehovah, ko kanyonjok anyun bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke11:21 Ak chi ne tinyei kimnatet ak kotinyei karikyik che ribe gonnyi, kotebyei tugukyik eng’ kalyet:" 
Luke11:22 ak ye nyonji chito ne kim kosiir inendet, ak koterter, korebe anyun inendet karikyik tugul che cham komang’u, ak kopcheita bareiywekyik." 
Luke11:23 Inendet ne magimi tuwai kogirindaa; ak inendet ne magiyumi tuwai koiyestooti. 
Luke11:24 Ye kagomanda tamirmiriet ne muruon eng’ chito, kosiir ole mami beek, kocheng’oti ole imuung’e; ak ye mata konyor, komwa anyun kole, Kaweektege gonnyu ole kiabunu." 
Luke11:25 Ak ye it, konyor kobugot ak ko chobot." 
Luke11:26 Kwo anyun, komut tamirmirik tisab alak che yaachen kosiir inendet; kochut anyun orit ak komeny oloto: ak yaitu kagesunetab chichoto kosiir ne bo tai." 
Luke11:27 Ak ye kita komwaei ng’alechu, komwa kobogoriot age eng’ tuiyet, kole, Iberurot moet ne kisichin, ak kinaik che kiirerie." 
Luke11:28 Ago kile inendet, Iberurotin kosiir che kasei ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak korib." 
Luke11:29 Ak ye kingoyumjingei inendet tuiyosiek, kotoi komwa kole, Ibini, ko ibinda ne ya: cheng’ei kaborunet; ago magigochin kaborunet kobate kaborunetab Jona." 
Luke11:30 Amu ko u ye kiek kaborunet Jona eng’ bikab Ninebe, ko u noto Weritab chi eng’ ibini." 
Luke11:31 Tun ng’eetei laitoriat kobogoriot ne bo murot ne bo tai eng’ kiruoget koboto bikab ibini, ak koruokyi ichek: amu kibun tabanwekab emet konyo kogas ng’omnatetab Solomon; ak ogeero, mitei yu ne o kosiir Solomon." 
Luke11:32 Tun tonondos bikab Ninebe ak ibini eng’ kiruoget, ak koruokyi: amu kisik ichek eng’ amdaetab Jona; ak ogeero, mi yu ne o kosiir Jona." 
Luke11:33 Mami chi ne ngo kagonaam tait, konde ole ung’at, anan kitonget orit, ago indoi kit ne tonone, si kobiit kogeer lapkeiyet che bendi go." 
Luke11:34 Taitab bortang’ung’ kondang’ung’: ngo mie kondang’ung’, ko nyiitat bortang’ung’ komugul lapkeiyet; ago ngo ya kondang’ung’ ko nyiitat bortang’ung’ agine mesundeito." 
Luke11:35 Keer anyun ngo lapkeiyet ne mi oring’ung’ ko mesundeito. 
Luke11:36 Ngo nyiitat bortang’ung’ komugul lapkeiyet, ama tinyei ye imen, kolapkeitu anyun bortang’ung’ tugul, ko u ye konin lapkeiyet tait ne ikweng’sei komie." 
Luke11:37 Ak ye kita kong’alali, koguur Parisaindet age kwo koamis tuwai: ak kiwa go ak koteb ng’ony koamis." 
Luke11:38 Ak ye kingogeer Parisaindet, kokwong’, amu kiamis ama iun eut korok." 
Luke11:39 Kolenji Kiptaiyat, Okwek Parisaik, ouni barak kikombet ak sanit; ago nyiitat oring’wong’ rebisiet ak yaitiet." 
Luke11:40 Okwek che o berber, inendet ne kiyaei sang’ ko ma ne kiyaei orit agine?" 
Luke11:41 Ogoite kagochinoik che bo tuguk che mi orit; ak ogeero, tililitu tuguk tugul eng’ okwek." 
Luke11:42 Ago bwa okwek Parisaik! Amu ogoitoi kebebertab taman ne bo heduosmon ak ketik che mengech che ng’uu, ak che bo sogek alak tugul, ak ometoi kiruoget ak chamnyetab Jehovah: ago kita nyolu oyai chuto, amomete chun alak." 
Luke11:43 Bwa okwek Parisaik! Amu ochame ng’echerok che tororen eng’ sunagogisiek, ak kagatosiek che kigatok eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet." 
Luke11:44 Bwa okwek! Amu o kerge ak kererisiek che matoogu, ama naei bik che bunoti barak." 
Luke11:45 Ak kiwolji ng’omotiot age ne bo ng’atutik, kolenji, Konetindoni, ngot imwa ko u noto ko ketewerech agachek." 
Luke11:46 Ak kole, Bwa okwek ng’omotikab Ng’atutik! Amu oganapchini bik lautik che bichien eng’ laiset, ago okwek ko motwae lautichoto agot eng’ mornet agenge." 
Luke11:47 Bwa okwek! Amu oteeche kererisiekab maotik, ago kibarei kwanisiekwok." 
Luke11:48 Kioegu anyun baorinik ak ochamnyechini boisionikab kwanisiekwok: amu icheget che kibarei ak oteeche okwek kererisiekwak. 
Luke11:49 Kile anyun ng’omnatetab Jehovah amu noto, Tun ayokyini maotik ak che kiyoktoi; ak kobar alak eng’ ichek ak kousaus alak;" 
Luke11:50 si kobiit komage ibini, korotikab maotik tugul, che kigitumda koboch ko kagilumda ng’ony;" 
Luke11:51 koboch korotikab Abil agoi korotikab Sakaria, ne kime eng’ kwenutab kaptisisiet ak gotab Jehovah: ee, amwawok ale, tun kimage ibini." 
Luke11:52 Bwa okwek ng’omotikab ng’atutik! Amu kioib yateiywot ne bo ng’omnatet ama obe orit okweget, ak kioger che kita mong’jin." 
Luke11:53 Ak ye kingomong’ eng’ oloto, kotoi sirik ak Parisaik koriich inendet mising’, ak kogilgilye, si kobiit komwa ng’alek che chang’;" 
Luke11:54 korib kole tamangab konyor ng’olyo ne mong’une kutinnyi. 
Luke12:1 Eng’ saisiechoto, ye kingoyumgei bik ng’isiat che bo tuiyet, kot kotiech ge ichegei, kosib kotoi kolenji alamalyennyi, Oribege mermerekab Parisaik, noto chombilisiet." 
Luke12:2 Ago mami kiy ne tugot, ne matun king’anyei, anan ne ung’at, ne matun naaksei." 
Luke12:3 Amu kiy age tugul ne omwae eng’ mesundeito kotun kegasei eng’ ole lapkei; ak che kiochaamji itit eng’ got orit kotun kemwaitoi eng’ got barak. 
Luke12:4 Ak amwawok choronokyuk ale, Amoiywei che barei borto, yeityo ko mata komuch koyai kiy age." 
Luke12:5 Ago ateeiywok si onai inendet ne kanyol oiywei: Oiywei inendet, ne ngo kagobar komuchi kowirji Gehenna; ee, amwawok ale, Oiywei inendet." 
Luke12:6 Tos magialdae taritik mut che mengechen kebebertab mut ne bo denarit? Ama utie Jehovah agot agenge. 
Luke12:7 Ago iitotin sumeek tugul che bo metowekwok. Amoiywei anyun: osiire okwek taritik che chang’ che mengechen. 
Luke12:8 Ak amwawok ale, Age tugul ne ibortaa eng’ taitab bik, kotun ibortoi agine Weritab chi chichoto eng’ taitab malaikaisiek che bo Jehovah." 
Luke12:9 Ago inendet ne esioa eng’ taitab bik kotun keesioi agine eng’ taitab malaikaisiek che bo Jehovah. 
Luke12:10 Ak age tugul ne mwaei ng’olyo ne ya agobo Weritab chi, kenyochin kaat: ago inendet ne chubei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ko maginyochin kaat inendet." 
Luke12:11 Ak ye kimutak oldab sunagogisiek, ak taitab kiruogik, ak bounik, ko mat ogerer met agobo kit ne owolu anan omwae:" 
Luke12:12 amu inetok Tamirmiriet ne Tilil eng’ sainato kit ne nyolu omwa. 
Luke12:13 Kilenji anyun chito age eng’ tuiyet, Konetindoni, mwachi werit ne kitupche kopcheiywa tugukyok." 
Luke12:14 Ago kilenji inendet, Chichi, ng’o ne kindea aek kiruogindet anan pcheindet eng’ okwek?" 
Luke12:15 Ak kilenji ichek, Ogeer, ak oripge eng’ kasetab miat tugul: amu matebyei sobondab chi eng’ chang’indab tuguk che tinyei." 
Luke12:16 Ak kimwachi kalewenet kolenji, Kimi magoriot age ne kiga rur mbarennyi mising’:" 
Luke12:17 ak kiibwat eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Ayae nee, amu matinye ole agonore bekyuk?" 
Luke12:18 Ak kile, Ayae ko u ni: abute chogenikyuk, si ateech che eechen kosiir chu: si agonore bekyuk ak tugukyuk tugul che miach." 
Luke12:19 Si alenji sobondanyu, Sobondanyu, itinye tuguk che chang’ che miachen che konorotin che yamei kenyisiek che chang’; imuuny, amisie, eeise, ak ibaibaitu." 
Luke12:20 Ago kilenji Jehovah, I berber inye, kimachei sobondang’ung’ kemouni bo ra; ara, si kobunji ng’o anyun, tuguchoto koichob?" 
Luke12:21 U noto anyun chito ne konorjingei magornatet inegei, ne ma magorio eng’ Jehovah." 
Luke12:22 Kilenji anyun alamalyennyi, Noto anyun amwawok ale, Amogerer met agobo sobeng’wong’, eng’ tuguk che oame; anan agobo borwekwok, eng’ tuguk che olaachi." 
Luke12:23 Amu siirei sobet amitwogik, ak siirei borto ngoroik." 
Luke12:24 Obwat chepkuginik, amu magolei, ama kesei; ama tinyei ole konore anan choget; ago Jehovah ne baei: osiire taritik konyil ata!" 
Luke12:25 Ak ng’o eng’ okwek ne imuchi kogerer met si kotes koindanyi eng’ kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut? 
Luke12:26 Ngo momuchi anyun oyai agot kiy kitigin, ko amu nee anyun si ogerer met agobo tuguk alak?" 
Luke12:27 Obwat taptok, ole bititoi: maboisiei, anan koletis; ago amwawok ale, Agot Solomon, eng’ talbistanyi tugul, ko kima kolumegei ko u age eng’ chuto." 
Luke12:28 Ago ngolaaksechin Jehovah ko u noto suswek che bo kewet che mi ra, ak mutai kewirji ma, kotos siirei ne tia anyun kolaaksewok okwek, che otinye kayanet ne ming’in!" 
Luke12:29 Amocheng’ che oame, anan che oee, amosage." 
Luke12:30 Amu cheng’ei tuguchuto tugul bororiosiekab ng’ony: ago ingen Kwandang’wong’ kole omakyinige tuguchuto. 
Luke12:31 Ago ocheng’ okwek bounatetab Jehovah, si keteswok tuguchuto tugul." 
Luke12:32 Amoiywei, okwek akwet ne ming’in; amu baibai Kwandang’wong’ kogonok bounatet." 
Luke12:33 Oalde che otinye, si ogoite kagochinoik; onapchige suberok che maosegitu, konoruet eng’ kipsengwetisiek ne mabegu, ole marikyin chorik, ama ng’emei kiptorotinik." 
Luke12:34 Amu ole mi konorueng’ung’, ko oloto ole mi muguleldang’ung’ agine." 
Luke12:35 Ongogermenogis suenutikwok, ak ongolalyo taisiekwok;" 
Luke12:36 ak ogergeitu ak bik che igeni kiptaiyandenywa, kobunu igortab katunisiet: si ye nyo ak kogongony, koyatyi ngunoto." 
Luke12:37 Boiboen otwogichoto, che nyoru kiptaiyandanato koripsei ye nyo: amwawok iman ale, kermenigei inendet, ak chobei bichoto koteb ng’ony eng’ ole amisie, ak kwo kobai ichek." 
Luke12:38 Ak ngo nyo eng’ ripset ne bo aeng’, anan ne bo somok, ak konyorta ko u noto, ko boiboen anyun otwogichoto." 
Luke12:39 Ago onai ni ole, nda kiingen kiptaiyatab got sait ne nyonei chorindet, ta kiripsei, ta kima kobagaktoi gonnyi kobut chorindet." 
Luke12:40 Ochopge ak okwek: amu nyonei Weritab chi eng’ sait ne mobwati. 
Luke12:41 Kilenji anyun Petero, Kiptaiyandani, imwawech achek kalewenoni, anan imwachini bik tugul?" 
Luke12:42 Kole anyun Kiptaiyat, Ng’o anyun ribindet ne kiyani ak ko ng’om, ne indoi kiptaiyandennyi kotononji gonnyi, ak kogochi amitwogikwak che yamei eng’ betut ne makyin?" 
Luke12:43 Baibai otwogindonoto, ne nyoru kiptaiyandennyi koyaei ko u noto." 
Luke12:44 Amwawok iman ale, indoi chichoto kotononji tugukyik tugul." 
Luke12:45 Ago ngo mwa otwogindonoto eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Igaegei kiptaiyandennyu masib koitu; ak kotoi kobir otwogik che murenik ak che tibik, ak koamis ak koeeiso, ak kobogit;" 
Luke12:46 weeksei anyun kiptaiyat ne bo otwogindonoto eng’ betut ne kama kogeni, ak eng’ sait ne manaei, ak kobir mising’, ak kopchechi kebebertanyi koboto che matinyei kayanet." 
Luke12:47 Ak otwogindonoto, ne kiingen magetab kiptaiyandennyi, ama kochopgei, anan koyai ko u magennyi, kebire birutik che chang’;" 
Luke12:48 ago inendet ne kima kongen, ak koyai tuguk che nyoljin biret, kebirei birutik che ng’ering’en. Ak age tugul ne kigigochi che chang’, kotun kimage che chang’: ak inendet ne kigigochi korib tuguk che chang’, kotun kimage inendet che siirei." 
Luke12:49 Kianyo awirji mat ng’ony; nee anyun ne ta amache, ngo kagolal nguno!" 
Luke12:50 Ago atinye kabatisanet ne tatun kibatisanena; kamarigitya ne tia agoi kosulda! 
Luke12:51 Tos olen kianyo agonu kalyet konyo ng’ony? Amwawok ale, Achicha; ago besiet:" 
Luke12:52 amu koboch nguno kopchegei bik mutu che mi got agenge, surie somogu aeng’, ak kosurie aeng’ somok." 
Luke12:53 Pchegei, kwanda ak werit, ak werit ak kwanda; kamet ak cheptanyi, ak chepto ak kamet; kametab werit ak osotiondennyi, ak osotiotab werit, ak kametab werit." 
Luke12:54 Kimwachi anyun tuiyet kolenji, Ye ogeer kotogosune boldet cherongo, ole, Machei korobon; ak koyaak ko u noto anyun." 
Luke12:55 Ak ye ogeer usonet ne usune murot ne bo tai, ole, Machei koit kemeut ne ng’wan; ak koyaak ko u noto." 
Luke12:56 Chombilichu, ongen obesie ole teptoi ng’ony ak kipsengwet; kalya anyun si monai ole teptoi betusiechu?" 
Luke12:57 Kalya si moruoch okwege agobo tuguk che bo imanda? 
Luke12:58 Amu ye ta obendi ak bunyondeng’ung’ taitab kiruogindet, igiilge obendi eng’ oret si kounden; si mata komutin taitab kiruogindet, ak komutyin kiruogindet askarindet, ak kotoorjin askarindet korgoret." 
Luke12:59 Amwaun ale, Magoi imong’une oloto, agoi iyaakte sendeiyot ne bo let." 
Luke13:1 Kimi bik alage eng’ betusiechoto che kimwachi inendet agobo Galilik, che kiburuch Pilato korotikwak ak tiseiywekwak." 
Luke13:2 Ak kowolji kolenji, Tos olen ki kiptengeginik bichoto bo Galili kosiir Galilik tugul, amu kinyor nyalilwogichu?" 
Luke13:3 Amwawok ale, Achicha: ago, ngot ko mosigu okwek, olustosi okwek tugul ko u noto." 
Luke13:4 Anan choto taman ak sisiit, che kisieb got ne koi ne bo Siloam, ak kobar, tos olen ki kiptengeginik kosiir bik tugul che kimenyei Jerusalem?" 
Luke13:5 Amwawok ale, Achicha: ago, ngot ko mosigu ak okwek, olustosi tugul ko u noto." 
Luke13:6 Ak kimwa kalewenoni, kolenji, Kimi chito age ne kitinyei mogoiywet ne kiga minji mbarennyi ne bo sabibuk; ak kinyo kocheng’ logoekab ketoto, amanyorji kiy." 
Luke13:7 Kolenji ribindetab mbaretab sabibuk, Keero, kenyini ko ne bo somok anyone acheng’e logoek eng’ mogoiywoni amanyorune kiy: eb kolul; amu nee si koamei ng’ung’unyek buch?" 
Luke13:8 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, ingotebi kenyini agine, si kota asemberji ak ande ng’atatek:" 
Luke13:9 ak ngo ii logoek kong’eete nguno, ko mie; ak ngo maii, ieb anyun kolul." 
Luke13:10 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ sunagogit age eng’ betutab sabato. 
Luke13:11 Ak ogeero, kobogoriot age ne kitinyei tamirmiriet ne bo nyalulet kenyisiek taman ak sisiit; ak kigarigak, ak kima kota komuchi kochuulgei agot kitigin." 
Luke13:12 Ak kingogeer Jesu inendet, koguur ak kolenji, Kobogoriondoni, kagitiachin eng’ nyaluleng’ung’." 
Luke13:13 Ak kiigonoor eunekyik inendet: kochuulak ngunoto, ak kolos Jehovah." 
Luke13:14 Kinerech anyun bounindetab sunagogit, amu kiisoob Jesu chito eng’ betutab sabato, ak komwachi tuiyet kolenji, Mitei betusiek lo che nyolu koboisie bik: obwa anyun eng’ betusiechoto si kisoobok, ama eng’ betutab sabato." 
Luke13:15 Ago kiwolji Kiptaiyat, kolenji, Okwek chombilik, tos mayatei age tugul eng’ okwek eitanyi anan sigiriennyi eng’ bii eng’ betutab sabato, ak kokweri koee beek?" 
Luke13:16 Ak kobogoriondoni, ne cheptab Abraham, ne kigorat Setani kenyisiechu taman ak sisiit, tos manyol kitiach eng’ ratutioni eng’ betutab sabato?" 
Luke13:17 Ak ye kingota komwaei tuguchu, kolilanso bunikyik tugul: ago kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul agobo tuguk che tororen che kiyaei inendet." 
Luke13:18 Kimwa anyun, kole, Kergei bounatetab Jehovah ak nee? Ak tos aroge nee?" 
Luke13:19 Kergei ak keswotab karadali, ne kinam chito, ak kominji mbarennyi; ak kibit, agoi koek ketit; ak kitebe taritik che bo barak temenikyik." 
Luke13:20 Ak kimwa kogeny kole, Aroge nee bounatetab Jehovah?" 
Luke13:21 Kergei ak mermerek, che kinam kobogoriot, ak koburukto busiek che bo kitongok somok, agoi kogut tugul." 
Luke13:22 Ak kibunot nganasok che eechen ak che mengech, konetisioti, kobunei oret ne wendi Jerusalem." 
Luke13:23 Ak kilenji chito age, Kiptaiyandani, tos ng’ering’ che tun kisoru? Ak kilenji," 
Luke13:24 Ogiilge obun kurget ne mariich: amu amwawok ale, cheng’ei tun che chang’ kobun yoto, ago matun imuchi." 
Luke13:25 Ak ye tun kang’eet chitab kobo got, ak koger kurget, ak otau anyun otononse eng’ sang’, ak ogongony kurget, ole, Kiptaiyandani, yatwech; ak kowolwok inendet kole, Mangenok, ak ole obunu;" 
Luke13:26 otau anyun ole, Kigiamisiei ak kigiee eng’ taing’ung’, ak kiinetisiei eng’ ortinwekyok;" 
Luke13:27 ak tun mwaei kole, Mangen ole obunu; oba eng’ ane, okwek tugul yaikab tengek." 
Luke13:28 Koek anyun rirek ak nyeetab kelek, ye tun ogeer Agraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo, ak maotik tugul, eng’ bounatetab Jehovah, ak kewirjok okweget sang’." 
Luke13:29 Ak tun bwanei kobunu kong’asis ak cherongo, ak murot ne bo katam ak murot ne bo tai, ak koteb ng’ony koamis eng’ bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke13:30 Ak ogeero, mi che bo let che tun egu che bo tai, ak mitei che bo tai che tun egu che bo let." 
Luke13:31 Kibwa Parisaik alak eng’ sainato, ak kolenji, Ng’eet mande, ui eng’ oli: amu machei kobarin Herod." 
Luke13:32 Ak kilenji ichek, Oba omwachi lelwandonoto, olenji, Keero, aone oik ak asoobi bik rani ak mutai, ak eng’ betutab somok abegechi." 
Luke13:33 Ago kanyol awo bandanyu rani ak mutai ak betut ne bo somok: amu manyoljin komechi maotiondo oldo age kobate Jerusalem. 
Luke13:34 Ee, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, inye ne ibare maotik, ak ilage koik che kiyogun! Kiamach konyil ata ayum lagoguk, ko u ngogiet ne iyumjin arekyik kebebaikyik, ago kima ocham!" 
Luke13:35 Ogeero, kagebagakwok gong’wong’ koek kipkubere: ak amwawok ale, Maogeera, agoi tun ole, Iberurot ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat." 
Luke14:1 Ak ye kingwo gotab age eng’ bounik che bo Parisaik eng’ betutab sabato, si koamis, koribot ichek inendet." 
Luke14:2 Ak ogeero, kimi chi tainnyi ne ki lolosenot borto." 
Luke14:3 Ak kiwolji Jesu ng’omotikab ng’atutik ak Parisaik, kolenji, Tos chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik kisoob chi eng’ betutab sabato, anan achicha?" 
Luke14:4 Ago kisisyo. Ak kinam inendet, ak kosoob, ak kounda kwo." 
Luke14:5 Ak kolenji icheget, Ng’o eng’ okwek ne tinyei sigiriet anan eito ne kagobutyo keringet, ama sutu eng’ sainato eng’ betutab sabato?" 
Luke14:6 Ak kimata komuch anyun kowolji inendet kogeny agobo tuguchuto. 
Luke14:7 Ak kimwachi kalewenet che kiga kiguur, ye kingogeer ole lewendoi ng’echerok che bo tai; kolenji ichek," 
Luke14:8 Ye kaguurjin chi age tugul igortab katunisiet, ko metebe ng’echeret ne bo tai; amu abere kagiguur age ne konyitot kosiirin," 
Luke14:9 si ye nyo inendet ne kaguurok okwek tuwai, komwaun kole, Istochige chichi; itau anyun iwe ole bo let eng’ kalilanet." 
Luke14:10 Ago ye kiguurin, itebe olo bo let; ak ye nyo anyun ne kaguurin, komuchi kolenjin, Choruani, ui olin bo tai: inyoru anyun teegisto eng’ che oamisiei tugul." 
Luke14:11 Amu age tugul ne itororigei kiming’ini; ak inendet ne iming’inegei kitorori. 
Luke14:12 Kimwachi anyun chichoto kiga kuurso agine, kolenji, Ye ichob amitwogik che bo bet anan che bo koskoleny, ko mat iguur choronoguk, anan che otupche, anan tilionutiguk, anan magorek che bo kokwet; abere tos kuurin agichek, ak koweegun cheguk." 
Luke14:13 Ago ye ichob igorta, iguur kibananok, ak che bo mugungon, ak che ing’waldos, ak che koriotin:" 
Luke14:14 si kiberurin; amu matinyei icheget che weegun: amu tun kiweegun eng’ ng’eetyetab che bo iman. 
Luke14:15 Ak kingogas tuguchuto chito age ne kimi koboto inendet eng’ amisiet, kolenji, Baibai inendet ne tun amisiei eng’ bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke14:16 Ago kilenji, Kichob chito age amitwogik che chang’ che bo koskoleny; ak koguur bik che chang’:" 
Luke14:17 ak kiiyokto otwogindennyi eng’ saitab amitwogik, koguur che kiga kemwachi, kolenji, Obwa; amu kagochobogis tuguk tugul." 
Luke14:18 Ak kotoi tugul eng’ maget agenge komwa kit ne karany. Kilenji chito ne bo tai, Kaal mbaret, kanyolja awo ageer: asomin ale nyoiywa kaat." 
Luke14:19 Kole age, Kaal eik taman che bo chogit, kawe atiem ichek: asomin ale nyoiywa kaat." 
Luke14:20 Kole age, Kaatunisie, noto anyun mamuchi anyo." 
Luke14:21 Konyo anyun otwogindonoto, ak kotetyi kiptaiyandennyi ng’alechuto tugul. Konerech anyun chitab kobo got, ak kolenji otwogindennyi, Ui chakte ortinwek che eechen ak che mengechen che bo nganaset, ak imutu yu kibananok, ak che bo mugungon ak che koriotin ak che ing’waldos." 
Luke14:22 Ak kile otwogindonoto, Kiptaiyandani, kagoyaak kit ne kageng’at, ago ta komi boroindo." 
Luke14:23 Kolenji anyun kiptaiyat otwogindennyi, Ui ortinwek che eechen ak kiwotosiekab mbarenik, ak ichiich kobwa go, si konyi gonnyu." 
Luke14:24 Amu amwawok ale, mami agot agenge eng’ che kiga kemwachi ne chamjami amitwogikyuk." 
Luke14:25 Ak kiba ak inendet tuiyosiek che chang’: ak kiwelelgei inendet ak kolenji," 
Luke14:26 Ngo nyonja chi, ama wech kwanda, ak kamet, ak osotiondennyi, ak lagokyik, ak werik che tupcho, ak chepkametinik, ee ak sobondanyi agine, ko maimuchi koek alamalyennyu." 
Luke14:27 Ak chi age tugul ne maibei kimurtoiyondennyi, ak kosubwa, ko maimuchi koek alamalyennyu." 
Luke14:28 Amu ng’o eng’ okwek, ne machei koteech got ne koi, ama toi koteb ng’ony korok ak koiit tuguk, ngo tinyei che yamei kogesune got?" 
Luke14:29 Si ma ye kagotonon lumeiywot, ak koma komuch koges, kotoi kochurachur inendet tugul che keerei," 
Luke14:30 kole, Kitoi chichi koteekso ago ma imuch koges." 
Luke14:31 Anan ng’o laitoriat ne wendi kobaregei ak laitoriat age, ama teb ng’ony korok ak korar ole teptoi, ngo tos imuchi inendet ak bik elfusiek taman kotuiyo ak ne setyin inendet ak bik elfusiek tiptem?" 
Luke14:32 Anan, ye ta komi age ole loo, koyokto ng’olyot, si koteeb agobo kalyet." 
Luke14:33 Noto anyun, chi age tugul eng’ okwek ne mabagaktoi tugukyik tugul, ko maimuchi koek alamalyennyu." 
Luke14:34 Miachen munyuk: ago ngo kagogesgei anyinyindanyi, ko ta kianyinye nee?" 
Luke14:35 Ma kotilei kiy eng’ emet anan eng’ kapng’atat: kilaktoi. Inendet ne tinyei itik che kastoe, kogas." 
Luke15:1 Ak kirikyi inendet taagikab aisurut tugul ak kiptengeginik si kobiit kogas inendet. 
Luke15:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’so Parisaik ak sirik, kole, Taachei chichi kiptengeginik, ak koamisiei tugul." 
Luke15:3 Ak kimwachi ichek kalewenoni, kolenji," 
Luke15:4 Ng’o chi eng’ okwek, ne tinyei kechirek bogol, ak ngobeet agenge eng’ choto, ko tos mabagaktoi choto tamanwogik sogol ak sogol eng’ surkwen, ak kwo kocheng’at noto kabet, agoi konyor?" 
Luke15:5 Ak ye kigonyor, konde tigikyennyi, ak kobaibait." 
Luke15:6 Ak ye kagoit ga, koguur choronokyik koboto bikab kokwennyi koyumgei, ak kolenji, Ongeboiboitu tugul, amu kaanyoru kechiriennyu ne koga bet." 
Luke15:7 Amwawok ale, egu ko u noto tun agine boiboiyet eng’ kipsengwet agobo kiptengekyot agenge ne kasik, ne siirei bik che bo iman tamanwogik sogol ak sogol, che mamage kiy sigunet." 
Luke15:8 Ng’o kobogoriot ne tinyei fedaisiek taman, ak ngobeet fedaiyat agenge, kotos mainaami tait ak kobuch got, ak kocheng’ mising’ agoi konyor?" 
Luke15:9 Ak ye kagonyor, koguur anyun choronokyik koboto bikab kokwennyi koyumgei ak kole, Ongeboiboitu tugul, amu kaanyoru fedaiyandennyu ne koga kobet." 
Luke15:10 U noto anyun, amwawok ale, mi boiboiyet eng’ taitab malaikaisiekab Jehovah eng’ kiptengekyot agenge ne kasik." 
Luke15:11 Ak kimwa kole, Kimi chi anum ne kitinyei werik aeng’:" 
Luke15:12 ak kilenji werit ne ming’in kwandanyi, Aba, kona tuguk che ka tatun bunjina. Ak kipchechi ichek tugukyik." 
Luke15:13 Ak kingobata betusiek che matia koyum weroto ming’in tugukyik tugul, ak kwo emet ne loo; kwo koserser eng’ oloto tugukyik eng’ atepto ne ya." 
Luke15:14 Ak kingo kagogesta tugul, konyo rubet ne o emonoto; kotoi anyun kobanan." 
Luke15:15 Ak kiwa kogakta chito age ne bo emonoto; ak kiiyokto kwo koyaga torok eng’ mbaret. 
Luke15:16 Ak kimachei mising’ kole kobiyo metetek che kiamei torok: amu ma igochi chi kiy. 
Luke15:17 Ak kingobwat, komwa kole, Tia otwogik che bo baba che tinyei amitwogik che yamei kot kosiir, ago ane, ko kabara rubo eng’ yu!" 
Luke15:18 Ang’eete ak awe oldab baba, alenji, Baba, kiachalwogenji kipsengwet ak kiachalwogen eng’ taing’ung’:" 
Luke15:19 ma ko nyoljina kota keguurena wering’ung’: ingaek ko u age eng’ otwogiguk. 
Luke15:20 King’eet anyun kwo oldab kwandanyi. Ago, ye kita komi ole loo, kogeer inendet kwandanyi, ak korire inendet, ak kilabat kwo kosuub kaatit, ak kong’utut." 
Luke15:21 Ak kilenji werit, Baba, kiachalwogenji kipsengwet, ak kiachalwogen eng’ taing’ung’: ma ko nyoljina kota keguurena wering’ung’." 
Luke15:22 Ago kilenji kwanda otwogikyik, Oibu ochogune ngoriet ne kararan ne siirei tugul, ak olaakyi; ak ondechi peteit mornennyi, ak olaakyi kweonik:" 
Luke15:23 ak ogetu moita ne nerat, ak oeny, si keam, ak keboiboitu:" 
Luke15:24 amu werinnyu ni, ne kiga kome, ago kagosob kogeny; kiga kobet, ak kagobiit. Kitoi anyun koboiboitu." 
Luke15:25 Ak kimi werinnyi ne o mbar: ak kingorik ye negit got, kogas cheetab tiendo ak ureriet." 
Luke15:26 Ak kiguur age eng’ otwogik, ak koteebe kole, nee tuguchu." 
Luke15:27 Ak kilenji, Kagoit ng’etab komet; ak kagoeng’ji kwandang’ung’ moita ne nerat, amu kagotaach inendet kochamegei." 
Luke15:28 Ago kinerech, ak kiesio kwo go: ak kimong’ sang’ kwandanyi, kogaigai." 
Luke15:29 Ago kiwolji kwandanyi kolenji, Keero, kiaotin eng’ kenyisiechu chang’, ama abut ng’atutieng’ung’: ak kima igona arua, si keboiboitu ak choronokyuk:" 
Luke15:30 ago ye kangonyo weritang’ung’et, ne kigoam tuguguk ak chepkugonik, ieng’ji anyun moita ne nerat." 
Luke15:31 Ak kilenji, Weri, kimi tuwai kotugul, ak tugukyuk tugul ko cheguk." 
Luke15:32 Ago kanyolu keboiboitu ak kigasge: amu kiga kome weri otupche, ago kagosob kogeny; kiga kobet, ago kagobiit." 
Luke16:1 Ak kilenji inendet alamalyennyi kogeny, Kimi chi anum ne ki magorio, ne kitinyei ribindet ne kitononjin gonnyi; ak kigimwaita chichoto eng’ tainnyi kele, iserseri tugukab magoriondonoto." 
Luke16:2 Ak kiguur inendet kolenji, Nee ni agase agobo inye? Konu koitetab ripseng’ung’; amu ma iegu ribindet kogeny." 
Luke16:3 Ak kile ribindonoto eng’ muguleldanyi, Ayae nee anyun, amu kagoistaa kiptaiyandennyu eng’ boisiet? Amatinye kimnatet ne abatisie; ak ngale, Asomso, alilani." 
Luke16:4 Kaanai kit ne ayae, si ye kageona eng’ boisiet, kotaacha eng’ gorikwak." 
Luke16:5 Ak kingoguur age tugul eng’ besenikab kiptaiyandennyi, kolenji ne bo tai, Kiibesen ata tugukab kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Luke16:6 Kole, Terenik bogol che bo mwanik. Ak kilenji, Nam kartasing’ung’, ak iteb ng’ony si isir konom, ichokyi." 
Luke16:7 Yeityo kolenji age, Kiibesen ata inye? Kole, Terenik bogol che bo nganok. Kolenji, Nam kartasing’ung’, si isir tamanwogik sisiit." 
Luke16:8 Ak kiichoi kiptaiyandennyi otwogindonoto kima ko bo imanda amu kayai eng’ ng’omnatet: amu ng’omen werikab ng’onyuni eng’ ibindanywa kosiir werikab lapkeiyet. 
Luke16:9 Ak amwawok ale, Oyachige choronok eng’ oretab magornatosiek che ma bo imanda; si ye tun igesgei, ko tun kotaachak eng’ gorik che bo koigeny." 
Luke16:10 Inendet ne kiyani eng’ che ng’ering’, kiyani agine eng’ che chang’: ak inendet ne magiyani eng’ che ng’ering’ ko magiyani agot eng’ che chang’." 
Luke16:11 U noto anyun, ngo kima oegu che kiyani eng’ magornatosiek che ma bo imanda, ko ng’o ne tos iyanak eng’ magornatosiek che bo imanda?" 
Luke16:12 Ak ngo kimata oegu che kiyani eng’ tugukab chito age, ko tos ng’o anyun ne konok tuguk che chekwok?" 
Luke16:13 Ma mi otwogindet ne imuchi koot kiptainik aeng’: amu tos wech age, ak kocham age; anan konamgei ak age, kosas age. Momuchi oot Jehovah ak magornatet." 
Luke16:14 Ak kigas Parisaik tuguchuto tugul. Kichamei siling’isiek icheget, ak kororechi inendet." 
Luke16:15 Ak kilenji, Okweget che omieitige eng’ taitab bik; ago ingen Jehovah mugulelwekwok: amu kit ne itorori bik ko wegot mising’ eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Luke16:16 Kitebi Ng’atutik ak maotik agoi koit Johana: koboch betunoto keamdoi logoiywek che miach che bo bounatetab Jehovah, ak komong’jin chi tugul eng’ kimnatet." 
Luke16:17 Ago nyamnyum kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng’ony, kosiir kobut sirutiet agenge ne bo Ng’atutik." 
Luke16:18 Age tugul ne onei osotiondennyi, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei: ak chito ne ituni inendet ne kigoon manong’otiot ko kabaigei." 
Luke16:19 Ak kimi chi anum ne ki magorio ne kiilaachi ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak che bo katanit ne kararan, ak kibaibai betut age tugul, ak kotalbisi:" 
Luke16:20 ak kimi kibanania ne kigiguure Lasaro ne kigimogoni eng’ kurgennyi, ak ki nyiitat mook bortanyi," 
Luke16:21 ak kimachei kebae tuguk che ibutos eng’ mesetab magoriondonoto; ee, kibwa agot sesenik ak komel mookyik." 
Luke16:22 Ak kime kibananiandanato betut age, komut inendet malaikaisiek konde tegetab Abraham: ak kime agine magoriondonoto, ak kigitub." 
Luke16:23 Ak ye kimi oldab che kigobek konyal barak, komi nyalilda ne o, kogeer Abraham komi ole loo, komi Lasaro tegennyi." 
Luke16:24 Ak kiite kole, Baba Abraham, rirena, ak iyogu Lasaro, koting’e beek walitab mornennyi, si kotiswa ng’elyeptanyu, amu ami ng’wanindo mising’ eng’ mai lalei." 
Luke16:25 Ago kile Abraham, Weri, ibwat ile kingota isobe ko kiinyoru tuguguk che miach, ki u noto Lasaro, kinyoru tuguk che yaach: ago nguno kigoigoi inendet eng’ yu, ago inye, imi ng’wanindo ne o." 
Luke16:26 Ak ne siirei chu tugul, ko kiginde chemng’eisut ne o ne ioitosech achek ak okwek, si che machei kolong’ olo omi ko maimuchi, ak che machei kolong’ ole kimi ko maimuchi." 
Luke16:27 Ak kile, Asain anyun, baba, ale, iyokte inendet kwo oldab baba;" 
Luke16:28 amu atinye che kitupche mut; kwo koteechi ichek, si mabwa ole mi nyalilda ne o." 
Luke16:29 Ak kilenji Abraham, Tinyei ichek Musa ak maotik; ingogas ichek." 
Luke16:30 Ago kile, Achicha, baba Abraham: ago ngot kwo chi ole mi ichek ne bunei oldab che kigobek, kosigu." 
Luke16:31 Ak kilenji, Ngot ko magas Musa ak maotik, koesioi koyan agot chito ne ng’eetei eng’ che kigobek." 
Luke17:1 Kilenji alamalyennyi anyun, Bwanei kanagutik matiny: ago bwa eng’ chichoto bunu!" 
Luke17:2 Kita kaigai eng’ inendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitab bai ne o ak kewirji nyanjet, kosiir ye inachi age eng’ chu mengech." 
Luke17:3 Oripge: ngochiliilun ne otupche, iger kong’; ak ngo sik, inyochi kaat." 
Luke17:4 Ak ngo chalwogenjin konyil tisab eng’ betut agenge, ak ngo week ole imi konyil tisab kolen, Kaasigu; inyochi kaat." 
Luke17:5 Ak kilenji che kiyoktoi Kiptaiyat, Teswech kayanennyo." 
Luke17:6 Ak kile Kiptaiyat, Ndotinye kayanet ne u keswotab karadali, ko ye omwachi mogoiywoni, olenji, Kitutin, ak keminin eng’ nyanjet; kogasok it." 
Luke17:7 Ago mi ng’o eng’ okwek ne tinyei otwogindet ne ibatisiei anan ne iyagi kechirek, ne lenjin, ye kait kobunu mbar, Nyo ngunoto ak itebi ng’ony iamisie?" 
Luke17:8 Tos ma kaigai kolenji inendet, Chobwa tuguk che aame, kermenge, ak iboisiewa, agoi aamisie ak aeeise; si yeityo iamisie ak ieeise aginye?" 
Luke17:9 Tos weekyin otwogindonoto kongoi amu kayai tuguk che kaga king’at? 
Luke17:10 U noto tun ak okwek, ye kaoyai tuguk tugul che kaging’atak, omwa ole, Ki otwogik che matilei kiy; kageyai che kanyoljinech keyai." 
Luke17:11 Ak ye kimi oret kowendi Jerusalem, kobun kwenutab Samaria ak Galili." 
Luke17:12 Ak kingomong’ji nganaset age, kotuiyo ak murenik taman che kiamei mogondosik, che kitonondos eng’ ole loo:" 
Luke17:13 ak kiwaach kole, Jesu Kiptaiyat, rirenech." 
Luke17:14 Ak kingogeer ichek, kolenji, Oba oborjige tisiik. Ak ye kingab kaba, kotililitu." 
Luke17:15 Ak kingogeer age eng’ ichek kole kagosob, koweek, kolosunonu Jehovah eng’ kutit ne o;" 
Luke17:16 ak kiibutyi kelyekyik kogochi kongoi; ak ki Samarindet chichoto. 
Luke17:17 Ak kiwol Jesu kole, Kama kitilil taman? Ago mi ano chugai sogolu?" 
Luke17:18 Tos ma biit agot agenge ne kaweek kogochi kalosunet Jehovah, kobate toondoni?" 
Luke17:19 Ak kolenji inendet, Ng’eet, si iwe: kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’." 
Luke17:20 Ak kingoteebe Parisaik kole nyonei au bounatetab Jehovah, kowolji ichek kolenji, Manyonei bounatetab Jehovah kegeeronu:" 
Luke17:21 ama kimwaei kele, Ogeero, mi oli! Anan mi olin! Amu, ogeero, mi bounatetab Jehovah kwenung’wong’." 
Luke17:22 Ak kilenji alamalyennyi, Tun bwanei betusiek, che tun omache ogeer betut agenge ne bo Weritab chi, ak mogeere." 
Luke17:23 Ak tun lenjinok, Ogeero, mi olin! Ogeero, mi oli! Amat obe, anan osub ichek:" 
Luke17:24 amu u kalyelet, ne ilyelune komosta age eng’ kipsengwet, ak koluu agoi komosta age ne bo kipsengwet; tun u noto Weritab chi agine eng’ betunnyi." 
Luke17:25 Ago kanyol konyalil eng’ tuguk che chang’ ak koesio inendet ibini. 
Luke17:26 Ak ko u ole kibiitunda eng’ betusiekab Noa, ko tun u noto eng’ betusiekab Weritab chi." 
Luke17:27 Kiamisiei, kieeisei, kiitunisiei, ak kiigoitoi kitun, agoi betut ne kiwa Noa melit orit, ak kinyo maranet, ak kobar tugul." 
Luke17:28 U noto agine, ole kibiitunda betusiekab Lot; kiamisiei, kieeisei, kialisiei, kialdoisiei, kigolsei, ak kiteeksei;" 
Luke17:29 ago eng’ betut ne kimanda Lot eng’ Sodom korobon mat ak koik che laldos che kibunu kipsengwet, ak kobar tugul:" 
Luke17:30 u noto eng’ betut ne kiboru Weritab chi. 
Luke17:31 Eng’ betunoto, ko mat kochorgei inendet ne mi got barak, koib tugukyik che mi go; amat koweek agine inendet ne mi mbar." 
Luke17:32 Obwat osotiotab Lot. 
Luke17:33 Age tugul ne cheng’ei kosor sobondanyi kobeeti: ak age tugul ne ibeeti sobondanyi koribei. 
Luke17:34 Amwawok ale, Tun ruitos bik aeng’u eng’ itogut agenge eng’ kemounoto; kimuti age, kebagakta age." 
Luke17:35 Tun ng’oisei kobogorisiek aeng’u kibagenge; kimuti age, kebagakta age." 
Luke17:36 Tun mi bik aeng’u mbar: kimuti age, kebagakta age." 
Luke17:37 Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji, Ano, Kiptaiyandani? Ak kilenji, Ole mi musto, koyumjingei oloto motong’wek agichek." 
Luke18:1 Kimwachi anyun kalewenet kole, Kanyol kosa betusiek tugul, amat chorirenso;" 
Luke18:2 kolenji, Kimitei nganaset age kiruogindo, ne kima koiywei Jehovah, ak kima koiiti chi:" 
Luke18:3 ak kimi mosoget age nganasanato; ne kinyonei ole mi kotugul, kolen, Ibesiewa kiruoget ne bo iman eng’ bunyondennyu." 
Luke18:4 Ak kiesio eng’ betusiek alak: ago eng’ let, komwa eng’ orinnyi kole, Agot ngo maiywei Jehovah, amaiiti chi;" 
Luke18:5 ago amu inyalila mosogani, abesiechini anyun, si ma konyonei kotugul koiima." 
Luke18:6 Ak kile Kiptaiyat, Ogas kit ne kimwa kiruogindet ne ma bo imanda." 
Luke18:7 Tos mayachin Jehovah imanda che lewenotin, che rirjin inendet bet ak kemoi, ak muitoi inendet eng’ ichek?" 
Luke18:8 Amwawok ale, yachin inendet ichek imanda kochokyin. Ago ye tun nyo Weritab chi, ko tos nyoru kayanet eng’ ng’ony?" 
Luke18:9 Ak kimwachi kogeny kalewenoni alak che kiimang’ugei kole, ki bo imanda, ak kosasei bik tugul," 
Luke18:10 kolenji, Kitogosta bik aeng’u hekalut koba kosa; Parisaindet age, ko taagindetab aisurut age." 
Luke18:11 Kitonon Parisaindet kosa kong’alal inegei ko u ni kole, Jehovah, amwaun kongoi, amu ma ki kergei ak bik alak, che rebik, che ma bo iman, che ibegei, anan taagindoni bo aisurut." 
Luke18:12 Arugutige konyil aeng’ eng’ wigit; agoitoi kebeberta ne bo taman eng’ tuguk tugul che anyoru. 
Luke18:13 Ago kitonon taagindetab aisurut eng’ ye loo, ak ma cham agot konyal kipsengwet, ago kiluch tegennyi, kole, Jehovah, rirena, a kiptengekyo." 
Luke18:14 Amwawok ale, kichortagei chichoto gonnyi ko kagoek ne bo imanda kosiir nin age: amu chi age tugul ne itororigei kiming’ini; ak age tugul ne iming’inigei ko tun kitorori." 
Luke18:15 Ak kiimutyi bik inendet manyurunik, si kobiit kotwa ichek: ago ye kingogeer alamalyet, koger kong’." 
Luke18:16 Ago kiguur Jesu ichek kobwanji, ak kolenji, Ochamji lagok che mengech kobwanja, amat oete: amu bo che u chu bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke18:17 Amwawok iman ale, Age tugul ne mataachei bounatetab Jehovah ko u lakwet ne ming’in, ko magoi mong’ji oloto matiny." 
Luke18:18 Ak kiteebe inendet bounindet age, kole, Konetindoni mie, ayai nee si kobiit anyor sobondab koigeny?" 
Luke18:19 Ak kilenji Jesu, Amu nee si iguurena ne mie? Mami ne mie, kobate agenge, noto ko Jehovah." 
Luke18:20 Ingen Ng’atutik, Amoipge, Amerumisie, Amechorse, Amebaorian lembech, Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet." 
Luke18:21 Ak kile, Kiarib tuguchuto tugul koboch ko a neran." 
Luke18:22 Ak ye kingogas Jesu, kolenji, Ta ko rartaat kit agenge eng’ inye: alde tugul che itinye, ak ipchechi kibananok, si inyoru konoruet eng’ kipsengwet: ak inyo, isubwa." 
Luke18:23 Ago ye kingogas inendet tuguchu, koarogen mising’; amu ki magorio kot." 
Luke18:24 Ak kingogeer Jesu inendet, komwa kole, Bichii ne tia eng’ che tinyei magornatosiek komong’ji bounatetab Jehovah!" 
Luke18:25 Amu nyamnyum eng’ tambesiet kochut kondab katet, kosiir komong’ji magoriot bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke18:26 Kimwa anyun che kigasei, kole, Ng’o anyun ne kesoru?" 
Luke18:27 Kile, Tuguk che maimugaksei eng’ bik komugaksei eng’ Jehovah." 
Luke18:28 Kole Petero, Keero, kigebagakte tugukyok, ak kisubun." 
Luke18:29 Ak kilenji ichek, Amwawok iman ale, Mami chi ne kibagakta got, anan osotiot, anan che tupcho, anan sigik, anan lagok, agobo bounatetab Jehovah," 
Luke18:30 ne manyoru che chang’ kosiir eng’ betusiechu, ak sobondab koigeny eng’ betusiek che tun bwanei." 
Luke18:31 Ak kiimut taman ak aeng’ kobwa ole mi, ak kolenji, Ogeero, kitogostoi Jerusalem, ak kosulda tuguk tugul che kisir maotik agobo Weritab chi." 
Luke18:32 Amu kindoi inendet eunekab Bororiosiek, si kechurachur, ak kitewer, ak kesing’ilji:" 
Luke18:33 ak kobire kipcharitit, ak kobar: ak kong’eet kogeny eng’ betutab somok." 
Luke18:34 Ak kima iguiyo icheget tuguchuto, agot agenge; ak kiung’ak mwaonito eng’ ichek, ak kima ibesio tuguk che kiga kimwa." 
Luke18:35 Ak kingorikyi Jeriko, ko kitebyei ng’ony kipkoratia eng’ oret taban kosomsei:" 
Luke18:36 ak kingogas kosiirtoi tuiyet, koteeb kole, Nee chu?" 
Luke18:37 Ak kimwachi ichek inendet kolenji, Jesu ne bo Nasaret ne siirtoi." 
Luke18:38 Ak kiwaach, kole, Jesu, Weritab Daudi, rirena." 
Luke18:39 Ak kiger kong’ inendet anyun che kiindoi, kole kosis: ago kites kowaach mising’ kole, Weritab Daudi, rirena." 
Luke18:40 Ak kitonon Jesu, ak kong’at kimut inendet kwo ole mi: ak ye kiga rik, koteebe inendet," 
Luke18:41 kole, Imache ayaun nee? Ak kile, Kiptaiyandani, amache ageerto." 
Luke18:42 Ak kilenji Jesu, Keerte: kagosoobin kayaneng’ung’." 
Luke18:43 Kigeerto anyun ngunoto, ak kosub inendet, kolosunoti Jehovah: ak kingogeer tuiyet komugul, kogonyit Jehovah." 
Luke19:1 Kimong’ji anyun Jeriko ak kobun kwenut. 
Luke19:2 Ak ogeero, chito ne kiguure Sakayo; ak ki ne o inendet eng’ taagikab aisurut, ak ki magorio." 
Luke19:3 Ak kicheng’ei kole kogeer Jesu si konai kole ng’o inendet; ago kima imuch amu tuiyet, amu ki nwach." 
Luke19:4 Ak kilabat kondo, kwo kolany mogoiywet si kogeer inendet: amu kinyo kosiirtoe oranato." 
Luke19:5 Ak ye kingoit Jesu yoto, konyal ketoto, ak kolenji, Sakayo, choruge, chogu; amu kanyolja aru gong’ung’ ra." 
Luke19:6 Ak kichok, kochorgei, ak kotaach inendet eng’ boiboindo." 
Luke19:7 Ak ye kingogeer bichoto, kong’unyng’ung’so tugul, kole, Kawa kotebi eng’ gotab chito ne kiptengekyo." 
Luke19:8 Ak kitonon Sakayo, ak kolenji Kiptaiyat, Keero, Kiptaiyandani, agochini kibananok kebebertab tugukyuk; ak ngo kiaibe chi age tugul kiy eng’ ng’alset, aweekyini konyil ang’wan." 
Luke19:9 Ak kilenji Jesu, Kagonyo yetunet rani goi, amu weritab Abraham agine inendet." 
Luke19:10 Amu kinyo Weritab chi kocheng’ ak kosor ne kiga kobet. 
Luke19:11 Ak ye kingota kogasei ichek tuguchu, kotes komwa kalewenet, amu ki negit Jerusalem, ak kiibwati icheget kolen toogu bounatetab Jehovah ngunoto." 
Luke19:12 Kimwa anyun kole, Kiwa chi anum ne toogunot emet ne loo, kwo konam bounatet kobunji, ak koweek." 
Luke19:13 Yeityo koguur otwogikyik taman, ak kogochi fedaisiek taman, ak kolenji, Oboisie agoi tun aitu." 
Luke19:14 Ago kiwech inendet bikab emennyi, koyokto ng’olyot kosube inendet, kole, Magimache chichi koboiywech." 
Luke19:15 Ak ye kingoweek kogeny, ko kagonam bounatet, kong’at keguur otwogichoto, chu kiga kigochi fedaisiek, kobwa ole mi inendet, si kobiit konai che kinyor bichoto eng’ boisiet." 
Luke19:16 Ak kinyo tainnyi chito ne bo tai, kole, Kiptaiyandani, kigonyor fedaiyandeng’ung’ fedaisiek alak taman." 
Luke19:17 Ak kilenji inendet, Kiiyai ne mie, otwogindoni mie: amu kiiegu ne kiyani eng’ kit ne ming’in mising’, bou nganasok taman." 
Luke19:18 Ak kinyo ne bo aeng’, kole, Kiptaiyandani, kigonyor fedaiyandeng’ung’ fedaisiek mut alak." 
Luke19:19 Ak kilenji noto agine, Bou nganasok mut aginye." 
Luke19:20 Ak kinyo age, kole, Kiptaiyandani, keero, ineni fedaiyandeng’ung’ ne kigaratyi anget ak agonor:" 
Luke19:21 amu kiaiywein, amu i chi ne kolgol: inemu ne kima inde ng’ony, ak igese che kima igol." 
Luke19:22 Kolenji anyun inendet, Aruogun agobo ne kemwa eng’ kuting’ung’, otwogindoni ya. Kiingen ile a chi ne kolgol, anemu ne kima ande ng’ony, ak agese che kima agol;" 
Luke19:23 kilya anyun si mende fedaisiekyuk ole kiwalawale, ta kaanyoru ko kaitu koboto che kitesak?" 
Luke19:24 Ak kimwachi ichek che kitonondos eng’ ye negit, kolenji, Orebe inendet fedaiyat, ak ogochi inendet ne tinye fedaisiek taman." 
Luke19:25 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Kiptaiyandani, tinyei inendet fedaisiek taman." 
Luke19:26 Amwawok ale, chi age tugul ne tinyei, kigochin; ago inendet ne matinyei, kerebe agot ne tinyei." 
Luke19:27 Ago omutu anyun bunichuchuk kobwa yu, che machamei aboi, si obar eng’ tainnyu." 
Luke19:28 Ak ye kiga komwa ko u noto, kwo kondo, kotogostoi Jerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Ak ye kingo kagorikta Betpage ak Betania, eng’ tulwet ne kiguure tulwetab Emitik, koyokto aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi," 
Luke19:30 kolenji, Oba agoi oit nganaset ne mi taing’wong’; ak ye oit ogeer moitab sigiriet ne ratat, ne tom kolany chi: otiach, ak ogetu." 
Luke19:31 Ak ngo teebenak chi age tugul, kole, Kalya si otiach? Olenji anyun, Makyingei Kiptaiyat." 
Luke19:32 Koba anyun che kaga kiyokto, ak konyor ko u ye kaga mwachi inendet ichek." 
Luke19:33 Ak ye kita kotiachi moitab sigiriet, kolenji bikab kobo, Kalya si otiach moitab sigiriet?" 
Luke19:34 Ak kilenji, Makyingei Kiptiyat." 
Luke19:35 Ak kiget konyo ole mi Jesu: yeityo koiito ngoroikwak eng’ moata bo sigiriet, ak koganapchi Jesu barak." 
Luke19:36 Ak ye kiwendi, koiitoot ngoroikwak eng’ oret." 
Luke19:37 Ak kingorikta tegeiyatab tulwetab Emitik, kotoi tuiyet tugul ne bo alamalyet koboiboitu ak kolos Jehovah eng’ kutit ne o agobo boisionik tugul che bo kamuktaet che kiga kogeer;" 
Luke19:38 kolen, Iberurot Laitoriat ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat: kalyet eng’ kipsengwet, ak lilindo eng’ ole toror mising’." 
Luke19:39 Ak kilenji Parisaik alage che bo tuiyet inendet, Konetindoni, ker kong’ alamalyeng’ung’." 
Luke19:40 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Amwawok ale, ngot kosisyo chu, koboldos koik." 
Luke19:41 Ak kingorik, kogeer nganaset ak korirji," 
Luke19:42 kolen, Nda kengen eng’ betuni, agot inye, tuguk che bo kalyet! Ago nguno ko kagoung’ogis eng’ konyeguk." 
Luke19:43 Amu tun bwanjinin betusiek che teechei buniguk irimet koyiemin komoswek tugul, ak kogerjin go eng’ komosta age tugul," 
Luke19:44 ak kowirjin ng’ony, ak lagoguk che mi oring’ung’; ama bagagun agot koita agenge ne mi baragutab age; amu kima inai betutab rutochineng’ung’." 
Luke19:45 Ak kiwa hekalut orit, ak kotoi koon komanda che kialdoisiei," 
Luke19:46 kolenji ichek, Kigisir kele, Egu gonnyu gotab saet: ago kaoyai koek kebenetab rebik." 
Luke19:47 Ak kiinetisiei betut age tugul eng’ hekalut. Ago kicheng’ tisiik che eechen ak sirik ak che toogunotin eng’ bik, kobar inendet:" 
Luke19:48 ak manyor kit ne kiimuchi koyai; amu kiepchin it bik tugul inendet mising’. 
Luke20:1 Ak ye kiineti bik eng’ betut age eng’ hekalut, ak koamdoi logoiywek che miach, kobwanji inendet tisiik che eechen ak sirik koboto boisiek koche inendet;" 
Luke20:2 ak kimwachi inendet kolenji, Mwawech; iyae tuguchu kimnatetab ng’o? Ak ko ng’o ne kigonin kimnatoni?" 
Luke20:3 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Ateebenok agane ng’olyot; ak omwawa:" 
Luke20:4 Kabatisanetab Johana ko kibunu kipsengwet, anan kibunu bik?" 
Luke20:5 Ak king’alaljigei ichegei, kole, Ngot kemwa kele, Kibunu kipsengwet; komwa kole, Ko kilya si moyan inendet?" 
Luke20:6 Ago ngot kemwa kele, Kibunu bik; kolachech bik tugul eng’ koik: amu kiiyani ichek kole, ki maotio Johana." 
Luke20:7 Ak kiwol kole, Magingen ole kibunu." 
Luke20:8 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Agot ane ko mamwawok kimnatet ne ayae tuguchu." 
Luke20:9 Ak kitoi komwachi bik kalewenoni, kole: Kimin chi sabibuk eng’ mbar, ak komanakyi meek, ak kwo emet age kotebi betusiek che chang’." 
Luke20:10 Ak kingoit betut koyokyi otwogindet meechoto, si kobiit kogochi ichek inendet logoekab mbaranato: ago kibir meek inendet, ak koon kwo buch." 
Luke20:11 Ak kiiyokto kogeny otwogindet age: ak kibir noto agine, ak kotewer, ak koon kwo buch." 
Luke20:12 Ak kiiyokto kogeny ne bo somok: ak kiiguoten agine ak kotoorji sang’. 
Luke20:13 Ak kile chitab kobo mbaret, Ayai nee anyun? Ayoktoi werinnyu chamanennyu: tamangab kogonyit inendet." 
Luke20:14 Ago ye kingogeer meek inendet, kong’alaljigei ichegei, kole, Nito ne tun bunjin tuguk: ongebar anyun, si kindii tuguk." 
Luke20:15 Ak kitoorta komanda eng’ mbaretab sabibuk ak kobar. Itoi nee anyun chitab kobo mbaret bichoto? 
Luke20:16 Nyonei anyun inendet ak kobar meechoto tugul, ak kogochi bik alak mbaretab sabibuk. Ak ye kingogas ichek, komwa kole, Achicha, mat koek ko u noto." 
Luke20:17 Ak kiichiilji kong’ ichek ak kole, Nee anyun ne kigisir kele, Koita ne kiesio teegik, Kigiyai noto koek metitab luita?" 
Luke20:18 Ak chi age tugul ne ibutyin koyata koilei konyaknyaksei; ak inendet ne ibutyin koyata, konyinyirsei." 
Luke20:19 Ak kicheng’ sirik ak tisiik che eechen konam inendet eng’ sainato; ak kiiywei ichek bik: amu kinai kole mwaei kalewenoni agobo ichek. 
Luke20:20 Ak kiriboti icheget inendet, ak koyokto segeik, che kiyaigei koek che bo imanda, si kobiit koname inendet ng’alekyik, si kogoito inendet kwo taitab bounatet ak kimnatetab bounindet." 
Luke20:21 Ak kiteebe inendet kole, Konetindoni, kingen kele imwae ak inetisiei eng’ iman, ago metiytii chi, ak ineti iman oretab Jehovah:" 
Luke20:22 Tos chamdoi ng’atutik kigochi kodi Kaisari, anan achicha?" 
Luke20:23 Ago kinai ng’alsenywa, ak kolenji ichek," 
Luke20:24 Oborua denarit, Bo ng’o itoni ak sirutik che tinyei? Ak kile, Bo Kaisari." 
Luke20:25 Ak kilenji ichek, Ogochi Kaisari tuguk che bo Kaisari, ak ogochi Jehovah tuguk che bo Jehovah." 
Luke20:26 Ak kima imuch koname mwaonato eng’ taitab bik; ak kikwong’io eng’ wolunennyi, ak kisisyo." 
Luke20:27 Ak kibwanji inendet Sadukaik alak, icheget che mwaei kole, mami ng’eetyet; ak kiteebe inendet," 
Luke20:28 kole, Konetindoni, kisirwech Musa, kole, Ngo me ng’etab kam, ago tinyei osotiot, ne tom kosich lakwa, kondii ng’etab kam osotiondonoto, si kolalji ma ng’etab kam." 
Luke20:29 Kimi anyun werik tisabu che kitupcho: ak kiitunis ne bo tai, ak kime ama kisich lakwa;" 
Luke20:30 ak kiindi ne bo aeng’; 
Luke20:31 ak u noto ne bo somok; ak kiigei noto tugul ko tisab, kibek ama sich lakwa." 
Luke20:32 Ak kingobata kome agine kobogoriondonoto. 
Luke20:33 Tun eng’ ng’eetyet anyun koegu osotiotab ng’o eng’ ichek? Amu kiitun ichek tugul ko tisab. 
Luke20:34 Ak kilenji Jesu ichek, Itunisiei werikab betusiechu, ak kogoitoi kitun:" 
Luke20:35 ago che kiityin kele nyoljin konyor betusiechoto bwanei, ak ng’eetyet eng’ che kibek, ko matun itunisiei, ama kigoitoi kitun:" 
Luke20:36 amu ma komuchi kobek agoi: amu kergeitu ak malaikaisiek; ak icheget ko werikab Jehovah, amu werikab ng’eetyet." 
Luke20:37 Ago ng’eetos che kigobek, kiibor Musa agine eng’ ye kigisir agobo Ketit, ye kiguure Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo Abraham, ak Jehovah ne bo Isak, ak Jehovah ne bo Jakobo." 
Luke20:38 Inendet ko ma Jehovah ne bo che kigobek, ago bo che soptos: amu soptos tugul eng’ inendet." 
Luke20:39 Ak kiwolji sirik alak kolenji, Konetindoni, kaimwa komie." 
Luke20:40 Amu kimata kogany ichek koteebe inendet teebut age tugul kogeny. 
Luke20:41 Ak kilenji ichek, Teptoi ano si komwaei ichek kole, Kristo ko weritab Daudi?" 
Luke20:42 Amu kimwa Daudi inendet eng’ bukuitab Tienwogikab Kalosunet, kole, Kilenji Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, Tebe eunnyu ne bo tai," 
Luke20:43 Agoi ayai buniguk koek ng’echeretab kelyeguk. 
Luke20:44 Kuure anyun Daudi inendet Kiptaiyat, koegundoi ano anyun werinnyi?" 
Luke20:45 Ak kimwachi alamalyennyi kogasei bik tugul kolenji," 
Luke20:46 Oripge eng’ sirik, che chamei kobendat kolaachi ngoroik che koen, ak kochamei kagatosiek eng’ oldinwekab aldaisiet, ak ng’echerok che bo tai eng’ sunagogisiek, ak oldinwek che bo tai eng’ igorwek;" 
Luke20:47 ak korebe mosogik gorikwak, ak kosaei sautik che koen kong’alsei: tun nyoru chuto kiruoget ne o kosiir." 
Luke21:1 Ak kiyot met, kogeer magorek kondoi kagochinoikwak ole kiyumjin." 
Luke21:2 Ak kigeer mosoget age ne kibanania kondoi sendeisiek aeng’ che u kebebertab pesaiyat. 
Luke21:3 Ak kile, Amwawok iman ale, Kagonde mosogani banan che siirei cho tugul:" 
Luke21:4 amu kagonde chu tugul eng’ chang’indanywa ole kindoi kagochinoik; ago kagonde inendet eng’ banandanyi tugul che tinyei, agot che kosobe." 
Luke21:5 Ak kingota kong’alali alak agobo hekalut, ole kigimusaganda eng’ koik che kororon ak kagochinoik, kole," 
Luke21:6 Eng’ tuguchu ogeere, ko tun bwanei betusiek, che mang’etune koita agot agenge, baragutab age, ne ma tun kiwirjin ng’ony." 
Luke21:7 Ak kiteebe, kole, Konetindoni, egu anyun tuguchuto auyo? Ak u nee kaborunet ye tun machei korik kosulda tuguchuto?" 
Luke21:8 Ak kile, Oripge si ma kibeetok: amu tun bwanei bik che chang’ eng’ kainennyu, kolen, A inendet; ak, Kagorik betusiek: amosub ichek." 
Luke21:9 Ak ye tun ogas agobo lugosiek ak chemarget, ko mat oarogense: amu kanyol kosib kosulda tuguchoto korok; ago tom korik kagesunet." 
Luke21:10 Kolenji anyun ichek, Tun setyin bororiet age bororiet age, ak setyin bounatet age bounatet age:" 
Luke21:11 ak kobiit botanosiek che eechen che bo ng’ony, ak rubosiek eng’ oldinwek alak, ak korotwek; ak kobiit kamuisosiek ak kaborunoik che eechen che bunu kipsengwet." 
Luke21:12 Ago ye tom kobiit chuto, konamak eng’ eunekwak, ak kousok, ak komutak obe sunagogisiek ak korgorosiek, komutak taitab laitorinik ak bounik agobo kainennyu." 
Luke21:13 Egu baornatet eng’ okwek. 
Luke21:14 Oegu che begechinotin eng’ mugulelwekwok, si mosib ogerer met agobo ole owolundoi:" 
Luke21:15 amu agonok kutit ak ng’omnatet, ne maimuchi bunikwok tugul kota kowol kiy anan kogirindaak." 
Luke21:16 Ak kong’wektak sigikwok, ak che otupche, ak che bo oreng’wong’, ak choronok; ak kebar alak eng’ okwek." 
Luke21:17 Ak kowechok bik tugul agobo kainennyu. 
Luke21:18 Ak mabetei sumeiyot agenge ne bo metowekwok. 
Luke21:19 Ak eng’ muitaeng’wong’ onyoru sobonwekwok. 
Luke21:20 Ak ye tun ogeer lugosiek koyiem Jerusalem, onai anyun ole, kagorik ng’emisiennyi." 
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun chi mi Judea tulonok; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutab nganasanato; ak amat kota koba orit ichek che mi emonoto. 
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun chi mi Judea tulonok; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutab nganasanato; ak amat kota koba orit ichek che mi emonoto. 
Luke21:22 Amu chuto ko betusiekab mugetut, si kobiit kosulda tuguk tugul che kigisir."
