Luke21:23 Bwa eng’ ichek che chio ak che reritos eng’ besiosiechoto! Amu biitu bichiindo ne o eng’ ng’ony, ak nereknatet eng’ bichuto." 
Luke21:24 Ak kobutyo ichek eng’ ng’atibindab rotwetab chok, ak kimut luulenik koba bororiosiek tugul: ak kotiech Bororiosiek Jerusalem, agoi kosulda betusiekab Bororiosiek." 
Luke21:25 Ak kobiit kaborunoik eng’ asista ak eng’ arawet ak eng’ kecheik; ak kobiit eng’ ng’ony bichiindab bororiosiek, ak beng’jinet amu kamuutetab nyanjet ak beek che mildogei;" 
Luke21:26 ak kobek mugulelwekab bik amu kaiyweisiet, ak amu kagenisietab tuguk che bwanjin ng’ony: amu kitumdum kimnatosiekab kipsengwetisiek." 
Luke21:27 Ak eng’ betunoto kogeer anyun Weritab chi konyonei eng’ boldet koboto kimnatet ak lilindo ne o. 
Luke21:28 Ak ye toi kosulda tuguchuto, ogeer barak, ak oyot metowekwok; am karik katiageng’wong’." 
Luke21:29 Ak kimwachi ichek kalewenet; kole, Ogeer mogoiywet, ak ketik tugul:" 
Luke21:30 ye ing’atyo ogeere ak onae okwek ole, karik kesisiet." 
Luke21:31 U noto anyun ak okwek, ye ogeer koyaagis tuguchuto, onai ole karik bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke21:32 Amwawok iman ale, Masiirtoi ibini, agoi kosulda tuguk tugul." 
Luke21:33 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng’ony: ago magoi siirto ng’alekyuk. 
Luke21:34 Ago oripge anyun okwek, si manyi mugulelwekwok keiyandit, ak bogitet, ak kaiimutikab sobetab betusiechu, ak konyonjok betunoto kocheak ko u mestet:" 
Luke21:35 amu u noto tun nyonjin bik tugul che menyei ng’ony komugul. 
Luke21:36 Ago oripge eng’ betut age tugul, ak osae, si kobiit oterterisie, ochilile tuguchuto tugul bwanei, ak otononse eng’ taitab Weritab chi." 
Luke21:37 Ak kiinetisiei eng’ hekalut betut age tugul; ak kimandoi kemout age tugul, kowendi kotebyei eng’ tulwet ne kiguure tulwetab Emitik." 
Luke21:38 Ak kimusyin bik tugul inendet eng’ hekalut, si kobiit kogas inendet." 
Luke22:1 Kirik anyun igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ne kiguure Paska." 
Luke22:2 Ak kicheng’ tisiik che eechen ak sirik ole bartoi inendet; amu kiiywei ichek bik. 
Luke22:3 Ak kichut Setani Judas ne kiguure Iskariot, ne ki age eng’ taman ak aeng’." 
Luke22:4 Ak kiwa kong’alal ak tisiik che eechen ak kiptainik, ole ng’wektochindoi inendet ichek." 
Luke22:5 Kiboiboitu anyun bichoto, ak kochamnyechi kogochi inendet fedaisiek." 
Luke22:6 Kocham anyun inendet, ak kocheng’ boroindo kong’wekyi inendet ichek eng’ ole mami bik che chang’." 
Luke22:7 Ak kiit anyun betut ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, betut ne ki kanyol koeny aruetab paska." 
Luke22:8 Ak kiiyokto Petero ak Johana, kole, Oba ochobwech paska, si kobiit keam." 
Luke22:9 Ak kilenji, Imache kebe kechob eng’ ano?" 
Luke22:10 Ak kilenji ichek, Ogeero, ye omong’ji nganaset, kotuiyenok chito ne ibei teretab beek; osub inendet agoi got orit ole wendi." 
Luke22:11 Ak omwachji chitab kobo got, olenji, Kateebenen Konetindet, kole, Mi ano gotab toek, ole anyone aame paska koboto alamalyennyu?" 
Luke22:12 Koboruok anyun got ne o ne mi barak ne tetotin tuguk: ochob eng’ oloto. 
Luke22:13 Ak kiba anyun, ak konyor ko u ye kaga kemwachi: ak kichob paska." 
Luke22:14 Ak ye kingoit sait, koteb ng’ony, koboto che kiyoktoi." 
Luke22:15 Ak kilenji ichek, Eng’ maget ko koamach aam paskaini kobotok kotom anyalil:" 
Luke22:16 amu amwawok ale, Koboch nguno ko ma aame, agoi kosulda eng’ bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke22:17 Ak kitaach kikombet, ak kingo kagogoito kongoi, kole, Onam ni, ak opchechige okwege:" 
Luke22:18 amu amwawok ale, Koboch nguno, ko ma aee che bo logoekab sabibuk, agoi koit bounatetab Jehovah." 
Luke22:19 Ak kinam makatiat, ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kobutul, ak kogochi ichek, ak kole, Ni bortanyu ne kigoitoi agobo okwek: oyae ko u ni eng’ kabwatet ne obwatena." 
Luke22:20 Ko u noto kikombet agine, kingo kagobata amitwogik che bo lagat, kole, Arorutiet ne leel kikombani eng’ korotikyuk, che kitumdoi agobo okwek." 
Luke22:21 Ago, ogeero, mi eutab inendet ne ng’wektaa kobota eng’ mesani." 
Luke22:22 Amu wendi Weritab chi iman, ko u ye kiging’at: ago bwa eng’ chichoto ng’wektoi inendet!" 
Luke22:23 Ak kitoi anyun koteebegei ichegei, kole ng’o eng’ ichek ne yaei kii." 
Luke22:24 King’eet anyun tiiyet eng’ kwenunywa, kole ng’o ne kiiti kele ne o eng’ ichek." 
Luke22:25 Ak kilenji ichek, Laitorani laitorinik eng’ Bororiosiek: ak icheget che tinyei bounatet eng’ ichek keguure Toretik." 
Luke22:26 Ago, ma u noto eng’ okwek: ago ingoigei ne o eng’ okwek ne ming’in; ak inendet ne o koigei ne otisiei." 
Luke22:27 Ng’o ne o anyun, inendet ne tebyei eng’ amisiet, anan inendet ne otisiei? Tos ma inendet ne tebyei eng’ amisiet? Ago ami kwenung’wong’ ko u chito ne otisiei." 
Luke22:28 Ago okwek ko o che kiotebi kobota eng’ yomsosiekyuk; 
Luke22:29 ak kaagonok bounatet, ko u ye kigogona Baba," 
Luke22:30 si kobiit oamisie ak koeeise mesennyu eng’ bounatennyu, ak tun otebe ng’echerok che bo laitornatet, oruokyini ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo Israel." 
Luke22:31 Simon, Simon, keero, kagosom Setani kole konamak, si kosesak ko u nganok:" 
Luke22:32 ago kiasa agobo inye, si mabek kayaneng’ung’: ak ye kaiwalage, igimit che otupche." 
Luke22:33 Ak kolenji inendet, Kiptaiyandani, kaachoboge kebe tuwai korgoret agot meet." 
Luke22:34 Ak kimwa kole, Amwaun Petero, kotom kote kipsoiywet rani, iesioa konyil somok ile, mengena." 
Luke22:35 Ak kilenji ichek, Kingayoktok ko motinye agot lolet, anan suberet, anan kweonik, ko tos kirarta kiy eng’ okwek? Ak kile, Ma raruech kiy." 
Luke22:36 Ak kilenji, Ago inendet ne tinyei lolet koibot nguno, ak u noto suberet agine: ak inendet ne matinyei rotwetab chok, koalda ngoriennyi, si koale." 
Luke22:37 Amu amwawok ale, kit ne kigisir ko kanyol kosulda eng’ ane, kele, Kigiit inendet koboto kiptengeginik: amu tinyei kagesunet ng’alek che kigisir agobo ane." 
Luke22:38 Ak kile, Kiptaiyandani, keero, mi yu rotokab chok aeng’u. Ak kilenji ichek, Kagoyam." 
Luke22:39 Komong’ sang’ anyun, ak kwo agoi tulwetab Emitik, ko u biteennyi; ak kiisub alamalyet inendet." 
Luke22:40 Ak ye kingo kagoit oloto, kolenji ichek, Osa si mochut yomset." 
Luke22:41 Ak kiistoegei ichek ye te ye itei koita ngewirta; ak kigutuny kosa," 
Luke22:42 kole, Baba, ngicham, iistoena kikombani: ago ma ko u magennyu, ago ingoyaak ko u mageng’ung’." 
Luke22:43 Ak kimong’ji inendet malaikaiyat ne kibunu kipsengwet kogimit inendet. 
Luke22:44 Ak ye kimi inendet nyalilda ne ng’wan, kotes kosa mising’: ak kigergeitu kaotikyik ak korotik che sachin ng’ony." 
Luke22:45 Ak kingong’eet eng’ saennyi, konyo ole mi alamalyennyi, ak konyor koruitos amu arogenet," 
Luke22:46 ak kilenji ichek, Kalya si oruiye? Ong’eetye, osa, si mochut yomset." 
Luke22:47 Ak kingota ko ng’alali, ogeero, tuiyet, koboto inendet ne kiguure Judas, age eng’ taman ak aeng’, kiindoune ichek; ak korikyi inendet Jesu si kong’utut." 
Luke22:48 Ago kilenji Jesu, Judas, ing’wektoi Weritab chi eng’ ng’ututet?" 
Luke22:49 Ak kingogeer che kimi koboto inendet kit ne machei koyaak, kole, Kiptaiyandani, kieb eng’ rotwetab chok?" 
Luke22:50 Ak kieb age eng’ ichek otwogindetab tisiindet ne o, kieb itinnyi ne bo tai." 
Luke22:51 Ago kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Obagakte; kagoyam. Ak kitwa itinnyi, kosoob." 
Luke22:52 Ak kilenji Jesu tisiik che eechen, ak kiptainikab hekalut, ak boisiek che kigabwa kogirinda inendet, Kobwa ak rotokab chok ak siarisiek, ko u ye obwanjini rebindet?" 
Luke22:53 Ye kiami kobotok betut age tugul eng’ hekalut, ko ma oyogocha eunekwok: ago saing’wong’ ni, ak kimnatet ne bo mesundeito." 
Luke22:54 Kinam anyun inendet, ak komut kwo gotab tisiindet ne o. Ak kiisubi Petero eng’ ye loo." 
Luke22:55 Ak ye kiga kolal mat eng’ kok, koteb ng’ony tugul, ak kitebe Petero kwenunywa." 
Luke22:56 Ak kingogeer chepto age inendet kotebyei eng’ ye mi lapkeiyetab mat, kochiilji kong’ inendet, kole, Kimi chichi agine koboto inendet." 
Luke22:57 Ago kitiiyo, kole, Kobogoriondoni, mangen inendet." 
Luke22:58 Ak ne matia kogeer chito age, ak kole, I agenge aginye eng’ ichek. Ak kile Petero, Chichi, ma bo bichoto." 
Luke22:59 Ak ye kingogesgei olo bo sait agenge, kole chito age eng’ kimnatet, Iman kimi chichi agine koboto inendet: amu Galilindet inendet." 
Luke22:60 Ago kile Petero, Chichi, mangen cho imwae. Ak kota komwaei, kote kipsoiywet ngunoto." 
Luke22:61 Ak kiwelelgei anyun Kiptaiyat, ak kogeer Petero. Ak kiibwat Petero ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, ko u ye kaga komwachi, kole, Kotom kote kipsoiywet rani, iesioa konyil somok." 
Luke22:62 Ak kimanda sang’, kwo korir eng’ ng’wanindo." 
Luke22:63 Ak kichombil bik Jesu che kinamei inendet, ak kobir." 
Luke22:64 Ak kituch konyekyik, ak koteebe, kole, Ng’orse: ng’o ne kamasin?" 
Luke22:65 Ak kimwa ng’alek alak che chang’ che yaachen agobo inendet, kochurachuri inendet." 
Luke22:66 Ak kingo kagoeech, koyumgei boisiekab bichoto, tisiik che eechen ak sirik; ak kiimut inendet kwo kapkiruogenywa, kole," 
Luke22:67 Ngo i Kristo, imwawech. Ago kilenji ichek, Agot ndamwawok, ko moyani:" 
Luke22:68 ak ngot ateebenak, ko mowolu." 
Luke22:69 Ago koboch nguno kotebe Weritab chi eutab tai ne bo kamuktaet ne bo Jehovah. 
Luke22:70 Ak kile ichek tugul, Tos i Weritab Jehovah anyun? Kolenji ichek, Omwae ole a inendet." 
Luke22:71 Ak kile ichek, Ta kemage nee baornatet age? Amu kagegas acheget eng’ kutinnyi." 
Luke23:1 King’eetyo anyun tuiyet komugul, ak komutyi inendet Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Ak kitoi anyun kotaam inendet, kole, Kiginyoru chichi komaasi bororiennyo, ak koetei kigochi Kaisari kodi, ak komwaei inendet kole, A Kristo laitoriat." 
Luke23:3 Ak kiteebe inendet Pilato, kole, I laitoriatab Yahudik? Ak kiwolji kole, Kaimwa." 
Luke23:4 Ak kilenji Pilato tisiik che eechen ak tuiyosiek, Ma anyorji lelutiet chichi." 
Luke23:5 Ago kiisimji mising’, kole, Kiinde chaamset bik, konetoti eng’ Judea komugul, kotoune Galili agoi koit oli." 
Luke23:5 Ago kiisimji mising’, kole, Kiinde chaamset bik, konetoti eng’ Judea komugul, kotoune Galili agoi koit oli." 
Luke23:6 Ago kingogas Pilato ng’olyondonoto, koteeb kole, Tos Galilindet chichi?" 
Luke23:7 Ak kingonai kole bo bounatet ne bo Herod, koyokto kimutyi Herod, ne kimi agine Jerusalem betusiechoto." 
Luke23:8 Kingogeer Herod Jesu, kobaibait mising’: amu kimachei koboch keny kogeer inendet, amu kiga kogas tuguk che chang’ agobo inendet; ak kimachei kogeer kwong’utiet age koyaak eng’ inendet." 
Luke23:9 Ak kiteepse inendet eng’ ng’alek che chang’; ago ma wolji kiy. 
Luke23:10 Ak kitonondos tisiik che eechen ak sirik, ak kotaam inendet eng’ kimnatet." 
Luke23:11 Ak kiiming’in inendet Herod ak askarikyik, ak kochombil, ak kolaakyi ngoriet ne kararan mising’ ak koweekyi Pilato kogeny." 
Luke23:12 Ak kiek choronoi Herod ak Pilato eng’ betunoto: amu kita kosurtos ichegei eng’ tai. 
Luke23:13 Kiguur anyun Pilato tisiik che eechen ak bounik koboto bik kobwa tugul," 
Luke23:14 ak kilenji ichek, Komutwa chichi, ak komwa ole imaasi bik: ak ogeero, kaatebe anendet eng’ taing’wong’, ak ma anyorji chichi lelutiet eng’ ng’alechato otaame inendet:" 
Luke23:15 achicha, agot Herod agine; amu kaweekwech inendet; ak ogeero, ma yai kiy inendet ne nyoljin meet." 
Luke23:16 Noto anyun, abire inendet, si atiach." 
Luke23:17 Amu ki ng’atutiet kotiakyi agenge eng’ betutab igorta. 
Luke23:18 Ago kibolyo tugul, kole, Iste chichi, ak itiakwech Baraba:" 
Luke23:19 ne kiga kitoorji korgoret, amu chaamset ne kiyai eng’ nganaset, ak rumisiet." 
Luke23:20 Ak king’alalji Pilato icheget kogeny, komachei kotiach Jesu;" 
Luke23:21 ago kibolyo ichek, kole, Igartat eng’ kimurtoiyot, igartat inendet eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Luke23:22 Ak kimwachi ichek ne bo somok, kolenji, Kalya, nee yaitiet ne kiyai chichi? Ma anyorji ng’olyot inendet ne nyoljin kome: noto anyun abire inendet si atiach." 
Luke23:23 Ago kites kobolyo mising’, komachei kole kigartat. Ak kiiterteris kutuswekwak." 
Luke23:24 Ak kitil anyun Pilato kiruoget koyaak ko u ye kimach ichek. 
Luke23:25 Ak kiitiach inendet ne kiga kitoorji korgoret agobo chaamset ak rumisiet, ne kaga kosom ichek; ago kiigoito inendet Jesu si kobiit koyachi ko u ye kimachei." 
Luke23:26 Ak kingota komuti inendet, konam Simon, Kurenindet, ne kibunu koret age, ak kosutyi kimurtoiyot, si kobiit koib kosubi Jesu." 
Luke23:27 Ak kiisubi tuiyet ne o ne bo bik, koboto kobogorisiek che kiiteiyoti ak korirjinoti inendet." 
Luke23:28 Ago kiweleljigei Jesu ichek kolenji, Tibikab Jerusalem, amoririe agobo ane, ago orirjige, ak lagokwok." 
Luke23:29 Amu, ogeero, bwanei betusiek, che tun len ichek, Kiberuri sonotinwek, ak mootinwek che ma iiyo, ak kinaik che ma kireri." 
Luke23:30 Yeityo kotoi ichek kolenji tulonok, Oluuljech; ak kolenji tulonok che mengech, Otuchech." 
Luke23:31 Amu ngot koyai tuguchu eng’ ketit ne tuon, koteptoi ano anyun eng’ ne yaamat?" 
Luke23:32 Ak kimitei kiptengeginik aeng’u, che kigimuti koboto inendet, koba kebar." 
Luke23:33 Ak kingoit ye kiguure Terta, ko yoto ole kigigartate inendet ak kiptengeginichoto, age eng’ komostab tai ak age eng’ komostab katam." 
Luke23:34 Ak kile Jesu, Baba, nyochi kaat ichek; amu ma nai kit ne yaei. Ak kipchechigei ngoroikyik, eng’ seretab barbarek." 
Luke23:35 Ak kitonondos bik kogeerei. Ak kororechi inendet bounik kole, Kisoru alak; ingosorgei ibak, ngo Kristo nito, ne lewenot ne bo Jehovah." 
Luke23:36 Ak kichurachur agichek askarik inendet, kobwanei ye mi inendet, kogochin siki," 
Luke23:37 kolen, Ngo i Laitoriatab Yahudik, isoruge." 
Luke23:38 Ak kimi sirutik metinnyi barak, che mwaei kolen, NI KO LAITORIAT NE BO YAHUDIK." 
Luke23:39 Ak kichurachur inendet age eng’ kiptengeginichoto kiga kigartat, kole, Tos ma i Kristo inye? Soruge ak isoruech ak achek." 
Luke23:40 Ago kiwol age, ak koger kong’ kole, Meiywei Jehovah, agot inye, ak imi kagikyinonoto?" 
Luke23:41 Ago bo iman nenyo; amu kagigonech ko u boisionikyok: ago ma yai chichi kiy ne ma nyolu. 
Luke23:42 Ak kile, Jesu, ibwata ye tun inyone eng’ bounateng’ung’." 
Luke23:43 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Amwaun iman, ale, Kitebye tuwai rani eng’ Paradis." 
Luke23:44 Ak ki olo bo sait lo, koimenit emet komugul agoi sait sogol," 
Luke23:45 ak kima kota koluu asista: ak kigerer kwenutab anget ne kiga kioiye ole tilil. 
Luke23:46 Ak kitwek Jesu eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Baba, kande tamirmiriennyu euneguk: ak kingo kagomwa ni, kogoito tamirmiriet." 
Luke23:47 Ak kingogeer kiptaiyatab bogol tuguk che kayaagis, kolos Jehovah, kole, Koga bo iman chichi." 
Luke23:48 Ak kingogeer tuguk che kayaagis tuiyosiek tugul che kiga koyumgei si korat setio, koweeigei kolugotegei tegetik." 
Luke23:49 Ak kitonondos eng’ ye loo tugul che kiingengei, ak kobogorisiek che kiisubu inendet kobunu Galili, kole si kogeer tuguchuto." 
Luke23:50 Ak ogeero, chito ne kigiguure Josep, chitab kapkiruok, chito ne mie, ak ko bo imanda" 
Luke23:51 (ak kima kochamei chichoto kiruogenywa ak boisienywa), ki bo Arimatea inendet, nganaset ne bo Yahudik, ne kiigeni agine bounatetab Jehovah:" 
Luke23:52 kiwa chichito ole mi Pilato, kwo kosom bortab Jesu." 
Luke23:53 Kochoor konyo ng’ony, ak kotaae anget ne bo katanit, ak konde kererit ne kigibal ruandet, ne kitom ketupchi chi." 
Luke23:54 Ak ki betutab Chobet, ak kiga rik sabato." 
Luke23:55 Ak kiisubu kobogorisiek, che kigabwa koboto inendet kobunu Galili, ak kogeer kererit, ak ole kigindoitoi bortanyi." 
Luke23:56 Ak kiweeigei, koba kochob nyamdutik ak mwanik. Ak kiimuuny eng’ betutab sabato ko u ng’atutiet." 
Luke24:1 Ak eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo wigit, ko kaeech emet, kobwa kererit, koibu nyamdutik che kiga kochob." 
Luke24:2 Ak kinyor ko kagemilda koita eng’ kererit. 
Luke24:3 Ak kiba orit, amanyor bortab Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
Luke24:4 Ak kingab kagerer met agobo noto, ogeero, kitonondos eng’ ye negit ichek murenik aeng’u che tinyei ngoroik che lilei bich:" 
Luke24:5 ak kingoiyweis, kong’uruk, kotiing’e togochikwak ng’ony, kolenji ichek, Amu nee si ocheng’e ne sobei eng’ oldab che kigobek?" 
Luke24:6 Ma komi yu, ago kagong’eet: obwat kit ne kimwawok kota komi Galili," 
Luke24:7 kolen kanyol kinde eunekab bikab tengek Weritab chi, ak kigartat, ak kong’eet eng’ betutab somok." 
Luke24:8 Kobwat anyun ng’alekyik," 
Luke24:9 ak koweektagei eng’ kererit, ak komwachi taman ak agenge, ak chun tugul alak." 
Luke24:10 Ki Maria Magdalene, ak Joana, ak Maria kametab Jakobo, ak kobogorisiek alak che kimi koboto ichek, che kimwachi che kiyoktoi tuguchoto." 
Luke24:11 Ak kigeer bichoto ng’alechato ko u tangoi; ak kima iyan ichek. 
Luke24:12 Ago king’eet Petero, ak kolabat kererit; kiing’uruk koiit orit, kogeer ngoroik ichegei; ak kwo, kokwong’oti agobo tuguk che kagoyagis." 
Luke24:13 Ak ogeero, kibendi aeng’u eng’ icheget betunoto nganaset age ne kiguure Emau, ne ki bandab maelisiek tisab ak nusu kong’eete Jerusalem." 
Luke24:14 Ak king’alaljinotegei agobo ng’alechuto tugul koyaagis. 
Luke24:15 Ak kingota kong’alaljinotegei ak koteebegei, korikyi Jesu ichek ak koba tugul." 
Luke24:16 Ago kigerogis konyekwak si manai inendet. 
Luke24:17 Ak kilenji ichek, Nee ng’alechu omwachinotige okwege obendi? Ak kitononso, kosiriny togochikwak." 
Luke24:18 Ak kiwolji age eng’ ichek, ne keguure Kleopa, kolenji, Tos i too inye eng’ Jerusalem si menai tuguk che koyaagis eng’ oloto eng’ betusiechu?" 
Luke24:19 Ak kilenji ichek, Nee tuguchoto? Ak kilenji, Tuguk che kiyaak agobo Jesu ne bo Nasaret ne ki maotiot ne kim eng’ boisiet ak ng’olyot eng’ taitab Jehovah and eng’ bik tugul:" 
Luke24:20 ak ko u ole kiigoito tisiik che eechen ak bounikyok si kiruokyi kiruoget ne bo meet, ak kigartat." 
Luke24:21 Ago kogimang’u kelen inendet ne itiachi Israel. Ee, ak koboto choto tugul ko betutab somok rani koboch ngab kobata ng’alechuto." 
Luke24:22 Ak kagonech kobogorisiek alak che kagimi tugul kekwong’, che kaga musta kererit;" 
Luke24:23 ak ye kamata konyor bortanyi, kobwa, kole, kamong’ji ichek malaikaisiek, che kamwa kole, sobei inendet." 
Luke24:24 Ak kaba alak kererit che kami kobotech, konyor ko u noto ko u ye kaga mwa kobogorisiek: ago ma keer inendet." 
Luke24:25 Ak kilenji anyun bichoto, Ee, che berberen, ak ko tamusen mugulelwek kot ko mata koyan tuguk tugul che kimwa maotik!" 
Luke24:26 Kima nyolji Kristo konyalil eng’ tuguchu, si komong’ji torornatennyi?" 
Luke24:27 Ak kitoi koboch Musa ak maotik tugul, ak kiiarorji ichek eng’ sirutik tugul ng’alek agobo inendet." 
Luke24:28 Ak kingorikta nganaset ole kibendi koigei inendet ne machei kosiirto. 
Luke24:29 Ak kiisimji, kole, Tebi kobotech: amu karikta koimen, ak machei koratarat. Ak kiwa go kotebi tugul." 
Luke24:30 Ak ye kingo kagotebi ng’ony tugul koamisiei, konam makatiat, koberur, kobutul, ak kogochi ichek." 
Luke24:31 Ak kiyatogis konyekwak, ak konai inendet; kobetito eng’ tainywa." 
Luke24:32 Ak kilenjigei ichegei, Tos kama lal mat eng’ mugulelwekyok, yu kang’alalwech eng’ oret, kong’ang’wech sirutik?" 
Luke24:33 Ak king’eetyo eng’ sainato, koweektagei Jerusalem, ak kinyor taman ak agenge ko katuiyo, ak che kimi koboto ichek," 
Luke24:34 kole, Kang’eet Kiptaiyat iman, ak kang’ang’jigei Simon." 
Luke24:35 Ak kimwachi ng’alek che kayaak eng’ oret, ak ko u ye kagonyit inendet kobutuli makatiat." 
Luke24:36 Ak kingota komwaei tuguchu, kotonon inendet eng’ kwenunywa, ak kolenji ichek, Ingoteb kalyet eng’ okwek." 
Luke24:37 Ago kiarogenso ak koiyweis, ak kilen kageer tamirmir." 
Luke24:38 Ak kilenji ichek, Koarogenji nee? Ak amu nee si kong’eetyo kererwekab met eng’ mugulelwekwok?" 
Luke24:39 Ogeer eunekyuk ak kelyekyuk, ole a inendet: osapsaba, ak ogeer; amu matinyei tamirmiriet borto ak kowek, ko u yu ogeere atinye." 
Luke24:40 Ak ye kiga komwa ni, koborji eunekyik ak kelyekyik." 
Luke24:41 Ak kingo tom koyan ichek amu boiboiyet, ak kwong’et, kolenji, Otinye eng’ yu kiy ne kiamei?" 
Luke24:42 Ak kiigochi kebebertab njiriot ne kagiwatan. 
Luke24:43 Ak kinam ak koam eng’ tainywa. 
Luke24:44 Ak kilenji ichek, Chu ko ng’alekyuk che kigamwawok, ye kingota ami kobotok, ko u ye kanyol kosulda tuguk tugul, che kigisir eng’ Ng’atutik che bo Musa, ak eng’ maotik, ak eng’ tienwogikab kalosunet, agobo ane." 
Luke24:45 Koyat anyun ng’omnatosiekwak, si kobiit konai sirutik;" 
Luke24:46 ak kilenji ichek, Kigisir ko u noto, kele, nyoljin Kristo konyalil, ak kong’eet kogeny eng’ che kigobek eng’ betutab somok;" 
Luke24:47 ak keamdaat eng’ bororiosiek tugul sigunet ak nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik eng’ kainennyi, kitaune Jerusalem." 
Luke24:48 O baorinikab tuguchuto. 
Luke24:49 Ak ogeero, ayogu kayomisetab Baba kotebi eng’ okwek: ago otebi okwek eng’ nganaset, agoi kilaakwok kimnatet ne bunu barak." 
Luke24:50 Ak kiindochi ichek agoi koit Betania: ak kinamji barak eunekyik, ak koberur ichek." 
Luke24:51 Ak kingota koberuri ichek, kobesiegei anyun, ak kigimut kwo kipsengwet." 
Luke24:52 Ak kiilos inendet, ak koweektagei Jerusalem eng’ boiboindo ne o:" 
Luke24:53 ak kimi kotugul hekalut, kolosu Jehovah." 
John1:1 Eng’ taunet ko kimi Ng’olyondet, ak kimi Ng’olyondet ak Jehovah, ak ki Jehovah Ng’olyondet." 
John1:2 Kimi inendet ak Jehovah eng’ taunet. 
John1:3 Kigiyai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet; ak kima kiyai kiy age tugul ne kiga keyai ne kima yai inendet. 
John1:4 Kimi sobondo eng’ inendet; ak ki lapkeiyetab bik sobonato. 
John1:5 Amu iluu lapkeiyet eng’ mesundeito; ak kima iterter mesundeito lapkeiyonoto. 
John1:6 Kinyo chi, ne kiiyok Jehovah, ne kigiguure Johana." 
John1:7 Kinyo chichoto koek baoriat, si kobaorianji lapkeiyet, si kobiit koyan bik tugul amu inendet." 
John1:8 Kima ko lapkeiyonoto inendet, ago kinyo si kobaorianji lapkeiyonoto." 
John1:9 Kimi lapkeiyet ne bo iman, ne nyonei ng’ony, ne iluuchin chi tugul." 
John1:10 Kimi ng’ony inendet, ak kigiyai ng’ony eng’ inendet, ak kima nai ng’ony inendet." 
John1:11 Kinyonji chechik, ak kima taach inendet bikyik." 
John1:12 Ago tugul che kitaach inendet, ko kiigochi kamuget koek lagokab Jehovah, ichek che iyani kainennyi:" 
John1:13 che kigisich, ama eng’ korotik, anan eng’ magetab borto, anan eng’ magetab chi, ago eng’ Jehovah." 
John1:14 Ak kiek Ng’olyot borto, ak komeny kwenunnyo (ak kigigeer torornatennyi, torornatet ne u ne bo ne kigii inegei kobunu Kwanda), ko nyiitat mieindo ak imanit." 
John1:15 Kibaorianji inendet Johana, koititen kole, Inendet ni ne kiamwaitoi ale, Inendet ne isubwa koegu ne bo tai eng’ ane, amu ki bo tai inendet eng’ ane." 
John1:16 Amu kigitaach achek tugul che bo nyiiennyi, ak mieindo eng’ mieindo." 
John1:17 Amu kigigon Ng’atutiet eng’ Musa; kibwa mieindo ak imanit eng’ Jesu Kristo. 
John1:18 Mami chi ne kigeer Jehovah ole kigoi; kigong’ang’wech inendet Werit ne kigii inegei, ne mi tegetab Kwanda." 
John1:19 Ak ni ko baornatetab Johana, ye kingoyok Yahudik tisiik ak Lawik eng’ Jerusalem koba koteebe kole, I ng’o inye?" 
John1:20 Ak king’any inendet, ama tiiyo; king’any kole, Ma a Kristo ane." 
John1:21 Ak kiteebe inendet kole, Nee anyun? I Elija? Ak kile, Ma a inendet. I maotiondonoto? Ak kiwol kole, Achicha." 
John1:22 Kilenji anyun inendet, I ng’o inye? Si kobiit kewolji che koiyokwech. Imwae nee agobo inyege?" 
John1:23 Kile, A kutitab chi ne ititeni eng’ surkwen, Olitit oretab Kiptaiyat, ko u ye kimwa maotiot Isaia." 
John1:24 Ak icheget che kigiyok ko ki bo Parisaik. 
John1:25 Ak kiteebe inendet, kolenji, Kalya anyun si ibatisanisiei, ngo ma i Kristo, anan Elija, anan maotiondonoto?" 
John1:26 Kowolji Johana bichoto kolenji, Abatisanisie beek: ago tononi eng’ kwenung’wong’ age ne mongen," 
John1:27 inendet ne isubwa, ne manyoljina atiach anokab kweonikyik." 
John1:28 Kiyaogis tuguchuto eng’ Betania Jordan komosin, ole kiibatisanisie Johana." 
John1:29 Eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kogeer Johana Jesu konyonjin, ak kole, Ogeero, Aruet ne bo Jehovah, ne ibei tengektab ng’ony!" 
John1:30 Inendet ni ne kiamwa ale, Isubwa chito ne egu ne tai eng’ ane: amu ki bo tai eng’ ane." 
John1:31 Ak kima angen ane inendet; ago si kobiit kibarta inendet eng’ Israel, kianyo anyun amu noto abatisane beek." 
John1:32 Ak kibaorian Johana, kole, Kiageer Tamirmiriet kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet ko u cheptuget; ak kotebe inendet." 
John1:33 Ak kima angen inendet: ago inendet ne kiiyokwa abatisane beek, ko inendet ne kimwawa kolenja, Chichoto igeere kochorjingei Tamirmiriet, ak kotebe inendet, ko noto ne ibatisane Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
John1:34 Ak kiageer, ak kiabaorian ale nito ko Weritab Jehovah." 
John1:35 Kogeny eng’ betut ne kiisubu betunoto, ko kitononi Johana, ak aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi;" 
John1:36 ak kigeerot inendet Jesu kowendoti, ak kole, Ogeero, Aruet ne bo Jehovah!" 
John1:37 Ak kigas choto aeng’ che bo alamalyennyi kong’alali inendet, ak kosub Jesu." 
John1:38 Ak kiwelelgei Jesu, ak kogeer ichek kosubu, ak kolenji, Ocheng’e nee? Ak kilenji inendet, Rabbi (ye kiweech kele, Konetindet), imenye ano?" 
John1:39 Kolenji ichek, Obwa si ogeer. Kibwa anyun kogeer ole menyei, ak kitebi koboto inendet betunoto; ki olo bo sait taman." 
John1:40 Ki Andrea, ne tupcho ak Simon Petero, age eng’ choto aeng’ che kigasei kong’alali Johana, ak kiisub inendet." 
John1:41 Kisib konyor Simon ne tupcho, ak kolenji, Kagenyoru Mesia (ye kiweech, ko Kristo)." 
John1:42 Kiimutyi inendet Jesu. Kigeer Jesu inendet, ak kole, I Simon weritab Johana: ta keguurenen Kepa (ye kiweech, ko Petero)." 
John1:43 Kimach anyun kwo Galili eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto, ak kinyor Pilipu: ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Isubwa." 
John1:44 Ak ki bo Pilipu Betsaida, nganaset ne bo Andrea ak Petero." 
John1:45 Kinyor Pilipu Natanael, ak kolenji, Kagenyoru inendet, ne kisir Musa eng’ Ng’atutiet, ak maotik, Jesu ne bo Nasaret, weritab Josep." 
John1:46 Ak kilenji Natanael, Tos imuchi kobun Nasaret kiy age tugul ne mie? Kolenji Pilipu inendet, Nyo si igeer." 
John1:47 Kigeer Jesu Natanael konyonei ole mi inendet, ak kole agobo inendet, Ogeero, Israelindet iman, ne matinyei ng’alset!" 
John1:48 Kolenji Natanael inendet, Kenaena nee? Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Kageerin, ye kemi mogoiywet kel, kotom koguurin Pilipu." 
John1:49 Kowolji Natanael kole, Rabbi, i Weritab Jehovah; i Laitoriatab Israel." 
John1:50 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Iyani amu kamwaun ale, kaagerin ye kemi mogoiywet kel? Tatun igeere tuguk che eechen che siirei chu." 
John1:51 Ak kilenji, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Tatun ogeere kipsengwet koyatoksei, ak kotogostoi malaikaisiek che bo Jehovah ak kochorjigei Weritab chi." 
John2:1 Ak kimi katunisiet eng’ betut ne bo somok eng’ Kana ne bo Galili; ak kimi oloto kametab Jesu: 
John2:2 ak kiga kiguurji katunisiet Jesu agine, koboto alamalyennyi." 
John2:3 Ak ye kingorar divaik, kolenji kametab Jesu inendet, Ma kotinyei divaik." 
John2:4 Ak kilenji Jesu inendet, Chebiosoni, kiting’ege nee ak inye? Tom koit sainnyu." 
John2:5 Kolenji kamet otwogik, Kiy age tugul ne kamwawok, oyai." 
John2:6 Ak kimi oloto terenik lo che eechen che bo beek, che bo koik, ko u biteetab katililetab Yahudik; kiyamei age tugul debeisiek mut anan ko lo." 
John2:7 Kolenji Jesu ichek, Onyiit beek terenichoto. Kiinyiit anyun mising’." 
John2:8 Ak kilenji, Osiilu nguno, ak oipchi bounindetab igorta. Ak kiipchi anyun." 
John2:9 Ak ye kingochamjam bounindetab igorta beek che kagoek divaik, ama nai ole kabunu (ago kiingen otwogik che kasiilei beek), koguur bounindonoto sandet," 
John2:10 ak kolenji, Igoitoi chi tugul divaik che miach korok; ak ye kagoee bik mising’, kogon che ma miach: kaigonor divaik che miach agoi nguno." 
John2:11 Taunet nito ne bo kaborunoikyik ne kiyai Jesu eng’ Kana ne bo Galili, ak kiibortoi torornatennyi; ak kiiyan inendet alamalyennyi." 
John2:12 Kingobata nito, kochortagei Kapernaum, koboto kamet, ak che tupcho, ak alamalyennyi: ak kibeni oloto betusiek che matia." 
John2:13 Ak kiga rik paska ne bo Yahudik, ak kitogosta Jesu Jerusalem." 
John2:14 Ak kinyor kotebei eng’ hekalut che kialdoi eik ak kechirek ak cheptugenik, ak walikab siling’isiek:" 
John2:15 ak kiyai kipcharitit ne bo rogoonik che kisach, ak koon tugul komanda eng’ hekalut, koboto kechirek ak eik; ak koranda siling’isiek che bo walik, ak kogabui mesosiekwak;" 
John2:16 ak kilenji icheget che kialdoi cheptugenik, Oib tuguchu koba eng’ oli; amoyai gotab Baba koek ole kiyae mung’aret." 
John2:17 Kiibwat anyun alamalyennyi kole kigisir kele, Ama ng’etkonda agobo gong’ung’." 
John2:18 Kiwolji anyun Yahudik kolenji, Iboruech kaborunet ngoro, amu iyae tuguchu?" 
John2:19 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Ong’em hekaluni, si ang’eet kogeny eng’ betusiek somok." 
John2:20 Kile anyun Yahudik, Kigiteech hekaluni eng’ kenyisiek artam ak lo, ak ing’eeti inye eng’ betusiek somok?" 
John2:21 Ago king’alali inendet agobo hekalut ne noto ko bortanyi. 
John2:22 Ye kinging’eet anyun inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek, kobwat alamalyennyi kole kiga komwa ng’olyondonito; ak kiiyan sirutiet, ak ng’olyot ne kiga mwa Jesu." 
John2:23 Ye kimi Jerusalem eng’ paska, komi igorta, koyan bik che chang’, kainennyi, kogeerei kaborunoikyik che kiyai." 
John2:24 Ago kima chamdagei Jesu, amu kiingen bik tugul," 
John2:25 ak amu kima komage kiy chi ne baoriani agobo chi age; amu kiingen inendet kit ne mi chi orit. 
John3:1 Kimi chi ne bo Parisaik, ne kigiguure Nikodemo, ki bounindet ne bo Yahudik:" 
John3:2 kinyo chichoto ole mi inendet kemoi, ak kolenji, Rabbi, kingen kele i konetindet ne bunu Jehovah: amu mami chi ne imuchi koyai kaborunoichu iyae inye, ngo mami Jehovah koboto inendet." 
John3:3 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, Ngot ko ma kisich chi eng’ siget ne leel, ko magoi imuch kogeer bounatetab Jehovah." 
John3:4 Kolenji Nikodemo inendet, Kisiktoi ano chi ye kagoosit? Imuchi kogetyigei moetab kamet kogeny, ak kesich?" 
John3:5 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, Ngot ko ma kisich chi eng’ beek ak Tamirmiriet, ko magoi imuch komong’ji bounatetab Jehovah." 
John3:6 Ne kigisich eng’ borto ko borto; ak ne kigisich eng’ Tamirmiriet ko tamirmiriet. 
John3:7 Amekwong’ amu kamwaun ale, Kanyol kesichok eng’ siget ne leel." 
John3:8 Usyin koristo ole machei, ak igase cheennyi, ago mengen ole bunu, anan ole wendi: ko u noto chi age tugul ne kagisich eng’ Tamirmiriet." 
John3:9 Kowolji Nikodemo kolenji, Imuchi kobiitunda ano tuguchu?" 
John3:10 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, I konetindetab Israel, ameguitosi tuguchu?" 
John3:11 Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, Kimwae ne kingen, ak kebaorianjini ne kagegeer; amotaache baornatennyo." 
John3:12 Ngamwawok tuguk che bo ng’ony, amoyani, omuktoi ano ogan ngamwawok tuguk che bo kipsengwet?" 
John3:13 Mami chi ne kitogosta kipsengwet, kobate inendet ne kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet, inendet ko Weritab chi ne mi kipsengwet." 
John3:14 Ak ko u ye kiigartat Musa erenet eng’ ong’atet, kigartoti ko u noto Weritab chi matiny:" 
John3:15 si konyor sobondab koigeny eng’ inendet age tugul ne iyani. 
John3:16 Amu kicham Jehovah ng’ony mising, kot kogoito Werinnyi ne kigii inegei, si malus age tugul ne iyani inendet, ago si konyor sobondab koigeny." 
John3:17 Amu kima iyokyi Jehovah Werit ng’ony koruokyi ng’ony; ago si kesor ng’ony eng’ inendet. 
John3:18 Magiruokyin chi ne iyani inendet: ago inendet ne maiyani, ko kagiruokyi, amu ma iyan eng’ kainetab Weritab Jehovah ne kigii inegei." 
John3:19 Ak ni kiruoget, amu kinyonji ng’ony lapkeiyet, ak kicham bik mesundeito kosiir lapkeiyet; amu ki yaach boisionikwak." 
John3:20 Amu wechei lapkeiyet chi tugul ne yaei yaitio, ama nyonei inendet ole mi lapkeiyet, si mang’ang’ogis boisionikyik." 
John3:21 Ago nyonei ole mi lapkeiyet inendet ne yaei imanda, si kobiit kibarta boisionikyik, kele kigiyai eng’ Jehovah." 
John3:22 Kingobata tuguchu konyo Jesu ak alamalyennyi emet ne kiguure Judea; ak kibeni oloto koboto ichek, ak kobatisanis." 
John3:22 Kingobata tuguchu konyo Jesu ak alamalyennyi emet ne kiguure Judea; ak kibeni oloto koboto ichek, ak kobatisanis." 
John3:23 Ak kibatisanisiei Johana agine eng’ Aenon ne negite Salim, amu kimi beek che chang’ oloto: ak kibwa bik, ak kigibatisan." 
John3:24 Amu kitom ketoorji Johana korgoret. 
John3:25 Kibiit anyun teebutiet eng’ alak che bo alamalyetab Johana ak Yahudiot agobo katililet. 
John3:26 Ak kibwanji Johana, ak kolenji, Rabbi, ibatisanisiei inendet ne kimi koboten eng’ Jordan komosin, ne kiibaorian agobo inendet, ak bwanjin inendet bik tugul." 
John3:27 Kowol Johana kole, Magoi imuch chi kotaach kiy, ngo ma kigochi eng’ kipsengwet." 
John3:28 Kiobaorianja okweget kole, kiamwa ale, Ma a Kristo, ago olen kigiyokwa andoune inendet." 
John3:29 Sandet inendet ne tinyei mureret: ago baibai mising’ choruetab sandet, ne tononi koepchin it inendet, amu kutitab sandet: isuldaat anyun boiboiyoninyu." 
John3:30 Nyoljin inendet koeet ne matiny, ago aming’initu." 
John3:31 O inendet ne bunu barak kosiir tugul: inendet ne bo ng’ony ko bo ng’ony, ak ng’alali che bo ng’ony: inendet ne bunu kipsengwet ko o kosiir tugul." 
John3:32 Baorianjin inendet kit ne kigogeer ak ne kigogas; ama mi chi ne taachei baornatennyi. 
John3:33 Inendet ne kagotaach baornatennyi ko kagonde ng’oksennyi, kole bo iman Jehovah." 
John3:34 Amu ng’alali ng’alekab Jehovah inendet ne kiiyogu Jehovah; amu magonu inendet Tamirmiriet eng’ karogendoet. 
John3:35 Chamei Kwanda Werit, ak kigonde tuguk tugul eunnyi." 
John3:36 Tinyei sobondab koigeny ne iyani Werit; ama keerei sobondo ne magase it Werit, ago tebe neregekab Jehovah baragunnyi." 
John4:1 Ye kingonai Kiptaiyat kole kigogas Parisaik kole kiyaei Jesu bik koek alamalyet ak kobatisani che siirei che kiibatisan Johana 
John4:2 (ago ma Jesu inendet ne kiibatisanisiei, ago alamalyennyi)," 
John4:3 kong’eet eng’ Judea, kwo kogeny Galili." 
John4:3 kong’eet eng’ Judea, kwo kogeny Galili." 
John4:4 Ak ki kanyol kobun Samaria. 
John4:5 Kiit anyun nganaset ne bo Samaria, ne kiguure Sukar, ne negite koret ne kiigochi Jakobo werinnyi Josep:" 
John4:6 ak kimi oloto keringetab beek ne bo Jakobo. Kitebyei anyun Jesu eng’ ye negite keringetab beek, amu ng’etatetab bandanyi. Ki olo bo sait lo." 
John4:7 Kinyo kobogoriot ne bo Samaria kosiil beek: kolenji Jesu, Inaga aee." 
John4:8 Amu kigaba alamalyennyi nganaset koal amitwogik. 
John4:9 Kilenji anyun kobogoriot ne bo Samaria, Katepto ano si isoma beek che iee, ak inye ko i Yahudiot, ak ane ko a kobogoriotab Samaria? (Amu manamegei Yahudik ak Samarik.)" 
John4:10 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Nda kengen konunetab Jehovah, ak inendet ne kalenjin, Inaga beek aee; ta kaisom inendet, ak ta kagogonin beekab sobon." 
John4:11 Kolenji kobogoriot, Kiptaiyandani, metinye kit ne isiile, ak loo keringet: inyorjini ano anyun beechoto bo sobon?" 
John4:12 I o inye eng’ kwandanyo Jakobo, ne kigonech keringoni, ne kiee inendet, ak werikyik, ak tukyik?" 
John4:13 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Age tugul ne eei beechu ko ta koamei melel kogeny:" 
John4:14 ago age tugul ne eei beek che agochini ko ma koamei melel agoi; ago egu beek che agochini kondab beek eng’ inendet, che kutu agoi sobondab koigeny." 
John4:15 Kolenji kobogoriot, Kiptaiyandani, inaga beechoto, si ma koama melel, si ma anyone asiile beek eng’ oli loo." 
John4:16 Kolenji Jesu kobogoriondonoto, Ui, iguur manong’otiondeng’ung’, ak obwa yuto." 
John4:17 Kowolji kobogoriot kolenji, Matinye manong’otiot. Kolenji Jesu, Kaimwa komie ile, Matinye manong’otiot:" 
John4:18 amu kiotebi ak manong’otaik mut; ak inendet ne omi tuwai nguno ko ma manong’otiondeng’ung’: kaimwa anyun iman nito. 
John4:19 Kolenji kobogoriot, Kiptaiyandani, kaageer ale i maotio." 
John4:20 Kisaei kwanisiekyok eng’ tulwoni; ak olen okwek, Jerusalem ole kanyol kosae bik." 
John4:21 Kolenji Jesu, Kobogoriondoni, iyana, nyonei sait, ye ma kosae Kwanda eng’ tulwoni, anan eng’ Jerusalem." 
John4:22 Osae ne mongen: kisae achek ne kingen: amu bunu yetunet Yahudik. 
John4:23 Ago nyonei sait, ak kagoit nguno, ye saei Kwanda saik che bo iman eng’ tamirmiriet ak imanit: amu cheng’oti Kwanda che u choto koek che saei inendet." 
John4:24 Jehovah ko Tamirmiriet: ak kanyol kosa inendet eng’ tamirmiriet ak iman che saei inendet. 
John4:25 Kolenji kobogoriot, Angen ale nyonei Mesia (ne keguure Kristo): ye nyo inendet, komwawech tuguk tugul." 
John4:26 Kolenji Jesu, A inendet ne ang’alalun." 
John4:27 Kibwa anyun alamalyennyi; ak kikwong’io amu king’alali ak kobogoriot; ago ma mwachi chi kole, Icheng’e nee? Anan, Kalya si ong’alal ak inendet?" 
John4:28 Kibagakta anyun kobogoriot terennyi bo bei, ak kwo nganaset, ak komwachi bik kolenji," 
John4:29 Obwa ogeer chito ne kamwawa tuguk tugul che kiayai atkinye kora: tos Kristo nito? 
John4:30 Kimong’ anyun eng’ nganaset kobwa ole mi inendet. 
John4:31 Kingota kobwanei, kosom alamalyennyi, kole, Rabbi, amisie." 
John4:32 Ago kilenji ichek, Atinye amitwogik che aame che mongen." 
John4:33 Kolenjigei anyun alamalyennyi, Tos kagoipchi chi kiy ne amei?" 
John4:34 Kolenji Jesu, Amitwogikyuk ko ayai magetab inendet ne kiiyokwa, ak agesu boisiennyi." 
John4:35 Momwae okwek ole, Ta komi arawek ang’wanu, si koit kesisiet? Ogeero, amwawok ale, Oyot met, ak ogeer mbarenik, ole kagoleelagitu, kagoyam keges." 
John4:36 Inendet ne kesei kotaachei melekto, ak koyumi logoek che bo sobondab koigeny; si koboiboitu tuwai ne kolei ak ne kesei." 
John4:37 Amu bo iman mwaoni eng’ ni, Kolei age, kogesei age." 
John4:38 Kiayoktok oges che kima onyalilji: kigonyalilji alage, ak kaonam okwek uuindab boisienywa." 
John4:39 Kiiyan anyun inendet Samarik che chang’ che bo nganasanato amu ng’olyotab kobogoriot, ne kibaorian kole, Kamwawa tuguk tugul che kiayai atkinye kora." 
John4:40 Noto anyun, ye kingobwanji inendet Samarik, kosom kole kotebi koboto ichek: ak kibeni oloto betusiek aeng’." 
John4:41 Ak kiiyan alak che chang’ amu ng’olyondennyi; 
John4:42 ak kilenji kobogoriot, Kiyani nguno, ma amu ng’aleleng’ung’: amu kagegasyige; ak kingen iman kele nito ko Yetindetab ng’ony." 
John4:43 Ak kingobata betusiechoto aeng’u kong’eet eng’ oloto kwo Galili. 
John4:44 Amu kibaorian Jesu inendet kole, matinyei maotiondo teegisto eng’ emennyi." 
John4:45 Ak kingonyo anyun Galili, kotaach inendet Galilik, ko kagogeer tuguk tugul che kiyai inendet eng’ Jerusalem eng’ igorta: amu kigaba agichek igorta." 
John4:46 Kinyo anyun inendet kogeny Kana ne bo Galili, ole kiyae beek koek divaik. Ak kimi kiboitiot age ne bo kaplaitoriat, ne kimiani werinnyi eng’ Kapernaum." 
John4:47 Ye kingogas kole kagomong’ Jesu eng’ Judea konyo Galili, kwo ole mi inendet, ak kisom kochorgei, kosoob werinnyi; amu ki negit kome." 
John4:47 Ye kingogas kole kagomong’ Jesu eng’ Judea konyo Galili, kwo ole mi inendet, ak kisom kochorgei, kosoob werinnyi; amu ki negit kome." 
John4:48 Kolenji anyun Jesu inendet, Ngot ko mogeer kaborunoik ak kwong’utik, ko magoi oyan matiny." 
John4:49 Kolenji kiboitiondonoto, Kiptaiyandani, choruge kotom kome lakwennyu." 
John4:50 Kolenji Jesu inendet, Ui inye; sobei wering’ung’. Koyan anyun chichoto ng’olyot ne kamwachi Jesu, ak kwo." 
John4:51 Ak ye kita kochortagei, kotuiyo ak otwogikyik, ak kolenji, Sobei wering’ung’." 
John4:52 Koteebe anyun kole kogaigaitu ko tia. Kolenji anyun bichoto inendet, Kobagakta eset inendet amut sait tisab." 
John4:53 Konai anyun kwanda kole ko sainato ne komwachin Jesu kolenjin, Sobei wering’ung’: ak kiiyan inendet, ak gonnyi komugul." 
John4:54 Noto kaborunet ne bo aeng’ ne kiyai Jesu koboch ng’omong’ eng’ Judea konyo Galili. 
John4:54 Noto kaborunet ne bo aeng’ ne kiyai Jesu koboch ng’omong’ eng’ Judea konyo Galili. 
John5:1 Kingobata tuguchu kobiit igorta ne bo Yahudik; ak kotogosta Jesu Jerusalem. 
John5:2 Ak mitei Jerusalem tamboiyot, ne kainennyi ko Betesda eng’ kutitab Hebranik, ye negite ormarichetab kechirek; kitinyei keterusiek mut." 
John5:3 Kiruitos eng’ oloto bik che chang’ che kimiandos, che koriotin, che ing’waldos, che meiyotin, [kogeni wasetab beek:" 
John5:4 amu kichorjingei malaikaiyat ne bo Kiptaiyat tamboiyot betusiek alak, kowendi kowasei beek: si kisoob chi age tugul ne sib kochutei ko kawasgei beek, eng’ miando age tugul ne kitinyei.]" 
John5:5 Ak kimi yoto chito age, ne kiga komian kenyisiek sosom ak sisiit." 
John5:6 Ak ye kingogeer Jesu chichoto koruei, ak konai kole ki u noto eng’ betusiek che chang’, kolenji, Imache kisoobin?" 
John5:7 Kowolji chito ne miani kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, matinye chi, ne indea tamboiyot, ko kawasgei beek: amu ye ta anyone, kosib kochortagei age." 
John5:8 Kolenji Jesu anyun, Ng’eet, ib itogung’ung’, ak iwe." 
John5:9 Ak kisob chichoto ngunoto, ak koib itogunnyi ak kwo. Ak ki sabato betunoto." 
John5:10 Kilenji anyun Yahudik inendet ne kagisoob, Betutab sabato nito, ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik iib itogung’ung’." 
John5:11 Ago kiwolji ichek kolenji, Kamwawa inendet ne kagosooba, kolenja, Ib itogung’ung’, ak iwe." 
John5:12 Koteebe anyun bichoto inendet kole, Ng’o chichoto kamwaun kole, Ib itogung’ung’ ak iwe?" 
John5:13 Ago kima nai inendet ne kagisoobi kole ka ng’o: amu kiga kwo Jesu, amu kimi bik che chang’ oloto." 
John5:14 Kingobata noto konyorji Jesu inendet hekalut, ak kolenji, Keero, kagisoobin: amatata iyai tengek, si manyonjin kit age ne ya ne siirei ni." 
John5:15 Kiwa anyun chichoto, ak komwachi Yahudik kole Jesu ne kagosoob inendet." 
John5:16 Kius anyun Yahudik Jesu amu ng’olyondonito, amu kiyai tuguchu eng’ betutab sabato." 
John5:17 Ak kiwolji Jesu kolenji, Boisiei Baba agoi kora, ak aboisiei agane." 
John5:18 Kicheng’ anyun Yahudik mising’ kole kobar inendet amu nito, amu kima bistoe sabato kityo, ago mwaei kole Jehovah Kwandanyi, koyaegei kogergeit ak Jehovah." 
John5:19 Kiwolji anyun Jesu ichek kolenji, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Mayaei kiy Werit inegei, ago ne keerei koyaei Kwanda: amu tuguk tugul che yaei inendet, koyaei choto agine Werit ko u noto." 
John5:20 Amu chamei Kwanda Werit, ak koborjin tuguk tugul che yaei inendet: ak ta koborjin boisionik che eechen che siirei chu, si kobiit okwong’ie." 
John5:21 Amu ko u ye ing’eeti Kwanda che kigobek ak kosoobi, isoobi Werit ko u noto agine che machei." 
John5:22 Amu ma iruokyin Kwanda chi age tugul, ago kigogochi Werit kiruoget tugul;" 
John5:23 si kobiit koteech tugul Werit, ko u ye teechei Kwanda. Inendet ne mateechei Werit ko mateechei Kwanda ne kiiyok inendet." 
John5:24 Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Inendet ne kasei ng’olyondennyu, ak koyani inendet ne kiiyokwa, kotinyei sobondab koigeny, ama wendi ole mi kiruoget, ago kagomong’ eng’ meet komong’ji sobondo." 
John5:25 Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Nyonei sait, ak kagoit, ye kas che kigobek kutitab Weritab Jehovah; ak soptos icheget che kasei." 
John5:26 Amu ko u ye tinyei Kwanda sobondo inegei, u noto kigogochi Werit kotepto sobondo:" 
John5:27 ak kiigochi kimnatet koyai kiruoget, amu Weritab chi inendet." 
John5:28 Amokwong’e nito: amu nyonei sait, ne tun kasei kutinnyi tugul che mi kererisiek," 
John5:29 ak komong’; ng’eetyin sobondo che kiyaei ne mie; ak kong’eetyi kiruoget icheget che kiyaei ne ya. 
John5:30 Mamuchi ayai kiy anege: aruochi ko u ye agase, ak bo iman kiruogennyu; amu macheng’e ayai magennyu, ago magetab inendet ne kiiyokwa." 
John5:31 Ngabaorianjinige, ko ma bo iman baornatennyu." 
John5:32 Mi age ne baorianjina; ak angen ale bo iman baornatet ne baorianjina. 
John5:33 Kioyokyi ng’olyot Johana, ak kibaorianji imanda." 
John5:34 Ago baornatet ne ataache ko mabunu chi: ago amwae tuguchu, si kobiit kesoruok." 
John5:35 Ki tait inendet ne kilalei kokweng’sei: ak kiocham oboiboitune lapkeiyennyi eng’ betusiek che matia. 
John5:36 Ago baornatet ne atinye ko o kosiir ne bo Johana: amu boisionik che kigona Kwanda ages, choto che ayae, ko che baorianjina, kole kiiyokwa Kwanda." 
John5:37 Ak kibaorianja Kwanda inendet ne kiiyokwa. Tom ogas kutinnyi ole kinye kora, ak tom ogeer itondanyi." 
John5:38 Ama tebyei eng’ okwek ng’olyondennyi: amu moyani inendet ne kiiyogu Jehovah. 
John5:39 Cham osiachi eng’ sirutik, amu olen otinye sobondab koigeny eng’ choto; ago choto che baorianjina;" 
John5:40 ago mochame obwanja, si kobiit konyoru sobondo." 
John5:41 Mataache kalosunet eng’ bik. 
John5:42 Ago angenok ale motinye chamnyetab Jehovah eng’ oring’wong’. 
John5:43 Kianyo eng’ kainetab Baba, ama otaacha: ngo nyo age eng’ kainennyi otaache inendet." 
John5:44 Omuchi eng’ nee oyan, che otaagege kalosunet, amocheng’e kalosunet ne bunu Jehovah ne mi inegei?" 
John5:45 Molen ang’andook eng’ Kwanda: mitei age ne ng’andook, Musa noto, ne omang’u." 
John5:46 Amu nda kigoyan Musa, toyana; amu kisir agobo ane." 
John5:47 Ago ngo moyani sirutikyik, omuktoi ano oyan ng’alekyuk?" 
John6:1 Kingobata tuguchu kwo Jesu bitet age ne bo araraitab Galili, noto ko araraitab Tiberia." 
John6:2 Ak kiisub inendet tuiyet ne o, amu kigeer kaborunoik che kiyachi che miandos." 
John6:3 Ak kitogosta Jesu tulwet, kwo koteb ng’ony eng’ oloto koboto alamalyennyi." 
John6:4 Ak kiga rik paska, igorta ne bo Yahudik." 
John6:5 Kingoyot met anyun Jesu, kogeer tuiyet ne o konyonjin inendet, kolenji Pilipu, Kiale ano makatinik si koam bichu?" 
John6:6 Kimwaei ni kotieme inendet: amu kiingen inendet kit ne machei koyai. 
John6:7 Kowolji Pilipu inendet kolenji, Mayamei ichek makatinik che bo denarisiek bogol aeng’, si konyor age tugul kitigin." 
John6:8 Kolenji inendet age ne bo alamalyennyi, Andrea, ng’etab kametab Simon Petero," 
John6:9 Mi yu werit age, ne tinyei makatinik mut che bo sairi, ak njirenik aeng’: ago yamei nee anyun chuto eng’ bik che te chu?" 
John6:10 Kimwa Jesu kole, Ochob bik kobuur. Ak kimi suswek che chang’ oloto. Kiibuur anyun bik; ki olo bo elfusiek mut murenjoto." 
John6:11 Kinam anyun Jesu makatinik; ak kingo kagogoito kongoi, koropchi icheget che kitebyei ng’ony; ak ko u noto agichek njirenik che te che machei." 
John6:12 Ak ye kingobiyong’so, kolenji alamalyennyi, Oyum katuganik che kang’et, si mabet kiy." 
John6:13 Koyum anyun katuganichato, ak konyiit kerebonik taman ak aeng’ katuganichato bo makatinik mut che bo sairi, che kang’etune icheget che kaamisiei." 
John6:14 Ye kingogeer anyun bichoto kaborunet ne kayai, kole, Ni maotiot iman ne nyonjin ng’ony." 
John6:15 Kingonai Jesu kole negit kobwa si konam inendet eng’ kimnatet, si koyai inendet koek laitoriat, kwo kogeny tulwet inegei." 
John6:16 Ak ye kingoek lagat, kochortagei alamalyennyi koba araraita;" 
John6:17 ak kilany moingetab beek, kolandae araraita koba Kapernaum. Ak kiga koimenit, ak kitom koit Jesu ole mi ichek." 
John6:18 Ak kiwasegei araraita amu kiusei usonet ne o. 
John6:19 Ye kingo kagoba anyun eng’ araraita ole bo maelisiek somok anan ko somok ak kebeber, kogeer Jesu kowendoti eng’ araraita barak, ak korikyin moinget: ak kiiyweis." 
John6:20 Ago kilenji ichek, Ane; amoiywei." 
John6:21 Kocham anyun kotaach inendet eng’ moinget: ak kiit moinget ngunoto emet ole kibendi. 
John6:22 Ki betut ne kiisubi noto kogeer tuiyet ne kitononi eng’ araraita bitonin, kole mami moinget age oloto, kobate agenge, ak kima lany Jesu moingonoto koboto alamalyennyi, ago kiba alamalyennyi ichegei" 
John6:23 (ago kibwa moingonik alage eng’ Tiberia ye negite koret ole kiame makatinik ye kingo kagogoito Kiptaiyat kongoi): 
John6:24 Ye kingogeer tuiyet anyun kole mami Jesu oloto, anan alamalyennyi, kolany ichek moingonik, ak kobwa Kapernaum, kocheng’onu Jesu." 
John6:25 Ak ye kingonyor inendet eng’ bitet age ne bo araraita, kolenji, Rabbi, koinyone au oli?" 
John6:26 Kowolji Jesu ichek kolenji, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Ocheng’a, ma amu koogeer kaborunoik, ago amu kooam makatinik ak obiyong’se." 
John6:27 Amoboisie agobo amitwogik che begu, ago oboisie agobo amitwogik che tebyei agoi sobondab koigeny, che konok Weritab chi: amu kigong’och inendet Kwanda, ne inendet ko Jehovah." 
John6:28 Kilenji anyun ichek inendet, Kiyai nee, si kobiit keyai boisionik che bo Jehovah?" 
John6:29 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Ni boisietab Jehovah, ale, oyan inendet ne kiiyogu Jehovah." 
John6:30 Kilenji ichek inendet anyun, Nee kaborunet ne iyae, si kegeer, ak kiyanin? Iyae nee?" 
John6:31 Kiam kwanisiekyok mana eng’ ong’atet; ko u ye kigisir kele, Kiigochi ichek makatiat ne bunu kipsengwet koam." 
John6:32 Kolenji anyun Jesu ichek, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Kima ko Musa ne kigonok makatiandanato kibunu kipsengwet; ago konok Baba makatiat ne bo iman ne bunu kipsengwet." 
John6:33 Amu makatiat ne bo Jehovah ko noto chorugei eng’ kipsengwet, ak kogochi ng’ony sobondo." 
John6:34 Kolenji anyun ichek inendet, Kiptaiyandani, konech makatiandanito koigeny." 
John6:35 Kolenji Jesu ichek, A makatiat ne bo sobon: inendet ne nyonjina ko magasei rubet agoi, ak inendet ne iyana ko maamei melel agoi." 
John6:36 Ago kaamwawok ale, koogeera, ama oyan." 
John6:37 Bwanjina tugul che kona Kwanda; ak inendet ne nyonjina ko maone matiny. 
John6:38 Amu kiachoruge eng’ kipsengwet, ma si ayai magennyu, ago magetab inendet ne kiiyokwa." 
John6:39 Ak ni magetab inendet ne kiiyokwa, ale, eng’ tugul che kigona inendet, ko mabetena agot agenge, ago tatun ang’eeti eng’ betutab let." 
John6:40 Amu ni magetab Baba, ale chi age tugul ne keerei Werit, ak koyan inendet, konyoru sobondab koigeny; ak ang’eeti inendet eng’ betutab let." 
John6:41 Kiing’unyng’ung’so anyun Yahudik, agobo inendet, amu kimwa kole, A makatiat ne kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet." 
John6:42 Ak kile, Tos ma Jesu nito, weritab Josep, ne kingen kwandanyi ak kamet? Lyon anyun si komwa kole, Kiachoruge eng’ kipsengwet?" 
John6:43 Kowolji Jesu anyun kolenji, Among’unyng’ung’se okwege eng’ okwege." 
John6:44 Maimuchi chi konyonja, ama ichuut Kwanda ne kiiyokwa: ak ang’eeti inendet eng’ betutab let." 
John6:45 Kigisir eng’ maotik, Ak kineti tugul eng’ Jehovah. Age tugul ne kagogas eng’ Kwanda, ak kagonetgei, konyonjina." 
John6:46 Molen kigogeer chi age tugul Kwanda, kobate inendet ne kibunu Jehovah, kigogeer inendet Kwanda." 
John6:47 Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Inendet ne iyani, kotinyei sobondab koigeny." 
John6:48 A makatiat ne bo sobon. 
John6:49 Kiam kwanisiekwok mana eng’ ong’atet, ak kibek." 
John6:50 Ni makatiat ne chorugei eng’ kipsengwet, ne ngo am chi, ko mameei." 
John6:51 A makatiat ne sobei ne kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet: ngo am chi age tugul makatiandani, kosobei koigeny: ee, ak bortanyu makatiat ne agoitoi agobo sobondo ne bo ng’ony." 
John6:52 Kiborio anyun Yahudik ichegei, kole, Imuktoi ano chichi kogonech bortanyi keam?" 
John6:53 Kolenji Jesu anyun ichek, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Ngot ko moam bortab Weritab chi ak oee korotikyik, ko motinye sobondo eng’ oring’wong’." 
John6:54 Inendet ne amei bortanyu ak koeei korotikyuk kotinyei sobondab koigeny; ak ang’eeti inendet eng’ betutab let. 
John6:55 Amu amdit iman bortanyu, ak korotikyuk ko che kieei iman." 
John6:56 Inendet ne amei bortanyu ak koeei korotikyuk komenya, ak amenye inendet." 
John6:57 Ko u ye kiiyokwa Kwanda ne sobei, ak asobe amu Kwanda; u noto inendet ne ama, sobei agine amu ane." 
John6:58 Ni makatiandanato ne kichorgei eng’ kipsengwet: ma ko u ye kiam kwanisiek ak kobek: inendet ne amei makatiandani kosobei koigeny. 
John6:59 Kimwa tuguchu eng’ sunagogit, kota konetisiei eng’ Kapernaum." 
John6:60 Ye kingogas ni che chang’ eng’ alamalyennyi, komwa kole, Uui ng’olyondoni: imuchi ng’o kogas?" 
John6:61 Ago kinai Jesu eng’ orinnyi kole, Ing’unyng’ung’jin alamalyennyi ng’olyondonito, kolenji ichek, Tos kagonachak nito?" 
John6:62 Teptoi ano anyun ngot ko tun ogeer Weritab chi kotogostoi ole kimi atkinye? 
John6:63 Tamirmiriet ne igoitoi sobondo; matilei kiy borto: tamirmiriet ak sobondo ng’alek che kaamwawok. 
John6:64 Ago mitei alak eng’ okwek che maiyani. Amu kinai Jesu koboch taunet icheget che maiyani, ak inendet ne kimachei kong’wekta inendet." 
John6:65 Ak kile, Noto kamwawok, ale, magoi imuch chi konyonja, kobate ne igochin Kwanda." 
John6:66 Koboch yoto kochuchuigei che chang’ che bo alamalyennyi, amata kobendat ak inendet." 
John6:67 Kilenji anyun Jesu choto taman ak aeng’, Obendi ak okwek?" 
John6:68 Kowolji anyun Simon Petero, kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, kibendi ole mi ng’o? Itinye ng’alek che bo sobondab koigeny." 
John6:69 Ak kigiyan ak kingen kele i Ne Tilil ne bo Jehovah. 
John6:70 Kowolji Jesu ichek kolenji, Kima alewenok taman ak aeng’, ak oindet age eng’ okwek?" 
John6:71 Kimwaei anyun agobo Judas ne bo gab Simon Iskariot, amu ine ne kimachei kong’wekta inendet, ne ki agenge eng’ taman ak aeng’." 
John7:1 Ak kingobata tuguchu kowendot Jesu eng’ Galili: amu ma cham kowendot eng’ Judea, amu kicheng’ei Yahudik kobar inendet." 
John7:1 Ak kingobata tuguchu kowendot Jesu eng’ Galili: amu ma cham kowendot eng’ Judea, amu kicheng’ei Yahudik kobar inendet." 
John7:2 Ak kiga rik igortab Yahudik, igorta ne bo keriosiek." 
John7:3 Kilenji anyun tupchosiekyik, Ui eng’ oli, ui agoi Judea, si kogeer alamalyeng’ung’ agichek boisioniguk che iyae." 
John7:3 Kilenji anyun tupchosiekyik, Ui eng’ oli, ui agoi Judea, si kogeer alamalyeng’ung’ agichek boisioniguk che iyae." 
John7:4 Amu mami chi ne yaei kiy eng’ ung’ot, ak kocheng’ kobartagei. Ngiyai tuguchu, iborjige ng’ony." 
John7:5 Amu agot tupchosiekyik agichek, ko ma iyan inendet." 
John7:6 Kolenji anyun Jesu ichek, Tom koit betunnyu; ago mi betung’wong’ kotugul." 
John7:7 Maimuchi ng’ony kowechok; ago wecha ane, amu abaoriani agobo ng’ony, ale, yaach boisionikyik." 
John7:8 Otogosyi okwek igorta: tom atogosyini ane igorita; amu tom kosulda betunnyu. 
John7:9 Ak kingo kagomwachi tuguchuto, kota kotebi eng’ Galili." 
John7:10 Ago ye kingotogosta tupchosiekyik igorta, kotogosta agine, ago ma ibartaatgei, ago kiwa ko u ne ung’otegei." 
John7:11 Kicheng’ anyun Yahudik inendet eng’ igorta, ak kole, Mi ano inendet?" 
John7:12 Ak kimi kang’unyng’unyet ne o eng’ tuiyosiek agobo inendet: amu kile alak, Mie chichi; kole alak, Achicha, ago imaasi tuiyet." 
John7:13 Ago ma mwa chi ng’olyo kotook agobo inendet amu kiiywei Yahudik. 
John7:14 Ago ye kingo kagoit kwenutab igorta kotogosta Jesu kwo hekalut, ak konetis." 
John7:15 Kokwong’io anyun Yahudik kole, Kinaita ano chichi sirutik, ago tom konetgei?" 
John7:16 Kowolji anyun Jesu kolenji, Konetisiennyu ko ma nenyu, ago bo inendet ne kiiyokwa." 
John7:17 Ngo machei chi age tugul koyai magetab Jehovah, konai konetisioni, ngo bo Jehovah, anan ngamwae anege." 
John7:18 Inendet ne mwaei che chechik inegei kocheng’ei torornatennyi: ago ne cheng’ei torornatetab ne kiiyok inendet ko bo iman, ama mi kiy ne ma bo imanda eng’ inendet." 
John7:19 Tos kima konok Musa Ng’atutiet, ago mami chi eng’ okwek ne yaei Ng’atutiet? Amu nee si ocheng’e obara?" 
John7:20 Kowol tuiyet, kole, Itinye oindet: cheng’ei ng’o kobarin?" 
John7:21 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Kiayai boisiet agenge, ak okwong’ie okwek tugul." 
John7:22 Kigonok Musa kamuratanet amu noto (ago ma bo Musa, bo kwanisiek); ak omuratani chi eng’ saboto." 
John7:23 Ngeyatitoi chi eng’ betutab sabato, si mabutok Ng’atutietab Musa, ko tos onerekyina, amu kaasoob chi komie eng’ betutab sabato?" 
John7:24 Amoruoch ko u ye ogeere, ago oruoch kiruoget ne bo imanda." 
John7:25 Kimwa alak eng’ choto bo Jerusalem kole, Ma inendet ni ne kocheng’ei ichek kobar?" 
John7:26 Ak ogeero, mwaitooti kotook, ama mwachi kiy ichek inendet. Tos ingen bounik komie kole, nito ko Kristo?" 
John7:27 Ago kingen ole bunu chichi: ago ye nyo Kristo, ko manaei chi ole bunu." 
John7:28 King’alal anyun Jesu eng’ kutit ne o eng’ hekalut, konetisiei, kole, Ongena, ak ongen ole abunu; ak kama anyo anege, ago bo iman inendet ne kiiyokwa, ne mongen okwek." 
John7:29 Angen inendet; amu abunu inendet, ak kiiyokwa inendet." 
John7:30 Kicheng’ anyun bichoto konam inendet: ama nam chi inendet, amu kitom koit betunnyi." 
John7:31 Ak kiiyan inendet che chang’ che bo tuiyet; ak kile, Ye nyo Kristo, ko tos yai kaborunoik che siirei cho koyaei chichi?" 
John7:32 Kigasei Parisaik kong’unyng’ung’jin tuiyet tuguchuto agobo inendet; ak kiiyok tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik kiptainik kobwa konam inendet. 
John7:33 Kole Jesu anyun, Ta ami kobotok ne matia, si awa ole mi inendet ne kiiyokwa." 
John7:34 Tun ocheng’a, amonyorua: ak ole ami, ko momuchi obwa." 
John7:35 Komwachigei anyun Yahudik kole, Wendi ano chichi si ma kinyoru inendet? Tos wendi ole mi icheget che kigoiyestochi Yunanik, si konet Yunanik?" 
John7:36 Nee anyun ng’olyondoni kamwa, kole, Ocheng’a, amonyorua: ak ole ami, ko momuchi obwa?" 
John7:37 Eng’ betut ne bo let, betunoto o bo igorta, kotonon Jesu ak komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ngo amei chi melel, ko ingonyonja, ak koee." 
John7:38 Inendet ne iyana, ko u ye kigomwa sirutiet, kole, bunu moennyi ainosiekab beek che sobei." 
John7:39 Ago kimwaei nito agobo Tamirmiriet, ne tun taachei ichek che iyani inendet: amu kitom kegon Tamirmiriet; amu kitom kitoror Jesu." 
John7:40 Ye kingogas alak che bo tuiyet ng’alechuto, kole, Nito maotiot iman." 
John7:41 Kole alak, Nito ko Kristo. Ago kile alage, Tos bunu Kristo Galili?" 
John7:42 Ma mwa sirutiet, kole, mong’une Kristo keswek che bo Daudi, ak kobun Betlehem, nganaset ole kimi Daudi?" 
John7:43 Kibiit anyun toiyet eng’ tuiyet agobo inendet. 
John7:44 Ak kimach alak konam inendet; ago ma nam chi inendet. 
John7:45 Kibwa anyun kiptainik ole mi tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik; ak kolenji, Kalya si momutu inendet?" 
John7:46 Kowol kiptainik kole, Kitom kong’alali chi ko u ni." 
John7:47 Kowolji anyun Parisaik ichek, kolenji, Kagibeetok ak okwek?" 
John7:48 Kigoyan inendet age tugul eng’ bounik, anan eng’ Parisaik?" 
John7:49 Ago chubotin bichu che manaei Ng’atutiet. 
John7:50 Kilenji Nikodemo (ne kigawa ole mi inendet atkinye tai, ne ki age eng’ ichek)," 
John7:51 Tos iruokyin chi Ng’atutiennyo, kotom kegas ng’alekyik ak kenai kit ne yaei?" 
John7:52 Kowolji anyun inendet kolenji, I bo Galili aginye? Cheng’, ak igeer amu mamong’une Galili maotiondo. [" 
John7:53 Kiwa chi ktugul anyun gonnyi: 
John8:1 Ago kiwa Jesus tulwetab Emitik. 
John8:2 Ak kimus karon konyo hekalut, ak kibwa bik tugul ole mi inendet; ak kiteb ng’ony, konet ichek." 
John8:3 Ak kiimut sirik ak Parisaik kobogoriot ne kiginamji ibetab ge; ak ye kingo kaginde kwenut," 
John8:4 kelenji, Konetindoni, kaginam kobogoriondoni eng’ ibetab ge, kota komi ibetab ge." 
John8:5 King’atech Musa eng’ Ng’atutiet kole, kilage koik ne u nito: ara ilen nee inye?" 
John8:6 Kimwaei ng’olyondonito kotiemei inendet, si kosich kit ne kitaame. Ago kiing’uruk Jesu, kosir ng’ony eng’ mornennyi." 
John8:7 Ago ye kingota koteepse inendet, kotonon, ak kolenji, Ingotoi ne matinye tengek eng’ okwek kowir eng’ koita." 
John8:8 Ak kiing’uruk kogeny kosir ng’ony eng’ mornennyi. 
John8:9 Ak ye kingogas ichek ng’olyondonoto, komanda kobee agenge agenge, koboch ne o agoi ne bo let: ak king’et Jesu inegei, ak kobogoriondonoto eng’ ole kimi, kotononi eng’ kwen." 
John8:10 Kotonon Jesu anyun, ak kolenji, Kobogoriondoni, mi ano ichek? Ma igikyin chi?" 
John8:11 Ak kile, Ma igikya chi, Kiptaiyandani. Ak kilenji Jesu, Magikyinin agane: ui anyun; koboch nguno, komatata iyai tengek.]" 
John8:12 Kimwachi Jesu anyun ichek kogeny, kolenji, A lapkeiyet ne bo ng’ony: inendet ne isuba ko mawendoti eng’ mesundeito, ago nyoru lapkeiyetab sobondo." 
John8:13 Kolenji anyun Parisaik inendet, Ibaorianjinige: ma bo iman baornateng’ung’." 
John8:14 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Agot ngabaorianjinige, ko bo iman baornatennyu; amu angen ole abunu, ak ole awendi; ago mongen ole abunu, anan ole awendi." 
John8:15 Oruochi ko u magetab borto; maruokyini chi ane. 
John8:16 Ee, agot ngaruoch, ko bo iman kiruogennyu; amu mami anege, ago kimi ak Kwanda ne kiiyokwa." 
John8:17 Ee, ak kigisir eng’ Ng’atutieng’wong’ kele, bo iman baornatetab bik aeng’." 
John8:18 A inendet ne abaorianjinige, ak baorianjina Kwanda ne kiiyokwa." 
John8:19 Kolenji anyun ichek inendet, Mi ano Kwandang’ung’? Kowol Jesu kole, Mongena, anan Baba: nda kigonaa, ta kiongen Baba agine." 
John8:20 Kimwa inendet ng’alechu eng’ ole kigonore siling’isiek, ye kiinetisiei eng’ hekalut: ak ma nam chi inendet; amu kitom koit sainnyi." 
John8:21 Kimwachi anyun icheget kogeny, kolenji, Awendi, ak tun ocheng’a, ak obegu eng’ tengektang’wong’: ole awendi, ko momuchi obwa." 
John8:22 Kile anyun Yahudik, Tos bargei, amu mwaei kole, Ole awendi, ko momuchi obwa?" 
John8:23 Ak kilenji, O bo oli bo ng’ony, a bo barak: o bo ng’onyuni; ma bo ane ng’onyuni." 
John8:24 Noto kaamwawok, ale, obegu eng’ tengekwogikwok: amu ngo moyuani ole a inendet, obegu eng’ tengekwogikwok." 
John8:25 Kilenji anyun ichek inendet, I ng’o? Kolenji Jesu, Noto kiamwawok koboch taunet." 
John8:26 Atinye tuguk che chang’ che amwae ak che aruochi agobo okwek: ago bo iman inendet ne kiiyokwa; ak amwachini ng’ony tuguk che kiagas eng’ inendet. 
John8:27 Ago ma iguiyo kole mwachin agobo Kwanda. 
John8:28 Kilenji Jesu anyun, Ye kaouite Weritab chi, onai anyun eng’ betunoto ole a inendet, amayae kiy anege, ago amwae tuguchu ko u ye kiineta Kwanda." 
John8:29 Ak kimi tuwai ak inendet ne kiiyokwa; ma bagakta anege; amu ayae kotugul tuguchoto chamaksei eng’ inendet. 
John8:30 Ak ye kita komwaei tuguchu, koyan inendet che chang’." 
John8:31 Kilenji Jesu anyun Yahudichoto kiga koyan inendet, Ngot otebye okwek eng’ ng’olyondennyu, ko o alamalyennyu iman;" 
John8:32 ak onai imanda, ak kotiachak imanda." 
John8:33 Kowolji ichek inendet kolenji, Ki keswekab Abraham, ak tom keegu otwogikab chi age tugul ole kinye kora: imwaitoi ano anyun ile, Kitiachok?" 
John8:34 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Age tugul ne yaei tengek ko otwogindetab tengek." 
John8:35 Ak matebyei otwogindet eng’ got koigeny: tebyei werit koigeny. 
John8:36 Ngotiachak anyun Werit, ko otiagotin iman." 
John8:37 Angen ale o keswekab Abraham; ago ocheng’e obara, amu matinyei ng’olyondennyu ole tebe eng’ okwek." 
John8:38 Amwae tuguk che kiageer eng’ Baba: ak oyae tuguchoto kiogas eng’ kwandang’wong’. 
John8:39 Kowolji kolenji, Kwandanyo ko Abraham. Kolenji Jesu, Nda kio lagokab Abraham, ta kioyae boisiosiekab Abraham." 
John8:40 Ago ngo ocheng’e obara, chito ne kamwawok ng’alek che bo iman, che kiagas eng’ Jehovah: kima yai ko u noto Abraham." 
John8:41 Oyae boisionik che bo kwandang’wong’. Kilenji anyun inendet, Kima kisichech eng’ sokset; kitinye Kwanda agenge, noto ko Jehovah." 
John8:42 Komwachi Jesu ichek kolenji, Nda ka Kwandang’wong’ Jehovah, ta kaochama: amu kianyo abunu Jehovah; kima anyo anege, ago kiiyokwa inendet." 
John8:43 Amu nee si monai choto amwae? Amu momuchi ogas ng’olyondennyu. 
John8:44 O bo kwandang’wong’ oindet, ak ochame oyai magutikab kwandang’wong’. Ki rumindet koboch taunet, ama tononi eng’ imanit, amu mami imanit eng’ inendet. Ye mwaei lembech, komwaei agobo tugukyik: amu kiplembechwa inendet, ak kwanda ne bo noto." 
John8:45 Ago moyana amu amwae imanit. 
John8:46 Ng’o eng’ okwek ne igikyina kole atinye tengek? Ngot amwae imanit, ko amu nee anyun si moyana?" 
John8:47 Inendet ne bo Jehovah kogasei ng’alekab Jehovah: noto anyun mogase okwek, amu mobo Jehovah." 
John8:48 Kowolji anyun Yahudik kolenji, Magimwae achek iman kele, I Samarindet, ak itinye oindet?" 
John8:49 Kowol Jesu kole, Matinye oindet; ago agonyiti Baba, ak otewera." 
John8:50 Ago macheng’e torornatennyu: mitei agenge ne cheng’ei ak koruochi. 
John8:51 Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Ngo rib chi ng’olyondennyu ko mageerei meet agoi." 
John8:52 Kolenji anyun Yahudik, Kingen nguno kele itinye oindet. Kigome Abraham, ak kigobek maotik; ak imwae ile, Ngo rib chi ng’olyondennyu, ko machamjami meet agoi." 
John8:53 Tos i o isiir kwandanyo Abraham, ne kigome? Ak kigobek maotik: iyaege iegu ng’o?" 
John8:54 Kowol Jesu kole, Ngot atororige, ko buch torornatannyu: Kwandanyu ne itorora; ne omwae ole, inendet ko Jehovah neng’wong’;" 
John8:55 ak tom onai inendet: ago angen inendet; ak ngot amwa ale, mangen inendet, aegu kiplembechwa, ko u okwek: ago angen inendet, ak aribe ng’olyondennyi." 
John8:56 Kibaibai kwandang’wong’ Abraham kogeer betunnyu; ak kigeer, ak kogasgei." 
John8:57 Kolenji Yahudik anyun, Tom iit kenyisiek konom, ak kiigeer Abraham?" 
John8:58 Kolenji Jesu, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Kingotom kobiit Abraham, ami." 
John8:59 Kiinem anyun koik komachei kowire inendet: ago kiung’gei Jesu, ak komanda eng’ hekalut." 
John9:1 Ak ye kisiirtoi, kogeer chito ne ki korat koboch ko kagisich." 
John9:2 Ak kiteebe inendet alamalyennyi, kolenji, Rabbi, ng’o ne kiyai tengekto, chichi anan sigikyik, si kesich ko korat?" 
John9:3 Kowol Jesu kole, Kima yai chichi tengekto, anan sigikyik; ago si kobiit kotook boisiosiekab Jehovah eng’ inendet." 
John9:4 Kanyol keyai boisiosiekab inendet ne kiiyokwa, ko ta ko bet: nyonei kemout, ye ma komuchi chi kobois." 
John9:5 Ye ta ami ng’ony, ko a lapkeiyetab ng’ony." 
John9:6 Ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto, kong’utyi ng’ung’unyek, ak kotangwar, ak koiile konyekyik ng’ung’unyechato," 
John9:7 ak kolenji, Ui iunde eng’ tamboiyotab Siloam (ye kiweech kele, Kiyokto). Kiwa anyun, ak koun, ak konyo kogeertoi." 
John9:8 Kimwa anyun bikab kokwet, ak che kiga kogeer inendet eng’ tai kole somindet, kole, Tos ma inendet ni ne kicham kotebyei ak kosomsei?" 
John9:9 Kole alage, Inendet: kole alage, Achicha, ago kerge ak inendet. Kole chichoto, A inendet." 
John9:10 Kilenji anyun ichek inendet, Kagiyatita ano konyeguk?" 
John9:11 Kowol kole, Katangwar ng’ung’unyek chito ne keguure Jesu, ak koiile konyekyuk, ak kolenja, Ui Siloam, ak iunde: kaawe anyun ak aun, ak ageerte." 
John9:12 Ak kilenji, Mi ano inendet? Kole, Mangen." 
John9:13 Kiimut ichek chichoto ki korat eng’ tai, kwo ole mi Parisaik." 
John9:14 Ki sabato betunoto ye kitangwari Jesu ng’ung’unyek, si koyate konyekab chichoto." 
John9:15 Koteebe anyun Parisaik kogeny inendet kole, Katepto ano si igeerte? Ak kilenji, Kagoiile konyekyuk ng’ung’unyek che katangwar, ak kaaun, ak kaageerte." 
John9:16 Kole alak che bo Parisaik anyun, Mabunu Jehovah chichi, amu maribei sabato. Ago kile alage, Imuktoi ano chi ne kiptengekyo koyai kaborunoik che u chu? Ak kibiit toiyet eng’ kwenunywa." 
John9:17 Kilenji anyun kogeny chito ne korat, Imwae nee agobo inendet, amu kayat konyeguk? Ak kile, Maotio." 
John9:18 Ma iyan anyun Yahudik agobo inendet, kole, ko korat, ak, kagogeerto, agoi koguur sigikab chichoto kagogeerto," 
John9:19 ak koteebe kolenji, Tos wering’wong’ ni, ne omwae ole kigisich ko korat? Katepto ano si kogeerto nguno?" 
John9:20 Kowol sigikyik kole, Kingen kele werinnyo nito, ak kingen kele kigisich ko korat:" 
John9:21 ago magingen ole katepto si kogeerto nguno; ak magingen inendet ne kayatei konyekyik: oteebe inendet; kogoeet; ingomwa inegei. 
John9:22 Kimwa ng’alechu sigikyik, amu kiiywei Yahudik: amu kiga sib kochamnyechi Yahudik, kole, ngo ng’any chi age tugul kole Kristo inendet, kibeetoi eng’ sunagogit." 
John9:23 Kimwa anyun sigikyik amu noto, kole, Oteebe, amu kogoeet inendet." 
John9:24 Kiguur anyun ne bo aeng’ bichoto chichoto ki korat, ak kolenji, Igochi Jehovah kalosunet: kingen kele kiptengekyo chichi." 
John9:25 Kowol anyun inendet kole, Ngo kiptengekyo chichoto, ko mangen: angen kit agenge, ale, koa korat, ago ageertoi nguno." 
John9:26 Kolenji anyun ichek inendet, Kayaun nee? Kayatita ano konyeguk?" 
John9:27 Kowolji ichek kolenji, Kaamwawok, ama ogas: kalya si omach ogas kogeny? Omache koegu ak okwek alamalennyi?" 
John9:28 Ak king’emji kut inendet kole, I alamalyennyi so? Ago ki alamalyetab Musa achek." 
John9:29 Kingen kele kigong’alalji Jehovah Musa: ago magingen kole bo chichi. 
John9:30 Kowolji chichoto icheget kolenji, Kwong’ut nito anyun, amu mongen ole bunu, ago kagoyat konyekyuk." 
John9:31 Kingen kele magasei Jehovah kiptengeginik: ago ngolosu chi age tugul Jehovah, ak koyai magennyi, kogasei inendet." 
John9:32 Koboch ngetoi ng’ony ko ma kigas kele kiyat chi konyekab chito ne kigisich ko korat. 
John9:33 Nda ma bunu Jehovah chichi ko magoi imuch koyai kiy. 
John9:34 Kowolji inendet kolenji, Kigisikten iman tengekwogik, ak inetech? Ak kitoorta inendet kwo sang’." 
John9:35 Kigas Jesu kole kagetoorta inendet kwo sang’; ak kingonyor inendet, kolenji, Tos iyani Weritab Jehovah?" 
John9:36 Ak kiwol kole, Ng’o noto, Kiptaiyandani, si kobiit ayan inendet?" 
John9:37 Kolenji Jesu, Kaigeer inendet, ak ko inendet ni ng’alali koboten." 
John9:38 Ak kile, Kiptaiyandani, ayani. Ak kogutung’ji kolos inendet." 
John9:39 Ak kile Jesu, Kianyo ng’onyuni amu kiruoget, si kobiit kogeerto che mageertoi; ak kogorio che keertoi." 
John9:40 Kigas tuguchuto alak che bo Parisaik che kimi koboto inendet, ak kolenji, Ki koriotin agachek?" 
John9:41 Kolenji Jesu, Nda o koriotin okwek, ta motinye tengek; ago nguno omwae ole, Kigeertoi: noto anyun, tebyei tengektang’wong’." 
John10:1 Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, Chorin ak ko rebin inendet ne mabunei kurgetab biutab kechirek, ne lanyei oldo age." 
John10:2 Ago mestowotab kechirek inendet ne bunei kurget. 
John10:3 Yatyin inendet ribindetab kurget; ak kasei kechirek kutinnyi: ak kuurei kechirekyik eng’ kainaikwak, ak kondoe ichek." 
John10:4 Ak ye kagomaanda inendet chechiget tugul koba sang’, kondoe, ak kosub kechirek inendet: amu ingen kutinnyi." 
John10:5 Ak machamei kosub toondet, ago mwee: amu manaei kutuswekab toek." 
John10:6 Komwachi Jesu ichek kalewenoni: ago ma iguiyo ichek kole nee tuguchoto kiga mwachi. 
John10:7 Kolenji anyun Jesu ichek kogeny, Amwawok, iman, iman, ale, A kurgetab kechirek." 
John10:8 Chorik ak ko rebik tugul che kiindounena: ago ma kas kechirek ichek. 
John10:9 A kurget: ngwo chi age tugul go ne buna ane, kesoru, ak kwo go, ak komanda sang’, ak konyor ole kiyage." 
John10:10 Nyonei chorindet si kochor, ak kobar, ak kong’em kityo: kianyo si kobiit konyor sobondo, ak kotepto sobonato inne." 
John10:11 A mestowot ne mie: igoitoi mestowot ne mie sobondanyi agobo kechirek. 
John10:12 Ago inendet ne otwogin, ne ma mestowot, ne ma chitab kobo kechirek, kogeerei konyonei suiyot, ak kobagakta kechirek, ak komwei, ak konam anyun suiyot ichek, ak koiyesta:" 
John10:13 komwei inendet amu otwogin, ak mamage kiy kechirek." 
John10:14 A mestowot ne mie; ak angen chechuk, ak kongena chechuk," 
John10:15 ko u ye ingena Kwanda, ak angen Kwanda; ak agoitoi sobondanyu agobo kechirek." 
John10:16 Ak atinye kechirek alak, che ma bo biuni: kanyol aget choto agichek, si kogas kutinnyu: ak koek akwet agenge, ak mestowot agenge." 
John10:17 Chama anyun Kwanda amu noto, amu agoitoi sobondanyu, si kobiit anam kogeny." 
John10:18 Marebena chi, ago agoitoi anege. Atinye kimnatet agoito, ak atinye kimnatet anam kogeny. Kiataach ng’atutioni eng’ Baba." 
John10:19 Kibiit toiyet kogeny eng’ Yahudik agobo ng’alechuto. 
John10:20 Ak kile che chang’ eng’ ichek, Tinyei oindet, ak koamei iywek; kalya si ogas inendet?" 
John10:21 Kole alage, Ma bo ng’alechu chi ne tinyei oindet. Tos imuchi oindet koyat konyekab chito ne korat?" 
John10:22 Ak kimi igortab katabanet eng’ Jerusalem: ak ki betusiekab kaititindo; 
John10:23 ak kiwendot Jesu eng’ hekalut eng’ keterut ne bo Solomon. 
John10:24 Kibwa anyun Yahudik koyiem inendet, kolenji, Igonech kigenisie eng’ saget kot kotianit? Ngo i Kristo, imwawech komie." 
John10:25 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Kiamwawok, amoyani: boisiosiek che ayae eng’ kainetab Baba ko choto che baorianjina." 
John10:26 Ago moyani, amu mobo kechirekyuk." 
John10:27 Kasei kutinnyu kechirekyuk, ak angen ichek, ak kosuba:" 
John10:28 ak agochini ichek sobondab koigeny; ak magoi lusyo, ama rebena chi ichek eng’ eunnyu." 
John10:29 O Baba, ne kigona ichek, kosiir tugul; ama mi chi ne imuchi koreb ichek eng’ eutab Baba." 
John10:30 Ane ak Kwanda, ko ki agenge." 
John10:31 Kinam anyun Yahudik koik kogeny kolen kolach inendet. 
John10:32 Kowolji Jesu kolenji, Koaboruok boisiosiek che chang’ che miach che bunu Kwanda; olacha agobo boisio nee eng’ choto?" 
John10:33 Kowolji Yahudik inendet kolenji, Magilachin amu boisiet ne mie, ago amu chotisiet; ak amu inye ne i chi, iyaege iegu Jehovah." 
John10:34 Kowolji Jesu bichoto, kolenji, Tos ma sirat eng’ Ng’atutieng’wong’ kele, Kiamwa ale, O cheptalelisiek?" 
John10:35 Ngo kigoguure inendet ichek cheptalelisiek, icheget che kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah (ama imugaksei kebut sirutiet)," 
John10:36 tos omwae agobo inendet, ne kiitaban Kwanda ak koyokto kwo ng’ony, olenjini, Ichotisiei; amu kiale, A Weritab Jehovah?" 
John10:37 Ngot ko mayai boisiosiekab Kwandanyu, ko mat oyana." 
John10:38 Ago ngayai, ko agot ngo moyana, oyan boisiosiek: si kobiit onai ak oyan ole mi Kwanda eng’ ane, ak ane eng’ Kwanda." 
John10:39 Kicheng’ anyun kogeny konam inendet: ago kibetito eng’ eunekwak. 
John10:40 Ak kiwa kogeny Jordan komosin ole kiibatisanisie Johana eng’ tai; ak kitebi eng’ oloto. 
John10:41 Ak kibwanji che chang’ inendet; ak kole, Kima yai Johana kaborunet; ago tuguk alak tugul che kimwa Johana agobo chichi ko bo iman." 
John10:42 Ak kiiyan inendet che chang’ eng’ oloto. 
John11:1 Ak kimian chito age ne kiguure Lasaro, ne bo Betania, ne bo nganasetab Maria ak chepkamet Marta." 
John11:2 Ak ki Maria nito ne kiil Kiptaiyat eng’ mwaita, ak kouuse kelyekyik sumeekyik, ne kitinyei ng’etab kamet, Lasaro, ne kimian." 
John11:3 Kiiyokyi chepkametwogichato inendet ng’olyot, kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, keero, miani inendet ne ichame." 
John11:4 Ago ye kingogas Jesu noto, kole, Ma bo meet mianoto, ago bo torornatetab Jehovah, ak kilosune Weritab Jehovah noto." 
John11:5 Ak kichamei Jesu Marta, ak chepkamet, ak Lasaro." 
John11:6 Kingogas anyun kole miani, kota kotebi betusiek aeng’ eng’ ole kimi." 
John11:7 Kingobatga nito anyun, kolenji alamalyet, Ongebe Judea kogeny." 
John11:7 Kingobatga nito anyun, kolenji alamalyet, Ongebe Judea kogeny." 
John11:8 Kolenji alamalyet, Rabbi, kocheng’ei Yahudik kolachin eng’ koik; ak iwendi olindo kogeny?" 
John11:9 Kowol Jesu kole, Tos mami saisiek tamanu ak aeng’ eng’ betut? Ngo wendot chi bet, ko maginachi, amu keerei lapkeiyetab ng’onyuni." 
John11:10 Ago ngo wendot chi kemoi, kinachi, amu mami lapkeiyet eng’ inendet." 
John11:11 Komwa tuguchu: ak ye ibata kolenji ichek, Inuuchi choruennyu Lasaro; ago awendi, si ang’eet inendet eng’ ruondo." 
John11:12 Kolenji anyun alamalyet inendet, Kiptaiyandani, ngot konuuchi, ko kaga ta kosobei." 
John11:13 Ago kimwaei Jesu agobo meennyi: ak kilen ichek abere mwaei agobo ruondo ne kiga konuuch. 
John11:14 Kimwachi anyun Jesu ichek komie, kolenji, Kogome Lasaro." 
John11:15 Ago abaibai agobo okwek amu kima ami olindo, si kobiit oyan; ago ongebe ole mi inendet." 
John11:16 Kolenji anyun Tomas, ne kiguure Didumo, alamalyet chun alak, Ongebe ak achek, si kobiit kebegu ak inendet." 
John11:17 Ye kingoit Jesu anyun, konyor kole kiga kotebe kererit betusiek ang’wan." 
John11:18 Ki negite Betania Jerusalem, ki bo olo bo maelisiek aeng’;" 
John11:19 ak kigabwanji che chang’ che bo Yahudik Marta ak Maria si kogaigai ichek agobo ng’etab kamet. 
John11:20 Kingogas anyun Marta kole, nyonei Jesu, kwo kotorokta inendet; ago kita kotebi Maria eng’ go." 
John11:21 Kolenji Marta anyun Jesu, Kiptaiyandani, nda kiimi yu, ta kima komeei werit ne kitupche." 
John11:22 Ago angen agot nguno ale, kit age tugul ne isome Jehovah, kogonin Jehovah." 
John11:23 Kolenji Jesu inendet, Ta kong’eetei ng’etab komet." 
John11:24 Kolenji Marta inendet, Angen ale ng’eetei eng’ ng’eetyet ne bo betutab let." 
John11:25 Kolenji Jesu, A ng’eetyet, ak sobondo: inendet ne iyana, agot ngo me, ko ta kosobei:" 
John11:26 ak chi age tugul ne sobei ak koyanan ko mameei matiny. Tos iyani inye nito? 
John11:27 Kolenji, We, Kiptaiyandani; kaayan ale i Kristo, Weritab Jehovah, ne nyonei ng’ony." 
John11:28 Ak ye kingo kagomwa nito cheboto, kwo, ak koguur Maria, chepkamet, eng’ ung’ot, kole, Mitei yu Konetindet; kuurin." 
John11:29 Ak ye kingogas noto, kong’eet kochakta kwo ole mi inendet." 
John11:30 (Ago kitomo koit Jesu nganasanato, ago kita komi ole kiga tuiyechi ak Marta.)" 
John11:31 Kiisub anyun Yahudik cheboto, icheget che kimi koboto inendet eng’ go kogoigoi, ye kingogeer kong’eet Maria, ak kochakta komanda sang’, kolen wendi kererit korirei eng’ oloto." 
John11:32 Ye kingoit anyun Maria ole mi Jesu, ak kogeer inendet, kobutyi kelyekyik, ak kolenji, Kiptaiyandani, nda kiimi yu, ta kima komeei werit ne kitupche." 
John11:33 Ye kingogeer Jesu anyun inendet korirei, ak korirtos agichek Yahudik che kigabwa koboto inendet, kogas king’wan eng’ tamirmiriet, koarogen," 
John11:34 ak kole, Kionde ano? Kolenji, Nyo, Kiptaiyandani, keer." 
John11:35 Korir Jesu. 
John11:36 Kole anyun Yahudik, Ogeer anyun-o ole kichamdoi inendet!" 
John11:37 Ago kile alak eng’ ichek, Kiga temene chichi, ne kiyatei konyekab chito ne ki korat, koger si mame agine chichi?" 
John11:38 Kogas anyun Jesu king’wan kogeny eng’ orinnyi konyonei kererit. Ki kebenet, ak kigegere koita kurget." 
John11:39 Kole Jesu, Oiste koita. Kolenji Marta, chepkametab inendet ne kime, Kiptaiyandani, kogobul: amu koboch ngome ko betusiek ang’wan." 
John11:40 Kolenji Jesu inendet, Kama amwaun, ale, ngiyani, igeere torornatetab Jehovah?" 
John11:41 Koisto anyun koita. Ak kiyot met Jesu ak kole, Baba, amwaun kongoi ale kaigasa." 
John11:42 Ak kaanai ale igasa eng’ ui tugul: ago kaamwa ni amu tuiyoni tononi eng’ yuto, si kobiit koyan kole kiiyokwa." 
John11:43 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto, komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Lasaro, mong’u." 
John11:44 Komong’ anyun inendet ne kiga me, ko ratotin eunek ak kelyek eng’ ngoroik che bo kererit; ak kiga kirate togennyi anget. Kolenji Jesu bichoto, Otiach, ak ounde kwo." 
John11:45 Kiiyan anyun inendet che chang’ che bo Yahudik che kigabwa ole mi Maria, ak kogeer tuguk che kayai Jesu." 
John11:46 Ago kiba alak ole mi Parisaik, ak komwachi ichek tuguk che kagoyai Jesu." 
John11:47 Kiguur anyun kiruoget tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik, ak kole, Kiyai nee? Amu yaei chichi kaborunoik che chang’." 
John11:48 Ngot kebagakte inendet ko u ni, koyani inendet bik tugul: asi kobwa Romanik korebenech emennyo ak bororiennyo." 
John11:49 Ak kilenji age eng’ ichek, ne inendet ko Kaiapa ne ki tisiindet ne o kenyinoto, Mongen okwek kiy age tugul," 
John11:50 mongen ole mieitu eng’ okwek ngo mechi bik chito agenge, si ma bet bororiet komugul." 
John11:51 Kima komwaei inegei noto: ago kimaoten amu ki tisiindet ne o kenyinoto, kole, komechi Jesu bororiet;" 
John11:52 ma agobo bororiet inegei, ago si kobiit koyum lagokab Jehovah che yestootin si kobiit koek agenge." 
John11:53 Koboch betunoto anyun ak kwo tai, koruogot agobo ole bartoi inendet." 
John11:54 Mata kowendot Jesu anyun eng’ ole toogu eng’ ole mi Yahudik, ago kiwa eng’ oloto kwo emet ne negite surkwen, agoi nganaset ne kiguure Epraim; ak kitebi eng’ oloto koboto alamalyet." 
John11:55 Kiga korik paska ne bo Yahudik: ak kiba che chang’ eng’ emet kotogosta Jerusalem kotom koit paska, koba koanyinygei." 
John11:56 Kicheng’ anyun Jesu, ak kolenjigei, kotonondos eng’ hekalut, Obwati nee okwek? Tos olen manyonei inendet igorta?" 
John11:57 Kiga ng’at tisiik che eechen ak Parisaik, kole, ngo nai chi age tugul ole mitei, kobor, si kobiit konam ichek inendet." 
John12:1 Ak kingota komi betusiek lo si koit paska konyo Jesu Bertania, ole kimi Lasaro, ne kiing’eeti Jesu komong’ eng’ che kibek." 
John12:2 Kichopchi ichek eng’ oloto inendet amitwogik che bo lagat: koboisiechi Marta; ago kimi Lasaro koboto ichek che kiamisiei ak inendet. 
John12:3 Kiinem anyun Maria mwaita ne nyamdut ne bo ratilit agenge, ne bo kamanutiet ne o, ak koiile kelyekab Jesu, ak kouuse sumeekyik kelyekyik: ak kinyi got nyamdutiet ne bo mwaata." 
John12:4 Ago kile Judas Iskariot, ne ki agenge ne bo alamalyennyi, ne kimachei kong’wekta inendet," 
John12:5 Ko amu nee si ma kialdae mwai denarisiek bogol somok, si kigochi kibananok?" 
John12:6 Kimwa ni anyun, ma amu kirire kibananok; ago amu ki chorin, ak kitinyei lolet, ak kiibei tuguk che mi orit." 
John12:7 Kole Jesu, Obagakte kogonorji betutab tubennyu." 
John12:8 Amu mi kibananok kobotok kotugul; ago mami ane ak okwek kotugul. 
John12:9 Kinai anyun bik che chang’ che bo Yahudik kole mi oloto: ak kibwa, ma agobo Jesu inegei, ago si kobiit kogeer Lasaro agine, ne kiga kong’eet inendet eng’ che kibek." 
John12:10 Ago kiiruoch tisiik che eechen kole kobar Lasaro agine; 
John12:11 amu kiitabangei che chang’ che bo Yahudik, koba koyan Jesu amu inendet." 
John12:12 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto, ye kingogas tuiyet ne o ne bo bik che kigabwa igorta, kole nyonei Jesu Jerusalem," 
John12:13 konam temenik che bo sosik, ak koba kotorokta inendet, ak komwa eng’ kutit ne o kole, Hosanna: Iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat, noto Laitoriatab Israel." 
John12:14 Ak ye kingo kagonyor Jesu moitab sigiriet, kolany; ko u ye kigisir kele," 
John12:15 Ameiywei, inye, ee, cheptab Sion: keero, nyonei Laitoriandeng’ung’, kobunu moitab sigiriet." 
John12:16 Kima iguiyo alamalyennyi eng’ tai tuguchuto: ago kingo kagitoror Jesu, kobwat anyun ichek kole kigisir tuguchuto agobo inendet, ak kiga keyachi inendet tuguchuto."
