Acts9:28 Ak kimi koboto ichek eng’ Jerusalem, komandoi ak komong’u," 
Acts9:29 koamdoi eng’ nyiganatet eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat: ak kong’alal ak kobeligei koboto Yahudik che ki kutinywa ko Yunanik; ago kicheng’ei kotugul kole kobar inendet. 
Acts9:30 Ak ye kingonai tupchosiek, komut inendet kochortagei kwo Kaisaria, ak koyokto kwo Tarso." 
Acts9:31 Konyor anyun kamuung’et kaniset ne mi Judea komugul ak Galili ak Samaria, koteegak; ak ye kibendoti eng’ kaiyweisietab Kiptaiyat ak eng’ kagaigaet ne bo Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, kotesak." 
Acts9:31 Konyor anyun kamuung’et kaniset ne mi Judea komugul ak Galili ak Samaria, koteegak; ak ye kibendoti eng’ kaiyweisietab Kiptaiyat ak eng’ kagaigaet ne bo Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, kotesak." 
Acts9:32 Ak ye kiwendote Petero komoswek tugul, kochortagei ole kimi che tililen che kimenyei Luda." 
Acts9:33 Ak kinyorji oloto chito age ne kigiguure Ainea, ne kiga korue itogunnyi kenyisiek sisiit; amu ki meat borto." 
Acts9:34 Kolenji anyun Petero inendet, Ainea, isoobin Jesu Kristo: ng’eet, ak iite itogung’ung’. Kong’eet anyun ngunoto." 
Acts9:35 Ak kigeer inendet tugul che kimenyei Luda ak Saron, ak koyan Kiptaiyat." 
Acts9:36 Ak kimi age ne bo alamalyet Jopa ne kigiguure Tabita, ne ye kiweech kele Dorkas: kitinyei kobogoriondoni boisionik che chang’ che miach ak kagochinoik che kiigoitoi." 
Acts9:37 Ak kimian eng’ betusiechoto, ak kime: ak kingo kagoun, konde got age ne mi barak." 
Acts9:38 Ak amu ki negityin Luda ak Jopa, ko ye kingogas alamalyet kole, mi Petero oloto, koyokyi bik aeng’ inendet, kosom kole, Nyonjech, amegage." 
Acts9:39 Kong’eet anyun Petero ak koba ak ichek. Ak kingo kagoit, komut inendet kwo got ne bo barak: ak kitonondos mosogik tugul korirtos eng’ ye negit inendet, ak koborji sumotik ak ngoroik che kinabei Dorkas, ye kita komi koboto ichek." 
Acts9:40 Komaanda Petero tugul koba sang’, ak kogutuny, kosa; ak kingoweleljigei musto, kolenji, Ng’eet, Tabita. Ak kiyat konyekyik: ak kingogeer inendet Petero, kong’eet koteb ng’ony." 
Acts9:41 Ak kogochi inendet eunnyi, ak konam inendet kong’eet; ak ye kingo kagoguur che tililen ak mosogik, konde inendet tainywa ko kagosob." 
Acts9:42 Ak kinaak eng’ Jopa komugul: ak kiiyan che chang’ Kiptaiyat. 
Acts9:43 Ak kitebi eng’ Jopa betusiek che chang’ koboto chito age ne kigiguure Simon ne teiteindetab muiywek. 
Acts10:1 Kimi chito age Kaisaria, ne kigiguure kainennyi Kornelio, ne ki kiptaiyatab bogol ne bo luget ne kigiguure luget ne bo Italia," 
Acts10:2 chito ne kigonyiti Jehovah ak koiywei inendet koboto gonnyi tugul, ne kiigochin bik kagochinoik che chang’, ak kosaei Jehovah kotugul." 
Acts10:3 Kigeer eng’ ng’ang’utiet kimni, olo bo sait sogol ne bo bet, malaikaiyatab Jehovah konyonjin inendet, ak kolenji, Kornelio." 
Acts10:4 Ak kingogeer inendet mising’ eng’ kaiyweisiet, kole, Tos nee, Kiptaiyandani? Kolenji, Kigoit barak sautiguk ak kagochinoiguk koek kabwatet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Acts10:5 Iyokte nguno anyun bik koba Jopa, koguur chi ne kiguure Simon, ne kainennyi ne bo aeng’ ko Petero:" 
Acts10:6 inendet ko toondetab Simon ne teiteindetab muiywek, ne mi gonnyi ngegutab araraita." 
Acts10:7 Ak ye kingo kakwa malaikaiyat ne king’alalji inendet, koguur otwogik aeng’ che bo gonnyi, ak askarindet ne kigonyiti Jehovah ne ki age eng’ che kiboisiechin inendet kotugul;" 
Acts10:8 ak kingo kagomwachi ichek ng’alek tugul, koyokto koba Jopa." 
Acts10:9 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto ye kita kobendi, ko karikta nganaset, kotogosta Petero got barak, eng’ olo bo sait lo, kwo kosa:" 
Acts10:10 ak kiam rubet, ak kimach koamis: ak ye kigichobei amitwogik, kobutyi kiy ne u ruon;" 
Acts10:11 ak kigeer kipsengwet koyatak, ak kochorugei kit ne u anget ne o kot, kechooru eng’ kuinoik ang’wan agoi ng’ony:" 
Acts10:12 kimi orit tiong’ik alak tugul che bo kelyek ang’wan ak tuguk che ichuutegei che bo ng’ony ak taritik che bo barak. 
Acts10:13 Kinyonji anyun kutit, kolenji, Ng’eet, Petero; eny ak iam." 
Acts10:14 Ago kile Petero, Ma u noto, Kiptaiyandani; amu tom aam kiy ne ma tilil anan ne ng’wan koboch atkinyei kora." 
Acts10:15 Kinyonji anyun kutit kogeny ne bo aeng’, kolenji, Kit ne kagotilil Jehovah, ko mata ile ng’wan." 
Acts10:16 Ak kiyaak kiito konyil somok; ak ngunoto ketaach kioto eng’ kipsengwet. 
Acts10:17 Ak ye kita koiimegei Petero mising’ eng’ muguleldanyi kole, iboru nee ng’ang’utioni kagogeer, ogeero, kotononso eng’ kurgat bik che kiga koyok Kornelio, ko kagoteeb ole mi gotab Simon," 
Acts10:18 ak koguurso ak koteeb ngo mi Simon oloto, ne kainennyi ne bo aeng’ ko Petero." 
Acts10:19 Ak ye kita kobwati Petero agobo ng’ang’utionoto, kolenji Tamirmiriet inendet, Keero, cheng’in bik somogu." 
Acts10:20 Ago ng’eet, ak ichortege, ak obe tugul, amesage kiy: amu kaayogu ichek." 
Acts10:21 Ak kichortagei anyun Petero kwo ole mi bichoto, ak kole, Ogeero, a inendet ne ocheng’e: nee ne kagonok obwa?" 
Acts10:22 Ak kile, Kiiborji komie Jehovah Kornelio, eng’ malaikaiyat ne tilil, koyok bik kobwa koguurin iwe gonnyi ne inendet ko kiptaiyatab bogol, chito ne bo imanda ak koiywei Jehovah, ak baorianjin bororiet tugul ne bo Yahudik kole mie inendet, kole si kogasenen ng’alek." 
Acts10:23 Koguur anyun kobwa go ak kochopchi ichek ole ruitos. Ak king’eet karon koba koboto bichoto ak tupchosiek alak che kibunu Jopa. 
Acts10:24 Ak betut ne kiisubi betunoto koit Kaisaria. Ak kiigeni ichek Kornelio, ko kagoguur tupchosiekyik ak choronokyik che kiingengei komie." 
Acts10:25 Ak ye kingwo go Petero, kotoroch Kornelio inendet, ak kobutyi kelyekyik, kogutung’ji." 
Acts10:26 Ago kiing’eet Petero inendet kolenji, Tonon; anendet ko a chito agane." 
Acts10:27 Ak kingota kong’alaljindos tuwai, kwo go, ak konyor bik che chang’ che kagoyumgei:" 
Acts10:28 kolenji anyun ichek, Ongen okwek ole kiy ne etan eng’ ng’atutik eng’ chi ne Yahudio konamgei ak chi ne bo boror age anan konyo ole mi; ago kagoborua ane Jehovah kole, si mata aguure chi age ne ma tilil anan ne ng’wan:" 
Acts10:29 noto anyun kaanyo amata asich kiy ne amwae, ye kingo kageguura. Noto anyun ateebe ale nee ne koguurja." 
Acts10:30 Kole anyun Kornelio, Betusiek ang’wan rani koboch yoto agoi saini, ye kiasae eng’ sait sogol eng’ gonnyu; ak keero, kitonon eng’ tainnyu mureno ne ilaachi ngoroik che lilei bich," 
Acts10:31 ak kole, Kornelio, kigegas saeng’ung’, ak kigoek kabwatet eng’ taitab Jehovah kagochinoiguk." 
Acts10:32 Iyokte anyun bik koba Jopa, koguurun Simon ne kainet ne bo aeng’ ko Petero; mitei inendet ko toondet eng’ gotab Simon teiteindetab muiywek, ye negite ngegutab nyanjet." 
Acts10:33 Kiayogu anyun bik eng’ sainato kobwa ole imi; ak kaiyai ne mie amu kainyo. Kimi anyun yu nguno achek tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah, si kegas tuguk tugul che king’atin Kiptaiyat." 
Acts10:34 Ak king’any anyun Petero kutinnyi, kole, Iman ageere ale machamei Jehovah bik alak kosiir alak:" 
Acts10:35 ago taachaksei eng’ inendet chito ne iywei inendet, ak koyaei iman eng’ bororiet age tugul." 
Acts10:36 Ng’olyot ne kiiyokyi inendet lagokab Israel, ko koamda ng’alek che miach che bo kalyet eng’ Jesu Kristo (inendet ko Kiptiyat ne bo tugul)-" 
Acts10:37 ongen okwek ng’olyondonoto, ne kigiamda eng’ Judea komugul ketaune Galili, kingobata kabatisanet ne kiamdoi Johana;" 
Acts10:37 ongen okwek ng’olyondonoto, ne kigiamda eng’ Judea komugul ketaune Galili, kingobata kabatisanet ne kiamdoi Johana;" 
Acts10:38 ko u ye kiil Jehovah Jesu ne bo Nasaret, eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak eng’ kamuktaet: ne kiwendot ak koyaei ne mie, ak kosoobi tugul che kiinyalili oindet; amu kimi Jehovah koboto inendet." 
Acts10:39 Ak ki baorinik achek che bo tuguk tugul che kiyai eng’ emetab Yahudik, ak eng’ Jerusalem; ne kibar ichek inendet kogartat eng’ ketit." 
Acts10:40 Kiing’eet Jehovah inendet eng’ betutab somok, ak kogoito kotook," 
Acts10:41 ma eng’ bik tugul, ago eng’ baorinik che kiga sib kolewen Jehovah, acheget choto che kigiamisiei ak keeisei koboto inendet ko kagong’eet komong’ eng’ che kibek." 
Acts10:42 Ak king’atech keamji bik, ak kebaorian kele nito ko inendet ne kiinde Jehovah koek Kiruogindet ne bo che soptos ak che kigobek." 
Acts10:43 Baoriani maotik tugul agobo inendet, kole, nyoru nyoetab kaat amu tengekwogikyik eng’ kainennyi age tugul ne iyani inendet." 
Acts10:44 Ye kita komwaei Petero ng’alechu, kochorjigei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil tugul che kigasei ng’olyot." 
Acts10:45 Ak kikwong’io ichek che bo kamuratanet che kiiyani, tugul che kibwanei koboto Petero, amu kagerong’ji Bororiosiek agichek konunetab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Acts10:46 Amu kigasei ichek kong’alali eng’ kutuswek che terotin, ak kotorori Jehovah. Kowol anyun Petero kole," 
Acts10:47 Imuchi chi koete beek, si ma kibatisan bichu, che kagotaach Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ko u achek?" 
Acts10:48 Ak king’at kole kibatisan ichek eng’ kainetab Jesu Kristo. Kosom anyun ichek inendet kole kota kobeni betusiek alak. 
Acts11:1 Ak kigas anyun che kiyoktoi ak tupchosiek che kimi Judea kole kogotaach agichek Bororiosiek ng’olyotab Jehovah. 
Acts11:1 Ak kigas anyun che kiyoktoi ak tupchosiek che kimi Judea kole kogotaach agichek Bororiosiek ng’olyotab Jehovah. 
Acts11:2 Ak kingo kagonyo Petero Jerusalem, kobelgei ak inendet ichek che bo kamuratanet," 
Acts11:3 kolen, Kiiwe oldab bik che ma kimuratan ak iamisie koboto ichek." 
Acts11:4 Ago kitoi Petero kotetyi ichek komie ng’alechato, kolenji," 
Acts11:5 Kiami nganasetab Jopa asae: ak kingobutya kiy ne u ruon ageer ng’ang’utiet, ne bo kiy ne kichorugei, ne u anget ne o kot, ne kigichoor kobunu kipsengwet eng’ kuinoik ang’wan; ak kinyo agoi ole ami:" 
Acts11:6 ak ye kingageer mising’, abwat, ageer tiong’ikab ng’ony che bo kelyek ang’wan ak tiong’ik che bo timin ak tuguk che ichuutegei ak taritik che bo barak." 
Acts11:7 Ak kiagas kutit kolenja, Ng’eet, Petero; eny ak iam." 
Acts11:8 Ak kiamwa ale, Ma u noto, Kiptaiyandani: amu tom kochut kutinnyu kiy ne ma tilil anan ne ng’wan." 
Acts11:9 Ago kiwol kutinato ne bo aeng’ kobunu kipsengwet kole, Amata ing’wanit kit ne kagotilil Jehovah." 
Acts11:10 Ak kiyaak kioto konyil somok: ak kigichuut kogeny tugul koba kipsengwet. 
Acts11:11 Ak ogeero, kitonondos eng’ sainato bik somogu eng’ taitab got ole kigimi, che kigiyok eng’ Kaisaria kobwa ole ami." 
Acts11:12 Kong’ata anyun Tamirmiriet, kole, kebe tugul, amat isage. Ak kigibe tugul ak tupchosiechu lo agichek; kebe agoi gotab chichoto:" 
Acts11:13 ak kimwawech ko u ye kiga keer malaikaiyat kotononi eng’ gonnyi, kole, Iyokte bik koba Jopa koguur Simon, ne kiguure kainennyi ne bo aeng’ Petero;" 
Acts11:14 konyo komwaun ng’alek, che kisorunenen, inye ak gong’ung’ tugul." 
Acts11:15 Ak ye kingatau kang’alal, kochorjigei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ichek, ko u ye kichorjech ge agachek eng’ taunet." 
Acts11:16 Abwat anyun ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, ko u ye kimwa, kole, Kiibatisanis Johana eng’ beek; ago kibatisanok okwek eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Acts11:17 Ngo kiigochi anyun Jehovah ichek konunet ne kergei ak ne kigonech ye kingiyan Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, ko tos, kia ng’o anyun, kot amuch agirinda Jehovah?" 
Acts11:18 Ak kingogas ng’alechuto, kosisyo, kolos Jehovah, ak komwa kole, Kaga kagogochi Jehovah Bororiosiek agichek sigunet ne ibu sobondo." 
Acts11:19 Kiba anyun ichek che kiga yesta amu usisiet ne king’eet agobo Stepano agoi koit Poinike, ak Kupro, ak Antiokia, ko mang’alaljin chi age ng’olyot kobate Yahudik." 
Acts11:20 Ago kimi alak eng’ ichek, bikab Kupro ak Kurene, che kingobwa Antiokia kong’alalji Yunanik agichek, koamdoi Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Ak kimi eutab Kiptaiyat koboto ichek: ak kiiyan bik che chang’ konam ng’alekab Kiptaiyat. 
Acts11:22 Ak kigas ng’alek agobo ichek kaniset ne kimi Jerusalem: ak kiiyokto Barnaba kwo kot koit Antiokia: 
Acts11:23 ak kingoit inendet, ak kogeer mieindab Jehovah, kobaibait; ak kogiil ichek tugul konamgei ak Kiptaiyat eng’ mugulelwek che bekyinotin:" 
Acts11:24 amu ki chi ne mie, ak ko nyiitat Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak kayanet: ak kitesak bik che chang’ kobunji Kiptaiyat." 
Acts11:25 Ak kiwa agoi Tarso kocheng’ Saul: 
Acts11:26 ak kingo kagonyor, komut konyo Antiokia. Ak kiiyumgei eng’ kenyit agenge koboto kaniset, ak konet bik che chang’; ak kigitoi keguure alamalyet Kristianik eng’ Antiokia." 
Acts11:27 Ak kichorgei maotik eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Jerusalem kobwa Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Ak kitonon age eng’ ichek ne kigiguure Agabo, ak kobor eng’ Tamirmiriet kole tun biitu rubet ne o ng’ony komugul: ne kiisulda eng’ betusiekab Klaudio." 
Acts11:29 Ak kichopgei komie alamalyet koyokyi toretet tupchosiek che kimenyei Judea, chi tugul ko u ye kiimuchi:" 
Acts11:29 Ak kichopgei komie alamalyet koyokyi toretet tupchosiek che kimenyei Judea, chi tugul ko u ye kiimuchi:" 
Acts11:30 kiyai anyun ko u noto, kiiyokyi boisiek eng’ eunekab Barnaba ak Saul." 
Acts12:1 Ak ye ki negit betusiechoto kotoi laitoriat Herod kous alak che bo kaniset. 
Acts12:2 Ak kibar Jakobo ng’etab Kametab Johana eng’ rotwetab chok. 
Acts12:3 Ak ye kingogeer kole kiibaibai noto Yahudik, kotoi konam Petero agine. Ak ki betusiekab makatiat ne ma kinde mermerek, betusiechoto." 
Acts12:4 Ak kingo kagonam inendet, konde korgoret, ak kogochi askarik ang’wan konyil ang’wan korib inendet; kolen ye ibata Paska komutyi bik." 
Acts12:5 Kigirib Petero anyun eng’ korgoret: ago kisa kaniset Jehovah mising’ agobo inendet. 
Acts12:6 Ak ye kimachei komoong’ Herod inendet, ko kirue Petero kwenutab askarik aeng’ eng’ kemounoto, koratate sirimwek aeng’: ak kirib korgoret ribik eng’ taitab kurget." 
Acts12:7 Ak ogeero, kitonon malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat eng’ ye negite inendet, ak kiikweny lapkeiyet got: ak kiirabach karastab Petero, ak kong’eet kolenji, Ng’eet chokyi. Ak kiibutyo sirimwek che kimi eunekyik." 
Acts12:8 Ak kolenji malaikaiyat inendet, Ratge, indege kweoniguk ak irat. Ak kiyai ko u noto. Ak kilenji, Ilaach ngorieng’ung’, ak isubwa." 
Acts12:9 Ak kiwa sang’ ak kosub; ak kima nai kole iman kit ne kayai malaikaiyat, ago kilen kageer ng’ang’utiet." 
Acts12:10 Ak kingo kagosiir ripset ne bo tai ak ne bo aeng’, kobwa agoi ormarichet ne bo karnet ne kibunei kebendi nganaset; koyatak inegei: ak kimanda sang’, ak koba kobun oret agenge; ak eng’ sainato kobagakta inendet malaikaiyat kwo." 
Acts12:11 Ak ye kingobwat Petero, komwa kole, Kaanai nguno iman, ale, kagoyok Kiptaiyat malaikaiyandennyi ak kasorua eng’ eutab Herod, ak eng’ kagenisiet tugul ne bo bikab Yahudik." 
Acts12:12 Ak ye kingo kagobwat komie, konyo gotab Maria kametab Johana ne kiguure kainennyi ne bo aeng’ Mariko; ole kiga koyumjigei che chang’ ak kosaei." 
Acts12:13 Ak ye kingogongony kurgetab ormarichet, konyo chepto ne kigiguure Roda kogas." 
Acts12:14 Ak kingonai cheboto kutitab Petero, koma koyat ormarichet amu boiboiyet, ago kilabat go, ak komwaita kole tononi Petero eng’ ormarichet." 
Acts12:15 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Amin iywek. Ago kimwa eng’ kimnatet kole, u noto. Ak kimwa ichek kole, Malaikaiyandennyi." 
Acts12:16 Ago kites Petero kogongony: ak kingo kagoyat, kogeer inendet, ak kokwong’io." 
Acts12:17 Ago kiiborjine inendet ichek eut kosisyo, ak kotetyi ole kagomutunda Kiptaiyat inendet komong’ eng’ korgoret. Ak kimwa kole, Omwachi ng’alechu Jakobo, ak tupchosiek. Ak kiwa agoi komosta age." 
Acts12:18 Ak kingo kagoeech, kotoptobenso askarik mising’, kole, katepto ano Petero." 
Acts12:19 Ak ye kingo kagocheng’ Herod inendet, ama konyor, kogin ribik, ak kong’at kole kanyol kebar. Ak kichortagei eng’ Judea kwo Kaisaria, ak kotebe oloto." 
Acts12:19 Ak ye kingo kagocheng’ Herod inendet, ama konyor, kogin ribik, ak kong’at kole kanyol kebar. Ak kichortagei eng’ Judea kwo Kaisaria, ak kotebe oloto." 
Acts12:20 Ak kinerekyi mising’ Herod bikab Turo ak Sidon: ak kobwanji inendet eng’ kabwatet agenge, ak, kingonam chorua ak Blasto, ne kiribei ole kirue laitoriat, kosom kalyet, amu kibaei emetab laitoriat emenywa." 
Acts12:21 Ak eng’ betut ne kiging’at, kolaach Herod ngoroikab laitornatet, ak kotebe ng’echeretab kiruoget, ak kong’alalji bichoto." 
Acts12:22 Ak kibolyo bik, kole, Kutitab cheptalelit nito, ma bo chi." 
Acts12:23 Eng’ sainato anyun kobir inendet malaikaiyatab Kiptaiyat, amu ma konyit Jehovah: ak kiam inendet kutik, ak kime." 
Acts12:24 Ago kiner ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak kotesak." 
Acts12:25 Kiweektagei Barnaba ak Saul Jerusalem, ye kingo kagoges boisienywa, komuti Johana, ne ki kainennyi ne bo aeng’ ko Mariko." 
Acts13:1 Ak kimi kaniset ne kimi Antiokia, maotik ak konetik, Barnaba, ak Simion ne kigiguure Niger, ak Lukio ne bo Kurene, ak Manaen ne kigigui koboto kiruogindet Herod, ak Saul." 
Acts13:2 Ak ye kiboisiechin Kiptaiyat ak korugutegei, kole Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, Otabanwa Barnaba ak Saul agobo boisiet ne kiaguurji." 
Acts13:3 Ak ye kingo kagorugutgei ak kosaei ak kogonoor ichek eunekwak, koyokto koba." 
Acts13:4 Ak kingo kagoyokto ichek Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, kochorjigei Seleukia; ak kiba eng’ oloto kobun melit agoi Kupro." 
Acts13:5 Ak ye kimitei Salamis, koamda ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ sunagogisiekab Yahudik: ak kimi koboto Johana ne kiboisiechinoti." 
Acts13:6 Ak kingo kagobun emet komugul ne kiikwen beek agoi koit Papos, konyorji oloto bonin, maotio ne bo lembech, ne Yahudiot, ne kigiguure Bar-Jesu;" 
Acts13:7 ne kimi koboto bounindet, Sergio Paulos, chito ne ng’om. Kiguur chichito Barnaba ak Saul koba ole mi inendet, ak kimachei kogas ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Acts13:8 Ago kigirinda ichek Eluma ng’orindet (amu u noto kainennyi ye kiweech), kigirinda bounindonoto, kocheng’ei komaas kole si manyor kayanet." 
Acts13:9 Ago kinyi Tamirmiriet ne Tilil Saul, ne kiguure Paulo, ak kiichiilji kong’," 
Acts13:10 ak kole, Ee inye ne nyiitat ng’alset tugul ak ng’omnatet tugul ne bo kabeetet, inye weritab oindet, inye bunyotab imanda tugul, mebagaktoi imaas ortinwek che lititen che bo Kiptaiyat?" 
Acts13:11 Ak keer nguno anyun-o, mi eutab Kiptaiyat baragung’ung’, ak iegu kipkoratia, si mata igeer asista eng’ betusiek alak. Ak kiibutyi ngunoto mirmirindo ak mesundeito; ak kiwendot kocheng’at bik che namoti inendet eut." 
Acts13:12 Kingogeer anyun bounindet kit ne kayaak, koyan, kokwong’ agobo konetisietab Kiptaiyat." 
Acts13:13 Kiba anyun Paulo ak che kimi koboto inendet kobun melit eng’ Papos, ak koit Perga eng’ Pampulia: ak kiwa Johana koweektagei Jerusalem kobagakta ichek." 
Acts13:14 Ak kingobun ichek Perga, koit Antiokia ne bo Pisidia; ak kiba sunagogit eng’ betutab sabato, ak koteb ng’ony." 
Acts13:15 Ak kingobata somanetab Ng’atutiet ak sirutikab maotik koyokto bounikab sunagogit bik koba ole mi ichek, kolenji, Che kitupche, ngotinye ng’olyo age tugul ne imuchi kotoret bichu, omwa." 
Acts13:16 Kotonon anyun Paulo, ak koborjine eut, kole, Ogaso okwek bikab Israel, ak okwek che oiywei Jehovah." 
Acts13:17 Kilewen Jehovah ne bo bichu Israel kwanisiekyok, ak kotoror bichoto ye ki bunotik eng’ emetab Misri, ak kiimut ichek komong’ eng’ eut ne kim." 
Acts13:18 Ak kimuitochi ichek eng’ atebosiekwak eng’ olo bo kenyisiek artam eng’ ong’atet. 
Acts13:19 Ak kingo kagong’em bororiosiek tisab eng’ emetab Kanan, kogochi ichek emenywa koek borotet, eng’ olo bo kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak konom:" 
Acts13:20 ak kingobata tuguchu kogochi ichek kiruogik agoi Samuel maotiot. 
Acts13:21 Ak kingobata kosom laitoriat: ak kiigochi Jehovah ichek Saul weritab Kis eng’ kenyisiek artam, chito ne bo oretab Benjamin." 
Acts13:22 Ak kingo kagoisto inendet, kong’eetyi Daudi koek laitoriandenywa; ne kibaorianji agine kole, Kaanyoru Daudi weritab Jesii, chito ne iboiboi muguleldanyu, ne tun yaei magutikyuk tugul." 
Acts13:23 Ak kiimutyi Jehovah Israel Yetindet, Jesu, eng’ keswekab chichito, ko u arorutiet;" 
Acts13:24 ye kiga sib koamji Johana bik tugul che bo Israel, kabatisanet ne bo sigunet, ye kitomo konyo inendet." 
Acts13:25 Ak ye ki negit koges Johana bandanyi, komwa kole, Olen a ng’o? Ma a inendet. Ago ogeero, isubwa age, ne manyoljina atiakyi kweonikab kelyekyik." 
Acts13:26 Che kitupche, lagokab keswek che bo Abraham, ak alak che mi kwenung’wong’ che iywei Jehovah, kagiyokwech achek ng’olyondoni bo yetunet." 
Acts13:27 Ichek che menyei Jerusalem, koboto bounikwak, amu kima nai inendet, anan kutuswekab maotik che kisomani eng’ sabato age tugul, kosuldae kutuswechuto kiruoget ne kiiruokyi inendet." 
Acts13:28 Ak nganda kimanyor eng’ inendet ng’olyot ne igochin kome, ago kisom ichek Pilato kole, kebar inendet." 
Acts13:29 Ak ye kingo kagoges tuguk tugul che kiga kisir agobo inendet, kochoor inendet eng’ ketit, ak konde kererit." 
Acts13:30 Ago kiing’eet Jehovah inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek: 
Acts13:31 Ak kigeer inendet eng’ betusiek che chang’ ichek che kitogosu koboto inendet kobunu Galili kobwanei Jerusalem, che nguno ko baorinik eng’ bik." 
Acts13:32 Ak kiibwok logoiywek che miach che bo arorutiet, ne kigigochi kwanisiekyok," 
Acts13:33 ko u ye kigosuldochi Jehovah lagokyok noto, amu kiing’eet Jesu; ko u ye sirat eng’ Tiendab Kalosunet ne bo aeng’, kole, I werinnyu, kaasichin rani." 
Acts13:34 Ak ko u ye kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek, ma koweekyingei amu inendet kogeny nunet, kimwa ko u ni, kole, Tun agonin kaberuroik che tililen, ak ko bo iman, che bo Daudi." 
Acts13:35 Amu kimwa agine eng’ Tiendo age, kole, Matun igochini neng’ung’ Ne Tilil kogeer nunet." 
Acts13:36 Amu ye kingo kagoboisiechi Daudi kiruogutikab Jehovah eng’ ibindanyi, konuuch, ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kogeer nunet:" 
Acts13:37 ago ma keer nunet inendet ne kiing’eet Jehovah. 
Acts13:38 Ingonaak anyun eng’ okwek, che kitupche, kele, kimwawok eng’ chichi nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik:" 
Acts13:39 ak kiityin imanda eng’ inendet age tugul ne iyani, eng’ tuguk tugul, che koma komuchi koiityok imanda Ng’atutietab Musa." 
Acts13:40 Oripge anyun, si manyonjok ne kigimwa eng’ maotik; kele," 
Acts13:41 Ogeero, okwek sasik, okwong’ie, ak olusye; Amu ayae boisiet eng’ betusiekwok, Boisiet ne magoi oyan matiny, agot ngo mwawok chi." 
Acts13:42 Ak kingota komandoi ichek, kosom kole, tun ko ta koamji ichek ng’alechato eng’ sabato ne nyonei." 
Acts13:43 Ak kingo kagomanda tuiyet eng’ sunagogit, kosub Paulo ak Barnaba che chang’ che bo Yahudik ak che konyiti Jehovah che kiwalak kobunji Yahudik: ye kingong’alaljin ichek, kogiil kole koba tai eng’ mieindab Jehovah." 
Acts13:44 Ak eng’ sabato ne isubi noto, koyumgei nganaset che negit tugul kole kogas ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Acts13:45 Ago ye kingogeer Yahudik tuiyosiek, koam ng’et kong’, ak koesio eng’ kimnatet ng’alek che kimwaei Paulo, ak komwa ng’alek che yaachen kochubis." 
Acts13:46 Kong’alal anyun Paulo ak Barnaba eng’ nyiganatet, kolen, Konyolu kemwawok korok ng’olyotab Jehovah. Amu ogirindoi, ak oruokyinige okwege ole manyolu onyoru sobondab koigeny, ogeero, kagibe oldab Bororiosiek." 
Acts13:47 Amu king’atech Kiptaiyat ko u noto, kole, Kaandein iegu lapkeiyet ne bo Bororiosiek, Si kobiit iegu yetunet agoi tabandab ng’ony." 
Acts13:48 Ak kingogas Bororiosiek ng’olyondonito, koboiboitu, ak kogonyit ng’olyotab Jehovah: ak koyan tugul che kiga kelewenji sobondab koigeny." 
Acts13:49 Ak kiyom ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat koronoto tugul. 
Acts13:50 Ago kiinde Yahudik ng’alekab chaamset kobogorisiek che konyiti Jehovah ak ko toogunotin, ak bik che eechen che bo nganaset, ak kiing’eet usisiet kous Paulo ak Barnaba, ak koon komanda eng’ kiwotosiekwak." 
Acts13:51 Ago kilelekyi ichek temburiek che mi kelyekwak, ak kiit Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Ak kinyi alamalyet boiboindo ak Tamirmiriet ne Tilil. 
Acts14:1 Ak ye kimi Ikonio, koba tuwai agoi sunagogitab Yahudik, ak kong’alal kot koyan tuiyet ne o ne bo Yahudik ak Yunanik." 
Acts14:2 Ago kiim Yahudik che ki bistoik sobonwekab Bororiosiek kot kogochi kowech tupchosiek. 
Acts14:3 Kitebe oloto anyun betusiek che chang’ ak kong’alali eng’ nyiganatet agobo Kiptaiyat, ne kibaorianji ng’olyotab mieindanyi, ak kogochin koyaak kaborunoik ak kwong’utik eng’ eunekwak." 
Acts14:4 Ago kipcheigei tuiyet ne bo nganaset; ak kinamgei alage ak Yahudik, konamgei alage ak che kiyoktoi." 
Acts14:5 Ak ye kimachei Bororiosiek ak Yahudik koboto bounikwak kobokyi ichek, kole koyachi ne ya, ak kolach eng’ koik," 
Acts14:6 kosib konai, ak kimwechi Lustra ak Derbe, nganasok che bo Lukaonia, ak korotinwek che negite oloto:" 
Acts14:7 ak kiamda logoiywek che miach eng’ oloto. 
Acts14:8 Ak kitebyei chito age eng’ Lustra, ne kima ko kimen kelyekyik, ne ki solomwo koboch komi moetab kamet, ne kitomo kowendot." 
Acts14:9 Kigas chichoto Paulo kong’alali: ak kingochiilji kong’ inendet chichoto, ak kogeer kole tinyei kayanet ne kimuchi kisoob," 
Acts14:10 komwa eng’ kutit ne o kole, Tonon komie eng’ kelyeguk. Ak kitoromben ak kowendot." 
Acts14:11 Ak kingogeer tuiyosiek kit ne kayai Paulo, kobolyo eng’ ng’alekab Lukaonia, kole, Kachorjech ge cheptalelisiek eng’ kergeindab bik." 
Acts14:12 Ak kiguure Barnaba, Seu; koguure Paulo, Herme, amu ki ng’alalindet ne o inendet." 
Acts14:13 Ak kiget tisiindetab Seu ne kimi hekalunnyi taitab nganaset, tuga ak sinendoik kobwa kurgotik, ak kimachei inendet koboto tuiyosiek kogoito tisieywot." 
Acts14:14 Ago ye kingogas agobo noto che kiyoktoi Barnaba ak Paulo, kogerer ngoroikwak, ak koruai koba kwenutab tuiyet, koboldos," 
Acts14:15 kolen, Murenju, kalya si oyai tuguchu? Ki bik agachek, che kergei ak okwek, ak kagiibwok logoiywek che miach, si kobiit oweige omete tuguchu matilei kiy ak obwanji Jehovah ne sobei, inendet ne kiyaei kipsengwet ak ng’ony ak nyanjet, ak tugul che mi oloto:" 
Acts14:16 kibagakyi inendet bororiosiek tugul eng’ ibinwek che kigosiirto, kobendat eng’ ortinwekwak." 
Acts14:17 Ago kima tebi buch inendet ama tinyei baoria, amu kiyai ne mie, ak kogonok ropta ne bunu kipsengwet ak betusiekab ruratet, kogochin kobiyong’so mugulelwekwok eng’ amitwogik ak kagasetab ge." 
Acts14:18 Ak ki negit kotemene koger tuiyosiek eng’ ng’alechu si mata kogochi tiseiywot. 
Acts14:19 Ago kibwa Yahudik che kibunu Antiokia ak Ikonia: ak kingo kagolom tuiyosiek, kolach Paulo eng’ koik, ak kochuut komanda eng’ nganaset, kolen kagome." 
Acts14:20 Ago ye kitonondos alamalyet ko kayiem inendet, kong’eet, ak kwo nganaset: ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto koba Derbe ak Barnaba." 
Acts14:21 Ak ye kingo kagoamji logoiywek che miach nganasanato, ak ko kagoyai che chang’ koek alamalyet, koweektagei koba Lustra, ak Ikonia, agoi Antiokia," 
Acts14:22 kogimitoti sobonwekab alamalyet, kogiili koba tai eng’ kayanet, ak kolenji, kanyol keit bounatetab Jehovah eng’ nyalilwogik che chang’." 
Acts14:23 Ak kingo kagolewenji ichek boisiek eng’ kaniset age tugul, ak kosa eng’ karugutetab ge, konde ichek eutab Kiptaiyat, ne kiga koyan." 
Acts14:24 Ak kibun Pisidia, ak koit Pampulia." 
Acts14:25 Ak kingo kagoamda ng’olyot eng’ Perga, kochortagei Atalia;" 
Acts14:26 ak kibun melit eng’ oloto agoi Antiokia, oloto ole kigindae ichek mieindab Jehovah agobo boisiet ne kiga koyai kosulda." 
Acts14:27 Ak kingo kagobwa, koyum kaniset komugul, komwachi tuguk tugul che kiga koyai Jehovah eng’ ichek, ak ko u ye kiga koyatyi Bororiosiek kurget ne bo kayanet." 
Acts14:28 Ak kitebi betusiek che chang’ koboto alamalyet. 
Acts15:1 Ak kichorgei bik alak che kibunu Judea ak konet tupchosiek, kole, Ngot ko magimuratanak ko u biteetab Musa, ko momuchi onyoru sorunet." 
Acts15:1 Ak kichorgei bik alak che kibunu Judea ak konet tupchosiek, kole, Ngot ko magimuratanak ko u biteetab Musa, ko momuchi onyoru sorunet." 
Acts15:2 Ak ye kingo kagotiiyo Paulo ak Barnaba mising’ ak koteebegei mising’ koboto ichek, kolewen tupchosiek Paulo ak Barnaba, ak alak eng’ ichek, kotogosta koba Jerusalem ole mi che kiyoktoi ak boisiek agobo ng’olyondonito." 
Acts15:3 Ak kingo kagoyomis anyun ichek kaniset eng’ bandanywa, kobun Poinike ak Samaria, komwaitaati agobo che kigowalogis koyan Jehovah eng’ Bororiosiek: ak kiigochi ng’olyondonoto tupchosiek tugul boiboiyet ne o." 
Acts15:4 Ak kingo kagoit Jerusalem, kotaach ichek kaniset ak che kiyoktoi ak boisiek, ak komwachi ichek tuguk tugul che kiga koyai Jehovah koboto icheget." 
Acts15:5 Ago kitononso alak eng’ kasubikab Parisaik che iyanotin, kole, Kanyol kimuratan ichek, ak keng’at ichek korib Ng’atutietab Musa." 
Acts15:6 Ak kiiyumgei che kiyoktoi ak boisiek si kobiit kogeer ole teptoi ng’olyondonito. 
Acts15:7 Ak kingo kagoteebegei mising’, kotonon Petero ak komwachi ichek, kole, Che kitupche, ongen okwek ole kigolewen Jehovah eng’ kwenung’wong’ koboch ye bo ui, kole, kogas Bororiosiek ng’olyot ne bo logoiywek che miach eng’ kutinnyu, ak koyan." 
Acts15:8 Ak kibaorianji ichek Jehovah ne ingen mugulelwekab bik, kogochi ichek Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, ko u ye kigonech;" 
Acts15:9 ak kima ibesiech ak icheget, ye kiitilili mugulelwekwak eng’ kayanet." 
Acts15:10 Kalya nguno anyun si otiem Jehovah kot onde chogit kaatitab alamalyet, ne kima imuch koib kwanisiekyok anan achek?" 
Acts15:11 Ago kiyani kele kisoruech eng’ mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu, ko u ye kisoru agichek." 
Acts15:12 Kosisyo anyun tuiyet komugul; ak koepchi it Barnaba ak Paulo kotetyin ichek kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che kiga koyai Jehovah eng’ ichek eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek. 
Acts15:13 Ak kingo kagosisyo, kowol Jakobo, kole, Che kitupche, ogaso." 
Acts15:14 Kagomwa Simion ko u ye kirutochi Jehovah Bororiosiek eng’ tai, si kobiit kolewenji kainennyi bik eng’ ichek." 
Acts15:15 Ak kanamgei nito ak ng’alekab maotik; ko u ye sirat, kole," 
Acts15:16 Ye ibata tuguchu aweege, Ak ateech kogeny gotab Daudi, ne kigolul; Ak ateech kogeny komoswek che kigolulyo, Ak alum kotonon:" 
Acts15:17 Si kocheng’ bik che ng’etunotin Kiptaiyat, Ak Bororiosiek tugul che kiguurtoe kainennyu." 
Acts15:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat, ne yaei tuguchu si konaak koboch taunetab ng’ony." 
Acts15:19 Noto anyun, atile kiruoget ko u ni ale, amata kinyalil achek ichek che bo Bororiosiek che bwanjin Jehovah;" 
Acts15:20 ago ongesirji ichek, kelenji kotabanegei muruonindab kanamonik, ak sokset, ak ne bo tuguk che kagiget, ak korotik." 
Acts15:21 Amu kitinyei Musa koboch ibinwek che bo keny eng’ nganasok tugul, icheget che amdoi agobo inendet, che kisomani eng’ sunagogisiek eng’ sabato age tugul." 
Acts15:22 Kogeer anyun che kiyoktoi ak boisiek, koboto kaniset komugul, kole mie kolewen bik alak eng’ ichek, ak koyokto koba Antiokia koboto Paulo ak Barnaba; choto ko Judas ne kigiguure Barsaba, ak Sila, bik che eechen eng’ tupchosiek:" 
Acts15:23 ak kisir ko u ni ak koyoktoe ichek, Kisirjini achek che kiyoktoi ak tupchosiek che boisiek, tupchosiek che bo Bororiosiek che mi Antiokia ak Suria ak Kilikia, kigatok:" 
Acts15:24 amu kogegas kele, inyalilok eng’ ng’alek bik alak che kibunei kwenunnyo, kong’emei sobonwekwok; bik che kima king’at ko u noto;" 
Acts15:25 kagigeer kele mie eng’ achek, che kagechamnyechi, kelewen bik ak kiyokwok koboto chamanikyok Barnaba ak Paulo," 
Acts15:26 bik che kigogoito sobonwekwak amu kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Kagiyogu anyun Juda ak Sila, si komwawok icheget agichek tuguchuto eng’ kutuswekwak." 
Acts15:28 Amu kigeere kele mie eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, ak eng’ achek kele, magigesenjok milet ne nyigis kosiir tuguchu nyolu;" 
Acts15:29 kele otabanege tuguk che kieng’jin kanamonik, ak korotik, ak banyekab che kagiget, ak sokset; ngotabanege choto, komieitu eng’ okwek. Saisere." 
Acts15:30 Ye kingo kagiyokto koba anyun, kochortagei koba Antiokia; ak kingo kagoyum tuiyet, kogochi baruet." 
Acts15:31 Ak kingo kagosoman koboiboitu agobo kagaigaet. 
Acts15:32 Ak kiigiil Juda ak Sila, tupchosiek eng’ ng’alek che chang’, ak kogimit amu ki maotik agichek." 
Acts15:33 Ak kingo kagotebe oloto betusiek alak, kounda tupchosiek ichek eng’ kalyet koba ole mi ichek che kiiyogu." 
Acts15:34 Ago kicham Sila kota kotebe oloto. 
Acts15:35 Ago kitebe Paulo ak Barnaba Antiokia, koneti ak koamdoi ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, koboto bik alak che chang’ agichek." 
Acts15:36 Ak kingobata betusiek alak kolenji Paulo Barnaba, Ingeweege nguno kerutochi tupchosiek eng’ nganaset age tugul ole kigeamdaate ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, ak kegeer ole teptoi." 
Acts15:37 Ak kimachei Barnaba mising’ komut Johana, ne kigiguure Mariko, koba tugul." 
Acts15:38 Ago kiibwat Paulo kole, ma mie kimut inendet ne kiga kobagakta ichek eng’ Pampulia, ama cham koba boisiet koboto ichek." 
Acts15:39 Ak king’eetyo ng’alek che koromen, kot kopcheigei ichegei, ak kiimut Barnaba Mariko, ak kobun melit agoi Kupro;" 
Acts15:40 ago kilewen Paulo Sila, ak koba, ko kagonde tupchosiek ichek mieindab Kiptaiyat." 
Acts15:41 Ak kobun Suria ak Kilikia, kogimitoti kanisosiek." 
Acts16:1 Ak kinyo agine Derbe ak Lustra: ak ogeero, kimi age ne bo alamalyet oloto, ne kigiguure Timoteo, weritab Chebyahudiot ne kiiyani; ago ki Yunanindet kwandanyi." 
Acts16:2 Kibaorianjin inendet tupchosiek che kimi Lustra ak Ikonio kole mie. 
Acts16:3 Kimachei Paulo chichito koba tuwai; ak kiimut inendet ak komuratan amu Yahudik che kimi komoswechoto: amu kiingen tugul kole Yunanindet kwandanyi. 
Acts16:4 Ak ye kibendi bandanywa kobunoti nganasok kogochi ichek ng’atutik, che kiga ng’at che kiyoktoi ak boisiek che kimi Jerusalem, si korib." 
Acts16:5 Kigigimit anyun kanisosiek eng’ kayanet, ak kotesak koitenywa betut age tugul." 
Acts16:6 Kiba anyun kobun koret ne bo Prugia ak Galatia, ko kagoete ichek Tamirmiriet ne Tilil komwaita ng’olyot eng’ Asia;" 
Acts16:7 ak ye kingotorjigei Musia, kotiem koba Bitunia; ago ma chamji ichek Tamirmirietab Jesu;" 
Acts16:8 ak kingosiir Musia, kochortagei Troa." 
Acts16:9 Kinyonji anyun ng’ang’utiet Paulo kemoi; kimi chitab Makedonia ne kitononi, kogoigoi inendet, kolen, Long’u Makedonia, nyo toretech." 
Acts16:10 Ak ye kingo kagogeer ng’ang’utiet, eng’ sainato kemach kebe Makedonia, ko kagenai kele kogoguurech Jehovah si kobiit keamji ichek logoiywek che miach." 
Acts16:11 Kigibun anyun melit kebunu Troa, kitorjige Samotrake, ak betut ne kiisubi noto keit Neapoli:" 
Acts16:12 ak keng’eetyo oloto kebe Pilipi, ne nganasetab Makedonia, ne ki toogunot eng’ emonoto, ne kiuchi Romanik: ak kigitebe nganasanato betusiek alak." 
Acts16:13 Ak eng’ betutab sabato kemandae ormarichet kebe ole negite ainet, ole kigilen oldab saet; ak kigiteb ng’ony ak keng’alalji kobogorisiek che kiga tuiyo." 
Acts16:14 Ak kigasech kobogoriot age, ne kigiguure Ludia, aldaindetab ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ne bo nganaset ne kiguure Tuatera, ne kiilosu Jehovah: ne kiyat Kiptaiyat muguleldanyi, si koepchi it tuguk che kimwaei Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ak ye kiga kibatisan inendet, ak bikab gonnyi, kogaigaech, kole, Ngo kaogeer ole ayani Kiptaiyat, obwa gonnyu, ak otebi. Ak kibirjech kebe." 
Acts16:16 Ak ye kigibendi oldab saet, kotuiyenech chepto ne kitinyei tamirmiriet ne ng’orsei ne kiipchi kiptainikyik tuguk che chang’ amu ng’orset." 
Acts16:17 Kiisubot Paulo kebendi tugul, ak komwaei eng’ kutit ne o, kolen, Bichu ko otwogikab Jehovah ne Toror Mising’, che mwawok oretab yetunet." 
Acts16:18 Ak kiyai inendet ko u noto eng’ betusiek che chang’. Ago kiarogen Paulo mising’, ak kowelelgei ak kolenji tamirmirionoto, Kang’atin eng’ kainetab Jesu Kristo ale, mong’u eng’ inendet. Ak kimong’ eng’ sainato." 
Acts16:19 Ago kingogeer kiptainikyik kole kagobet kamang’unetab keljinenywa, konam Paulo ak Sila, ak kochuut koba taitab bounik eng’ oldab aldaisiet," 
Acts16:20 ak kingo kagomut ichek kobwa taitab kiruogik, komwa kole, Inyalili bichu nganasennyo mising’, ago icheget ko Yahudik," 
Acts16:21 ak ineti bitonwek che ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik ketaach, anan kisub, amu achek ko ki Romanik." 
Acts16:22 Ak king’eet tuiyet kibagenge kobokyi ichek: ak kogerer kiruogik ngoroikab bichoto, ak kong’at kebir eng’ kirokwek." 
Acts16:23 Ak kingo kagobir ichek mising’, kotoorji korgoret, ak kong’at ribindetab korgoret korib komie:" 
Acts16:24 ak kingo kagonyor ng’atutiet ne u noto, kotoorji ichek got ne bo orit, ak koratyi kelyekwak temeleiywek." 
Acts16:25 Ago kisaei Paulo ak Sila ak kotienjin Jehovah tienwogik olo bo kemoi kwen, ak kiepchin it ichek kimonjororinik;" 
Acts16:26 ak kibotan emet mising’ eng’ sainato, kot kotumdumgei lumeiywekab korgoret: ak eng’ sainato koyatogis kurgotik tugul; ak kiitiagogis tuguk che kigirate chi tugul." 
Acts16:27 Ak kingosiir eng’ ruondo ribindetab korgoret, ak kogeer kurgotikab korgoret ko yatotin, kong’us rotwennyi bo chok, ak ki negit kobargei, kolen kagochililyo kimonjororinik." 
Acts16:28 Ago kimwa Paulo eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ameyachige kiy ne ya: amu kimi yu achek tugul." 
Acts16:29 Ak kiguur keib taisiek, ak kotoromben kwo orit, ak kiibutyi kelyekab Paulo ak Sila kobotananu eng’ kaiyweisiet," 
Acts16:30 ak kiimut komong’ sang’, ak kole, Kiptainichu, ayai nee si kesorua?" 
Acts16:31 Kolenji, Iyan Kiptaiyat Jesu, si kesorun, inye ak gong’ung’." 
Acts16:32 Ak kimwachi inendet ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, koboto tugul che kimi gonnyi." 
Acts16:33 Ak kiimut ichek sainato bo kemoi, ak kounji birutikwak; ak kigibatisan inendet ak bikyik eng’ sainato." 
Acts16:34 Ak kiimut koba gonnyi ak kogochi amitwogik, ak kiboiboitu mising’, koboto gonnyi tugul, amu kagoyan Jehovah." 
Acts16:35 Ak ye kingoeech, koyokto kiruogik kiptainikab askarik, kole, Ounde bicho koba." 
Acts16:36 Ak kimwachi ribindetab korgoret Paulo ng’alechato, kole, Kagoyok kiruogik kole keundak obe: omong’u anyun ak obe eng’ kalyet." 
Acts16:37 Ago kilenji Paulo ichek, Kagobirech eng’ taitab bik, ama kiruokwech, achek bik che ki Romanik, ak kogotoorjech korgoret; ak nguno komachei koonech eng’ ung’ot? Achicha, ma u noto; ago ingobwa icheget komutech kemande." 
Acts16:38 Ak kimwachi kiptainikab askarik ng’alechuto kiruogik: ak kiiywei, kingogas kole icheget ko Romanik:" 
Acts16:39 ak kibwa kogaigai ichek; ak kingo kagomut ichek kobwa sang’, kosom, kolenji, Oba eng’ nganaset." 
Acts16:40 Ak kimanda eng’ korgoret, ak kiba agoi gotab Ludia: ak kingo kagogeer tupchosiek, kogaigai ichek, ak koba." 
Acts17:1 Ak kingo kagobun Ampipoli ak Apolonia, koit Tesalonike, ole kimi sunagogitab Yahudik:" 
Acts17:2 ak kiwa Paulo ole mi ichek, ko u ye kicham koyaei, ak kong’alal koboto bichoto eng’ sabatosiek somok eng’ sirutik," 
Acts17:3 kong’ang’jin ak koborjin komie kole kiga nyolji Kristo konyalil, ak kong’eet kogeny eng’ che kibek; ak kole Jesu nito aamwok, ko Kristo." 
Acts17:4 Kiiyan anyun alage eng’ ichek, ak konamgei ak Paulo ak Sila; ak tuiyet ne o ne bo Yunanik che kigonyiti Jehovah, ak che chang’ eng’ kobogorisiek che toogunotin." 
Acts17:5 Ago ye kingoam ng’etkonda Yahudik, konamgei ak bik che yaachen che matilei kiy, ak kiiyum tuiyet, ak kong’eet ichek bolatet eng’ nganaset; ak kibut gotab Jason, komachei kole komut ichek sang’ koba ole mi bik." 
Acts17:6 Ak ye kimata konyor, kochuut Jason ak tupchosiek alak koba taitab kiruogikab nganaset, koboldos, kolen, Kagobwa oli kogeny bichu kogowal ng’ony;" 
Acts17:7 bik che kagotaach Jason: ak yaei bichuto tugul, tuguk che etei ng’atutikab Kaisari, komwaei kolen mitei laitoriat age, ne inendet ko Jesu." 
Acts17:8 Ak ye kingogas tuguchuto, koiim tuiyet ak kiruogikab nganaset." 
Acts17:9 Ak kingo kagoname Jason ak bik alak, tuguk, kounda koba." 
Acts17:10 Ak ne matianit koyokto tupchosiek Paulo ak Sila kemoi koba Berea: ak kingoit oloto, koba sunagogitab Yahudik." 
Acts17:11 Ak ki miachen bichu kosiir choto bo Tesalonike, amu kitaach ng’olyot ak kocham mising’, kosiachi sirutik betut age tugul, si kobiit konai ngo iman tuguchu." 
Acts17:12 Kiiyan anyun che chang’ eng’ icheget; ak kobogorisiek che bo Yunanik che toogunotin, ak murenik che chang’." 
Acts17:13 Ago kingonai Yahudik che bo Tesalonike kole, amdoi Paulo ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ Berea agine, koba oloto agine, ak kowas ak konyalil tuiyosiek." 
Acts17:14 Koyokto anyun ngunoto tupchosiek Paulo kot koit nyanjet: ak kita kotebi eng’ oloto Sila ak Timoteo. 
Acts17:15 Ago icheget che kiimuti Paulo ko kiimut agoi Atene: ak kingotaach ng’atutiet koipchi Sila ak Timoteo kole koba ole mi inendet kochok, koba anyun." 
Acts17:16 Ak kingota kogeni Paulo ichek eng’ Atene, koiimak tamirmiriennyi eng’ orinnyi, ye kingogeer nganaset ko nyiitat kanamonik." 
Acts17:17 Kong’alal anyun eng’ sunagogit koboto Yahudik ak bik che konyiti Jehovah, ak eng’ oldab aldaisiet eng’ betut age tugul koboto che kituitos ak inendet." 
Acts17:18 Ak kituiyo koboto inendet alak che bo ng’omotikab Epikurio ak Stoiko. Ak kole alak, Mwaei nee kipchang’alaini? Kole alak, U kabartaindet ne bo cheptalelisiek che ter: amu kiamdoi Jesu ak ng’eetyet." 
Acts17:19 Ak konam inendet, ak komut kwo Areopago, kole, Tos kimuchi kenai kele nee konetisioni leel, imwae?" 
Acts17:20 Amu keipchi itikyok tuguk alak che leelach: noto anyun kimache kenai kit ne iboru tuguchuto. 
Acts17:21 (Ak kima kotinyei bik tugul che bo Atene, ak toek che kimi oloto, boroindo ne bo kiy age kobate komwa anan kogas ng’al che too.)" 
Acts17:22 Ak kitonon Paulo eng’ kwenutab Areopago, ak kole, Okwek bikab Atene, kaageer ale eng’ tuguk tugul ogiilige mising’ eng’ sautik." 
Acts17:23 Amu ye kiasiirtoi, ak ageer tuguk che osae, anyoru agine kapkorosut ne tinyei sirutichu, BO CHEPTALELIT NE MANAEI CHI. Noto anyun ne osae amongen, aboruok anyun nito." 
Acts17:24 Mamenyei hekalusiek che kigiyae eunek Jehovah ne kiyai ng’ony ak tuguk tugul che mitei oloto, amu inendet ko Kiptaiyatab kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Acts17:25 Ama kiboisiechin eng’ eunekab bik, ko u ne banani kiy, amu inendet ne igochin tugul sobondo, ak kabuset, ak tuguk tugul;" 
Acts17:26 ak kiyai eng’ chito agenge bororiet age tugul ne bo bik si komeny ng’ony komugul, ko kagoborji kenyisiek che kiging’at, ak kiwotosiekab meng’otenywa;" 
Acts17:27 si kobiit kocheng’ Jehovah, komang’u kole tamangab kotamdamat, ak konyor inendet, nganda ma loo eng’ age tugul eng’ achek:" 
Acts17:28 amu kisoptosi eng’ inendet, ak kebendoti, ak kemi; ko u ye kigomwa alage eng’ sirikwok che bo ng’alek che kergei ak tienwogikab kalosunet, kole, Amu ki lagokyik ak achek." 
Acts17:29 Ngo ki lagokab Jehovah anyun, ko manyoljech kibwat kele kergei Jehovah ak tahabu, anan feda, anan koita, che kigiyai eng’ musoknatet ak eng’ ng’omnatetab bik." 
Acts17:30 Kima mage kiy anyun Jehovah betusiek che kima komi naet; ago kang’at nguno kole kosik bik tugul eng’ komosta age tugul: 
Acts17:31 amu kigochob betut, ne tun iruokyine ng’ony eng’ imanda eng’ chichoto kigonde; ak kigoborji komie bik tugul agobo noto, amu kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek." 
Acts17:32 Ye kingogas anyun agobo ng’eetyetab che kibek, kochombil alage; ago kile alak, Ta kegasun nito betut age." 
Acts17:33 Kimanda anyun Paulo eng’ kwenunywa. 
Acts17:34 Ago kinamgei bik alak ak inendet, ak koyan; ki age eng’ icheget Dionusio Areopagindet, ak kobogoriot ne kiguure Damaris, ak alak che kimi koboto icheget." 
Acts18:1 Kingobata tuguchu kwo Paulo eng’ Atene, ak koit Korinto." 
Acts18:2 Ak kinyor Yahudiot age ne kiguure Akula, chito ne bo Ponto, ne kita kobunu Italia, koboto osotiondennyi Prisila, amu kiga ng’at Klaudio kole koba Yahudik tugul eng’ Rom: ak kinyo ole mi ichek;" 
Acts18:3 amu ki kergei boisiennyi ak nenywa, kotebi anyun koboto ichek, ak kobois tugul; amu ki nabik che bo emaisiek icheget." 
Acts18:4 Ak king’alali eng’ sunagogit sabato age tugul, ak kochuutu Yahudik ak Yunanik." 
Acts18:5 Ago ye kingochorgei Sila ak Timoteo kobunu Makedonia, konyonji Paulo kachirjiret ne bo ng’olyot, kobaorianjin Yahudik kole Jesu ko Kristo." 
Acts18:6 Ak ye kingogirindagei ak inendet, ak komwa ng’alek kochubis, koleglekta ngoriennyi, ak kolenji, Ingotebi korotikwok eng’ metowekwok; a tilil ane: koboch nguno ko kawe oldab Bororiosiek." 
Acts18:7 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto, ak kwo gotab chito age ne kiguure Tito Justo, chito ne kiilosu Jehovah, ne kinamegei gonnyi ak sunagogit." 
Acts18:8 Ak kiiyan Krispo Kiptaiyat, ne ki bounindetab sunagogit, koboto gonnyi tugul; ak kingogas che chang’ che bo Korintoek, koyan, ak kigibatisan." 
Acts18:9 Ak kilenji Kiptaiyat Paulo kemoi eng’ ng’ang’utiet, Ameiywei, ago ng’alal inye, amat isis:" 
Acts18:10 amu ami koboten, ama mi chi ne twain koyaun ne ya: amu atinye bik che chang’ eng’ nganasani." 
Acts18:11 Ak kimeny oloto kenyit agenge ak arawek lo, koneti ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kwenunywa." 
Acts18:12 Ago ye kingo kiruogindetab Akayo Galio, kong’eetyi Yahudik Paulo eng’ maget agenge, ak komut inendet kwo taitab ng’echeretab kiruoget," 
Acts18:13 kole, Ichuuti chichi bik kole kolos Jehovah eng’ oret ne etei Ng’atutiet." 
Acts18:14 Ago ye kimachei Paulo kotwek, kolenji Galio Yahudik, Okwek Yahudichu, nda bo yaitio ng’alechu iman, anan ko bo chalwok ne ya, ta nyolu agaswok:" 
Acts18:15 ago ngo teebutik agobo ng’alek ak kainaik ak ng’atutieng’wong’ okweget, oyai okwege; mamache aek kiruogindetab ng’alechuto." 
Acts18:16 Ak kion ichek koba eng’ oldab ng’echeretab kiruoget. 
Acts18:17 Ak kinam tugul Sostene, bounindetab sunagogit, ak kobir inendet eng’ taitab ng’echeranato bo kiruoget. Ak kima mage kiy Galio ng’alechato tugul." 
Acts18:18 Ak kingobata ni, ak ko kagotebi Paulo betusiek che chang’, kobagakta inendet tupchosiek kobun melit kwo Suria, koboto Prisila ak Akula; ye kiga kocher metit eng’ Kenkrea: amu kiga koarorta kiy eng’ kayosiet." 
Acts18:19 Ak kiit Epeso ak kobagakta ichek eng’ oloto: ago kiwa inendet sunagogit, ak kong’alal ak Yahudik." 
Acts18:20 Ak kingomwachi kole, kota kotebi ak ichek, koma kocham;" 
Acts18:21 ago kingobagaktoi ichek, komwa kole, Aweekyinoge kogeny ngo cham Jehovah, ak kibun melit kwo Epeso." 
Acts18:22 Ak ye kingo kagolanda Kaisaria, kotogosta kwo kogat kaniset, ak kochortagei kwo Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Ak kingo kagotebi eng’ oloto betusiek alak, kwo kobunot koret ne bo Galatia ak ne bo Prugia, ko u ye rubegei, kogimitoti alamalaik tugul." 
Acts18:24 Ak kinyo Epeso Yahudiot age, ne keguure Apolo, ne bo Aleksandria, chito ne ng’om; ak ki kim eng’ sirutik." 
Acts18:25 Kiga kinet chichito oretab Kiptaiyat; ak amu kitinyei kagiiletab ge eng’ tamirmiriennyi, kong’alal ak konet komie ng’alek agobo Jesu, kongen kabatisanetab Johana kityo:" 
Acts18:26 ak kitoi kong’alal eng’ nyiganatet eng’ sunagogit. Ago ye kingogas Prisila ak Akula, komut inendet kwo oldanywa, ak koborji inendet oretab Jehovah komie kosiir." 
Acts18:27 Ak ye kimachei kolanda kwo Akaya, kogimit tupchosiek inendet, ak kosirji alamalyet kole kotaach inendet: ak ye kingo kagoit, kotoret inendet, ichek mising’ che kiga koyan eng’ mieindo:" 
Acts18:28 amu kiiguiyechi Yahudik komie eng’ kimnatet, eng’ taitab bik, koborjin eng’ sirutik kole Jesu ko Kristo." 
Acts19:1 Ak ye kita komi Apolo Korinto, ko kagobun Paulo emet kwen, koit Epeso, ak konyor alamalyet:" 
Acts19:2 ak kilenji ichek, Tos kiotaach Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ye kingoyan? Kolenji, Achicha, tomo agot kegas ngo mitei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Acts19:3 Ak kilenji, Kigibatisanjok nee anyun? Ak kile, Kigibatisanjech kabatisanetab Johana." 
Acts19:4 Kole Paulo, Kiibatisanis Johana eng’ kabatisanetab sigunet, kolenjin bik kanyol koyan inendet ne isubu inendet, noto ko Jesu." 
Acts19:5 Ak ye kingogas nito, kibatisan eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
Acts19:6 Ak ye kingo kagogonoor Paulo eunekyik icheget, konyonji anyun Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ichek; ak king’alal eng’ kutuswek che terotin, ak koamda." 
Acts19:7 Ak ki olo bo taman ak aeng’ bichoto tugul. 
Acts19:8 Ak kiwa sunagogit orit, ak kong’alal eng’ nyiganatet eng’ arawek somok, kong’alali ak kolomei agobo tuguk che bo bounatetab Jehovah." 
Acts19:9 Ago ye kingouuegitu mugulelwekab alak ak kobistoe, ak komwaei ne ya agobo Oranato eng’ taitab tuiyet, kwo eng’ ole mi, ak kotaban alamalyet, kong’alaljin betut age tugul eng’ skulitab Turano." 
Acts19:10 Kiyaak ko u noto eng’ kenyisiek aeng’; kot kogas ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat tugul che kimenyei Asia, Yahudik koboto Yunanik." 
Acts19:11 Ak kiyai Jehovah boisionikab kimnatet che ter eng’ eunekab Paulo: 
Acts19:12 kot keipchi che miandos kitambaok ak angok che kiga kotiiny bortanyi, ak kiistogei mainwek eng’ bichoto, ak kimanda tamirmirik che yaachen eng’ ichek." 
Acts19:13 Ak kitoi Yahudik alage che kiombenoti, che kilen koon oik, komwa kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu eng’ icheget che kitinyei tamirmirik che yaachen, kolen, Ayosiewok eng’ Jesu ne amdoi Paulo." 
Acts19:14 Ak kimi werik tisabu che bo Skeba, inendet Yahudiot, tisiindet ne o, che kiyai ng’olyondonito." 
Acts19:15 Ak kiwolji tamirmiriet ne ya ichek, kolenji, Angen Jesu, ak angen Paulo: ago okwek ko o ng’o?" 
Acts19:16 Ak kitorombenji chichoto kitinyei tamirmiriet ne ya ichek, ak konenet ichek, ak koterter, kot komwei komanda eng’ goyoto ach ngor ko kagiguoten." 
Acts19:17 Ak kinaak nito eng’ tugul, Yahudik koboto Yunanik, che kimenyei Epeso; ak kinyor kaiyweisiet ichek tugul, ak kinyor teegisto kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
Acts19:18 Kibwa agichek che chang’ che kiiyan, kong’anyei, ak kobortoi boisionikwak." 
Acts19:19 Ak kiib bukuisiekwak bik che chang’ eng’ ichek che kiyaei ng’orset, ak kobeel eng’ taitab bichoto tugul: ak kiit kamanutienywa, konyor kole kiitei fedaisiek elfusiek konom." 
Acts19:20 Kotesak ko u noto anyun ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat eng’ kimnatet ak koterter. 
Acts19:21 Kingobata anyun tuguchuto, komach Paulo eng’ tamirmiriennyi kwo Jerusalem, ko kagobun Makedonia ak Akaya, kolen, Ye kaawe oloto, ko kanyol ageer Rom agine." 
Acts19:22 Ye kingo kagoyokto aeng’ eng’ ichek che kiboisiechin inendet koba Makedonia, Timoteo ak Erasto, kota kotebi inendet eng’ Asia ne matia." 
Acts19:23 Ak king’eet bolatet ne o eng’ betusiechoto agobo Oranato; 
Acts19:24 amu chito age ne kiguure Demetrio, kitang’indet ne bo feda, ne kiitanyi kanamonik che bo feda che bo Artemi, ne kiipchin tuguk che chang’ kitang’ik;" 
Acts19:25 che kiiyum kibagenge koboto bik che kitinyei boisiet ne u noto, ak kolenji, Murenju, ongen okwek ole, bunu magornatennyo boisioni." 
Acts19:26 Ak ogeere ak ogase ole, ma eng’ Epeso kityo, ago negit Asia tugul, kagochuut bik che chang’ Paulo-inito, ak koweechi, kolenjin, choto kigiyae eunek ko ma cheptalelisiek:" 
Acts19:27 ak ma kele kityo biitu bichiindab sasisiet ne kisasei boisiennyo; ago kiiti kele ma kiy hekalutab cheptalelit ne o ne kobogoriot Artemi, ak keistoe inendet teegistannyi, ne koilosu Asia tugul koboto ng’ony." 
Acts19:28 Ak ye kingogas nito, konerekso inne, ak kobolyo, kole, O Artemi ne bo Epesoek." 
Acts19:29 Ak konyi anyun nganaset bolatet: ak koruai kibagenge oldab ureriet, ko kagonam Gaio ak Aristarko, bikab Makedonia, che kibendoti ak Paulo." 
Acts19:30 Ak ye kimachei kwo Paulo orit ole mi bik, ko ma kochamji alamalyet." 
Acts19:31 Ak kiiyokto ng’olyot bik alage che eechen che bo Asia, amu ki choronokyik, si mat kogoitogei kwo oldab ureriet orit." 
Acts19:32 Kiboldos anyun alage, komwaei ni, komwaei alage kit age: amu kibiit bolatet eng’ tuiyet; ak kima kongen che chang’ kit ne kiigochi kotuiyo." 
Acts19:33 Ak kiimut Aleksandro komong’ eng’ tuiyet, kogoito Yahudik inendet. Ak kiiborji Aleksandro bichoto eng’ eut, ak kimachei kosorgei eng’ bichoto." 
Acts19:34 Ago ye kingonai kole inendet ko Yahudiot, kobolyo tugul eng’ kutit agenge, eng’ olo bo saisiek aeng’, kolen, O Artemi ne bo Epesoek." 
Acts19:35 Ak kingo kagomwachi sirindetab nganaset tuiyet kosisyo, kole, Okwek bikab Epeso, tos mi ng’o ne maingen kole nganasetab Epesoek ko ribindetab hekalutab Artemi ne o, ak kanamwet ne kiibut kobunu barak?" 
Acts19:36 Ak ngo magimuchi ketiiyo agobo tuguchu, ko kanyol osisye, mat osartae ng’olyo." 
Acts19:37 Amu kaomutu bichu, che ma rebikab hekalusiek ama chubei cheptalelinnyo ne kobogorio." 
Acts19:38 Ngo tinyei anyun Demetrio ak musogik che mi koboto inendet, ng’olyo agobo chi, ko yatotin kapkiruogutik, ak mitei bounik: ingoruokyin anyun ichegei." 
Acts19:39 Ago ngocheng’ okwek ng’olyo agobo tuguk alak, ko tun kilititi eng’ tuiyet ne cham komi." 
Acts19:40 Amu mi bichiindo ne tos kiruokwech agobo bolatet ne bo rani, amu mami kito ne bo: ak magimuchi ketetu kiy agobo tuiyoni." 
Acts19:41 Ak kingo kagomwa ko u noto, komwachi tuiyet koba." 
Acts20:1 Ak kingobata bolatet, ko kagoyokto Paulo alamalyet kobwa ak kogimit ichek, koyomisgei, si kwo Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Ak kingo kagobun komoswechoto, ko kagogimit ichek eng’ ng’alek che chang’, koit emetab Yunanik." 
Acts20:3 Ak kingo kagotebe oloto arawek somok, kochob Yahudik ng’alek eng’ ung’ot agobo inendet, ye kimachei kobun melit kwo Suria, komachei kole koweegegei oretab Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Ak kiba koboto inendet agoi Asia Sopatro ne bo Berea, ne bo gab Puro; ak che bo Tesalonikek Aristarko ak Sekundo; ak Gaio ne bo Derbe, ak Timoteo; ak Tukiko ak Tropimo che bo Asia." 
Acts20:5 Ago kiga kondo chuto, ak kiigenech eng’ Troa." 
Acts20:6 Ak kigibun melit eng’ Pilipi ko kagobata betusiekab makatiat ne ma kinde mermerek, ak keit ole mi ichek eng’ Troa eng’ betusiek mut; ole kigitebe eng’ betusiek tisab." 
Acts20:7 Ak eng’ betutab tai ne bo wigit ye kiga kiyumge si kebutul makatiat, koamji Paulo ichek, ye kimachei kwo eng’ betut ne bo aeng’; kong’alal koek keny agoi kemoi kwen." 
Acts20:8 Ak kimi taisiek che chang’ eng’ got ne bo barak, ole kiga kiyumjige." 
Acts20:9 Ak kitebe tirisiet neranet age ne kigiguure Eutuko ak kibirto met; ak kita koamji Paulo koek keny, ak kingobirto met, kotururtogei kong’eete got ne bo somok, ak kigisut ko kagome." 
Acts20:10 Ak kichortagei Paulo, ak koitaegei inendet, ak kosuube eunekyik, komwa kole, Moiimge; amu ta kosobei." 
Acts20:11 Ak kingotogosta, ak kobutul makatiat, ak koam, ak kong’alal keny koboto ichek, agoi koeech, kwo anyun." 
Acts20:12 Ak kiimut nerananato ko kagosob, ak kinyor kagaigaet ne o." 
Acts20:13 Ago kigindoi achek kebe melit, kebe Asos, amu kigimache kimut Paulo eng’ oloto: amu kiga kong’at inendet ko u noto, komach inendet kole kobun keldo." 
Acts20:14 Ak ye kingetuiye ak inendet eng’ Asos, kimut inendet konyo melit, ak keit Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Ak kigibe eng’ oloto kebun melit, keit Kio eng’ betut ne bo tai; ak betut ne bo aeng’ keit Samo; ak betut ne bo somok keit Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Amu kiga kobegechi Paulo kwo kosiirtoe Epeso eng’ melit, si ma igagei eng’ Asia; amu kiigirgiri, kole tamangab koit Jerusalem eng’ betutab Pentekost." 
Acts20:17 Ak kiiyokto eng’ Mileto keguur boisiekab kaniset eng’ Epeso. 
Acts20:18 Ak ye kingobwa ole mi inendet, kolenji, Ongen okweget koboch betut ne bo tai ye kingatau atiech Asia, ole kiateptoi kobotok tugul," 
Acts20:19 aboisiechini Kiptaiyat eng’ kaming’inetab ge tugul, ak eng’ beekab kong’, ak eng’ tiemisiosiek che kibwanja eng’ chobutik che bo ung’ot che bo Yahudik;" 
Acts20:20 ko u ye kima ariny amwawok kiy age tugul ne imuchi kotoretok, ak anetak eng’ taitab bik, ak ang’eete got age agoi got age," 
Acts20:21 abaorianjini Yahudik koboto Yunanik sigunet eng’ taitab Jehovah ak kayanet eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. 
Acts20:22 Ak ogeer anyun, nguno, awendi Jerusalem korata tamirmiriet, amangen tuguk che bwanjina eng’ oloto:" 
Acts20:23 kobate kityo baorianjina Tamirmiriet ne Tilil eng’ nganaset age tugul, kolen, igena ratisiosiek ak nyalilwogik." 
Acts20:24 Ago maiiti sobondanyu ale kiy ne achame kot, si kobiit ages bandanyu, ak boisiet ne kiataach eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu, abaorianji logoiywek che miach che bo mieindab Jehovah." 
Acts20:25 Ak nguno anyun, ogeero, angen ale okwek tugul che kiaamdaate bounatetab Jehovah kwenung’wong’, koma ogeere togennyu kogeny." 
Acts20:26 Abaoriani anyun eng’ taing’wong’ betuni, ale, a tilil eng’ korotikab bik tugul." 
Acts20:27 Amu ma ariny amwawok magutik tugul che bo Jehovah. 
Acts20:28 Oripge anyun okweget, koboto akwet tugul, ne kigonok Tamirmiriet ne Tilil oegu ribik, obai kanisetab Jehovah, ne kiale korotikyik." 
Acts20:29 Angen ale ye kaawe komong’jok suik che koromen, ama rire akwet:" 
Acts20:30 ak tun ng’eetos alage eng’ kwenung’wong’ komwaei ng’alek che imaasi bich, si kochuut alamalyet kosub ichek." 
Acts20:31 Oripse anyun, ak obwat ole ma abagakte atigon chi age tugul eng’ beekab kong’ eng’ kenyisiek somok kemoi ak bet." 
Acts20:32 Ara anyun, kabagakyok nguno eutab Jehovah, ak ng’olyotab mieindanyi, ne imuchi koteechak, ak kogonok borotet koboto ichek tugul che kitilili." 
Acts20:33 Ma agase miat feda che bo chi age tugul, anan tahabu, anan ngoroik." 
Acts20:34 Ongen okwek ole kibois eunechu agobo tuguk che kianyalili, ak agobo ichek che kimi kobota." 
Acts20:35 Kiagonok kaborunet eng’ tuguk tugul, ale ye oboisiei ko nyolu otoret che matinyei kimnatet, ak obwati ng’alekab Kiptaiyat Jesu, ko u ye kimwa inendet kole, Tinyei boiboiyet kagoitoet kosiir taaget." 
Acts20:36 Ak kingo kagomwa ko u noto, kogutuny, kosa koboto ichek tugul." 
Acts20:37 Ak kiririo ichek tugul mising’, ak kosuub kaatitab Paulo, ak kong’utut inendet," 
Acts20:38 koarogendos kosiir agobo ng’olyot ne kiga komwa, kole matun kogeerei togennyi kogeny. Ak kiiyomis inendet kowendi kolanyei melit." 
Acts21:1 Ak ye kingo kagebesie ak icheget, ak ketau kebe eng’ melit, kilitit banda, kitorjige Kos, ak betut ne kiisubi noto keit Rodo, ak kebe eng’ oloto agoi keit Patara:" 
Acts21:2 ak ye kingenyoru melit ne landoi kowendi Poinike, kelany, ak kebe." 
Acts21:3 Ak ye kiga kegeer Kupro, kesiirtoe komi eut ne bo katam, kebe agoi Suria, ak kechoruge eng’ melit eng’ Turo: amu yoto ye kinemune tugukab melit." 
Acts21:4 Ak ye kiga kenyoru alamalyet, ketebi eng’ oloto betusiek tisab: ak kimwachi ichek Paulo eng’ Tamirmiriet kolenji, amat kotiech Jerusalem." 
Acts21:5 Ak kingo kagigesu betusiechoto, kebe bandanyo; ak kiiyomisech ichek tugul koboto osotik ak lagok, agoi kemande eng’ nganaset: ak kegutung’se eng’ ngegut, kesa" 
Acts21:6 ak kigochige saisere; kelany anyun melit koweek ichek koba ga. 
Acts21:7 Ak ye kiga kigesu banda ne bo melit kebunu Turo, keit Ptolemai; ak kigat tupchosiek, ak ketebi koboto ichek betut agenge." 
Acts21:8 Ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kebe, agoi keit Kaisaria: ak kebe gotab Pilipu amdoindet ne bo logoiywek che miach, inendet ko agenge eng’ bik tisab, ak kigitebi ak inendet." 
Acts21:9 Kitinyei chichito tibik ang’wan, bergeinik, che kimaoteni." 
Acts21:10 Ak ye kita ketebye eng’ betusiek che chang’ eng’ oloto, konyo kochorgei maotiot age ne bunu Judea ne kigiguure Agabo." 
Acts21:10 Ak ye kita ketebye eng’ betusiek che chang’ eng’ oloto, konyo kochorgei maotiot age ne bunu Judea ne kigiguure Agabo." 
Acts21:11 Ak kingo kagoit ole kimi, konam birenetab Paulo, ak korate kelyekyik ak eunekyik, ak kole, Mwaei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ko u ni kole, Ratei ko u nito Yahudik che mi Jerusalem chitab kobo birenoni, ak tun indoi inendet eunekab Bororiosiek." 
Acts21:12 Ak kingegas ng’alechuto, kigaigai inendet, achek ak bikab oloto, si matogosta Jerusalem." 
Acts21:13 Kowol Paulo kole, Oyae nee, orirtosi ak obare muguleldanyu? Amu a chobot, ma kerata kityo, ago ame eng’ Jerusalem agobo kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
Acts21:14 Ak ye kimata kocham ko u noto, kesisye, kemwa kele, Ingoyaak magetab Kiptaiyat." 
Acts21:15 Ak kingobata betusiechoto kenam tugukyok ketogoste Jerusalem. 
Acts21:16 Ak kigibe koboto alamalyet che kibunu Kaisaria, komutu Mnason ne bo Kupro, ne agenge ne bo alamalyet ne bo keny, ne kigibendi ketebe gonnyi." 
Acts21:17 Ak kingeit Jerusalem, kotaachech tupchosiek eng’ boiboiyet." 
Acts21:18 Ak betut ne kiisubi betunoto kebe achek ak Paulo gab Jakobo; ak kimi boisiek tugul. 
Acts21:19 Ak kingo kagogat ichek, kotetyi tuguk tugul agenge agenge che kiga koyai Jehovah eng’ boisiennyi eng’ Bororiosiek." 
Acts21:20 Ak kingogas ichek ng’olyondonoto, kogonyit Jehovah; ak kolenji ichek inendet, Igeere anyun, ne kitupche, ole te elfusiek ng’isiat eng’ kwenutab Yahudik che kigoyan; ak tinyei tugul kagiiletab ge agobo Ng’atutiet:" 
Acts21:21 ak kigiborji ichek agobo inye, kele, ineti Yahudik tugul che mi oldab Bororiosiek kobagakta Musa, ilenjini amat komuratan lagokwak, anan kosub bitonwek." 
Acts21:22 Nee anyun nguno? Magogas ichek iman kole kaiitu. 
Acts21:23 Yai anyun ni kimwaun: Kitinye bik ang’wan che kigoarorta kiy eng’ kayosiet; 
Acts21:24 imut anyun bichu, ak ianyinyge koboto ichek, ak igamanji feda, si kobiit kicherji metowekwak: si konai tugul kole mami imanit eng’ tuguchoto kigiborji agobo inye; ago inye iwendoti komie, iribe Ng’atutiet." 
Acts21:25 Ago eng’ Bororiosiek che kigoyan, ko kigesir ketil kiruoget kele, kotabanegei tuguk che kieng’jin kanamonik, ak korotik, ak banyek che bo che kagiget, ak sokset." 
Acts21:26 Komut anyun Paulo murenjoto, ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ koanyinygei koboto icheget ak kwo hekalut orit, kobortoi kasuldaetab betusiek che bo kaanyinyet, agoi kigoito kagochinet ne bo age tugul eng’ ichek." 
Acts21:27 Ak ye kimachei kogesgei betusiek tisabu, kowas tuiyet Yahudik che kibunu Asia, ye kingogeer inendet komi hekalut, ak konam inendet," 
Acts21:28 koboldos, kolen, Okwek bikab Israel, otoretech! Chichito ne ineti bik tugul eng’ komosta age tugul kowech bik, ak Ng’atutiet, ak yuto: ak koboto noto koimut Yunanik agichek kobwa hekalut, ak kagong’wanit yuto tilil." 
Acts21:29 Amu kiga kogeer Tropimo Epesoindet komi koboto inendet eng’ nganaset, ne kilen kiimutu Paulo konyo hekalut." 
Acts21:30 Kowasgei anyun nganaset komugul, ak kiruai bik kibagenge: ak konam Paulo, ak kochuut komong’ eng’ hekalut: ak kigiger kurgotik eng’ sainato." 
Acts21:31 Ak ye kicheng’ei kobar inendet, koityi ng’alek kiptaiyat ne o ne bo murenikab luget kole, mitei chemarget Jerusalem komugul." 
Acts21:32 Komut ngunoto askarik ak kiptainikab bogolwogik, koruai kochortagei ole mi ichek: ak kingogeer ichek kiptaiyat ne o ak askarik, kobagakta biret ne kibirei Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Konyo anyun kiptaiyat ne o korik, ak konam inendet, ak kong’at kole, kerat inendet eng’ sirimwek aeng’; ak koteebe kole, ng’o nito? Ak kayai nee?" 
Acts21:34 Ak kobolyo alak eng’ tuiyet komwaei kit age komwaei alage kit age: ak ye kima imuch konai komie kit ne bo bolatet, kong’at kole kimut inendet kwo irimet." 
Acts21:35 Ak kingoit long’eiywot, koganab askarik inendet amu koromnatetab tuiyet;" 
Acts21:36 amu kiisubi tuiyet ne bo bik, koboldos, kolen, Oiste inendet." 
Acts21:37 Ak ye kigimachei kimut Paulo kwo irimet, kolenji kiptaiyat ne o, Ichamwa amwaun ng’olyo? Kolenji, Tos ingen kutitab Yunanik?" 
Acts21:38 Tos ma i Misrindet ne kiing’eet lomset yaginye ak komut bik elfusiek ang’wan koba ong’atet, bik che kiguure Rumik?" 
Acts21:39 Ago kile Paulo, A Yahudiot ne bo Tarso eng’ Kilikia, a bo nganaset ne ma nyerat: ak asomin ale, chamwa ang’alalji bik." 
Acts21:40 Ak ye kingo kagochamji, kotonone Paulo long’eiywot, ak koborji bik eng’ eut kosisyo; ak ye kingo kagosisyo inne, kong’alalji ichek eng’ kutitab Hebranik, kole," 
Acts22:1 Che kitupche ak kwanisiekyok, ogas ng’alek che amwae nguno eng’ taing’wong’ che asorunege." 
Acts22:2 Ak kingogas kole ng’alaljin ichek eng’ kutitab Hebranik, kosisyo mising’: ak kile," 
Acts22:3 A Yahudiot, kigisikya Tarso ne bo Kilikia, ago kianerji nganasani, ak kiineta Gamaliel, ak kigineta komie ko u ole teptoi Ng’atutietab kwanisiekyok, ak kiatinye kagiiletab ge eng’ Jehovah, ko u ole oteptoi okwek tugul rani:" 
Acts22:4 ak kiausausi Orani agoi meet, arate ak atoorjini korgoret murenik ak kobogorisiek." 
Acts22:5 Ko u ye baorianjina tisiindet ne o, ak kapkiruoget tugul ne bo boisiek: che kianyorune baronok, che kiaibe koba oldab tupchosiek, ak kiawe Damasko, ale amut ichek che kimi oloto kobwa Jerusalem ko ratotin, si kobiit kebir." 
Acts22:6 Ak ye kiawendi, ko karikyi Damasko, ko katonon asis, koluu eng’ sainato lapkeiyet ne o ne kibunu kipsengwet koluucha komoswek tugul." 
Acts22:7 Ak kiabutyi ng’ony, ak agas kutit kolenja, Saul, Saul, amu nee si iusa?" 
Acts22:8 Ak kiawolu ale, I ng’o inye, Kiptaiyandani? Ak kilenja, A Jesu ne bo Nasaret, ne iuse." 
Acts22:9 Ak kigeer lapkeiyet iman che kimi kobota, ago kima kas kutitab inendet ne king’alalwa." 
Acts22:10 Ale, Ayai nee anyun, Kiptaiyandani? Kolenja Kiptaiyat, Ng’eet, ui Damasko; si kemwaun eng’ oloto tuguk tugul che kigeng’at iyai." 
Acts22:11 Ak ye kima kota amuchi ageer kiy amu liletab lapkeiyonoto, ait Damasko, konamota eut ichek che kimi kobota." 
Acts22:12 Ak kinyo ole ami, chito age ne keguure Anania, chito ne bo iman eng’ ribetab Ng’atutiet, ne kibaorianjin Yahudik tugul che kimenyei oloto kole mie." 
Acts22:13 Ak ye kitononi eng’ ye negitena, kolenja, Ne kitupche Saul, keerte. Ak eng’ sainato ageer inendet." 
Acts22:14 Ak kile, Kigolewenin Jehovah ne bo kwanisiekyok si kobiit inai magennyi, ak igeer Inendet ne bo Imanda, ak igas ng’olyot ne bunu kutinnyi." 
Acts22:15 Amu iegu baoriandennyi eng’ bik tugul agobo tugul che koigeer ak che koigas. 
Acts22:16 Ta igeni nee anyun nguno? Ng’eet kibatisanin, ak kiundo tengekwogiguk iguure kainennyi." 
Acts22:17 Ak kingo kaaweektege Jerusalem, ak kingota asae eng’ hekalut, kobutya kit ne u ruon," 
Acts22:18 ageer inendet kolenjina, Igirgir, chakte, mande eng’ Jerusalem: amu mataachei baornatet eng’ inye agobo ane." 
Acts22:19 Ak kiale, Kiptaiyandani, ingen icheget kole kiarate ak abire eng’ sunagogit age tugul ichek che kiiyanin:" 
Acts22:20 ak ye kingetumdoi korotikab Stepano baoriandeng’ung’, ko, kiatononi agane eng’ yoto, ak achame, ak aribe ngoroikab icheget che kibarei inendet." 
Acts22:21 Ak kilenja inendet, Ui: amu ayoktoin iwe ole loo agoi oldab Bororiosiek." 
Acts22:22 Koepchi it anyun ichek inendet agoi ng’olyondonito; yeityo komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Oiste chito ne u nito kwo eng’ ng’ony: amu manyolu kosob." 
Acts22:23 Ak ye kita koboldos, ak kowirtoi ngoroikwak, ak kowastoi temburiek koba barak," 
Acts22:24 kong’at kiptaiyat ne o kole kimut inendet kwo irimet, kong’at kole, Ogine eng’ biret ne bo kipcharitisiek, si konai inendet kit ne kabolji ichek ko u noto agobo inendet." 
Acts22:25 Ak ye kingo kagorate inendet anok, kolenji Paulo kiptaiyatab bogol ne kitononi eng’ yoto, Tos chamdoi ng’atutik eng’ okwek obir chi ne Romanindet, ama kiruokyi?" 
Acts22:26 Ak kingogas kiptaiyandanato bo bogol noto, kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne o, ak komwachi inendet kolenji, Imache iyai nee nguno? Amu Romanindet chichi." 
Acts22:27 Konyo anyun kiptaiyat ne o, ak kolenji inendet, Mwawa, tos i Romanin? Ak kile, Ee." 
Acts22:28 Kowol kiptaiyat ne o kole, Kiaegu chitab bororioni eng’ alyet ne o. Ak kile Paulo, Kigisikya bororionito." 
Acts22:29 Koba anyun eng’ sainato ichek che kimachei kogine inendet: ak kiiywei agine kiptaiyat ne o, ye kingonai kole kaga Romanindet inendet, ak amu kiga korat inendet." 
Acts22:30 Ago ye kimachei konai komie eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, kit ne koitaame Yahudik, kotiach inendet, ak kong’at tisiik che eechen ak kapkiruoget tugul kotuiyo, ak komut Paulo kochorgei, ak konde inendet tainywa." 
Acts23:1 Ak kingogeer Paulo kapkiruogonoto komie, komwa kole, Che kitupche, kiatebe kotugul kabwatet ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah agoi rani." 
Acts23:2 Kong’at Anania, tisiindet ne o, ichek che kitonondos eng’ yoto kole, korabach kutinnyi." 
Acts23:3 Kolenji anyun Paulo inendet, Tun birin Jehovah, inye inatut ne kigisal koleelit: itebye ak iruokwa ko u ye mwaei Ng’atutiet, ak ing’ate kebira ama chamdoi Ng’atutiet?" 
Acts23:4 Komwa ichek che kitonondos eng’ yoto kole, Ichube tisiindet ne o ne bo Jehovah?" 
Acts23:5 Kole anyun Paulo, Kama anai, che kitupche, ale inendet ko tisiindet ne o: amu kigisir kele, Amemwa ne ya agobo bounindetab biguk." 
Acts23:6 Ago ye kingonai Paulo kole, Sadukaik alage, ko Parisaik alage, komwa eng’ kutit ne o eng’ kapkiruok kole, Che kitupche, a Parisaindet, weritab Parisaik: kagiruokwa agobo kamang’unet ak ng’eetyet ne bo che kigobek." 
Acts23:7 Ak kingo kagomwa ko u noto, kong’eet anyun toiyet eng’ Parisaik ak Sadukaik: ak kipcheak tuiyet." 
Acts23:8 Amu mwaei Sadukaik kole, mami ng’eetyet eng’ che kibek, anan malaika, anan tamirmiriet: ago iyani tugul Parisaik." 
Acts23:9 Kong’eet anyun bolatet ne o: ak kitononso sirik alak che bo Parisaik, ak koborio kolen, Ma kinyoru yaitio eng’ chichi: ak tos nee eng’ okwek ngot ko kang’alal ak inendet tamirmiriet, anan malaika?" 
Acts23:10 Ak ye kingong’eet toiyet ne o, koiywei kiptaiyat ne o kole, abere togot kotonaton bichu Paulo, kong’at anyun askarik kochortagei ak komut inendet eng’ kimnatet eng’ kwenunywa, ak komut konyo irimet." 
Acts23:11 Ak eng’ kemout ne kiisubi noto kotonon Kiptaiyat eng’ ye negite inendet ak kolenji, Nyiganitu: amu ko u ye kiibaorianja eng’ Jerusalem, ko u noto kanyol ibaorian eng’ Rom agine." 
Acts23:12 Ak kingoeech koyumgei Yahudik, ak korategei kayosiet, kole magiame kiy ama kiee agoi kebar Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Ak kisiirei artam icheget che kiyosio. 
Acts23:14 Ak kibwa ole mi tisiik che eechen ak boisiek, ak kolenji, Kageratge eng’ kayosiet ne o kele, magichamjami kiy agoi kebar Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Oborji anyun okwek ak boisiek kiptaiyat ne o komut inendet kochorgei konyo ole omi, ko u ne omache ogin komie ng’alekyik: ak ki chobotin achek kebar inendet agot kotom korikyech." 
Acts23:16 Ago kigas weritab chepkametab Paulo agobo setyinenywa, ak kinyo kwo irimet ak komwachi Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Koguur anyun Paulo age eng’ kiptainikab bogolwogik, ak kolenji, Imut murenoni kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne o: amu tinye ng’olyo ne machei komwachi inendet." 
Acts23:18 Komut anyun inendet kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne o, ak kolenji, Kaguura Paulo, kimonjororiot, awa ole mi inendet, ak komwawa amutun murenoni konyo ole imi, tinyei ng’olyo ne machei komwaun." 
Acts23:19 Konam anyun kiptaiyat ne o eutab weroto, ak komut taban, ak koteebe eng’ ung’ot kole, Nee noto imache imwawa?" 
Acts23:20 Kole, Kagochamnyechi Yahudik kole, kosomin imutu Paulo kochorgei mutai konyo kapkiruok, ko u ne imache iteepse inendet komie." 
Acts23:21 Ameyanji anyun: amu mitei eng’ ichek che siirei artam che setyin inendet, che kagoratgei eng’ kayosiet, kole maamei kiy anan koee agoi kobar inendet: ak chobotin ichek nguno kogeni ng’atutiet ne bunun." 
Acts23:22 Kounda anyun kiptaiyat ne o murenonoto kwo, ak kong’at inendet kolenji, Amemwachi chi agot agenge ilenji, Kaimwa tuguchu." 
Acts23:23 Ak kiguur kiptainik aeng’ che bo bogolwogik koba ole mi inendet, ak kolenji, Ochob askarik bogol aeng’ koba agoi Kaisaria, ak askarik tamanwogik tisab che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak murenikab ng’otwek bogol aeng’, eng’ sait somok ne bo kemoi:" 
Acts23:24 ak kimwachi kochob mbartanyisiek, si kobiit komute ichek Paulo, ak komut kot koit ole mi Peliki bounindet kochamegei." 
Acts23:25 Ak kisir baruet ko u ni: 
Acts23:26 Ane Klaudio Lusia, agatin inye bounindet Peliki, ne i toogunot." 
Acts23:27 Konam Yahudik chichi, ak ki negit kobar ichek inendet, awe anyun ak askarik ole mi ichek, ak asoru inendet, ko kaanai ale kaga Romanin inendet." 
Acts23:28 Ak ye kiamache anai kit ne kiitaame ichek inendet, amutu anyun kochorgei kapkiruogenywa:" 
Acts23:29 ageer ale, kigitaam inendet agobo ng’alekab ng’atutikwak, ago mami ng’olyo ne kigiityi inendet ne nyoljin meet anan ratutik." 
Acts23:30 Ak ye kongiborua kele kogechob ng’alek eng’ ung’ot agobo inendet, ayogu inendet konyo olong’ung’ achogune, ak ang’at che kataamikyik si komwa ng’alek eng’ taing’ung’, che itaame inendet." 
Acts23:31 Komut anyun askarik Paulo, ko u ye kaga king’at, ak komut kemoi kwo Antipatris." 
Acts23:32 Ago mutai kobagakta murenik che kilanyei mbartanyisiek koba koboto inendet, ak koweektagei koba irimet:" 
Acts23:33 ak kingo kagoit Kaisaria, ak kogochi bounindet baruet, konde Paulo agine tainnyi." 
Acts23:34 Ak ye kiga kosoman baruet, koteebe ichek kolenji, Ano emetab chichi? Ak kingogas kele, bo inendet Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 kole, Tun agasun ng’aleguk ko kait bik che kiitaamin: ak king’at kerib inendet eng’ gotab kiruoget ne bo Herod." 
Acts24:1 Ak kingobata betusiek mutu, kochorgei Anania tisiindet ne o ak boisiek alak, ak ng’alalindet age, ne kiguure Tertulo; ak koborji bounindet ng’alek che kogitaame Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ak kingo kageguur, kotoi Tertulo kotaam inendet kole, Amu kiboiboitune kalyet ne o eng’ inye, ak kiistoi yaitwogik eng’ bororioni amu ng’omnateng’ung’," 
Acts24:3 kitaach anyun eng’ ortinwek tugul ak eng’ komoswek tugul, koboto kongoi tugul, ee inye ne i toogunot, Peliki." 
Acts24:4 Ago si mata again mising’, asomin ale igasech eng’ ng’alek che ng’ering’ eng’ mieindang’ung’," 
Acts24:5 amu kigegeer chichi kele inendet ko chi ne itoitos bich, ne ing’eeti chemereret eng’ Yahudik tugul eng’ ng’ony tugul, ak kandoindet ne bo kasubikab Nasaretik:" 
Acts24:6 ak kogeny, ko kigotiem kong’wanit hekalut: ak kiginam inendet: [ak kigimache kiruokyi inendet ko u ng’atutikyok." 
Acts24:7 Ago kinyo ole kimi Lusia kiptaiyat ne o ne bo askarik, ak korebenech inendet eng’ eunekyok eng’ kimnatet ne o,]" 
Acts24:8 imuchi inai tuguchu tugul eng’ inendet ye igine inyendet, agobo tuguchoto kogitaame." 
Acts24:9 Ak kiiyomechigei Yahudik kataamsonato, kogimit kole, u noto ng’alechuto." 
Acts24:10 Ak kingo kagoborjine bounindet Paulo eut, kole kong’alal, kowol Paulo kole, Angen ale, i kiruogindet ne bo bororioni eng’ kenyisiek che chang’, amu noto asoruge eng’ boiboindo:" 
Acts24:11 amu imuchi inai ile, tom kosiir betusiek taman ak aeng’ koboch ngab atogoste Jerusalem awe asa:" 
Acts24:12 ama nyorua ichek eng’ hekalut kibelige ak chi age tugul, anan awase tuiyet, anan eng’ sunagogisiek, anan eng’ nganaset." 
Acts24:13 Amaimuchi ichek koborun komie tuguk che itaamena. 
Acts24:14 Ago kang’ang’un nito, eng’ Oranato kuure ichek biteet age, aote Jehovah ne bo kwanisiekyok, ak ayani tuguk tugul ko u ye mwaei Ng’atutiet, ak che kigisir eng’ maotik:" 
Acts24:15 atinye kamang’unet eng’ Jehovah, ne cheng’ei bichu agichek, ale, tatun komi ng’eetyetab che bo imanda ak che ma bo imanda." 
Acts24:16 Ak achobege anyun agane eng’ ng’olyondoni atebe kotugul kabwatet ne matinyei kanagut eng’ taitab Jehovah ak bik. 
Acts24:17 Ak kingobata kenyisiek che chang’ anyo aipchi bikab bororiennyu kagochinoik ak tuguk che kigoitoi: 
Acts24:18 ak kinyortaa kitilila eng’ hekalut, ama mi tuiyet, anan bolatet: ago kimi Yahudik alak che kibunu Asia-" 
Acts24:19 mie nda kami yu ichek eng’ taing’ung’ si komwaitaa ngo ting’ena ichek ng’olyo. 
Acts24:20 Anan ingomwa bichu icheget boisiet ne ya ne kinyor, ye kingatonon eng’ taitab kapkiruoget," 
Acts24:21 kobate twegunet agenge ne kiarirji atononi eng’ kwenunywa, ale, Kagiruokwa rani eng’ taing’wong’ agobo ng’eetyetab che kigobek." 
Acts24:22 Amu kiingen Peliki komie agobo Oranato, kolenji, Ogen, ye tun kachorgei kiptaiyat ne o Lusia, atil anyun ng’alekwok." 
Acts24:23 Ak kong’at kiptaiyatab bogol kole kerib inendet, ak kigochin boroindo; amat koete age tugul eng’ choronokyik koboisiechi inendet." 
Acts24:24 Ago kingobata betusiek alage, koit Peliki, koboto Drusila osotiondennyi, ne ki Chebyahudio, ak koyokto Paulo konyo, ak kigas eng’ inendet agobo kayanet eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Ak ye kita kong’alali agobo imanda, ak ribetab ge, ak kiruoget ne nyonei, koiyweis Peliki, ak kowol kole, Ui korok; ak ye tun anyoru boroindo ne mie, aguurin." 
Acts24:26 Kiimang’u kole togot kogochi Paulo siling’isiek: kiguur anyun inendet konyil che chang’, ak kong’alal koboto inendet." 
Acts24:27 Ago kingogesgei kenyisiek aeng’u, konam Porkio Pesto boisietab Peliki; ak amu kimachei Peliki kobaibai Yahudik, kobagakta Paulo ko ratat." 
Acts25:1 Kingo kagoit Pesto koronoto, kotogosta Jerusalem kobunei Kaisaria, ko kagobata betusiek somogu." 
Acts25:2 Ak kimwachi tisiik che eechen ak bik che toogunotin che bo Yahudik ng’alek che kiting’e Paulo; ak kogaigai ichek inendet," 
Acts25:3 kosom chamdaet agobo inendet, kole koyokto inendet kimut konyo Jerusalem; si kobiit korat oret kobar inendet." 
Acts25:4 Ago kiwol Pesto kole kerib Paulo eng’ Kaisaria, ak kole, Negit si awa anendet oloto." 
Acts25:5 Ak kole inendet, Ongechortege ak che eechen eng’ okwek, si ngo mi ng’olyo age tugul ne ya eng’ chichito, komwa ichek." 
Acts25:6 Ak kingo kagotebi eng’ kwenunywa koboto ichek eng’ betusiek che masiirei sisiit anan ko taman, kochortagei Kaisaria; ak mutai kotebe ng’echeretab kiruoget, ak kong’at kole, kimut Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ak kingo kagoit, koyiem inendet Yahudik che kabunu Jerusalem, koibu ng’alek che chang’ che koromen che kiitaame inendet, che kima imuch kobor komie kit ne inet;" 
Acts25:8 ago kimwa Paulo eng’ ng’alek che kisorunegei, kole, Tom ayai tengek agot kitigin agobo Ng’atutietab Yahudik, anan agobo hekalut, anan agobo Kaisari." 
Acts25:9 Ago ye kimachei Pesto kobaibai Yahudik, kowolji Paulo, kolenji, Tos imache itogoste Jerusalem, si kiruogun eng’ oloto agobo tuguchu eng’ tainnyu?" 
Acts25:10 Ago kile Paulo, Atononi eng’ taitab ng’echeretab kiruoget ne bo Kaisari, ole kanyol kiruogunena: tom ayachi kiy ne ya Yahudik, ko u ye ingen inye aginye komie." 
Acts25:11 Ngo a kiptengekyo, ak ngot ko koayai kiy ne nyoljin meet, ko maesioi ame: ago ngot ko ma bo iman tuguchoto, che itaamjina bichu, ko mami chi ne imuchi kondea eunekwak. Arirjini Kaisari." 
Acts25:12 Ak kingo kagong’alal anyun Pesto ak bikab kapkiruok, kowol kole, Kairirji Kaisari: ara anyun, iwendi gab Kaisari." 
Acts25:13 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek alage, koit laitoriat Agripa ak Bernike Kaisaria, si kogat Pesto." 
Acts25:14 Ak ye kita kobeniei betusiek che chang’, koborji Pesto laitoriat ng’alekab Paulo, kolenji, Mitei chi age ne kibagakta Peliki ko ratat:" 
Acts25:15 ne kimwawa ng’alekyik tisiik che eechen ak boisiekab Yahudik ye kiami Jerusalem, kisomei ng’alek che kigikyine inendet." 
Acts25:16 Ak kiawolji ichek alenji, ma biteetab Romanik kigoito chi kotomo kogeergei kimni chito ne kitaami ak che itaamsei, ak konyor boroindo ne sorunegei eng’ ng’alek che kigitaamjin." 
Acts25:17 Ye kingoyumgei anyun eng’ yu, ko mata agage, ago eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ atebe ng’echeretab kiruoget, ak ang’at kimut chichoto." 
Acts25:18 Ak kingotononso icheget che kiitaami inendet, ko ma koib ng’olyo ne ya ne bo kagikyino agobo inendet ko u ye kiabwati;" 
Acts25:19 ago kiting’e inendet teebutik agobo kayanenywa, ak agobo chi ne kilen Jesu, ne kigome, ne igiiljingei Paulo kole, sobei." 
Acts25:20 Ago kialen agin ole teptoi ng’alechu kotemena, ateebe ngo machei kwo Jerusalem, si kiruokyi eng’ olindo agobo ng’alechuto." 
Acts25:21 Ago kingorirji Paulo kotebi kole si kotil kiruoget bounindet ne o, ang’at ale kerib agoi tun ayokte kwo gab Kaisari." 
Acts25:22 Ak kilenji Agripa Pesto, amache agas agane ng’alekab chichito. Kolenji, Igase mutai." 
Acts25:23 Ak mutai ko kagoit Agripa, koboto Bernike, eng’ etunatet ne o, ak ko kagoba got ne kigase ng’alek, koboto kiptainik che eechen, ak bik che toogunotin che bo nganaset, kimut Paulo eng’ ng’atutietab Pesto." 
Acts25:24 Komwa Pesto anyun, kole, Laitoriat Agripa, ak bik tugul che kimi yu tugul, ogeere chichi, kigorirja tuiyet tugul ne bo Yahudik agobo inendet, eng’ Jerusalem ak eng’ olito, koboldos, kolen, manyol kota kosob." 
Acts25:25 Ago kiageer ale ma yai kiy ne nyoljin meet: ak ko u ye kirirji inendet bounindet ne o, acham anyun ayokto inendet." 
Acts25:26 Matinye ng’olyo ne bo iman ne asirjini kiptaiyandennyu agobo inendet. Noto anyun kamutu inendet konyo taing’wong’, ak ne siirei ko konyo taing’ung’, inye, laitoriat Agripa, si ye kageteepse, asich ng’olyot ne asire." 
Acts25:27 Amu ageere ale, ma nyolu kiyokto kimonjororio, ama kibor tuguk che kigitaamjin." 
Acts26:1 Kolenji anyun Agripa Paulo, Kagichamun iwolu ng’aleguk. Kochuul anyun Paulo eunnyi, ak komwa ng’alek che sorunegei, kole:" 
Acts26:2 Abwati ale abaibai, ee laitoriat Agripa, amu amuchi asorge rani eng’ taing’ung’ agobo tuguk tugul che koitaamja Yahudik:" 
Acts26:3 ne siirei ko amu ingen komie bitonwek tugul ak teebutik tugul che tinyei Yahudik: noto anyun, kasomin ale igasa eng’ muitaet." 
Acts26:4 Ingen Yahudik tugul ateptab sobennyu, koboch ko a ming’in, ne kiatinye koboch ko kabiitu eng’ bororiennyu, ak eng’ Jerusalem;" 
Acts26:5 ak kongena ichek koboch eng’ tai, nda chamei ichek kobaorian, ko u ye kia Parisaindet ne isubi biteet ne korom ne bo kayanennyo." 
Acts26:6 Ak katonon nguno eng’ yu si kiruokwa agobo kamang’unet ne bo arorutiet ne kichopchi Jehovah kwanisiekyok; 
Acts26:7 noto ne imang’u ortinwekyok tamanu ak aeng’ kole nyoru, koboisiechin Jehovah eng’ kagiiletab ge bet ak kemoi. Kagogikya Yahudik agobo kamang’unonito, ee, laitoriandani!" 
Acts26:8 Amu nee si kibwat kele maiyanaksei eng’ okwek kele, ing’eeti Jehovah che kigobek?" 
Acts26:9 Kiabwati anendet iman ale kanyol ayai tuguk che chang’ che kirindoi kainetab Jesu ne bo Nasaret. 
Acts26:10 Ak kiayai nito agine eng’ Jerusalem: ak atoorji korgorosiek bik che chang’ eng’ che tililen, ko kagogona kimnatet tisiik che eechen, ak kiachame ye kigibarei ichek." 
Acts26:11 Ak kiabirote konyil che chang’ eng’ sunagogisiek tugul, abirjini kochubis; ak ye kiga konyita ichek mising’, ausote agoi nganasok che bo toek." 
Acts26:12 Ak ye kingawendi Damasko atinye kimnatet ak kayoktoet ne bo tisiik che eechen,"
