Acts26:13 ageer lapkeiyet ne kibunu kipsengwet, ne siirei kaluunetab asista, koluucha komoswek tugul koboto che kigibendi tugul, eng’ oret bet kwen, ee, laitoriandani." 
Acts26:14 Ak kingo kagibutyi ng’ony tugul, agas kutit ne lenjina eng’ kutitab Hebranik, Saul, Saul, amu ne si iusa? Bichii eng’ inye itiar kiplitwet." 
Acts26:15 Ak kiale, I ng’o inye, Kiptaiyandani? Kole Kiptaiyat, A Jesu ne iuse." 
Acts26:16 Ago ng’eet, tonon eng’ kelyeguk: kang’ang’unge amu ni, ale andein iegu kiboitiot ak baoriatab tuguchu kaigeer agobo ane, ak tuguk che tun ang’ang’unenege;" 
Acts26:17 asorun eng’ bik, ak eng’ Bororiosiek, ole tun ayoktoin iwe," 
Acts26:18 si kobiit ing’any konyekwak, ak koweek eng’ mesundeito kobwanji lapkeiyet, ak eng’ kimnatetab Setani kobwanji Jehovah, si konyor ichek nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogik ak borotet eng’ ichek che kigitilil amu kayanet ne mi eng’ ane." 
Acts26:19 Noto anyun, ee, laitoriandani Agripa, ma abistoe kaborunet ne bo kipsengwet:" 
Acts26:20 ago kiaborji che mi Damasko korok, ak eng’ Jerusalem, ak eng’ emet komugul ne bo Judea, ak eng’ Bororiosiek agichek, si kosik ak koyan Jehovah, koyaei boisionik che nyoljin sigunet." 
Acts26:20 ago kiaborji che mi Damasko korok, ak eng’ Jerusalem, ak eng’ emet komugul ne bo Judea, ak eng’ Bororiosiek agichek, si kosik ak koyan Jehovah, koyaei boisionik che nyoljin sigunet." 
Acts26:21 Kinama anyun Yahudik eng’ hekalut amu nito, ak kotiem kobara." 
Acts26:22 Ye kinganyoru toretet ne bunu Jehovah, atonon agoi rani abaorianjini che mengech ak che eechen, amamwae kiy age kobate che kimwa maotik ak Musa, kole tun bwanei;" 
Acts26:23 kole kanyol konyalil Kristo, ak kole komwaita korok eng’ ng’eetyetab che kibek, lapkeiyet, komwachi bik ak Bororiosiek." 
Acts26:24 Ak ye kita kosorugei ko u noto, komwa Pesto eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Paulo, i kibiywa; kagogonin iywek kanetetab ge ne o." 
Acts26:25 Ago kile Paulo, Ma a kibiywa, ee Pesto ne i toogunot: ago amwae ng’alek che bo iman ak che bo ng’omnatet." 
Acts26:26 Amu ingen laitoriat ng’alechuto, inendet ne ang’alaljini eng’ nyiganatet: amu angen komie, ale ma ung’otin ng’alechu eng’ inendet, agot agenge; amu mayaak ng’olyondonito eng’ taban." 
Acts26:27 Laitoriat Agripa, tos iyani inye maotik? Angen ale iyani." 
Acts26:28 Ak kilenji Agripa Paulo, Ka negit igaigaa eng’ ng’alek che ng’ering’ aek Kristianindet." 
Acts26:29 Kole Paulo, Achame ko u noto eng’ Jehovah, ale ngo eng’ che ng’ering’ anan eng’ che chang’, ma inye kityo, ago tugul agichek che kasa rani, ale kotebi ko u ane, ago ama eng’ ratutichu." 
Acts26:30 Kong’eet anyun laitoriat, ak bounindet ak Bernike, koboto ichek che kimi tugul:" 
Acts26:31 ak kingo kagoba, kong’alaljigei ichegei, kole, Ma yai chichi kiy ne nyoljin meet anan ratisiosiek." 
Acts26:32 Kolenji anyun Agripa Pesto, Kota kitiachi chichi, nda kima rirji Kaisari." 
Acts27:1 Ak kingo katetil ng’alek kele kebun melit kebe Italia, kigigochi Julio kiptaiyatab bogol, ne bo lugetab Augusto, Paulo ak kimonjororinik alak." 
Acts27:2 Kelany anyun melit ne bo Adramutio, ne kimachei kwo komoswek alak che mi ngegutab Asia, ak kebe nyanjet ak Aristarko Makedonianindet ne bo Tesalonike." 
Acts27:3 Ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ keit Sidon: ak kirire Julio Paulo, ak kochamji kwo ole mi choronokyik si konyor toretet." 
Acts27:4 Ak kigibun melit eng’ oloto ak kigitektaege Kupro, amu kigirindaech usonet." 
Acts27:5 Ak ye kiga kebun melit kelande eng’ nyanjet ne bo Kilikia ak Pampulia, keit Mura, nganaset ne bo Lukia." 
Acts27:6 Ak kinyorji oloto kiptaiyatab bogol melit ne bo Aleksandria, ne wendi Italia; kondeech melit anyun." 
Acts27:7 Ak ye kiga kebe mutyo eng’ melit eng’ betusiek che chang’, agoi keit Kanido eng’ bichiindo, koranyech usonet, kebe ketektaege Krete, ne itorjingei Salmone;" 
Acts27:8 ak kigibun ngegut eng’ bichiindo agoi keit komosta age ne kiguure Luukwek che Miach; ole negite nganasetab Lasea. 
Acts27:9 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek che chang’, ak kobichiit bandab nyanjet, amu kiga kosiirto betusiekab Karugutetab ge, koteechi Paulo ichek," 
Acts27:10 kolenji, Murenju, kaageer ale mitei ng’oiyondit ak luset eng’ banito bo nyanjet, ma ne bo melit kityo ak tuguk che mi orit, ago ne bo sobonwekyok agichek." 
Acts27:11 Ago kigas kiptaiyatab bogol ng’alekab bounindet ak chitab kobo melit, kosiir ng’alek che kamwaei Paulo." 
Acts27:12 Ak amu kima ko luita ne yamei ketebe eng’ betusiekab kaititiet, komwa che chang’ kole, Mie kota kinaakte eng’ olito, tamangab keit Poinike, si ketebe oloto eng’ betusiekab kaititiet; noto ko ki luitab Krete, ne kitokyingei murot ne bo katam kitigin ak murot ne bo tai kitigin." 
Acts27:13 Ak ye kingous mutyo usonet ne bunu komostab tai, kolen ichek kagonyor kit ne kamachei, konem nanget ak kobun tabandab Krete, ye negit ngegut." 
Acts27:14 Ak ne matenit kous chebwiwichet, ne kiguure Eurakulo:" 
Acts27:15 ak ye kingenam melit, ak mata komuch kotab usonet, keistochige, ak koonech." 
Acts27:16 Ak kingeruai ketektaatege emet ne kiikwen beek ne kiguure Kauda, kimuch eng’ bichiindo keganab moinget ne ming’in:" 
Acts27:17 ak kingo kagotogosune moingonoto, koboisie tuguk che kitorete, koratune melit orit; ak kingoiywei ichek kole si magiwirji Surti, kochoor angok, ak kion usonet koba." 
Acts27:18 Ak ye kita keboisiei mising’ eng’ kagiiletab ge, ketabe usonoto o, ketau eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kewirte tuguk che mi melit," 
Acts27:19 ak eng’ betutab somok kowirta icheget eng’ eunekwak tuguk che kiboisie eng’ melit. 
Acts27:20 Ak ye kimata koluuchech asista anan kecheik eng’ betusiek che chang’, ak kogiichech usonet ne o, kogesgei anyun kamang’unet ne kigilen, tos kisoruech." 
Acts27:21 Ak ye kiga kotar betusiek che chang’ ama amis, kotonon Paulo eng’ kwenunywa, ak kole, Murenju, kita mie nda kigogasa, ak kita mie nda kima obwa eng’ Krete, ak onyoru nyalili ak lusoni." 
Acts27:22 Amwawok nguno ale onyiganitu: amu mami chi ne meei eng’ okwek, kobate melit." 
Acts27:23 Amu kotonon malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ ye negitena kemouni, ne a nenyi, ak ne aote," 
Acts27:24 kole, Ameiyweisie, Paulo; kanyol itonon eng’ taitab Kaisari: ak keero, kagogonin Jehovah tugul che obendi tugul eng’ melit." 
Acts27:25 Ara anyun, murenju, onyiganitu: amu ayani Jehovah, ale yaaksei ko u ye kogomwawa." 
Acts27:26 Ago kanyol kewirjech emet ne kiikwen beek. 
Acts27:27 Ago ye kingoit kemoutab taman ak ang’wan, ye kita kowirjinech usonet komosi ak komosi eng’ nyanjet ne kiguure Adria, ko kiibwati bikab melit olo bo kemoi kwen kolen kagorikta emet age;" 
Acts27:28 ak kiirooch beek kit ne kikwaise, ak konyor kakwautik artam; ak kita koba kitigin korooch beek kogeny kioto, konyor kakwautik sosom." 
Acts27:29 Ak kingoiywei ichek kole abere togot kewirjech bitet ne mi ruandosiek, kounda nangaisiek ang’wan eng’ melit olo bo let, kosom kole nda kaech." 
Acts27:30 Ak ye kimachei bikab melit komwaei kobagakta melit, ko kagochoorta moinget kwo nyanjet, kolen si kobwat bik kole wirtoi ichek nangaisiek eng’ olo bo melit tai," 
Acts27:31 kolenji Paulo kiptaiyatab bogol ak askarik, Ngot ko matebi bichu eng’ melit, ko momuchi osopche." 
Acts27:32 Kotil anyun askarik rogoosiek che bo moinget, ak kobagakta kobut." 
Acts27:33 Ak ye kimachei koeech, kogaigai Paulo ichek tugul koamis, kolenjin, Rani ko betutab taman ak ang’wan ogeni ak ko ta orugutige, ak tom oam kiy." 
Acts27:34 Noto anyun asomok ale oamisie: amu nito sobeng’wong’; amu mabetei sumeiyot agot agenge eng’ metitab chi age tugul eng’ okwek. 
Acts27:35 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto, ak konam makatiat, kogochi Jehovah kongoi eng’ taitab tugul: ak kiton, ak kotoi koamis." 
Acts27:36 Konyiganitu anyun ichek tugul, ak koamis." 
Acts27:37 Ak achek tugul ko kigiite bik bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik tisab ak lo eng’ melit. 
Acts27:38 Ak kingo kagobiyong’so, kowirji nyanjet nganok si kowisisit melit." 
Acts27:39 Ak kingo kagoeech, ko ma konai emonoto: kigeer luita age ne tinyei ng’aniek, ne kiibwati kole, ngomugak kokweri melit kwo oloto." 
Acts27:40 Kotiach anyun nangaisiek, ak kobagakta eng’ nyanjet, ak kotiach rogoosiek che kigirate baoinik che kindochine melit; ak ye kingo kagonamji barak anget ne mi olin bo tai kotokyi usonet, koba ngegut." 
Acts27:41 Ago kingoit ye tuiyechin nyanjosiek aeng’u, kochunda ichek melit korieb ng’aniek; ak kinamak melit ole bo tai kot ko ma kotwau, ago kitoi melit kong’asur eng’ ole bo let eng’ kimnatetab mildaetab ge ne bo beek." 
Acts27:42 Ak ng’olyot ne kitinyei askarik ko kobar kimonjororinik, kole si mabir beek alage eng’ ichek, kochililyo." 
Acts27:43 Ago amu kimachei kiptaiyatab bogol kosor Paulo, koeete ichek si mayai kit ne kamachei; ak kong’at ichek che kiimuchi kobirot beek kole, kowirjigei nyanjet, si kosib koit ngegut:" 
Acts27:44 ak kibun alage baoinik, kobun alage tuguk alak che bo melit. Kolong’ji anyun tugul emet kochamegei." 
Acts28:1 Ak ye kingo kagesopche, kenai anyun kele kigiguure emonoto kiikwen beek Melita." 
Acts28:2 Ak kiyaiywech ne mie mising’ bikab emonoto: amu kiilaal mat, ak kotaachech achek tugul, amu kimi ropta ak kaititiet." 
Acts28:3 Ago ye kingo kagoyum Paulo ratutiet ne bo kwenik, ak konde ma, komong’ anyun erenet amu mat, ak kotaachigei eunnyi." 
Acts28:4 Ak kingogeer bikab emonoto erenet kosonginini eng’ eut, kolenjigei, Rumin chichi iman, agot nga kagosorgei eng’ nyanjet, ko machamjin inendet Imanda kosob." 
Acts28:5 Ago kilelekta tionyoto kwo ma, ama am kiy Paulo." 
Acts28:6 Ago kilen ichek abere tos ibwa, anan kobut ak kome ngunoto: ak ye kiga kogenis keny, ama kogeer kiy ne ya konyonji inendet, kowal kabwatutikwak, ak komwa kole, Inendet ko cheptalelit." 
Acts28:7 Kimi anyun eng’ ole negite yoto, korotinwekab chito ne o ne bo emonoto kiikwen beek, ne kigiguure Publio; ne kitaachech eng’ chamnyet, ak koyaech keegu toekyik eng’ betusiek somok." 
Acts28:8 Ak kimiani kwandab Publio koamei eset ak miandab moet ne bendi korotik: ak kiwa Paulo gotab chichoto, ak kosa, ak kogonoor eunekyik inendet ak kosoob." 
Acts28:9 Ak kingo kagoyaak nito kobwa agichek che kimiandos eng’ kakwembeiyondonoto, ak kigisoob:" 
Acts28:10 ak kigonyitech eng’ teegisto ne o; ak ye kingebe eng’ melit, kondewech melit tuguk che te che kigimakyinige." 
Acts28:11 Ak kingobata arawek somogu ketau banda eng’ melit ne bo Aleksandria, ne kiga tebe kakwembeiyondonoto eng’ betusiekab kaititiet, ne kaborunennyi ko ki Saramek che Muren." 
Acts28:12 Ak kingeit Surakusa, ketebe yoto betusiek somok." 
Acts28:13 Ak keng’eetye eng’ oloto kebe keyiematege, kot keit Regio: ak kingobata betut agenge kous usonetab murot ne bo tai, ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ keit Puteoli:" 
Acts28:14 ole kiginyorji tupchosiek, ak kiigaigaech ketebi ak icheget betusiek tisab: keit anyun Rom." 
Acts28:15 Ak kingogas tupchosiek agobo achek eng’ oloto, kobwa kotorokwech kot koit Siret ne bo Apio, ak Gorik Somok che bo Toek: che kingogeer Paulo, komwachi Jehovah kongoi, ak konyiganit." 
Acts28:16 Ak kingeit Rom, kechamji Paulo kotebi inegei koboto askarindet ne kiribei inendet." 
Acts28:17 Ak kingo kagosiirto betusiek somogu koguur bik che eechen che bo Yahudik kotuiyo: ak kingo kagoyumgei, kolenji ichek, Che kitupche, agot ngo mayai ane kiy ne ya eng’ bik, anan eng’ bitonwekab kwanisiekyok, ko kigindea eunekab Romanik eng’ Jerusalem, ko a kimonjororio:" 
Acts28:18 ak kimachei kotiacha ichek, ko kagogin ng’alekyuk, amu kima komi kiy eng’ ane ne nyoljin meet." 
Acts28:19 Ago ye kingogirinda Yahudik ng’olyondonoto, ageer ale kanyol arirji Kaisari; ma kele kiatinye kiy ne ang’andoe bororiennyu." 
Acts28:20 Amu nito anyun kasomok obwa kegeerge ak keng’alal tugul: amu a ratat eng’ sirimi agobo kamang’unetab Israel. 
Acts28:21 Ak kilenji inendet, Tomo kenyoru baronok che bunu Judea agobo inye, anan konyo oli age eng’ tupchosiek ak koboruech anan komwa kiy ne ya agobo inye." 
Acts28:21 Ak kilenji inendet, Tomo kenyoru baronok che bunu Judea agobo inye, anan konyo oli age eng’ tupchosiek ak koboruech anan komwa kiy ne ya agobo inye." 
Acts28:22 Ago kimache kegasenen kiy ne ibwati: amu kigonaak eng’ achek kele kimwaoti ne ya agobo bitonito eng’ komosta age tugul. 
Acts28:23 Ak ye kingo kagochob betut, kobwanji inendet che chang’ eng’ got ne kimenyei; ak kiiborsechi komie, kobaoriani agobo bounatetab Jehovah, ak kogiiljingei koneti ichek agobo Jesu, eng’ Ng’atutiet ne bo Musa, ak eng’ maotik, koboch karon agoi koimen." 
Acts28:24 Ak kiiyan alak tuguk che kigimwaei, ko ma iyan alak." 
Acts28:25 Ak ye kimata kogasyin ichegei, koba, ko kagomwa Paulo ng’olyot agenge, kole, Kimwachi komie Tamirmiriet ne Tilil kwanisiekwok eng’ maotiot Isaia, kole," 
Acts28:26 Ui oldab bichu, ak imwa ile, Eng’ kaset ogase, ago moguitosi agot kitigin; Ak eng’ keeret ogeere, ago mobestosi agot kitigin:" 
Acts28:27 Amu kwolilenotin mugulelwekab bichu, Ak magastoi komie itikwak, Ak kiger icheget konyekwak; Si mageer eng’ konyekwak, Anan kogas eng’ itikwak, Anan koguiyo eng’ mugulelwekwak, Si koweek kogeny, Ak asoob ichek." 
Acts28:28 Ingonaak anyun eng’ okwek, ole, kiyokyin yetunoni bo Jehovah Bororiosiek: kasei agichek." 
Acts28:29 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ng’alechu, koba Yahudik, koteebategei ichegei mising’." 
Acts28:30 Ak kimeny eng’ kenyisiek aeng’ gonnyi ne kialei meng’et, ak kitaach tugul che kibwanjin inendet," 
Acts28:31 koamdoi agobo bounatetab Jehovah, ak koneti tuguk agobo Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo eng’ nyiganatet tugul, ama ete chi." 
Romans1:1 Paulo, otwogindetab Jesu Kristo, ne kigiguur koek ne kiyoktoi, ne kigitabanji logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah," 
Romans1:2 che kisib koaror eng’ maotikyik eng’ sirutik che tililen," 
Romans1:3 agobo Werinnyi, ne kigisich eng’ keswekab Daudi eng’ borto," 
Romans1:4 ne kigimwaita kele Weritab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet, ko u tamirmiriet ne bo tililindo, eng’ ng’eetyetab che kibek; Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo," 
Romans1:5 kigitaach eng’ inendet mieindo ak kayoktoet, agoi kasetab it ne bo kayanet eng’ bororiosiek tugul amu kainennyi:" 
Romans1:6 kigiguurok ak okwek eng’ icheget obunji Jesu Kristo: 
Romans1:7 eng’ okwek tugul che omite Rom, chamanikab Jehovah, che kigiguur koek che tililen: Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet ne bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Ne bo tai, amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi eng’ Jesu Kristo agobo okwek tugul, amu kimwaitoi kayaneng’wong’ eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Romans1:9 Amu Jehovah baoriandennyu, ne aote eng’ tamirmiriennyu eng’ logoiywek che miach che bo Werinnyi, ale masise amwa agobo okwek kotugul eng’ sautikyuk," 
Romans1:10 asome ale, tamangab kobiitwa boroindo nguno ko negit, anyonjok eng’ magetab Jehovah." 
Romans1:11 Amu atinye emosto ageerok, si agonok konunet age ne bo tamirmiriet, si kobiit kigimitok;" 
Romans1:12 noto ko si kobiit kigaigaige ane ak okwek eng’ kwenung’wong’, chi tugul eng’ kayanet ne bo age, neng’wong’ ak nenyu." 
Romans1:13 Ak mamache oegu che mongen, che kitupche, ale, kiamach konyil che chang’ anyonjok (ak kigeranya agoi kora), si kobiit anyor logoek alak agot eng’ okwek, agot ko u eng’ Bororiosiechun alak agichek." 
Romans1:14 A ne kiyaachei eng’ Yunanik ak che ma Yunanik, eng’ che ng’omen ak che berber." 
Romans1:15 Noto anyun, ko u ye amuchi, ko a chobot aamwok logoiywek che miach ak okwek che omite Rom." 
Romans1:16 Amu malilanjini logoiywek che miach: amu choto ko kimnatetab Jehovah agoi yetunet eng’ age tugul ne iyani; eng’ Yahudiot korok, ak Yunanindet agine." 
Romans1:17 Amu king’anyei eng’ choto imandab Jehovah eng’ kayanet agoi kayanet: ko u ye sirat kole, Ago sobei ne bo imanda eng’ kayanet." 
Romans1:18 Amu kigeng’any neregekab Jehovah kobun kipsengwet agobo bistoet tugul ak yaitiet tugul ne bo bik, che kirindoi imanit eng’ yaitiet;" 
Romans1:19 amu tugukab Jehovah che naotin ko toogunotin eng’ ichek; amu kigong’ang’ji Jehovah ichek. 
Romans1:20 Amu kigeerei komie tugukyik che ma toogu koboch yaetab ng’ony che naoksei eng’ tuguk che yaotin, agot kimnatennyi ne bo koigeny ak inendet iman ko Jehovah; si maek ichek che tinyei lotania:" 
Romans1:21 amu kingo kagonai Jehovah, ko ma kolos ko u Jehovah, anan kogochi kongoi; ago kiberberitu eng’ kabwatutikwak, ak kiimenitu mugulelwekwak che matinyei naet." 
Romans1:22 Kingolen kondegei kong’omegitu, koberberitu," 
Romans1:23 ak kowal torornatetab Jehovah ne ma ng’emaksei kogergeit ak itondab chito ne ng’emaksei, ak ne bo taritik, ak tiong’ik che bo kelyek ang’wan, ak tuguk che ichuutegei." 
Romans1:24 Noto anyun kibagakyi Jehovah ichek magutikab mugulelwekwak kosub muruonindo, si kotewer borwekwak ichegei eng’ ichegei:" 
Romans1:25 amu kiwal imanitab Jehovah kowale lembeita, ak kolos ak koot kit ne kigiyai kosiir Yaindet, ne iberurot koigeny. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Amu nito kibagakyi Jehovah ichek magutik che bo tewernatet: amu kiwal kobogorisiekwak biteet ne nyolu koek ne ma nyolu: 
Romans1:27 ak ko u noto agichek murenik, kibagakta biteet ne nyolu ne bo kobogorisiek, ak kogasegei ichegei maget ne lalei, koyachingei murenik eng’ murenik noto ne ma nyolu, ak taachei ichegei melekto ne yamegei ak yaitienywa." 
Romans1:28 Ak ko u ye kiesio kotebe Jehovah naenywa, kobagakyi Jehovah ichek kabwatutik che kigong’emogis, si koyai tuguchoto che ma nyolu;" 
Romans1:29 ko nyiitat tuguk tugul che ma bo iman, sogornatet, kasetab miat, yaitiet; nyiitat ng’etkonda, rumisiet, boriet, kenisiet, suriet; chaamik," 
Romans1:30 che bo chemererosiek, che wechei Jehovah, che kolgolen, che menotik, che ichougei, taunikab tuguk che yaachen, che magase it sigik," 
Romans1:31 che matinyei kaguiyet, butikab kayomisutik, che matinyei chamnyet, che matinyei rirenetab ge:" 
Romans1:32 che nganda ingen ng’atutietab Jehovah, ne len, nyoljin meet icheget che yaei tuguk che u chuto, ko mayaei kityo che u chuto, ago chamnyechin koboto icheget che yaei tuguchuto." 
Romans2:1 Noto anyun, metinye lotania, ee, inye chi age tugul ne iruochi: amu noto iruokyine age, iruokyinege inyendet; amu inye ne iruochi, iyae aginye tuguchoto." 
Romans2:2 Ak kingen kele namegei kiruogetab Jehovah ak imanit agobo ichek che yaei tuguk che u choto. 
Romans2:3 Ee, inye chi, tos iiti inye, ile ichilile kiruogetab Jehovah, inye ne iruokyini ichek che yaei tuguk che u choto, ak iyae aginye choto?" 
Romans2:4 Anan isase magornatosiek che bo mieindanyi ak muitaennyi ak talasiennyi ama inai ile imutyinin sigunet mieindab Jehovah? 
Romans2:5 Ago eng’ uuindang’ung’ ak muguleldang’ung’ ne matinyei sigunet, igonorjinige nereknatet kobunji betutab nereknatet ak ng’ang’utietab kiruoget ne bo imanda ne bo Jehovah;" 
Romans2:6 ne tun igochin chi tugul ko u boisionikyik: 
Romans2:7 igochin sobondab koigeny ichek che cheng’ei eng’ muitaet ak eng’ boisionik che miach, torornatet ak teegisto ak che ma ng’emaksei;" 
Romans2:8 ago eng’ ichek che ngelelik, ama kase it imanit, ago che kase it ne ma bo imanda, koegu nyitatet ak nereknatet," 
Romans2:9 nyalilda ak bichiindo, eng’ sobondab chi age tugul ne yaei yaitio, ne bo Yahudiot korok, ak ne bo Yunanindet agine;" 
Romans2:10 ago torornatet ak teegisto ak kalyet eng’ chi age tugul ne yaei ne mie, bo Yahudiot korok ak Yunanindet agine:" 
Romans2:11 amu matiytii Jehovah bik. 
Romans2:12 Amu tugul che kiyai tengek ko mami Ng’atutiet, ko tun lustos ama eng’ Ng’atutiet: ak tugul che kiyai tengek ko mi eng’ Ng’atutiet, ko tun kiruokyin eng’ Ng’atutiet;" 
Romans2:13 amu ma ichek che kasei Ng’atutiet ko che bo imanda eng’ taitab Jehovah, ago ichek che yaei Ng’atutiet, kiityin imanda." 
Romans2:14 Amu ye yaei Bororiosiek, che matinyei Ng’atutiet, eng’ biteenywa, tuguk che bo Ng’atutiet, chuto, bichoto matinyei Ng’atutiet, kobougei ichegei;" 
Romans2:15 ibortoi eng’ noto boisietab Ng’atutiet ne sirat eng’ mugulelwekwak, kobaorianjin agichek nautikwak, ak komwaitogei ichegei eng’ ichegei eng’ kabwatutikwak, anan kosorugei;" 
Romans2:16 eng’ betut ne tun iruokyin Jehovah ung’otikab bik, ko u logoiywekyuk che miach, eng’ Jesu Kristo." 
Romans2:17 Ago ngeguurenen Yahudiot, ak itiiege Ng’atutiet, ak ichouge eng’ Jehovah," 
Romans2:18 ak ingen magennyi, ak ichame komie tuguk che kororon kosiir, amu kiginetin Ng’atutiet," 
Romans2:19 ak iiti ile i kandoindet ne bo che koriotin, lapkeiyetab icheget che mi mesundeito," 
Romans2:20 kotigonindet ne bo che berber, konetindet ne bo manyurunik, ne itinye eng’ Ng’atutiet kergeindab naet ak imanit;" 
Romans2:21 inyendet anyun ne ineti age, ko menetige? Inye ne iamdoi ile amat kochorse chi, ko tos ichorsei inye?" 
Romans2:22 Inye ne imwae ile amat oipgei, ko tos iyae inye? Inye ne iweche kanamonik, ko tos irebe che mi gorikab kanamonik?" 
Romans2:23 Inye ne ichouge eng’ Ng’atutiet, ko tos iteweri Jehovah eng’ bistoeng’ung’ ne ibistoe Ng’atutiet?" 
Romans2:24 Amu kichubei kainetab Jehovah eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek, amu okwek, ko u ye kigisir." 
Romans2:25 Amu toreti iman kamuratanet, ngo i yaindetab Ng’atutiet: ago ngot ko i butindetab Ng’atutiet, ko kagoek kamurataneng’ung’ ne ma kamuratano." 
Romans2:26 Ngot koribei anyun tetutikab Ng’atutik inendet ne ma kimuratan, ko tos magiiti ne ma kimuratan kele imuratanat?" 
Romans2:27 Ak tos matun iruogun inendet ne ma kimuratan eng’ atebennyi, ngot koyai Ng’atutiet kosulda, inyendet ne i butindetab Ng’atutiet ak itinye ng’atutik che sirotin ak kamuratanet?" 
Romans2:28 Amu ma Yahudiot inendet ne Yahudiot eng’ borto barak, ama kamuratanet noto bo borto barak:" 
Romans2:29 ago Yahudiot inendet ne Yahudiot eng’ orit; ak kamuratanet ko noto bo muguleldo, eng’ tamirmiriet, ma eng’ siret; ne kalosunennyi ko ma bo bik, ago bo Jehovah." 
Romans3:1 Tinyei borot nee anyun Yahudiot? Anan nee toretet ne bo kamuratanet? 
Romans3:2 O eng’ oret age tugul: ne bo tai, ko amu kigigochi Yahudik kotononji ng’alekab Jehovah." 
Romans3:3 Amu egu nee ngot ko matinyei alage kayanet? Kayanenywa ne mami, ko tos walei imandab Jehovah koek buch?" 
Romans3:4 Achicha: ma u noto: ingoek ne bo iman Jehovah, ago kiplembechwa chi age tugul; ko u ye sirat kole, Si kobiit kindein imanda eng’ ng’aleguk, Ak imuch ibelisie ye kiruogun." 
Romans3:5 Ago ngot kogonyiti atebennyo ne ma bo imanda, imandab Jehovah, ko ta kemwae nee anyun? Tos ma bo imanda Jehovah ne nyonei eng’ neregek? (Ang’alali ko u bik.)" 
Romans3:6 Achicha: ma u noto: amu nda u noto koruokyindoi ano Jehovah ng’ony? 
Romans3:7 Ago ngo tesak imanitab Jehovah eng’ lembeitanyu agoi torornatennyi, ko amu nee si ko ta kiruokwa ko u kiptengekyo?" 
Romans3:8 Ak amu nee si magimwa (ko u ye kimwaitaenech ne ya, ak ko u ye iyani alage kole kimwae achek) kele, Ongeyai che yaach si kobiit kobwa che miach? Bo iman kiruogenywa." 
Romans3:9 Nee anyun? Tos ki miachen kesiir ichek? Achicha, agot kitigin: amu kiga kisib kiityi Yahudik ak Yunanik kele mi ichek tugul eng’ bounatetab tengekto;" 
Romans3:10 ko u ye sirat, kole, Mami ne bo imanda, achicha, mami agot agenge:" 
Romans3:11 Mami ne iguitos, Mami ne cheng’ei Jehovah;" 
Romans3:12 Kigomasta tugul, kigoek tugul che matilei kiy; Mami ne yaei ne mie, achicha, mami agot agenge:" 
Romans3:13 Mokwekwak ko kererit ne yatat; Kiboisie kenisiet eng’ ng’elyebwekwak: Mi ng’wonetab erenok kutuswekwak orit: 
Romans3:14 Che nyiitat kutuswekwak chubisiet ak ng’wanindo: 
Romans3:15 Chepcheb kelyekwak kotumda korotik; 
Romans3:16 Mi ortinwekwak ng’emisiet ak nyalilda; 
Romans3:17 Ama nai oretab kalyet: 
Romans3:18 Mami kaiyweisiet ne iywei Jehovah taitab konyekwak. 
Romans3:19 Ak kingen kele tuguk alak tugul che mwaei Ng’atutiet, komwachin ichek che mitei eng’ bounatetab Ng’atutiet; si kobiit keger kutit age tugul, ak si kimutyi ng’ony komugul kiruogetab Jehovah:" 
Romans3:20 amu mami chi ne kiityin imanda eng’ tainnyi eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet: amu bunu naetab tengekto Ng’atutiet. 
Romans3:21 Ago nguno ko kagong’ang’ak imandab Jehovah ama eng’ ng’atutik, ne baoriani Ng’atutiet ak maotik;" 
Romans3:22 agot imandab Jehovah ne mi eng’ kayanet eng’ Jesu Kristo eng’ icheget tugul che iyani; amu mami kabesiet; 
Romans3:23 amu kigoyai tugul tengek, ama ityin torornatetab Jehovah;" 
Romans3:24 che kiityin imanda buch eng’ mieindanyi eng’ katiaget ne mi eng’ Kristo Jesu: 
Romans3:25 ne kiinde Jehovah koek kaptisisio eng’ kayanet, eng’ korotikyik, si kobarta imandanyi, amu kachundaetab tengekwogik che kigisib keyai, eng’ muitaetab Jehovah;" 
Romans3:26 amu kabartaetab imandanyi eng’ betusiechuto, si kobiit koek inendet ne bo imanda, ak koek ne iityin imanda inendet ne tinyei kayanet eng’ Jesu." 
Romans3:27 Mi ano anyun kachaunetab ge? Kigegerji sang’. Eng’ ng’atutiet ne u nee? Ne bo boisionik? Achicha: ago eng’ ng’atutietab kayanet. 
Romans3:28 Kiiti anyun kele kiityin chi imanda eng’ kayanet ama boisionikab ng’atutik. 
Romans3:29 Anan Jehovah ko Jehovah ne bo Yahudik kityo? Ama Jehovah ne bo Bororiosiek agichek? Ee, bo Bororiosiek agichek:" 
Romans3:30 ko u ye agenge Jehovah, ak koiityin imanda eng’ kayanet che kigimuratan, ak koiityin imanda eng’ kayanet che ma kimuratan." 
Romans3:31 Tos kiyai anyun Ng’atutiet koek ne matilei kiy amu kayanet? Achicha, ma u noto: kigimiti Ng’atutiet." 
Romans4:1 Kimwae nee anyun agobo Abraham, kwandanyo, kinyor nee eng’ atebetab borto?" 
Romans4:2 Amu nda kiga kiityi Abraham imanda eng’ boisionik, kotinyei inendet ne ilosunegei; ago ma eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Romans4:3 Mwaei nee anyun sirutik? Kiiyan Abraham Jehovah, ak kigiityi inendet imanda." 
Romans4:4 Ago inendet ne boisiei, ko magiityin melekto kele bo mieindo, ago bo besendo." 
Romans4:5 Ago eng’ inendet ne maboisiei, ago iyani inendet ne iityin imanda chi ne ya, kiiti kayanennyi kele bo imanda." 
Romans4:6 Agot ko u ye kimwa Daudi agine agobo kaberuretab chito ne iityin Jehovah imanda ama eng’ boisionik," 
Romans4:7 kole, Boiboen ichek che kigenyochi kaat tengekwogikwak, Ak che kigetuch tengekwogikwak." 
Romans4:8 Baibai chito ne matun iityin kiptaiyat tengekto. 
Romans4:9 Tos kimwae kaberuroni agobo che kigimuratan, anan che ma kimuratan agichek? Amu kimwae kele, Kigiityi Abraham kayanennyi kobunji imanda." 
Romans4:10 Kigiityindo ano anyun? Ye kiga kimuratan anan ye kitom kimuratan? Ma eng’ kamuratanet, ago ye kitom kimuratan:" 
Romans4:11 kitaach kaborunetab kamuratanet, ng’okset ne bo imandab kayanet ne kitinyei ye kitom kimuratan: si kobiit koek kwandab ichek tugul che kiyani, agot ye kitom kimuratan, si kobiit kiityi ichek imanda;" 
Romans4:12 ak koek kwandab che imuratanotin eng’ ichek che ma bo kamuratanet kityo, ago che bendi agichek eng’ tiegutikab kayanonoto bo kwandanyo Abraham ne kitinyei ye kitom kimuratan." 
Romans4:13 Amu kima kigochi Abraham ak keswekyik arorutiet eng’ oret ne bo Ng’atutiet kele kobunji ng’ony, ago eng’ imanda ne bo kayanet." 
Romans4:14 Amu ngot koek che namei tuguk, ichek che bo Ng’atutiet, ko kagoek buch kayanet, ak kageyai arorutiet koek ne matilei kiy:" 
Romans4:15 amu ibu Ng’atutiet neregek; ago ole mami ng’atutiet, ko mami bistoet." 
Romans4:16 Bunu kayanet amu nito, si kobiit koek ne bo mieindo; si mawalak arorutiet eng’ iyotet tugul; ma choto bo Ng’atutiet kityo, ago choto agichek che bo kayanetab Abraham, ne kwandanyo achek tugul" 
Romans4:17 (ko u ye sirat kole, Kaayain iegu kwandab bororiosiek che chang’) eng’ taitab ne kigoyan inendet, noto ko Jehovah, ne isoobi che kigobek, ak koguurei tuguk che mami, ko u che mi." 
Romans4:18 Kiiyan eng’ kamang’unet ye kima komi kiy ne kimang’u, si kobiit koek kwandab bororiosiek che chang’, kiga kemwa ko u noto kele, Tenitu choto iyoteng’ung’." 
Romans4:19 Ak kima nyalul eng’ kayanet ye kiibwati bortanyi ne u ne kigome, (ye kiga kotar olo bo kenyisiek bogol) ak Sara ne kiga kosiirto betusiekab iyotet:" 
Romans4:20 ee, kima sage kobistoe ye kiibwati arorutietab Jehovah, ago kitesak kogimit eng’ kayanet, kotorori Jehovah," 
Romans4:21 ak kiingen komie kole kit ne kiga koaror inendet, komuchi koyai kosulda." 
Romans4:22 Eng’ noto anyun, ko kigiityi inendet imanda." 
Romans4:23 Ago kima kisir agobo inendet inegei, kele kigiityi inendet;" 
Romans4:24 ago amu achek agachek, che tun kiityin, che iyani inendet ne kiing’eet Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo komong’ eng’ che kibek," 
Romans4:25 ne kigigoito amu bistautikyok, ak kiging’eet si kobiit kiityech imanda." 
Romans5:1 Kitinye kalyet ak Jehovah eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo amu kigiityech imanda eng’ kayanet; 
Romans5:2 ak kigenyoru eng’ inendet agine kemong’ji eng’ kayanet mieinoto kitonone; ak ongeboiboitu eng’ kamang’unetab torornatetab Jehovah. 
Romans5:3 Ak ma u noto kityo, ago ongeboiboitu eng’ nyalilwogikyok: kingen kele ibu nyalilda muitaet;" 
Romans5:4 ak ibu muitaet tiemisiet; ak ibu tiemisiet kamang’unet: 
Romans5:5 magonu kamang’unet kililan; amu kigerong’ji chamnyetab Jehovah mugulelwekyok eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne kigegonech. 
Romans5:6 Amu ye kita ko ki nyalulyotin, kome Kristo agobo che yaachen eng’ betut ne kiga kelewen." 
Romans5:7 Amu bichii kome chi agobo chi ne bo imanda: ago abere kanyei chito age kome agobo chi ne mie. 
Romans5:8 Ago iboruech achek Jehovah chamnyennyi, amu ye kita ko ki kiptengeginik, kome Kristo agobo achek." 
Romans5:9 Ak ne siirei mising’ anyun, ko kagiityech imanda eng’ korotikyik, kesoruech eng’ neregekab Jehovah eng’ inendet." 
Romans5:10 Amu ye kita ko ki bunik, ko kigituiyech ak Jehovah eng’ meetab Werinnyi, ne siirei mising’ anyun, koga kituiyech, kesoruech eng’ sobondanyi." 
Romans5:11 Ak ma u noto kityo, ago kiboiboi agachek eng’ Jehovah eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, amu kigenyoru eng’ inendet katuiyet." 
Romans5:12 Noto anyun, ko u ye kimong’ji ng’ony tengek eng’ chito agenge, ak meet amu tengek; koityi anyun meet bik tugul, amu kiyai tugul tengek -" 
Romans5:13 amu kimi ng’ony tengek agoi koit Ng’atutik: ago magiiti tengek ye mami ng’atutik. 
Romans5:14 Ago kiboi meet koboch Adam agoi Musa, agot eng’ ichek che kima yai tengekto ne kergei ak bistoetab Adam, ne ki itondab inendet ne ki tun konyo." 
Romans5:15 Ago ma u bistoet, konunetab chamnyet. Amu ngo kibek che chang’ eng’ bistoetab agenge, ko kitesak mising’ kosiir eng’ che chang’, mieindab Jehovah, ak konunet eng’ mieindab chito agenge, Jesu Kristo." 
Romans5:16 Ak ma kergei kit ne biitune konunet ak kit ne biitune tengektab chito agenge: amu kinyo kiruoget eng’ agenge agoi kagikyinet, ago kinyo konunetab chamnyet eng’ bistautik che chang’ agoi kaiityinetab imanda." 
Romans5:17 Amu ngo kiboi meet eng’ bistoetab agenge; ne siirei mising’ anyun, kobou eng’ sobondo ichek che taachei chang’indab mieindo ak konunet ne bo imanda eng’ agenge, noto Jesu Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Noto anyun, ko u ye kinyonji bik tugul kiruoget agoi kagikyinet eng’ bistoetab agenge; ko u noto kinyonji bik tugul konunet ne kigoitoi buch, agoi kaiityinetab imanda ne bo sobondo eng’ bistoet agenge ne bo imanda." 
Romans5:19 Amu ko u ye kiek che chang’ kiptengeginik eng’ bistoetab chito agenge, ko u noto kiyaei che chang’ kobunji imanda eng’ kasetab it ne bo agenge." 
Romans5:20 Ak kinyo Ng’atutiet, si kobiit kotesak bistoet; ago ye kitesak tengekto, ko kitesak mieindo mising’ kosiir:" 
Romans5:21 si, ko u ye kiboi tengekto eng’ meet, ko u noto bou mieindo eng’ imanda agoi sobondab koigeny eng’ Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo." 
Romans6:1 Kimwae nee anyun? Kitebi eng’ tengek, si kobiit kotesak mieindo?" 
Romans6:2 Achicha, ma u noto. Achek che kigebekyi tengek, ko ta kesoptoi ano eng’ tengek?" 
Romans6:3 Anan ma onai ole achek tugul che kigibatisanjech Jesu Kristo ko kigibatisanjech meennyi? 
Romans6:4 Noto anyun kigetubech koboto inendet eng’ kabatisanet agoi meet: si ko u ye kiging’eet Kristo eng’ che kibek eng’ torornatetab Kwanda, ko u noto, kibendoti agachek eng’ sobondo ne leel." 
Romans6:5 Amu ngo kigituiyech ak inendet eng’ kergeindab meennyi, ke u noto agachek eng’ kergeindab ng’eetyennyi;" 
Romans6:6 kingen ni, kele kigigartat chinnyo ne bo keny koboto inendet, si kong’emak bortab tengek, si mata koratech tengekto kogeny." 
Romans6:7 Amu inendet ne kigome kotiagat eng’ tengek. 
Romans6:8 Ago ngo kigebegu koboto Kristo, kiyani kora kele kisoptosi koboto inendet;" 
Romans6:9 kingen kele kiging’eet Kristo komong’ eng’ che kigobek: ma komeei kogeny; ma kotinyei meet bounatet eng’ inendet kogeny. 
Romans6:10 Amu meet ne kime, ko kimechi tengek konyil agenge ak koyam; ago sobet ne sobei inendet kosobei eng’ Jehovah." 
Romans6:11 Ko u noto oiityige ak okwek ole kiobekyi tengek, ago osoptosi eng’ Jehovah eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Romans6:12 Noto anyun amochamji tengek koboi borwekwok che begu, si ogas it magutikwak:" 
Romans6:13 anan ogochi tengek kebeberwekab borwekwok koek karik che ma bo iman; ago ogochige Jehovah, ko u che soptos che kamong’une che kibek, ak ogochi Jehovah kebeberwekab borwekwok koek karikab imanda." 
Romans6:14 Amu matinyei tengek bounatet eng’ okwek: amu ma omi eng’ Ng’atutik, ago eng’ mieindo." 
Romans6:15 Nee anyun, kiyai tengek, amu ma kemi eng’ Ng’atutik, ago eng’ mieindo? Achicha, ma u noto." 
Romans6:16 Mongen ole, inendet ne ogochinige oegu otwogik agoi kasetab it, ko o otwogikab inendet ne ogase it; ngo bo tengekto agoi meet, anan ngo bo kasetab it agoi imanda?" 
Romans6:17 Ago kimwachini Jehovah kongoi, amu, okwek che ki o otwogikab tengekto, ko kiogas it eng’ muguleldo konetisiet ne u ne kigegonok okwek;" 
Romans6:18 ak ye kingitiachak eng’ tengek, oegu otwogikab imanda." 
Romans6:19 Ang’alali ko u biteetab bik amu nyalulet ne bo borwekwok: amu ko u ye kiogoite kebeberwekab borwekwok koek otwogikab muruonindo ak tengek agoi tengek, ko u noto anyun ogoite kebeberwekab borwekwok koek otwogikab imanda agoi tililindo." 
Romans6:20 Amu ye kita ko o otwogikab tengekto, ko kiotiagotin eng’ imanda." 
Romans6:21 Kiotinye logoek nee eng’ betusiechoto eng’ tuguk che olilane nguno? Amu kagesunetab tuguchoto ko meet. 
Romans6:22 Ago nguno ko kagitiachak eng’ tengekto, ak kaoegu otwogikab Jehovah, otinye logoekwok agoi tililindo, ak kagesunet ko sobondab koigeny." 
Romans6:23 Amu melektab tengek ko meet; ago konunetab chamnyet ne bo Jehovah ko sobondab koigeny eng’ Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo. 
Romans7:1 Anan mongen okwek, che kitupche (amu ang’alaljini bik che ingen Ng’atutiet), ole tinyei ng’atutiet bounatet eng’ chito eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi?" 
Romans7:2 Amu kobogoriot ne tinyei manong’otiot koratei ng’atutik eng’ manong’otiot eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi; ago ngo me manong’otiot, kotiagak anyun eng’ ng’atutietab manong’otiot." 
Romans7:3 Noto anyun, ye ta kosobei manong’otiot, ak konamgei ak chito age, keguure inendet chebaigeiyat: ago ngo kagome manong’otiot, kotiagak eng’ ng’atutiet, eng’ noto anyun, ko ma keguure chebaigeiyat, agot ngotun chito age inendet." 
Romans7:4 Noto anyun, che kitupche, kigeyaak obegu eng’ Ng’atutiet eng’ bortab Kristo; si kobiit obunji chito age, inendet ne kiging’eet komong’une che kibek, si keiichi Jehovah logoek." 
Romans7:5 Amu ye kingota kemi eng’ borto ko kiboisiei magutik che bo tengek eng’ kebeberwekab borwekyok, che kimi amu Ng’atutiet, si koiiyo logoek che ityin meet." 
Romans7:6 Ago nguno, ko kigitiachech eng’ Ng’atutiet, ko kagebekyi noto ne kiga ratech; si kobiit keotisie eng’ leelindab Tamirmiriet, ma eng’ osindab ng’atutik che sirotin." 
Romans7:7 Kimwae nee anyun? Tos tengek Ng’atutiet? Achicha, ma u noto. Ago kima kota anae tengek nda kima ko eng’ Ng’atutiet: amu kima kota anai kasetab miat nda kima mwa Ng’atutiet kole, Amegase miat:" 
Romans7:8 ago kinyor tengek boroindo eng’ ng’atutiet koyai eng’ ane kasetab miat age tugul: amu ye mami Ng’atutiet ko meat tengekto. 
Romans7:9 Ak kiasobe eng’ tai ye kima komi Ng’atutiet: ago ye kingonyo ng’atutiet, kosob kogeny tengekto, amee anyun;" 
Romans7:10 ak kiageer ale kibunji meet ng’atutiet ne ki bo sobondo: 
Romans7:11 amu kinyor tengek boroindo eng’ ng’atutiet kong’ala, ak kobara eng’ noto." 
Romans7:12 Noto anyun tilil Ng’atutiet, ak ko tilil kayomiset, ak ko bo imanda, ak ko mie." 
Romans7:13 Tos kiek anyun noto mie meet eng’ ane? Achicha, ma u noto. Ago si koborgei tengekto kele tengekto, ko kiyai meet eng’ ane eng’ noto mie; - si kobiit koek tengekto tengekto inne eng’ ng’atutiet." 
Romans7:14 Amu kingen kele bo Ng’atutiet tamirmiriet: ago a chitab borto, ne kigealdochi tengek." 
Romans7:15 Amu mangen ne ayae: amu ma ne amache, ne ayae; ago ne aweche, ko noto ne ayae." 
Romans7:16 Ago ngayai noto mamache, ayan anyun ale mie Ng’atutiet." 
Romans7:17 Nguno anyun ko ma ko ane ne ayae, ago tengekto ne menya." 
Romans7:18 Amu angen ale eng’ ane, noto ko eng’ bortanyu, ko mamenyei kiy ne mie: amu mi chamet kobota, ago ale ayai noto mie, ko mayae." 
Romans7:19 Amu noto mie ne kata ayae, ko mayae: ago yaitiet ne mamache, ko noto ne cham ayae." 
Romans7:20 Ago ngot ayae ne mamache, ko ma ko ane ne yaei, ago tengekto ne menya." 
Romans7:21 Ageere anyun ng’atutiet, ale, eng’ ane, ne kata ayae ne mie, komitei yaitiet kobota." 
Romans7:22 Amu abaibai eng’ Ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ chito ne bo orit: 
Romans7:23 ago ageere ng’atutiet ne ter eng’ kebeberwekab bortanyu, kobortos ak ng’atutietab ng’omnatennyu, koyaa aek luulenetab ng’atutiet ne bo tengekto ne mitei kebeberwekab bortanyu." 
Romans7:24 Ee, ane ne nyalili! Ng’o ne itiacha eng’ bortab meoni?" 
Romans7:25 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi eng’ Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo. Noto anyun, aote eng’ ng’omnatennyu Ng’atutietab Jehovah, ago eng’ borto aote ng’atutikab tengekto." 
Romans8:1 Noto anyun ma komi kiruoget eng’ ichek che mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu. 
Romans8:2 Amu kagotiacha ng’atutietab Tamirmirietab sobon eng’ Kristo Jesu among’une ng’atutietab tengek ak meet. 
Romans8:3 Amu kit ne kima imuch Ng’atutiet koyai, amu nyaluletab borto, koyok Jehovah Werinnyi eng’ kergeindab bortab tengek si koek kagochinet ne bo tengekto, kogikyi tengekto eng’ borto:" 
Romans8:4 si kobiit kosulda kayomisetab Ng’atutiet eng’ achek, che magisubi borto, ago Tamirmiriet." 
Romans8:5 Amu ichek che isubi borto kogereri met agobo tugukab borto; ago ichek che isubi Tamirmiriet kogereri met agobo tugukab Tamirmiriet. 
Romans8:6 Amu kererwekab met che bo borto ko meet; ago kererwekab met che bo Tamirmiriet ko sobondo ak kalyet: 
Romans8:7 amu kererwekab met che bo borto ko bunyondit eng’ Jehovah; amu magase it Ng’atutietab Jehovah, amaimuchi:" 
Romans8:8 ak icheget che mi borto kotemene kobaibai Jehovah. 
Romans8:9 Ago ma omi eng’ borto ago eng’ Tamirmiriet, ngo menyok Tamirmirietab Jehovah. Ago ngo matinyei chi Tamirmirietab Kristo ko ma nenyi." 
Romans8:10 Ak ngo mi Kristo eng’ okwek, ko kigome borto amu tengekto; ago Tamirmiriet ko sobondo amu imanda." 
Romans8:11 Ago ngo menyok Tamirmirietab inendet ne kiing’eet Jesu komong’une che kibek, kosoobi borwekwok che begu inendet ne kiing’eet Kristo Jesu komong’une che kibek, eng’ Tamirmiriennyi ne menyei eng’ okwek." 
Romans8:12 Noto anyun, che kitupche, ki che kiyaachei, ma eng’ borto, si kisubi borto:" 
Romans8:13 amu ngosubi borto, obegu matiny; ago ngobar eng’ Tamirmiriet boisionikab borto, osoptosi." 
Romans8:14 Amu tugul che indochin Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ko werikab Jehovah choto." 
Romans8:15 Amu kima otaach kogeny tamirmirietab otwoknot ne konok oiyweisie; ago kiotaach tamirmiriet ne kigiyaenak oegu lagok, eng’ noto anyun kerire kele, Aba, Kwanda." 
Romans8:16 Baoriani Tamirmiriet inendet ak tamirmirikyok kole ki lagokab Jehovah: 
Romans8:17 ak ngo ki lagok, ko ki che bunjinech tuguk; che bunjinech tugukab Jehovah, ak che bunjinech tuguk koboto Kristo; ngot kenyalildosi koboto inendet, si kitororech koboto inendet." 
Romans8:18 Amu aiiti ale nyalilwogik che bo betusiechu ko ma nyolu kiroge torornatet ne tun king’ang’wech. 
Romans8:19 Amu igeni mising’ ak koganyei yaet komugul ng’ang’et ne bo werikab Jehovah. 
Romans8:20 Amu kigigochi yaet tugul kogas it kit ne matilei kiy, ma ko u ye machei, ago amu inendet ne kiigochi kogas it ko u noto eng’ kamang’unet," 
Romans8:21 si kobiit kitiach yaet komugul agine eng’ otwoknatetab ng’emisiet agoi katiaget ne bo torornatetab lagokab Jehovah. 
Romans8:22 Amu kingen kele tigeni ak kogasei ng’wanindo yaet komugul kobotech agoi nguno. 
Romans8:23 Ak ma u noto kityo, ago agot achek, che kitinye tongoanikab Tamirmiriet, ketigendosi agachek eng’ orit, kigeni keyaech keegu lagok, noto ko katiagetab borwekyok." 
Romans8:24 Amu kigesoruech eng’ kamang’unet: ago kamang’unet ne kigeerei ko ma kamang’unet; amu ng’o ne imang’u noto keerei? 
Romans8:25 Ago ngimang’u noto magigeere, kigeni noto anyun eng’ muitaet." 
Romans8:26 Ak toreti ko u noto agine Tamirmiriet nyalulennyo: amu magingen kesa ko ye nyolu; ago saiywech Tamirmiriet inendet eng’ tigenoik che magimuchi kemwa; 
Romans8:27 ak inendet ne isiachi mugulelwek kongen kit ne ibwati Tamirmiriet, amu saei agobo bik che tililen ko u magetab Jehovah." 
Romans8:28 Ak kingen kele, eng’ ichek che chamei Jehovah, kotuitos tuguk tugul si kobois koreu che miach eng’ ichek che kigeguur ko u magennyi." 
Romans8:29 Amu Jehovah ne kisib konai ichek, ko inendet ne kisib kolewen ichek si kogergeit ak itondab Werinnyi, si koek ne bo tai eng’ che tupcho che chang’:" 
Romans8:30 ak icheget che kisib kolewen, koguur choto; ak choto che kiguur, ko kiityi imanda: ak choto che kiityi imanda, ko kiitoror." 
Romans8:31 Kimwae nee anyun eng’ tuguchuto? Ngo mi Jehovah komostanyo, ko ng’o ne kirindaech?" 
Romans8:32 Inendet ne kima rire Werinnyi, ago kigon inendet agobo achek tugul, tos magonech tuguk tugul eng’ aiyebindo koboto inendet?" 
Romans8:33 Ng’o ne itaami che kilewen Jehovah? Jehovah ne iityin imanda; 
Romans8:34 ng’o inendet ne igikyin? Kristo Jesu ne kime, ee, inendet ne kiging’eet komong’une che kibek, ne mi eutab tai ne bo Jehovah, ne saiywech agine." 
Romans8:35 Ibestosech ng’o eng’ chamnyetab Kristo? Nyalilda, anan bichiindo, anan usisiet anan rubet anan ach ngor, anan ng’oiyondit, anan rotwetab chok?" 
Romans8:36 Ko u ye kigisir, kele, Kibarech betut komugul agobo inye; Kigiitech ko u kechirek che bo eng’set." 
Romans8:37 Ago, ki katerterik kot kosiir eng’ tuguchu tugul eng’ inendet ne kichamech." 
Romans8:38 Amu angen komie ale maimuchi kobesiech meet, anan sobondo, anan malaikaisiek, anan bounatosiek, anan tuguk che mitei, anan tuguk che bwanei, anan kimnatosiek," 
Romans8:39 anan tororindo, anan asurto, anan kiy age tugul ne kigiyai, eng’ chamnyetab Jehovah, ne mi eng’ Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo." 
Romans9:1 Amwae iman eng’ Kristo, mamwae lembech, baoriani kabwatutikyuk kobota eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil," 
Romans9:2 ale atinye arogenet ne o ak ng’wanindo ne maigesugei eng’ muguleldanyu. 
Romans9:3 Amu kata amache ale king’wanita anendet eng’ Kristo agobo tupchosiekyuk, che bikyuk eng’ borto:" 
Romans9:4 che Isrealik; che kigiyai koek lagok, che nenywa torornatet, ak kayomisutik, ak kagoitoetab Ng’atutiet, ak otetab Jehovah, ak arorutik;" 
Romans9:5 ne chechuak kwanisiek, ak nenywa Kristo eng’ atebetab borto. Iberurot koigeny Jehovah, ne bou tugul. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Ago ma kele kogoek buch ng’olyotab Jehovah. Amu ma Israelik ichek tugul, che bo Israel:" 
Romans9:7 ama kele lagok ichek tugul, amu keswekab Abraham: ago, Kiguurtoe Isak keswondeng’ung’." 
Romans9:8 Noto anyun, ichek ko ma lagokab borto che lagokab Jehovah; ago lagokab arorutiet che kiiti koek keswot." 
Romans9:9 Nito anyun ko ng’olyotab arorutiet, Anyone tun kapkora eng’ kenyit ne nyonei, ak kosich Sara werit." 
Romans9:10 Ak ma u noto kityo; ago ye kingo kagomanach Rebeka agine eng’ agenge, noto kwandanyo Isak-" 
Romans9:11 amu ye kitomo kesich lagok, koyai kiy age tugul ne mie anan ne ya, si kobiit kotonon magetab Jehovah ko u lewenet, ama bo boisionik, ago bo inendet ne kuursei," 
Romans9:12 kigilenji inendet, Otei ne o ne ming’in." 
Romans9:13 Agot ko u ye sirat, kele, Kiacham Jakobo, ago kiawech Esau." 
Romans9:14 Kimwae nee anyun? Mi ne ma bo imanda eng’ Jehovah? Achicha, ma u noto." 
Romans9:15 Amu mwachin inendet Musa kolenjin, Arire inendet ne amache arire, ak atinye rirenetab ge eng’ inendet ne amache arirege." 
Romans9:16 Noto anyun ma bo inendet ne machei, anan inendet ne labati, ago bo Jehovah ne tinyei rirenetab ge." 
Romans9:17 Amu mwachin siret Parao kolenjin, Kang’eetin amu ng’olyondonito ale, abartaenen kamuktaennyu, si keamdaat kainennyu eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Romans9:18 Noto anyun inendet ne machei korire, koriregei, ak ne machei kouuiit, kouuiiti." 
Romans9:19 Ilenjina anyun, Amu nee si kota kocheng’ei lelutiet? Amu ng’o ne kirindoi magennyi?" 
Romans9:20 Achicha, ago, ee inye chi, i ng’o ne tos iwolji Jehovah kiy? Tos mwachin kit ne kigimimi mimiindet, kolenjin, Amu nee si iyaa ko u noto?" 
Romans9:21 Anan matinyei cheptereniot kimnatet eng’ menet, koyai eng’ kebebertab menonoto teret ne bo teegisto, ak age ne ma bo teegisto?" 
Romans9:22 Tos nee anyun, ngo machei Jehovah kobarta nereknatennyi, ak kong’any kimnatennyi, komuita eng’ talasiet ne o agobo terenik che bo neregek che nyoljin ng’emisiet:" 
Romans9:23 ak si kobiit kobarta magornatosiekab torornatennyi eng’ terenik che bo rirenetab ge che kiga sib kochopchi telunatet," 
Romans9:24 agot achek che kiguurech, ma eng’ Yahudik kityo, ago eng’ Bororiosiek agichek?" 
Romans9:25 Ko u ye mwaei agine eng’ Hosea kole, Aguure ichek bikyuk, che kima ko bikyuk; Ak aguure inendet chamanet, ne kima ko chamanet." 
Romans9:26 Ak eng’ oloto ole kigimwachine, kelenji, Ma o bikyuk, Keguure eng’ oloto werikab Jehovah ne sobei." 
Romans9:27 Ak kimwa Isaia eng’ kutit ne o agobo Israel, kole, Agot ngo koitetab lagokab Israel ko te ng’aniekab nyanjet, kesoru che king’et:" 
Romans9:28 amu yaei Kiptaiyat ng’olyondennyi eng’ ng’ony, koges ak kotil konwagit." 
Romans9:29 Ak, ko u ye kiga sib komwa Isaia kole, Nda kima bagakwech Kiptaiyatab Lugosiek keswot, Ta kiga kegergeitu ak Sodom, ak ta kiga keyaech keige Gomora." 
Romans9:30 Kimwae nee anyun? Kimwae kele kigonor Bororiosiek imanda che kima kosubi imanda, noto ko imanda ne bo kayanet:" 
Romans9:31 ago Israel, ye kingosub ng’atutietab imanda, ko maityi Ng’atutionoto." 
Romans9:32 Amu nee? Amu kima cheng’ eng’ kayanet, ago ko u eng’ boisionik. Kiriich ichek koita ne riichei bich;" 
Romans9:33 ko u ye sirat kole, Ogeero, andoi Sion koita ne riichei bich ak ruandet ne inachi bich: Ak ne iyani inendet ko magigochin kolilan." 
Romans10:1 Che kitupche, magetab muguleldanyu ak somennyu eng’ Jehovah agobo ichek ko ale kesor ichek." 
Romans10:2 Amu abaoriani agobo ichek ale tinyei kagiiletab ge agobo Jehovah, ago ma eng’ naet." 
Romans10:3 Amu ye kima nai ichek imandab Jehovah, ak ye kicheng’ kogimit nenywa, ko ma kogas it imandab Jehovah." 
Romans10:4 Amu Kristo kagesunetab Ng’atutiet agoi imanda eng’ age tugul ne iyani. 
Romans10:5 Amu sirei Musa kole chi ne yaei imanda, ne bunu Ng’atutiet, kosobei eng’ noto." 
Romans10:6 Ago mwaei imanda noto bo kayanet ko u ni, Amemwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Ng’o ne togostoi kipsengwet? (Noto ko komut Kristo kochorgei.)" 
Romans10:7 Anan, Ng’o ne togostoi kipsengwet? (Noto ko komut Kristo kotogos eng’ che kibek.)" 
Romans10:8 Ago mwaei nee? Negitenen ng’olyot, mi kuting’ung’, ak mi muguleldang’ung’: noto ko ng’olyotab kayanet, ne kiamdoi:" 
Romans10:9 amu nging’any eng’ kuting’ung’ ile Jesu ko Kiptaiyat, ak iyani eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile kiing’eet Jehovah inendet komong’une che kibek, kesorun:" 
Romans10:10 amu iyani chi eng’ muguleldo agoi imanda; ak ng’anyei eng’ kutit agoi yetunet. 
Romans10:11 Amu mwaei siret kole, Age tugul ne iyani inendet ko magigochin kolilan." 
Romans10:12 Amu mami kabesiet eng’ Yahudiot ak Yunanindet: amu Kiptaiyandanato ko Kiptaiyatab tugul, ak magoriot eng’ ichek tugul che kuurei inendet:" 
Romans10:13 amu, Age tugul ne kuurei kainetab Kiptaiyat, kesoru." 
Romans10:14 Kuurtoi ano anyun inendet ichek che tom koyan? Ak iyandoi ano inendet ichek che tom kogas agobo inendet? Ak kastoi ano ama amdoindet? 
Romans10:15 Ak amdoitoi ano, ngo ma kiyokto? Agot ko u ye sirat kole, Kororon ne tia kelyekab icheget che ibu logoiywek che bo boiboiyet, che bo tuguk che miach!" 
Romans10:16 Ago kima kas it tugul logoiywek che miach. Amu mwaei Isaia kole, Kiptaiyandani, kigoyan ng’o ng’alekyok?" 
Romans10:17 Nyonei anyun kayanet eng’ kaset, ak nyonei kaset eng’ ng’olyotab Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Ago amwae ale, Tos kima kas? Ee, iman, Kiwa twegunenywa koyom emet komugul, Ak kiba ng’alekwak agoi tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Romans10:19 Ago amwae ale, Tos kima nai Israel? Kisib komwa Musa kole, Andeok ng’etkonda eng’ noto ne ma bororiet, Atachok eng’ bororiet ne matinyei naet." 
Romans10:20 Ak nyigan mising’ Isaia, ak mwaei kole, Kinyorua ichek che kima cheng’a; Kiatoogu eng’ ichek che ma teeba." 
Romans10:21 Ago mwaei agobo Israel kole, Kiaitochi eunekyuk eng’ betut komugul bik che magase it ak che ngelelik." 
Romans11:1 Amwae anyun ale, Kitoorta Jehovah bikyik? Achicha, ma u noto. Amu a Israelindet agane, ne bo keswekab Abraham, ne bo oretab Benjamin." 
Romans11:2 Kima toorta Jehovah bikyik che kisib konai. Anan ma onai ne mwaei siret agobo Elija? Ko u ye king’andoi inendet Israelik eng’ taitab Jehovah, kole," 
Romans11:3 Kiptaiyandani, kigobar maotiguk, ak kigoluul ole kitisisie: ak kaang’etu anege, ak kocheng’ei sobondanyu." 
Romans11:4 Ago lenjin nee wolunetab Jehovah? Kaatukyige murenik elfusiek tisab, che ma kutung’ji Baal." 
Romans11:5 Agot ko u noto anyun agine eng’ betusiechu, mitei che ng’etunotin ko u lewenet ne bo mieindo." 
Romans11:6 Ago ngot ko bo mieindo, ko ma ko bo boisionik: ngo ma u noto, ko mata koek mieindo mieindo." 
Romans11:7 Nee anyun? Kimanyor Israel noto kicheng’ei; ago kinyor lewenik, ak kigiuuiit chun alak:" 
Romans11:8 ko u ye sirat kole, Kigogochi Jehovah ichek tamirmirietab ruondo ne nyigis, ak konyek che mageerei kiy, ak itik che magasei kiy, agoi betunito." 
Romans11:9 Am mwaei Daudi kole, Ingoek mesenywa meset ak rigeito, Ak kanagutiet, ak yaaktaet eng’ ichek:" 
Romans11:10 Ingoimenitu konyekwak, si mageer kiy, Ak iyai batoikwak kogumbu kotugul." 
Romans11:11 Amwae anyun ale, Tos, kiterteriot kot kobutyo? Achicha, ma u noto: ago kinyonji yetunet Bororiosiek eng’ kabutenywa, si kobiit kogochi ichek ng’etkonda." 
Romans11:12 Ngot koegu kabutenywa magornatosiekab ng’ony, ak koek lusenywa magornatosiekab Bororiosiek; kosiirei ne tia anyun nyiienywa?" 
Romans11:13 Ago ang’alalwok okwek che o bo Bororiosiek. Ko u ye a ne kiyoktoi ne bo Bororiosiek, atorori boisiennyu:" 
Romans11:14 si agochi ng’etkonda eng’ or age tugul icheget che ki borto agenge, ak asoru alak eng’ ichek." 
Romans11:15 Amu ngo toortaenywa ko katuiyetab ng’ony, ko tos nee anyun taagetab ichek, kobate sobondo ne mong’une che kibek?" 
Romans11:16 Ak ngo tilil tongoaniat, ko tilil kit komugul agine: ak ngo tilil tigitiot, ko tililen agichek temenik." 
Romans11:17 Ago ngot ko kigiiri temenik alak, ak inye ne i emditab timin, ko kiginamnyenen ichek eng’ kwenunywa, ak kioyamde koboto icheget ne bo tigitiot ak akwaiyetab emdit;" 
Romans11:18 mechauge ile isiire temenik: ago, ngot ichauge, ko ma inye ne igeseni tigitiot, ago tigitiot ne kesenin." 
Romans11:19 Imwae anyun ile, Kigiiri temenik, si kinamnyena." 
Romans11:20 Mie; kigiiri ichek amu bistoenywa, ak itononi eng’ kayaneng’ung’. Amelasge, ago iyweisie:" 
Romans11:21 amu ngo kima rire Jehovah temenik che ki bo ketoto ye kinye, ko marirenen ak inye." 
Romans11:22 Keer anyun-o mieindo ak koromnatetab Jehovah: eng’ ichek che kibutyo, ko koromnatet; ago eng’ inye, ko mieindab Jehovah, ngitebi eng’ mieindanyi: ngo ma u noto ketilin aginye." 
Romans11:23 Ak ngo matebi ichek eng’ bistoenywa, kinamdos: amu imuchi Jehovah konamnyo ichek kogeny." 
Romans11:24 Amu ngo kigetilin eng’ emdit ne bo timin eng’ biteennyi, ak kiginamnyenen emdit ne mie ne kima ko bo timin eng’ biteennyi: ko siirei anyun ne tia kinamnye temenik che ki bo ye kinye emdinywa!" 
Romans11:25 Amu mamache oegu che mongen ung’otioni, che kitupche, si moiityige ole o ng’omen eng’ loseng’wong’ bo ge, ale kanyonji Israel uuindo eng’ kebeber, agoi konyo nyiiet ne bo Bororiosiek;" 
Romans11:26 ak u noto tun kisoru Israel tugul: ko u ye sirat kole, Tun mong’une Sion Katiagindet; Ak koistoe Jakobo bistoet:" 
Romans11:27 Ak ni arorutiennyu eng’ ichek, Ye tun aiste tengekwogikwak." 
Romans11:28 Ago bunik ichek eng’ okwek, amu logoiywek che miach: ago eng’ ng’olyotab lewenet, ko chamanik ichek amu kwanisiek." 
Romans11:29 Amu matinyei ndara konunoikab Jehovah ak kuursennyi. 
Romans11:30 Amu ko u ye kiongelelji Jehovah eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto, ago nguno ko kaonyoru rirenetab ge eng’ bistoenywa," 
Romans11:31 ko u noto agichek chu, kigobistoe, si konyor agichek rirenetab ge eng’ rirenetab ge ne kigiboruok." 
Romans11:32 Amu kigoratyi Jehovah tugul eng’ bistoet, si kobiit korire tugul." 
Romans11:33 Ee tianitu anyun oindo ne bo magornatosiekab ng’omnatet ak naetab Jehovah! Ak kiruogutikyik che maisiagaksei, ak ortinwekyik che ma cheng’oksei!" 
Romans11:34 Amu ng’o ne kigonai kabwatutikab Kiptaiyat? Anan ng’o ne kigoek konetindennyi? 
Romans11:35 Anan ng’o ne kisib kogochi kiy, si kobiit koyaakyi inendet kogeny?" 
Romans11:36 Amu bou inendet, ak kobunu inendet, ak koweekyingei inendet, tuguk tugul. Bunjin inendet torornatget koigeny. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Noto anyun che kitupche, asomok mising’, eng’ rirenosiekab Jehovah ale, ogoite borwekwok koek tiseiywot ne sobei, ne tilil, ne taachaksei eng’ Jehovah, noto ko boisieng’wong’ ne nyolu." 
Romans12:2 Amoyaniege ateptab betusiechu: ago ingewalak eng’ kaleelitetab kabwatutikwok, si kobiit onai komie maget ne mie, ne tachaksei ak kogesunotgei, ne bo Jehovah." 
Romans12:3 Amu amwachini chi age tugul ne mi kwenung’wong’, eng’ mieindo ne kigegona, amat kobwatgei chi kole toror kosiir ne te ne nyolu kobwat; ago kobwat ne yamei, ko u ye kiigochi Jehovah chi age tugul karagutietab kayanet." 
Romans12:4 Amu agot ko u ye kitinye kebeberwek che chang’ eng’ borto agenge, ama tinyei kebeberwek tugul boisiet agenge:" 
Romans12:5 ko u noto eng’ achek che ki chang’, ki borto agenge eng’ Kristo, ak ki kebeberta age tugul ne bo age." 
Romans12:6 Ak ketinye konunoik che terotin ko u mieindo ne kigegonech, ngo maoinatet, ko ongeamde ko u ole te kayanennyo;" 
Romans12:7 anan boisiet, ongigochige boisiennyo; anan inendet ne inetisiei, kochuljigei konetisiennyi;" 
Romans12:8 anan inendet ne iteitoi, kochuljige kateitaennyi: inendet ne igoitoi, kogoito eng’ aiyebindo; inendet ne bou, koboi kochuljigei; inendet ne riregei, koriregei eng’ boiboiyet." 
Romans12:9 Ingoek chamnyet ne matinyei ng’alset. Wech mising’ noto ya; onamge ak ne mie. 
Romans12:10 Ochamnye eng’ chamnyet ne u ne bo tupchosiek; ingoiit chito age chito age kosiir inendet eng’ teegisto; 
Romans12:11 eng’ kagiiletab ge amochoriren; ogiilge mising’ eng’ tamirmiriet, oote Kiptaiyat;" 
Romans12:12 oboiboitu eng’ kamang’unet; omuitoi eng’ nyalilda; ogiiljige saet kotugul; 
Romans12:13 otoret che tililen eng’ tuguk che bononi; oaiyebitu eng’ toek. 
Romans12:14 Oberur che usok; oberur, amochub." 
Romans12:15 Oboiboitu koboto che boiboi; oririe koboto che rirtos. 
Romans12:16 Oegu che tinyei kabwatet agenge okwege eng’ okwege. Among’asyige tuguk che tororen, ago onamge ak che iming’inegei. Moiityige ole o ng’omen eng’ loseng’wong’ bo ge." 
Romans12:17 Amoyaakyi chi yaitio eng’ yaitio. Ibwat tuguk che bo teegisto eng’ taitab bik tugul. 
Romans12:18 Ngomugaksei eng’ okwek, otebi ak bik tugul eng’ kalyet." 
Romans12:19 Chamanichu, amoyaakte mugetut, ago ogochi boroindo neregek: amu sirat kole, Nenyu yaaktaetab mugetut; ayaaktoi, mwaei Kiptaiyat." 
Romans12:20 Ago ngo am rubet bunyondeng’ung’, ibai; ngo am melel, inage koee: amu ye iyae ko u noto ko kerurukyi ng’etetiot metinnyi." 
Romans12:21 Ameng’ koterterin yaitiet, ago iterter yaitiet eng’ ne mie." 
Romans13:1 Ingogas it chi tugul bounatosiek che eechen: amu mami bounato, kobate ne bunu Jehovah; ak kiindoi Jehovah choto mitei." 
Romans13:2 Noto anyun inendet ne kirindoi bounatet, kobistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah: ak ichek che bistoe kocheng’jingei kiruoget." 
Romans13:3 Amu ma bo bounik kamuiset eng’ boisionik che miach, ago eng’ che yaach. Ak tos meiywei bounatet? Yai ne mie, si inyoru kalosunet eng’ noto;" 
Romans13:4 amu inendet ko kiboitiotab Jehovah eng’ inye, ne yaei ne mie. Ago ngiyai ne ya, iywei; amu maiboti rotwetab chok buch: amu inendet ko kiboitiotab Jehovah, yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo neregek eng’ inendet ne yaei yaitio." 
Romans13:5 Noto anyun kanyol ogas it, ma amu neregek kityo, ago amu kabwatet agine." 
Romans13:6 Amu ng’olyondonito anyun ogoitoi aisurut agine; amu icheget ko kiboitinikab boisietab Jehovah, che igiiljingei kotugul kioto." 
Romans13:7 Ogochi tugul tuguk che nyoljin: kodi eng’ inendet ne nyoljin kodi; aisurut eng’ inendet ne nyoljin aisurut; kaiyweisiet eng’ inendet ne nyoljin kaiyweisiet; teegisto eng’ inendet ne nyoljin teegisto. 
Romans13:8 Amobesen chi kiy age tugul, ago ochamnye: amu inendet ne chamei chitab kokwennyi ko kagoyai kosulda Ng’atutiet." 
Romans13:9 Amu eng’ mwaonato kimwaei kele, Amoipge, Amerumisie, Amechorse, Amegase miat kiy ne bo chi, ago ngo mi ng’atutiet age, kiyumi tugul eng’ ng’olyondoni, kele, Cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ole ichamdoige." 
Romans13:10 Mayachin chamnyet kiy ne ya chitab kokwennyi: noto anyun chamnyet ko kasuldaetab Ng’atutiet. 
Romans13:11 Ak anyun, ongen betusiek, ole kagoit sait ne kanyol ogosu eng’ ruondo: amu kagorikyech nguno yetunet kosiir ye kingiyan eng’ tai." 
Romans13:12 Negit kosiirto kemout, karik betut; noto anyun ongireegu boisionikab mesundeito, ak ongilaach karikab lapkeiyet." 
Romans13:13 Ongebendoti ko u ye nyolu, ko u bet; ma eng’ wasang’natet anan bogitet, ma eng’ sokset anan maget ne ya, ma eng’ boriet ak ng’etkong’." 
Romans13:14 Ago olach Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, amochopchi borto boroindo, si oyai magutikyik." 
Romans14:1 Ago otaach inendet ne nyalulat eng’ kayanet, ago ma si oruokyi kabwatutikyik." 
Romans14:2 Tinyei chito age kayanet koam tuguk tugul: ago inendet ne nyalulat koamei ngwek. 
Romans14:3 Amat kosas ne amei ne maamei; ak amat koruokyi inendet ne maamei, inendet ne amei: amu kagotaach Jehovah inendet." 
Romans14:4 I ng’o inye ne iruokyini otwogindetab chito age? Tononi anan kobuti eng’ kiptaiyandennyi. Ee, kinamei kotonon; amu imuchi Kiptaiyat konam inendet kotonon." 
Romans14:5 Iiti chito age betut age kosiir betut age: iiti chito age betut age tugul kogergeit. Ingonai komie chi age tugul eng’ ng’omnatennyi. 
Romans14:6 Inendet ne ribei betut, koripchin Kiptaiyat: ak inendet ne amisiei, koamisiei eng’ Kiptaiyat, amu mwachin Jehovah kongoi; ak inendet ne maamisiei, ko maamisiei eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak mwachin Jehovah kongoi." 
Romans14:7 Amu mami age eng’ achek ne sobei agobo ge, ama mi ne meei agobo ge." 
Romans14:8 Amu ngesoptosi, kesoptosi eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak ngebegu, kebegu eng’ Kiptaiyat: noto anyun, ngesoptosi anan ngebegu, kebo Kiptaiyat." 
Romans14:9 Amu kime Kristo agobo nito, ak kisob, si koek Kiptaiyat ne bo che kigobek ak che soptos." 
Romans14:10 Ago inye, ko amu nee si kiruokyi ne otupche? Anan kogeny, ko amu nee si iit ne otupche koek buch? Amu tun kitonondosi achek tugul eng’ taitab ng’echeretab kiruoget ne bo Jehovah." 
Romans14:11 Amu kigisir kele, Mwaei Kiptaiyat kole, Ko u ye asobe, Tun kutung’jina kutundo age tugul, Ak kolos ng’elyepta age tugul Jehovah." 
Romans14:12 Noto anyun, tun tetyin chi age tugul Jehovah atebennyi." 
Romans14:13 Noto anyun, amat ko ta kiruyokyige kogeny: ago kaigai oruoch ko u ni kele amat konde chi kanagut oretab ne tupcho, anan kiy ne igochin kobut." 
Romans14:14 Angen, ak koanai komie eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu, ale mamitei kiy ne ng’wanitu inegei: kobate eng’ inendet ne iiti kiy kole ng’wan, kong’wanitu eng’ inendet." 
Romans14:15 Amu ngo arogen ne otupche amu amitwogik, koma iwendoti eng’ chamnyet. Amebar inendet eng’ amitwogiguk ne kimechi Kristo." 
Romans14:16 Amat kemwaitae mieindang’wong’ yaitio: 
Romans14:17 amu bounatetab Jehovah ko ma amisiet ak eeiset, ago imanda ak kalyet ak boiboiyet eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Romans14:18 Amu inendet ne otei Kristo eng’ tuguchuto koboiboi Jehovah, ak koyanjin bik." 
Romans14:19 Noto anyun, ongisub tuguk che yaei kalyet, ak tuguk che kiteegege achege eng’ achege." 
Romans14:20 Amowechawech boisietab Jehovah eng’ amitwogik. Tililen tuguk tugul iman; ago ya eng’ chichoto amei eng’ kanagut. 
Romans14:21 Mie ngot ko magiam banyek, anan kee maiyek, anan keyai kiy age tugul ne inachi ne otupche." 
Romans14:22 Kayanet ne itinye, itepte inyege eng’ taitab Jehovah. Baibai inendet ne matinyei ne iruokyinegei eng’ kioto kagoyanjigei inegei." 
Romans14:23 Ago inendet ne tinyei saget, kigikyin ngot koam, amu maamei eng’ kayanet; ak kit age tugul ne ma bo kayanet ko tengek." 
Romans15:1 Noto anyun kanyoljech achek che ki kimen kegesen nyalulnatetab che ma kimen, ama kibaibaigei achege." 
Romans15:2 Ingobaibai age tugul eng’ achek chitab kokwennyi eng’ noto mie, si koteegak." 
Romans15:3 Amu kima ibaibaigei Kristo inegei; ago, ko u ye kigisir kele, kogoitya agane churisietab icheget che kichurin." 
Romans15:4 Amu tuguk alak tugul che kigisir keny ko kigisir si kinetge, si kenyoru kamang’unet eng’ muitaet ak eng’ kagaigaet ne bo sirutik." 
Romans15:5 Ingogonok anyun Jehovah ne bo muitaet ak kagaigaet oegu che otinye kabwatet agenge okwege eng’ okwege ko u ye machei Kristo Jesu: 
Romans15:6 si kobiit otoror Jehovah inendet Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo eng’ maget agenge ak kutit agenge. 
Romans15:7 Noto anyun otaachge, ko u ye kitaachak Kristo agine, eng’ torornatetab Jehovah." 
Romans15:8 Amu amwae anyun ale kigeyai Kristo koek kiboitiotab kamuratanet agobo imanitab Jehovah, si kobiit kogimit arorutik che kigigochi Kwanisiek," 
Romans15:9 ak si kotoror Bororiosiek Jehovah amu rirenennyi; ko u ye kigisir kele, Noto anyun alosun eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek, Ak atienji kaineng’ung’." 
Romans15:10 Ak kimwa kogeny kole, Oboiboitu okwek Bororiosiek, koboto bikyik." 
Romans15:11 Ak kogeny, Olosu Kiptaiyat, okwek Bororiosiek tugul; Ak ingolos bik tugul inendet." 
Romans15:12 Ak kogeny mwaei Isaia kole, Tun biitu tigitiotab Jesii, Ak inendet ne tun ng’eetei koboi Bororiosiek; Kotun imang’u inendet Bororiosiek." 
Romans15:13 Noto anyun, ingonyiitak Jehovah ne bo kamang’unet boiboiyet tugul ak kalyet eng’ kayanet, si kobiit otesage eng’ kamang’unet, eng’ kamuktaetab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Romans15:14 Ak kaanai anendet agane agobo okwek, che kitupche, ale o nyiitotin eng’ mieindo, o nyiitotin eng’ naet tugul, ak kogeny, omuchi otigonge." 
Romans15:15 Ago, asirwok agobo ng’alek alak eng’ nyiganatet ne siirei, ko u ye abwatwok kogeny, amu mieindo ne kigona Jehovah," 
Romans15:16 ale aek kiboitiotab Kristo Jesu eng’ Bororiosiek, aboisiei eng’ logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah, si kobiit koek kagoitoetab Bororiosiek ne taagaksei, ko kagitaban eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Romans15:17 Noto anyun atinye kalosunennyu bo ge eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ tuguk che tokyingei Jehovah. 
Romans15:18 Amu maganye ang’alal agobo tugun alak tugul kobate choto che kigoyai Kristo eng’ ane, agobo kasetab it ne bo Bororiosiek, eng’ ng’olyot ak yaet," 
Romans15:19 eng’ kamuget ne bo kaborunoik ak kwong’utik, eng’ kamuktaetab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil; noto anyun, kong’eete Jerusalem, ak komoswekyik agoi Iluriko, ko kiaamdaate komie logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo;" 
Romans15:20 ee, ayae noto koek kit ne atoorjinige ale aamda logoiywek che miach, ma eng’ ole kigemwae kainetab Kristo, si mateech eng’ lumeiywotab chito age;" 
Romans15:21 ago, ko u ye kigisir kele, Keerei ichek, che kima bwanji logoiywekyik, Ak tun naei ichek che tom kogas." 
Romans15:22 Kigeranya anyun konyil che chang’ si manyonjok: 
Romans15:23 ago ko u ye ma atinye oldo age eng’ komoswechu, ak ko u ye atinye eng’ kenyisiechu chang’ emosto ale anyonjok," 
Romans15:24 eng’ ui tugul ye tun awendi Spania (amu amang’u ageerok eng’ bandanyu, si oyomisa eng’ bandanyu, si ye tun ngo kagoyama atebet ne kagitebi tugul ak okwek)-" 
Romans15:25 ago nguno, awendi Jerusalem, awa aboisiechi bik che tililen." 
Romans15:26 Amu kicham mising’ Makedonia ak Akaia kobasyi tugun bik che bonondos eng’ kwenutab che tililen che mi Jerusalem. 
Romans15:27 Ee, kigocham ichek mising’ ng’olyondonito; ak ichek ko besenikwak. Amu ngo kigeyai Bororiosiek koek yamdoik che bo tuguk che bo tamirmiriet, ko kanyol agichek koyaakta eng’ boisiet ne boisiechin eng’ tuguk che bo borto." 
Romans15:28 Ye kaagesu anyun nito, ak ang’okyi ichek logoechu, anyo abun oldang’wong’ awendi Spania." 
Romans15:29 Ak angen ale, ye anyonjok, anyone eng’ nyiietab kaberuretab Kristo." 
Romans15:30 Asomok mising’ anyun che kitupche, eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ak eng’ chamnyetab Tamirmiriet, ale ogiilge kobota eng’ sautikwok che osae Jehovah agobo ane;" 
Romans15:31 si kobiit kitiacha eng’ ichek che magase it eng’ Judea, si koek boisiennyu ne atinye agobo Jerusalem ne taagaksei eng’ che tililen;" 
Romans15:31 si kobiit kitiacha eng’ ichek che magase it eng’ Judea, si koek boisiennyu ne atinye agobo Jerusalem ne taagaksei eng’ che tililen;" 
Romans15:32 si amuch anyonjok eng’ boiboiyet eng’ magetab Jehovah, ak anyoru kamuung’et kobotok." 
Romans15:33 Ingoteb Jehovah ne bo kalyet kobotok okwek tugul. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kande eunekwok Poibe ne kitupche ne cheboitiotab kaniset ne mi Kenkrea: 
Romans16:2 ale otaach inendet eng’ Kiptaiyat, ko u ye nyoljin che tililen, ak otoret inendet eng’ kit age tugul ne magenok; amu inendet agine ko ki toretindet ne bo che chang’, ak kitoreta agane." 
Romans16:3 Ogat Priska ak Akula che ki kiboitinik tugul eng’ Kristo Jesu," 
Romans16:4 che ki chobotin kogoito sobonwekwak agobo sobondanyu; che mamwachini kongoi anege, ago koboto kanisosiek tugul che bo Bororiosiek agichek:" 
Romans16:5 ak ogat kaniset ne mi gonywa. Ogat Epeneto ne achame mising’, ne tongoaniat ne bo Kristo eng’ emetab Asia." 
Romans16:6 Ogat Maria, ne kiboisiewok eng’ boisiet ne o." 
Romans16:7 Ogat Androniko ak Junia, che bo ornyo, ak che kimonjororinik kobota, che toogunotin eng’ che kiyoktoi, che kimi eng’ Kristo kotom ayan." 
Romans16:8 Ogat Ampliato ne achame mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat. 
Romans16:9 Ogat Urbano kiboitiondennyu ne kiboisiei tugul eng’ Kristo, ak Stako ne achame." 
Romans16:10 Ogat Apele ne chamat eng’ Kristo. Ogat ichek che bo gotab Aristobulo. 
Romans16:11 Ogat Herodion ne bo ornyo. Ogat ichek che bo gotab Narkiso, che mi eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:12 Ogat Trupena ak Truposa, che boisiei eng’ Kiptaiyat. Ogat Persis chamanet, ne kibois mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:13 Ogat Rupo ne lewenot eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak kamet ne kamennyu agane." 
Romans16:14 Ogat Asunkrito, ak Plegon, ak Herme ak Patroba, ak Herma, ak tupchosiek che mi koboto ichek." 
Romans16:15 Ogat Pilologo ak Julia, ak Nereo ak chepkamet, ak Olumpa, ak che tililen tugul che mi koboto ichek." 
Romans16:16 Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil. Igatok kanisosiek tugul che bo Kristo. 
Romans16:17 Kasomok anyun che kitupche, ale ogeer ichek che ing’eeti kabesiosiek ak kanagutik, che manamegei ak konetisiet ne kionetge: ak koistoege ichek." 
Romans16:18 Amu icheget che u choto, ko maotei Kiptaiyandennyo Kristo, ago otei mootinwekwak; ak kong’alei mugulelwekab che libwoben eng’ ng’alekwak che tangusen ak che bo chemwaikutnatet." 
Romans16:19 Amu kigogasak eng’ bik tugul kaseng’wong’ bo it. Noto anyun abaibai eng’ okwek: ago amache ong’omegitu eng’ noto mie, ak oegu che berber eng’ noto bo yaitiet." 
Romans16:20 Ak tun tuei Jehovah ne bo kalyet Setani eng’ kelyekwok ko negit. Ingoteb kobotok mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. 
Romans16:21 Igatok Timoteo ne kiboitiot kobota; ak Lukio ak Jason ak Sosipatro, che bo ornyo." 
Romans16:22 Ane Tertio ne kasirei baruani, agatok eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:23 Igatok Gaio ne ami gonnyi, ak kaniset komugul. Igatok Erasto ribindetab tugukab nganaset, ak Kuarto ne tupcho." 
Romans16:24 Ingoteb kobotok tugul mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. Amen. 
Romans16:25 Nguno eng’ inendet ne imuchi kogimitok ko u logoiywekyuk che miach ak amdaetab Jesu Kristo, ko u ng’ang’utiet ne bo ung’ot ne kiga kiuny kosis koboch betusiek che bo koigeny," 
Romans16:26 ago kagong’ang’ak nguno, ak eng’ sirutik che bo maotik, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah ne bo koigeny, ko kagiborji bororiosiek tugul agoi kasetab it ne bo kayanet;" 
Romans16:27 bo Jehovah ne ng’om inegei, torornatet koigeny, eng’ Jesu Kristo. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo, ne kigiguur koek ne kiyoktoi ne bo Jesu Kristo eng’ magetab Jehovah, ak Sostene tupchennyo," 
1Corinthians1:2 kisirjini kanisetab Jehovah ne mitei Korinto, ichek che kigitaban eng’ Kristo Jesu, che kigiguur koek che tililen, koboto tugul che kuurei kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo eng’ komosta age tugul, Kiptaiyandenywa ak ko nenyo:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet ne bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:4 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi kotugul agobo okwek, amu mieindab Jehovah ne kigigonok eng’ Kristo Jesu;" 
1Corinthians1:5 amu kigeyaak oegu magorek mising’ eng’ inendet eng’ kiy age tugul, eng’ ng’alek tugul, ak naet tugul;" 
1Corinthians1:6 ko u ye kigigimit baornatetab Kristo eng’ okwek: 
1Corinthians1:7 si moletu eng’ konunet age tugul; ogeni ng’ang’utietab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ne igimitok agine agoi let, ko motinye kiy ne kiruogunenok eng’ betutab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo;" 
1Corinthians1:9 Jehovah ko ne kiyani, kigeguurok eng’ inendet obwanji yamdaetab Werinnyi Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo." 
1Corinthians1:10 Asomok mising’ anyun, che kitupche, eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ale, omwa tugul kit agenge, si mabiit kabesiosiek eng’ kwenung’wong’; ago si oegu che igesunotgei kibagenge eng’ kabwatet agenge ak eng’ kiruoget agenge." 
1Corinthians1:11 Amu kigoborua ichek che mi gotab Kloe agobo okwek, tupchosiekyuk, kole mi toiyosiek kwenung’wong’." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kit anyun ne amwae ko ni, ale, mwaei age tugul eng’ okwek, kole, A bo Paulo; ak a bo Apolo; ak a bo Kepa; ak a bo Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:13 Tos pcheat Kristo? Tos kigigartatwok Paulo? Anan kigibatisanjok kainetab Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi amu ma abatisan chi eng’ okwek, kobate Krispo ak Gaio," 
1Corinthians1:15 si mamwa chi age tugul kole kigibatisanjok kainennyu. 
1Corinthians1:16 Ak kiabatisan che bo gotab Stepana agichek: mangen kogeny, ngo kita abitisan chi age." 
1Corinthians1:17 Amu ma iyokwa Kristo abatisanis, ago aamda logoiywek che miach: ma eng’ ng’omnatet ne bo ng’alek, si ma kiyai kimurtoiyotab Kristo koek buch." 
1Corinthians1:18 Amu berberindo ng’olyotab kimurtoiyot eng’ icheget che lustos; ago eng’ achek che kisoru ko kimnatetab Jehovah. 
1Corinthians1:19 Amu kigisir kele, Ang’eme ng’omnatetab che ng’omen, Ak aesioi kaguiyetab icheget che iguitos." 
1Corinthians1:20 Mi ano ne ng’om? Mi ano sirindet? Mi ano kiptiiyotiot ne bo kenyisiechu? Tos ma yai Jehovah ng’omnatetab ng’onyuni koberberit? 
1Corinthians1:21 Amu eng’ ng’omnatet ne bo Jehovah ko ma nai ng’ony Jehovah eng’ ng’omnatennyi, kicham Jehovah kosor icheget che iyani, eng’ berberindo ne bo ng’olyot ne kiamdoi." 
1Corinthians1:22 Amu somei Yahudik kaborunoik, ak cheng’ei Yunanik ng’omnatet:" 
1Corinthians1:23 ago kiamdoi achek Kristo ne kigigartat, ne kanagutiet eng’ Yahudik, ak ko berberindo eng’ Bororiosiek;" 
1Corinthians1:24 ago eng’ ichek che kigiguur, Yahudik koboto Yunanik, Kristo ko kamuktaetab Jehovah, ak ng’omnatetab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians1:25 Amu berberindo ne bo Jehovah ko ng’om kosiir bik; ak nyalulnatetab Jehovah ko kim kosiir bik. 
1Corinthians1:26 Amu, ogeer kuurseng’wong’-o, tupchosiechu, ole ma kiguur che chang’ che ng’omen eng’ atebetab borto, anan che chang’ che kimen, ama che chang’ che toogunotin:" 
1Corinthians1:27 ago kilewen Jehovah tuguk che berber che bo ng’ony, si kogochi kalilanet che ng’omen; ak kilewen Jehovah tuguk che nyalulotin che bo ng’ony, si kogochi kalilanet tuguk che kimen;" 
1Corinthians1:28 ak kilewen Jehovah tuguk che ma toogunotin che bo ng’ony, ak tuguk che kisasei, ak tuguk che mamitei, si kowal koek buch tuguk che mitei:" 
1Corinthians1:29 si mat kolosgei chi age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ago o bo inendet okwek eng’ Kristo Jesu, ne kigiyai eng’ Kristo Jesu, ne kigiyai eng’ achek koek ng’omnatet ne bunu Jehovah, ak imanda, ak tililindo, ak katiaget:" 
1Corinthians1:31 si koek, ko u ye kigisir kele, Inendet ne ilosugei, ko ingolosgei eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians2:1 Ak ye kianyonjok, tupchosiechu, ko kima anyo eng’ anyinyindab ng’alalet anan ne bo ng’omnatet, anyo aboruok ung’otietab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians2:2 Amu kiabegechi ale mamache anai kiy age tugul eng’ kwenung’wong’ kobate Jesu Kristo, inendet ne kigigartat." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ak kiami kobotok eng’ nyalulet, ak eng’ kaiyweisiet, ak eng’ botanet ne o." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ak ng’alalennyu ak ng’olyondennyu ne kiaamdoi ko kima ko ng’alekab kagaigaet che bo ng’omnatet, ago eng’ kaborunetab Tamirmiriet ak ne bo kamuktaet:" 
1Corinthians2:5 si matonone kayaneng’wong’ ng’omnatetab bik, ago eng’ kamuktaetab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians2:6 Ago kimwae ng’omnatet eng’ kwenutab che igesunotingei: ago ng’omnatet ne ma bo betusiechu, anan ne bo bounikab betusiechu, che machei koek buch:" 
1Corinthians2:7 ago kimwae ng’omnatetab Jehovah eng’ ung’otiet, noto ne kigeuny, ne kiga sib kong’at Jehovah agobo torornatennyo ye kitom kobiit ng’ony:" 
1Corinthians2:8 ne manaei agot agenge eng’ bounik che bo betusiechu: amu nda kiga nai, ta kima kogartati Kiptaiyatab torornatet:" 
1Corinthians2:9 ago ko u ye kigisir kele, Tuguk che kima keer konda, ama kas itit, Ak ne kima chut muguleldab chi, Tuguk alak tugul che kichopchi Jehovah icheget che chamei inendet." 
1Corinthians2:10 Ago king’ang’wech Jehovah eng’ Tamirmiriet: amu isiachi Tamirmiriet tuguk tugul, agot tuguk che bo orit che bo Jehovah." 
1Corinthians2:11 Amu tos chi ng’o ne ingen tugukab chi, kobate tamirmirietab chichoto, ne mitei inendet? Ko u noto mami chi ne ingen tugukab Jehovah, kobate Tamirmiriet ne bo Jehovah." 
1Corinthians2:12 Ago kima kitaach tamirmiriet ne bo ng’ony, ago tamirmiriet ne bo Jehovah; si kenai tuguk che kigogonech Jehovah buch." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tuguchoto agichek che kimwae, ma eng’ ng’alek che ineti ng’omnatetab chi, ago che ineti Tamirmiriet; kiroge tugukab tamirmiriet ak tugukab tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians2:14 Mataachei chito ne mi eng’ atebetab borto tuguk che bo Tamirmirietab Jehovah: amu berberindo eng’ inendet; ak temene kobesio tuguchoto, amu naoksei eng’ tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians2:15 Ago inendet ne mi eng’ atebetab tamirmiriet kobestos tuguk tugul, ago mami chi ne ibestos ole teptoi chichoto." 
1Corinthians2:16 Amu ng’o ne kigonai kabwatutikab Kiptaiyat, si kobiit konet inendet? Ago kitinye achek kabwatutikab Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Kitemena anyun, che kitupche, ang’alalwok ko u bik che mi eng’ atebetab tamirmiriet, ago ko u bik che mi eng’ atebetab borto, ko u che manyurunik eng’ Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Kiaguenak chego, ma abaenak amitwogik che uuen; amu kitom omuch; achicha, agot nguno kotom omuch;" 
1Corinthians3:3 amu ta omi eng’ atebetab borto: amu ko u ye mi kwenung’wong’ ng’etkonda ak boriet, tos momi eng’ atebetab borto, ak obendoti ko u biteetab bik?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Amu ye mwaei age kole, A bo Paulo; ak kolen age, A bo Apolo; tos ma o bik?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Nee anyun Apolo? Ko nee Paulo? Kiboitinik che kigonok oyan; ak ko u ye kiigochi Kiptaiyat age tugul. 
1Corinthians3:6 Kiagole, kobisi Apolo; ago kiibit Jehovah." 
1Corinthians3:7 Noto anyun matilei kiy ne kolei, anan ne ibisi; ago Jehovah ne ibiti." 
1Corinthians3:8 Noto anyun, inendet ne kolei ak inendet ne ibisi ko agenge: ago tun nyoru age tugul melektanyi inegei ko u boisiennyi." 
1Corinthians3:9 Amu ki kiboitinikab Jehovah che kiboisiei koboto inendet: okwek ko o mbaretab Jehovah, gotab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians3:10 Kialumde lumeiywot ko u teegindet ne o ne ng’om, ko u mieindab Jehovah ne kigigona; ak teechei chito age baragunnyi. Ago ingorib chi age tugul ole teektoi eng’ baragunnyi." 
1Corinthians3:11 Amu mami lumeiywot age ne imuchi chi kolumda kobate noto kigelum, noto Jesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Ago ngo teech chi baragutab lumeiywondonoto eng’ tahabu, feda, koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ketik, suswek, mobek;" 
1Corinthians3:13 tun king’anyei boisietab chi age tugul: amu tun ng’anyei betut, amu king’anyei eng’ mat; ak kotiem mat ole teptoi boisietab chi age tugul." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ngo tebi boisietab chi age tugul ne kiteech baragunnyi, kotaachei inendet melekto." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ngo lal boisietab chi age tugul, kobetos tugukyik: ago kisoru inendet; ago ko u ye kisoru eng’ mat." 
1Corinthians3:16 Mongen okwek ole o hekalut ne bo Jehovah, ak menyok Tamirmirietab Jehovah?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Ak ngo ng’em chi age tugul hekalut ne bo Jehovah, kotun ng’emei Jehovah inendet; amu tilil hekalut ne bo Jehovah, okwek noto." 
1Corinthians3:18 Amat koberbergei chi. Ngobwati chi age tugul eng’ kwenung’wong’ kole ng’om eng’ betusiechu, ko ingoek ne berber, si kobiit koek ne ng’om." 
1Corinthians3:19 Amu ng’omnatet ne bo ng’onyuni ko berberindo eng’ Jehovah. Amu kigisir kele, Inendet ne namei che ng’omen eng’ ng’alsenywa:" 
1Corinthians3:20 ak kogeny, Ingen Kiptaiyat kabwatutikab che ng’omen, kole buch." 
1Corinthians3:21 Noto anyun amat kolosgei chi eng’ bik. Amu tuguk tugul ko chekwok; 
1Corinthians3:22 ngo Paulo, anan Apolo, anan Kepa, anan meet, anan tuguk che mitei, anan tuguk che bwanei; tugul ko chekwok;" 
1Corinthians3:23 ak o bo Kristo; ak Kristo ko bo Jehovah. 
1Corinthians4:1 Ingoiitech anyun chi kole ki kiboitinikab Kristo, ak ribik che bo ung’otikab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians4:2 Eng’ yuto anyun kogeny, kemage ribik kele koek chi age tugul ne kiyani." 
1Corinthians4:3 Ago kit ne ming’in mising’ eng’ ane ale ogina okwek, anan eng’ kiruogetab chi: ee, maginege anege." 
1Corinthians4:4 Amu mangenjige kiy: ago magiityina imanda eng’ noto: ago inendet ne kina ko Kiptaiyat. 
1Corinthians4:5 Noto anyun amat oruokyi kiy kotom koit betut, agoi konyo Kiptaiyat, ne tun ng’anyei tuguk che ung’otin che bo mesundeito, ak kobarta kabwatutik che bo mugulelwek; si konyor chi age tugul anyun kalosunennyi eng’ Jehovah." 
1Corinthians4:6 Nguno anyun che kitupche, kaayai tuguchu koek kayaniet eng’ ane ak Apolo agobo okwek; si kobiit onetge eng’ achek si mosiir tuguk che sirotin; si mamenegei chi agobo chi age, kotil let chito age." 
1Corinthians4:7 Amu tos ng’o ne kayain iegu ne ter? Ak nee ne itinye inye ne kima itaach? Ago ngo kiitaache, ko amu nee si ilosuge, ko u ye kima itaache?" 
1Corinthians4:8 O nyiitotin, kooegu magore, koobou ama kimi: ee, achame ale obou, si kobiit kebou agachek kobotok." 
1Corinthians4:9 Amu, alen, kigondeech Jehovah achek che kiyoktoi keegu che bo let eng’ tugul, ko u bik che kigiruokyi kobek: amu kigeyaech keegu che kigeerei eng’ ng’ony, ak eng’ malaikaisiek, ak eng’ bik." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ki che berberen achek amu Kristo, ago o ng’omen eng’ Kristo; ki nyalulyotin achek, ago o kimen; otinye teegisto okwek, ago mateechech chi." 
1Corinthians4:11 Agot sainito ketinye rubet ak melelda ak kimi ach ngor ak kiluiluchech, ama kitinye ole kimenye;" 
1Corinthians4:12 ak kibirtoige, keboisie eunekyok: ye king’emwech kut, kiberur; ye kiusech, kemuitoi;" 
1Corinthians4:13 ye kimwaitaenech yaitio, kigoigoi: kiyaech kegergeitu ak busagariekab ng’ony, tuguk che kibuktoi che kilaktoi, agoi nguno." 
1Corinthians4:14 Masire tuguchu ale si olilanse, ago si atigonok ko u lagokyuk che achame." 
1Corinthians4:15 Amu ndotinye ribik elfusiek taman eng’ Kristo, ago motinye kwanisiek che chang’: amu kiasichok eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ logoiywek che miach." 
1Corinthians4:16 Noto anyun asomok ale oegu kasubikyuk. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kaayokwok anyun Timoteo amu ng’olyondonito, ne inendet ko lakwennyu ne achame ak iyani, eng’ Kiptaiyat, ne nyonei kabwatwok ortinwekyuk che mi eng’ Kristo, ko u ye anetoti komosta age tugul eng’ kaniset age tugul." 
1Corinthians4:18 Mendos alak anyun, kolen abere manyonjinok." 
1Corinthians4:19 Ago negit anyonjok, ngo cham Kiptaiyat; ak aguiye, ma ng’olyotab ichek che meniotin, ago kamugenywa." 
1Corinthians4:20 Amu bounatetab Jehovah ko ma eng’ ng’olyot, ago eng’ kamuget." 
1Corinthians4:21 Nee ne omache anyun? Anyonjok ak kirokto, anan eng’ chamnyet ak tamirmirietab talasiet?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Mwaat komie kele mitei ibetab ge kwenung’wong’, ibetab ge ne mami agot eng’ Bororiosiek, kele ibegei chi ak osotiotab kwandanyi." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ak omendosi, ama agot oarogense, si kobiit keisto eng’ kwenung’wong’ inendet ne kiyai kioto."
