1Corinthians5:3 Amu ane iman, ko mamite eng’ borto, ago amite eng’ tamirmiriet, kaaruokyi anyun inendet ne kiyai kiito ko u noto, ko u ye amite," 
1Corinthians5:4 ye koyumge eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu, koboto tamirmiriennyu, ak kamuktaetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 ogochi Setani chito ne u noto si keng’em borto, si tun kesor tamirmiriennyi eng’ betutab Kiptaiyat Jesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ma kararan kalosuneng’wong’ bo ge. Tos mongen ole igutu mermerek tutigin kererutiet komugul? 
1Corinthians5:7 Ounde mermerek che bo keny, si kobiit oegu kererutiet ne leel, ko u ye mami mermerek eng’ okwek. Amu kigeeny agine aruennyo ne bo Paska, noto ko Kristo:" 
1Corinthians5:8 noto anyun ongerib igorta, ma eng’ mermerek che bo keny, anan eng’ mermerekab yaitiet ak tengekto, ago eng’ makatiat ne ma kinde mermerek che matinyei kenisiet ak bo iman." 
1Corinthians5:9 Kiasirwak eng’ baruennyu ale amonamge ak bik che soksei; 
1Corinthians5:10 mamwae ale otabanege mising’ che soksei che bo ng’onyuni, anan kipkeinik anan rebik, anan che saei kanamonik; amu nda u noto ta kanyoljok omande eng’ ng’ony:" 
1Corinthians5:11 ago nguno asirwok, ale amonamge ak chi age tugul ne kiguure tupchet, ne soksei, anan kipkeiyat, anan ne saei kanamonik, anan ne chubisiei, anan kibogityot, anan rebindet; amat oamjine ak chito ne u noto, achicha." 
1Corinthians5:12 Amu amage nee aruokyi ichek che mitei sang’? Tos moruokyini okwek ichek che mitei go? 
1Corinthians5:13 Ago ichek che mitei sang’ koruokyin Jehovah choto. Oiste anyun chichoto sogoran eng’ kwenung’wong’. 
1Corinthians6:1 Tos kanyei age tugul eng’ okwek ne ting’e ng’olyo chitab kokwennyi kwo kapkiruok eng’ taitab che ma bo iman, ama eng’ taitab che tililen?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anan mongen ole tun iruokyin bik che tililen ng’ony? Ak ngot kotun oruokyini ng’ony, ko tos manyoljinok oruoch agobo tuguk che mengechen?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Tos mongen ole tun kiruokyini malaikaisiek? Siirei anyun ne tia, tuguk che bo soboni!" 
1Corinthians6:4 Ngot otinye ole kiruokyine tuguk che bo soboni, ko tos ondoi koek kiruogik ichek che magiiti kele kiy eng’ kaniset?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Amwae ni si agonok olilanse. Tos iman, mami chi ne ng’om eng’ kwenung’wong’ ne imuchi kotil ng’alek eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekyik," 
1Corinthians6:6 ago imuti tupchet age tupchennyi kwo kapkiruok, ak ne siirei ko, eng’ taitab che maiyanotin?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Achicha, kagoek nguno lelut eng’ okwek, amu oruokyinige okwege. Amu nee si mochamdege kinyalilak? Kalya si mochamdege kerebenak tuguk?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Achicha, ago, okweget che oyae ne ya, ak orebisiei, agot eng’ tupchosiek." 
1Corinthians6:9 Anan mongen ole matun nyoru icheget che ma bo iman bounatetab Jehovah? Amat kiberberak: mami eng’ che soksei, anan che saei kanamonik, anan che kibegei, anan chemulkwonyinik, anan chemogorgoinik," 
1Corinthians6:10 anan chorik, anan kipkeinik, anan kibogitinik, anan che chubisiei, anan rebik, che nyoru bounatetab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians6:11 Ak ki u choto alak eng’ okwek: ago kigiunok, ago kigitabanak, ago kigiityok imanda eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, ak eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah nenyo." 
1Corinthians6:12 Chamdaat tuguk tugul eng’ ane; ago ma tuguk tugul che nyolu. Chamdaat tuguk tugul eng’ ane; ago mamache koboiywa age tugul eng’ choto. 
1Corinthians6:13 Bo amitwogik moet, ak bo moet amitwogik; ago tun yaei Jehovah tuwai koek buch, moet ak amitwogik. Ago borto, ko ma bo sokset, ago bo Kiptaiyat; ak Kiptaiyat, ko bo borto;" 
1Corinthians6:14 ak kiing’eet Jehovah Kiptaiyat, ak tun ing’eetech ak achek eng’ kamuktaennyi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Tos mongen ole borwekwok ko kebeberwekab Kristo? Ara anyun aiste kebeberwekab Kristo, ak ayai koek kebeberwekab chepkugoniot? Achicha, ma u noto." 
1Corinthians6:16 Anan, tos mongen ole inendet ne ituitos gei ak chepkugoniot ko borto agenge? Amu, mwaei inendet kole, Egu tuwai borto agenge." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ago inendet ne ituitos gei ak Kiptaiyat ko tamirmiriet agenge. 
1Corinthians6:18 Omwee ibetab ge. Tengek age tugul ne yaei chi komitei sang’utab borto; ago inendet ne yaei ibetab ge koyachin bortanyi tengekto. 
1Corinthians6:19 Anan, tos mongen ole borwekwok ko hekalut ne bo Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne mitei eng’ okwek, ne otinye eng’ Jehovah? Ama o bo ge okwege;" 
1Corinthians6:20 amu kigialenak kamanutiet: otoror Jehovah anyun eng’ borwekwok. 
1Corinthians7:1 Nguno anyun agobo tuguk che kiosirwa: ko mie eng’ muren ama twa kobogorio. 
1Corinthians7:2 Ago, amu ng’olyotab soksosiek, ko ingotebi chi age tugul ak osotiondennyi, ak ingotebi osotiot age tugul ak manong’otiondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Ingogochi manong’otiot osotiondennyi ko u ye nyoljin: ak ko u noto agine osotiot eng’ manong’otiot. 
1Corinthians7:4 Matinyei osotiot inegei kamugo eng’ bortanyi, ago manong’otiot: ak ko u noto agine manong’otiot, matinyei kamugo eng’ bortanyi, ago osotiot." 
1Corinthians7:5 Amoetege okwege, kobate ye kochamnyechi eng’ betusiek alak, si onyoru boroindo ne bo saet, si otuiyege kogeny, si mayomak Setani amu motinye ribetab ge." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ago amwae ni amu chamjinet, ma ng’atutiet." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ago kata achame koigei bik tugul ane. Ago tinyei chi age tugul konunennyi ne bunu Jehovah, age ko u ni, ak age ko u no." 
1Corinthians7:8 Ago amwachini che tom kotunis ak mosogik, alenjini, Mie eng’ ichek ngo tebi ko u ane." 
1Corinthians7:9 Ago ngo matinyei ribetab ge, ko ingotunis ichek: amu kaigai kotunis kosiir maget ne lalei." 
1Corinthians7:10 Ago ang’ate che kigotungei ago ma ane, ago Kiptaiyat, ale, Amat kobagakta osotiot manong’otiondennyi" 
1Corinthians7:11 (ago ngot kometo, komat kitun, anan kogasyin ak manong’otiondennyi); ak amat kometo manong’otiot osotiondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ago amwachini bik alak, ago ma Kiptaiyat, ale, ngo tinyei ne ketupche age tugul osotiot ne maiyanat, ak kochamei kotebi ak inendet, komat kometo." 
1Corinthians7:13 Ak kobogoriot ne tinyei manong’otiot ne maiyanat, ak kochamei kotebi ak inendet, ko mat kometo manong’otiondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:14 Amu kitilili manong’otiot ne maiyanat eng’ osotiot, ak kitilili osotiot ne maiyanat eng’ manong’otiot: nda ma u noto ta ma tililen lagokwok; ago tililen ichek nguno." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ago ngwo ne maiyanat, ko ingwo: ma ratat ne ketupche mureno anan kwony eng’ ng’alek che u chu: ago kiguurech Jehovah eng’ kalyet." 
1Corinthians7:16 Amu inaitoi ano inye, ee, osotiondoni, ngo tos mesuru manong’otiondeng’ung’? Anan inaitoi ano inye, ee manong’otiondoni, ngo tos mesoru osotiondeng’ung’?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Ago, ko u ye kigopchechi Kiptaiyat chi age tugul, ko u ye kigoguur Jehovah age tugul, ingotebi ko u noto. Ak ang’ate anyun ko u noto eng’ kanisosiek tugul." 
1Corinthians7:18 Tos kigiguur chi age tugul ko kagimuratan? Ko mat koigei ne tom kimuratan. Tos kigiguur chi age tugul kotom kimuratan? Ko mat ko ta kimuratan. 
1Corinthians7:19 Ma kiy kamuratanet, ak ngo ma kimuratan ko ma kiy; ago kerib ng’atutikab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians7:20 Ingoteb chi age tugul ko u ole kiteptoi ye kingeguurei. 
1Corinthians7:21 Tos kigiguurin ko i otwogin? Ko mat iimge: ago ngimuchi itiagage, ko mie iboisie." 
1Corinthians7:22 Amu inendet ne kigiguur eng’ Kiptaiyat, ko otwogin, ko chito ne itiagat ne bo Kiptaiyat: ko u noto, inendet ne kigiguur kotiagat, ko otwogetab Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Kigialak eng’ kamanutiet; amat oegu otwogikab bik. 
1Corinthians7:24 Tupchosiechu, ingoteb chi age tugul ak Jehovah ko u ole kiteptoi ye kingeguurei." 
1Corinthians7:25 Matinye anyun ng’atut eng’ Kiptaiyat agobo bergeinik: ago amwae ko u ole ageertoi, ko u chi ne kigonyor rirenetab Kiptaiyat aek ne kiyani." 
1Corinthians7:26 Abwati anyun ale mie nito, amu bichiindo ne mitei nguno, ale mie koteb chi ko u ole teptoi nguno." 
1Corinthians7:27 Tos, kigeratyin osotiot? Mecheng’ kitiachin. Tos, itiagat eng’ osotiot? Mecheng’ anyun osotiot." 
1Corinthians7:28 Ago, ngot itunisie, ko ma iyai tengek; ak ngitun bergeiyat, ko ma yai inendet tengek. Ago nyoru che u choto nyalilda eng’ borwek: ak amache ale si moiimge." 
1Corinthians7:29 Ago amwae ni, anyun, che kitupche, ale, kagonwagitu betusiek; si kotebi, koboch nguno, che tinyei osotik ko u che matinyei;" 
1Corinthians7:30 ak icheget che rirtos, koigei che marirtos; ak icheget che boiboen, koigei che ma boiboen; ak icheget che alisiei, koigei che matinyei kiy;" 
1Corinthians7:31 ak icheget che boisie ng’ony, koigei che maboisie mising’: amu siirtoi itondab ng’onyuni." 
1Corinthians7:32 Amu amache ale otiagage eng’ kaiimutik. Inendet ne ma itunis kochirjirenjin tuguk che bo Kiptaiyat, ole imuchi kobaibaita Kiptaiyat:" 
1Corinthians7:33 ago inendet ne kigotunis kochirjirenjin tuguk che bo ng’ony, ole imuchi kobaibaita osotiondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:34 Ak mi terjinet agine eng’ osotiot ak bergeiyat. Inendet ne ma kitun kochirjirenjin tugukab Kiptaiyat, si koek ne tilil eng’ borto ak eng’ tamirmiriet: ago inendet ne kigitun kochirjirenjin tugukab ng’ony, ole imuchi kobaibaita manong’otiondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Amwae nito anyun agobo keluneng’wong’; ma si atoorjok mestet, ago agobo noto ne nyolu, si kobiit ochuuljige Kiptaiyat ko motinye kiy ne iimok." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ago ngobwati chi age tugul kole mayachin bergeiyandennyi ne nyolu, ak ngo kagosiirto kororonindab ming’inatennyi, ak ngo mi kiy ne nyoljin, koyai ko u ye machei; ma yai tengek; ingotungei." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ago inendet ne lumdaatgei eng’ muguleldanyi, ko matinyei birjino, ago imuchi koboi magutikyik, ak kagotil ko u nito eng’ muguleldanyi, korib bergeiyandennyi, ko kayai ne mie." 
1Corinthians7:38 Noto anyun, inendet ne igoitoi bergeiyandennyi kitun koyaei ne mie; ak inendet ne ma igoito kitun koyaei ne mie kosiir." 
1Corinthians7:39 Ratat osotiot kota kosobei manong’otiondennyi: ago ngo me manong’otiot, kotiagat inendet kotun chito ne kacham mosoganato: eng’ Kiptaiyat kityo." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ago baibai kosiir ngo teb ko u ye konye, ko u ye abwati: ak alen atinye agane Tamirmirietab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians8:1 Nguno anyun agobo tuguk che kieng’jin kanamonik: kingen kele kitinye achek tugul naet. Menei naet, ago teeksei chamnyet." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ngo len chi age tugul ingen kiy age tugul, ko tomo konai ko u ye kanyol konai;" 
1Corinthians8:3 ago ngo chamei chi age tugul Jehovah, ko naat chichoto eng’ inendet." 
1Corinthians8:4 Noto anyun eng’ amet ne bo tuguk che kieng’jin kanamonik, kingen kele mami kanamwet ne kiy eng’ ng’ony, ama mi Jehovah age kobate agenge." 
1Corinthians8:5 Amu agot nganda mitei che keguure cheptalelisiek, ngo eng’ kipsengwet, anan eng’ ng’ony; ko u ye mitei cheptalelisiek che chang’, ak kiptainik che chang’;" 
1Corinthians8:6 ago eng’ achek komitei Jehovah agenge, inendet Kwanda, ne bunu tuguk tugul ak achek eng’ inendet; ak Kiptaiyat agenge, Jesu Kristo, ne mi tuguk tugul amu inendet, ak achek eng’ inendet." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ago mami naonato eng’ bik tugul: ago ko u ye kigonerta alak kanamonik agoi nguno, koamei ko u kit ne kagieng’ji kanamwet; ak muruonitu kabwatenywa ne nyalulat." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ago amitwogik ko ma kit ne imutech kerikyi Jehovah: anan ngo magiamisie, ko mararuech kiy; anan, ngeamisie, ko matesak kiy." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ago oripge si maek kanagutiet kimnatoning’wong’ eng’ che nyalulyotin. 
1Corinthians8:10 Amu ngo keerin chi inye ne itinye naet, iamisiei eng’ hekalut ne bo kanamwet, ko tos manyiganitu kabwatennyi, ngot ko nyalulat, kot koam tuguk che kieng’jin kanamonik?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ak lusei inendet ne nyalulat amu naeng’ung’, inendet tupchet ne kimechi Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ak u noto anyun, ye koyachini tengek tupchosiek, ak oguoteni kabwatenywa ne nyalulat, ko koyachi tengek Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Noto anyun, ngot konachi amitwogik ne kitupche, ko ma aame banyek agoi, si manach ne kitupche." 
1Corinthians9:1 Tos ma atiagat? Ma a ne kiyoktoi? Tos kima ageer Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo? Tos ma o boisiennyu okwek eng’ Kiptaiyat? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ak ngot ko ma a ne kiyoktoi eng’ alak, ko a ne kiyoktoi eng’ okwek: amu ng’oksetab kayoktoinatennyu ko okwek eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians9:3 Nito anyun ne asorunege eng’ icheget che kina. 
1Corinthians9:4 Tos magitinye kimnatet keam ak kee? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tos magitinye kimnatet kimutate osotiot ne iyanat, ko u alak che kiyoktoi, ak tupchosiek che bo Kiptaiyat, ak Kepa?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Anan anege kityo ak Barnaba, che magitinye kimnatet kebagakte boisiet?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Tos ng’o askarindet ne boisie tugukyik? Ng’o ne minei logoek, ne maamei logoekyik? Anan ng’o ne iyagi akwet, ama luei chego che bo akwet?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Tos amwae tuguchu ko u biteetab bik? Anan mamwaei agine Ng’atutiet choto? 
1Corinthians9:9 Amu kigisir eng’ Ng’atutietab Musa kele, Amerat kutitab eito ye tiechei bek koborie. Tos ibwati Jehovah mising’ agobo eik," 
1Corinthians9:10 anan mwaei kityo amu achek? Ee, kigisir amu achek: amu inendet ne ibatisiei, ko nyolu kobatis eng’ kamang’unet, ak inendet ne borei koborei komang’u kole sige kiy." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ngo kigigoljok tugukab tamirmiriet, ko tos kiy ne o ngeges tugukwok che bo borto?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ngot kotinyei bik alak yamdaet eng’ kamugonito koboiywok, ko tos ma ki siirtoot? Ago ma kiboisie achek kamugonito; ago kimuitoi eng’ tuguk tugul, si ma kigirinde logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Tos mongen ole icheget che boisiei agobo tuguk che tililen koamei tuguk che bo hekalut, ak icheget che ribei kaptisisiet kotinyei kebebertanywa koboto kaptisisiet?" 
1Corinthians9:14 King’at ko u noto Kiptaiyat kole icheget che amdooti logoiywek che miach kosoptos eng’ logoiywek che miach. 
1Corinthians9:15 Ago tom aboisie tuguchoto agot agenge: amasire tuguchu ale keyaiywa ko u noto: amu kata kaigai ame kosiir kowal chi torornatennyu koek buch. 
1Corinthians9:16 Amu ngaamde logoiywek che miach, ko matinye kiy ne alosunege; amu kanyol ayai ko u noto; bwa eng’ ane ngot ko maamde logoiywek che miach." 
1Corinthians9:17 Amu ye ayai ni eng’ magennyu anege, atinye melekto: ago ngo ma bo magennyu anege, atinye ripset ne kigiyanwa." 
1Corinthians9:18 Nee anyun melektanyu? Noto ko ni, ye aamdoi logoiywek che miach, ayae logoiywechoto miach koek ne maboto melekto, si maboisie kamugennyu mising’ eng’ logoiywek che miach." 
1Corinthians9:19 Agot ngo kiatiagat eng’ bik tugul, ko kiayaige aek ne ratat agobo tugul, si kobiit anyor che siirtoot." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ak eng’ Yahudik, ko kiaige Yahudiot, si kobiit anyor Yahudik; eng’ icheget che mi eng’ Ng’atutiet, ko kiaige agane ne mi eng’ Ng’atutiet, ama kele ami anendet eng’ Ng’atutiet, ago si kobiit anyor icheget che mi eng’ Ng’atutiet;" 
1Corinthians9:21 eng’ icheget che mami eng’ Ng’atutik, ko kiaige agane chi ne mami Ng’atutik, ma kele mami eng’ Ng’atutik eng’ Jehovah, ago ami eng’ Ng’atutik eng’ Kristo, si anyor ichek che mami eng’ Ng’atutik." 
1Corinthians9:22 Eng’ che nyalulyotin kiaegu ane ne nyalulat, si tamangab anyoru che nyalulyotin: kiaegu tuguk tugul eng’ bik tugul, tamangab amuch asor alak eng’ oret age tugul." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ak ayae tuguk tugul amu logoiywek che miach, si kobiit anyor yamdaet eng’ choto." 
1Corinthians9:24 Mongen ole icheget che ibelegei eng’ labatet koruaei tugul, ago agenge ne nyoru konunet? Oruai anyun, si onyoru." 
1Corinthians9:25 Ak chi age tugul ne igiilegei eng’ ureriosiek, koribegei eng’ tuguk tugul. Yaei anyun ichek noto si konyor kutwet ne ng’emaksei; ago achek ko ne ma ng’emaksei." 
1Corinthians9:26 Alabati anyun ko u noto, ma ko u ne tinyei saget, ayae anyun kabeletab ge ko u noto, ma ko u chi ne birei ola buch:" 
1Corinthians9:27 ago abire bortanyu, ak abou inendet: si ma ye kaamji bik alak, kotun keesia." 
1Corinthians10:1 Mamache anyun, che kitupche, ale oegu che mongen, ole kimitei kwanisiekyok tugul ng’onyutab boldet, ak kibun tugul nyanjet:" 
1Corinthians10:2 ak kigibatisanji tugul Musa eng’ boldet ak eng’ nyanjet; 
1Corinthians10:3 ak kiam tugul amdit agenge ne bo tamirmiriet; 
1Corinthians10:4 ak kiee tugul eet agenge ne bo tamirmiriet: amu kiee tugul eng’ ruandet ne bo tamirmiriet ne kiisubi ichek: ak ruandanoto ko ki Kristo. 
1Corinthians10:5 Ago kima baibaitune mising’ Jehovah che chang’ eng’ ichek: amu kigiserta eng’ ong’atet. 
1Corinthians10:6 Kiek tuguchu anyun kaborunoikyok, si magimakyige tuguk che yaachen, ko u ye kimakyigei ichek mising’." 
1Corinthians10:7 Amoegu che saei kanamonik, ko u alak eng’ ichek; ko u ye kigisir kele, Kiteb ng’ony bik koamis ak koee, ak kong’eetyo kourerenso." 
1Corinthians10:8 Amongesokse, ko u ye kiyai alak eng’ ichek, ak kiibutyo eng’ betut agenge elfusiek tiptemu ak somok." 
1Corinthians10:9 Anan ketiem Kiptaiyat, ko u ye kitiem alak eng’ ichek, ak kibar erenok." 
1Corinthians10:10 Amat ong’unyng’ung’se, ko u ye kiing’unyng’ung’so alak eng’ ichek, ak kibek eng’ ng’emindet." 
1Corinthians10:11 Kiyaak anyun tuguchuto eng’ ichek si koek kaborunet; ak kigisir agobo kateunennyo, achek che kagonyonjech kagesunetab kenyisiek." 
1Corinthians10:12 Noto anyun ingoripgei si maibut, inendet ne ibwati kole tononi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Kima namak yomset kobate noto ne imuchi komuitae chi tugul: ago bo iman Jehovah ne machamdook keyomak kosiir ne te ne omuchi; ago koboto yomsonoto koyaei agine oret ne ochilile, si kobiit omuch omuite." 
1Corinthians10:14 Noto anyun, chamanikyuk, omwee biteetab kanamonik." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ang’alali ko u ye ang’alaljini bik che ng’omen; obesie kit ne amwae. 
1Corinthians10:16 Kikombet ne bo kaberuret ne kiberuri, ko tos ma yamdaet ne bo korotikab Kristo? Makatiat ne kibutuli, ko tos ma yamdaet ne bo bortab Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Amu achek che ki bik che chang’, ko ki makatiat agenge, borto agenge: amu kiame achek tugul makatiat agenge." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ogeer Israel-o eng’ atebetab borto: tos matinyei yamdaet ak kaptisisiet ichek che amei tiseiywek? 
1Corinthians10:19 Amwae nee anyun? Amwa ale kiy kit ne kieng’jin kanamonik, anan tos kiy kanamwet?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Ago tuguk che igoitoi Bororiosiek koeng’jin oik, ago ma Jehovah: amamache koyai yamdaet ak oik." 
1Corinthians10:21 Momuchi oee kikombetab Kiptaiyat, ak kikombetab oik: momuchi oam eng’ mesetab Kiptaiyat, ak mesetab oik." 
1Corinthians10:22 Anan kitache Kiptaiyat konyor ng’etkong’? Tos ki kimen kosiir inendet? 
1Corinthians10:23 Chamdaat tuguk tugul; ago ma tuguk tugul che nyolu. Chamdaat tuguk tugul; ago ma tuguk tugul che teeksei. 
1Corinthians10:24 Amat kocheng’jigei chi chechik inegei, ago che bo chitab kokwennyi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Kiy age tugul ne kialdoi eng’ kabany, oam, amoteeb kiy amu kabwatet;" 
1Corinthians10:26 amu bo Kiptaiyat ng’ony, ak che nyiitat ng’ony." 
1Corinthians10:27 Ngo kuurok age eng’ ichek che maiyani kole kobaak, ak omache obe; ko kiy age tugul anyun ne kaginde taing’wong’, oam, amat oteeb amu kabwatet:" 
1Corinthians10:28 ago ngo lenjok chi age tugul, Kagigoitoi kii koek tiseiywot, ko moam, amu inendet ne kagoborun, ak amu kabwatet:" 
1Corinthians10:29 kabwatet ne amwae ko ma neng’ung’, ago bo age; amu kalya si koruokyi katiagennyu kabwatet age?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ngot ataache eng’ kongoi, ko amu nee si kemwaitaena yaitio eng’ kit ne koagoite kongoi?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Noto anyun ngoame, anan ngoee, anan agot eng’ kiy age tugul ne oyae, oyai tugul otorori Jehovah." 
1Corinthians10:32 Amonach Yahudik anan Yunanik, anan kanisetab Jehovah:" 
1Corinthians10:33 agot ko u ye aboiboi bik tugul eng’ tuguk tugul, macheng’e kelunennyu anege, ago kelunet ne bo che chang’, si kobiit kesor." 
1Corinthians11:1 Oegu kasubikyuk, ko u ye a kasubindetab Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Aloswok anyun nguno amu obwata eng’ tuguk tugul, ak oribe konetisiosiek ko u ye kiaroruok." 
1Corinthians11:3 Ago amache onai, ole metitab muren age tugul ko Kristo; ak metitab kobogoriot ko muren; ak metitab Kristo ko Jehovah." 
1Corinthians11:4 Muren age tugul ne saei anan koamdoi logoiywek ko kerat metit, ko kagotewer metinnyi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ago kobogoriot age tugul ne saei anan koamdoi logoiywek ko yatat metit, ko kagotewer metinnyi: amu kagergeit ak chi ne inemunot met." 
1Corinthians11:6 Amu ngo ma tugot metitab kobogoriot, ko ingetilji agine sumeek: ago ngo kalilano eng’ kobogoriot ketilji sumeek anan kinem, ko ingotuch metinnyi." 
1Corinthians11:7 Manyoljin iman muren koger metit, amu inendet ko kergeindo ak torornatetab Jehovah: ago kobogoriot ko torornatetab muren." 
1Corinthians11:8 Amu kima bun mureno kobogorio; ago kibunu kobogoriot muren: 
1Corinthians11:9 ak kogeny, kima kitoi keyai muren agobo kobogorio; ago kigiyai kobogorio agobo muren:" 
1Corinthians11:10 amu nito anyun konyoljin kobogorio kotinyei kaborunet ne bo bounatet eng’ metinnyi, amu malaikaisiek." 
1Corinthians11:11 Ago mami kobogoriondo ngo mami mureno, ak mami mureno ngo mami kobogoriot, eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians11:12 Amu ko u ye kibunu kobogoriot muren, ko u noto agine mureno kisichei kobogoriot; ago bunu tuguk tugul Jehovah." 
1Corinthians11:13 Oruoch okwege: tos nyolu eng’ kobogoriot kosa Jehovah ko ma tugot metit? 
1Corinthians11:14 Tos mainetok agine biteetab borto, kole, ngo tinyei mureno sumeek che koen, ko kalilanet eng’ inendet?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Ago ngo tinyei kobogoriot sumeek che koen, ko torornatet eng’ inendet: amu kigigochi sumeekyik kotugegei." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ago ngo machei chi tiiyet, ko ma kitinye biteet ne u noto, anan eng’ kanisosiekab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians11:17 Ago, ye ang’atok eng’ ng’olyondoni, ko maloswok amu oyumige ko ma agobo che miach ago agobo che yaach." 
1Corinthians11:18 Amu ne bo tai eng’ tugul, ye oyumige eng’ kaniset, agase kele mitei kabesiosiek eng’ kwenung’wong’; ak ayani kitigin ale u noto." 
1Corinthians11:19 Amu mi ne matiny kabesiosiek eng’ kwenung’wong’, si kobiit kotook ichek che bo iman eng’ kwenung’wong’." 
1Corinthians11:20 Ye oyumige anyun ko maimugaksei keam igortab Kiptaiyat: 
1Corinthians11:21 amu eng’ amisieng’wong’ kosib konemu age amitwogikyik kotomo age; ak amei age rubet, kobogiti age." 
1Corinthians11:22 Nee? Motinye gorik che oamisie ak oeeise? Anan osase kanisetab Jehovah, ak ogochini kalilanet icheget che matinyei? Amwawok nee anyun? Tos aloswok eng’ ng’olyondoni? Maloswok." 
1Corinthians11:23 Amu kiataach eng’ Kiptaiyat noto kiagonok agane, ko u ye kinam makatiat Kiptaiyat Jesu eng’ kemounoto kiging’wektoe inendet;" 
1Corinthians11:24 ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kotonaton, ak kole, Nito ko bortanyu, ne neng’wong’: oyae ni obwatena." 
1Corinthians11:25 Ko u noto agine kikombet, kingo kagoamis, kole, Kikombani ko arorutiet ne leel eng’ korotikyuk: oyae nito kotugul ye oee obwatena." 
1Corinthians11:26 Amu kotugul ye oame makatiandani, ak oee kikombet, obortoi meetab Kiptaiyat agoi koit." 
1Corinthians11:27 Noto anyun chi age tugul ne amei makatiat, anan ne eei kikombet ne bo Kiptaiyat ama nyoljin, koipchingei kiruoget ne bo borto ak korotikab Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians11:28 Ago ingosiagei chi, si koamei makatiat, ak koeei kikombet." 
1Corinthians11:29 Amu inendet ne amei ak koeei, koamei ak koeei kiruoget ngo ma ibesio borto." 
1Corinthians11:30 Amu nito anyun nyaluldos che chang’ eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak komiandos, ak koruitos che chang’." 
1Corinthians11:31 Amu ngot kitigonige, ko matun kiruokwech." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ago ye kiruokwech, kotigonech Kiptaiyat, si matun kigikyech koboto ng’ony." 
1Corinthians11:33 Noto anyun, tupchosiekyuk, ye oyumge oamisie, oganyge." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ngo amei chi age tugul rubet, koamis eng’ ga; si mabunji kayumeng’wong’ bo ge kiruoget. Ak ng’alek che kang’et ko ye kaitu, anyo achob." 
1Corinthians12:1 Nguno anyun agobo konunoik che bo tamirmiriet, che kitupche, ko mamache oegu che mongen." 
1Corinthians12:2 Ongen ole kingota ko o Bororiosiek, ko kigiretok obe oldab kanamonichoto che matwegu, ko u ye kigindoiywok." 
1Corinthians12:3 Noto anyun agonok oguiye ole, mami chi ne ng’alali eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah ne mwaei kole, Jesu ko chubot; ama mi chi ne imuchi komwa kole, Jesu ko Kiptaiyat, kobate eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
1Corinthians12:4 Nguno anyun, komitei konunoik che besiotin, ago agenge Tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians12:5 Ak mitei ripsosiek che besiotin, ago agenge Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians12:6 Ak mitei boisionik che besiotin, ago agenge Jehovah, ne yaei tuguk tugul eng’ tugul." 
1Corinthians12:7 Ago kigochin chi tugul kaborunetab Tamirmiriet si kobiit kotoretegei. 
1Corinthians12:8 Amu kigochin chito age ng’olyotab ng’omnatet eng’ Tamirmiriet; ak kigochin age ng’olyotab naet, eng’ Tamirmirionoto:" 
1Corinthians12:9 kigochin age kayanet, eng’ Tamirmirionoto; ak kigochin age konunoikab kasoobet, eng’ Tamirmirionoto agenge;" 
1Corinthians12:10 ak kigochin age boisionikab kamuget; ak age maoinatet; ak age kabesietab tamirmirik: ak age kutuswek che terotin; ak age weeksetab kutuswek: 
1Corinthians12:11 ago boisie chuto tugul Tamirmiriet ne noto agenge, kopchechin age tugul ko u ye makyin." 
1Corinthians12:12 Amu ko u ye agenge borto, ak kotinyei kebeberwek che chang’, ak kebeberwek tugul che bo borto, agot ngo chang’, ko borto agenge; ko u noto agine Kristo." 
1Corinthians12:13 Amu eng’ Tamirmiriet agenge ko kigibatisanech achek tugul keegu borto agenge, ngo Yahudik anan Yunanik, ngo ratotin, anan kotiagotin, ak kigigonech achek tugul kee eng’ Tamirmiriet agenge." 
1Corinthians12:14 Amu borto, ko ma kebeberta agenge, ago chang’." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ngot komwa keldo kole, Amu ma a eut, ko ma bo borto; tos ma bo borto amu noto?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Ak ngot komwa itit kole, Amu ma a konda, ko ma bo anyun borto; ko tos ma bo borto amu noto?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Nda borto komugul ko konda, ko ta mi ano kastaet? Nda borto komugul ko itit, ko tos mi ano kang’utoet?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ago nguno ko kigonde Jehovah kebeberwek, age tugul eng’ ichek, eng’ borto, ko u ye kicham inendet." 
1Corinthians12:19 Ak nda tugul ko kebeberta agenge, ta mi ano borto?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Ago nguno ko kebeberwek ichek che chang’, ago agenge borto." 
1Corinthians12:21 Amaimuchi konda kolenji eut, Mamagenen kiy: anan kogeny, maimuchi metit kolenji kelyek, Mamagenok kiy." 
1Corinthians12:22 Ago ne siirei mising’ ko, kebeberwechoto bo borto che u kele nyalulyotin, ko choto che nyolu:" 
1Corinthians12:23 ak kebeberwechoto bo borto, che kiiti kele matia teegistanywa, ko choto che kilaakyin teegisto ne o kosiir; ak kebeberwekyok che matinyei kororonindo ko choto che tinyei kororonindo ne o kosiir;" 
1Corinthians12:24 amu kebeberwekyok che tinyei kororonindo, ko mamachei kiy: ago kiituiyo Jehovah borto, kogochin teegisto ne o kosiir kebeberta kirarji;" 
1Corinthians12:25 si mabiit kabesiet eng’ borto; ago si koripgei eng’ ripset agenge, kebeberwechoto, korib age age." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ak ngo nyalili kebeberta agenge, konyalildos kebeberwek tugul koboto noto; anan ngegonyiti kebeberta agenge, koboiboitu kebeberwek tugul koboto noto." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nguno anyun, okwek ko o bortab Kristo, ak o kebeberwekab boroto, age tugul eng’ okwek." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ak kigonde Jehovah alak eng’ kaniset, che bo tai ko che kiyoktoi, che bo aeng’ ko maotik, che bo somok ko konetik, yeityo ko kwong’utik, yeityo ko konunoikab kasoobet, toretosiek, kandoinatosiek, ak kutuswek che terotin." 
1Corinthians12:29 Tos tugul ko che kiyoktoi? Tos tugul ko maotik? Tos tugul ko konetik? Tos tugul ko yaikab kwong’utik? 
1Corinthians12:30 Tos tinyei tugul konunoikab kasoobet? Tos ng’alali tugul kutuswek che terotin? Tos iweechi tugul kutuswek? 
1Corinthians12:31 Ago ocheng’ mising’ konunoik che eechen. Ak aboruok oret ne mie mising’ ne siirei tugul. 
1Corinthians13:1 Agot ndang’alale kutuswekab bik ak che bo malaikaisiek, amatinye chamnyet, ko kaegu sugunwet ne cheei, anan sanitab sugunwet ne bolei." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ak ngot atinye konunetab maoinatet, ak angen ung’otik tugul ak naet tugul, ak ngatinye kayanet tugul, kot amuch autoe tulonok, ago matinye chamnyet, ko a buch." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ak ngot agoite tugukyuk tugul abae kibananok, ak ndagoite bortanyu kebeel, ago matinye chamnyet, ko magelwa kiy." 
1Corinthians13:4 Muitoi chamnyet, ak ko tala; ama tinyei chamnyet ng’etkong’, malosegei chamnyet, ama menei," 
1Corinthians13:5 ama yaei ne ma nyolu, ama cheng’jingei chechik inegei, ama iiti tagisiet, ama iiti yaitio;" 
1Corinthians13:6 mabaibai eng’ ne ma bo imanda, ago baibai eng’ imanit;" 
1Corinthians13:7 sisei eng’ tuguk tugul, iyani tuguk tugul, imang’u tuguk tugul, muitoi eng’ tuguk tugul." 
1Corinthians13:8 Mararu chamnyet agoi: ago ngo mitei maoinatosiek, kotun igesugei; ngo mi kutuswek che terotin, kotun sistos; ngo mi naet, kotun igesugei." 
1Corinthians13:9 Amu kingen eng’ kebeberta, ak keamdoi eng’ kebeberta:" 
1Corinthians13:10 ago ye tun nyo ne igesunotgei, kogesgei anyun kebeberta." 
1Corinthians13:11 Ye kingo a lakwa, ko kiang’alali ko u lakwa, kiaguitosi ko u lakwa, kiabwati ko u lakwa: nguno, ko kaaegu chito ne o, ko kaamete tugukab lakwandit." 
1Corinthians13:12 Amu nguno kegeere eng’ kioit, eng’ tamirmiron; ago tun ko togoch eng’ togoch: nguno angen eng’ kebeberta; ago tun anae ko u ye kigenaa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ago tebyei nguno kayanet, kamang’unet, chamnyet, chuto somok; ago ne o eng’ chuto ko chamnyet." 
1Corinthians14:1 Osub chamnyet; ak ocheng’ mising’ konunoik che bo tamirmiriet, ago ne siirei ko oamde logoiywek." 
1Corinthians14:2 Amu inendet ne ng’alali eng’ kutit ne magigasei ko mang’alaljin bik, ago Jehovah; amu magasei chi; ago mwaei ung’otik eng’ tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ago inendet ne amdoi kong’alaljin bik ng’alekab teekset, ak kagimitet, ak kagaigaet." 
1Corinthians14:4 Inendet ne ng’alali eng’ kutit koteechegei inegei; ago inendet ne amdoi koteechei kaniset. 
1Corinthians14:5 Amakwok anyun okwek tugul ong’alal eng’ kutuswek, ago ne siirei ko oamde: ak o inendet ne amdoi kosiir inendet ne ng’alali eng’ kutuswek, kobate koweech, si kobiit koteegak kaniset." 
1Corinthians14:6 Ago nguno anyun, che kitupche, ngot anyonjok ang’alale kutuswek, atoretenok nee, ngot ko mang’alalwok eng’ ng’ang’et, anan eng’ naet, anan eng’ amdaet, anan ko eng’ konetisiet?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Agot tuguk che masoptos, che cheitos, anan ndurerut anan ketubet, ngo ma ibesio cheosiekwak, kenaitoi ano ne kiguutei anan ne kibutei?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Amu ngo chei iriaget cheet ne magiguitos, ko ng’o ne chobegei agobo luget?" 
1Corinthians14:9 O u noto ak okwek, ngot ko motwegu eng’ ng’alek che nyamnyum kegas, kenaitoi ano kit ne kagemwa? Amu ong’alaljini ola buch." 
1Corinthians14:10 U kele, mitei kutuswek che chang’ che terotin eng’ ng’ony, ama mi ne matinyei kit ne iboru." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ngot ko mangen anyun kit ne mwaei tuguchoto, aegu bunotyot eng’ inendet ne ng’alali, ak inendet ne ng’alali, koegu bunotyot eng’ ane." 
1Corinthians14:12 O u noto ak okwek, ko u ye omache mising’ koniunoikab tamirmiriet, ocheng’ eng’ kagiiletab ge tuguk che igochin kaniset koteegak." 
1Corinthians14:13 Noto anyun, inendet ne ng’alali eng’ kutit, ingosa si koweech ng’alek." 
1Corinthians14:14 Amu ngasa eng’ kutit ne magigasei, kosaei tamirmiriennyu, ago matinyei logoek ng’omnatennyu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Nee anyun? Asae eng’ tamirmiriet, ak asae eng’ ng’omnatet agine; atieni eng’ tamirmiriet, ak atieni eng’ ng’omnatet agine." 
1Corinthians14:16 Amu ngo ma u noto, ko ngiberuri eng’ tamirmiriet, komwaitoi ano Amen ye igoitoi kongoi, inendet ne tebe ole mi che ma inetgei amu manaei kit ne kimwae?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Amu iman, igoitoi inye kongoi komie, ago manyor nin age kit ne imuchi koteech inendet." 
1Corinthians14:18 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi, ale ang’alale kutuswek kosiirok okwek tugul:" 
1Corinthians14:19 ago achame amwa ng’alek mut eng’ ng’omnatennyu eng’ kanisa, si anet bik alak agichek, kosiir amwa ng’alek elfusiek taman eng’ kutit ne magigasei." 
1Corinthians14:20 Che kitupche, amoegu lagok eng’ ng’omnatet: ago oegu lagok che nyerotin eng’ yaitio, ago oegu che kaoeegitu eng’ ng’omnatet." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kigisir eng’ Ng’atutiet kele, Ang’alaljini bichu eng’ bik che bo kutuswek alak, ak eng’ kutuswekab toek; ak agot ngo u noto ko magasa, mwaei Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians14:22 Noto anyun kutuswek ko bo kaborunet, ma eng’ ichek che iyanotin, ago eng’ icheget che maiyanotin: ago amdaet ko bo kaborunet, ma eng’ che maiyanotin, ago eng’ ichek che iyani." 
1Corinthians14:23 Noto anyun ngoyumgei kaniset komugul, ak kong’alal tugul eng’ kutuswek che magigasei, ak ngo bwa go bik che ma inetgei, anan ko che maiyanotin, ko tos mamwaei kole o kibion?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ago ngo amda tugul, ak konyo go chi agenge ne maiyanat, anan ko ne ma inetgei, koger kong’ tugul inendet, ak koruokyin tugul inendet:" 
1Corinthians14:25 ak king’anyei ung’otikab muguleldanyi; ak kobutyi ng’ony anyun kong’uruk kolos Jehovah, komwaei kolen mi Jehovah kwenung’wong’ iman." 
1Corinthians14:26 Nee anyun, che kitupche? Ye oyumge, kotinyei age tugul tiendab kalosunet, ak konetisiet, ak ng’ang’utiet, ak kutit ne magigasei, ak kaweegetab ng’alek. Ingoyaogis tuguk tugul koteegogis." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ngo ng’alal chi age tugul eng’ kutit ne magigasei, kong’alal aeng’u, anan ko che masiirei somok, ak ingorupgei; ak ingoweech chito age:" 
1Corinthians14:28 ago ngo mami weegindetab ng’alek, ko ingosis eng’ kanisa; ak ingong’alaljigei inegei ak Jehovah." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ak ingong’alalso maotik aeng’u anan ko somok; ingoguiyo alage. 
1Corinthians14:30 Ago ngeng’ang’ji ng’olyo age ne tebyei eng’ yoto, ko ingosis ni ka bo tai." 
1Corinthians14:31 Amu omuchi okwek tugul oamde agenge agenge, si kobiit konetgei tugul, ak konyor kagaigaet tugul;" 
1Corinthians14:32 ak kase it tamirmirikab maotik maotik; 
1Corinthians14:33 amu Jehovah ko ma Jehovah ne bo bolatet, ago bo kalyet. Ko u eng’ kanisosiek tugul che bo che tililen," 
1Corinthians14:34 ingosisyo kobogorisiek eng’ kanisosiek: amu magichamjin icheget kong’alal; ago ingogas it, ko u ye mwaei ng’atutik." 
1Corinthians14:35 Ak ngo machei ichek konetgei kiy, ko ingoteebe manong’otaikwak eng’ ga: amu kalilano ngo ng’alal kobogoriondo eng’ kaniset." 
1Corinthians14:36 Nee anyun? Tos okwek che kimong’unenok ng’olyotab Jehovah? Anan kibwanjok okwege? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ngobwati chi age tugul kole maotiot, anan ko chi ne mi eng’ atebetab tamirmiriet, ko ingonai tuguk che asirwok, kole choto ko ng’atutietab Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ago ngo maingen chi age tugul kiy, ko ingoek kimanaiyat." 
1Corinthians14:39 Noto anyun, che kitupche, ocheng’ mising’ oamde, amat oet keng’alal eng’ kutuswek che magigasei." 
1Corinthians14:40 Ago ingoyaogis tuguk tugul ko u ye nyolu ak eng’ chobet ne mie. 
1Corinthians15:1 Aboruok anyun, che kitupche, nguno, logoiywek che miach che kiaamwok, choto kiotaach, choto agichek che otonone," 
1Corinthians15:2 kisorunenok choto agichek; eng’ ng’alek che kiaamwok, ngot onam komie, ngot ko kima oyan buch." 
1Corinthians15:3 Amu kiagonok eng’ tai noto kiataach agane, ale kime Kristo agobo tengekwogikyok, ko u ye mwaei sirutik," 
1Corinthians15:4 ak kigitub; ak kiging’eet eng’ betutab somok ko u ye mwaei sirutik; 
1Corinthians15:5 ak kimong’ji Kepa; ye ibata, komong’ji taman ak aeng’;" 
1Corinthians15:6 yeityo komong’ji tupchosiek che siirei bogol mut komi tugul, che ta komi agoi kora che chang’ eng’ ichek, ago kigoruiyo alak;" 
1Corinthians15:7 yeityo komong’ji Jakobo; ye ibata, komong’ji che kiyoktoi tugul;" 
1Corinthians15:8 ak let eng’ tugul, komong’ja agane, ko u ne kigios." 
1Corinthians15:9 Amu a ne ming’in eng’ che kiyoktoi, ne ma nyolu keguurena ne kiyoktoi, amu kiaus kanisetab Jehovah." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ago eng’ mieindab Jehovah a u kit ne a u: ak mieindanyi ne kigigona ko maek buch; ago kiaboisie mising’ asiir ichek tugul: ago ma ane, ago mieindab Jehovah ne kimi kobota." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngo ane anyun, anan ngo ichek, keamdoi ui tugul, ak u noto kioyan ak okwek." 
1Corinthians15:12 Ara anyun, ngeamdoi Kristo kele kiging’eet komong’ eng’ che kibek, ko teptoi ano si komwaei alak eng’ kwenung’wong’ kole mami ng’eetyet ne bo che begu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Ago ngot ko mami ng’eetyet ne bo che begu, ko kaga ma king’eet Kristo agine:" 
1Corinthians15:14 ak ngo kima king’eet Kristo, ko buch anyun amdaennyo, ko buch kagine kayaneng’wong’." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ee, ak kagenyoruech kele ki baorinik che bo lembech che bo Jehovah; amu kigebaorian agobo Jehovah kele kiing’eet Kristo: ne kaga ma ing’eet Jehovah, ngot ko maging’eeti che begu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Amu ngot ko maging’eeti che begu, ko kima king’eet Kristo agine:" 
1Corinthians15:17 ak ngo kima king’eet Kristo, ko buch kayaneng’wong’; ko ta omi eng’ tengekwogikwok." 
1Corinthians15:18 Noto anyun, icheget che kigoruiyo eng’ Kristo ko kigolusyo." 
1Corinthians15:19 Ngot ko kogimang’u Kristo eng’ soboni kityo, ko kaga ki bik che tinyei rirek kosiir tugul." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ago kiging’eet anyun Kristo komong’ eng’ che kibek, tongoaniat ne bo icheget che ruitos." 
1Corinthians15:21 Amu ko u ye kibunu meet chi, ko kibunu chi agine ng’eetyet ne bo che begu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Amu ko u ye begu tugul eng’ Adam, ko u noto tun kisoobi tugul eng’ Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ago chi tugul eng’ komostanyi: Kristo ko tongoaniat; ye ibata ko ichek che bo Kristo, eng’ nyonunennyi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Ye ibata koit anyun let, ye tun igoito inendet bounatet kogochi Jehovah, inendet Kwanda; ye tun kagowong’ bounatet tugul ak kimnatet tugul ak kamuktaet." 
1Corinthians15:25 Amu kanyol kolaitoran inendet matiny, agoi konde bunikyik tugul keldebesaikab kelyekyik." 
1Corinthians15:26 Bunyot ne bo let ne tun king’emei ko meet. 
1Corinthians15:27 Amu, kigonde tuguk tugul keldebesaikab kelyekyik kogas it inendet. Ago ye mwaei kole kindoi tuguk tugul kogas it inendet, kotoogu kele maboto inendet ne kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ak ye tun kaginde tuguk tugul kogas it inendet, eng’ betunoto anyun kinde Werit agine kogas it inendet, si koek Jehovah tugul eng’ tugul." 
1Corinthians15:29 Anan yaei nee anyun che kigibatisanji che kigobek? Ngot ko kaga maging’eeti iman che begu, ko kalya anyun si kibatisan choto agobo ichek?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ko amu nee anyun si kemi ng’oiyondit sait age tugul? 
1Corinthians15:31 Abaoriani eng’ kalosunonoto mi eng’ okwek, che kitupche, ne atinye eng’ Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo ale, amee betut age tugul." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ngo kigibarge ak tiong’ik eng’ Epeso ko u biteetab bik, atinye borot nee anyun? Ngo kaga maging’eeti che begu, ongeamisie ak kee, amu kibegu mutai." 
1Corinthians15:33 Among’ kiberberak: Ng’emei choronok che yaach atepto ne mie. 
1Corinthians15:34 Ogosu eng’ imanda, amat oyai tengek; amu maingen alak Jehovah: amwae ni si agonok olilan." 
1Corinthians15:35 Ago mwaei chi age, kolen, King’eetitoi ano che kigobek? Ak bwanei eng’ borto ne u nee?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Inye ne i berber, noto ne igole inyendet, ko masobei, ngot ko mame:" 
1Corinthians15:37 ak noto ne igole, ko megole borto ne tun biitu, ago keswot buch, abere biitune nganok, anan tuguk alak;" 
1Corinthians15:38 ago igochin Jehovah borto ko u ye iboiboi inendet, ak kogochin keswot age tugul bortanyi inegei." 
1Corinthians15:39 Banyek tugul ko ma agenge: ago mi alak che bo bik, ak alak che bo tiong’ik, ak alak che bo taritik, ak alak che bo njirenik." 
1Corinthians15:40 Mitei borwek che bo kipsengwet, ak mitei borwek che bo ng’ony: ago terjin telunatet ne bo choto bo kipsengwet ak telunatet ne bo choto bo ng’ony." 
1Corinthians15:41 Mitei lilindo ne bo asista, ak lilindo age ne bo arawet, ak lilindo age ne bo kecheik; amu terjin kecheiyat age ak kecheiyat age eng’ lilindo." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ko u noto agine ng’eetyetab che begu. Kigolei eng’ ng’emisiet; king’eeti ko ma komi ng’emisiet: 
1Corinthians15:43 kigolei ko mami teegisto; ak tun king’eeti eng’ telunatet: kigolei eng’ nyalulet; ak tun king’eeti eng’ kamuktaet: 
1Corinthians15:44 kigolei borto ne kigisiktoi; king’eeti borto ne bo tamirmiriet. Ngo mi borto ne kigisiktoi, komi agine ne bo tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ko u noto agine, kigisir kele, Kiek chito ne bo tai, Adam, chito ne sobei. Kiek Adam ne bo let tamirmiriet ne igoitoi sobondo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ago maindoi noto bo tamirmiriet, ago noto bo borto; ye ibata ko noto bo tamirmiriet." 
1Corinthians15:47 Chito ne bo tai ko bo ng’ony, bo ng’ung’unyek: chito ne bo aeng’ ko bo kipsengwet." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ko u ole teptoi ne bo ng’ung’unyek, u choto agichek che bo ng’ung’unyek: ak ko u ole teptoi ne bo kipsengwet, u choto agichek che bo kipsengwet." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ak ko u ye kigiib itondab chitab ng’ung’unyek, ko tun kiibe itondab chitab kipsengwet agine." 
1Corinthians15:50 Amwae ni anyun, tupchosiechu, ale maimuchi banyek ak korotik konyor bounatetab Jehovah; amaimuchi ne nunei konyor ne manunei." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ogeero, amwawok ung’otiet: Magiruitosi achek tugul, ago kiwalech achek tugul," 
1Corinthians15:52 eng’ ne matia, eng’ kamismisetab konda, eng’ iriaget ne bo let: amu cheei iriaget, si king’eet che kigobek ko ma kotinyei nunet, ak kewalech." 
1Corinthians15:53 Amu kanyol kolaach ne nunei, ne manunei, ak kanyol kolaach nito meei ne mameei." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ago ye tun kagolaach nito nunei, ne manunei, ak ko kagolaach nito meei ne mameei, kosulda anyun mwaet ne kigisir kele, Kagelugui meet eng’ kabelisiet." 
1Corinthians15:55 Ee, meet, mi ano kabelisieng’ung’? Ee, meet, mi ano ng’wanindang’ung’?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ng’wanindab meet ko tengek; ak kimnatetab tengek ko ng’atutik: 
1Corinthians15:57 ago kigochini Jehovah kongoi, ne konech kabelisiet eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:58 Noto anyun, che kitupche che achame, ogimegitu, among’ king’eak, oyae otese kotugul boisietab Kiptaiyat, amu ongen ole ma bo buch boisieng’wong’ ne uui eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians16:1 Nguno anyun agobo kayumanik agobo bik che tililen, ko u ye kiang’at kanisosiek che bo Galatia, oyai ak okwek ko u noto." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ingogonor chi age tugul eng’ okwek eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo wigit, ko u che te che kanyor, si mabiit kayumisiet ye tun anyo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ak ye tun aitu, ayokte alak tugul che kiolewen koboto baronok, koib tuguk che bo aiyebindang’wong’ koba Jerusalem." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ak ngot ko nyolu awa agane, kebe tugul." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ago anyonjinok, ye kaabunote Makedonia; amu abunoti Makedonia;" 
1Corinthians16:6 ago abere anyone ketebi ak okwek eng’ betusiek alak anan agot eng’ betusiekab kaititiet, si kobiit omonorseiwa okwek eng’ bandanyu eng’ komosta age tugul ole awendi." 
1Corinthians16:7 Amu mamache ageerok nguno asiirtoi eng’ oret; amu amang’u ale atebi kobotok ne matia, ngo cham Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ago ta atebe Epeso agoi betutab Pentekost; 
1Corinthians16:9 amu kogiyatwa kurget ne o ne nyoljin boisionik, ak mi bunik che chang’." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ngot anyun konyo Timoteo, ko ingoteb kobotok ama eng’ kaiyweisiet; amu boisiei inendet eng’ boisietab Kiptaiyat, ko u ye ayae agane:" 
1Corinthians16:11 amat kosas chi inendet anyun. Ago omonorsechi inendet eng’ bandanyi eng’ kalyet si konyo ole ami: amu ageni inendet koboto che kitupche. 
1Corinthians16:12 Ago eng’ ng’alekab Apolo ne kitupche, kiasom inendet mising’ ale konyonjok koboto tupchosiek: ak kima ko magennyi agot kitigin konyo nguno; ago ta konyonei ye tun nyor boroindo." 
1Corinthians16:13 Oripse, olumdege mising’ eng’ kayanet, otebi ko u murenik, ogimegitu." 
1Corinthians16:14 Ingoyaak eng’ chamnyet tugul che oyae. 
1Corinthians16:15 Asomok anyun mising’, che kitupche (ongen che bo gotab Stepana, ole icheget tongoanik che bo Akaya, ak kichuljigei koboisiechi che tililen)," 
1Corinthians16:16 ale ogas it okwek che u chu, ak chi age tugul ne toreti eng’ boisiet ak ne birtoegei boisiet." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ak abaibai eng’ nyonunetab Stepana ak Portunato ak Akaiko: amu kiinyiitwa ichek noto ne rarunot eng’ komostang’wong’. 
1Corinthians16:18 Amu kiimuung’ji tamirmiriennyu ak neng’wong’: onai anyun komie ichek che u choto. 
1Corinthians16:19 Igatok kanisosiekab Asia. Igatok Akula ak Priska mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat, koboto kaniset ne mi gonywa." 
1Corinthians16:20 Igatok tupchosiek tugul. Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil. 
1Corinthians16:21 Kagatennyu nito ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu. 
1Corinthians16:22 Ngot ko machamei chi age tugul Kiptaiyat, ko ingoek ne chubot. Maran-atha." 
1Corinthians16:23 Ingotebi kobotok mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ingoteb chamnyennyi kobotok tugul eng’ Kristo Jesu. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Kristo Jesu eng’ magetab Jehovah, ak Timoteo tupchennyo, kisirjini kanisetab Jehovah ne mitei Korinto, koboto che tililen tugul che mitei Akaya komugul:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet ne bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:3 Iberurot Jehovah ne Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, Kwanda ne bo rirenosiek ak Jehovah ne bo kagaigaet tugul;" 
2Corinthians1:4 ne igoigoech eng’ bichiindanyo tugul, si kimuch kigaigai icheget che mi bichiin age tugul, eng’ kagaigaet ne igoigoenech Jehovah." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ko u ye katesak eng’ achek nyalilwogik che bo Kristo, ko u noto katesak kagaigaennyo eng’ Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Ago nginyalilech, ko agobo kagaigaeng’wong’ ak yetuneng’wong’; anan ngigoigoech, ko agobo kagaigaeng’wong’, ne boisiei eng’ muitaet ye omuitoi eng’ nyalilwogichoto kinyalili agachek:" 
2Corinthians1:7 ak lumdaat kamang’unennyo agobo okwek; kingen kele, ko u ye o yamdoik che bo nyalilwogik, ko u noto o yamdoik che bo kagaigaet." 
2Corinthians1:8 Amu magimache oegu che mongen, che kitupche, agobo bichiindo ne kinyoruech eng’ Asia, ale kisiebech mising’, kosiir kamugennyo, kot ko ma ketinyei kamang’unetab sobet." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ee, kigitinye acheget kiruogetab meet eng’ orinnyo, si mata kimang’uge, ago Jehovah ne ing’eeti che begu:" 
2Corinthians1:10 ne kisoruech eng’ meet ne o ne te ni, ak ta kosoruech: ne kimang’u kele ta ko soruech kogeny;" 
2Corinthians1:11 otoretech ak okwek kibagenge eng’ someng’wong’; si kobiit kogoito kongoi bik che chang’ agobo achek, amu konunet ne kigigonech eng’ toretetab che chang’." 
2Corinthians1:12 Amu kalosunennyo ko ni, baornatetab kabwatennyo, kele kigiteptoi tililindo ak atepto ne matinyei kenisiet, ne bo Jehovah, eng’ ng’ony, ma eng’ ng’omnatetab borto ago eng’ mieindab Jehovah, ak ne siirei mising’ ko eng’ komostang’wong’." 
2Corinthians1:13 Amu magisirwok tuguk alak tugul, kobate choto che osomani anan onai, ak amang’u ale onai agoi let:" 
2Corinthians1:14 Agot ko u ye kionaech kitigin, ole achek ko ki kalosuneng’wong’, agot ko u ye o kalosunennyo ak okwek, eng’ betutab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ak eng’ kayanonito ko kiabwati isib anyonjok si kobiit onyoru mieindo ne bo aeng’; 
2Corinthians1:16 ak abune olong’wong’ awendi Makedonia, ak kogeny abunu Makedonia anyone olong’wong’, si omonorseiwa eng’ bandanyu awendi Judea." 
2Corinthians1:16 ak abune olong’wong’ awendi Makedonia, ak kogeny abunu Makedonia anyone olong’wong’, si omonorseiwa eng’ bandanyu awendi Judea." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ye kingabwat ko u noto, ko tos kiaurereni? Anan tuguk che a begechini ale ayae, ko tos abegechini ko u atebetab borto, si kobiit koek eng’ ane ee, ee, ak achicha, achicha?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ago ko u ye bo iman Jehovah, ng’olyondennyo eng’ okwek ko ma ee ak achicha." 
2Corinthians1:19 Amu Weritab Jehovah, Jesu Kristo, ne kigiamde eng’ kwenung’wong’, ane ak Silbano ak Timoteo, ne kima ko ee ak achicha, ago eng’ inendet ko wei." 
2Corinthians1:20 Amu agot ngo tia arorutikab Jehovah, eng’ inendet ko wei: ak kogeny eng’ inendet ko Amen, agoi torornatetab Jehovah eng’ achek." 
2Corinthians1:21 Nguno anyun, inendet ne igimitech kobotok eng’ Kristo, ak ne kiilech, ko Jehovah;" 
2Corinthians1:22 ak king’ochech, ak kogonech Tamirmiriet eng’ mugulelwekyok koek tongoaniatab tuguk che bwanei." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ago aguure Jehovah koek baoriat eng’ sobondanyu, ale, si ko manyo Korinto, ko kiarirenak." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ma kele kitinye bounatet eng’ kayaneng’wong’, ago ki toretik che bo boiboiyeng’wong’: amu otonondosi eng’ kayaneng’wong’." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ago kiatil ni ale ma anyonjinok kogeny eng’ arogenet. 
2Corinthians2:2 Amu ngot agonok oarogense, ko ng’o anyun ne iboiboa, kobate inendet ne kaagochi koarogen?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ak kiasirwak ng’olyondonito, si ma ye anyo, ko matinye arogenet eng’ ichek che kanyolja agasege; atinye kamang’unet eng’ okwek tugul, ale boiboiyennyu ko neng’wong’ okwek tugul." 
2Corinthians2:4 Amu kiasirwak eng’ bichiindo ne o ak ng’wanindab muguleldo koboto beekab kong’ che chang’; ma si oarogense, ago si kobiit onai chamnyet ne ating’enok mising’ kosiir." 
2Corinthians2:5 Ago ngot ko koing’eet chi arogenet, ko koing’eet arogenet, ma eng’ ane, ago eng’ kebeber, (si magonok ane nyigisindo ne siirei) eng’ achek tugul." 
2Corinthians2:6 Yamei chito ne u nito kagikyinoni kitilji bik che chang’; 
2Corinthians2:7 ago kaigai onyochi kaat inendet ak ogaigai, si malugui, eng’ oret age tugul, chito ne u noto arogenennyi ne siirtoot." 
2Corinthians2:8 Noto anyun asomok ale ogimit chamnyeng’wong’ eng’ inendet. 
2Corinthians2:9 Amu kiasir agobo ng’olyondonito, ale anaak komie ngogase it eng’ tuguk tugul." 
2Corinthians2:10 Ago inendet ne onyochini kaat kiy age tugul, anyochini kaat agane: amu noto ne kianyochi kaat agane, ngo kianyochi kaat eng’ kiy age tugul, ko kianyochi kaat agobo okwek eng’ taitab Kristo;" 
2Corinthians2:11 si manyor Setani kit ne iterterenech: amu ma ki berberen, ago kingen chobutikyik." 
2Corinthians2:12 Ak ye kinganyo Troa amu logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo, ak ye kingeyatwa kurget eng’ Kiptaiyat," 
2Corinthians2:13 kimanyoru kamuung’et eng’ tamirmiriennyu, amu kima anyoru Tito ne kitupche: ago kiabagakte, ak awe Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ago kongoi eng’ Jehovah, ne imutatech kotugul kibelisie eng’ Kristo, ak kobortoi nyamdutietab naennyi eng’ achek eng’ komosta age tugul." 
2Corinthians2:15 Amu ki nyamdutiet ne anyiny ne bo Kristo eng’ Jehovah, eng’ ichek che kisoru, ak eng’ ichek che lustos;" 
2Corinthians2:16 eng’ alak ko ki nyamdutiet ne bo meet agoi meet; eng’ alak ko ki nyamdutiet ne bo sobondo agoi sobondo. Ak tos ng’o ne yamegei ak tuguchu? 
2Corinthians2:17 Amu achek ko ma ki u che chang’, che boisie ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ ng’alset: ago ki che boisiei eng’ oret ne matinyei ng’alset, ago ki bo Jehovah, ak eng’ taitab Jehovah, keng’alali eng’ Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Ara anyun, kagitau kogeny kemwauge acheget? Anan kimache, ko u ye machei bik alak, baronok che bo mwaitaetab ge che bwanjinok ak che bunwok?" 
2Corinthians3:2 O baruennyo ne sirat eng’ mugulelwekyok, ne naat ak kosomani bik tugul;" 
2Corinthians3:3 obortoige ole o baruet ne bo Kristo, ne kigiyai, ne kigisir ama eng’ wino, ago eng’ Tamirmiriet ne bo Jehovah ne sobei; ma eng’ koik che lebelen, ago eng’ koik che lebelen che mugulelwek che bo borwek." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ak ketinye kamang’unet ne u noto eng’ Kristo, ne tokyingei Jehovah:" 
2Corinthians3:5 ma kele kitinye kiy achege ne yamegei ak kiy, kiit kiy age tugul kele bunwech acheget; ago bunu Jehovah che yamech;" 
2Corinthians3:6 ne kiyaech keegu che yamei, kiboitinik che bo arorutiet ne leel; ma che bo ng’atutiet, ago bo Tamirmiriet; amu barisiei ng’atutiet, ago Tamirmiriet ne igoitoi sobondo." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ago ngo kibwa koboto torornatet boisietab meet, ne kigisir, ak kewachi koik barak, kot ko kimata komuch bikab Israel kogeer toget ne bo Musa komie amu lilindab togennyi; lilindo ne kiigesugei:" 
2Corinthians3:8 tos ma tesat kosiir boisietab tamirmiriet eng’ torornatet? 
2Corinthians3:9 Amu ngo boisietab kiruoget ko torornatet, ko siirtoot mising’ boisietab imanda eng’ torornatet." 
2Corinthians3:10 Amu iman, noto ne kigitoror, ko kima kigochyi torornatet agobo nito, amu torornatet ne siirtoot." 
2Corinthians3:11 Amu ngo kimi noto siirtoi koboto torornatet, komitei anyun eng’ torornatet ne tia, noto ne ng’etunot." 
2Corinthians3:12 Noto anyun, amu kitinye kamang’unet ne u ni, keboisie anyun nyiganatet ne bo keny eng’ ng’alalet," 
2Corinthians3:13 ama ki u Musa, ne kituge togennyi anget, si mageer lagokab Israel komie kagesunet ne bo noto kiigesugei:" 
2Corinthians3:14 ago kiuuegitu kabwatutikwak: amu agoi betuni, eng’ somanetab arorutiet ne bo keny, ko ta komi anganato bo toget, tom keisto; noto ne kigeisto eng’ Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ago agoi betuni, ko eng’ betut age tugul ye kisomani Musa, ko ta komitei anganato mugulelwekwak." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ago ye kaweekyinegei Kiptaiyat, keisto anganato." 
2Corinthians3:17 Kiptaiyat ko Tamirmiriet anyun: ak ole mi Tamirmirietab Kiptaiyat komi katiaget. 
2Corinthians3:18 Ago achek tugul kobortoi torornatetab Kiptaiyat ko u kioit eng’ togochikyok che ma tugotin, kewalech eng’ itonoto kobunu torornatet agoi torornatet, ko u ye bunu Kiptaiyat ne Tamirmiriet." 
2Corinthians4:1 Noto anyun, amu kitinye boisioni, ko u ye kigenyoru rirenetab ge, ko mameech mugulel:" 
2Corinthians4:2 ago kigeesie tuguk che ung’otin che bo kalilanet, ama kibendoti eng’ ng’alset, anan keboisie ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kaberberisiet; ago eng’ kabartaetab imanit, kiborjinige kabwatetab chi age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Corinthians4:3 Ago ngo tugotin logoiywekyok che miach, ko tugotin eng’ ichek che lustos:" 
2Corinthians4:4 eng’ ichek che katuch cheptalelitab ng’onyuni kabwatutikab che maiyani, si mailuuchi ichek lapkeiyetab logoiywek che miach che bo torornatetab Kristo, ne inendet ko itondab Jehovah." 
2Corinthians4:5 Amu magiamdoti agobo ge, ago Kristo Jesu ne Kiptaiyat, ak acheget ko ki otwogikwok amu Jesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Amu Jehovah ne kimwa kole, Tun iluu lapkeiyet kobunu mesundeito, inendet ne kiiluuchi mugulelwekyok, si kogon lapkeiyet ne bo naetab torornatetab Jehovah eng’ togetab Jesu Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ago kitinye konoruani eng’ terenik che bo ng’ung’unyek, si kobiit kobunji Jehovah oindo ne siirtoot mising’ ne bo kamuktaet, ago ma achek;" 
2Corinthians4:8 kinyalilech eng’ komosta age tugul, ago magigiichech; kitobtobeni, ago mabetwech kamang’unet;" 
2Corinthians4:9 Kionwech, ago magibagaktaech; kiwirtaech ago magibarech;" 
2Corinthians4:10 kiiboti kotugul eng’ borto meetab Jesu, si kobiit kong’ang’ak agine sobondab Jesu eng’ borwekyok." 
2Corinthians4:11 Amu acheget che kisoptosi kimutyinech meet kotugul amu Jesu, si kobiit kong’ang’ak agine sobondab Jesu eng’ borwekyok che begu." 
2Corinthians4:12 Noto anyun boisiei meet eng’ achek, ago sobondo eng’ okwek." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ago amu kitinye tamirmiriet noto bo kayanet, ko u ye kigisir kele, Kiayan, noto anyun kiang’alali; kiyani agachek, ak keng’alali amu noto;" 
2Corinthians4:14 kingen kele inendet ne kiing’eet Kiptaiyat Jesu ko tun ing’eetech agachek koboto Jesu, ak kobartech kobotok." 
2Corinthians4:15 Amu tuguk tugul ko agobo okwek, si ye tesak mieindo eng’ che chang’, koyai kagoitoetab kongoi kotesak eng’ katororetab Jehovah." 
2Corinthians4:16 Noto anyun, mameech mugulel; ago agot ngo ng’emak chinnyo ne bo barak, kewalei chinnyo ne bo orit kileeliti betut age tugul." 
2Corinthians4:17 Amu bichiindanyo ne nyamnyum, ne matebyei, koyaiywech torornatet ne o ne bo koigeny, ne tesoksei mising’ kosiir;" 
2Corinthians4:18 ye magigeere tuguk che toogu, ago tuguk che ma toogu, amu tuguk che toogu kosiirtoi; ago tuguk che ma toogu ko bo koigeny." 
2Corinthians5:1 Amu kingen kele ngobutok got ne bo ng’onyuni ne borwekyok, ketinye teekset ne bunu Jehovah, got ne kima kiteech eng’ eunek, bo koigeny, eng’ kipsengwet." 
2Corinthians5:2 Amu iman kitigendosi eng’ ni, kimache mising’ kilaakwech meng’otennyo ne bunu kipsengwet:" 
2Corinthians5:3 ye tun kagilaakwech ko ma kemi ach ngor. 
2Corinthians5:4 Iman, achek che kimi eng’ borito, ketigendosi, ketinye laiset; ma kele kimache kereegunenech, ago kimache kilaakwech, si kobiit kolugui sobondo noto meei." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ara anyun, ne kiyaech agobo nito, ko Jehovah, ne kigonech Tamirmiriet, koek tangoaniatab tuguk che bwanei." 
2Corinthians5:6 Eng’ noto anyun ki nyigonen kotugul, ak kingen kele, ye ta kemi eng’ borto, ko kagimi koboto Kiptaiyat" 
2Corinthians5:7 (amu kibendoti eng’ kayanet, ma eng’ keeret);" 
2Corinthians5:8 amwae ale, ki nyigonen, ak kemache kele, kaigai kemande eng’ borto, ak ketebi koboto Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians5:9 Noto anyun ko kit ne kitokyinige, ngemi eng’ bori, anan ngo magimi, keegu che iboiboi inendet." 
2Corinthians5:10 Amu kanyol kibartech achek tugul eng’ taitab ng’echeretab kiruoget ne bo Kristo; si kobiit kotaach chi age tugul tuguk che te che kiyai eng’ borto, ngo miach anan ngo yaach." 
2Corinthians5:11 Amu kingen anyun kaiyweisietab Kiptaiyat, kichuutu bik, ago kibortaech eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak amang’u ale kibortoech eng’ taitab kabwateng’wong’." 
2Corinthians5:12 Magimwauge kogeny eng’ taing’wong’, ago kigonok boroindo si kobiit olosuge amu achek, si kobiit onyoru kit ne kowoljini icheget che ilosugei eng’ tuguk che toogu, ama eng’ muguleldo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Agot ngo kogobetech met, ko eng’ Jehovah; anan ngo litit ng’omnatennyo, ko amu okwek." 
2Corinthians5:14 Amu ichiichech chamnyetab Kristo; amu kigeere ko u ni, kele kimechi chito agenge tugul, noto anyun kibek tugul;" 
2Corinthians5:15 ak kimechi inendet tugul, si ma kosoptos agobo ge icheget che soptos, ago agobo inendet ne kimechi ak kong’eet kogeny." 
2Corinthians5:16 Noto anyun koboch nguno ko magingen chi age tugul eng’ borto: ago ngot kigingen Kristo eng’ borto, ko magingen inendet nguno ko u noto kogeny." 
2Corinthians5:17 Noto anyun, ngo mi chi age tugul eng’ Kristo, ko kigeyai inendet koek chito ne leel: kagosiirto tuguk che bo keny; ogeero, kagoek che leelach." 
2Corinthians5:18 Ago bo tuguk tugul Jehovah ne kiituiyenech ge eng’ Kristo, ak kigonech achek boisiet ne bo katuiyet;" 
2Corinthians5:19 kele kimi Jehovah eng’ Kristo kotuitos ng’ony ak inendet, ko maiityin ichek yaitwogikwak, ko kagogonech ng’olyotab katuiyet." 
2Corinthians5:20 Noto anyun ki tononjinik agobo Kristo, ko u ye igoigook Jehovah eng’ achek; kigoigook agobo Kristo, kele otuiyege ak Jehovah." 
2Corinthians5:21 Inendet ne kima kongen tengek, ko kiyai inendet koek tengek amu achek; si kobiit keegu imanda ne bo Jehovah eng’ inendet." 
2Corinthians6:1 Kisome achek che keboisiei ak Jehovah kele amotaach mieindab Jehovah buch 
2Corinthians6:2 (amu mwaei kele, Kiagasin eng’ betut ne bo chamjinet, Ak kiatoretin eng’ betut ne bo sorunet: Ogeero, nguno ko betut ne bo chamjinet; ogeero, nguno ko betut ne bo yetunet):" 
2Corinthians6:3 ama kiyai kiy age tugul ne bo kanagut, si ma kimwaitae boisiennyo yaitio;" 
2Corinthians6:4 ago eng’ tuguk tugul kibortoige, ko u kiboitinikab Jehovah, eng’ muitaet ne o, eng’ bichiinwek, eng’ kagiigosiek, eng’ tiritinwek," 
2Corinthians6:5 eng’ birutik, eng’ ratisiosiek, eng’ bolatosiek, eng’ boisionik che uuen, eng’ ripsosiek, eng’ rugutosiek;" 
2Corinthians6:6 eng’ tililindo, eng’ naet, eng’ mutyonet, eng’ talasiet, eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, eng’ chamnyet ne matinyei kenisiet," 
2Corinthians6:7 eng’ ng’olyotab imanit, eng’ kamuktaetab Jehovah; eng’ karikab imanda eng’ eutab tai ak eng’ eutab katam," 
2Corinthians6:8 eng’ torornatet ak tewernatet, eng’ ng’alek che yaach che kimwaitaenech, ak eng’ ng’alek che miachen; ko u kaberberik, ago ki bo iman;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ko u che ma naotin, ago kingenech komie; ko u che machei kobek, ak ogeero, kisoptosi; ko u che kitigoni, ago magibarech;" 
2Corinthians6:10 ko u che arogendos, ago che boiboi kotugul; ko u che bonondos, ago imogornoni che chang’; ko u che matinyei kiy, ago tinyei tuguk tugul." 
2Corinthians6:11 Kagiyatwok kutuswekyok, ee Korintoechu, kabaraitu mugulelwekyok." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ma ogiigotin eng’ achek, ago ogiigotin eng’ chamnyeng’wong’." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ak eng’ kageeret ne te ne kigigonok (ang’alali ko u ye ang’alaljini lagokyuk), ingobartaitu mugulelwekwok." 
2Corinthians6:14 Amot oratge ak che ma iyanotin: tinyei imanda yamdao nee ak tengekto? Anan tinyei yamdao nee lapkeiyet ak mesundeito? 
2Corinthians6:15 Anan kasyindos eng’ nee Kristo ak Belial? Anan ting’egei nee ne iyanat ak ne ma iyanat? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ak ting’egei nee hekalut ne bo Jehovah ak kanamonik? Amu ki hekalut ne bo Jehovah ne sobei; ago ko u ye kimwa Jehovah kole, Amenye ichek, ak awendote ichek; Ak aegu Jehovah nenywa, Ak koek ichek bikyuk." 
2Corinthians6:17 Noto anyun omong’u eng’ kwenunywa, Ak otabange, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Amotwa kiy ne bo simdo; Si ataachak," 
2Corinthians6:18 Ak aegu Kwanda eng’ okwek, Ak oegu werik ak tibik eng’ ane, Mwaei Kiptaiyat ne bo Kamuktaet." 
2Corinthians7:1 Amu kitinye arorutichu anyun, chamanichu, ongitililge, keiste simdo tugul ne bo borto ak ne bo tamirmiriet, si keityi tililindo eng’ kaiyweisietab Jehovah." 
2Corinthians7:2 Oyatwech mugulelwekwok: ma kiyachi chi age tugul kiy ne ya, ma king’em chi age tugul, ma kiibe chi age tugul kiy." 
2Corinthians7:3 Mamwae nito ale aruokwok: amu kisib amwa, ale omi eng’ mugulelwekyok kebegu tugul ak kesopche tugul." 
2Corinthians7:4 O nyiganatet ne ang’alalunenok, o katororennyu bo ge agobo okwek: kanyiia kagaigaet, kanyiia boiboiyet kot kong’irtagei eng’ bichiinwekyok tugul." 
2Corinthians7:5 Amu agot ye kingeitu Makedonia, ko manyor borwekyok kamuung’et, ago kiginyalilech eng’ komosta age tugul; kimi sang’ boriosiek, ak kimi orit kaiyweisiosiek." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ago Jehovah ne igoigoi che nyerotin, ko kiigaigaech eng’ nyonunetab Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 ak, ma eng’ nyonunennyi kityo, ago eng’ kagaigaet ne kiogaigai inendet, ye kingomwawech emostong’wong’, ak rirekwok, ak kagiileng’wong’ bo ge agobo ane; kot abaibaitu mising’ kosiir." 
2Corinthians7:8 Amu agot ngo kiagonok oarogense eng’ baruennyu, ko ma ageer ko ya, nganda kita ageer ko ya; amu ageere ale kigonok baruanato oarogense, nganda ki bo betusiek che matia." 
2Corinthians7:9 Abaibai nguno, ma amu kigigonok oarogense, ago abaibai amu kigigonok oarogense agoi sigunet: amu kigigonok oarogense eng’ arogenet ne tokyingei Jehovah, si mabetwok kiy age tugul amu achek." 
2Corinthians7:10 Amu arogenet ne tokyingei Jehovah koyaei sigunet agoi yetunet, ne matinyei ndara: ago arogenet ne bo ng’onyuni koibu meet." 
2Corinthians7:11 Amu ogeero, ng’olyondonito ne kigonok arogenet ne tokyingei Jehovah, ko kiyai kagiilet ne u nee eng’ okwek; ee, sorunetab ge, ee, nereknatet; ee, kaiyweisiet; ee, emosto; ee, kagiiletab ge; ee, yaaktaetab mugetut! Eng’ kiy age tugul ko kiobartege ole o tililen eng’ ng’olyondonito." 
2Corinthians7:12 Ko anyun, nganda kiasirwak, ko kima asirwak agobo ng’olyondetab inendet ne kiyai ne ya, anan amu ng’olyondetab inendet ne kigiyachi ne ya, ago si kong’ang’ak eng’ okwek kagiileng’wong’ bo ge agobo achek eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Corinthians7:13 Noto anyun kigigaigaech: ak eng’ kagaigaennyo ko kigiboiboitu mising’ ne siirei amu boiboiyetab Tito, amu kiogochi okwek tugul tamirmiriennyi komuuny." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ak ngo kiamwachi inendet kiy age tugul eng’ losetab ge agobo okwek, ko kima kigona alilan; ago ko u ye kigemwawok tuguk tugul eng’ iman, ko u noto kalosunennyo agine, ne kiamwa eng’ taitab Tito, ko kiek iman." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ak o mising’ ne siirtoot chamnyennyi ne bo orit agobo okwek, kobwati kasetab it neng’wong’ tugul, ko u ye kiotaach inendet eng’ kaiyweisiet ak botanet." 
2Corinthians7:16 Abaibai anyun amu ating’enok kamang’unet eng’ kiy age tugul. 
2Corinthians8:1 Kiboruok anyun, che kitupche, mieindab Jehovah ne kigigochi kanisosiekab Makedonia;" 
2Corinthians8:2 ale ye kingetiem ichek eng’ nyalilda ne o, ko kitesak boiboindanywa ne siirtoot ak banandanywa ne o kot kotesyi ichek magornatetab aiyebindanywa." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amu abaoriani ale kiigoito eng’ chamnyenywa ko u kamugenywa, ak ne siirei kamugenywa," 
2Corinthians8:4 kosomech eng’ kagaigaet ne o agobo mieini ak yamdaet eng’ boisiet ne kiboisiechin che tililen: 
2Corinthians8:5 ak ma ko u ye kigimang’u, ago kisib kogochigei icheget Kiptaiyat, ak kigoneigei eng’ magetab Jehovah;" 
2Corinthians8:6 agoi kigiil Tito, kele ko u ye kisib kotoi, komachei kosulda eng’ okwek mieinito agine." 
2Corinthians8:7 Ago ko u ye otinye aiyebindo eng’ kiy age tugul, eng’ kayanet, ak twegunet, ak naet, ak eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul, ak eng’ chamnyeng’wong’ ne oting’enech, ingonyiiak anyun mieinito agine." 
2Corinthians8:8 Mang’alali eng’ ng’atutiet, ago atieme eng’ kagiiletab ge ne bo alak, ngo bo iman chamnyeng’wong’." 
2Corinthians8:9 Amu ongen mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo ole, agot nganda ki magorio, ko kiek kibanania agobo okwek, si kobiit oegu magorek eng’ banandanyi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ak eng’ nito aboruok kabwatutikyuk: amu nyolu nito eng’ okwek, che kigosib otau eng’ kenyit agenge ne kogosiirto, ma kityo oyai, ago ochame agine." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ago ogesu anyun nguno boisiet; amu ko u ye kio chobotin ochame oyai ko u noto, komitei ko u noto kasuldaet ne bo kamugeng’wong’." 
2Corinthians8:12 Amu ngo chobot kabwatetab chi, ko taachaksei ko u ye tinyei chi, ma ko u ye matinyei." 
2Corinthians8:13 Amu ma ale si kinyamnyumji alak, kinyalilak okwek;" 
2Corinthians8:14 ago koaechin; toreti nguno anyun chang’indang’wong’ terterindanywa, si kotoret chang’indanywa terterindang’wong’; si kobiit kogergeit:" 
2Corinthians8:15 ko u ye kigisir kele, Inendet ne kiiyum che chang’ ko masiirto kiy; ak inendet ne kiiyum che ng’ering’ ko mararji kiy." 
2Corinthians8:16 Ago kongoi eng’ Jehovah, ne indoi muguleldab Tito ko u noto kagiiletab ge agobo okwek." 
2Corinthians8:17 Amu kitaach iman kagiilennyo, ago amu igiilegei kot, kogonyo anyun ole omi eng’ chamnyennyi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ak kogiyokte tupchet age koboto inendet ne toogunot kalosunennyi agobo logoiywek che miach eng’ kanisosiek tugul; 
2Corinthians8:19 ak ma noto kityo, ago kilewen kanisosiek inendet kebendate tugul agobo mieini, ne kiyae achek keyachini torornatetab Kiptaiyat, ak kiboru chobennyo bo ge ne kitinye:" 
2Corinthians8:20 keistoege ng’olyondonito kele, si kobiit mamwaitaenech chi age tugul kiy ne ya agobo aiyebini kiyaati:" 
2Corinthians8:21 amu kibwati tuguk che bo teegisto, ma eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat kityo, ago eng’ taitab bik agichek." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ak kogiyokte koboto ichek tupchennyo, ne kogegeer konyil che chang’ kele igiilegei eng’ tuguk che chang’, ago nguno kogiilegei mising’ kosiir, amu kamang’unet ne ting’enok mising’." 
2Corinthians8:23 Ngo teebenak chi agobo Tito, inendet ko kiboitiot ne kimi tuwai, ak kiboisiei tuwai agobo okwek; anan agobo tupchosiekyok, icheget ko che kiyoktoi che bo kanisosiek, choto ko torornatetab Kristo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Noto anyun oborji icheget eng’ taitab kanisosiek kit ne iboru chamnyeng’wong’, ak kalosunennyo bo ge agobo okwek." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ago eng’ ng’alekab boisiet ne kiboisiechin che tililen ko matilei kiy ko ta asirwak. 
2Corinthians9:2 Amu angen chobeng’wong’ bo ge ne alosunege agobo okwek eng’ ichek che bo Makedonia, ale kigochopgei Akaya koboch kenyit agenge ne kogosiirto; ak kigong’eet kagiileng’wong’ bo ge che chang’ mising’ eng’ ichek." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ago koayogu che kitupche, si maek buch kalosunennyo bo ge agobo okwek eng’ ng’olyondonito; si kobiit ochopge, ko u ye kiamwa:" 
2Corinthians9:4 si ngot kebwa ak age ne bo Makedonia, ak kenyoruok kotom ochoboge, ko magililan eng’ kamang’unoni (si ma kimwa kele okwek)." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kiabwat anyun ale kanyol agaigai che kitupche, si kobiit kondoi kobwa olo omi, si kosib kochob tuguk che bo aiyebindang’wong’ che kigosib oaror, si kobiit kochobok tukchoto, koek tuguk che bo aiyebindo, ama bo torjinet." 
2Corinthians9:6 Ago amwae ni anyun ale, Inendet ne kolei che ng’ering’ kogesei agine che ng’ering’; ak inendet ne kolei eng’ aiyebindo kogesei agine che bo aiyebindo." 
2Corinthians9:7 Ingogoito chi age tugul ko u ye kigochob eng’ muguleldanyi; ma eng’ ng’oknatet, anan torjinet: amu chamei Jehovah ne igoitoi eng’ boiboiyet." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ak komuchi Jehovah kogonok mieindo tugul kotesak mising’; si otinye okwek kotugul tuguk tugul che yamok eng’ kit age tugul, si otunen eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie:" 
2Corinthians9:9 ko u ye kigisir kele, Kigoserser, kigogochi kibananok; Tebyei imandanyi koigeny." 
2Corinthians9:10 Ak inendet ne igochin keswek kolindet ak amitwogik che amei, kogonok ak kotesei keswekwok che ogole, ak kotes logoekab imandang’wong’:" 
2Corinthians9:11 kigonok magornatet eng’ kiy age tugul eng’ aiyebindo tugul, ne igochin Jehovah kongoi eng’ achek." 
2Corinthians9:12 Amu yaetab boisioni ko mainyiityin kityo bik che tililen, tuguk che te che kobononi, ago tesoksei agine eng’ kaweekyinoik che chang’ che bo kongoi che kiweekyin Jehovah;" 
2Corinthians9:13 amu tiemet ne bo boisioni kotorori ichek Jehovah amu kasetab it ne bo ng’ang’eng’wong’ eng’ logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo, ak aiyebindab kagoitoeng’wong’ eng’ ichek, ak eng’ tugul;" 
2Corinthians9:14 ak eng’ saenywa agobo okwek, koting’enok emosto amu mieindab Jehovah ne tesat mising’ eng’ okwek." 
2Corinthians9:15 Kongoi eng’ Jehovah amu konunennyi ne ma mwaoksei. 
2Corinthians10:1 Asomok anyun ane Paulo eng’ talasiet ak mutyonetab Kristo, ane ne ming’in ye ami kobotok eng’ kwenung’wong’, ago ye mami kobotok atinye nyiganatet:" 
2Corinthians10:2 ee, asomok, ale si manyiganitu ye ami kobotok eng’ kamang’unet ne kona aiit ale a nyigan eng’ alak, che iitech kole kibendoti eng’ atebetab borto." 
2Corinthians10:3 Amu agot ngebendoti eng’ borto, ko magiyae luget eng’ atebetab borto" 
2Corinthians10:4 (amu karikab lugennyo ko ma bo borto, ago tinyei kamuget eng’ taitab Jehovah koluul irimosiek);" 
2Corinthians10:5 kiluuli kabwatutik, ak kiy age tugul ne toror ne ieetegei kole kogirinda naetab Jehovah, ak koluulei kabwatet age tugul si kobiit kogas it Kristo;" 
2Corinthians10:6 ko ki chobotin keyaakyi mugetut bistoet tugul, ye tun isulda kaseng’wong’ bo it." 
2Corinthians10:7 Ogeere tuguk che mitei taitab konyekwok. Ngot komang’ugei chi age tugul kole bo Kristo, ko ingoruchi nito kogeny inegei, kole, ko u ye bo Kristo inendet, ke u noto agachek." 
2Corinthians10:8 Amu agot ngo nyolu alosge mising’ kitigin agobo kimnatennyo (ne kigon Kiptaiyat si kobiit koteechak, ama si koluulok), ko malilani;" 
2Corinthians10:9 si maegu ne amutenok baronokyuk. 
2Corinthians10:10 Amu mwaei ichek kole, Baronokyik ko nyigisen ak ko kimen; ago nyalulat inendet ye mitei tainywa, ama tilei kiy ng’alekyik." 
2Corinthians10:11 Ingobwat ne u noto, ni, kole, kit ne ki u eng’ ng’olyot eng’ baronok ye magimi, ke u noto agine eng’ boisiet ye kimitei." 
2Corinthians10:12 Amu ma ki nyigonen kiitge anan kirogege alak eng’ ichek che ilosugei: ago ichek ichegei korogege ge ichegei, ak koyaniege ge ichegei, ko matinyei kaguiyet." 
2Corinthians10:13 Ago magitororige kosiir ne te ne yamei, ago ko u ole te karogendoet ne kiikwaiywech Jehovah, kot keitu olong’wong’." 
2Corinthians10:14 Amu magiyogoitoige kosiir, ko u ne magiitu olong’wong’: amu kigebwa agoi olong’wong’ eng’ logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo:" 
2Corinthians10:15 ama kilosuge kosiir ne te ne yamei, eng’ boisionikab bik alak; ago kimang’u kele, ko u ye tesoksei kayaneng’wong’, kitororech eng’ okwek ko u ole te kakwaennyo, kot kosiir," 
2Corinthians10:16 si kobiit keamde logoiywek che miach agot eng’ komoswek che mi komosin eng’ olong’wong’, ama kilosuge eng’ kakwaetab chi age eng’ tuguk che kigechob." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ago inendet ne ilosugei, ingolosgei eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians10:18 Amu ma inendet ne ilosugei ne kiyani, ago inendet ne ilosu Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ee, kata kaigai ndomuchi omuitawa eng’ berberindo kitigin: ee omuitawa iman." 
2Corinthians11:2 Amu ama ng’etkong’ agobo okwek, eng’ ng’etkonda ne bo Jehovah: amu kiachamwok obunji manong’otiot agenge, si kobiit amutyok Kristo ko u bergeiyat ne tilil." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ago aiywei ale, si mang’emogis eng’ or age tugul kabwatutikwok eng’ lititindo ak tililindo ne tokyingei Kristo ko u ye kiiberber erenet Awa eng’ ng’alsennyi." 
2Corinthians11:4 Amu inendet ne nyonei, ngo amda Jesu age, ne kima kiamde achek, anan ngo taach tamirmiriet age, ne kima otaach okwek, anan logoiywek che miach che ter, che kima oyan, ko kaga anyun omuitochini inendet komie." 
2Corinthians11:5 Amu aiitige ale mami let eng’ kiy age tugul eng’ che eechen mising’ eng’ che kiyoktoi. 
2Corinthians11:6 Agot ngo u ng’alalennyu ne bo chi ne ma inetgei, ko ma u noto eng’ naet; achicha, kigibartech achek eng’ okwek eng’ kiy age tugul eng’ kwenutab bik tugul." 
2Corinthians11:7 Anan kiayai tengek ye kingaming’inge si kobiit kitororok okwek, amu kiaamwok logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah ama melekto?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Kiarebe kanisosiek alak, aibe melekto eng’ ichek si kobiit aboisieunenok;" 
2Corinthians11:9 ak ye kingami kobotok ak abanani, ko kima agochi chi age tugul nyigisin; amu kingoit tupchosiek kobunu Makedonia, kogona che te che kiabanani; ak kiaripge eng’ kiy age tugul ale si maegu nyigisin eng’ okwek, ak ta aribege." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ko u ye mi imanitab Kristo eng’ ane, mami chi ne kirindoa eng’ kalosunoni eng’ korotinwekab Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Amu nee anyun? Amu machamok? Ingen Jehovah. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ago kit ne ayae, ayae noto, si kobiit atile boroindo icheget che machei boroindo; si kobiit kogergeit ak ichek eng’ kioto ilosunegei." 
2Corinthians11:13 Amu bik che u choto ko che kiyoktoi che bo lembech, kiboitinikab kenisiet, che walegei koek che kiyoktoi che bo Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ama mi kwong’et; amu agot Setani kowalegei koek malaikaiyatab lapkeiyet. 
2Corinthians11:15 Ma kiy ne o anyun ngo walegei otwogikyik koigei kiboitinikab imanda; ne kagesunenywa konamegei ak boisionikwak. 
2Corinthians11:16 Amwae kogeny ale, Amat kobwat chi kole a berber; ago ngo u noto, otaacha okwek ngo a berber, si kobiit alosge agane kitigin." 
2Corinthians11:17 Noto amwae, ko mamwae eng’ Kiptaiyat, ago ko u eng’ berberindo, eng’ nyiganatanito bo kalosunetab ge." 
2Corinthians11:18 Amu ngolosugei che chang’ eng’ borto, alosuge agane." 
2Corinthians11:19 Amu omuitochini che berberen eng’ boiboiyet, amu o ng’omen." 
2Corinthians11:20 Amu omuitochini chito, ngo yaak oegu otwogik, ngo amok, ngo namak, ngo tororgei, ngorabachok." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ang’alali eng’ sasetab ge, ko u ye ki nyalulyotin. Ago ngot ko nyigan chi eng’ kiy age tugul (ang’alali eng’ berberindo), a nyigan agane." 
2Corinthians11:22 Tos Hebranik ichek? A u noto agane. Tos Israelik ichek? A u noto agane. Tos keswekab Abraham ichek? A u noto agane. 
2Corinthians11:23 Tos kiboitinikab Kristo ichek? (Ang’alali ko u chi ne amei iywek) a siirtoot; eng’ birtaosiekab ge che siirtoot, eng’ korgorosiek mising’, eng’ birutik che magirarei, eng’ meosiek konyil che chang’." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kianyoru eng’ Yahudik konyil mut birutik artam, kibet agenge." 
2Corinthians11:25 Kigibirena kirokwek konyil somok, kigilagena koik konyil agenge, king’emak melit ne kiami konyil somok, kiatebe nyanjet betut agenge ak kemout agenge." 
2Corinthians11:26 Eng’ banwek konyil che chang’, ng’oiyonditab ainosiek, ng’oiyondit ne bunu rebik, ng’oiyondit ne bunu bikab bororiennyu, ng’oiyondit ne bunu Bororiosiek, ng’oiyondit eng’ nganaset, ng’oiyondit eng’ ong’atet, ng’oiyondit eng’ nyanjet, ng’oiyondit eng’ kwenutab tupchosiek che bo lembech;" 
2Corinthians11:27 eng’ birtoetab ge ak nyalilda, eng’ ripsosiek konyil che chang’, eng’ rubet ak melelda, eng’ rugutosiek konyil che chang’, eng’ kaititindo ak ach ngorit." 
2Corinthians11:28 Koboto tuguchoto bo sang’, komi agine noto ne igiicha betut age tugul, tononjinetab kanisosiek tugul." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ng’o ne nyalulat, ama a nyalulat ane? Ng’o ne koginach, ama agas agane ng’wanindo?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngot ko nyolu alosge, alosuge agobo tuguk che bo nyalulennyu." 
2Corinthians11:31 Ingen Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyat Jesu, ne iberurot koigeny, kole magenu." 
2Corinthians11:32 Kirib eng’ Damasko bounindetab laitoriat Areta, nganasetab Damaskik, kole konama:" 
2Corinthians11:33 ak kigichoortaena mesendet eng’ tirisiet ne bo irimet, ak kiachilil eng’ eunnyi." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kanyol alosge, agot ngo manyolu; ago aityini keersosiek ak ng’ang’utik che bo Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians12:2 Angen chito eng’ Kristo, koboch nguno ko kenyisiek taman ak ang’wan (ngo kimi eng’ borto, ko mangen; anan ngo kiga komanda eng’ borto, ko mangen; ingen Jehovah), ale kigimut inendet kotogosta agoi kipsengwet ne bo somok." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ak angen chichoto (ngo kimi eng’ borto, anan kima ko ta komi eng’ borto, ko mangen; ingen Jehovah)," 
2Corinthians12:4 ale kigimut kotogosta agoi Paradis, ak kigas ng’alek che ma mwaoksei, che ma chamdaat komwa chi." 
2Corinthians12:5 Alosuge agobo chichoto: ago malosuge agobo anege, kobate eng’ nyalulnatosiekyuk." 
2Corinthians12:6 Amu ngot amache alosge, ko maberberitu; amu amwae ne bo iman: ago asise, si mat koiita chi age tugul kosiir ne te ne keerjina, anan ye kasena." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ak eng’ oindo ne siirtoot ne bo ng’ang’utik - si ma kitorora mising’, ko kigigona katet eng’ borto, ne otwoget ne bo Setani kobira, si ma kitorora mising’." 
2Corinthians12:8 Kiasom Kiptaiyat mising’ konyil somok agobo kiito, ale koistoenogei." 
2Corinthians12:9 Ak kilenja, Yamin mieindanyu: amu kiyaei kamugennyu koek ne igesunotgei eng’ nyalulet. Alosuge anyun eng’ boiboiyet mising’ kosiir amu nyalulnatosiekyuk, si kobiit kotebena kamugetab Kristo." 
2Corinthians12:10 Noto anyun, abaibai eng’ nyalulnatosiek, eng’ ng’woninwek, eng’ kagiigosiek, eng’ usisiosiek, eng’ tiritinwek, agobo Kristo: amu ye a nyalulat, ko yoto anyun ye a kim." 
2Corinthians12:11 Kaaberberitu: kiobirja; amu kota nyolu oloswa okwek: amu kima a bo let eng’ kiy age tugul eng’ che koiyoktoi che eechen kosiir, agot ngo ma a kiy." 
2Corinthians12:12 Iman kigiyae kwenung’wong’ kaborunoik che bo ne kiyoktoi eng’ muitaet tugul, eng’ kaborunoik ak kwong’utik ak boisionik che bo kamuktaet." 
2Corinthians12:13 Amu tos mi nee ne kiyaak oegu che nyerotin eng’ kanisosiek alak, kobate kima aegu nyigisin eng’ okwek? Onyoiywa kaat lelutionito." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ogeero, nito ko ne bo somok achoboksei ale anyonjok; ak manyone aegu nyigisindo eng’ okwek: amu macheng’e tugukwok, ago okweget: amu manyoljin lagok kogonorji tuguk sigik, ago konorjin sigik lagok." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ak abaibai mising’ aboisie chechuk ak keboisena agobo sobonwekwok. Ngot achamok mising’ kosiir, ko tos kichama kitigin?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ago ngo u noto, ko kima agonok nyigisindo; ago atinye ng’omnatet, ak kianamak eng’ mestet." 
2Corinthians12:17 Tos kiaibenok kiy eng’ chi age tugul eng’ icheget che kiayokwok? 
2Corinthians12:18 Kiatechi Tito, ak kiayokte ne kitupche koba tuwai. Tos kiibenok Tito kiy? Kima kebendoti eng’ Tamirmirionoto agenge? Tos ma eng’ tiegutik che kergei?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Obwati agoi nguno olen kisoruge eng’ taing’wong’. Eng’ taitab Jehovah keng’alali eng’ Kristo. Ago tuguk tugul, ko si keteechak, chamanichu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Amu aiywei, ale si ye anyo, ko manyoruok eng’ or age tugul ko u ye mamache, ak onyorua ko u ye momache; si mabiit eng’ or age tugul, boriosiek, ng’etkonda, neregek, suriosiek, ng’aksosiek, chaamsosiek, menotosiek, bolatosiek;" 
2Corinthians12:21 si ye tun anyo kogeny, ko maiming’ina Jehovah nenyu eng’ taing’wong’, ak arir agobo che chang’ eng’ ichek che kiyai tengekwogik koboch yoto, ama sik eng’ simdo ak sokset ak maget ne ya agobo tuguk che yaach che kiyai ichek." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ni ko ne bo somok anyonjinok. Kigimiti ng’olyot age tugul eng’ kutuswekab baorinik aeng’ anan ko somok. 
2Corinthians13:2 Kiasib amwa, ak asib amwae kogeny, ko u ye kiami eng’ banda ne bo aeng’, ko u noto nguno ye mami kobotok, eng’ icheget che kiyai tengekto, koboch yoto, ak eng’ chun alak tugul, ale, si ma ye anyo kogeny, ko marirege;" 
2Corinthians13:3 amu ocheng’e kaborunetab Kristo ne ng’alali eng’ ane; ne ma nyalulat eng’ okwek, ago tinyei kimnatet eng’ okwek:" 
2Corinthians13:4 amu kigigartat eng’ nyalulet, ago sobei eng’ kamuktaetab Jehovah. Amu ki nyalulyotin ak achek eng’ inendet, ago kisoptosi koboto inendet eng’ kamuktaetab Jehovah agobo okwek." 
2Corinthians13:5 Osiaige okwege, ngomi eng’ kayanet; otiemge okwege. Anan mongen okwege ole mitei Jesu Kristo eng’ okwek? Iyois ko o esiootin iman." 
2Corinthians13:6 Ago amang’u ale ongen ole ma ki esiootin.
