2Corinthians13:7 Kisae Jehovah anyun si moyai yaitio age tugul; ma si ketoogu kele kigiyanech, ago si kobiit oyai noto mie, agot nganda ko u che kiesioi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Amu magimuchi keyai kiy ne kirindoi imanit, ago ne toreti imanit." 
2Corinthians13:9 Amu ki boiboen ye ki nyalulyotin, ago o kimen: kisae agobo nito agine, kele oegu che igesunotgei." 
2Corinthians13:10 Amu noto anyun, asire tuguchu ko ma ami, si ma ye tun ami ko maboisie koromnatet, ko u ole te bounatet ne kigona Kiptaiyat agobo teekset, ma agobo butet." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ne bo let anyun, che kitupche, ko saisere. Oegu che chobotin; oegu che bo kagaigaet; oegu che bo kabwatet agenge; otebi eng’ kalyet: ak mi Jehovah ne bo chamnyet ak kalyet kobotok." 
2Corinthians13:12 Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil. 
2Corinthians13:13 Igatok bik tugul che tililen. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ingotebi ak okwek tugul mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, ak chamnyetab Jehovah, ak yamdaetab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
Galatians1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi (ma ne bo bik, ama kiyok eng’ chi, ago eng’ Jesu Kristo, ak Jehovah Kwanda, ne kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek)," 
Galatians1:2 ak tupchosiek tugul che mi kobota, kisirjini kanisosiek che bo Galatia:" 
Galatians1:3 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet ne bunu Jehovah Kwanda, ak Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo," 
Galatians1:4 ne kiigoitogei agobo tengekwogikyok, si kobiit kosoruech eng’ betusiechu yaachen, ko u magetab Jehovah nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo:" 
Galatians1:5 nenyi torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Akwong’e amu oistoige ochoktoi eng’ inendet ne kiguurok eng’ mieindab Kristo, obe oldab logoiywek che miach che ter;" 
Galatians1:7 che ma ter: kobate mi alage che iimok, ak machei kowal logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Agot ngo achek, anan malaikaiyat ne bunu kipsengwet, ne tos amwok logoiywek alak tugul che miach che ter eng’ choto che kigeamwok, ko ingoek ne chubot inendet." 
Galatians1:9 Ko u ye kiga kemwa eng’ tai, amwae nguno kogeny ko u noto ale, ngot koamwok chi age tugul logoiywek alak tugul che miach che ter eng’ choto kiotaach, ko ingoek ne chubot inendet." 
Galatians1:10 Tos agoigoi nguno bik anan Jehovah? Anan acheng’e abaibai bik? Ngot ko ta aboiboi bik, ko ma a otwogetab Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Amu aboruok anyun, che kitupche, agobo logoiywek che miach che kiaamdoi, ale mabunu chi." 
Galatians1:12 Amu kima ataach eng’ chi, ama kineta, ago eng’ ng’ang’utietab Jesu Kristo." 
Galatians1:13 Amu kiogas agobo atebennyu eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto eng’ kayanetab Yahudik, ko u ye kiausausi kanisetab Jehovah kot kosiir, ak kiang’emang’emi:" 
Galatians1:14 ak kiatese tai eng’ kayanetab Yahudik kosiir siritoikyuk che chang’ eng’ bikab emennyu agiilige mising’ kosiir agobo bitonwekab kwanisiekyuk. 
Galatians1:15 Ago ye kingocham Jehovah, ne kiitabana, koboch moetab kamennyu, ak koguura eng’ mieindanyi," 
Galatians1:16 si kong’any Werinnyi eng’ ane, si kobiit aamda inendet eng’ Bororiosiek; kima king’alal anyun ak chi eng’ sainato:" 
Galatians1:17 ama atogoste Jerusalem ole mi ichek che kisib koek che kiyoktoi eng’ ane: ago kiawe Arabia; ak kiaweege agoi Damasko. 
Galatians1:18 Kingogesgei anyun kenyisiek somogu atogoste awe Jerusalem si aborjige Kepas, ak abeni oldanyi betusiek taman ak mut." 
Galatians1:19 Ago ma ageer alak eng’ che kiyoktoi, kobate Jakobo ne tupcho ak Kiptaiyat." 
Galatians1:20 Ara anyun, eng’ tuguk che asirwok, ogeero, eng’ taitab Jehovah ko mamwae lembech." 
Galatians1:21 Yeityo anyo korotinwekab Suria ak Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Ak kitom kogeera togoch kanisosiekab Judea che kimi eng’ Kristo: 
Galatians1:22 Ak kitom kogeera togoch kanisosiekab Judea che kimi eng’ Kristo: 
Galatians1:23 ago kigas kemwaei kityo kele, Inendet ne kiusech eng’ betusiek alak koamdoi nguno kayanonato king’emang’emi;" 
Galatians1:24 ak kiitoror ichek Jehovah eng’ ane. 
Galatians2:1 Kingobata anyun kenyisiek tamanu ak ang’wan atogoste kogeny awe Jerusalem koboto Barnaba, amuti Tito agine." 
Galatians2:2 Ak kiatogoste eng’ ng’ang’utiet; ak kiatetyi ichek logoiywek che miach che aamdooti eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek, ago eng’ ung’ot eng’ icheget che toogunotin, si maegu, eng’ or age tugul, ne alabati buch, anan ne kialabat buch." 
Galatians2:3 Ago ma kibirji Tito, ne Yunanindet, ne kimi kobota, kele kimuratan:" 
Galatians2:4 amu tupchosiek che bo lembech che kigimut kobwa orit eng’ ung’ot, che kimong’ eng’ ung’ot kosegei katiagennyo ne kitinye eng’ Kristo Jesu, si kobiit kondeech otwoknatet:" 
Galatians2:5 eng’ icheget che kima kigas it, agot eng’ sait agenge; si kobiit kotebi imanitab logoiywek che miach kobotok." 
Galatians2:6 Ago icheget che kigiiti kele toogunotin (ngo u ole teptoi ichek, ko ma kiy eng’ ane: matiytii Jehovah chi) - amwae ale, ma teswa kiy icheget cho toogunotin." 
Galatians2:7 Ago ye kingogeer ichek kole kigigona arib logoiywek che miach agobo icheget che magimuratani, ko u Petero agine eng’ che kimuratani" 
Galatians2:8 (amu inendet ne kiimuktochi Petero koek ne kiyoktoi eng’ che kimuratani, ko kiimuktawa agane ko u noto agobo Bororiosiek);" 
Galatians2:9 ak ye kingonai Jakobo ak Kepa ak Johana, icheget che kigiit kele tolochik, mieindo ne kigigona, kogona ak Barnaba eutab tai en bo yamdaet, si kobiit kebe oldab Bororiosiek, koba ichek oldab che kimuratani;" 
Galatians2:10 kobate kimakwech ichek kibwat kibananok; kioto ne kiating’e kagiiletab ge agane ale ayai. 
Galatians2:11 Ago ye kingonyo Kepa Antiokia, agirinde inendet kimni, amu kinyoljin inendet kiruoget." 
Galatians2:12 Amu ye kitom kobwa alage che kibunu gab Jakobo, ko kiamisiei ak Bororiosiek: ago ye kingobwa, koweektagei let kotabangei, koiywei icheget che bo kamuratanet." 
Galatians2:13 Ak kiiberberisiei Yahudik alage agichek koboto inendet; kot kotito Barnaba agine eng’ kaberberisienywa. 
Galatians2:14 Ago ye kingageer ale mabendoti eng’ lititindo ko u imanitab logoiywek che miach, amwachi Kepa eng’ tainywa tugul, alenji, Ngot ko inye, ne i Yahudiot, itebye ko u Bororiosiek, ak ma ko u Yahudik, ibirjindoi ano Bororiosiek koigei Yahudik?" 
Galatians2:15 Achek che ki Yahudik eng’ siget, ama ki kiptengeginik che bo Bororiosiek," 
Galatians2:16 ago kingen kele magiityin chi imanda eng’ boisionikab ng’atutik, ago eng’ kayanet eng’ Jesu Kristo, kigiyan agachek eng’ Kristo Jesu, si kobiit kiityech imanda eng’ kayanet eng’ Kristo, ama eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet: amu magiityin chi imanda eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet." 
Galatians2:17 Ago, ye kita kecheng’e kiityech imanda eng’ Kristo, kenyoruech ak achek kele ki kiptengeginik, tos Kristo ko kiboitiotab tengek? Achicha, ma u noto." 
Galatians2:18 Amu ngot ateech kogeny tuguchoto che kiga abut, ko kabartege ale a bistoindet." 
Galatians2:19 Amu ane, ko kiamechi Ng’atutiet eng’ Ng’atutiet, si kobiit asob eng’ Jehovah." 
Galatians2:20 Kigigartata koboto Kristo; ago asobe; ago ma ko ane, ago sobei Kristo eng’ ane: ak sobondo ne asobe nguno eng’ borto asobe eng’ kayanet ne mitei eng’ Weritab Jehovah, ne kichama, ak kiigoitogei agobo ane." 
Galatians2:21 Mawale mieindab Jehovah koek buch; amu nda bunu imanda Ng’atutiet, ko kime Kristo buch." 
Galatians3:1 Ee Galatiechu berberen, ng’o ne kibanak, okwek che kiginde Jesu Kristo taitab konyekwok kotook kele kigigartat?" 
Galatians3:2 Ni kityo ne amache anetenage, Kiotaach Tamirmiriet eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet, anan eng’ kaset ne bo kayanet?" 
Galatians3:3 Tos kaga o berberen ko u noto? Ngo kiotau eng’ Tamirmiriet, omache nguno oegu che ogesunotingei eng’ borto?" 
Galatians3:4 Tos kionyalilse eng’ tuguk che chang’ buch? Ngot ko buch iman. 
Galatians3:5 Tos inendet anyun ne konok Tamirmiriet, ak koyaei kwong’utik eng’ kwenung’wong’, ko tos yaei eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet, anan eng’ kaset ne bo kayanet?" 
Galatians3:6 Agot ko u ye kiiyan Abraham Jehovah, ak kigiityi inendet kobunji imanda." 
Galatians3:7 Ongen anyun ole icheget che bo kayanet, ko werikab Abraham choto." 
Galatians3:8 Ak kiisib kogeer sirutiet kole iityin Jehovah imanda Bororiosiek eng’ kayanet, ko kiisib koamji logoiywek che miach Abraham, kolenji, Kiberuri bororiosiek tugul eng’ inye." 
Galatians3:9 Noto anyun, kiberuri icheget che bo kayanet koboto Abraham ne iyanat." 
Galatians3:10 Amu tugul che mi eng’ boisionikab Ng’atutiet, komitei eng’ chubet: amu kigisir kele, Chubot chi age tugul ne matebyei eng’ tuguk tugul che kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutiet, kele koyai choto." 
Galatians3:11 Toogu anyun kele, mami chi ne kiityin imanda eng’ Ng’atutiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: amu, Sobei ne bo imanda eng’ kayanet;" 
Galatians3:12 ak ma bo Ng’atutiet kayanet; ago, Inendet ne yaei choto kosobei eng’ choto." 
Galatians3:13 Kiitiachech Kristo eng’ chubisietab Ng’atutiet ye kiek inendet chubet agobo achek: amu kigisir kele, Chubot chi age tugul ne kisonginini eng’ ketit:" 
Galatians3:14 si kobiit konyonji Bororiosiek kaberuretab Abraham eng’ Kristo Jesu; si kobiit ketaach arorutietab Tamirmiriet eng’ kayanet. 
Galatians3:15 Che kitupche, amwae ko u biteetab chi: Agot ngo arorutietab chi noto, ko ye kagigimit, ko mami chi ne walei koek buch, anan kotesyi." 
Galatians3:16 Kigimwachi anyun Abraham arorutichoto, ak keswondennyi. Mamwaei kole, Igochin keswekyik, ko u ye kachang’a; ago ko u agenge, kole, Ak eng’ keswondeng’ung’, noto ko Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Amwae ni anyun ale; Kayomiset ne kisib kogimit Jehovah, noto Ng’atutiet ne kinyonei ko kagobata kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak sosom, ko mawalei koek buch, kele, si koyai arorutiet koek ne matilei kiy." 
Galatians3:18 Amu ngo bunu borotet Ng’atutiet, ko ma ko bo arorutiet anyun: ago kiigochi Jehovah Abraham eng’ arorutiet." 
Galatians3:19 Nee anyun Ng’atutiet? Kigites amu bistautik, agoi koit keswot oldab inendet ne kiga kichopchi arorutionoto; ak kiging’at eng’ malakaisiek eng’ eutab katuiyoindet." 
Galatians3:20 Katuiyoindet anyun ko ma bo agenge; ago Jehovah ko agenge. 
Galatians3:21 Tos kirindoi Ng’atutiet arorutikab Jehovah? Achicha, ma u noto: amu nda kiga kigon Ng’atutiet ne imuchi kosoob, ta kibunjin imanda Ng’atutiet." 
Galatians3:22 Ago kigoratyi sirutiet tuguk tugul kimnatetab tengekto, si kobiit kigochi che iyani, arorutiet eng’ kayanet eng’ Jesu Kristo." 
Galatians3:23 Ago ye kitomo konyo kayanet, ko kigiribech eng’ Ng’atutiet. Kiga kiratech agoi koit kayanet ne kitun keng’any eng’ let." 
Galatians3:24 Kiek anyun Ng’atutiet konetindennyo ne imutyinech Kristo, si kobiit kiityech imanda eng’ kayanet." 
Galatians3:25 Ago nguno anyun, ko kagonyo kayanet, ko ma koboiywech konetindet." 
Galatians3:26 Amu okwek tugul ko o werikab Jehovah, eng’ kayanet, eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Galatians3:27 Amu che te eng’ okwek che kigibatisanjok Kristo ko kiolaach Kristo. 
Galatians3:28 Ma imugaksei kele mi Yahudiot anan Yunanindet, ama mi otwogindet anan ne itiagat, ama mi ne muren anan ne tie: amu okwek tugul ko o agenge eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Ak ngot o bo Kristo, ko o keswekab Abraham anyun che namei tuguk ko u eng’ arorutiet." 
Galatians4:1 Ago amwae ale ye ta ko lakwa inendet ne tun namei tuguk, ko materjin inendet ak otwogin, agot nganda inendet ko kiptaiyatab tugul;" 
Galatians4:2 ago mi eng’ eutab ng’atik ak ribik agoi koit betut ne king’atyi kwanda. 
Galatians4:3 Ki u noto ak achek, kingota ko ki lagok, ko kigi ratotin eng’ konetisiosiek che bo tai che bo ng’ony:" 
Galatians4:4 ago ye kingoit betut ne kiyamgei, koyok Jehovah Werinnyi, ne kisich kobogoriot, kosich eng’ Ng’atutiet," 
Galatians4:5 si kobiit kotiach ichek che kimi eng’ Ng’atutiet, si kobiit keyaech keegu werik." 
Galatians4:6 Ak amu o werik, ko kiiyokyi Jehovah Tamirmirietab Werinnyi mugulelwekyok, ne rirei, kole, Aba, Kwanda." 
Galatians4:7 Eng’ noto anyun ma ko i otwogindet kogeny, ago i werit; ak ngo i werit ko i namindet ne bo tuguk eng’ Jehovah." 
Galatians4:8 Ago eng’ betunoto, kima ongen Jehovah, ko kio otwogikab icheget che kima ko cheptalelisiek che ma bo iman:" 
Galatians4:9 ago nguno ko kaonai Jehovah, anan ko kagonaak okwek Jehovah, amu nee anyun si oweektege let kogeny oweekyige konetisiosiek che bo tai che nyalulyotin ak che bo bananda, eng’ choto omache oweekyige otwoknatenywa kogeny?" 
Galatians4:10 Oribe betusiek, ak arawek, ak ole teptoi betusiekab kenyit, ak kenyisiek." 
Galatians4:11 Aiyweisiei agobo okwek, si maegu ne kiabirtege buch eng’ or age tugul agobo okwek." 
Galatians4:12 Asomok mising’, che kitupche, ale otebi ko u ane, amu ane a u okwek. Kima oyaiywa ne ya:" 
Galatians4:13 ago ongen ole kiaamwok logoiywek che miach eng’ tai, amu nyalulnatetab borto:" 
Galatians4:14 ak kima osas yomset ne kiotinye agobo bortanyu, ama oesie; ago kiotaacha ko u malaikaiyatab Jehovah, ko u Kristo Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Mi ano anyun boiboiyonotong’wong’? Amu abaorianjinok, ale, nda kiimugaksei, ta kiobalu konyekwok ak ogona." 
Galatians4:16 Ara anyun tos kaaegu bunyondeng’wong’, amu kamwawok ne bo iman?" 
Galatians4:17 Igiiljinogei kocheng’ok eng’ oret ne ma mie: ee, machei kole kogerjok sang’, si kobiit ocheng’ ichek." 
Galatians4:18 Ago mie oegu che kicheng’ok eng’ kagiiletab ge betusiek tugul agobo kit ne mie, ak ma ye ami kobotok kityo." 
Galatians4:19 Lagokyuk che mengech, che anyorunenok ng’wanindo ne bo siget kogeny agoi koyaak Kristo eng’ okwek," 
Galatians4:20 ee, katamache ale nda kami kobotok nguno, ak awal kutinnyu; amu aiimige agobo okwek." 
Galatians4:21 Omwawa, okwek che omache otebe bounatetab ng’atutik, tos mogase Ng’atutiet?" 
Galatians4:22 Amu kigisir kele, Kitinyei Abraham werik aeng’, age eng’ chepto ne otwogin, ak age eng’ kobogoriot ne itiagat." 
Galatians4:23 Ago kigisich eng’ borto inendet ne bo chepto ne otwogin; ago kigisich eng’ arorutiet inendet ne bo kobogoriot ne itiagat. 
Galatians4:24 Tuguchuto ko kalewenet: amu chuto ko arorutik aeng’; kibunu age tulwetab Sinai, ne sichei lagok eng’ otwognatet, noto ko Hagar." 
Galatians4:25 Ak Hagar nito ko tulwetab Sinai eng’ Arabia, ak iboru Jerusalem ne bo nguno: amu mi eng’ otwognatet koboto lagokyik." 
Galatians4:26 Ago Jerusalem ne mi barak kotiagat, ne noto ko kamennyo." 
Galatians4:27 Amu kigisir kele, Baibaitu, inye ne i son ne meyie; Yaas ak iwaach, inye ne megase ng’wanindab sigisiet: Amu chang’ lagokab inendet ne mi inegei kosiir che bo inendet ne tinyei manong’otiot." 
Galatians4:28 Achek anyun, che kitupche, ko ki lagokab arorutiet, ko u Isak." 
Galatians4:29 Ago anyun, ko u inendet ne kigisich eng’ borto, ko kius inendet ne kigisich eng’ Tamirmiriet ko u noto anyun agot nguno." 
Galatians4:30 Ago mwaei nee sirutik? On kobogoriondoni otwogin ak werinnyi: amu manamei tuguk weritab kobogoriot ne otwogin koboto weritab kobogoriot ne itiagat. 
Galatians4:31 Noto anyun, che kitupche, ma ki lagokab kobogoriot ne otwogin, ago ki bo kobogoriot ne itiagat." 
Galatians5:1 Kiitiachech Kristo eng’ katiaget; otononse komie anyun, amatata keratak kogeny eng’ chogitab otwoknatet." 
Galatians5:2 Ogeero, amwawok ane Paulo, ale, ngimuratanak, ko motinye keluno eng’ Kristo." 
Galatians5:3 Ee, abaorianjini kogeny chi age tugul ne kimuratani, ale, kiyaachei inendet koyai Ng’atutiet komugul." 
Galatians5:4 Kaotoiye ak Kristo, okwek che omache kiityok imanda eng’ Ng’atutiet; kaobutye eng’ mieindo." 
Galatians5:5 Amu kigeni kamang’unet ne bo imanda eng’ Tamirmiriet eng’ kayanet. 
Galatians5:6 Amu eng’ Kristo Jesu ko matilei kiy kamuratanet, anan ngo ma kimuratan; ago kayanet ne boisiei eng’ chamnyet." 
Galatians5:7 Kioruae komie; ng’o ne koranyak si mogas it imanit? 
Galatians5:8 Mabunu kagaigaoni inendet ne kiguurok. 
Galatians5:9 Igutu mermerek tutigin kererutiet komugul. 
Galatians5:10 Atinye kamang’unet eng’ okwek eng’ Kiptaiyat, ale amoegu che tinyei kabwatutik che ter: ago inendet ne inyalilok konyoru kiruogennyi, agot ngo ng’o." 
Galatians5:11 Ago ane anyun, che kitupche, ngot ko ta aamdooti kamuratanet, ko kalya si ko ta keusausa? Ko kaga kigeisto anyun kanagutietab kimurtoiyot." 
Galatians5:12 Katamache anyun ale koistogei icheget che iluiluchok. 
Galatians5:13 Amu okwek che kitupche, ko kigiguurjok katiaget; ago moboisie katiageng’wong’ koek boroindo ne bo borto, ago oboisiechige okwege eng’ okwege eng’ chamnyet." 
Galatians5:14 Amu isuldoi Ng’atutik tugul eng’ ng’olyot agenge, noto ko ni; Cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ole ichamdoige." 
Galatians5:15 Ago ngot osusege ak oamege okwege, oripge si morumge." 
Galatians5:16 Amu amwae anyun ale, Obendoti eng’ Tamirmiriet, si moyai magetab borto." 
Galatians5:17 Amu machei borto mising’ kogirinda Tamirmiriet, ak machei Tamirmiriet kogirinda borto; amu kirindogei chuto tuwai; si moyai tuguk che omache." 
Galatians5:18 Ago ngondoiywok Tamirmiriet, ko momite bounatetab Ng’atutiet." 
Galatians5:19 Toogunotin anyun boisionik che bo borto, choto ko chu: sokset, simdo, maget ne ya agobo tuguk che yaach," 
Galatians5:20 saetab kanamonik, bonisiet, bunyondisiek, suriosiek, ng’etkonda, nereknatosiek, toiyosiek, kabesiosiek, pcheutik," 
Galatians5:21 kong’ ne ya, bogitosiek, keiyandisiek, ak alak che u choto: kasib ateeywok agobo chu, ko u ye kisib ateeywok, ale icheget che yaei tuguk che u chuto ko manyoru bounatetab Jehovah." 
Galatians5:22 Ago logoiyotab Tamirmiriet ko chamnyet, boiboiyet, kalyet, muitaet, talasiet, mieindo, atepto ne kiyani," 
Galatians5:23 kaming’inetab ge, ribetab ge: mami ng’atutiet ne esioi chuto." 
Galatians5:24 Ak icheget che bo Kristo Jesu ko kigogartat borto koboto magutikyik ak kasetab miat che bo choto. 
Galatians5:25 Ngot kesoptosi eng’ Tamirmiriet, ko ongebendoti anyun eng’ Tamirmiriet." 
Galatians5:26 Among’ kilosuge buch, among’ ketachatachge, among’ koamjechge ng’etkong’." 
Galatians6:1 Che kitupche, agot ngenyorji chi lelutiet, ko okwek che o bo Tamirmiriet, oweegu chito ne u noto eng’ tamirmiriet ne bo mutyonet; ak iripge, si ma kiyomin aginye." 
Galatians6:2 Otoretge eng’ nyalilwogik, oyae kosulda ng’atutikab Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Amu ngot kobwategei chi kole a kiy, ago kaga ma kiy, koberberegei inegei." 
Galatians6:4 Ago ingotiem chi age tugul boisiennyi, si konyor anyun kit ne ilosunegei inegei, ak ma eng’ chito age." 
Galatians6:5 Amu laei chi tugul milennyi inegei. 
Galatians6:6 Ago ingoyamda tuguk tugul che miachen inendet ne kineti ng’olyot, ak inendet ne inetisiei." 
Galatians6:7 Amat kegenak; magigengenie Jehovah; amu kit age tugul ne kolei chi, kotun kesei noto agine." 
Galatians6:8 Amu inendet ne koljin bortanyi kotun kesei eng’ borto ng’emisiet; ago inendet ne koljin Tamirmiriet kotun kesei eng’ Tamirmiriet sobondo ne bo koigeny. 
Galatians6:9 Among’ keng’etye ye kiyae boisionik che miach: amu tun kigese ko kait betunnyi ngo magitanuise. 
Galatians6:10 Noto anyun, ko u ye kitinye boroindo, ko ongeyachi bik tugul ne mie, ago ne siirei ko icheget che bo gotab kayanet." 
Galatians6:11 Ogeer anyun sirutik che eechen che kaasirunenak eng’ eunnyu anege. 
Galatians6:12 Tugul che te che machei telunatet eng’ borto, kobirjinok kole kimuratanak; ago si magiusaus ichek agobo kimurtoiyotab Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 Agot icheget che kimuratani, ko maribei Ng’atutiet; ago machei kole kimuratanak, si kolosunegei borwekwok." 
Galatians6:14 Ago ingolooit eng’ ane alosge, kobate eng’ kimurtoiyot ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ne eng’ noto ko kigigartat ng’ony agobo ane, ak ane agobo ng’ony." 
Galatians6:15 Amu ma kiy kamuratanet, anan ngo ma kimuratan, ago yautiet ne leel." 
Galatians6:16 Ak ingotebe kalyet ichek tugul che bendoti eng’ ng’atutioni, ak rirenetab ge, ak eng’ Israel ne bo Jehovah." 
Galatians6:17 Koboch nguno ko matata konyalila chi: amu aiboti eng’ bortanyu berutikab Jesu. 
Galatians6:18 Che kitupche, ingoteb koboto tamirmirikwok mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Kristo Jesu eng’ magetab Jehovah, asirjini bik che tililen [che mi Epeso], koboto che bo kayanet eng’ Kristo Jesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
Ephesians1:3 Iberurot Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, inendet ne kigoberurech eng’ kaberuret age tugul ne bo tamirmiriet eng’ komoswekab kipsengwet eng’ Kristo:" 
Ephesians1:4 ko u ye kilewenech eng’ inendet ye kitom kelumda ng’ony, si keegu che tililen che matinyei lelut eng’ tainnyi eng’ chamnyet:" 
Ephesians1:5 ko u ye kiga sib kolewenech kenamech keegu werik eng’ Jesu Kristo eng’ inendet, ko u chamet ne mie ne bo magennyi," 
Ephesians1:6 agoi kalosunetab torornatetab mieindanyi, ne kigonech eng’ aiyebindo eng’ Chamanet:" 
Ephesians1:7 ne kitinye eng’ inendet katiagennyo eng’ korotikyik, nyoetab kaat ne bo chalwogikyok, ko u magornatosiekab mieindanyi," 
Ephesians1:8 che kiyai kotesak eng’ achek eng’ ng’omnatet tugul ak naet," 
Ephesians1:9 ko kagoboruech ung’otiet ne bo magennyi, ko u chamennyi ne mie ne kichob eng’ inendet" 
Ephesians1:10 agoi tononjinet ne bo ripsetab betusiek che yamegei, si koyum tuguk tugul eng’ Kristo, tuguk che mi kipsengwet, ak tuguk che mi ng’ony; eng’ inendet," 
Ephesians1:11 ne kiyaech eng’ inendet keegu borotennyi, ko kasib kolewenech, ko u magetab inendet ne yaei tuguk tugul ko u kabwatetab magennyi;" 
Ephesians1:12 si kobiit keegu kalosunetab torornatennyi, achek che kiga kisib kimang’u Kristo." 
Ephesians1:13 Kiogas ak okwek eng’ inendet ng’olyotab imanit, logoiywek che miach che bo yetuneng’wong’ - eng’ inendet, ne kingo kaoyan, ko kiging’ochak eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne bo arorutiet," 
Ephesians1:14 ne tongoaniatab borotennyo, agoi katiagetab borotennyi, eng’ kalosunetab torornatennyi." 
Ephesians1:15 Amu nito anyun, kingo kaagas agobo kayanet ne mi kwenung’wong’, eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu, ak chamnyet eng’ tugul che tililen," 
Ephesians1:16 ko mata asis agoito kongoi agobo okwek, ak amwaok eng’ sautikyuk;" 
Ephesians1:17 ale ingogonok Jehovah ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, Kwanda ne bo torornatet, tamirmiriet ne bo ng’omnatet ak ng’ang’utiet eng’ naetab inendet;" 
Ephesians1:18 ko kagokweng’ogis konyekab mugulelwekwok, si kobiit onai kit ne u kamang’unetab kuursennyi, ak magornatosiekab torornatet ne bo borotennyi eng’ che tililen," 
Ephesians1:19 ak kit ne u oindo ne siirtoot ne bo kamuktaennyi eng’ achek che kiyani, ko u boisionoto bo kimnatetab kamuktaennyi" 
Ephesians1:20 ne kiyai eng’ Kristo, ye kingong’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek, ak konde inendet kotebe eunnyi ne bo tai eng’ komoswekab kipsengwet;" 
Ephesians1:21 ne toror kosiir laitornatet tugul, ak bounatet, ak kamuktaet, ak kiptainatet, ak kainet age tugul ne mwaat, ma kityo eng’ kenyisiechu, ago eng’ choto bwanei:" 
Ephesians1:22 ak kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyik, ak kogochi inendet koek metit eng’ tuguk tugul eng’ kaniset," 
Ephesians1:23 noto ko bortanyi, nyiietab inendet ne inyiiti tugul eng’ tugul." 
Ephesians2:1 Ak kigosobok okwek, ye kio begunotin eng’ yaitwogikwok ak tengekwogikwok," 
Ephesians2:2 che kiobendote ye kinye ko u biteetab ng’onyuni, osubi ne o ne bo kimnatet ne bo soet, ne bo tamirmiriet ne boisiei nguno eng’ werikab ngelelnatet;" 
Ephesians2:3 che kigimenye agot achek tugul kwenunywa eng’ magutik che yaach che bo borto, keyae magutik che bo borto ak che bo kabwatutik, ak kigi lagokab nereknatet, eng’ siget, ko u alak:" 
Ephesians2:4 ago Jehovah, ne magoriot eng’ rirenetab ge, eng’ chamnyennyi ne o ne kichamenech," 
Ephesians2:5 agot ye kigi begunotin eng’ yaitwogikyok, ko kiisoobech koboto Kristo (kigesoruok eng’ mieindo)," 
Ephesians2:6 ak kiing’eetech koboto inendet, ak kigonech ketebi koboto inendet eng’ komoswekab kipsengwet, eng’ Kristo Jesu:" 
Ephesians2:7 si kobiit kobarta eng’ kenyisiek che bwanei magornatosiek che siirtoot che bo mieindanyi eng’ talasiet ne tokyineigei eng’ Kristo Jesu: 
Ephesians2:8 amu kigesoruok eng’ mieindo eng’ kayanet; ago mabunwok nito: konunetab Jehovah; 
Ephesians2:9 ama bo boisionik, si mailosgei chi." 
Ephesians2:10 Amu ki boisiennyi achek, ne kigiyaech eng’ Kristo Jesu agobo boisionik che miachen, che kisib kochob Jehovah si kebendate ichek." 
Ephesians2:11 Noto anyun obwat, ole okwek, che kio Bororiosiek eng’ borto atkinye, che kiguurenok che Ma Kimuratan eng’ ichek che kiguure Kamuratanet, eng’ borto, ne kigiyae eunek;" 
Ephesians2:12 ole kiomi taban eng’ Kristo eng’ betusiechoto, che kio kipsagarek eng’ bororietab Israel, ak ki o toek eng’ kayomisutik che bo arorutiet, kima otinye kamang’unet ak kima otinye Jehovah eng’ ng’onyuni." 
Ephesians2:13 Ago nguno eng’ Kristo Jesu okwek che kio looen eng’ betusiek alak, ko kagegonok origu eng’ korotikab Kristo." 
Ephesians2:14 Amu inendet ko kalyennyo, ne kiyai tuwai koek agenge, ne kibut totetab kwen ne bo kaoiyet," 
Ephesians2:15 ko kagowong’ eng’ bortanyi bunyondit, ng’atutietab ng’atutik ne mitei eng’ kayomisutik; si kobiit kotoi koyai eng’ inendet choto aeng’ koek chito agenge ne leel koyai kalyet;" 
Ephesians2:16 ak kotuiyo ichek tuwai eng’ borto agenge ak Jehovah eng’ kimurtoiyot, ko kagobar bunyondit eng’ noto." 
Ephesians2:17 Ak kinyo koamwok kalyet okwek che kio looen, ak kalyet eng’ ichek che ki negiten:" 
Ephesians2:18 amu kinyoru achek tuwai eng’ inendet orennyo eng’ Tamirmiriet agenge, ne kiite ole mi Kwanda." 
Ephesians2:19 Noto anyun ma ko o toek ak bunotik ago o bikab nganaset agenge ak che tililen, ak che bo gotab Jehovah." 
Ephesians2:20 Kigeteechak eng’ lumdaetab che kiyoktoi ak maotik, Kristo Jesu inendet ko koita ne o ne bo luita;" 
Ephesians2:21 ne kituiyechin teekset age tugul ne kiginamnyo koek agenge, koeet koek hekalut ne tilil eng’ Kiptaiyat;" 
Ephesians2:22 kigiteechak ak okwek oegu agenge eng’ inendet, ole menyei Jehovah eng’ Tamirmiriet." 
Ephesians3:1 Amu nito ane Paulo, kimonjororiotab Kristo Jesu agobo okwek Bororiosiek," 
Ephesians3:2 ngo kiogas agobo tononjinetab mieindab Jehovah ne kigigona agobo okwek; 
Ephesians3:3 ko u ye kigiborua eng’ ng’ang’utiet ung’otiet, ko u ye kiasib asir eng’ tai eng’ ng’alek che ng’ering’," 
Ephesians3:4 si, ye osomani, omuchi oguiye ng’omnatennyu eng’ ung’otietab Kristo;" 
Ephesians3:5 ne kima kiborji werikab bik eng’ ibinwek alak ko u ye kageng’ang’ji nguno che kiyoktoi chechik che tililen ak maotik eng’ Tamirmiriet; 
Ephesians3:6 kele, Bororiosiek ko yamdoikab nametab tuguk, ak yamdoikab kebeberwekab borto, ak yamdoikab arorutiet eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ logoiywek che miach," 
Ephesians3:7 che kigiyaena aek kiboitiot, ko u konunetab mieinoto bo Jehovah ne kigigona ko u ye boisiei kamuktaennyi." 
Ephesians3:8 Kigigona mieini, ane, ne a ming’in kosiir inendet ne ming’in eng’ che tililen tugul: aamji Bororiosiek magornatosiekab Kristo che maisiagaksei;" 
Ephesians3:9 ak kiguiyechi bik tugul kit ne u tononjinetab ung’otiet ne kiga kiuny koboch kenyisiek che kigosiirto, eng’ Jehovah, ne kitoi koyai tuguk tugul;" 
Ephesians3:10 si kobiit konaak eng’ kaniset nguno ng’omnatet ne o ne bo Jehovah eng’ laitornatosiek ak bounatosiek eng’ komoswekab kipsengwet," 
Ephesians3:11 ko u magetab koigeny ne kisib kolewen eng’ Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo: 
Ephesians3:12 kitinye eng’ inendet nyiganatet ak kamang’unet ne kirikyine inendet amu kiyani inendet. 
Ephesians3:13 Eng’ noto anyun asomok ale amat komeak mugulel amu nyalilwogikyuk agobo okwek, choto ko torornateng’wong’." 
Ephesians3:14 Amu nito anyun agutung’jini Kwanda," 
Ephesians3:15 ne nyorune inendet kainenywa oret age tugul ne bo gab chi, eng’ kipsengwet ak ng’ony," 
Ephesians3:16 si kobiit kogonok, ko u magornatosiekab torornatennyi, ogimegitu eng’ kamuktaet eng’ Tamirmiriennyi eng’ chito ne bo orit;" 
Ephesians3:17 si kobiit komeny Kristo mugulelwekwok eng’ kayanet; si kobiit, ye otinye tigitik ak lumdaet eng’ chamnyet," 
Ephesians3:18 onyoru kimnatet oguiye koboto tugul che tililen ole te tebeesindo ak koindo ak tororindo ak loindo ne wendi ng’ony," 
Ephesians3:19 ak onai chamnyetab Kristo ne siirei naet, si kobiit kinyiitak nyiiet tugul ne bo Jehovah." 
Ephesians3:20 Ingobunji anyun inendet ne imuchi koyai mising’ inne kosiir tugul che kisome anan che kibwati ko u kamuktaet ne boisiei eng’ achek," 
Ephesians3:21 torornatet eng’ kaniset ak eng’ Kristo Jesu agoi ibinwek tugul che bo koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Noto anyun, ane ne a kimonjororiot eng’ Kiptaiyat, asomok mising’ ale obendate ko u ye nyoljin kuurset ne kigeguurok," 
Ephesians4:2 eng’ kaming’inetab ge tugul ak mutyonet, koboto muitaet, omuitochinige eng’ chamnyet;" 
Ephesians4:3 ogiilige oribe yamdaet ne bo Tamirmiriet eng’ ratutietab kalyet. 
Ephesians4:4 Agenge borto, ak agenge Tamirmiriet, ko u ye kigeguurok eng’ kamang’unet agenge ne bo kuurseng’wong’;" 
Ephesians4:5 Kiptaiyat agenge, kayanet agenge, kabatisanet agenge," 
Ephesians4:6 Jehovah agenge ne Kwandab tugul, ne bou tugul, ak koyamu tugul, ak komi eng’ tugul." 
Ephesians4:7 Ago kigigochi age tugul eng’ achek mieindo ko u kakwaet ne bo konunetab Kristo. 
Ephesians4:8 Mwaei eng’ noto anyun kole, Kingotogosta barak, komut luulenik che kigoluul, Ak kogochi bik kagochinoik." 
Ephesians4:9 (Noto anyun, ng’olyondonito mwaei kole, Kitogosta, ko nee anyun kobate kele kichortagei agine kwo komoswekab ng’ony orit mising’?" 
Ephesians4:10 Inendet ne kichortagei ko inendet ne kitogosta barak mising’ kosiir kipsengwetisiek tugul, si kobiit konyiit tuguk tugul.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Ak kiigochi alak koek che kiyoktoi: ak alak, maotik; ak alak, che mwaitooti logoiywek che miach; ak alak, mestowek ak ko konetik;" 
Ephesians4:12 si koyai che tililen koek che igesunotingei, agobo boisietab otisiet, agobo teeksetab bortab Kristo:" 
Ephesians4:13 agoi keit achek tugul yamdaetab kayanet, ak naetab Weritab Jehovah, agoi keegu chito ne bekyinot, agoi kakwaet ne bo etunatetab nyiietab Kristo:" 
Ephesians4:14 si mata keegu lagok, che kitoortoi koba komosi ak komosi ak kiiboti eng’ usonet age tugul ne bo konetisiet, eng’ ng’alsetab bik, eng’ ng’omkong’natet, eng’ kaberberisiosiekab lelutiet;" 
Ephesians4:15 ago king’alali che bo iman eng’ chamnyet, si keegitu eng’ tuguk tugul eng’ inendet, inendet ne metit, noto ko Kristo;" 
Ephesians4:16 eng’ inendet keropchindos ak kituitos borto tugul, eng’ noto ne konu kebeberta age tugul, ko u kakwautietab boisiet ne bo kebeberta age tugul, si kotes borto eng’ teekset ne teechegei inegei eng’ chamnyet." 
Ephesians4:17 Amwae anyun ni, ak abaoriani eng’ Kiptaiyat, ale si mata obendate ko u ye bendoti Bororiosiek agichek, eng’ kabwatutikwak che bo buch," 
Ephesians4:18 che imenen eng’ nautikwak, che kigiyai koek kipsagarek eng’ sobondab Jehovah, amu berberindo ne mi eng’ ichek, amu uuindab mugulelwekwak;" 
Ephesians4:19 che kiigochigei maget ne ya agobo tuguk che yaachen, amu kigobek kosoptos, si koyai simdo tugul eng’ keiyandit." 
Ephesians4:20 Ago kima onetge Kristo ko u noto; 
Ephesians4:21 ngo kiogas inendet, ak kiginetak eng’ inendet, ko u ye mi imanit eng’ Jesu:" 
Ephesians4:22 ale oregu chito ne bo keny, noto atebeng’wong’ ne bo atkinye, ne ng’emaksei ko u magutik che yaach che bo kenisiet;" 
Ephesians4:23 asi owalage oleelagitu eng’ tamirmirietab nautikwok," 
Ephesians4:24 ak olaach chito ne leel, ne kigiyai eng’ Jehovah eng’ imanda ak tililindo ne bo iman." 
Ephesians4:25 Noto anyun oiste lembeita, ong’alaljinige ne bo iman chi tugul ak chitab kokwennyi: amu ki kebeberwek age tugul ne bo age." 
Ephesians4:26 Onerech, amoyai tengek: amat kororokto asis kota onerektosi:" 
Ephesians4:27 amat ogochi boroindo oindet. 
Ephesians4:28 Inendet ne kigochorso ko matata kochorso: ago kaigai kobois, koyai eng’ eunekyik noto mie, si kobiit kosich kit ne igochin inendet ne banani." 
Ephesians4:29 Amat komong’une ng’olyo age tugul ne ya kutuswekwok, ago noto ne mie ne imuchi koteekso, ko u ye nyolu, si kobiit kogochi mieindo icheget che kasei." 
Ephesians4:30 Ak amogochi arogenet Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne bo Jehovah ne kigindaenak ng’okset agoi betutab katiaget. 
Ephesians4:31 Ingoistogei eng’ okwek ng’wanindo tugul, ak nyitatet, ak neregek, ak bolatet, ak chubisiet, koboto yaitiet tugul:" 
Ephesians4:32 ak otebi eng’ talasiet okwege eng’ okwege, orirege, ak onyochinige kaat, ko u ye kinyoiywok kaat Jehovah agine eng’ Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Oegu anyun kasubikab Jehovah, ko u lagok che kichamei;" 
Ephesians5:2 ak obendate chamnyet, ko u ye kichamak Kristo agine, ak kogoitogei agobo achek, koek kagochinet ak tiseiywot eng’ Jehovah ne ng’uu ne nyamdut." 
Ephesians5:3 Ago ko u ye nyoljin bik che tililen ko mat ong’alale eng’ kwenung’wong’ sokset, ak simdo tugul, anan kasetab miat;" 
Ephesians5:4 anan tewernat, anan ng’alaletab abusnatet, anan roriot ne bo ng’alek che yaach, manyolu choto: ago kaigai kagoitoetab kongoi." 
Ephesians5:5 Amu ongen nito iman ole, mami chi ne soksei, anan chitab simdo, anan ne kasei miat, noto ne saei kanamonik, mami eng’ chu ne nyoru borotet eng’ bounatetab Kristo ak Jehovah." 
Ephesians5:6 Amat koberberak chi eng’ ng’alek che manamegei ak kiy: amu nyonjin nereknatet ne bo Jehovah werikab ngelelnatet amu tuguchuto. 
Ephesians5:7 Noto anyun, amoyai yamdaet agenge ak ichek;" 
Ephesians5:8 amu kio mesundeito eng’ betusiek alak, ago o lapkeiyet nguno eng’ Kiptaiyat: obendate ko u lagokab lapkeiyet" 
Ephesians5:9 (amu logoiyatab lapkeiyet ko eng’ mieindo tugul ak imanda ak imanit)," 
Ephesians5:10 si onai noto taachaksei eng’ Kiptaiyat; 
Ephesians5:11 amoyai yamdaet ak boisionikab mesundeito, che matinyei logoek, ago kaigai oger kong’;" 
Ephesians5:12 amu tuguk che yaei ichek eng’ ung’ot ko tewernat ngelen kemwa. 
Ephesians5:13 Ago tuguk tugul che kigere kong’ ko ng’ang’aksei eng’ lapkeiyet: amu kiy age tugul ne kibortoi ko lapkeiyet. 
Ephesians5:14 Noto anyun, mwaei inendet kole, Kosu, inye ne irue, ak ing’eet eng’ che kigobek, ak kokwenyin Kristo." 
Ephesians5:15 Oripge anyun mising’ eng’ ole oteptoi eng’ banwekwok, ma ko u che ma ng’omen, ago ko u che ng’omen;" 
Ephesians5:16 oboisie saisiek komie, amu yaachen betusiek." 
Ephesians5:17 Noto anyun amoberberitu, ago oguiye kit ne u magetab Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians5:18 Amat obogitye eng’ maiyek, che ibu maget ne ya, ago ingonyiiak Tamirmiriet;" 
Ephesians5:19 ong’alaljinige eng’ tienwogikab kalosunet ak tienwogik ak tienwogikab tamirmiriet, otieni tiendo ne rurei eng’ mugulelwekwok eng’ Kiptaiyat;" 
Ephesians5:20 ogoitoi kongoi kotugul agobo tuguk tugul eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ogochini Jehovah, inendet Kwanda;" 
Ephesians5:21 oming’injige ge eng’ kaiyweisietab Kristo. 
Ephesians5:22 Osotichu, ogas it manong’otaikwok, ko u ye ogase it Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians5:23 Amu manong’otiot ko metitab osotiot, ko u Kristo agine ne metitab kaniset, inendet yetindetab borto." 
Ephesians5:24 Ago ko u ye kase it kaniset Kristo, ko u noto agichek osotik eng’ manong’otaikwak eng’ kiy age tugul." 
Ephesians5:25 Manong’otaichu, ocham osotikwok, ko u Kristo agine ne kicham kaniset, ak kogoitogei agobo inendet;" 
Ephesians5:26 si kobiit kotaban, ko kagotilil eng’ kaunetab beek eng’ ng’olyot," 
Ephesians5:27 si kobiit komutyigei kaniset, noto ne bo torornatet, ne matinyei kunenden anan siring’ut anan kiy age tugul ne u noto; ago koek ne tilil ne matinyei tisia." 
Ephesians5:28 Ko u noto kanyolji manong’otaik agichek kocham osotikwak ko u ye chamei borwekwak ichegei. Inendet ne chamei osotiondennyi kochamegei inegei: 
Ephesians5:29 amu mami chi ne wechei bortanyi; ago baei ak koribei, ko u kit ne yachin Kristo agine kaniset;" 
Ephesians5:30 amu ki kebeberwek che bo bortanyi. 
Ephesians5:31 Amu ng’olyondoni, kobagaktoi chi kwandanyi ak kamet, ak konamgei ak osotiondennyi; ak koek icheget tuwai borto agenge." 
Ephesians5:32 O ung’otioni: ago ang’alali agobo Kristo ak kaniset. 
Ephesians5:33 Ago ingocham chi age tugul osotiondennyi, ko u ole chamdogei; ak ingogonyit osotiot manong’otiondennyi." 
Ephesians6:1 Lagochu, ogas it sigikwok eng’ Kiptaiyat: amu mie nito." 
Ephesians6:2 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet (nito ng’atutiet ne bo tai ne boto kayomiset)," 
Ephesians6:3 si kobiit komieit eng’ inye, si kota iwe keny eng’ ng’ony." 
Ephesians6:4 Ak okwek, kwanisiechu, amotachatachi lagokwok, si konerekso: ago obai ichek eng’ kotigonet ak kateunetab Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians6:5 Otwogichu, ogas it ichek che kiptainikwok eng’ borto, eng’ kaiyweisiet ak botanet, eng’ muguleldo tugul, ko u ye ogase it Kristo;" 
Ephesians6:6 ama eng’ otwognatet ne kigeerei, ko u che iboiboi bik; ago ko u otwogikab Kristo, oyae magetab Jehovah eng’ muguleldo;" 
Ephesians6:7 oyae boisiet eng’ chamnyet, ko u eng’ Kiptaiyat, ama eng’ bik:" 
Ephesians6:8 ongen ole kiy age tugul ne mie ne yaei chi age tugul, kotun taachei noto kogeny eng’ Kiptaiyat, ngo ratat anan ngotiagat." 
Ephesians6:9 Ak okwek kiptainichu, oyachi ichek ak okwek ko u noto, amorasyini: ongen ole mi kipsengwet Kiptaiyandenywa ak ko neng’wong’, ama mi eng’ inendet tiytiet ne bo bik." 
Ephesians6:10 Ne bo let anyun, oegu che kimen eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak eng’ kimnatetab kamugennyi." 
Ephesians6:11 Olaach karikab luget komugul che bo Jehovah, si kobiit omuch ogirinde kaberberisiosiekab oindet." 
Ephesians6:12 Amu ma bo kabelennyo bo ge borto ak korotik, ago bo laitornatosiek, ak kimnatosiek, eng’ bounikab ng’onyuni che bo mesundeito, eng’ lugosiekab tamirmirik che bo yaitiet eng’ komoswekab kipsengwet." 
Ephesians6:13 Noto anyun onam karikab luget komugul che bo Jehovah, si kobiit omuch ogirinde eng’ betut ne ya, ak ye kaoyai tugul, otononse." 
Ephesians6:14 Otononse anyun, ko kaogermen suenutikwok eng’ imanit, ak ko kaolaach karnetab teget ne bo imanda," 
Ephesians6:15 ak ko kaoratyi kelyekwok bekyinet ne bo logoiywek che miach che bo kalyet; 
Ephesians6:16 ak onam koboto chun tugul long’etab kayanet, ne omuchi omis kipchabonik tugul che bo mat che bo inendet ne ya." 
Ephesians6:17 Ak onam kutwetab yetunet, ak rotwetab chok ne bo Tamirmiriet, noto ng’olyotab Jehovah:" 
Ephesians6:18 Osa betusiek tugul eng’ Tamirmiriet koboto saet tugul ak kagaigaet, ak oripsei eng’ noto eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul ak kagaigaet, agobo tugul che tililen." 
Ephesians6:19 Ak agobo ane, si kobiit kegona twegunet, ayat kutinnyu, abarta eng’ nyiganatet ung’otiet ne bo logoiywek che miach," 
Ephesians6:20 amu a tononjinindet ne bo noto eng’ sirimwek; si kobiit ang’alal eng’ choto eng’ nyiganatet, ko u ye nyolu amwa." 
Ephesians6:21 Ago si kobiit onai ak okwek ng’alekyuk, ole ateptoi, komwawok tuguk tugul Tukiko, chamanet ne ketupche ne kiboitiot ne kiyani eng’ Kiptaiyat:" 
Ephesians6:22 ne koayokwok agobo ng’olyondonito, si kobiit onai ng’alekyok, ak kogaigai inendet mugulelwekwok." 
Ephesians6:23 Ingotebi kalyet koboto tupchosiek, ak chamnyet ak kayanet, che bo Jehovah Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo." 
Ephesians6:24 Ingoteb mieindo koboto ichek tugul che chamei Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo eng’ atepto ne ma ng’emaksei. 
Philippians1:1 Paulo ak Timoteo, otwogikab Kristo Jesu, kisirjini tugul che tililen eng’ Kristo Jesu che mitei Pilipi koboto ribikab kaniset ak kiboitinik:" 
Philippians1:2 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
Philippians1:3 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi agobo kabwatennyu tugul ne abwatok," 
Philippians1:4 eng’ somennyu age tugul agobo okwek tugul, asome eng’ somennyu eng’ boiboiyet kotugul," 
Philippians1:5 amu yamdaeng’wong’, eng’ logoiywek che miach koboch betut ne bo tai agoi betuni;" 
Philippians1:6 angen komie ng’olyondonito, ale inendet ne kitoi boisiet ne mie eng’ okwek koyaei kosulda agoi betutab Jesu Kristo:" 
Philippians1:7 ko u ye mie eng’ ane abwat ko u nito agobo okwek tugul, amu omi muguleldanyu, amu eng’ monjorornatennyu, ak eng’ ripset ak kagimitetab logoiywek che miach, okwek tugul ko o yamdoik kobota eng’ mieindo." 
Philippians1:8 Amu Jehovah baoriandennyu, ko u ye ating’enok okwek tugul emosto eng’ rirenosiekab Kristo Jesu." 
Philippians1:9 Ak ni ko saennyu ale kotesak chamnyeng’wong’ mising’ inne eng’ naet ak kaguiyet tugul; 
Philippians1:10 si kobiit onai komie tuguk che bo telunatet; si kobiit oegu che matinyei kenisiet, che matinyei kanagut agoi betutab Kristo;" 
Philippians1:11 ko o nyiitotin eng’ logoekab imanda, che bunu Jesu Kristo, agoi torornatet ak kalosunetab Jehovah." 
Philippians1:12 Ago amache, che kitupche, ale, onai ole tuguk che kibwanja, ko kigotoret logoiywek che miach koba tai;" 
Philippians1:13 kot kotook monjorornatennyu agobo Kristo eng’ askarik tugul che bo gab laitoriat, ak eng’ bik alak tugul;" 
Philippians1:14 ak tinyei che chang’ eng’ che kitupche eng’ Kiptaiyat nyiganatet ne o kosiir, komwaita ng’olyotab Jehovah ama eng’ kaiyweisiet, amu tinyei kamang’unet agobo monjorornatennyu." 
Philippians1:15 Amdoi alage Kristo eng’ ng’etkonda, ak suriet; koamdoi alage agichek eng’ kabwatutik che miach;" 
Philippians1:16 amdoi alage eng’ chamnyet, kongen kole kigindea arib logoiywek che miach:" 
Philippians1:17 ago amdoi alage Kristo eng’ toiyet, ma eng’ mugulelwek che leelach, kolen teswa nyalilda eng’ monjorornatennyu." 
Philippians1:18 Nee anyun? Kobate kityo eng’ oret age tugul, ngo eng’ kenisiet anan ngo eng’ imanit, keamdoi Kristo; ak abaibai eng’ noto, ee, ak ta abaibaitu." 
Philippians1:19 Amu angen ale walaksei nito koegu yetunennyu, eng’ someng’wong’, ak ne konu Tamirmirietab Jesu Kristo." 
Philippians1:20 Ko u eng’ kagenisiennyu ne ageni mising’ ak kamang’unennyu, ale magigona alilan eng’ kiy age tugul ago eng’ nyiganatet tugul, ko u kotugul, ko u noto agine nguno kitorori Kristo eng’ bortanyu, ngo eng’ sobondo, anan eng’ meet." 
Philippians1:21 Amu eng’ ane ngasobe ko Kristo, ak ngamee ko borotet." 
Philippians1:22 Ago ngasobe eng’ borto, - ngo nito logoekab boisiennyu, ko mangen anyun ne aleweni." 
Philippians1:23 Amu kagigikya kwenutab tuguk aeng’, atinye maget awa ketebi ak Kristo; amu mie noto mising’ kosiir:" 
Philippians1:24 ago ngatebi eng’ borto konyolu kosiir agobo okwek. 
Philippians1:25 Ak atinye kamang’unoni, ak angen ale atebye, ee, ak ta atebye kobotok okwek tugul, agobo teseng’wong’ bo tai ak boiboiyet eng’ kayanet;" 
Philippians1:26 si kobiit kotesak kalosuneng’wong’ eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ ane, amu ami kobotok kogeny." 
Philippians1:27 Ago ingoek atebeng’wong’ ne nyoljin logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo: si ngot anyo ageerok anan ngo mami ane, amuchi agas agobo atebeng’wong’, kele otonondosi komie eng’ tamirmiriet agenge, eng’ muguleldo agenge ogiilige agobo kayanetab logoiywek che miach;" 
Philippians1:28 amat komuok bunik eng’ kiy age tugul: noto kaborunet ne toogunot ne bo luset eng’ ichek, ago bo yetuneng’wong’, ak bunu noto Jehovah;" 
Philippians1:29 amu kigigonok agobo Kristo, ma oyan inendet kityo, ago onyalilye agobo inendet:" 
Philippians1:30 otinye lugonoto kiogeerena, ak ogase nguno kele mi eng’ ane." 
Philippians2:1 Ngo mitei anyun kagaigaet age tugul eng’ Kristo, ngo mi saisaet age tugul ne bo chamnyet, ngo mi yamdaet age tugul ne bo Tamirmiriet, ngo mi rirenosiek ak rirge," 
Philippians2:2 osulde anyun boiboiyennyu, si oegu che bo kabwatet agenge, otinye chamnyet agenge, o bo yamdaet agenge, che bo maget agenge." 
Philippians2:3 Amoyai kiy age tugul eng’ toiyet, anan eng’ kalosunetab ge, ago eng’ kaming’inetab ge ne bo naet, koiiti chi age tugul chito age kole kaigai kosiir inendet;" 
Philippians2:4 amat kogeer chi age tugul eng’ okwek tugukyik kityo, ago chi age tugul eng’ okwek kogeer tugukab bik alak agichek." 
Philippians2:5 Ingotebenok ateboni, ne kimi agine eng’ Kristo Jesu:" 
Philippians2:6 ne, nganda kitinye itondab Jehovah, ko ma iit kole kit ne bo kamanut ne o kole kogergeit ak Jehovah," 
Philippians2:7 ago kigaigei inendet koek buch ak konam itondab otwogindet, kogergeit ak bik;" 
Philippians2:8 ak kingotook eng’ itondab chi, koming’ingei, kogas it agoi meet, ee, meet ne bo kimurtoiyot." 
Philippians2:9 Noto anyun, kiitoror Jehovah inendet mising’, ak kogochi inendet kainet ne siirei kainet age tugul;" 
Philippians2:10 si kobiit kogutuny kutundo age tugul eng’ kainetab Jesu, age tugul ne mi kipsengwet, ak ne mi ng’ony ak ne mi ng’ony orit," 
Philippians2:11 si kong’any ng’elyepta age tugul kole Jesu Kristo ko Kiptaiyat, agoi torornatetab Jehovah Kwanda." 
Philippians2:12 Noto anyun, chamanikyuk, ko u ye koogase it kotugul, ma ye ami kityo, ago nguno ye mami ogase it kosiir, oboisie yetuneng’wong’ kosulda eng’ kaiyweisiet ak botanet;" 
Philippians2:13 amu Jehovah ne boisiei eng’ okwek si omach, ak oboisie agine, agobo magennyi ne mie." 
Philippians2:14 Oyai tuguk tugul ama eng’ kang’unyng’unyosiek ak tiiyosiek; 
Philippians2:15 si kobiit oegu che matinyei lelut ak ko libwoben, lagokab Jehovah che matinyei kunenden eng’ kwenutab ibinda ne kunur ak ko mastaat, che koluu eng’ kwenunywa ko u lapkeiyosiek eng’ ng’ony," 
Philippians2:16 obortoi ng’olyotab sobondo; si kobiit anyor ne alosunege eng’ betutab Kristo, ale kima alabat buch anan aboisie buch." 
Philippians2:17 Ee, agot ngerong’ja baragutab kaptisisiet ak otisietab kayaneng’wong’, ko abaibai, ak agasige kobotok okwek tugul:" 
Philippians2:18 ak ko u noto oboiboitu ak okwek, ak ogase ge kobota." 
Philippians2:19 Ago amang’u eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu ale ayokwok Timoteo ko negit, si anyor agane kagaigaet ne mie, ye kaanai atebeng’wong’." 
Philippians2:20 Amu matinye chi age ne kergei kabwatennyi ak nenyu, ne ribei iman atebeng’wong’." 
Philippians2:21 Amu cheng’ei ichek tugul chechuak, ma tuguk che bo Jesu Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Amu ongen atebennyi komie, ole, ko u lakwet ak kwanda, ko kibois kobota eng’ logoiywek che miach." 
Philippians2:23 Amang’u anyun ale, ayokwok inendet nguno, eng’ sait ye kaageer ole ateptoi:" 
Philippians2:24 ago amang’u eng’ Kiptaiyat ale anyone anendet agane ko negit. 
Philippians2:25 Ago kiabwat ale nyolu ayokwok Epaprodito, tupchennyu ne kiboitiot ne kiboisiei tuwai ne askarindet kobota, ak ko neng’wong’ ne kiyoktoi ak toretindet agobo tuguk che amakyinige;" 
Philippians2:26 amu kiting’enok emosto okwek tugul, ak kitinye nyalilda ne o, amu kiogas kele kimiani inendet:" 
Philippians2:27 amu kimian iman, kot ko negit kome: ago kirire Jehovah inendet; ago ma eng’ inendet kityo, ago eng’ ane agane, si manyoru arogenet eng’ arogenet." 
Philippians2:28 Kayogu inendet anyun eng’ kagiiletab ge ne o, si, ye ogeer inendet kogeny, omuchi oboiboitu, si kowisisit arogenennyu." 
Philippians2:29 Otaach inendet anyun eng’ Kiptaiyat eng’ boiboiyet tugul; ak ogonyit che u noto: 
Philippians2:30 amu ki negit kome agobo boisietab Kristo, ko marire sobondanyi si konyiitwa kit ne ki rartaat eng’ boisieng’wong’ ne kioboisiewa." 
Philippians3:1 Ne bo let anyun, che kitupche, oboiboitu eng’ Kiptaiyat. Ma kaiimet iman eng’ ane asirwak tuguchuto, ago toretok okwek." 
Philippians3:2 Oribege sesenik, oribege yaikab yaitio, oribege ichek che tilegei:" 
Philippians3:3 amu ki kamuratanet achek, che saei eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ak kilosuge eng’ Kristo Jesu, ama kitinye kamang’unet eng’ borto:" 
Philippians3:4 agot ngamuchi amang’ge agot eng’ borto: ngobwati chi age tugul kolen tinyei kamang’unet eng’ borto, ko a siirtoot." 
Philippians3:5 Kigimuratana eng’ betut ne bo sisiit, a bo keswekab Israel, a bo oretab Benjamin, Hebranindet ne bo Hebranik; eng’ ng’alekab Ng’atutiet, ko a Parisaindet;" 
Philippians3:6 eng’ kagiiletab ge, ko kiausaus kaniset; eng’ imanda ne mi eng’ Ng’atutiet, ko matinye lelut." 
Philippians3:7 Ago tuguk che ki borotet eng’ ane, ko kiaiit chuto koek tugun che kigobetyo amu Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Ee iman, ak aiiti tuguk tugul koek tugun che kigobetyo amu telunatet ne bo naetab Kristo Jesu, Kiptaiyandennyu: kigobetwa tuguk tugul amu inendet, ak aiiti ale busagariek, si kobiit anyor Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 ak kenyorua eng’ inendet, ko matinye imandanyu, noto ne bo Ng’atutiet, ago noto ne bunu kayanet eng’ Kristo, imanda ne bo Jehovah eng’ kayanet:" 
Philippians3:10 si kobiit anai inendet, ak kamuktaet ne bo ng’eetyennyi, ak yamdaet ne bo nyalilwogikyik, kirogendoena meennyi;" 
Philippians3:11 si kobiit anyor eng’ or age tugul aiityi ng’eetyetab che kibek. 
Philippians3:12 Ma kele kianyoru, ama kele kiaegu ne igesunotgei: ago agiiljinige tai, si kobiit anam noto ne kiigochi Kristo Jesu konamena." 
Philippians3:13 Che kitupche, maiiti ane ale kaanam: ago ayae kit agenge, autie tuguk che mi let eng’ ane, ayogochinige tuguk che mi tai." 
Philippians3:14 Agiiljinige tai, ait ole boch melekto ne bo kuuretab barak ne bo Jehovah eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Philippians3:15 Noto anyun, ongibwat achek che kigesunotinge ko u noto: ak ngobwat kiy ne ter eng’ ng’olyo age tugul, ko ta kong’ang’wok Jehovah nito agine:" 
Philippians3:16 ago, yoto kogeit, ko ongebendate ng’atutionoto." 
Philippians3:17 Che kitupche, oegu che yaei tuguk che ayae, ak ogeer ichek che bendoti ko u kaborunet ne ogeerenech." 
Philippians3:18 Amu bendoti che chang’ che kiamwawok kotugul agobo ichek, ak nguno amwawok eng’ rirek, ale icheget ko bunikab kimurtoiyotab Kristo:" 
Philippians3:19 ne kagesunenywa ko luset, ne cheptalelinywa ko moet, ne kalosunenywa ko tewernatenywa, che ibwati tugukab ng’ony." 
Philippians3:20 Amu ki bikab kipsengwet: che kigeni Yetindet kobun oloto, Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo:" 
Philippians3:21 ne tun walei kileelit bortanyo ne bo nyerotiet, si kobiit kogergeit ak bortanyi ne bo lilindo, eng’ kamugonato imuchi koyai tuguk tugul kogas it inendet." 
Philippians4:1 Noto anyun, tupchosiekyuk chamanik, che ating’e emosto, boiboiyennyu ak kutwennyu, olumdege anyun eng’ Kiptaiyat, chamanikyuk." 
Philippians4:2 Asome mising’ Euodia, ak asome mising’ Suntuke, koek che bo kabwatet agenge eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Philippians4:3 Ee, asomin aginye, kiboitiot ne bo iman kobota, ale toret kobogoriosiechu, amu kigiboisiei tugul eng’ logoiywek che miach, koboto Klement agine, ak chun alak che ki kiboitinik tugul, che mi kainaikwak bukuitab sobondo." 
Philippians4:4 Oboiboitu eng’ Kiptaiyet kotugul: ak amwae kogeny ale, Oboiboitu." 
Philippians4:5 Ingonaak mutyoneng’wong’ eng’ bik tugul. Kagorik Kiptaiyat. 
Philippians4:6 Amogereri met eng’ kiy age tugul; ago eng’ kiy age tugul ko eng’ saet ak somet koboto kongoi, ingonaak somutikwok eng’ Jehovah." 
Philippians4:7 Ak ribei kalyetab Jehovah, ne siirei kaguiyet tugul, mugulelwekwok ak kabwatutikwok eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Ne bo let anyun, che kitupche, tuguk alak tugul che bo imanda, alak tugul che bo teegisto, alak tugul che bo imanda, alak tugul che tililen, alak tugul che chamotin, alak tugul che kimwaitoe ne mie; ngo mi miein age tugul, ak ngo mi kalosunet age tugul, obwat tuguchuto." 
Philippians4:9 Tuguk che kionetge ak che kiotaach ak che kiogas ak che kiogeer eng’ ane, oyai tuguchoto: ak koteb kobotok Jehovah ne bo kalyet." 
Philippians4:10 Ago koabaibaitu mising’ eng’ Kiptaiyat, ale koobwata kogeny nguno, ko kagobata betusiek che chang’; ko u ye kootinye kabwatonoto iman, ago kima otinye boroindo." 
Philippians4:11 Mang’alali amun matinye kiy: amu kianetge, eng’ atebet age tugul ne atinye ale, yama ko u noto." 
Philippians4:12 Angen ole ateptoi eng’ terterindo, ak angen ole ateptoi ye katesak tuguk: eng’ kiy age tugul ak eng’ tuguk tugul, ko kianetge ung’otietab biyendo ak rugutet, anyor che chang’ ak abanan." 
Philippians4:13 Amuchi ayai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet ne igimita. 
Philippians4:14 Ago kioyai ne mie, amu kiotinye yamdaet eng’ nyalildanyu." 
Philippians4:15 Ak ongen okweget okwek Pilipik, ole eng’ taunetab logoiywek che miach, ye kingawe eng’ Makedonia, ko ma biit kaniset ne kitinyei yamdaet kobota eng’ ng’olyotab kagoitoet ak taaget, kobate okwege kityo;" 
Philippians4:16 amu agot eng’ Tesalonika ko kioyokwa atkai tugul tuguk che kiabanani. 
Philippians4:17 Ma kele acheng’e konunet; ago acheng’e logoek che tesoksei eng’ koiteng’wong’. 
Philippians4:18 Ago atinye tuguk tugul, ak che siirtoot: a biyong’ot, amu kiataach eng’ Epaprodito tuguk che kibunwok, che bo ng’uunet ne nyamdut, korosiot ne taagaksei, ne iboiboi Jehovah." 
Philippians4:19 Ago inyiitwok Jehovah nenyu kit age tugul ne obononi ko u magornatosiekyik eng’ torornatet eng’ Kristo Jesu. 
Philippians4:20 Nguno anyun ingobunji Jehovah nenyo, inendet Kwandanyo, torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Ogat age tugul ne tilil eng’ Kristo Jesu. Igatok tupchosiek che mi kobota. 
Philippians4:22 Igatok tugul che tililen, mising’ ko icheget che mi gab Kaisari." 
Philippians4:23 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo koboto tamirmirikwok. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Kristo Jesu eng’ magetab Jehovah, ak Timoteo tupchennyo," 
Colossians1:2 kisirjini che tililen che kitupche che iyanotin eng’ Kristo, che mi Kolosai: Ingotebi kobotok mieindo ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo." 
Colossians1:3 Kigochini kongoi Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandenyo Jesu Kristo, kesaiywok kotugul," 
Colossians1:4 ye kingegas agobo kayaneng’wong’ eng’ Kristo Jesu, ak chamnyet ne oting’e tugul che tililen" 
Colossians1:5 amu kamang’unet ne kigegonoruok eng’ kipsengwet, ne kiosib ogas eng’ ng’olyotab imanit ne bo logoiywek che miach," 
Colossians1:6 ne kigoityok; ko u ole teptoi agine eng’ ng’ony komugul koiyiei logoek ak ko tesoksei, ko u eng’ okwek, koboch betut ne kiogas ak onai mieindab Jehovah eng’ iman;" 
Colossians1:7 ko u ye kionetge eng’ Epapra chamanennyo ne kiboisiei tugul, ne kiboitiot ne iyanat ne bo Kristo agobo achek," 
Colossians1:8 ne kiiboruech chamnyeng’wong’ ne mi eng’ Tamirmiriet. 
Colossians1:9 Amu nito anyun, ko magimete kesa ak kesom agobo okwek koboch betut ne kingegas, kele konyiiak naetab magennyi eng’ ng’omnatet tugul ne bo tamirmiriet ak kaguiyet," 
Colossians1:10 si obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ Kiptaiyat, oboiboi inendet, oitosi logoek eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie, ak otesage eng’ naetab Jehovah;" 
Colossians1:11 kigimitok eng’ kamuktaet tugul, ko u kamugetab torornatennyi, agoi muitaet tugul ak talasiet eng’ boiboiyet," 
Colossians1:12 ogochini kongoi Kwanda, ne kiyaech keegu che nyoljin keyamde borotetab che tililen eng’ lapkeiyet;" 
Colossians1:13 ne kisoruech kemong’une kimnatetab mesundeito, ak kouutech kebe bounatetab Werit ne bo chamnyennyi;" 
Colossians1:14 ne kitinye eng’ inendet katiagennyo, nyoetab kaat ne bo tengekwogikyok." 
Colossians1:15 Inendet itondab Jehovah ne ma toogu, inendet ne kisib kesich eng’ kit age tugul ne kigitoi keyai;" 
Colossians1:16 amu kigitoi keyai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet, che mi kipsengwetisiek ak che mi ng’ony, tuguk che toogu ak tuguk che ma toogu, anan laitornatosiek, anan kiptainatosiek, anan bounatosiek anan kimnatosiek; kigitoi keyai tuguk tugul eng’ inendet ak ko bo inendet;" 
Colossians1:17 ak bo tai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul, ak namegei tuguk tugul eng’ inendet." 
Colossians1:18 Ak inendet metitab borto, noto kaniset: inendet taunet, taunindetab che kimong’ eng’ che kibek; si kobiit koek ne o eng’ tuguk tugul." 
Colossians1:19 Amu kichamak komie kele komeny nyiiet tugul eng’ inendet; 
Colossians1:20 si kotuiyechigei tuguk tugul inendet, ye kingo kagoyai kalyet eng’ korotikab kimurtoiyondennyi; eng’ inendet, ngo tuguk che mi ng’ony anan tuguk che mi kipsengwetisiek." 
Colossians1:21 Ak nganda kio kipsagarek eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto, ak kio bunik eng’ kabwatutikwok eng’ boisionikwok che yaachen, ko kagotuiyok inendet nguno," 
Colossians1:22 eng’ bortanyi ne bo banyek, eng’ meet, si kobiit komutak ko o tililen ko motinye tisia, amotinyei kiy ne kiruogunenok eng’ tainnyi:" 
Colossians1:23 ngotebi iman eng’ kayanet, ko o lumdootin ak ko o tononiotin komie, ama kiistok eng’ kamang’unetab logoiywek che miach che kiogas, che kigiamda eng’ yautiet tugul eng’ kureretab kipsengwet; kigiyaa ane Paulo amu noto aek kiboitiot." 
Colossians1:24 Abaibai anyun nguno eng’ nyalilwogikyuk agobo okwek, ak anyiiti eng’ komostanyu noto ne rarunot agobo nyalilwogikab Kristo eng’ bortanyu agobo bortanyi, noto kaniset;" 
Colossians1:25 ak, kigiyaa agobo noto aek kiboitiot, eng’ tononjinetab Jehovah ne kigigona amu okwek, si ayai ng’olyotab Jehovah kosulda," 
Colossians1:26 ung’otiet ne kigiuny koboch kenyisiek tugul che kigosiirto ak ibinwek: ago nguno, ko kagiborji chechik che tililen," 
Colossians1:27 che kicham Jehovah kong’ang’ji kit ne u magornatosiekab torornatet ne bo ung’otionito eng’ Bororiosiek, noto Kristo eng’ okwek, kamang’unetab torornatet:" 
Colossians1:28 inendet ne kimwaitoi, ak kiteechini chi age tugul ak kineti chi age tugul eng’ ng’omnatet tugul, si kobiit kimut chi age tugul kogesunotgei eng’ Kristo;" 
Colossians1:29 abirtochinige agine noto, agiilige ko u boisiennyi, ne boisiei eng’ ane eng’ kamuktaet." 
Colossians2:1 Amu amache onai ole agiilige mising’ agobo okwek, ak ichek che mi Laodikia, ak alak tugul che tomo kogeera togoch eng’ borto;" 
Colossians2:2 si kobiit kigaigai mugulelwekwak, ak keropchin eng’ chamnyet, ak eng’ magornatosiek tugul che bo nyiietab kaguiyet, si kobiit konai ichek ung’otietab Jehovah, inendet Kristo," 
Colossians2:3 kigiuny eng’ inendet konoraik tugul che bo ng’omnatet ak naet. 
Colossians2:4 Amwae nito ale, si magenak chi age tugul eng’ ng’alekab lomset." 
Colossians2:5 Amu agot ngo mami ane eng’ borto, ami kobotok eng’ tamirmiriet, ko abaibai eng’ atebeng’wong’, ne ageere, ak kimnatetab kayaneng’wong’ eng’ Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Ko u ye kiotaach anyun Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyat, obendate eng’ inendet," 
Colossians2:7 ko o lumdootin ak ko o teegotin eng’ inendet, ak kigimitok eng’ kayaneng’wong’, ko u ye kiginetak, otese omwae kongoi." 
Colossians2:8 Oripge si maluulok chi age eng’ ng’omnatennyi ak kaberberisiet ne bo buch, eng’ bitonwekab bik, eng’ konetisiosiek che bo tai che bo ng’ony, ak ma eng’ Kristo:" 
Colossians2:9 amu menyei eng’ inendet eng’ borto nyiiet tugul ne bo Jehovah," 
Colossians2:10 ak keyaok oegu che nyiitotin eng’ inendet, ne metitab bounatet tugul ak kimnatet:" 
Colossians2:11 kigimuratanak eng’ inendet eng’ kamuratanet ne kima kiyae eunek, eng’ istoetab bortab banyek, eng’ kamuratanetab Kristo;" 
Colossians2:12 ko kagetubok koboto inendet eng’ kabatisanet, ak kiging’eetak eng’ noto koboto inendet amu kayanet eng’ yaet ne yaei Jehovah, ne kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek." 
Colossians2:13 Ak okwek, che kio begunotin eng’ yaitwogikwok ak borwekwok che ma kimuratan, kiisoobok okwek, koboto inendet, ko kagonyoiywech kaat yaitwogikyok tugul;" 
Colossians2:14 ko kagobuch siret ne bo arorutik ne kiga kogikyech, ne kiranyech: ak kigoisto, kobirji kimurtoiyot;" 
Colossians2:15 ko kagorek bounatosiek ak kimnatosiek, kobor kotook, koterteri ichek eng’ kimurtoiyot." 
Colossians2:16 Noto anyun amat koruokwok chi age tugul agobo amitwogik, anan agobo che kieei, anan agobo betutab igorta anan agobo arawet ne kaleel anan betutab sabato:" 
Colossians2:17 che uruetab tuguk che bwanei; ago borto ko bo Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Amat korebenak chi melektang’wong’ eng’ oret ne machei inendet, ne bo kaming’inetab ge ak kalosunetab malaikaisiek, ak kogimitegei tuguk che kigogeer, ak komene kabwatutikyik che bo borto," 
Colossians2:19 ama namei komie Metit, ne nyorune borto tugul teset eng’ teset ne bunu Jehovah, ko kagonyor tugul, ak konamatgei eng’ kabeberwek ak tigitik." 
Colossians2:20 Ko u ye kiobegu koboto Kristo omong’une konetisiosiek che bo tai che bo ng’ony, amu nee anyun si ogas it arorutik, ko u ye osoptosi eng’ ng’ony," 
Colossians2:21 amonam, anan ochamjam, anan otwa" 
Colossians2:22 (betos tuguchuto tugul ye kiboisie), ko u ng’atutik ak konetisiosiekab bik?" 
Colossians2:23 Tinyei tuguchoto kaborunet ne bo ng’omnatet eng’ chamet ne bo kalosunet, ak eng’ kaming’inetab ge, ak nyalilda ne kinyalili borto; matoreti kiy age tugul eng’ katerteretab magutikab borto." 
Colossians3:1 Ko u ye king’eetye anyun koboto Kristo, ocheng’ tuguk che mi barak, ole mi Kristo kotebyei eng’ eutab tai ne bo Jehovah." 
Colossians3:2 Obwat tuguk che mi barak, ma tuguk che mitei ng’ony." 
Colossians3:3 Amu kiobegu, ak kigiuny sobonwekwok koboto Kristo eng’ Jehovah." 
Colossians3:4 Ye tun took Kristo, ne inendet sobondanyo, otoogu anyun ak okwek koboto inendet eng’ torornatet." 
Colossians3:5 Obar anyun kebeberwekwok che mitei ng’ony; sokset, simdo, magutik che samisen, maget ne ya, ak kasetab miat, noto saetab kanamonik;" 
Colossians3:6 nyonjin nereknatetab Jehovah werikab ngelelnatet amu tuguchoto; 
Colossians3:7 eng’ tuguchoto che kiobendote ak okwek eng’ tai, ye kita omenye eng’ tuguchuto." 
Colossians3:8 Ago nguno olakte ak okwek tuguchuto tugul; neregek, nyitatet, yaitiet, chubisiet, ak ng’alalet ne bo tewernatet eng’ kutuswekwok:" 
Colossians3:9 amomwachige lembech, amu kioregu chito ne bo keny koboto boisionikyik," 
Colossians3:10 ak koolaach chito ne leel, ne kiwalei koleelit agoi naet kogergeit ak itondab inendet ne kiyai inendet:" 
Colossians3:11 ole mating’e boroindo Yunanindet ak Yahudiot, ne imuratanat ak ne ma imuratanat, bunotio, Sitiaindet, ne otwogin, ne itiagat: ago Kristo ko tugul ak eng’ tugul." 
Colossians3:12 Noto anyun, amu o lewenaikab Jehovah che tililen ak ko o chamanik, olaach muguleldo ne bo rirenetab ge, talasiet, kaming’inetab ge, mutyonet, ak muitaet;" 
Colossians3:13 omuitochinige, ak onyochinige kaat okwege, ngo tinyei chi age tugul ng’olyo eng’ age: agot ko u ye kinyoiywok kaat Kiptaiyat, oyai ko u noto ak okwek:" 
Colossians3:14 ak otes eng’ tuguchuto tugul chamnyet, noto ratutiet ne bo kagesunetab ge." 
Colossians3:15 Ak ingoboi kalyetab Kristo mugulelwekwok, noto ne kigiguurjok eng’ borto agenge; ak oegu che tinyei kongoi." 
Colossians3:16 Ingomenyok ng’olyotab Kristo eng’ magornatet, eng’ ng’omnatet tugul onetige ak oteechinige eng’ tienwogikab kalosunet ak tienwogik ak tienwogikab tamirmiriet, otienjini Jehovah eng’ mieindo eng’ mugulelwekwok." 
Colossians3:17 Ak kit age tugul ne oyae, eng’ ng’olyot anan eng’ boisiet, oyai tugul eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat Jesu, omwachini Jehovah Kwanda kongoi eng’ inendet." 
Colossians3:18 Osotichu, ogas it manong’otaikwok, ko u ye nyolu eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Colossians3:19 Manong’otaichu, ocham osotikwok, amogochi ng’wanindo." 
Colossians3:20 Lagochu, ogas it sigikwok eng’ tuguk tugul, amu iboiboi nito mising’ Kiptaiyat." 
Colossians3:21 Kwanisiechu, amotachatachi lagokwok, si mailuuk mugulelwekwak." 
Colossians3:22 Otwogichu, ogas it eng’ tuguk tugul ichek che kiptainikwok eng’ borwek; ama eng’ otwoknatet ne kigeerei, ko u che iboiboi bik, ago eng’ muguleldo tugul, oiywei Kiptaiyat:" 
Colossians3:23 kit age tugul ne oyae, oyai kobunu muguleldo, ko u eng’ Kiptaiyat, ama ko u eng’ bik;" 
Colossians3:24 ongen ole otaache eng’ Kiptaiyat melekto ne bo borotet; oote Kiptaiyat Kristo. 
Colossians3:25 Amu inendet ne yaei ne ya, ko tun taachei agine ne bo yaitionoto kiyai: ama mi tiytiet." 
Colossians4:1 Kiptainichu, ogochini otwogikwok noto ne bo imanda ak ne nyolu; ongen ole otinye ak okwek Kiptaiyat eng’ kipsengwet." 
Colossians4:2 Ogiilige kotugul eng’ saet, oripsei eng’ noto koboto kongoi;" 
Colossians4:3 osaiywech ak achek, si koyatwech Jehovah kurget ne bo ng’olyot, kemwa ung’otietab Kristo; kigirata agobo noto;" 
Colossians4:4 si abortoi, ko u ye nyolu amwa." 
Colossians4:5 Obendoti eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ taitab icheget che mi sang’, ingoek saisiek kamanut eng’ okwek." 
Colossians4:6 Ingoteb ng’alekwok eng’ mieindo kotugul, koanyinyogis eng’ munyuk, si kobiit onai ole kanyol owoljinde chi age tugul." 
Colossians4:7 Mwawok ng’alekyuk tugul Tukiko, tupchet ne chamat, ak ko kiboitiot ne iyanat, inendet otwogindet ne kiboisiei tuwai eng’ Kiptaiyat:" 
Colossians4:8 ne koayokwok amu ng’olyondonito, si kobiit onai atebennyo, si kogaigai mugulelwekwok;" 
Colossians4:9 koboto Onesimo, tupchet ne kiyani ak ko chamat, ne age eng’ okwek. Mwawok ichek tuguk tugul che bo olito." 
Colossians4:10 Igatok Aristarko ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai, ak Mariko ne tupchetab Barnaba (kionyoru ng’alek agobo inendet; ngo nyonjok, otaach)," 
Colossians4:11 ak Jesu, ne kiguure Justo, icheget che bo che imuratonotin: chuto kityo che keboisiei tugul agobo bounatetab Jehovah, icheget che kigoek kagaigaet eng’ ane." 
Colossians4:12 Igatok Epapra, ne age eng’ okwek, otwogindetab Kristo Jesu, igiilegei kotugul agobo okwek eng’ sautikyik, si kobiit otononse ko ogesunotingei, ak ongen komie maget tugul ne bo Jehovah." 
Colossians4:13 Amu abaoriani agobo inendet, ale tinyei kagiiletab ge ne o agobo okwek, ak agobo ichek che mitei Laodikia, ak ichek che mitei Hierapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Igatok Luka, chepkerichot ne chamanet, ak Dema." 
Colossians4:15 Ogat tupchosiek che mitei Laodikia, ak Numpa, ak kaniset ne mitei gonnyi." 
Colossians4:16 Ak ye kagesoman baruani eng’ kwenung’wong’, ogoite kesoman agine eng’ kanisetab Laodikiek; ak osoman ak okwek baruanin bo Laodikia." 
Colossians4:17 Ak omwachi Arkipo olenji, Rib boisiet ne kiitaach eng’ Kiptaiyat, si kobiit iyai kosulda." 
Colossians4:18 Kagatennyu ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu. Obwat monjorornatennyu. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, ak Silbano, ak Timoteo, kisirjini kanisetab Tesalonikek eng’ Jehovah Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo: Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Kimwachini Jehovah kongoi kotugul agobo okwek tugul, kemwaok eng’ sautikyok;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 kibwati ne magisise, boisieng’wong’ ne bo kayanet ak boisiet ne uui ne bo chamnyet ak muitaetab kamang’unet eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyo ak ko Kwanda;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 kingen leweneng’wong’, che kitupche, che chamanik eng’ Jehovah," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kele kima bwanjok logoiywekyok che miach eng’ ng’olyot kityo, ago eng’ kimnatet agine, ak eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ak eng’ naet ne ongen inne; ko u ye ongen ole kigi bik che u nee eng’ taing’wong’ agobo okwek." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ak kioegu kasubikyok, ak che bo Kiptaiyat, ko kaotaach ng’olyot eng’ usisiet ne o, koboto boiboiyet ne bo Tamirmiriet ne Tilil;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 kot oegu kaborunoik eng’ tugul che iyani eng’ Makedonia ak eng’ Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Amu kigogasak ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat kobun olong’wong’, ma eng’ Makedonia ak Akaya kityo, ago kigoyom komosta age tugul kayaneng’wong’ ne otinye eng’ Jehovah; kot ko ma kemage kiy ko ta kemwa kiy age tugul." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu icheget che ibortoi agobo achek ole kigibwanunde oldang’wong’; ak ko u ye kioweekyige Jehovah olakte kanamonik, si kobiit oot Jehovah ne sobei ak ko ne bo iman," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ak ogeni Werinnyi ne bunu kipsengwet, ne kiing’eet komong’ eng’ che kibek, inendet Jesu, ne soruech eng’ nereknatet ne nyonei." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Amu ongen okwek, tupchosiechu, itunennyo ne kigiitu olong’wong’, ole kimaek buch:" 
1Thessalonians2:2 ago kingo kaginyalilech eng’ tai ak kitewerech eng’ Pilipi, ko u ye ongen, ko kiginyiganitu eng’ Jehovah nenyo kemwawok logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah eng’ boriet ne o." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Amu ma bo kateunennyo lelut, anan simdo, anan eng’ ng’alset:" 
1Thessalonians2:4 ago ko u ye kigoyanwech Jehovah keegu che tononjin logoiywek che miach, keng’alali ko u noto; ma ko u che iboiboiti bik, ago Jehovah ne tiemei mugulelwekyok." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Amu kima kinyoruech eng’ sait age tugul keboisie ng’alekab kachaunetab ge, ko u ye ongen, anan ng’alekab ung’ot che bo keiyandit, baoriat Jehovah;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 ama kicheng’e teegisto eng’ bik, anan eng’ okwek, anan eng’ alak, ye kita kiegu nyigisin eng’ okwek ko u che kiyoktoi che bo Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Ago kigi taloen eng’ kwenung’wong’, ko u baindet ne baei lagokyik:" 
1Thessalonians2:8 ko u noto, kigiting’enok emosto ne bo chamnyet ne o, kigimache mising’ kele kegonok, ma logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah kityo, ago sobonwekyok agichek, amu kioegu che chamotin mising’ eng’ achek." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu obwati, tupchosiechu, boisiennyo ne uui ak bichiindo, keboisie kemoi ak bet, si ma kigochi milet chi age tugul eng’ okwek. Kigiamwok logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah." 
1Thessalonians2:10 O baorinik okwek, koboto Jehovah, agobo ole kigitepte acheget eng’ kwenung’wong’ okwek che oyani, eng’ tililindo ak eng’ imanda ko magitinye kiy ne kiruogunenech:" 
1Thessalonians2:11 ko u ye ongen ole kigiteechindoite chi age tugul eng’ okwek, ko u kwanda ak lagokyik, kiteeiywok ak kigiilok, ak kebaoriani," 
1Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ Jehovah, ne kuurjinok bounatennyi ak torornatet." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Kimwachini anyun Jehovah kongoi, amu ng’olyondonito, ama kisistosi kele, ye kingotaach ng’olyot ne kiogasenech, noto ng’olyotab Jehovah, kiotaach, ma ko u ng’olyotab bik, ago ko u ye mi eng’ imanit, ng’olyotab Jehovah, noto agine ne boisiei eng’ okwek che oyani." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okwek anyun, tupchosiechu, ko kioegu yaikab tuguk che yaei kanisosiekab Jehovah che mitei Judea eng’ Kristo Jesu: amu kionyoru ak okwek, nyalilwogik che u choto eng’ bikab emeng’wong’, agot ko u ye kinyor ichek eng’ Yahudik;" 
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okwek anyun, tupchosiechu, ko kioegu yaikab tuguk che yaei kanisosiekab Jehovah che mitei Judea eng’ Kristo Jesu: amu kionyoru ak okwek, nyalilwogik che u choto eng’ bikab emeng’wong’, agot ko u ye kinyor ichek eng’ Yahudik;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 che kibar Kiptaiyat Jesu ak maotik, ak kionech, ama ibaibai Jehovah, ama namegei ak bik tugul;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 etenech keng’alalji Bororiosiek si kobiit kesor; inyiiti kotugul tengekwogikwak: ago nyonjin ichek nereknatet agoi let. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ago, achek anyun, tupchosiechu, nga mata kegeerge ak okwek togoch eng’ betusiek che ng’ering’, ma eng’ muguleldo, ko kigitiem mising’ inne kele kegeerok togoch amu emosto ne o:" 
1Thessalonians2:18 amu kigimache kebwa olong’wong’, agot ane Paulo, ko kiamache ak ko ta amache; ago kiranyech Setani." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu tos nee kamang’unennyo, anan boiboiyennyo, anan kutwet ne bo torornatet? Tos ma okwek, eng’ taitab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu eng’ nyonunennyi?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Amu okwek torornatennyo ak boiboiyennyo. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Noto anyun ye kingo mata kimuch kemuite, kibwat kele mie kebagaktech achege eng’ Atene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 ak kiyogu Timoteo, tupchennyo ak ko kiboitiotab Jehovah eng’ logoiywek che miach che bo Kristo, kogimitok, ak kogaigaak agobo kayaneng’wong’;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 si maing’eak chi age tugul eng’ nyalilwogichuto; amu ongen okweget ole kigilewenwech choto. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Amu iman, kingemi kobotok, ko kisib kemwawok kele kinyoru usisiet; ko u ye kigobiit, ak ongen ak okwek." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Amu ng’olyondonito ye kimata amuch amuita, ayogu kut si kobiit anai kayaneng’wong’, ale tama kogoyomak yomindet, ak koek buch boisiennyo ne uui." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ago, ye kingonyo Timoteo kobunu olong’wong’, ak koibwech logoiywek che bo boiboiyet che bo kayaneng’wong’ ak chamnyet, ak otinye kabwatet ne mie ne obwatech kotugul, oting’enech emosto omache ogeerech, ko u ye kimache agachek kegeerok;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 amu ng’olyondonito anyun, tupchosiechu, kigigaigaech eng’ okwek eng’ bichiindanyo tugul ak nyalildanyo amu kayaneng’wong’:" 
1Thessalonians3:8 amu kisoptosi nguno, ngot olumdege eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Amu kongoi nee ne kimuchi kigochi Jehovah kogeny agobo okwek, amu boiboiyet tugul ne kiboiboitune ko amu okwek eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyo;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 kisae mising’ kemoi ak bet si kobiit kegeer togochikwok, ak kigesu noto ne rartaat eng’ kayaneng’wong’?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Ingondochi anyun bandanyo kebwa oldang’wong’, Jehovah nenyo ak ko Kwanda inendet, ak Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 ingogonok Kiptaiyat otesage ak obaraitu eng’ chamnyet okwege eng’ okwege, ak eng’ bik tugul, agot ko u achek eng’ okwek;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 si kobiit kogimit mugulelwekwok ko motinye kiy ne kimuchi kiruogunenok eng’ tililindo eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo, eng’ nyonunetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu koboto chechik che tililen tugul." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ne bo let anyun, tupchosiechu, kesomok mising’ ak kiteeiywok eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu, ko u ye kiotaach eng’ achek, ole kanyol obetite ak obaibaite Jehovah, agot ko u ye obendoti, si kobiit obaraitu mising’ inne." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Amu ongen ng’atutik che kigigonok achek eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Amu nito magetab Jehovah, noto katabaneng’wong’, si kobiit oistoege sokset." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Si kobiit konai chi tugul eng’ okwek komuch gei, korib bortanyi eng’ tililindo ak teegisto," 
1Thessalonians4:5 ma eng’ maget ne bo kasetab miat, agot ko u Bororiosiek che maingen Jehovah;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 amat koyai chi kachiliilut anan koyachi ne ya tupchennyi eng’ ng’olyondonito: amu Kiptaiyat yaaktaindetab mugetut eng’ tuguchuto tugul, ko u ye kisib kiteeiywok ak kebaorian." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Amu kima kuurjech Jehovah simdo, ago eng’ tililindo." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Inendet ne esioi, ko maesio chi, ago Jehovah, ne konok Tamirmiriennyi ne Tilil." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ago ma nyolu kesirwak agobo chamnyetab tupchosiek; amu onetotin okweget eng’ Jehovah si ochamnye; 
1Thessalonians4:10 amu oyae ko u noto iman eng’ tupchosiek tugul che mitei Makedonia komugul. Ago kiteeiywok, tupchosiechu, kele obaraitu kosiir;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 ak onetge otebi eng’ mutyonet, ak oyai boisionikwok, ak oboisie eunekwok, ko u ye kiging’atak;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 si obendate ko u ye nyolu eng’ taitab ichek che mi sang’, si mobanan kiy age tugul." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ago magimache anyun, che kitupche, oegu che mongen agobo icheget che ruitos; kele amoarogense, ko u bik alak che matinyei kamang’unet." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Amu ngiyani kele kime Jesu ak kong’eet kogeny, ko u noto anyun eng’ icheget che ruitos eng’ Jesu, imutu Jehovah koboto inendet." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Amu kimwawok ni eng’ ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat, kele achek che kisoptosi, che ki ng’etunotin agoi nyonunetab Kiptaiyat, ko magoi kindoe ichek che kigoruiyo." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Amu chorugei Kiptaiyat inendet eng’ kipsengwet, koboto twegunet ne o, ak kutitab malaikaiyat ne o, ak iriagetab Jehovah: ak isib kong’eetos che kibek eng’ Kristo:" 
1Thessalonians4:17 ak achek anyun che kisoptosi, che ki ng’etunotin, keganabech koboto ichek eng’ bolik, ketuiye ak Kiptaiyat eng’ soet: ak ketebi anyun koboto Kiptaiyat koigeny." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Noto anyun ogaigaige okwege eng’ ng’alechuto. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ma nyolu anyun kesirwak, che kitupche, agobo betusiek ak kenyisiek." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Amu ongen okweget komie ole nyonei betutab Kiptaiyat ko u chorin ne nyonei kemoi. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ye mwaei ichek kolen, Kalyet ak chametab ge, koche anyun ichek ng’emisiet, ko u ye ityin ng’wanindo kobogoriot ne machei kosigis; ago magoi chililso." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ago okwek, tupchosiechu, ko momi eng’ mesundeito, kot konyonjok betunoto ko u chorin:" 
1Thessalonians5:5 amu okwek tugul ko o werikab lapkeiyet, ak werikab bet: ma ki bo kemoi, anan mesundeito;" 
1Thessalonians5:6 noto anyun among’ keruiye ko u bik alak, ago ongeripse ak keegu che ribegei." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Amu icheget che ruitos koruitos kemoi; ak icheget che bogitos kobogitos kemoi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ago ongeegu che kiribegei, achek che ke bo bet, kilaachi karnetab teget ne bo kayanet ak chamnyet; ak kutwet, noto ko kamang’unet ne bo yetunet." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Amu kima lewenjech Jehovah nereknatet, ago nyorunetab yetunet eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 ne kimechech, si ngegosu anan ngeruitosi, kesoptosi koboto inendet." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Noto anyun ogaigaige okwege eng’ okwege, oteech ge okwege eng’ okwege, agot ko u ye oyae ak okwek." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Ago kisomok, che kitupche, kele onai ichek che tinyei boisiet ne o eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak che boiywok eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak kotigonok;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 ak ogonyit ichek mising’ inne eng’ chamnyet agobo boisienywa. Otebi eng’ kalyet okwege eng’ okwege. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ak kitigonok, che kitupche, kele oteechi che maribei che kiging’at, ocher che nyogoren, otoret che nyalulyotin, omuite ak bik tugul." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ogeer si mayaakyi chi age tugul chito age yaitio eng’ yaitio; ago osub noto mie kotugul, chi age eng’ age, ak eng’ bik tugul." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Oboiboitu betusiek tugul; 
1Thessalonians5:17 osae kotugul; 
1Thessalonians5:18 omwae kongoi eng’ tuguk tugul: amu nito magetab Jehovah eng’ Kristo Jesu eng’ okwek. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Amogirinde Tamirmiriet; 
1Thessalonians5:20 amosas maoinatosiek; 
1Thessalonians5:21 otiem tuguk tugul; onam mising’ noto mie; 
1Thessalonians5:22 oistoege kiy age tugul ne ya. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ak ingotabanak eng’ katabanet ne nyiitat Jehovah ne bo kalyet; ak ingoribogis komie tamirmirikwok ak sobonwekwok ak borwekwok, ko motinye kiy ne kimuchi kiruogunenok eng’ nyonunetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Inendet ne kuurok ko inendet ne kiyani, ne yaei noto agine kosulda." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Tupchosiechu, osaiywech." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ogat tupchosiek tugul eng’ ng’ututet ne tilil. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ayosiewok eng’ Kiptaiyat ale kesomanji baruani che kitupche tugul. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ingotebi mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo kobotok. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, ak Silbano, ak Timoteo, kisirjini kanisetab Tesalonikek eng’ Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ingoteb kobotok mieindo ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kanyol kemwachi Jehovah kongoi betusiek tugul agobo okwek, che kitupche, ko u ye nyolu, amu nerei kayaneng’wong’ mising’, ak ko tesoksei chamnyet ne oting’ege okwek tugul;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 kot kichounenok ge okwek eng’ kanisosiekab Jehovah amu muitaeng’wong’ ak kayanet eng’ usisiosiekwok tugul ak nyalilwogik che omuitoi; 
2Thessalonians1:5 nito kaborunet ne toogunot ne bo kiruogetab imanda ne bo Jehovah; si kobiit kiitok kele onyolu eng’ bounatetab Jehovah, ne onyorune agine nyalilda:" 
2Thessalonians1:6 si ngo kiy ne bo imanda eng’ Jehovah koyaakyi mugetut ne bo nyalilda icheget che inyalilok," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ak kogonok kamuung’et kobotech, okwek che kiusei, eng’ ng’ang’etab Kiptaiyat Jesu kobunu kipsengwet koboto malaikaisiek che bo kamuktaennyi" 
2Thessalonians1:8 eng’ mat ne lalei, koyaakyi mugetut icheget che ma nai Jehovah, ak ichek che magase it logoiywek che miach che bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu:" 
2Thessalonians1:9 che tun nyoru biret, noto ng’emisiet ne bo koigeny ko kageisto eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat ak eng’ torornatetab kimnatennyi," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ye tun nyo si kobiit kitoror eng’ chechik che tililen; ak kekwong’e eng’ ichek tugul che iyani (amu kigiyan baornatennyo eng’ okwek), eng’ betunoto." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Noto anyun kisaiywok kotugul, si kobiit koiitok Jehovah nenyo kole onyolu eng’ kuurseng’wong’, ak kosulda maget age tugul ne bo mieindo ak boisiet age tugul ne bo kayanet, eng’ kamuktaet;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 si kobiit kitoror kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu eng’ okwek, ak okwek eng’ inendet, ko u mieindab Jehovah nenyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Kisomok anyun, che kitupche, agobo nyonunetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ak kayumennyo bo ge ne kiyumjinige inendet;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 si motoptobense ochokyi eng’ kabwatutikwok, anan oarogense, ngot ko eng’ tamirmiriet, anan eng’ ng’olyo, anan eng’ baruet ne olen bunwech, olen kagoit betutab Kiptaiyat;" 
2Thessalonians2:3 amat kong’alak chi eng’ kiy age tugul; amu maitu betunoto, kobate indou katuituet ak keng’any chito ne bo tengekto, weritab luset," 
2Thessalonians2:4 inendet ne kirindoi ak kotororegei kogirindoi tugul che kiguure Jehovah anan che kilosu; si koteb anyun eng’ hekalutab Jehovah, koborugei inendet ko u ne Jehovah." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Tos mobwati, yu kiami kobotok, ole kiamwawok tuguchu?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ak nguno ongen noto ne ranyei, si kobiit keng’any eng’ betusiekyik." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Amu boisiei nguno ung’otietab ngelelnatet; kobate mi agenge ne ranyei nguno, agoi keisto." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ak yeityo keng’any ngeleliot, ne tun barei Kiptaiyat Jesu eng’ kabusetab kutinnyi, ak kong’em koek buch eng’ ng’ang’etab nyonunennyi;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 nyonunennyi konamegei ak boisietab Setani koboto kamuget tugul ak kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che bo lembech," 
2Thessalonians2:10 koboto kenisiet tugul che ma bo imanda agobo ichek che lustos; amu ma taach chamnyetab imanit, si kobiit kesor." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Amu nito anyun, iyokyin Jehovah ichek kamaaset ne boisie si kobiit koyan lembeita:" 
2Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit kiruokyi ichek tugul che ma iyan imanit, ago che kiboiboitune che ma bo imanda." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ago kanyol kemwachi Jehovah kongoi kotugul agobo okwek, che kitupche che chamanikab Kiptaiyat, amu kilewenjok Jehovah yetunet koboch taunet eng’ katabanetab Tamirmiriet ak kayanetab imanit:"
