2Thessalonians2:14 kiguurok anyun eng’ choto eng’ logoiywekyok che miach, si kobiit onyoru torornatetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Noto anyun, che kitupche, olumdege, ak onam bitonwek che kiginetak, ngot ko eng’ ng’olyot, anan eng’ baruennyo." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Nguno anyun, ingogaigai Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ak Jehovah Kwandanyo ne kichamech ak kogonech kagaigaet ne bo koigeny ak kamang’unet ne mie eng’ mieindo," 
2Thessalonians2:17 kogaigai mugulelwekwok ak kogimit ichek eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie ak ng’olyot. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ne bo let anyun, che kitupche, osaiywech, si kobiit kochakta ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat ak kitoror, ko u ole teptoi eng’ okwek agine;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 si kobiit kesoruech eng’ bik che ngelelik ak che yaachen; amu matinyei tugul kayanet. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ago Kiptaiyat ko ne kiyani, ne igimitok, ak koribok eng’ noto ya." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ak kitinye kamang’unet eng’ Kiptaiyat agobo okwek, kele oyae ak ko ta oyae tuguk che king’ate." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ak ingondochi Kiptaiyat mugulelwekwok agoi chamnyetab Jehovah, ak muitaetab Kristo." 
2Thessalonians3:6 King’atok anyun, che kitupche, eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, kele oistoege tupchet age tugul ne wendoti eng’ bistoet, ama ko u bitonwek che kionyorunenech." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Amu ongen okweget ko u ye kanyol oyai ko u ye kiyae: amu kima kitebi achek eng’ kwenung’wong’ ko u bik che maribegei; 
2Thessalonians3:8 ama kiam amitwogikab chi age tugul buch, ago eng’ boisiet ne uui ak bichiindo, keboisiei kemoi ak bet, si ma kiim chi age tugul eng’ okwek:" 
2Thessalonians3:9 ma amu kele magitinye kimnatet, ago si kobiit keyaige keegu kaborunet eng’ okwek, si kobiit oyai osubenech." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Amu agot ye kigimi kobotok, ko kiging’atak ko u ni, kele ngo macham chi age tugul kobois, ko mat ongoamis." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Amu kigase agobo alak eng’ kwenung’wong’ che bendoti eng’ bistoet, che maboisiei agot kitigin, ago kibieminik." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ago king’ate ak kiteechini che u choto eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, kele kobois eng’ mutyonet, ak koam amitwogikwak." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ago okwek, che kitupche, among’etye eng’ yaet ne oyae ne mie." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ak ngo magase it chi age tugul ng’olyondennyo eng’ baruani, obwat chichoto, amat oyomege ak inendet, si kobiit kolilan." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Amoiit inendet ole bunyot, ago otigon ko u tupchet." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nguno anyun ingogonok kalyet Kiptaiyat inendet, ne Kiptaiyat ne bo kalyet, kotugul eng’ ui tugul. Ingoteb Kiptaiyat kobotok okwek tugul." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kagatennyu ane Paulo eng’ eunnyu, noto kaborunet eng’ baruet age tugul: asire anyun ko u noto." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo kobotok okwek tugul. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Kristo Jesu ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah Yetindennyo, ak Kristo Jesu ne kamang’unennyo;" 
1Timothy1:2 asirjini Timoteo lakwennyu, ne bo iman eng’ kayanet: Ingoteb koboten mieindo, ak rirenetab ge, ak kalyet, che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo." 
1Timothy1:3 Ko u ye kiasomin ale itebe Epeso, ye kiawendi Makedonia, si kobiit ing’at bik alak amat konet konetisiet ne ter," 
1Timothy1:4 anan koepchi it atindonik ak tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, che matinyei ole igesunegei, che ing’eeti teebutik, kosiir ripsetab boisietab Jehovah ne mi eng’ kayanet; kasomin nguno anyun ko u noto." 
1Timothy1:5 Ago kasuldaetab ng’atutioni ko chamnyet ne bunu muguleldo ne tilil ak kabwatet ne mie ak kayanet ne matinyei kenisiet: 
1Timothy1:6 ye kingo kagochilil bik alak eng’ tuguchuto, koyiemjigei ng’alalet ne bo buch," 
1Timothy1:7 chamei koek konetikab Ng’atutiet, nganda maiguitos che mwaei, anan ng’alechato mwaei eng’ kimnatet." 
1Timothy1:8 Ago kingen kele mie Ng’atutiet, ngo boisie chi ko u ye nyolu," 
1Timothy1:9 kongen kole kima kiyai Ng’atutiet agobo chi ne bo imanda, ago agobo bistoik ak ng’emik, agobo che yaachen ak kiptengeginik, agobo che ma tililen ak che maiywei Jehovah, agobo che barei kwanisiek ak che barei kametisiek agobo rumik," 
1Timothy1:10 agobo che soksei, ak murenik che ibegei ak murenik, ak che chorei bik, ak kiplembechonik, ak che iyostos lembech, ak ngo mi kit age tugul ne ketei konetisiet ne bo imanit;" 
1Timothy1:11 ko u ye mwaei logoiywek che miach che bo torornatetab Jehovah ne iberurot, che kigigona atononji." 
1Timothy1:12 Amwachini kongoi inendet, ne kiimuktawa, inendet Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo, amu kiita kole a chito ne kiyani, kondea boisiet;" 
1Timothy1:13 nganda kia chi ne chubisiei eng’ tai, ak ne usisiei, ak kia kolgol: ago kianyoru rirenetab ge, amu kiayae ko mangen kotom ayan;" 
1Timothy1:14 ak kitesak mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo kobarait koboto kayanet ak chamnyet ne mi eng’ Kristo Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Bo iman ng’olyondoni, ak nyolu koyanak inne, ne mwaei kole kinyo Kristo Jesu ng’ony kosor kiptengeginik; a ne bo tai eng’ choto;" 
1Timothy1:16 ago kianyoru rirenetab ge amu ng’olyondoni, si kobiit kobarta Jesu Kristo muitaennyi tugul eng’ ane, ne a ne bo tai, koek kaborunet eng’ ichek che tun iyani inendet agoi sobondab koigeny." 
1Timothy1:17 Ingobunji anyun nguno Laitoriat ne bo koigeny, ne ma ng’emaksei, ne ma toogu, Jehovah ne inegei, teegisto ak torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Kagonin kayomisoni inye lakwennyu Timoteo, ko u amdaosiek che kisib kemwa agobo inye si kobiit imuch iyai luget ne mie eng’ choto;" 
1Timothy1:19 iname kayanet ak kabwatet ne mie; che, kingo kagometo alage, kong’emogis eng’ kayanet;" 
1Timothy1:20 eng’ choto ko Humenayo ak Aleksandro; che kiagochi Setani, si kobiit kinet si machubis." 
1Timothy2:1 Ne bo tai anyun aboru ale ingoyaak somutik, ak sautik, ak saisaet, ak mwaet ne bo kongoi agobo bik tugul;" 
1Timothy2:2 agobo laitorinik ak tugul che tinyei bounatet; si kobiit ketebe kalyet ak mutyonet eng’ kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah ak teegisto. 
1Timothy2:3 Mie nito ak ko taagaksei eng’ taitab Jehovah Yetindennyo; 
1Timothy2:4 ne machei kole kesor bik tugul, ak konyor naet ne bo imanit." 
1Timothy2:5 Amu mitei Jehovah agenge, katuiyoindet agenge agine kwenutab Jehovah ak bik, noto chito, Kristo Jesu," 
1Timothy2:6 ne kiigoitogei koek ne kitiage tugul; ne tun kibaorianjin eng’ betusiekyik; 
1Timothy2:7 kigindea anyun agobo noto aek amdoindet ak ne kiyoktoi (amwae imanit, mamwae lembech), konetindetab Bororiosiek eng’ kayanet ak imanit." 
1Timothy2:8 Amache anyun ale kosaei murenik eng’ komosta age tugul, konamjin barak eunekwak che tililen, ko mami neregek ak tiiyet." 
1Timothy2:9 Ko u noto kobogorisiek ingolaach ge eng’ kalaakset ne nyolu, eng’ teegisto ak ribetab ge; ma eng’ laetab sumeek, ak tahabu anan sonoek che kororon anan ngoroik che bo kamanutiet ne o;" 
1Timothy2:10 ago (ko u ye nyoljin kobogorisiek che ibortogei kole bikab Jehovah icheget) eng’ boisionik che miach. 
1Timothy2:11 Ingonetgei kobogoriot eng’ mutyonet koboto kasetab it. 
1Timothy2:12 Ago machamjini kobogoriot konetis, anan koboi muren, ago kotebi eng’ mutyonet." 
1Timothy2:13 Amu kigiyai Adam korok, si keyae Awa;" 
1Timothy2:14 ak kima king’al Adam, ago kingo kageng’al kobogoriot kobutyi bistoet;" 
1Timothy2:15 ago kisoru eng’ sigisiet, ngo tebyei ichek eng’ kayanet ak chamnyet ak katabanet koboto ribetab ge." 
1Timothy3:1 Bo iman ng’olyondoni, Ngo machei chi koek ribindetab kaniset, ko kamach boisiet ne mie." 
1Timothy3:2 Kanyolji anyun ribindet koek ne magigeerjin ng’olyo ne ma litit, manong’otiotab osotiot agenge, ne ribegei, ne litit ng’omnatet, ne tebyei komie, ne taachei toek, ne chepcheb konetis;" 
1Timothy3:3 ne ma kimaiya, ne ma birisiei; ago ne tala, ne ma chi ne bo boriot, ne machamei siling’isiek;" 
1Timothy3:4 ne bou gonnyi komie, ne igochin eng’ teegisto tugul lagokyik kogas it;" 
1Timothy3:5 (ago ngo manai chi ole boundoi gonnyi, koriptoi ano kanisetab Jehovah?)" 
1Timothy3:6 Ama chi ne kota koyani, si ye men kobutyi kiruogetab oindet." 
1Timothy3:7 Ak kogeny konyoljin kotinyei baornatet ne mie eng’ icheget che mi sang’; si maibutyi tewernatet ak mestetab oindet. 
1Timothy3:8 Ko u noto kiboitinikab kaniset kanyol kotebi eng’ teegisto, ma che bo ng’elyebwek aeng’, ama che bogitos, ama che kasei miat agobo siling’isiek;" 
1Timothy3:9 che namei ung’otietab kayanet eng’ kabwatet ne tilil. 
1Timothy3:10 Ak nyolu ketiem chuto agichek korok; ingoyai anyun ichek boisietab kiboitinik ngo magigeerjin ng’olyo ne ma litit. 
1Timothy3:11 Ko u noto kobogorisiek, kanyol kotebi eng’ teegisto, ma kataamik, che ribegei, che kiyani eng’ tuguk tugul." 
1Timothy3:12 Ingoek kiboitinikab kaniset manong’otaikab osotiot agenge, kobou lagokwak ak gorikwak komie." 
1Timothy3:13 Amu icheget che kigobois komie eng’ boisionoto bo kiboitinik, konyoru teegisto ne mie, ak nyiganatet ne o eng’ kayanet ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Kasirun tuguchu, amang’u ale anyonjinin ko negit;" 
1Timothy3:15 ago ngot agage, imuchi inai ole kanyol kotepto bik eng’ gotab Jehovah, noto kanisetab Jehovah ne sobei, toloita ak irimetab imanit." 
1Timothy3:16 Ak ne matiny, ko o ung’otiot ne bo kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah; Inendet ne king’ang’ak eng’ borto, Kigiityi imanda eng’ tamirmiriet, Ne kigeer malaikaisiek, Ne kigiamda eng’ Bororiosiek, Ne kiiyan che bo ng’ony, Ne kigimut kwo barak eng’ torornatet." 
1Timothy4:1 Ago mwaei Tamirmiriet kotook, kole tun eng’ betusiek che bwanei koistoegei alak kayanet, koepchin it tamirmirik che ibeeti bich ak konetisiosiek che bo oik," 
1Timothy4:2 eng’ chombilisietab bik che ng’alali lembech, che kigoigei kabwatutikwak che kigibeele karnet ne beelei bich;" 
1Timothy4:3 che etei kitunis, ak koistoegei amitwogik alak, che kiyai Jehovah kole kotaach eng’ kongoi ichek che iyani ak kongen imanit." 
1Timothy4:4 Amu mie yautiet age tugul ne bo Jehovah, ama mi kiy ne nyolu keesio, ngetaach eng’ kongoi:" 
1Timothy4:5 amu kitilili eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah ak saet. 
1Timothy4:6 Ngot ibwatyi che kitupche tuguchu, iegu anyun kiboitiot ne mie ne bo Kristo Jesu, ne baat komie eng’ ng’alek che bo kayanet, ak eng’ konetisiet ne mie ne kiisub inye:" 
1Timothy4:7 ago esie atindonik che bo tangoita che manamegei ak oretab Jehovah, che mwaei chebiosok. Ak igiilge eng’ kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah:" 
1Timothy4:8 amu borot ne matia kagiiletab ge ne bo borto; ago borotet eng’ tuguk tugul kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah, amu tinyei arorutiet ne bo sobondo ne mi nguno, ak ne nyonei." 
1Timothy4:9 Bo iman ng’olyondoni, ak konyolu koyanak inne." 
1Timothy4:10 Kiyae anyun boisiet ne o amu nito ak kigiilige, amu mitei kamang’unennyo Jehovah ne sobei, inendet Yetindetab bik tugul, ago ne siirei ko bo bik che iyani." 
1Timothy4:11 Ng’at tuguchu ak inet. 
1Timothy4:12 Amat kosas chi ming’inateng’ung’; ago egu kaborunet eng’ ichek che iyani, eng’ ng’olyot, eng’ atepto, eng’ chamnyet, eng’ kayanet, eng’ tililindo." 
1Timothy4:13 Agoi anyo, chuuljige somanet, ak kateitaet, ak konetisiet." 
1Timothy4:14 Amebagakte iboisie konunet ne itinye, ne kigigonin eng’ oret ne bo amdaet, koboto kagonooretab eunek che bo boisiekab kaniset." 
1Timothy4:15 Igiiljige tuguchuto; igochige mising’; si kotook eng’ bik tugul bandang’ung’ ne bo tai. 
1Timothy4:16 Ripge, ak irib konetisieng’ung’. Tepte tuguchuto; amu ngiyae nito isoruge koboto icheget che kasin." 
1Timothy5:1 Amerasyi boiyo, ago ng’alalji ko u kwanda; murenik ko u che otupche," 
1Timothy5:2 chebiosok ko u kametisiek, kwonyik che mengechen ko u tibik che otupche, eng’ tililindo tugul." 
1Timothy5:3 Teech mosogik che mosogik iman. 
1Timothy5:4 Ago ngo tinyei mosoget age tugul lagok anan mochogoronik, konetgei korok kobarta kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah eng’ bikab gonywa, ak koyaakyi sigikwak toretet: amu taagaksei nito eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
1Timothy5:5 Ak inendet ne mosoget iman, ne tebyei inegei, kotinyei kamang’unennyi eng’ Jehovah, ak kotepto somutik ak sautik kemoi ak bet." 
1Timothy5:6 Ago inendet ne suegei ko kagome agot ngo sobei. 
1Timothy5:7 Ng’at tuguchuto, si kotebi ichek ko matinyei tewernat." 
1Timothy5:8 Ago ngo maribei chi bikyik, ak che siirei ko che bo gonnyi, ko kagoesio kayanet, ak ko ya kosiir chito ne ma iyan." 
1Timothy5:9 Amat kesirji ole kisirjin mosogik kotom koit kenyisiek tamanwogik lo, ne ki osotiotab chito agenge," 
1Timothy5:10 ne kimwaitae inendet boisionik che miach; ngo kigobai lagok, ngo kigotaach toek, ngo kigoun kelyekab che tililen, ngo kigotoret che nyalildos, ngo kigogiilgei eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie." 
1Timothy5:11 Ago esie mosogik che mengechen; amu ye kagongelelji Kristo, komach kitun;" 
1Timothy5:12 tinyei kiruoget anyun, amu kagometo kayanenywa ne bo tai." 
1Timothy5:13 Koboto noto anyun konetgei koek chorirenik, ak koitoti gorik; ago ma chorirenik kityo, ago chaamik ak che iboti chemererosiek, kong’alalote tuguk che manyoljin." 
1Timothy5:14 Noto anyun achame ale kitun mosogik che ta ko mengechen, si kosich lagok, ak korib got, amat kogochi boroindo bunyot kochuris eng’ ui tugul;" 
1Timothy5:15 amu agot nguno ko kagomasta alak kosub Setani. 
1Timothy5:16 Ngo tinyei kobogoriot ne iyanat mosogik, ingotoret anyun ichek, si manyor nyigisindo kaniset; si kotoret che mosogik iman." 
1Timothy5:17 Ingiityi boisiek che bou komie, teegisto konyil aeng’, ne siirei ko ichek che yaei boisiet ne nyigis ne bo ng’olyot ak konetisiet." 
1Timothy5:18 Amu mwaei sirutiet kole, Amerat kutitab eito ne tiechei bek koborei, ak, Nyoljin kiboitiot melektanyi." 
1Timothy5:19 Ametaach kataamset agobo boiyo, kobate eng’ kutuswekab baorinik aeng’ anan ko somok." 
1Timothy5:20 Ker kong’ eng’ taitab bik tugul icheget che yaei tengekwogik, si kobiit koiywei chun alage agichek." 
1Timothy5:21 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak Kristo Jesu, ak malaikaisiek che lewenotin, ale irib tuguchuto amesib itil kiruoget, ameyae kiy age tugul eng’ tiytiet." 
1Timothy5:22 Amegonoor chi age tugul eunek eng’ sartaet, anan iyai yamdaet ak tengekwogikab bik alak: ripge eng’ tililindo." 
1Timothy5:23 Koboch nguno ko mata iee beek kityo, ago boisie divaik tutigin amu moeng’ung’, ak amu mianweguk che bo atgai tugul." 
1Timothy5:24 Toogunotin tengekwogikab bik alak, indoe kobendi kiruoget; ak che bo bik alak agichek kosubi ichek." 
1Timothy5:25 Ko u noto agine mitei boisionik che miach che toogunotin; ak che ma u choto ko maimugaksei koung’ogis. 
1Timothy6:1 Ingoiityi otwogik alak tugul che ratotin kole nyoljin kiptainikwak teegisto tugul, si ma kichub kainetab Jehovah ak konetisiet." 
1Timothy6:2 Ak ichek che tinyei kiptainik che iyanotin, ko mat kosas ichek, amu tupchosiek; ago kaigai koot ichek, amu icheget che nyoru toretet ko che iyani ak ko chamanik. Inet ng’alechu ak iteechi." 
1Timothy6:3 Ngoneti chi age tugul konetisiet ne ter, ama chamei ng’alek che bo iman, ng’alekab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ak konetisiet ne namegei ak atebet ne bo kaiyweisietab Jehovah;" 
1Timothy6:4 komenei, ama naei kiy, ago tinyei miando agobo teebutik ak tiiyosiekab ng’alek che bunu ng’etkonda, suriet, chemereret, kabwatutik che yaachen," 
1Timothy6:5 boriosiekab bik che kigong’emogis kabwatutikwak, ak che kigirebe imanit, kolen kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah ko oret ne kibore." 
1Timothy6:6 Ago kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah koboto yametab ge eng’ tuguk che kitinye, ko borotet ne o:" 
1Timothy6:7 amu kima kiibu kiy konyo ng’ony, ama kimuchi keib kiy komanda eng’ ng’ony;" 
1Timothy6:8 ago kitinye amitwogik ak ngoroik; yamech choto. 
1Timothy6:9 Ago ichek che machei koek magorek kobutyin yomset ak mestet ak magutik che chang’ che berberen, che ibu ng’wanindo, che lugui bik koba ng’emisiet ak luset." 
1Timothy6:10 Amu chametab siling’isiek ko tigitiot agenge ne bo yaitwogik alak tugul: che kigong’asyigei alage kot kometo kayanet ak kigotorgei eng’ arogenosiek che chang’. 
1Timothy6:11 Ago inye, ee, chitab Jehovah, mwee tuguchuto; ak isub imanda, ak kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah, kayanet, chamnyet, muitaet, mutyonet." 
1Timothy6:12 Yai luget ne mie ne bo kayanet, nam sobondo ne bo koigeny, noto ne kigiguurjin, ak kiing’any ng’ang’et ne mie eng’ taitab baorinik che chang’." 
1Timothy6:13 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah, ne ribei tuguk tugul kosopcho, ak eng’ taitab Kristo Jesu, ne kibaorian ng’ang’et ne mie eng’ taitab Pontio Pilato;" 
1Timothy6:14 ale irib ng’atutiet amanyor berut, ne magimuchi keger kong’, agoi toogunetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo:" 
1Timothy6:15 ne tun ibortoi eng’ betusiekyik, ne inendet ne iberurot ak ko Kamuktaindet inegei, Laitoriat ne bo laitorinik, ak Kiptaiyat ne bo kiptainik;" 
1Timothy6:16 ne tinyei inegei sobondab koigeny, ne menyei eng’ lapkeiyet ne magimuchi kerikyi; ne tomo kogeer chi, ama imuchi kogeer: ingobunji inendet teegisto ak kamuktaet koigeny. Amen" 
1Timothy6:17 Ng’at magorek che bo betusiechu, si mamenio, anan konde kamang’unenywa magornatosiek che matonondos, ago eng’ Jehovah inendet ne konech tuguk tugul eng’ aiyebindo si kobiit keboiboitune;" 
1Timothy6:18 ile koyai ne mie, si kobiit koek magorek eng’ boisionik che miach, si kochobogis kogoito, koyomogei ak alak;" 
1Timothy6:19 kogonorjigei lumdaet ne mie, agobo betusiek che bwanei, si kobiit konam sobondo noto ne bo iman." 
1Timothy6:20 Ee, Timoteo, rib anyun noto kigegonin, istoege ng’alek che manamegei ak oretab Jehovah, ak kabeletab ge ne bo naet, noto kiguure eng’ lembech naet;" 
1Timothy6:21 ne kigosub alage ak kigochiliil eng’ kayanet. Ingoteb mieindo koboten. 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Kristo Jesu eng’ magetab Jehovah, ko u arorutiet ne bo sobondo ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 asirjini Timoteo, lakwennyu ne achame mising’: Ingoteb koboten mieindo, rirenetab ge, kalyet, che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Kristo Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo." 
2Timothy1:3 Amwachini Jehovah kongoi, ne aote ko u ye kiyaei kwanisiekyuk che bo tai eng’ kabwatet ne tilil, ale masisei kabwatet ne abwatin eng’ somutikyuk, kemoi ak bet," 
2Timothy1:4 atinye emosto ageerin, abwati beeguk bo kong’, si konyiia boiboiyet;" 
2Timothy1:5 ye kingibwatwa kayanet ne matinyei kenisiet ne mi eng’ inye; ne kimenyei korok eng’ ingogo Lois, ak komet Eunike; ak, ayani ale menyin aginye." 
2Timothy1:6 Abwatun anyun amu nito ale iyuokyi konunet ne bo Jehovah, ne mi eng’ inye amu kagonooretab eunekyuk." 
2Timothy1:7 Amu kima konech Jehovah tamirmirietab nyogoriet, ago ne bo kamuget ak chamnyet ak ribetab ge." 
2Timothy1:8 Amelilanji anyun baornatetab Kiptaiyandennyo, anan ane kimonjororiondennyi: ago nam yamdaetab nyalilwogik amu logoiywek che miach ko u ye te kamuktaetab Jehovah;" 
2Timothy1:9 ne kisoruech ak koguurech eng’ kuurset ne tilil, ma ko u boisionikyok, ago ko u magennyi ak mieindanyi, ne kigigonech eng’ Kristo Jesu koboch kenyisiekab koigeny," 
2Timothy1:10 ago kagotook nguno eng’ toogunetab Yetindennyo Kristo Jesu, ne kigobar meet, ak kong’any sobondo ak ng’emisiet ne ma komi, eng’ logoiywek che miach," 
2Timothy1:11 kigindea agobo noto aek amdoindet, ak ne kiyoktoi, ak konetindet." 
2Timothy1:12 Anyoru anyun nyalilwogichu agichek agobo noto: ago malilani; amu angen inendet ne kiayan, ak ayani komie ale imuchi korib noto ne kiagochi inendet agoi betunoto." 
2Timothy1:13 Nam itondab ng’alek che bo iman che kiigasena, eng’ kayanet ak chamnyet ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Rib eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne menyei eng’ achek, noto mie ne kigigonin." 
2Timothy1:15 Ingen ni ile, kigoistoenagei tugul che mi Asia; eng’ ichek ko Pugelo ak Hermogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Ingogochi Kiptaiyat rirenet gotab Onesiporo: amu kitoreta konyil che chang’, ama ililan amu monjororinnyu;" 
2Timothy1:17 ago, ye kingomi Rom, kocheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak kinyorua," 
2Timothy1:18 (ingogochi Kiptaiyat inendet konyor rirenet ne bo Kiptaiyat eng’ betunoto;) ak ingen komie ole te boisiet ne kiyai eng’ Epeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Kimitu anyun, lakwennyu, eng’ mieindo ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Ak tuguk che kiigasena eng’ kwenutab baorinik che chang’, igochi choto bik che kiyani, che imuchi konet alak agichek." 
2Timothy2:3 Nam yamdaet ne bo nyalilda, ko u askarindet ne mie ne bo Kristo Jesu." 
2Timothy2:4 Mami askarindet, ne ngo mi boisiet, koratyingei tuguk che bo ng’ony; si kobiit kobaibai ne kisirei inendet koek askarindet." 
2Timothy2:5 Ak ngot koyai chi agine kabeletab ge eng’ ureriosiek, ko magigochin kutwet, ngo ma ibelis ko u ye mwaei ng’atutik." 
2Timothy2:6 Nyoljin kabatindet ne yaei boisiet ne uui, kosib kotongoi logoek." 
2Timothy2:7 Ruchi komie kit ne amwae; amu konin Kiptaiyat kaguiyet eng’ tuguk tugul. 
2Timothy2:8 Ibwat Jesu Kristo, ne king’eet eng’ che kigobek, ne bo keswekab Daudi, ko u logoiywekyuk che miach:" 
2Timothy2:9 ne anyorune nyalilda, agoi monjorornatosiek; ko u chito ne yaei yaitio; ago ma ratat ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Timothy2:10 Noto anyun amuitoi eng’ tuguk tugul amu che kigilewen, si kobiit konyor agichek yetunet ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu koboto torornatetab koigeny." 
2Timothy2:11 Bo iman ng’olyondoni: Amu ngo kigebegu koboto inendet, kesoptosi koboto inendet:" 
2Timothy2:12 ngemuite, ko tun kibou koboto inendet: ngot keesie inendet, ko tun esioech agine:" 
2Timothy2:13 ngo ma ki bo iman, kotebyei inendet eng’ iman; amu maimuchi koesiogei." 
2Timothy2:14 Ibwatyi ichek tuguchuto, ng’at ichek eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat, si maibelgei agobo ng’alek, che magisige kiy, che ng’emei ichek che kasei." 
2Timothy2:15 Igiilgei ibartege ile kigoyanun Jehovah iegu kiboitiot ne manyol kolilan, ne boisie komie ng’olyotab imanit." 
2Timothy2:16 Istoege ng’alek che manamegei ak oretab Jehovah: amu tesoksei koyaagitu kosiir eng’ yaitiet," 
2Timothy2:17 ak amei ng’olyondenywa ko u chepsergechet: eng’ ichek ko Humenayo ak Pileto; 
2Timothy2:18 bik che kigochiliil eng’ imanit, mwaei kole kigosiirto ng’eetyet, ak koweleli kayanetab bik alak." 
2Timothy2:19 Ago tononi lumeiywot ne kim ne bo Jehovah, kotinyei ng’oksoni kele, Ingen Kiptaiyat ichek che chechik; ak, Ingoistoegei yaitiet age tugul ne mwaei kainetab Kiptaiyat." 
2Timothy2:20 Ago eng’ got ne o ko mami terenikab tahabu ak feda kityo, ago che bo ketik ak ng’ung’unyek agichek; ak bo alage teegisto, ko ma bo alage teegisto." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngotililgei anyun chi eng’ tuguchuto, koegu teret ne bo teegisto, ne itabanat, ne nyoljin koboisie kiptaiyat, ne kigichopchi boisiet age tugul ne mie." 
2Timothy2:22 Ago mwee magutik che bo neranik, ak isub imanda, chamnyet, kayanet, kalyet, koboto icheget che kuurei Kiptaiyat eng’ mugulelwek che tililen." 
2Timothy2:23 Ago esie teebutik che berberen che mabunu konetisiet, ingen ile yiei boriosiek." 
2Timothy2:24 Ama nyoljin otwogindetab Kiptaiyat koyai boriet, ago koek ne tala eng’ tugul, ne chepcheb konetis, ago muitoi," 
2Timothy2:25 ne kere kong’ eng’ mutyonet ichek che kirindoi; tamangab kogochi Jehovah ichek sigunet ne bo naetab imanit," 
2Timothy2:26 ak kosorgei ichek komong’une mestetab oindet, ko kagoluul ichek si koyai magennyi." 
2Timothy3:1 Ago nai ni ile bwanei eng’ betusiek che bo let egosiek che bichien. 
2Timothy3:2 Amu egu bik che chamegei ichegei, che chamei siling’isiek, che ichaugei, che mendos, che boisie chemereret, che ingeleljin sigikwak, che matinyei kongoi, che ma tililen," 
2Timothy3:3 che matinyei chamnyet, che matinyei nyoetab kaat, che itaamsei, che maribegei, che kolgolen, che machamei che miach," 
2Timothy3:4 ng’wektoik, ngelelik, che ilosugei, che chamei ureriet kosiir koek che chamei Jehovah;" 
2Timothy3:5 che tinyei kergeindab kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah, ago esioi kimnatet ne bo kaiyweonato: istoege chuto agichek." 
2Timothy3:6 Amu biitune chuto che itoti gorik, ak koluul kobogorisiek che berber che tinyei chalwogik che chang’, che indochin magutik che terotin." 
2Timothy3:7 Che inetegei kotugul, ago magoi imuch koityi naetab imanit." 
2Timothy3:8 Ak ko u Janne ak Jambre, che kigirinda Musa, koyaei chu agichek ko u noto, kirindoi imanit; bik che kigong’emogis ng’omnatosiekwak, che betyotin eng’ oretab kayanet." 
2Timothy3:9 Ago matesei tai: amu toogu berberindanywa eng’ bik tugul, ko u ne bo chugai agichek." 
2Timothy3:10 Ago kiisub inye konetisiennyu, atebet, kit ne atokyinige, kayanet, mutyonet, chamnyet, muitaet," 
2Timothy3:11 usisiosiek, nyalilwogik; tuguchoto che kibwanja eng’ Antiokia, ak Ikonia, ak Lustra; kiamuite eng’ usisiosiechoto tugul: ak kisorua Kiptaiyat eng’ choto tugul." 
2Timothy3:12 Ee, tugul che machei kotebi eng’ atebet ne mie eng’ Kristo Jesu, konyoru usisiet." 
2Timothy3:13 Ago tesoksei kiptengeginik ak kenik eng’ yaitiet, koberberisiei ak kiberberi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ago tebi inye eng’ tuguk che kiinetge, ak che kigiguiyeun, ingen icheget che kiinetege;" 
2Timothy3:15 ak koboch ko i lakwa ko kiingen sirutik che tililen che imuchi kong’omitin agoi yetunet eng’ kayanet ne mitei eng’ Kristo Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Bunu kabusetab Jehovah sirutiet age tugul, ak kotoreti eng’ konetisiet, eng’ kergong’iet, eng’ kateechinet, eng’ kotigonet ne mi eng’ imanda:" 
2Timothy3:17 si kobiit koek chitab Jehovah, ne inetat, ne kigichob koek ne ititaat eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie." 
2Timothy4:1 Kang’atin anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak Kristo Jesu, ne tun iruokyin che soptos ak che kigobek, ak eng’ toogunennyi ak eng’ bounatennyi;" 
2Timothy4:2 amde ng’olyot; choboge eng’ betut ne nyolu, ak eng’ betut ne ma nyolu; itigon, ker kong’, igiil, eng’ muitaet tugul ak konetisiet." 
2Timothy4:3 Amu nyonei betut ne ma tun epchin it agot kitigin konetisiet ne bo imanit; ago, tinyei itik che iututos, iyumjingei konetik che isubi magutikwak;" 
2Timothy4:4 ak koesio koepchi it imanit, ak komasta kosub atindonik che bo buch." 
2Timothy4:5 Ago ripge inye eng’ tuguk tugul, muite eng’ nyalilda, yai boisietab amdaetab logoiywek che miach, yai boisieng’ung’ kosulda." 
2Timothy4:6 Amu kigoitoa nguno, ak kagoit betusiek che awendi." 
2Timothy4:7 Kiayai luget ne mie, kaagesu labatet, kiarib kayanet:" 
2Timothy4:8 koboch nguno ko kagegonorua kutwet ne bo imanda, ne tun kona Kiptaiyat, kiruogindet ne bo imanda, eng’ betunoto: ago ma anege, ago icheget tugul agichek che kigocham toogunennyi." 
2Timothy4:9 Igiilge nyonja ko negit: 
2Timothy4:10 amu kigobagakta Dema, ko kagocham ng’onyuni bo betusiechu, ak kwo Tesalonika; kwo Kreske Galatia, kwo Tito Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka inegei ne mi kobota. Imutu Mariko, ak obwa tuwai: amu toreta eng’ boisiet." 
2Timothy4:12 Ago kiayokte Tukiko kwo Epeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ye inyo iibu sumet ak bukusiek, ago ne siirei ko magatok che kisirei che kiabagakyi Karpo eng’ Troa." 
2Timothy4:14 Kiyaiywa ne ya mising’ Aleksandro, kitong’oindet ne bo sugunoik: tun yaakyin Kiptaiyat ko u boisionikyik:" 
2Timothy4:15 ribege inendet; amu kigirinda ng’alekyok mising’ kot. 
2Timothy4:16 Ma biit chi ne kitoreta eng’ wolunennyu ne bo tai; kibagakta tugul: amat kiityi ichek ng’olyondonito. 
2Timothy4:17 Ago kitonon Kiptaiyat kobota, ak kogimita; si kobiit keamda eng’ ane ng’alek komie, ak si kogas Bororiosiek tugul: ak kigisorua eng’ kutitab ng’etundo." 
2Timothy4:18 Sorua Kiptaiyat eng’ boisiet age tugul ne ya, ak kosorua agoi ait bounatennyi ne bo kipsengwet: nenyi torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Igat Priska ak Akula, ak bikab Onesiporo." 
2Timothy4:20 Kitebi Erasto eng’ Korinto: ago kiabagach Tropimo eng’ Mileto komiani. 
2Timothy4:21 Igiilge nyo kotom koit betusiek che bo kaititiet. Igatin Eubulo, ak Pude, ak Lino, ak Klaudia, ak tupchosiek tugul." 
2Timothy4:22 Ingoteb Kiptaiyat koboto tamirmirieng’ung’. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok. 
Titus1:1 Paulo, otwogindetab Jehovah, ak ne kiyoktoi ne bo Jesu Kristo, ko u kayanetab che kigilewen che bo Jehovah, ak naetab imanit ne namegei ak kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah," 
Titus1:2 eng’ kamang’unet ne bo sobondab koigeny, ne kiiyomis Jehovah, ne maimuchi kolembechan, koboch kenyisiek che bo koigeny;" 
Titus1:3 ago king’any ng’olyondennyi eng’ betusiekyik eng’ amdaet, ne kigiyanwa ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah Yetindennyo:" 
Titus1:4 asirjini Tito, lakwennyu ne bo iman eng’ kayanet ne kiyamdoi: Ingoteb koboten mieindo ak kalyet che bunu Jehovah Kwanda ak Kristo Jesu Yetindennyo." 
Titus1:5 Kiabagakten eng’ Krete amu ng’olyondoni, si kobiit ichob tuguk che ki rartootin, ak inde boisiek nganaset age tugul, ko u ye kiang’atin;" 
Titus1:6 ngot komi chi age tugul ne matinyei lelut, ne manong’otiotab osotiot agenge, ne tinyei lagok che iyanotin, che magimwaitae yaitio, anan che magase it." 
Titus1:7 Amu kanyolji ribindetab kaniset koek chi ne matinyei lelut, inendet ne ribindetab boisietab Jehovah; ma ne isubi magennyi, ne ma sib konerechi, ne ma kimaiya, ne mabirisiei, ne ma ting’e keiyandit magornatetab tewernatet;" 
Titus1:8 ago ne taachei toek, ne chamei che miachen, ne bou kabwatutikyik, ne bo imanda, ne tilil, ne ribegei;" 
Titus1:9 ne namei ng’olyot ne kiyani ko u ole teptoi konetisiet, si komuch koteechi eng’ konetisiet ne bo iman, ak koterter kiptiyotinik." 
Titus1:10 Amu mi bik che chang’ che magase it, ng’ololikab ng’alek che bo buch ak kenik, mising’ ko ichek che bo kamuratanet," 
Titus1:11 che kanyol keger kutuswekwak; che itarng’anyi go komugul, koneti tuguk che kama konyolu amu magornatetab tewernatet." 
Titus1:12 Kile age eng’ ichek, ne maotionywa, Kiplembechonik Kretik kotugul, tiong’ik che yaachen, kipkeinik che choriren." 
Titus1:13 Bo iman baornatanito. Ker kong’ anyun eng’ kimnatet amu noto, si kobiit koek che bo iman eng’ kayanet," 
Titus1:14 ama epchin it atindonikab Yahudik, ak ng’atutikab bik che istoegei imanit." 
Titus1:15 Tililen tuguk tugul eng’ ichek che tililen: ago mami kiy ne tilil eng’ icheget che muruonen che maiyanotin; ago muruonen nautikwak ak kabwatutikwak. 
Titus1:16 Mwaei kole ingen Jehovah; ago esioi inendet eng’ boisionikwak, kigoek che kiwechei, ak che magase it, ama tilei kiy eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie." 
Titus2:1 Ago ng’alal inye agobo ng’alek che nyoljin konetisiet ne bo iman: 
Titus2:2 si koripgei boisiek che kagoeegitu, koek che bo teegisto, che bou kabwatutikwak, che bo iman eng’ kayanet, eng’ chamnyet, eng’ muitaet:" 
Titus2:3 ko u noto chebiosok che kagoeegitu, ingoek che teegot eng’ atebosiekwak, che ma kataamik, anan che rategei eng’ divaik che chang’, konetik che bo tuguk che miach;" 
Titus2:4 si kobiit konet osotik che mengechen kocham manong’otaikwak, kocham lagokwak," 
Titus2:5 koek che bou kabwatutikwak, che tililen, che boisiei eng’ gorikwak, che taloen, che kase it manong’otaikwak, si ma kimwaitae ng’olyotab Jehovah kiy ne ya:" 
Titus2:6 iteechi neranik agichek koek che bou kabwatutikwak; 
Titus2:7 ibartege inyendet eng’ tuguk tugul iegu kaborunet ne bo boisionik che miachen; eng’ konetisieng’ung’ ibarte atebet ne ma ng’emaksei," 
Titus2:8 ng’alek che bo iman, teegisto, che magimuchi kiruokyi; si kobiit kolilan inendet ne kirindoech, ko matinyei kiy ne ya ne mwaitaenech." 
Titus2:9 Ingogas it otwogik kiptainikwak, ak kobaibai ichek komie eng’ tuguk tugul; amaek che wolu kiy;" 
Titus2:10 amaek che koen eun, ago kobarta kayanet tugul ne mie; si kobiit kogochi ichek telunatet konetisietab Jehovah ne Yetindennyo eng’ tuguk tugul." 
Titus2:11 Amu kigotook mieindab Jehovah, ne ipchin bik tugul yetunet." 
Titus2:12 Inetech kole keesie oret ne matokyingei Jehovah, ak magutik che bo ng’ony, ak ketebi eng’ ng’omnatet ne litit, ak eng’ imanda, ak eng’ oret ne tokyingei Jehovah eng’ kenyisiechu;" 
Titus2:13 kigeni kamang’unet ne iberurot, noto ko toogunetab torornatetab Jehovah nenyo ne o ne Yetindennyo Jesu Kristo;" 
Titus2:14 ne kiigoitogei agobo achek, si kobiit kotiachech eng’ tengekto tugul, ak kotililjigei bik koek chechik, che lewenotin, che igiilegei eng’ boisionik che miach." 
Titus2:15 Mwa tuguchuto ak iteechi ak iger kong’ koboto bounatet tugul. Amat kosasin chi age tugul. 
Titus3:1 Ibwatyi ichek koming’injigei bounik, ak bounatosiek, kogas it, kochobogis eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie," 
Titus3:2 amat komwa kiy ne ya agobo chi age tugul, amat koek bich che bo boriot, ingoek che taloen, koborjin bik tugul mutyonet tugul." 
Titus3:3 Amu kigi berberen agachek keny, kima kegase it, kigiberberech, keote magutik che terotin ak ureriosiek, ketebye eng’ yaitiet ak ng’etkong’, kigi che kiwechei ak kewechege." 
Titus3:4 Ago ye kingotook talasietab Jehovah Yetindennyo, ak chamnyennyi ne chamei bik," 
Titus3:5 kosoruech, ma eng’ boisionikab imanda che kigiyai acheget, ago ko u ole teptoi rirenennyi bo ge, eng’ kaunetab siget ne leel ak kaleelitetab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil," 
Titus3:6 ne kirong’wech eng’ aiyebindo, eng’ Jesu Kristo Yetindennyo;" 
Titus3:7 si, ye kagiityech imanda eng’ mieindanyi, keyaech keegu che namei tuguk ko u kamang’unetab sobondab koigeny." 
Titus3:8 Bo iman ng’olyondoni, ak amache imwa tuguchuto eng’ kimnatet, si kobwat ichek che kigoyan Jehovah, koyai kotugul boisionik che miach. Miachen tuguchuto ak kotoreti bik:" 
Titus3:9 ago istoege teebutik che berber, ak tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, ak suriosiek, ak boriosiek agobo Ng’atutiet; amu matinyei borot ak ko buch." 
Titus3:10 Esie chito ne ibu toiyet ye kagitigon ne bo tai ak ne bo aeng’; 
Titus3:11 ingen ile chito ne u noto ko kigomasta, ak koyaei tengekto, ko kagoruokyigei." 
Titus3:12 Ye tun kayogu Artema, anan Tukiko, igiilge inyo eng’ Nikopoli ole ami; amu koabegechi atebe oloto eng’ betusiekab kaititiet." 
Titus3:13 Igiilge imonorsechi eng’ bandanywa Sena ng’omotiotab ng’atutik ak Apolo, si mararta kiy eng’ ichek." 
Titus3:14 Ak ingonetgei bikyok agichek koyai boisionik che miachen kotugul, agobo tuguk che makyingei, si maek che mayiei logoek." 
Titus3:15 Igatin tugul che kemi tugul. Igat ichek che chamech eng’ kayanet. Ingoteb mieindo kobotok okwek tugul. 
Philemon1:1 Paulo, kimonjororiotab Kristo Jesu, ak Timoteo tupchennyo, kisirjini Pilemon chamanennyo ne kiboitiot ne kiboisiei tugul," 
Philemon1:2 ak Apia, chepkamennyo, ak Arkipa askarindet ne kiboisiei tugul, ak kaniset ne mi gong’ung’:" 
Philemon1:3 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok ak kalyet, che bunu Jehovah Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo." 
Philemon1:4 Amwachini Jehovah nenyu kongoi kotugul, amwain eng’ sautikyuk," 
Philemon1:5 agase agobo chamnyeng’ung’, ak kayanet ne itinye eng’ Kiptaiyat Jesu, ak eng’ che tililen tugul;" 
Philemon1:6 si koek yamdaetab kayaneng’ung’ ne boisie komie, eng’ naetab kiy age tugul ne mie ne mitech, eng’ Kristo." 
Philemon1:7 Amu kiatinye boiboiyet ne o ak kagaigaet eng’ chamnyeng’ung’, amu kigonyor kamuung’et mugulelwekab bik che tililen agobo inye, ne kitupche." 
Philemon1:8 Noto anyun, agot nga ndatinye nyiganatet eng’ Kristo si ang’atin agobo noto ne nyolu," 
Philemon1:9 ago, amu chamnyet asomin mising’, ane Paulo ne koaositu, ak nguno kogeny ko a kimonjororiot ne bo Kristo Jesu:" 
Philemon1:10 asomin mising’ agobo lakwennyu Onesimo, ne kiasich eng’ monjorornatosiekyuk," 
Philemon1:11 inendet ne kima kotoretin eng’ kiy eng’ tai, ago nguno kotoretin ak kotoreta:" 
Philemon1:12 ne kaaweegun inendet ne muguleldanyu: 
Philemon1:13 ne kitamache arany ketebi tuwai, si kotoreta kogeerenengei eng’ monjorornatosiekab logoiywek che miach:" 
Philemon1:14 ago ma amach ayai kiy kotom agas kit ne ibwati; si mabun mieindang’ung’ torjinet, ago chamdaeng’ung’." 
Philemon1:15 Amu abere kiibesienengei eng’ betusiek che matia, si kobiit otebi tuwai kogeny agoi;" 
Philemon1:16 ma ko u otwogin kogeny, ago kogosiir otwogin, tupchet ne chamat, mising’ ko eng’ ane, ago siirei ne tia anyun eng’ inye, eng’ borto ak eng’ Kiptaiyat." 
Philemon1:17 Noto anyun ngiita ile ki agenge eng’ boisiet, itaach anyun ko u ye imuchi itaacha anendet." 
Philemon1:18 Ago ngo kigoyaun kiy ne ya, anan ngo kigobesenin kiy, iitya noto;" 
Philemon1:19 anendet Paulo ne kasir eng’ eunnyu, ale ayaagun; ago mamwaun ale itinye besendanyu, u kele, inyendet noto." 
Philemon1:20 Ee, tupchennyu, inganyorunenen boiboiyet eng’ Kiptaiyat: imuung’ji muguleldanyu eng’ Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Kasirun amu amang’u kaseng’ung’ bo it, angen ale iyae agot che siirei che amwae." 
Philemon1:22 Ago koboto choto ichobwa ole anyo arue: amu amang’u ale eng’ sautikwok amuchi abiit. 
Philemon1:23 Igatin Epapra ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai, eng’ Kristo Jesu;" 
Philemon1:24 ko u noto Mariko, Aristarko, Dema, ak Luka, che ki kiboitinik tugul." 
Philemon1:25 Ingoteb mieindab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo koboto tamirmirikwok. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Jehovah, ne king’alalji kwanisiekyok keny eng’ maotik, eng’ kebeberwek che chang’ ak eng’ ortinwek che chang’," 
Hebrews1:2 ko ne kagong’alalwech eng’ betusiechu bo let, eng’ Werit, ne kigonde koek ne namei tuguk tugul, ak kiyai inendet ng’ony agine eng’ inendet;" 
Hebrews1:3 inendet ko kakweng’etab lilindanyi, ak itondo ne bo indennyi, ak kotononi tuguk tugul eng’ ng’olyotab kamuktaennyi, kingo kagoyai kaundoetab tengekwogik, kwo kotebe eutab tai ne bo Etunatet eng’ barak;" 
Hebrews1:4 ko kagoek ne kararan kosiir malaikaisiek, ko u ye konyitot kainet ne kigonam inendet, kosiir kainenywa." 
Hebrews1:5 Amu kimwachi malaikaisiek ngorjo eng’ betut age, kolenji, I Werinnyu, Kaasichin rani? Ak kogeny, Aegu Kwanda eng’ inendet Ak koek inendet Werit eng’ ane?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ak ye imut kogeny taita konyo ng’ony komwa kole, Ingolos inendet malaikaisiek tugul che bo Jehovah." 
Hebrews1:7 Ak kimwa agobo malaikaisiek kole, Inendet ne yaei malaikaisiekyik koek usonaik, Ak koek kiboitinikyik liblibenetab mat:" 
Hebrews1:8 Ago kimwa agobo Werit kole, Ee, Jehovah, tebyei koigeny ak koigeny ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo laitornatet; Siaritab imanda siaritab bounateng’ung’." 
Hebrews1:9 Kiicham imanda, ak kiiwech tengekto; Eng’ noto anyun kigoiilin Jehovah, inendet Jehovah neng’ung’ Eng’ mwaitab boiboiyet kosiir siritoiguk." 
Hebrews1:10 Ak, Kiilun inye Kiptaiyandani, eng’ taunet, ole tonone ng’ony, Ak kipsengwetisiek ko boisionikab euneguk:" 
Hebrews1:11 Betos choto; ago itebye inye agoi: Ak osegitu tugul ko u ngoriet; 
Hebrews1:12 Ak imamani ko u ngoriet ne tabanu barak, Ak kiwalei ko u ngoriet: Ago i u noto inye agoi, Ama tinye kenyisieguk ole igesunegei." 
Hebrews1:13 Tos kimwachi malaikaisiek ngorjo eng’ betut age, kolenji, Tebe eunnyu ne bo tai, Agoi ayai buniguk koek ng’echeretab kelyeguk?" 
Hebrews1:14 Tos choto tugul ko ma tamirmirik che boisiei, che kiyoktoi kobois agobo ichek che tun nyoru yetunet?" 
Hebrews2:1 Eng’ noto anyun kanyol kenam mising’ kosiir, tuguchoto kigegas, si ma kichuchuige." 
Hebrews2:2 Amu ngo tononot ng’olyot ne kigimwau eng’ malaikaisiek ak kigonyor bistoet age tugul ak ngelelnatet melekto ne kageerjinet ne bo imanda; 
Hebrews2:3 kechilildoi ano anyun, ngemete yetunet ne o ne te ni? Ne kiga kisib kemwa eng’ Kiptaiyat, ak kiigimitwech ichek che kigas;" 
Hebrews2:4 ak kibaoriani agine Jehovah koboto icheget, eng’ kaborunoik ak kwong’utik, ak eng’ kamugosiek che terotin, ak eng’ kagoitaosiekab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil, ko u magennyi." 
Hebrews2:5 Amu ma igochi malaikaisiek koboi ng’onyut ne nyonei, noto kimwae." 
Hebrews2:6 Ago baoriani chito age eng’ komosta age, kole, Nee chi, ne tos ibwat? Anan weritab chi, ne tos irutochi?" 
Hebrews2:7 Kiiyai inendet koming’init kitigin eng’ malaikaisiek; Ilaakyini inendet kutwetab torornatet ak teegisto, Ak kiinde koboi boisionikab euneguk:" 
Hebrews2:8 Kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyik. Eng’ noto anyun ko u ye kiinde tuguk tugul kogas it inendet, ko kima ituch kiy ne ma kas it inendet. Ago nguno ko tom kegeer kogas it tuguk tugul inendet." 
Hebrews2:9 Ago kigeere inendet ne kigiyai koming’init kitigin eng’ malaikaisiek, inendet Jesu, ne kigilaakyi kutwet ne bo torornatet ak teegisto amu nyalilda ne bo meet, si kobiit kochamjam meet eng’ mieindab Jehovah agobo chi age tugul." 
Hebrews2:10 Amu kinyolji inendet, ne mi tuguk tugul amu inendet, ak kobunu inendet tuguk tugul, ye imutyin werik che chang’ torornatet, si koyai taunindetab yetunenywa koek ne igesunotgei eng’ nyalilwogik." 
Hebrews2:11 Amu inendet ne itililisiei ak ichek che kitilili kobunu agenge: eng’ noto anyun ko mageerei inendet kalilanet koguure ichek che kitupche," 
Hebrews2:12 kole, Amwachini kaineng’ung’ tupchosiekyuk, Atieni kalosuneng’ung’ eng’ kwenutab tuiyet." 
Hebrews2:13 Ak kogeny, Amang’u inendet. Ak kogeny, Keero, ane ak lagok che kigogona Jehovah." 
Hebrews2:14 Amu yamdoi anyun lagok korotik ak borto, kinam choto inendet agine ko u noto; si kobiit kong’em eng’ oretab meet inendet ne tinyei kimnatetab meet, noto ko oindet;" 
Hebrews2:15 si kobiit kotiach ichek tugul che ki ratotin betusiekwak tugul eng’ kaiyweisietab meet. 
Hebrews2:16 Amu iman manamei itondab malaikaisiek, ago kinam keswekab Abraham." 
Hebrews2:17 Eng’ noto anyun kinyolji keyai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul kogergeit ak tupchosiekyik, si kobiit koek tisiindet ne o ne bo rirenetab ge ak ko bo iman eng’ tuguk che tokyingei Jehovah, si kobiit koyai tisisiet agobo tengekwogikab bik." 
Hebrews2:18 Amu ko u ye kinyalil inendet ye kigiyomei, komuchi inendet kotoret ichek che kiyomei." 
Hebrews3:1 Noto anyun, che kitupche che tililen, yamdoik che bo kuursetab kipsengwet, obwat mising’ Ne Kiyoktoi ak Tisiindet ne O ne bo ng’ang’ennyo, inendet Jesu;" 
Hebrews3:2 ne kiek ne kiyani eng’ inendet ne kilewen, ko u Musa agine eng’ gotab Jehovah tugul." 
Hebrews3:3 Amu kigiit kele nyoljin torornatet ne o kosiir Musa, ko u ye tinyei inendet ne kiteechei got teegisto kosiir got." 
Hebrews3:4 Amu teechei chito got age tugul; ago inendet ne kiteechei tuguk tugul ko Jehovah. 
Hebrews3:5 Ak kiek Musa iman ne kiyani eng’ gotab Jehovah tugul ko u kiboitiot, agobo baornatet ne bo tuguchoto che ki tun kemwa eng’ let;" 
Hebrews3:6 ago Kristo ko u werit, ne bou gonnyi; achek gonnyi, ngenam mising’ nyiganatennyo ak torornatetab kamang’unennyo agoi kagesunet." 
Hebrews3:7 Noto anyun, ko u ye mwaei Tamirmiriet ne Tilil kole, Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani," 
Hebrews3:8 Ko mat ouuiit mugulelwekwok, ko u eng’ kaiimset, Ko u eng’ betutab yomset eng’ ong’atet," 
Hebrews3:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisiekwok kotiema, Ak kigeer boisionikyuk kenyisiek artam." 
Hebrews3:10 Eng’ noto anyun kianerekyi ibini, Ak kiale, ichiliili kotugul eng’ mugulelwekwak: Ago kima kongen ortinwekyuk;" 
Hebrews3:11 Ko u ye kiayosie eng’ neregekyuk ale, Maitei ichek kamuung’ennyu." 
Hebrews3:12 Oripge anyun che kitupche, si mabiit chi age tugul eng’ okwek ne tinyei muguleldo ne ya ne bo bistoet, koistoegei Jehovah ne sobei:" 
Hebrews3:13 ago oteechige betut age tugul, eng’ ye ta kemwaei kele rani; si ma kiuuiit chi age tugul eng’ okwek amu kenisietab tengekto:" 
Hebrews3:14 amu kigeegu yamdoikab Kristo, ngenam mising’ taunetab kamang’unennyo agoi kagesunet:" 
Hebrews3:15 ye ta kemwaei kele, Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani, Ko mat ouuiit mugulelwekwok, ko u eng’ kaiimset." 
Hebrews3:16 Amu ng’o che kitagis ye kingogas? Tos ma ichek tugul che kimong’une Misri eng’ Musa? 
Hebrews3:17 Ak ng’o che kinerekyi inendet kenyisiek artam? Tos ma icheget che kichalwogenso, che kiibutyi muswekwak ong’atet?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ak ng’o che kiiyosiechi inendet kole magoi it kamuung’ennyi, tos ma ichek che kiingelelso?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kigeere anyun kele kima imuch ichek koit amu ma iyan. 
Hebrews4:1 Ongiywei anyun yo ta komi arorutiet ne keite kamuung’ennyi, si malen chi age tugul eng’ okwek, mata anyoru." 
Hebrews4:2 Amu kigiamwech iman logoiywek che miach, ko u icheget: ago ma toret ichek ng’olyotab kaset, amu kima namgei ak kayanetab icheget che kigasei." 
Hebrews4:3 Amu achek che kigiyan keite kamuung’onoto; ko u ye kigomwa inendet kole, Ko u ye kiayosie eng’ neregekyuk ale, Maitei ichek kamuung’ennyu: agot nganda kiga kogesgei boisionichoto koboch ngab kelumda ng’ony." 
Hebrews4:4 Amu kigomwa ko u ni eng’ komosta age agobo betutab tisab kole, Ak kiimuuny Jehovah eng’ betutab tisab eng’ boisionikyik tugul;" 
Hebrews4:5 ak eng’ yu agine komwa kole, Maitei ichek kamuung’ennyu." 
Hebrews4:6 Eng’ noto anyun amu mitei boroindo ne bo alak koit oloto, ak ichek che kiga keamji logoiywek che miach, ko kimata koit amu ngelelnatet," 
Hebrews4:7 kamwa kogeny agobo betut age, komwaei eng’ Daudi, ko kagobata betusiek alak, kole, Rani, ko u ye kisib kemwa kele, Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani Ko mat ouuiit mugulelwekwok." 
Hebrews4:8 Amu nda kiga kogochi Josua ichek kamuung’et, ta kima kota komwaei let agobo betut age." 
Hebrews4:9 Ng’etunot anyun kamuung’etab sabato agobo bikab Jehovah. 
Hebrews4:10 Amu inendet ne kagoit kamuung’etab Jehovah ko kagomuuny eng’ boisionikyik, ko u ye kiimuuny Jehovah eng’ chechik." 
Hebrews4:11 Ongigiilge anyun si keit kamuung’onoto, si maibut chi age tugul eng’ kergeinoto bo ngelelnatet." 
Hebrews4:12 Amu sobei ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak ko kim, ak ko ng’atib kosiir rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai, ak kotoorei agoi kobesio sobondo ak tamirmiriet, ak ole tuiyechin kowek ak amset, ak chepcheb koguiyo kabwatutik ak magutikab muguleldo." 
Hebrews4:13 Ama mi kiy age tugul ne kigiyai ne ma toogu eng’ tainnyi: ago ng’ang’otin ak yatotin tuguk tugul eng’ taitab konyek che bo inendet ne tun kitetyini atebosiekyok. 
Hebrews4:14 Amu kitinye tisiindet ne o ne kigochut kipsengwetisiek, Jesu Weritb Jehovah, ongenam mising’ ng’ang’ennyo." 
Hebrews4:15 Amu magitinye tisiindet ne o ne maimuchi kogaswech nyalulnatosiekyok; ago ne kigiyom ko u achek eng’ tuguk tugul, ama yai tengek." 
Hebrews4:16 Ongerikyi anyun ng’echeret ne bo mieindo eng’ nyiganatet, si kenyoru rirenetab ge, ak kesich mieindo ne toretech eng’ betut ne kinyalili." 
Hebrews5:1 Amu tisiindet age tugul ne o, ne kigilewen eng’ bik, kindoi agobo bik amu tuguk che tokyingei Jehovah, si kobiit kogoito kagochinoik ak tisieywek agobo tengekwogik:" 
Hebrews5:2 inendet ne imuchi korire kimanainik ak che mastoi, amu inendet agine komi eng’ nyalulet;" 
Hebrews5:3 ak amu noto anyun, ko u ye nyoljin kogoito che kitisisie agobo tengekwogikab bik, ko u noto konyoljin kogoito agobo ge agine." 
Hebrews5:4 Ama mi chi ne igochingei inegei teegisi, kobate ye kaguur Jehovah inendet, ko u Aron." 
Hebrews5:5 Ko u noto anyun, kima itororgei Kristo agine koek tisiindet ne o, ago inendet ne king’alalji, kolenji, I Werinnyu, Kasichin rani:" 
Hebrews5:6 Ko u ye mwaei agine eng’ komosta age kole, I tisiindet koigeny Ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek." 
Hebrews5:7 Ne ki eng’ betusiek che kimi eng’ borto, ko kagogoito sautik ak somutik eng’ rirek che eechen ak beekab kong’, korirjin inendet ne kiimuchi kosor eng’ meet, ak kingo kagegasyi amu kaiyweisiennyi ne kiywei Jehovah." 
Hebrews5:8 Agot nganda ki Werit inendet, ko kiinetgei kasetab it eng’ tuguk che kinyorune nyalilda;" 
Hebrews5:9 ak kingo kageyai koek ne igesunotgei, koek inendet ne kitaunegei yetunet ne bo koigeny eng’ ichek tugul che kase it inendet;" 
Hebrews5:10 ne kiguure Jehovah tisiindet ne o ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek. 
Hebrews5:11 Kitinye ng’alek che chang’ che kimwae agobo inendet, ago uui ole kiborundoi, amu kigouuiit eng’ okwek ogas." 
Hebrews5:12 Amu eng’ ye kita nyolu oegu konetik, konyoljinok kogeny konetak chi konetisiosiek che bo tai che bo ng’alekab Jehovah; ak kioegu che machei chego, ama amitwogik che uuen." 
Hebrews5:13 Amu age tugul ne luei chego kotom konai koboisie komie ng’olyotab imanda; amu manyurut inendet. 
Hebrews5:14 Ago bo bik che eechen amitwogik che uuen, icheget che kigoboisie ng’omnatosiekwak komuchi kobesio che miach ak che yaach." 
Hebrews6:1 Noto anyun ongebagakte mata ongeng’alale ng’alek che bo tai che bo Kristo, ak ongigiilge agoi keit ne igesunotgei; amata onginde lumeiywot ne bo sigunet ne bunu boisionik che meiyotin, ak ne bo kayanet eng’ Jehovah," 
Hebrews6:2 ne bo konetisietab kabatisanosiek, ak ne bo kagonooretab eunek, ak ne bo ng’eetyetab che kigobek, ak ne bo kiruogetab koigeny." 
Hebrews6:3 Ak kiyae nito, ngo cham Jehovah." 
Hebrews6:4 Amu eng’ ichek che kisib kigochi lapkeiyet ak kochamjam konunet ne bo kipsengwet, ak koek yamdoikab Tamirmiriet ne Tilil," 
Hebrews6:5 ak kochamjam ng’olyot ne mie ne bo Jehovah, ak kimnatosiekab kenyisiek che bwanei," 
Hebrews6:6 ak kochuchuigei anyun, ko ma imugaksei keweekyi ichek sigunet kogeny; amu igartatyingei kogeny Weritab Jehovah, ak kogochi inendet kalilanet ne toogu." 
Hebrews6:7 Amu emet ne kigoee ropta ne robonjin konyil che chang’ ak koii ngwek che nyoljin ichek che kigibatyin, konyoru kaberuret eng’ Jehovah:" 
Hebrews6:8 ago ngo iiyo katok ak katablelinik, keesioi ak ko negite chubet; ne kagesunennyi ko kebeel." 
Hebrews6:9 Ago chamanichu, kiyani eng’ okwek tuguk che miachen kosiir choto, ak tuguk che namegei ak yetunet, agot ngemwae ko u noto:" 
Hebrews6:10 amu Jehovah, ko ma Jehovah ne ma bo iman, kot koutie boisieng’wong’ ak chamnyet ne kiobarte agobo kainennyi, ye kioboisiechini che tililen, ak kota oboisiechini." 
Hebrews6:11 Ak kimache mising’ chi age tugul eng’ okwek kele kobarta kagiilonoto bo ge eng’ nyiietab kamang’unet agoi kagesunet: 
Hebrews6:12 si mouuegitu, ago oyaniege ichek che nyoru arorutik eng’ kayanet ak muitaet." 
Hebrews6:13 Amu ye kingoyachi Jehovah Abraham arorutiet, ko amu kima komi age ne o kosiir inendet ne kiimuchi koyosiechi koyosio agobo ge," 
Hebrews6:14 kole, Eng’ kaberuret aberurin iman, ak eng’ kayabet ayabin ibaraitu." 
Hebrews6:15 Ak u noto, kingo kagomuita, konyor arorutiet." 
Hebrews6:16 Amu iyostos bik agobo ne o: ak kayosiet ko kagimitet ne igesu tiiyenywa age tugul. 
Hebrews6:17 Eng’ ng’olyondonoto ye kingomach Jehovah mising’ koborji ichek che nyoru arorutiet ole u rarennyi ne ma walaksei, konde kayosiet kwenut:" 
Hebrews6:18 si eng’ tuguk aeng’ che ma walaksei, che ma imugaksei eng’ Jehovah komwa lembech eng’ choto, kimuch anyun kenyoru kagaigaet ne kim, achek che kigemwechi toretet si kenam kamang’unet ne kiginde tainnyo;" 
Hebrews6:19 ne kitinye ne u nangetab sobondo, ne kingen ak ko lumdaat ne wendi orit kot kosiir anget ne kigioiye;" 
Hebrews6:20 ole kichut Jesu agobo achek, koek kandoindet, ko kagoek tisiindet ne o koigeny, ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:1 Amu Meldisedeki-nito, laitoriatab Salem, Tisiindet ne bo Jehovah ne Toror Mising’, ne kituiyo ak Abraham ye kiweeksei kobunu ole kibare laitorinik, ak koberur inendet," 
Hebrews7:2 ne kipchechi agine Abraham kebebertab taman ne bo tugul ne ye kiweech, ko Laitoriatab imanda korok, ak yeityo kogeny ko Laitoriatab Salem, noto ko Laitoriatab kalyet;" 
Hebrews7:3 ne matinyei kwanda, ama tinyei kamet, ama tinyei orenywa, ama tinyei taunetab betusiek anan kagesunetab sobondo, ago kigiyai kogergeit ak Weritab Jehovah, tebyei ko tisiindet koigeny." 
Hebrews7:4 Obwat anyun ole ki te oindab chichi, ne kiigochi Abraham, boiyot ne o, kebeberta ne bo taman ne bo bareiywek." 
Hebrews7:5 Ak tinyei iman werikab Lawi che namei boisietab tisisiet, ng’atutiet konam kebeberwekab taman eng’ bik ko u eng’ Ng’atutiet, eng’ tupchosiekwak, agot nga kibunu bortab Abraham:" 
Hebrews7:6 ago kinam kebeberwekab taman eng’ Abraham inendet ne kima kiitito ichek eng’ orenywa, ak koberur inendet ne tinyei arorutik." 
Hebrews7:7 Ago ne mami tiiyet age tugul, konyoru ne ming’in kaberuret eng’ ne o." 
Hebrews7:8 Ak eng’ yu kotaachei bik che begu kebeberwekab taman; ago eng’ oloto, ko inendet ne kibaoriani kele sobei." 
Hebrews7:9 Ak, kimuchi kemwa kele, eng’ Abraham agot Lawi, ne taachei kebeberwekab taman, ko kiigoito kebeberwekab taman;" 
Hebrews7:10 amu kita komi bortab kwandanyi, ye kituitos ak Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:11 Ak nda kimi kagesunatetab ge eng’ tiseinatetab Lawik (amu kinyorune yoto bik Ng’atutiet), ko kita kimage nee kobiit tisiindet age ne u kit ne ki u Melkisedek, ama kiititoi kit ne ki u Aron?" 
Hebrews7:12 Amu ngot kowalak tiseinatet, ko kanyol kewal agine ng’atutiet." 
Hebrews7:13 Amu inendet ne kimwaitae tuguchu ko bo bororiet age, ne mami chi eng’ bororionoto ne kigobois eng’ kaptisisio." 
Hebrews7:14 Amu toogu kele kibunu Kiptaiyandennyo oretab Juda; bororiet ne kima mwaitae Musa ng’olyo age tugul eng’ ng’alekab tisiik. 
Hebrews7:15 Ak toogu komie kosiir, ngot kotun biitu tisiindet age eng’ kergeindab Melkisedek," 
Hebrews7:16 ne kigiyai, ago ma eng’ oretab ng’atututikab borto, ago eng’ kimnatetab sobondo ne ma igesugei:" 
Hebrews7:17 amu kibaoriani kele, I tisiindet koigeny Ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:18 Amu mitei metoet ne bo ng’atutiet ne kiga kindoune, amu nyalulennyi ama tilei kiy" 
Hebrews7:19 (amu ma yai Ng’atutiet kiy koek ne igesunotgei), ak komitei ibunetab kamang’unet ne kaigai, ne kirikyine Jehovah." 
Hebrews7:20 Ama yaaksei ama kiyosio 
Hebrews7:21 (amu kigiyai ichek koek tisiik ama mi kayosiet eng’ inendet ne mwaei agobo inendet kole, Kiiyosio Kiptaiyat ama walei kole, I tisiindet koigeny)." 
Hebrews7:22 Ko u noto anyun kiek Jesu tononjinindet ne bo arorutiet ne mie kosiir. 
Hebrews7:23 Ago icheget ko kigiyai koek tisiik che chang’, amu eete ichek meet si matebi:" 
Hebrews7:24 ago amu tebyei inendet koigeny, kotinyei anyun tiseinatet ne magiwalei." 
Hebrews7:25 Eng’ noto anyun komuchi kogeny kosor agoi kasuldaet ichek che bwanjin Jehovah eng’ inendet, amu sobei inendet koigeny si kobiit kosaei agobo ichek." 
Hebrews7:26 Amu nyoljinech tisiindet ne o ne u ni, ne tilil, ne matinyei kenisiet, ama tinyei muruonindo, ne itabanat eng’ kiptengeginik, ak kigitoror kosiir kipsengwetisiek;" 
Hebrews7:27 ne ma nyoljin kogoito tiseiywek betut age tugul, ko u tisiichu ki eechen, che igoitoi korok agobo tengekwogikyik, ye ibata kogoito agobo bik: amu kiyai nito konyil agenge ak koyam, ye kiigoitogei." 
Hebrews7:28 Amu indoi Ng’atutiet bik che nyalulyotin koek tisiik che eechen; ago ng’olyotab kayosiet, ne kibiitu let eng’ Ng’atutiet, kondoi Werit, ne igesunotgei koigeny." 
Hebrews8:1 Nguno anyun, eng’ tuguk che kimwae, kit ne o ko ni: kitinye tisiindet ne o ne u ni, ne kitebe komostab eut ne bo tai ne bo ng’echeretab Laitornatet ne bo Etunatet eng’ kipsengwetisiek," 
Hebrews8:2 kiboitiot ne bo tuguk che tililen, ak emait ne bo iman, ne kilumei Kiptaiyat, ma bik." 
Hebrews8:3 Amu kindoi tisiindet age tugul ne o si kogoitoi kagochinoik ak tiseiywek: noto anyun konyolu kotinyei agine tisiindoni kit ne igoitoi. 
Hebrews8:4 Nda mi ng’ony, ta maegu tisiindet, amu mi ichek che igoitoi kagochinoik ko u biteetab Ng’atutiet;" 
Hebrews8:5 che boisiei eng’ karogutiet ak uruetab tuguk che bo kipsengwet, ko u ye kigiteechi Musa ye kimachei kotonon emait: amu kilenji, Rib, si iyai tuguk tugul ko u kergeindo ne kigiborun eng’ tulwet." 
Hebrews8:6 Ago kagosich nguno boisiet ne mie kosiir, ko u noto agine, inendet ko katuiyoindet ne bo kayomiset ne mie kosiir, ne kigiyai eng’ arorutik che miach kosiir." 
Hebrews8:7 Amu nda kima ko rartaat arorutiet ne bo tai, ko kima ta ta kecheng’jin boroindo ne bo aeng’." 
Hebrews8:8 Amu ye kingonyorji lelutik ichek, komwa kole, Ogeero, mwaei Kiptaiyat kole, bwanei betusiek, Che tun kiyomisyinige kayomiset ne leel ak gotab Israel ak gotab Juda;" 
Hebrews8:9 Ma ko u kayomiset ne kigiyomisge ak kwanisiekwak Eng’ betut ne kianam eunekwak si amut komong’ eng’ emetab Misri; Amu kima koteptoi kayomisennyu, Ak kima amage kiy ichek, mwaei Kiptaiyat." 
Hebrews8:10 Amu ni kayomiset ne tun kiyomisyinige ak gotab Israel. Ye ibata betusiechoto, mwaei Kiptaiyat; Andoi ng’atutikyuk kabwatutikwak, Ak asirji kogeny mugulelwekwak: Ak aegu Jehovah eng’ ichek, Ak koek bikyuk:" 
Hebrews8:11 Amu koneti chi tugul chitab kokwennyi, Anan konet chi age tugul ne tupcho, kolenji, Ni Kiptaiyat: Amu tun naa tugul Koboch ne ming’in eng’ ichek kot koit ne o." 
Hebrews8:12 Amu tun arire ichek amu tengekwogikwak, Ama tun abwati tengekwogikwak agoi." 
Hebrews8:13 Amu kimwa kole, Arorutiet ne leel, kigoyai koosit ne bo tai. Ago noto ositu koga kotebi keny, ko negit kogesgei." 
Hebrews9:1 Noto anyun, agot arorutiet ne bo tai ko kitinyei ng’atutikab saet, ak komostanyi ole tilil, ne bo ng’onyuni." 
Hebrews9:2 Amu kiga kichob emait; ne bo tai ko ole kimi keldab tait, ak meset, ak makatinik che bo kabartaet; ne kiguure Ole Tilil." 
Hebrews9:3 Ak kingesiir anget ne bo aeng’, ne kigioiye got, ko kimi emait ne kiguure Ole Tilil kosiir tugul;" 
Hebrews9:4 ne tinyei kapkorosutab tahabu, ak moingetab arorutiet ne kigiliige tahabu komoswek tugul, ole kimi teret ne bo tahabu ne kimi mana, ak kiroktab Aron ne kiing’ati, ak koik che bo arorutiet;" 
Hebrews9:5 ak kimi baragunnyi kerubisiekab lilindo che kiiuuri keruetab rirenet; tuguk che magimuchi keng’alale nguno agenge agenge. 
Hebrews9:6 Ak kingo kagechob anyun tuguchuto ko u noto, koba tisiik kotugul emait ne bo tai, koyaei boisiosiekab saet;" 
Hebrews9:7 ago, kiwendi tisiindet ne o inegei emait ne bo aeng’ konyil agenge eng’ kenyit, ama wendi ama tinyei korotik, che igoitoi agobo ge, ak agobo lelutikab bik:" 
Hebrews9:8 iboru Tamirmiriet ne Tilil eng’ ng’olyondoni kole, kitom keng’any oret ne mong’jin ole tilil, ye kita ko tononot emait ne bo tai;" 
Hebrews9:9 ne kalewenetab betusiechu; kigigoitoi eng’ kalewenonoto agine kagochinoik ak tiseiywek, che maimuchi koyai chito ne saei koek ne igesunotgei eng’ kabwatennyi," 
Hebrews9:10 amu (koboto amitwogik ak che kieei ak kaunsosiek che terotin) choto ko ng’atutik che bo borto kityo, che kiging’at agoi betusiek che bo kalititet." 
Hebrews9:11 Ago Kristo, ye kingo kagonyo, ne inendet tisiindet ne o ne bo tuguk che miach che tun bwanei, eng’ emait ne o ak kogesunotgei kosiir, ne ma kiyae eunek, ye kiweech, ko ma bo ng’onyuni," 
Hebrews9:12 ama eng’ korotikab kwesik ak moek, ago eng’ korotikyik ichegei, kwo anyun ole tilil konyil agenge ak koyam, ye kingo kagonyor katiaget ne bo koigeny." 
Hebrews9:13 Amu ngot kotilili agoi kaunetab borto korotikab kwesik ak kirugik, ak orekab roriat che kiise ichek che tinyei muruonindo:" 
Hebrews9:14 kotilili anyun ne tia korotikab Kristo, ne kiigochigei Jehovah eng’ Tamirmiriet ne bo koigeny, ko matinyei berut, kotilil kabwateng’wong’ eng’ boisiosiek che meiyotin si oboisiechi Jehovah ne sobei!" 
Hebrews9:15 Ak amu ng’olyondonito inendet ko katuiyoindetab kayomiset ne leel, si kobiit konyor che kigeguur, arorutietab borotet ne bo koigeny, ye kingo kagobiit meet agobo katiagetab bistaosiek che kimitei eng’ kayomiset ne bo tai." 
Hebrews9:16 Amu ole mitei arorutiet ne bo nametab tuguk ko kanyol komitei meetab inendet ne kiyaei. 
Hebrews9:17 Amu tinyei arorutiet kimnatet ye kabiit meet: tos kim kota kosobei inendet ne kiyaei? 
Hebrews9:18 Eng’ noto anyun agot arorutiet ne bo tai, ko kima kigoito ko mami korotik." 
Hebrews9:19 Amu ye kingo kagomwachi Musa bik tugul kayomiset age tugul ko u eng’ Ng’atutiet, konam korotikab moek ak che bo kwesik, koboto beek ak kororik che biriren ak husop, ak kois bukuit, ak bik tugul," 
Hebrews9:20 komwaei kole, Chu ko korotik che bo arorutiet ne king’at Jehovah agobo okwek." 
Hebrews9:21 Ak koise kogeny korotik emait koboto tuguk che kiboisie. 
Hebrews9:22 Ak eng’ Ng’atutiet ko u kele, kitilili tuguk tugul eng’ korotik, ak ngo mami tumdaetab korotik ko mami nyoetab kaat." 
Hebrews9:23 Kinyolu anyun kitilil itonwekab tuguk che bo kipsengwetisiek eng’ choto; ago kitilile tuguk che bo kipsengwet tiseiywek che miach kosiir chuto. 
Hebrews9:24 Amu kima mong’ji Kristo ole tilil ole kigiyae eunek, ne karogutietab tugukab iman; ago kimong’ji kipsengwet inendet, si kotoogu eng’ taitab Jehovah agoi achek:" 
Hebrews9:25 ma si kogoitogei konyil che chang’: ko u ye wendi tisiindet ne o ole tilil eng’ kenyit age tugul koibei korotik che ma chechik; 
Hebrews9:26 amu nda ki u noto anyun ta kinyoljin konyalil konyil che chang’ koboch ngelumda ng’ony: ago kagong’ang’ak nguno konyil agenge eng’ kagesunetab kenyisiek si kobiit koisto tengekto eng’ tiseiywot ne ki inendet. 
Hebrews9:27 Ak ko u ye kiging’at agobo bik kobek konyil agenge, ak ye ibata nito koek kiruoget;" 
Hebrews9:28 ko u noto Kristo agine, kingo kagigoito konyil agenge si koib tengekwogikab che chang’, ko tun toogu ne bo aeng’, ma agobo tengek ago, eng’ ichek che igeni inendet, agoi yetunet." 
Hebrews10:1 Amu tinyei Ng’atutiet uruetab tuguk che miachen che bwanei, ma itondab tuguchoto, maimuchi koyai ichek che rikyin koek che igesunotingei, eng’ tiseiywechoto igoitoi ichek kotugul eng’ kenyit age tugul." 
Hebrews10:2 Nda ki u noto, ko tos, kima kebagaktoi kigoito? Amu ye kingo kagitilil saik konyil agenge, ko kimatata kotinyei kabwatetab tengekwogik kogeny." 
Hebrews10:3 Ago eng’ tiseiywechoto komitei kabwatetab tengekwogik kenyit age tugul. 
Hebrews10:4 Amu maimugaksei eng’ korotikab kirugik ak kwesik konem tengekwogik. 
Hebrews10:5 Eng’ noto anyun ye kingonyo Kristo ng’ony, konyo komwa kole, Kima imach tiseiywek ak kagochinoik, Ago kiichobwa borto;" 
Hebrews10:6 Kima ibaibaitu eng’ kagochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che bo tengekwogik: 
Hebrews10:7 Amwa anyun ale, Keero, kaanyo (Kigisir agobo ane eng’ bukuit ne kigimaman) Ayai mageng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Hebrews10:8 Mwaei ng’alechu mi meto yu kole, Ma imach anan ibaibaitu eng’ tiseiywek ak kagochinoik ak kagochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che bo tengekwogik, eng’ choto (che kigoitoi ko u ye mwaei Ng’atutiet)," 
Hebrews10:9 yeityo komwa anyun inendet kole, Keero, kaanyo ayai mageng’ung’. Istoi ne bo tai, si kogimit ne bo aeng’." 
Hebrews10:10 Kigitililech anyun eng’ magonato eng’ kagoitoetab bortab Jesu Kristo konyil agenge ak koyam. 
Hebrews10:11 Ak tononi iman tisiindet age tugul eng’ betut age tugul koboisiei ak kogoitoi konyil che chang’ tiseiywechoto, che magoi imuch koisto tengekwogik;" 
Hebrews10:12 ago tisiindoni, ko ye kingo kagogoito tiseiywot agenge agobo tengekwogik agoi koigeny, kotebe anyun eutab tai ne bo Jehovah;" 
Hebrews10:13 kogeni koboch yoto agoi keyai bunikyik koek ng’echeretab kelyekyik. 
Hebrews10:14 Amu kigoyai koek che igesunotingei agoi koigeny eng’ kagoitoet agenge ichek che kigitilil. 
Hebrews10:15 Ak baorianjinech agine Tamirmiriet ne Tilil: amu kingobata komwa kole," 
Hebrews10:16 Ni kayomiset ne tun kiyomisyinige ak ichek Ye ibata betusiechoto, mwaei Kiptaiyat; Andoi ng’atutikyuk mugulelwekwak, Ak asirji kabwatutikwak;" 
Hebrews10:17 Ama abwati chalwogikwak ak tengekwogikwak kogeny. 
Hebrews10:18 Ye mitei anyun nyoetab kaat ne bo chuto, ko ma komitei kogeny kagoitoet agobo tengekto." 
Hebrews10:19 Amu kitinye nyiganatet anyun, che kitupche, kemong’ji ole tilil eng’ korotikab Jesu," 
Hebrews10:20 eng’ oret ne leel ak kosobei, ne kiyatwech, ne chutei anget ne kigioiye, ne noto ko bortanyi;" 
Hebrews10:21 ak amu kitinye tisiindet ne o ne bou gotab Jehovah; 
Hebrews10:22 ongerikte anyun eng’ muguleldo ne bo iman eng’ nyiietab kayanet, ko kageis mugulelwekyok kemete kabwatet ne ya, ak kiun borwekyok eng’ beek che tililen:" 
Hebrews10:23 ongenam mising’ ng’ang’etab kamang’unennyo si mawalak; amu iman inendet ne kiiaroru: 
Hebrews10:24 Ak ongibwatge achege eng’ achege kigimitge eng’ chamnyet ak boisiosiek che miach; 
Hebrews10:25 ama kibagaktoi kituiyege achege eng’ achege, ko u biteetab bik alak, ago kiteechinige; ak ko u noto kosiir, ko u ye ogeere ole rigu betut." 
Hebrews10:26 Amu ngot kekwetyini keyae tengek ko kagetaach naetab imanit, ko ma kong’etu tiseiywot age kogeny, ne bo tengekwogik," 
Hebrews10:27 ago kagenet ne bo kiruoget eng’ kaiyweisiet, ak koromnatetab mat ne igesu bunik." 
Hebrews10:28 Meei chito ne kasas Ng’atutietab Musa ko mami rirenet, eng’ baorinik aeng’ anan ko somok:" 
Hebrews10:29 obwatitoi ano okwek, ng’wanitu ne tia biret ne tun nyoljin kiruokyine inendet ne kigotiech Weritab Jehovah, ak koiit korotikab kayomiset, che kigitilile inendet, koek tuguk che ma tililen, ak kosas Tamirmirietab mieindo?" 
Hebrews10:30 Amu kingen inendet ne kigomwa kole, Nenyu yaaktaetab mugetut, ane ne ayaaktoi. Ak kogeny, Tun iruokyin Kiptaiyat bikyik." 
Hebrews10:31 Kit ne bichii kot kibutyi eunekab Jehovah ne sobei. 
Hebrews10:32 Ago obwat betusiek che bo keny, ye kingo kagegonok lapkeiyet; ye kingaomuite eng’ boriet ne o ne bo nyalilwogik," 
Hebrews10:33 ye kioegu, eng’ kebeber, che kitang’ang’jin eng’ katewerisiosiek ak kanyililosiek; ak eng’ kebeber, ko kiotinye yamdaet koboto ichek che kicham keyachin ko u noto." 
Hebrews10:34 Amu kiorire ichek che ki ratotin, ak ocham eng’ boiboiyet kerebenak tugukwok, amu kiongen ole otinye magornatet ne mie kosiir choto ago ne tebyei koigeny." 
Hebrews10:35 Amowirte anyun nyiganateng’wong’, ne tinyei melekto ne o." 
Hebrews10:36 Amu nyolu otinye muitaet, si ye kaoyai magetab Jehovah, omuch otaach arorutiet." 
Hebrews10:37 Amu ta komi kitigin mising’, Si konyo inendet ne nyonei, ama igaigei." 
Hebrews10:38 Ago sobei nenyu ne bo imanda eng’ kayanet, Ak ngot kochuchuigei ko mabaibaitu muguleldanyu eng’ inendet." 
Hebrews10:39 Ago achek ko ma ki bo ichek che ichuchuchegei kobendi luset: ago ki bo ichek che iyani kot koit sorunetab sobondo. 
Hebrews11:1 Noto anyun kayanet ko naetab tuguk che kimang’u, ak kaborunetab tuguk che tomo kegeer." 
Hebrews11:2 Amu kigibaorianjine noto boisiek. 
Hebrews11:3 Kinae eng’ kayanet kele kigiyai ng’onyusiek eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, noto anyun tuguk che kigeerei ko kima kiyae tuguk che toogu." 
Hebrews11:4 Kiigochi Abil Jehovah eng’ kayanet tiseiywot ne mie kosiir ne bo Kaen, ne kigibaorianjine inendet kele ki bo imanda, ak kibaorian Jehovah agobo kagochinoikyik: ak eng’ noto, agot nganda kigome ko ta kong’alali." 
Hebrews11:5 Kigimut Enok eng’ kayanet si mageer meet; ak kimata kogeer chi inendet, amu kiimut Jehovah: amu ye kitom kimut ko kiga kibaorian agobo inendet kele kiibaibai Jehovah;" 
Hebrews11:6 ak ngo mami kayanet ko ma imugaksei kibaibai inendet: amu inendet ne rikyin Jehovah konyoljin koyan kole mi inendet, ak kole igochin melekto icheget che cheng’ei inendet." 
Hebrews11:7 Kiyai Noa melit eng’ kayanet, kot kosor gonnyi, ye kingo kagiteechi agobo tuguk che kitomo kegeer, amu kiiywei Jehovah; kiiruokyine anyun ng’ony noto, ak kiek ne kinam imanda ne biitu eng’ kayanet." 
Hebrews11:8 Kigas it Abraham eng’ kayanet ye kingeguur, ak kimanda kwo, ko maingen ole wendi, kwo komosta ne tun taachei koek borotet." 
Hebrews11:9 Kiek eng’ kayanet kiprutoiyot eng’ emetab arorutiet, ko u emet ne ma nenyi, komeng’oti emaisiek, koboto Isak ak Jakobo, che ki che namei arorutionoto koboto inendet:" 
Hebrews11:10 amu kiigeni nganaset ne tinyei lumeiywek, ne Jehovah teegindet ak ko yaindet." 
Hebrews11:11 Kisich agot Sara agine kimnatet eng’ kayanet komanach ko kagosiirto kenyisiekyik, amu kiit kole bo iman inendet ne kiiarorji inendet:" 
Hebrews11:12 noto anyun kigisich eng’ agenge, ne kiga koigei ne kigome, bik che chang’, ko u kecheikab kipsengwet ak ng’aniek che mi ngegutab nyanjet, che ma iitoksei." 
Hebrews11:13 Kibek chuto tugul eng’ kayanet, ama taach arorutichoto, ago kiga kogeer ak koboiboitu kota komi ole loo, ko kagong’any kole ki toek ak ko kiprutoinik eng’ ng’ony." 
Hebrews11:14 Amu ichek che mwaei tuguk che u choto koboru kole cheng’ei emet ne nenywa. 
Hebrews11:15 Ak nda kiga ibwat iman emoni kimong’une, ta kinyoru boroindo koweektagei." 
Hebrews11:16 Ago machei kot nguno emet ne kararan kosiir noto, noto ko, ne bo kipsengwet: noto anyun mageerei Jehovah kalilanet agobo ichek keguure Jehovah nenywa: amu kigochopchi ichek nganaset." 
Hebrews11:17 Kingo kagetiem Abraham, kogoito Isak eng’ kayanet: ee, kiigoitoi nenyi ne kigii inegei, inendet ne kiga taach arorutik eng’ boiboindo;" 
Hebrews11:18 ne kiga kemwachi kelenji, Tun kimwaitae Isak iyoteng’ung’:" 
Hebrews11:19 koiit kole imuchi Jehovah kong’eet agot eng’ che kigobek, ak kitaach inendet koweek eng’ yoto koek karogutiet." 
Hebrews11:20 Kiiberur Isak eng’ kayanet Jakobo ak Esau, agot eng’ tuguk che bwanei." 
Hebrews11:21 Kiiberur Jakobo eng’ kayanet, werik tuwai che bo Josep, ye ki negit kome; ak kosa kotiiegei walitab kiroktanyi." 
Hebrews11:22 Kimwa Josep eng’ kayanet agobo mandaetab lagokab Israel ye ki negit kome; ak kogon ng’atutiet agobo kowekyik. 
Hebrews11:23 Kiuny sigikyik Musa eng’ kayanet eng’ arawek somok kingo kagesich, amu kiga keer kole ki lakwet ne kararan; ak kima iywei ng’atutietab laitoriat." 
Hebrews11:24 Kiesio Musa eng’ kayanet, ye kingo kagoeet, keguure weritab che bo Parao;" 
Hebrews11:25 kolewen keyachi ne ya koboto bikab Jehovah, kosiir kobaibaegei boiboiosiekab tengekto che bo betusiek che matia;" 
Hebrews11:26 koiit tewernatet ne kiteweri Kristo kole magornatosiek che eechen kosiir konoraik che bo Misri: amu kiigeni melekto. 
Hebrews11:27 Kibagakta Misri eng’ kayanet, amaiywei neregekab laitoriat: amu kimuita, ko u ye keerei inendet ne ma toogu." 
Hebrews11:28 Kiyai paska eng’ kayanet, ak isisietab korotik, si matwa ichek ne kibarei werik che bo tai." 
Hebrews11:29 Kilandae Nyanjet ne Birir eng’ kayanet ko u ye bunei emet ne yaamat; ak ye kilen kotiem Misrik koyai ko u noto kelugui. 
Hebrews11:30 Eng’ kayanet ko kilulyo irimoikab Jeriko, kingo kageyiem betusiek tisab." 
Hebrews11:31 Eng’ kayanet ko ma me chepkugoniot Rahab koboto ichek che ki ngelelik, amu kiga taach segeik eng’ kalyet." 
Hebrews11:32 Ara nee anyun age ne ta amwae? Amu mayama boroindo ngot amwa agobo Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jepta; ak agobo Daudi ak Samuel ak maotik:" 
Hebrews11:33 che kiiterter bounatosiek eng’ kayanet, koyai imanda, kisich arorutik, kiger kutuswekab ng’etunyik," 
Hebrews11:34 kiimis kimnatet ne bo mat, kichililye rotwetab chok, kigigimit komong’ eng’ nyalulet, kigimegitu eng’ luget, kion lugosiekab bunik koweekta." 
Hebrews11:35 Kitaach kwonyik bikwak che kiga kobek, che kiging’eet: ak kigibir alak kot kobek, koesioi katiagenywa; si kobiit kosich ng’eetyet ne mie kosiir:" 
Hebrews11:36 ak kigitiem alak eng’ chombilet, ak eng’ birisiosiekab kipcharitisiek, ee, ak kogeny eng’ ratisiosiek ak toorjinetab korgoret:" 
Hebrews11:37 kigilach eng’ koik, kigimurmure musumenosiek, kigiyom, kigibare rotwetab chok: kiilaagoti ngoroikab kechirek, ak che bo ng’ororek, kobonondos, kiginyalili, keyachin ne ya" 
Hebrews11:38 (che kima konyoljin ng’ony ichek), koombenoti eng’ ong’atosiek ak tulonok ak kebenonik ak keringonikab ng’ony." 
Hebrews11:39 Ak kingo kagosich chuto tugul baornatet ne kigibaorianji amu kayanenywa, ko ma kotaach ichek arorutiet," 
Hebrews11:40 amu kisib kochobwech Jehovah kit ne mie kosiir, si ma kiyai koek che igesunotingei ama kimi." 
Hebrews12:1 Noto anyun, amu kiyiemenech boldet ne o ne bo baorinik eng’ komoswek tugul, ongeiste nyigisindo age tugul, ak tengekto ne isib konamech, ak ongeruai eng’ muitaet eng’ kabeletab ge ne kiginde tainnyo," 
Hebrews12:2 kegeere Jesu ne kandoindet ak ko kawong’unindet ne bo kayanet, ne kimuita eng’ kimurtoiyot amu boiboiyet ne kiginde tainnyi, ak kosas kalilanet, ak kigotebe eutab tai ne bo ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah." 
Hebrews12:3 Obwat mising’ inendet ne kimuita eng’ kirindaetab ge ne bo kiptengeginik agobo inendet, si mong’etye, otanuise eng’ sobonwekwok." 
Hebrews12:4 Tom oyai luget kot kotumdagei korotik, obarege ak tengekto:" 
Hebrews12:5 ak kioutie kateunet, ne ng’alalwok ko u ye king’alaljin werik, kole, Werinnyu, amesas kotigonetab Kiptaiyat, Anan itanui ye kerin kong’ inendet;" 
Hebrews12:6 Amu inendet ne chamei Kiptaitaiyat, kotigoni, Ak kobirei werit age tugul ne taachei." 
Hebrews12:7 Omuitoi amu kotigonet; yaiywok Jehovah ko u noto ko u ye yachin werik; ng’o werit ne maitigoni kwanda? 
Hebrews12:8 Ago ngot ko motinye kotigonet, ne kigonyorune tugul yamdaet, o bo sarbuch anyun, ma o werik." 
Hebrews12:9 Ak kigitinye kwanisiek che bo borwekyok che kiitigonech, ago kigigonyiti ichek: tos ma kaigai kiming’inityige Kwanda ne bo tamirmirik, ak kesopche?" 
Hebrews12:10 Amu kiitigonisiei ichek betusiek che ng’ering’ ko u ye kigeerei kole mie; ago inendet, kotigonisiei agobo toretet, si keegu che yamdoi tililindanyi." 
Hebrews12:11 Ma toogu kotigonet tugul kele bo boiboiyet eng’ betunnyi; ago bo arogenet: ago ye ibata koiichi icheget che kinetegei noto, logoekab kalyet, choto ko logoekab imanda." 
Hebrews12:12 Eng’ noto anyun onamji barak eunek che nyalulyotin, ak kutung’oik che meiyotin;" 
Hebrews12:13 ak oyachi kelyekwok ortinwek che lititen, si ma kimaas che king’waldos, ago si kisoob." 
Hebrews12:14 Ogiilge otebi eng’ kalyet koboto bik tugul, ak tililinoto ne ngo matinyei chi ko maimuchi kogeer Kiptaiyat:" 
Hebrews12:15 ogeer si marartae chi mieindab Jehovah; si mabiit tigitiotab ng’wanindo ak konyalilis, ak komuruon che chang’;" 
Hebrews12:16 si mabiit ne soksei, anan chito ne maiywei Jehovah, ko u Esau, ne kialda etunatennyi ne bo siget agobo amdit agenge." 
Hebrews12:17 Amu ongen ole kingomach eng’ let konam kaberuret, keesio (amu kima sich boroindo ne bo sigunet) nganda kicheng’ mising’ eng’ beekab kong’." 
Hebrews12:18 Amu ma oit tulwet ne kimuchi ketwa, ne kilalei, anan tuuindo, ak mesundeito, ak kipchurjuriet," 
Hebrews12:19 ak cheetab iriaget, ak twegunet ne bo ng’alek, ne kisom ichek che kigasei kole si mata kemwachi ichek ng’olyo age tugul:" 
Hebrews12:20 amu kima imuch komuita eng’ ng’olyondonoto kiging’at kele, Agot ngo twa tiony tulwet, kelage koik;" 
Hebrews12:21 ak noto kitook, ko ki u kiy ne imuisei, kot kole Musa, Aiywei mising’ ak abotani:" 
Hebrews12:22 ago kaoit okwek tulwetab Sion, ak nganaset ne bo Jehovah ne sobei, Jerusalem ne bo kipsengwet, ak tuiyosiek che bo malaikaisiek che ma iitoksei," 
Hebrews12:23 ak tuiyetab bik tugul ak kaniset ne bo che bo tai eng’ siget che kigesir eng’ kipsengwet, ak Jehovah kiruogindetab tugul, ak tamirmirik che bo bikab imanda che kigiyai koek che igesunotingei," 
Hebrews12:24 ak Jesu katuiyoindetab kayomiset ne leel, ak korotikab iset, che ng’alali ko mie kosiir che bo Abil." 
Hebrews12:25 Ogeer, amoesie inendet ne ng’alali. Amu ngot ko kima chililyo ichek ye kingoesio inendet ne kiga koteeita eng’ ng’ony, kesiire ne tia anyun achek ngot keistoege inendet ne iteu eng’ kipsengwet:" 
Hebrews12:26 ne kiitumdum ng’ony kutinnyi betunoto: ago kagoaror anyun nguno, kole, Ta atumdumi kogeny konyil agenge, ma ng’ony kityo, ago kipsengwet agine." 
Hebrews12:27 Ago ng’olyondonito, kamwa kole, Ta konyilei agenge, koboru istoetab tuguk che kimuchi kitumdum, ko u eng’ tuguk che kigeyai, si kobiit kong’et tuguchoto che magitumdumi." 
Hebrews12:28 Noto anyun, amu kinyoru bounatet ne magimuchi kitumdum, ko ongeegu che tinyei mieindo, ne kimuchi keyae boisiet ne iboiboi Jehovah mising’, eng’ teegisto ak kaiyweet:" 
Hebrews12:29 amu Jehovah nenyo ko mat ne igesu. 
Hebrews13:1 Ingoteb ko u noto chamnyetab che kitupche. 
Hebrews13:2 Amoutie oborji toek chamnyet: amu kigotaach alak malaikaisiek eng’ noto amaingen. 
Hebrews13:3 Obwat ichek che mi eng’ ratisiosiek, ko u ne o ratotin tugul; icheget che kinyalili, ko u ye omi ak okwek eng’ borto." 
Hebrews13:4 Ingogonyit tugul katunisiet, amat koek itogut ne tinyei simdo: amu tun iruokyin Jehovah che soksei ak che ibegei." 
Hebrews13:5 Oegu che itiogotin eng’ chametab siling’isiek; ingoyamak tuguk che otinye: amu kigomwa inendet, kole, Magoi abagakten, magoi ameten." 
Hebrews13:6 Noto anyun kimwae eng’ nyiganatet ne mie kele, Toretindennyu Kiptaiyat; maiyweisiei: Yaiywa nee chi?" 
Hebrews13:7 Obwat ichek che kiindoiywok, che kimwawok ng’olyotab Jehovah; ye obwati ole kiteptoi atebosiekwak, oyai ko u ye kiyaei ichek eng’ kayanenywa." 
Hebrews13:8 Kergei Jesu Kristo eng’ amut ak ra, ak agoi koigeny." 
Hebrews13:9 Amatata ongobeetok konetisiosiek che besiotin che ter: amu mie kolumdaak muguleldo eng’ mieindo; ma eng’ amitwogik, che kima keljine kiy ichek che kiga bendate choto." 
Hebrews13:10 Ki tinye kaptisisiet, ne matinyei kimnatet koamisie ichek che boisie emait." 
Hebrews13:11 Amu borwekab tiong’ichoto kiibu tisiindet ne o korotikwak kobwa ole tilil agobo tengekto, kebeelei eng’ nganaset sang’." 
Hebrews13:12 Noto anyun, kinyalil Jesu agine eng’ ormarich sang’, si kobiit kotilil bik eng’ korotikyik." 
Hebrews13:13 Ongebe anyun ole mi inendet eng’ sang’utab ormarich, keibe tewernatet ne kiteweri inendet." 
Hebrews13:14 Amu magitinye eng’ yu nganaset ne tebyei koigeny, ago kicheng’e nin nyonei." 
Hebrews13:15 Noto anyun ongigochi Jehovah eng’ inendet korosiotab kalosunet kotugul, noto ko logoiyatab kutuswek che ng’anyei kainennyi." 
Hebrews13:16 Oyai che miachen, amoutie oyai yamdaet: amu baibai mising’ Jehovah eng’ korosek che u choto." 
Hebrews13:17 Ogas it che indoiywok, ak oming’inityige ichek: amu ripsei agobo sobonwekwok, ko u che tun tetu agobo boisienywa; si kobiit koyai boisionito eng’ boiboiyet, ama eng’ arogenet: amu magelwok kiy eng’ noto." 
Hebrews13:18 Osa agobo achek: amu kiyani kele kitinye kabwatet ne mie, kimache ketebi eng’ atebet ne mie eng’ tuguk tugul." 
Hebrews13:19 Ak asome mising’ kot ale oyai ko u noto, si kobiit kesib keweekya oldang’wong’." 
Hebrews13:20 Ingoyaak Jehovah ne bo kalyet, ne kiimut mestowot ne o ne bo kechirek komong’ eng’ che kibek, eng’ korotik che bo kayomiset ne bo koigeny, inendet Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu," 
Hebrews13:21 oegu che o chobotin eng’ boisiet age tugul ne mie si oyai magennyi, koyai eng’ ichek che chamaksei mising’ eng’ tainnyi, eng’ Jesu Kristo; ne nenyi torornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Ago asomok mising’, tupchosiechu, ale omuite eng’ ng’olyotab kagimitet: amu kaasiruak eng’ ng’alak tutigin." 
Hebrews13:23 Onai ole kogitiach tupchennyo Timoteo; ngot konyo ko negit, ko tun anyo ageerok koboto inendet." 
Hebrews13:24 Ogat tugul che indoiywok, ak tugul che tililen. Igatok che bo Italia." 
Hebrews13:25 Ingoteb mieindo kobotok okwek tugul. Amen. 
James1:1 Jakobo, otwogindetab Jehovah ak ko bo Kiptaiyat Jesu Kristo, asirjini ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo bik che kigoiyestat, agatok." 
James1:2 Tupchosiekyuk, oiit ole boiboiyet kityo ye konyoru yomsosiek che terotin;" 
James1:3 ongen ole ibu muitaet tiemetab kayaneng’wong’. 
James1:4 Ak ingoek muitaet ne tinyei boisiet ne igesunotgei, si kobiit oegu che igesunotingei ak ko nyiitotin, che ma rartaat eng’ kiy." 
James1:5 Ago ngot kobetyi chi age tugul eng’ okwek ng’omnatet, ko ingosom Jehovah, ne igochin tugul eng’ aiyebindo ama kere kong’; ak kigochin inendet." 
James1:6 Ago ingosom eng’ kayanet, amat kosage: amu inendet ne sage ko kergei ak mildaetab ge ne bo nyanjet ne mildoi usonet koba komosi ak komosi." 
James1:7 Amat kobwat chichoto kole sichei kiy eng’ Kiptaiyat," 
James1:8 chitab kabwatutik aeng’, ne ma tononot eng’ ortinwekyik tugul." 
James1:9 Ago ingobaibait ne tupchet ne ko nyerat, eng’ katororennyi:" 
James1:10 ak ingobaibait magoriot, amu kagiming’in: amu siirtoi inendet ko u taptetab suswek." 
James1:11 Amu choru asista koboto usonet ne beelei tuguk, ak kobeel suswek koresyo; ak kobutyo taptokwak, ak kobet kororonindab itondanywa: betei ko u noto agine magoriot eng’ ortinwekyik." 
James1:12 Baibai chito ne muitoi eng’ yomset: amu ye kagoterter, kotaachei kutwet ne bo sobondo, ne kiiarorji Kiptaiyat ichek che chamei inendet." 
James1:13 Amat komwa chi ye kagiyom kole, Kayoma Jehovah: amu mayomei Jehovah yaitiet, ama yomei inendet chi age tugul:" 
James1:14 ago kiyomei chi tugul, ye imuti magennyi ne ya, ak kichuuti," 
James1:15 ak ye kagomanach maget ne ya, koii tengekto: ak ye kagoeet tengekto, koii meet." 
James1:16 Amat ongegenak, chamanikyuk che kitupche." 
James1:17 Kagoitoet age tugul ne mie ak konunotiot age tugul ne igesunotgei ko bo barak, chorugei eng’ Kwanda ne bo lapkeiyosiek, ne mami eng’ inendet kit ne walaksei, anan ko uruet ne bunu waletab ge." 
James1:18 Kisichech eng’ magennyi eng’ ng’olyotab imanit, si kobiit keegu che tongoanikab yautikyik." 
James1:19 Ongen ng’olyondoni, chamanikyuk che kitupche. Ago ingochepchebit chi age tugul kogas, amaek ne sib kong’alali, ama sib konerechi:" 
James1:20 amu mayaei neregekab chi imandab Jehovah. 
James1:21 Eng’ noto anyun omete simdo tugul ak chang’indab yaitwogik, otaach eng’ mutyonet ng’olyot ne kigimin, ne imuchi kosor sobonwekwok." 
James1:22 Ago oegu che yaei ng’olyot, amat oegu che kasei kityo, ogenege okwege." 
James1:23 Amu ngot koek chi age tugul kasindetab ng’olyot, ama ne yaei, ko u chito ne keerei togennyi eng’ kioit:" 
James1:24 amu keeregei, ak kwo, ak koutie eng’ yoto kole ka chito ne u nee." 
James1:25 Ago inendet ne isiachi ng’atutiet ne igesunotgei, ne bo katiaknatet, ak koteptoi, amaek kasindet ne utie, ago yaindet ne boisiei, kiberuri chichito eng’ boisiennyi." 
James1:26 Ngo len chi tinyei atebet ne u ne bo kayanik, ama ribei ng’elyeptanyi ak koberberi muguleldanyi, ko buch kayanetab chichoto." 
James1:27 Kayanet ne tilil ne matinyei muruonindo eng’ taitab Jehovah Kwanda, ko ni: kowendi kogeerei che matinyei sigikwak ak mosogik eng’ nyalildanywa, ak koripgei inendet eng’ ng’ony koek ne matinyei tisia." 
James2:1 Tupchosiekyuk, amonam kayanetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, Kiptaiyatab torornatet, eng’ tiytietab bik."
