James2:2 Ngot konyo chi ole otuiyechini ne tinyei peteit ne bo tahabu, ak ngoroik che kororon, ak konyo agine kibananiat ne tinyei ngoroik che yaachen;" 
James2:3 ak ogonyit inendet ne ilaachi ngoroik che kororon, olenji, Tebe yu mie; ak olenji kibananiat, Tonon eng’ yo, anan itebe ng’ony yu bo kelyekyuk;" 
James2:4 ko ma obesiege okwege, ak oegu che iruochi che tinyei kabwatutik che yaachen?" 
James2:5 Ogaso, tupchosiekyuk ak ko chamanikyuk; tos kima lewen Jehovah che bonondos eng’ ng’ony koek magorek eng’ kayanet, ak koek che nyoru bounatet ne kigoarorji ichek che chamei inendet?" 
James2:6 Ago kaosas kibananiat. Tos mainyalilok magorek, ak kochuutok obe kapkiruogutik?" 
James2:7 Machubei ichek kainet ne bo teegisto ne kimwaitaenok? 
James2:8 Ago ngot osulde Ng’atutietab kaplaitoriat, ko u ye mwaei sirutik kole, Cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ye ichamdoige, oyae ne mie;" 
James2:9 ago ngot otiytii bik, ko kaoyai tengekto, koruokwok Ng’atutiet kole o bistoik." 
James2:10 Amu chito age tugul ne ribei Ng’atutiet komugul, ak kobut eng’ ng’olyot agenge, konamei kiruoget eng’ tugul." 
James2:11 Amu inendet ne kimwa kole, Amoipge, ko kimwa agine kole, Amerumisie. Noto anyun, ngot ko meyai ibetab ge, ak irumisiei, ko kaiegu bistoindetab Ng’atutiet." 
James2:12 Omwa ak oyai ko u bik che tun kiruokyin eng’ ng’atutietab katiaknatet. 
James2:13 Amu matinyei kiruoget rirenetab ge eng’ inendet ne ma ibor rirenetab ge: itororegei rirenetab ge kogirindoi kiruoget. 
James2:14 Kelu nee, tupchosiekyuk, ngot kole chi tinyei kayanet, ama tinyei boisionik? Komuchi kayanonato kosor inendet?" 
James2:15 Ngot komi ach ngor ng’etab komet, anan ko chepto ne otupche, ama tinyei amitwogik betut age tugul," 
James2:16 ak kolenji ichek age eng’ okwek, Oba eng’ kalyet, ocheng’ lalang’indo ak biyendo, ama ogochi ichek tuguk che machei borto; kotoreti nee?" 
James2:17 Ko kit ne u agine kayanet, ngot ko matinyei boisionik, ko meat inegei." 
James2:18 Ago imuchi komwa chito kole, Itinye inye kayanet, atinye ane boisionik: iborua kayaneng’ung’ ne matinyei boisionik, si aborun boisionikyuk eng’ kayanet." 
James2:19 Iyani ile agenge Jehovah; iyae ne mie: iyani agichek oik, ak kobotandos." 
James2:20 Ago imache inai, ee, inye chito ne ma i kiy, ile, kayanet ne matinyei boisionik ko son?" 
James2:21 Kima kiityi imanda kwandanyo Abraham eng’ boisionik, ye kingogoito werinnyi Isak eng’ kaptisisiet?" 
James2:22 Igeere ile kibois kayanet koboto boisionikyik, ak kiek kayanet ne igesunotgei eng’ boisionik," 
James2:23 ak kiisulda sirutiet ne mwaei kolen, Kiiyan Abraham Jehovah, ak kigiityi inendet noto koek imanda; ak kigiguure inendet choruetab Jehovah." 
James2:24 Ogeere ole kiityin chi imanda eng’ boisionik, magiityin eng’ kayanet inegei." 
James2:25 Ak ko u noto, tos kima kiityi Rahab chepkugoniot imanda agine eng’ boisionik, amu kitaach che kiga kiyokto, ak koweekta ichek kobun oret age?" 
James2:26 Amu ko u ye meat borto ne matinyei tamirmiriet, ko u noto kayanet ne matinyei boisionik, meat agine." 
James3:1 Amat koek che chang’ eng’ okwek konetik, tupchosiekyuk, ongen ole tun kinyoru kiruoget ne o mising’." 
James3:2 Amu kibutosi achek tugul eng’ tuguk che chang’. Ngot ko maibut chi age tugul eng’ ng’olyo, kogesunotgei chichoto, ak komuchi korib borto komugul agine." 
James3:3 Ngot kinde karik kutuswekab mbartanyisiek, si kobiit kogasech it, keweechi borwekwak tugul agichek." 
James3:4 Ogeer melisiek agichek, nganda eechen mising’, ak koonati usonaik che kimen, keweege baoiyot ne ming’in ne kindochine, kwo ole makyin ne kweriei." 
James3:5 U noto agine ng’elyepta, kebeberta ne ming’in, ak kolosegei eng’ tuguk che eechen. Ogeero, beelei mat ne ming’in kwenik che tia!" 
James3:6 Ak ng’elyepta ko mat: ng’onyut ne bo tengekto eng’ kebeberwekyok ko ng’elyepta, ne imuruoni borto komugul, ak konaami mat eng’ bandab chi kote kosobei ak kinaami eng’ matab Gehenna." 
James3:7 Amu kibaei tiong’ik alak tugul, ak taritik, ak tuguk che ichuutegei ak tuguk che mitei nyanjet, ko kigobai bik;" 
James3:8 ago maimuchi chi koboi ng’elyepta: yaitiet ne ma bounaksei, ne nyiitat ng’wonetab meet." 
James3:9 Kilosune noto Kiptaiyat ak ko Kwanda: ak kichube bik, che kigiyai eng’ kergeindab Jehovah:" 
James3:10 bunu kutit agenge kaberuret ak chubisiet. Che kitupche, ma nyolu koteb ko u nito tuguchuto." 
James3:11 Tos kutune konda agenge beek che anyiny ak che ng’wonen? 
James3:12 Che kitupche, imuchi mogoiywet koii emitik? Anan koii ketitab sabibuk logoekab mogoonik? Amaimuchi beek che miach kobiitune che bo munyuk." 
James3:13 Ng’o ne ng’om eng’ okwek ak koguitos? Ingobarta boisionikyik eng’ atebet ne mie eng’ kaming’inetab ge ne bo ng’omnatet. 
James3:14 Ago ngot otinye ng’etkonda ne ng’wan ak toiyet eng’ mugulelwekwok, ko mat olosge, amat omwa lembech agobo imanit." 
James3:15 Mabunu barak ng’omnatoni bo ng’ony, bo borwek, bo oindet." 
James3:16 Amu ole mitei ng’etkonda ak toiyet, komitei bolatet ak yautiet age tugul ne ya." 
James3:17 Ago ng’omnatet ne bunu barak ko ne tai ko tilil, yeityo ko bo kalyet, ak komuitoi, ak kasei kiy ne kimwachin, ak ko nyiitat rirenet ak logoek che miach, ama walaksei, ama tinyei chombilet." 
James3:18 Ak kegolei logoekab imanda eng’ kalyet agobo ichek che yaei kalyet. 
James4:1 Bunu ano lugosiek ak boriosiek eng’ kwenung’wong’? Mabunu magutikwok che bortos eng’ kebeberwekwok? 
James4:2 Ogase miat, amotinye kiy: obarisiei, ak koamok ng’etkong’, amomuchi onyoru: obortosi ak oyae luget; amotinye kiy, amu mosome." 
James4:3 Osome, amosiche, amu ya someng’wong’, si oyae magutikwok." 
James4:4 Okwek che oibege, mongen ole choruanditab ng’ony ko bunyondit eng’ Jehovah? Chito age tugul anyun ne machei koek choruetab ng’ony koyaegei koek bunyotab Jehovah." 
James4:5 Anan obwati ole ng’alali buch sirutik, kole, Tamirmiriet ne menyei eng’ achek kotinyei ng’etkonda?" 
James4:6 Ago konu mieindo ne tesat. Len anyun, Kirindoi Jehovah che meniotin, ak kogochin mieindo che iming’inegei." 
James4:7 Noto anyun, oming’inityige Jehovah; ago ogirinde oindet, si komweenok." 
James4:8 Orikyi Jehovah, si korikyok. Oun eunekwok, okwek kiptengeginik; ak otilil mugulelwekwok, okwek che o bo kabwatutik aeng’." 
James4:9 Onginyalilak, ak oarogense, ak oteeiye: ingowalak roriondeng’wong’ koek arogenet, ak koek boiboiyeng’wong’ nyigisindo." 
James4:10 Oming’inge eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat, si koeetok." 
James4:11 Amomwaitaege ng’alek che yaach okwege, che kitupche. Inendet ne mwaitae ng’olyot ne ya ne tupcho, anan koruokyi tupchennyi, komwaitae ng’olyot ne ya Ng’atutiet, ak koruokyin Ng’atutiet: ago ngot iruokyi Ng’atutiet, ko ma i chito ne yaei Ng’atutiet, ago i ne iruokyin." 
James4:12 Ne konu Ng’atutiet ak koruochi ko agenge, inendet ne imuchi kosor ak komuchi kong’em: ago i ng’o inye si iruokyi chitab kokweng’ung’?" 
James4:13 Ogas anyun, okwek che omwae ole, Kibendi rani anan ko mutai nganasani, ak ketar kenyit agenge eng’ oloto, kealisiei, ak kealdoisiei, ak kesich kelunet:" 
James4:14 ago mongen kit ne biitu karon. Nee sobeng’wong’? Amu okwek ko o kibungweret, ne toogu ne matia, yeityo kobet." 
James4:15 Amu kata nyoljinok ole, Ngo cham Kiptaiyat, kesoptosi, keyai ni anan ko nin." 
James4:16 Ago nguno otororige eng’ kachaunosiekwok bo ge: katororetab ge age tugul ne u noto ko ya. 
James4:17 Eng’ inendet anyun, ne ingen koyai ne mie, ama yaei, ko tengekto eng’ inendet." 
James5:1 Ogas anyun, okwek magorek, oririe ak oteeiye amu nyalwogikwok che bwanjinok." 
James5:2 Kagonunio magornatosiekwok, ak kigoam kiptorotinik ngoroikwok." 
James5:3 Kagoruotityo tahabusiekwok ak fedaisiekwok; ak tun egu karuotitoenywa baornatet eng’ okwek, ak tun amei borwekwok ko u mat. Kaogonorjige magornatet eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
James5:4 Ogeero, boldos melekwekab kiboitinik che kigesei mbarenikwok, che kionamdege: ak kigochut itikab Kiptaiyatab Lugosiek rirekab ichek che kigesei." 
James5:5 Kiomeng’isie eng’ ng’ony eng’ kabaibaetab ge, ne kiobaibaege magutikwok; kiobai mugulelwekwok eng’ betutab eng’set." 
James5:6 Kioruokyi, ak kiobar chitab imanda; ama kirindook." 
James5:7 Omuite anyun, che kitupche, kot koit nyonunetab Kiptaiyat. Ogeero, igeni chitab kobo mbaret logoek che miachen che bo ng’ony, ak komuitoi agobo choto, kot konyor ropta ne bo tai ak ne bo let." 
James5:8 Omuite anyun ak okwek; ogimit mugulelwekwok: amu kagonegitit nyonunetab Kiptaiyat. 
James5:9 Among’unyng’ung’jige okwege, che kitupche, si ma kiruokwok: ogeero, tononi kiruogindet eng’ taitab kurgotik." 
James5:10 Tupchosiechu, obwat maotik che king’alal eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat, koek karogutietab nyalilda ak muitaet." 
James5:11 Ogeero, kiguure che kimuita che boiboen: kiogas agobo muitaetab Job, ak kiogeer kit ne kiyai Kiptaiyat eng’ let, ole nyiitat rirenet Kiptaiyat, ak koriregei." 
James5:12 Ago ne siirei tuguk tugul, tupchosiekyuk, ko mat oyosie kipsengwet, anan ko ng’ony, anan ko eng’ kayosiet age tugul: ago ingoek ee neng’wong’, ee, ak ingoek achicha neng’wong’, achicha; si mobutyi kiruoget." 
James5:13 Mi chi eng’ okwek ne nyalili? Ingosa. Mi ne baibai? Ingotien kalosunet. 
James5:14 Mitei ne miani eng’ kwenung’wong’? Ingoguur boisiekab kaniset; ak kosa ichek agobo inendet, koiile mwaita eng’ kainetab Kiptaiyat:" 
James5:15 ak kosoob saetab kayanet inendet ne miani, ak kong’eet Kiptaiyat inendet; ak ngot ko kigoyai tengekwogik, kenyochi kaat." 
James5:16 Ong’ang’jige anyun kachiliilutikwok okwege, ak osachinige okwege, si kobiit kisoobok. Toretisiei mising’ saetab chito ne bo imanda ngo sa eng’ kagiiletab ge." 
James5:17 Ki chito Elija ne u achek, ak kisa kogiilgei kole si marobon; ak ma robonji ng’ony eng’ kenyisiek somok ak arawek lo." 
James5:18 Ak kisa kogeny; ak kigon kipsengwet ropta, ak kii ng’ony logoekyik." 
James5:19 Che kitupche, ngot komi chi eng’ kwenung’wong’ ne mastoi eng’ imanda, ak kowal chi inendet;" 
James5:20 ko ingonai kole inendet ne walei kiptengekyot kobagakta mastaetab orennyi kosoru sobondo eng’ meet, ak kotuchei tengekwogik che chang’." 
1Peter1:1 Petero, ne kiyoktoi ne bo Jesu Kristo, asirjini che kigilewen, bunotik che bo bik che kigoiyesta, eng’ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia, ak Bitunia," 
1Peter1:2 ko u eng’ naetab Jehovah Kwanda ne kisib konai, eng’ katabanetab Tamirmiriet, agoi kasetab it ak isetab korotik che bo Jesu Kristo: Ingotesak mieindo ak kalyet eng’ okwek." 
1Peter1:3 Iberurot Jehovah Kwandab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, ne kisichech kogeny eng’ rirenennyi ne o kenyoru kamang’unet ne sobei eng’ ng’eetyetab Jesu Kristo ne kimong’ eng’ che kibek," 
1Peter1:4 ketaach borotet ne ma ng’emaksei, ama tinyei muruonindo, ama betei, ne kigigonoruok eng’ kipsengwet," 
1Peter1:5 okwek che kiribei eng’ kimnatetab Jehovah eng’ kayanet si onyoru yetunet ne chobot keng’any eng’ betutab let. 
1Peter1:6 Ne oboiboi mising’ eng’ noto, nganda nguno eng’ betusiek che matia, ngo nyolu, ko kagigonok oarogense eng’ yomsosiek che chang’," 
1Peter1:7 si kenyor eng’ kalosunet ak torornatet ak teegisto, tiemet ne chamaksei ne bo kayaneng’wong’, ne tinyei kamanutiet ne o kosiir ne bo tahabu che betos nganda kitiemei eng’ mat, eng’ ng’ang’et ne bo Jesu Kristo:" 
1Peter1:8 ne ochame nganda tom ogeer; inendet ne nganda mogeere nguno, oyani, ko oboiboi mising’ eng’ boiboiyet ne ma mwaoksei ak ko nyiitat torornatet:" 
1Peter1:9 ye tun onyoru kasuldaetab kayaneng’wong’, yetunetab sobonwekwok." 
1Peter1:10 Kicheng’ maotik ak kogilgilye mising’ inne agobo yetunanoto, icheget che kimaoten agobo mieindo ne osiche:" 
1Peter1:11 ye kicheng’ei betut ne inet anan ole u betut ne kiiborjin Tamirmirietab Kristo ne kimitei eng’ ichek, ye kisib kobaorian agobo nyalilwogikab Kristo, ak torornatosiek che isubi choto." 
1Peter1:12 Che kiging’ang’ji, ma agobo icheget, ago kiyaiywok okwek tuguchuto, che kagemwawok nguno eng’ ichek che kiamwok logoiywek che miach eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil ne kigiyok eng’ kipsengwet; tuguk che machei malaikaisiek mising’ kogeer." 
1Peter1:13 Eng’ noto anyun ogermen suenutikab kabwatutikwok, oripge ak omang’u eng’ kagesunetab ge mieindo ne tun kiibwok eng’ ng’ang’etab Jesu Kristo;" 
1Peter1:14 ko u lagok che kase it, amoyaniege magutikwok che bo tai eng’ betusiek che ki bo berberindang’wong’:" 
1Peter1:15 ago ko u ye tilil inendet ne kiguurok, oegu che tililen ak okwek eng’ atebosiek tugul;" 
1Peter1:16 amu kigisir kele, Oegu che tililen; amu a tilil ane." 
1Peter1:17 Ak ngot oguure inendet olen Kwanda, ne iruochi ko u ole teptoi boisietab chi age tugul, ama eng’ tiytiet, obendoti eng’ kaiyweisiet eng’ betusiekwok che omi ko o toek:" 
1Peter1:18 ongen ole kigitiachak omong’une atebeng’wong’ ne bo buch ne kionyoru eng’ kwanisiekwok, ma eng’ tuguk che ng’emaksei, ko u feda anan tahabu;" 
1Peter1:19 ago eng’ korotik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ko u che bo aruet ne matinyei berut ak ne matinyei tisia, choto ko korotikab Kristo:" 
1Peter1:20 ne kisib konaam iman kotom kelumda ng’ony, ago kiging’any eng’ betusiek che bo let agobo okwek," 
1Peter1:21 che o kayanik eng’ Jehovah amu inendet, ne kiing’eet inendet komong’ eng’ che kibek, ak kogochi torornatet; si kotebi kayaneng’wong’ ak kamang’uneng’wong’ eng’ Jehovah." 
1Peter1:22 Amu kiotilil sobonwekwok eng’ kasetab it ne ogase it imanit kot koit chamnyetab tupchosiek ne matinyei kenisiet, ochamnye, okwege eng’ mugulelwekwok eng’ kagiiletab ge:" 
1Peter1:23 amu kigesichok kogeny, ma eng’ keswek che ng’emaksei ago eng’ che ma ng’emaksei, eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne sobei ak kotebyei." 
1Peter1:24 Amu, U suswek borwek tugul, Ak u taptokab suswek torornatenywa tugul. Restos suswek, ak kobutyo taptok:" 
1Peter1:25 Ago tebyei koigeny ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat. Nito ko ng’olyotab logoiywek che miach che kigiamwok. 
1Peter2:1 Oiste anyun yaitiet tugul, ak ng’alset tugul, ak chombilisiosiek, ak ng’etkonda, ak ng’alalet age tugul ne ya," 
1Peter2:2 omach mising’ chego che bo ng’omnatetab tamirmiriet, che matinyei ng’alset, ko u manyurunik, si kobiit onerie agoi yetunet;" 
1Peter2:3 ngo kiochamjam ole Kiptaiyat ko bo mieindo: 
1Peter2:4 obwanjini inendet koita ne sobei, ne kiesio bik iman, ago lewenot eng’ Jehovah, ne chamat mising’," 
1Peter2:5 ak okwek, che o koik che soptos, kiteechok oegu gotab tamirmiriet, oegu che boisiei eng’ tiseinatet ne tilil, si ogoite korosekab tamirmiriet, che taachaksei eng’ Jehovah eng’ Jesu Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Amu mi eng’ siret kole, Ogeero, kande Sion koita ne o ne bo luita, ne lewenot, ne chamat mising’: Ak inendet ne iyani, ko maililani." 
1Peter2:7 Eng’ okwek anyun che oyani ko chamat mising’ inendet: ago eng’ ichek che maiyani, ko, Koita ne kiesio teegik, Kigiyai koyata koek metitab luita;" 
1Peter2:8 ak ko, Koita ne inachi bich, ak ko ruandet ne riichei bich; amu kinachi ichek eng’ ng’olyot, amu magase it: kiginde ichek agobo noto." 
1Peter2:9 Ago okwek ko o bororiet ne kigelewen, o che boisiei eng’ tiseinatet ne bo kaplaitoriat, bororiet ne tilil, bik che bunjin Jehovah, si kobiit obarte telunatosiek che bo inendet ne kiguurok omong’une mesundeito omong’ji lapkeiyennyi ne kikweng’e." 
1Peter2:10 Okwek che kima ko o bororiet eng’ tai, ago nguno ko o bororietab Jehovah: che kima osich rirenetab ge, ago nguno ko kaosich rirenetab ge." 
1Peter2:11 Chamanichu, asomok ko u ye o toek ago o kiprutoinik, ale oistoege magutik che bo borto, che bortos ak sobondo;" 
1Peter2:12 okwek che otinye atebet ne nyolu eng’ kwenutab Bororiosiek: si nganda itaamok ko u yaikab yaitio, kotoror Jehovah eng’ betutab rutochinet eng’ boisionikwok che miach che keerei." 
1Peter2:13 Ogas it kit age tugul ne ng’atei bik amu Kiptaiyat: agot ngo laitoriat, ne bou tugul;" 
1Peter2:14 anan ko bounik, che iyogu inendet agobo mugetut ne yaakyin yaikab yaitio, ak agobo kalosunet eng’ ichek che yaei ne mie." 
1Peter2:15 Amu u noto magetab Jehovah, ale oger eng’ yautik che miach abusnatetab bik che berberen:" 
1Peter2:16 ko u che itiogotin, amoboisie katiaknateng’wong’ ko u kit ne otektoe yaitiet, ago oboisie ko u otwogikab Jehovah." 
1Peter2:17 Oteech bik tugul. Ocham che otupche. Oiywei Jehovah. Oteech laitoriat. 
1Peter2:18 Okwek che o otwogik, ogas it kiptainikwok eng’ kaiyweisiet tugul; ma che miachen ak che taloen kityo, ago ogas it che kolgol agichek." 
1Peter2:19 Amu chamaksei nito, ngot komuita chi eng’ arogenosiek kobwati Jehovah, ye kinyalili ama yai kiy ne ya." 
1Peter2:20 Amu teegis nee, ngot oyai tengek ak kebirok, ak omuitoi? Ago ngot oyai ne mie, ak onyalil, ak omuitoi, ko chamaksei nito eng’ Jehovah." 
1Peter2:21 Amu kigiguurjok nito: amu kinyalil Kristo agine agobo okwek, kobagakwok kaborunet, si kobiit osub tiegutikyik:" 
1Peter2:22 inendet ne kima yai tengek, ama kinyorji kutinnyi ng’alset:" 
1Peter2:23 ne ye kingeng’emji kut, ko ma ng’em kut; ye kingonyalil, ko ma imuiso; ago kiigochigei inendet ne iruochi eng’ imanda:" 
1Peter2:24 inendet ne kiib tengekwogikyok eng’ bortanyi eng’ ketit barak, si kesopche eng’ imanda; achek che kiga kebekyi tengekwogik; kigisoobenok birutikyik." 
1Peter2:25 Amu kiobetooti ko u kechirek; ago kaoweekyigei Mestowot ak ko Ribindetab sobonwekwok. 
1Peter3:1 U noto, osotichu, ogas it manong’otaikwok; si nganda magase it alak ng’olyot, kimuch kichuut ichek eng’ atebet ne mie ne bo osotikwak ama eng’ ng’olyot," 
1Peter3:2 ye keerei atebeng’wong’ ne tilil ne boto kaiyweisiet. 
1Peter3:3 Amaek lelestanywa lelesta ne bo sang’, ne bo laetab sumeek, ak kalaagetab karikab tahabu, ak kalaagetab ngoroik;" 
1Peter3:4 ago ingoek chito ne ung’at ne bo muguleldo, eng’ lelesta ne ma ng’emaksei ne bo tamirmiriet, ne tala ak kosisei, ne eng’ taitab Jehovah ko bo kamanutiet ne o." 
1Peter3:5 Amu kiyaei lelesta ko u noto agichek kwonyik che tililen chu ki bo keny, che kiimang’u Jehovah, ak kogase it manong’otaikwak:" 
1Peter3:6 ko u ye kigase it Sara Abraham, koguure inendet kiptaiyat: o lagokyik, ngot oyae ne mie, amoiywei kamuiset age tugul." 
1Peter3:7 Okwek manong’otaichu, otebi ko u noto koboto osotikwok eng’ ng’omnatet, ogochini kwondo teegisto, amu inendet ko nyalulat eng’ muren, ko u ye tun onyoru tugul mieindab sobondo; si ma kiger sautikwok." 
1Peter3:8 Ne bo let anyun, ko oegu tugul che bo kabwatet agenge, che riregei, che chamdos ko u che tupcho, che ng’arng’arge, che iming’inegei:" 
1Peter3:9 che mayaaktoi yaitio eng’ yaitio, anan ko ng’emetab kut eng’ ng’emetab kut; ago oegu che iberurisiei; amu kigiguurjok nito, si onam kaberuret." 
1Peter3:10 Amus, Inendet ne chamei sobondo, Ak kogeer betusiek che miachen, Ko ingorib ng’elyeptanyi si mamwa yaitio, Ak kutinnyi si mamwa ng’alset:" 
1Peter3:11 Ak ingoistoegei yeitio, ak koyai ne mie; Ingocheng’ kalyet ak kosub." 
1Peter3:12 Amu tokyingei konyekab Kiptaiyat che bo imanda, Ak kogasei itikyik somenywa: Ago kirindoi togetab Kiptaiyat che yaei yaitio." 
1Peter3:13 Ak ng’o ne yaiywok ne ya, ngot omache mising’ kit ne mie?" 
1Peter3:14 Ago ngot onyalili agobo imanda, ko o boiboen: amoiywei kamuisenywa, anan oiimge:" 
1Peter3:15 ago ogonyit Kristo koek Kiptaiyat ne tilil eng’ mugulelwekwok: ak oegu che chobotin kotugul owolji chi tugul ne teebenok ng’olyo agobo kamang’unet ne mitei eng’ okwek, ago eng’ talasiet ak kaiyweisiet:" 
1Peter3:16 otinye kabwatet ne mie; si ye kitaamok, kigochin kolilan ichek che mwaitae ng’alek che yaach atebeng’wong’ ne mie eng’ Kristo." 
1Peter3:17 Amu kaigai ngot ko noto magetab Jehovah, onyalilye amu oyae ne mie kosiir ye oyae ne ya." 
1Peter3:18 Amu kime Kristo agine konyil agenge agobo tengekwogik, inendet ne bo imanda agobo che ma bo imanda, si kobiit komutyech Jehovah; ne kigibar eng’ borto, ago kigisoob eng’ tamirmiriet;" 
1Peter3:19 kiwa eng’ noto agine koamji tamirmirik che kimi korgoret," 
1Peter3:20 che kima kogase it eng’ tai, ye kiganyei muitaetab Jehovah eng’ betusiekab Noa, ye kingeyaei melit, ne kigisorune che ng’ering’ eng’ beek, choto ko ki bik sisiit:" 
1Peter3:21 kergeindab tuguchuto ko kabatisanet, ne soruok agine eng’ betusiechu, ma kele istoetab simdab borto, ago wolunetab kabwatet ne mie ne tokyingei Jehovah, eng’ ng’eetyetab Jesu Kristo;" 
1Peter3:22 ne kikwa kipsengwet ak komi eutab tai ne bo Jehovah; ak kigiyai malaikaisiek ak bounatosiek ak kimnatosiek kogas it inendet. 
1Peter4:1 Noto anyun ko u ye kinyalil Kristo eng’ borto, ogermenge anyun eng’ kabwatonato; amu kigitiach eng’ tengekto inendet ne kinyalil eng’ borto;" 
1Peter4:2 si ko mata osopche eng’ borto eng’ betusiekwok che ng’etunotin eng’ magutik che yaach che bo bik, ago si osopche eng’ magetab Jehovah." 
1Peter4:3 Amu kigoyam betusiek che kigosiirto kosulda magetab Bororiosiek, ye kiobendoti eng’ magutik che yaachen, ak kasetab miat, eetab maiyek, ak wasang’natet, ak saetab kanamonik che etei ng’atutik:" 
1Peter4:4 tuguk che keerei ichek kole kwong’et amu moruachini osubi kimargatinoto koboto ichek, si komwaitaenak yaitio:" 
1Peter4:5 che tun tetyin ng’alek inendet ne chobot koruokyi che soptos ak che kigobek. 
1Peter4:6 Amu nito ko kigiamji logoiywek che miach agot che kigobek, si kobiit kiruokyi eng’ borto ko u ye kiruokyin bik, ago si kosopcho eng’ tamirmiriet ko u ye sobei Jehovah." 
1Peter4:7 Ago kagorik kagesunetab tuguk tugul: noto anyun oegu che oribege, ak oripse eng’ saet:" 
1Peter4:8 ne siirei tuguk tugul ko ochamnye mising’ okwege; amu tuchei chamnyet chang’indab tengekwogik: 
1Peter4:9 otaachge okwege eng’ okwege ama eng’ kang’unyng’unyet: 
1Peter4:10 ko u ye kigonyor chi age tugul kagochinet oboisiechinege, ko u ribik che miachen che bo chang’indab mieindab Jehovah;" 
1Peter4:11 ngo ng’alali chi, kong’alal ko u arorutikab Jehovah; ngo boisiei chi, kobois eng’ kimnatet ne igochin Jehovah: si kobiit kitoror Jehovah eng’ tuguk tugul eng’ Jesu Kristo, ne nenyi torornatet ak kimnatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Chamanichu, amokwong’ eng’ tiemisiet ne bo mat ne mi kwenung’wong’, ne nyonjinok si kobiit kotiemak, ko u ye kaityok kiy ne okwong’e:" 
1Peter4:13 ago oboiboitu, ko u ye o yamdoikab nyalilwogikab Kristo; si tun oboiboitu eng’ boiboiyet ne o eng’ ng’ang’etab lilindanyi agine." 
1Peter4:14 Ngechurok eng’ kainetab Kristo, ko oboiboi; amu tebenok Tamirmirietab lilindo ne Tamirmirietab Jehovah." 
1Peter4:15 Amat konyalil age eng’ okwek amu rumin, anan ko chorin, anan ko ne yaei yaitio, anan ko chi ne indogei ng’alekab bik alak;" 
1Peter4:16 ago nginyalil chi amu Kristianindet, ko mat kolilan; ingotoror Jehovah eng’ kainanito." 
1Peter4:17 Amu kagoit betut ne kitaune kiruoget gotab Jehovah: ak ngot ketaunenech achek, kotam nee kagesunetab ichek che magase it logoiywek che miach che bo Jehovah?" 
1Peter4:18 Ak ngot ko bichii kesor chi ne bo imanda, ko tun koegu nee eng’ ne ma bo imanda ak kiptengekyot?" 
1Peter4:19 Noto anyun ingogoito sobonwekwak che nyalildos ko u magetab Jehovah kogochi eng’ yaet ne mie Yaindet ne kiyani, korib." 
1Peter5:1 Ateechini mising’ boisiek che mi kwenung’wong’, anendet ne a boiyot ko u ichek, ak a baoriatab nyalilwogikab Kristo, ne kiyamdoi torornatet ne tun king’anyei:" 
1Peter5:2 oyage akwetab Jehovah ne mitei kwenung’wong’, otononji, ama eng’ birjinet, ago oyage eng’ chamet, eng’ Jehovah; ama eng’ magetab keljinet ne muruon, ago oyage eng’ chamet ne o;" 
1Peter5:3 amoegu kiptainik eng’ che otononjini, ago oegu kaborunoik eng’ akwet." 
1Peter5:4 Ak ye tun took Mestowot ne o, onyoru kutwet ne bo lilindo ne mabetei." 
1Peter5:5 Ko u noto ak okwek che o mengechen, ogas it boisiek. Ee, ogermenge okwek tugul eng’ kaming’inetab ge si kobiit oboisiechige okwege eng’ okwege: amu kirindoi Jehovah menotik, ak kogochin mieindo che iming’inegei." 
1Peter5:6 Oming’inityige anyun eut ne kim ne bo Jehovah, si kotororok ye kait betut;" 
1Peter5:7 otuuchi inendet kaiimutikwok tugul, amu ibwatok mising’." 
1Peter5:8 Oripge, oripse: amu wendoti bunyondeng’wong’ oindet, ko u ng’etundo ne boriseni, kocheng’ei ne amei:" 
1Peter5:9 ogirinde inendet ko o lumdootin eng’ kayaneng’wong’, ongen ole yaoksei nyalilwogik che u choto eng’ tupchosiekwok che mi ng’ony." 
1Peter5:10 Ak ingochobok, ak kolumdok, ak kogimitok Jehovah ne bo mieindo tugul, ne kiguurjok lilindanyi ne bo koigeny eng’ Kristo, ko kaonyalilse eng’ betusiek che matia." 
1Peter5:11 Nenyi kimnatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Kasirwak eng’ ng’alek tutigin, eng’ eutab Silbano, tupchennyo ne kiyani, ko u ye abwati, amwawok inne, ak abaoriani ale mieindab iman ni ne bo Jehovah: otononse olumdege." 
1Peter5:13 Igatok inendet ne mitei Babulon, ne kigilewenok tugul; ak kogatok agine Mariko werinnyu." 
1Peter5:14 Ogatge eng’ ng’ututet ne bo chamnyet. Ingoteb kalyet eng’ okwek tugul che omite eng’ Kristo. 
2Peter1:1 Simon Petero, otwogindet ak ko ne kiyoktoi ne bo Jesu Kristo, asirjini ichek che kigenyoru tugul kayanet ne kararan mising’ eng’ imandab Jehovah nenyo ak ko Yetindennyo Jesu Kristo:" 
2Peter1:2 Ingotesak mieindo ak kalyet eng’ okwek eng’ naet ne ongen Jehovah ak Jesu Kiptaiyandennyo. 
2Peter1:3 Amu kigonech kamuktaetab Jehovah tuguk tugul che nyoljin sobondo ak kaiyweet ne kiywei Jehovah, eng’ naet ne kinae inendet ne kiguurech eng’ torornatennyi ak mieindanyi;" 
2Peter1:4 kigogonech eng’ choto arorutik che miachen mising’ ak ko eechen inne; si kobiit oegu eng’ chuto yamdoikab atebetab Jehovah, ko kaochililye ng’emisiet ne mi ng’ony amu maget ne ya." 
2Peter1:5 Ee, amu ng’olyondonito ye kaotes kagiiletab ge tugul eng’ komostang’wong’, otesyi mieindo kayaneng’wong’; ak otesyi naet mieindo;" 
2Peter1:6 ak otesyi ribetab ge naet; ak otesyi muitaet ribetab ge; ak otesyi kaiyweetab Jehovah, muitaet;" 
2Peter1:7 ak otesyi chametab tupchosiek kaiyweetab Jehovah; ak otesyi chamnyet chametab tupchosiek. 
2Peter1:8 Amu ngot komitei eng’ okwek tuguchuto ak kotesak, koyaok si mochorirense anan ko che maiyiei logoek eng’ naetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Amu inendet ne matinyei tuguchuto, ko kipkoratiat ak kogeerei kit ne mi ole negit kityo ak koutie katililet eng’ tengekwogikyik che bo keny." 
2Peter1:10 Eng’ noto anyun, che kitupche, ogiilge mising’ inne, oyai kuureng’wong’ ak leweneng’wong’ kogimit: amu ngot oyai tuguchuto ko magoi obutye matiny:" 
2Peter1:11 amu kigonok ko u noto eng’ chang’indo ochut bounatetab koigeny ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindet Jesu Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Noto anyun achobege kotugul abwatwok tuguchuto, agot ngongen choto, ak o lumdotin eng’ imanit ne otinye." 
2Peter1:13 Ak abwati ale mie ko ta ami eng’ bori, ang’eetak eng’ kabwatet ne abwatwok;" 
2Peter1:14 angen ale nyonei kochogu metoetab bortanyu, ko u ye kiga mwawa Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
2Peter1:15 Ee, agiilige si ye tun kaame omuch obwat tuguchu tugul eng’ boroindo age tugul." 
2Peter1:16 Amu kima kisub atindonik che kigichobei eng’ ng’omnatet, ye kingemwawok kimnatet ak nyonunetab Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo, kigi baorinik che kigigeer etunatennyi," 
2Peter1:17 amu kitaach teegisto ak torornatet eng’ Jehovah Kwanda, ye kinyonji inendet kutit ne kibunu lilindo ne bo etunatet, kole, Ni ko Werinnyu chamanennyu, ne abaibai mising’ eng’ inendet:" 
2Peter1:18 ak kigigas kutinito kobunu kipsengwet, ye kigimi koboto inendet eng’ tulwet ne tilil." 
2Peter1:19 Ak kitinye ng’olyotab maoinatet ne bo iman inne; ne oyae ne mie ye orib, ko u tait ne ikweng’sei eng’ ole imen, kot koeech, ak kochorji mugulelwekwok taboiyatab karon:" 
2Peter1:20 ye kaonai ni korok, ole mami maoinatetab sirutik ne iboru chito inegei kaguiyennyi." 
2Peter1:21 Amu mami maoinatet ne kigobiit eng’ magetab chi: ago king’alali bik eng’ Jehovah, kondochin Tamirmiriet ne Tilil." 
2Peter2:1 Ago kibiit maotik che bo lembech agichek eng’ kwenutab bik, ko u ye ta kobiitu agine eng’ kwenung’wong’ konetikab lembech, che ibu eng’ ung’ot pcheutikab ng’emisiet, koesioi agot Kiptaiyat ne kial ichek, koipchingei ng’emisiet ne chogu." 
2Peter2:2 Ak isubi bik che chang’ magutikwak che yaachen; kimwaitoe ne ya oretab imanit amu ichek. 
2Peter2:3 Ak kocheng’jingei borotet eng’ okwek eng’ ng’alekab ng’alset amu kasenywa ne bo miat: che ma igaegei kiruogenywa koboch keny, ama ruei ng’emisienywa." 
2Peter2:4 Amu ngot ko kima rire Jehovah malaikaisiek ye kingoyai tengekto, ago kitoorji oldab kiruoget, ak konde keringonik che bo mesundeito, kerib kot koit kiruoget;" 
2Peter2:5 ak kima rire ng’onyut ne bo keny, ago kirib Noa ak bik alak tisab amdoindet ne bo imanda, ye kingoipchi maranet ng’onyutab bik che maiywei Jehovah;" 
2Peter2:6 ak koruokyi nganasokab Sodom ak Gomora, kogabui, kowal koek orek, koyai koek kaborunet eng’ ichek che ta kotebyei ko maiywei Jehovah;" 
2Peter2:7 ak kosor Lot chitab imanda, ne kinyalili mising’ amu atebosiek che yaachen che bo kiptengeginik," 
2Peter2:8 (amu ye kimenyei chichoto bo imanda kwenunywa, kogeerei ak kogasei, kous muguleldanyi ne bo imanda eng’ betut age tugul eng’ boisiosiekab ngelelnatet:)" 
2Peter2:9 ingen anyun Kiptaiyat kosor eng’ yomset che iywei Jehovah, ak korib che ma bo imanda kot koit betutab kiruoget, si tun kiruokyi;" 
2Peter2:10 ago eng’ magetab muruonindo, ak kosasei bounatet. Che koromen, che isubi magutikwak, che mabotandos ye chubei che tororen." 
2Peter2:11 Agot nganda siirtoot malaikaisiek, che siirei mising’ eng’ kimnatet ak kamuktaet, ko maipchin ichek kiruogetab chubisiet konyo taitab Kiptaiyat." 
2Peter2:12 Ago bichuto matinyei ng’omnatet, che kigisich kityo ko u tiong’ik si kenamei ak kebarei, che chubisiei eng’ ng’alek che maingen, ko tun king’emei iman eng’ ng’emisienywa," 
2Peter2:13 che nyoru nyalilda, noto ko melektab yaitiet; che iiti kole boiboiyet ye bogitos bet, berutik ak tisonok, che iboiboigei eng’ igorwekwak che bo chamnyet, ye oamisie tugul;" 
2Peter2:14 bik che tinyei konyek che nyiitotin ibetab ge, amaimuchi kometo tengekto; che ichuuti sobonwek che ma tononiotin; che tinyei mugulelwek che kigonetgei kasetab miat; lagokab chubet;" 
2Peter2:15 kingobagakta oretab iman, koba komasta, kosub oretab Balaam ne bo gab Beor ne kicham melektab yaitiet;" 
2Peter2:16 ago kigiger kong’ amu bistoennyi: king’alal sigiriet ne namat kut eng’ kutitab chi ak korany iywekab maotiondonoto. 
2Peter2:17 Chuto kondametusiek che matinyei beek, ak ko bolik che iboti usonet; che kigigonorji tuuindab mesundeito." 
2Peter2:18 Amu, ye mwaei ng’alek che koromen che bo losetab ge, kochuutu eng’ magutikab borto, ak eng’ maget ne ya, bik che katoi kochililyo eng’ ichek che mi eng’ kenisiet:" 
2Peter2:19 koarorjin ichek katiaget, ago icheget ko otwogikab ng’emisiet; amu inendet ne iterteri chito age, koyaei chichoto koek otwogindet." 
2Peter2:20 Amu ye kagochililye muruonindab ng’ony eng’ naet ne naei Kiptaiyat ak ko Yetindet Jesu Kristo, ko ngot ko ta koratgei kogeny ak tuguchoto ak kiterter, koyaitu atebenywa ne bo let kosiir ne bo tai." 
2Peter2:21 Amu kita kaigai eng’ ichek ko ma nai oretab imanda, kosiir, ye kingonai, koweektagei let eng’ ng’atutiet ne tilil ne kiga kigochi." 
2Peter2:22 Kigoyaak eng’ icheget ko u ye mwaei kalewenetab iman, kole, Weekyingei seset kang’undaikyik, ak kwo komildaegei ng’atatek kogeny toret ne kaga kiun." 
2Peter3:1 Chamanichu, baruani asirwok nguno ko ne bo aeng’, ak eng’ tuwai ang’eeti kabwatutikwok che matinyei kenisiet ye agonok obwat;" 
2Peter3:2 si obwat ng’alek che kimwa maotik che tililen eng’ tai, ak ng’atutietab Kiptaiyat ak ko Yetindet eng’ bikwok che kiyoktoi:" 
2Peter3:3 korok, ongen ole tun bwanei chombilik ak chombilisiet eng’ betusiek che bo let, che isubi magutikwak," 
2Peter3:4 ak komwaei kolen, Mi ano arorutietab nyonunennyi? Amu, koboch ye kingoruiyo kwanisiekyok, komi tuguk tugul ko u kit ne ki u koboch taunetab yaetab ng’ony." 
2Peter3:5 Amu kwetyin ichegei koutie kole kimi kipsengwetisiek koboch keny, ak ng’ony ne kigiyai eng’ beek ak komi kwenutab beek, eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah;" 
2Peter3:6 kimarane beechoto ng’onyut ne ki bo betusiechoto, ak kilus:" 
2Peter3:7 ago kipsengwetisiek ak ng’onyut che bo nguno, ko kigigonorji mat eng’ ng’olyondonoto, kogonor agoi betutab kiruoget ak ng’emisietab bik che maiywei Jehovah." 
2Peter3:8 Ago amoutie ng’olyondoni, chamanichu, ole betut agenge eng’ Kiptaiyat ko kergei ak kenyisiek elfut, ak ko kergei kenyisiek elfut ak betut agenge." 
2Peter3:9 Maigaegei Kiptaiyat eng’ arorutiennyi, ko u ye iiti alak kagaetab ge; ago muitoi agobo okwek, mamachei kolus chi age tugul, ago machei kobwanji tugul sigunet." 
2Peter3:10 Ago tun nyonei betutab Kiptaiyat ko u chorin; ne siirtoe kipsengwetisiek eng’ cheet ne o, ak kochootyo tuguk tugul che kigiyae ng’ony ak barak eng’ mat ne korom, ak kolal ng’onyut ak boisionik che mi." 
2Peter3:11 Amu tun chootos tuguchuto tugul ko u nito, ko nyolu oegu bik che u nee eng’ atebet ne tilil ak kaiyweetab Jehovah," 
2Peter3:12 ogeni nyonunetab betutab Jehovah, ak ogiili, amu noto anyun chootos kipsengwetisiek eng’ mat, ak kochootyo tuguk tugul che kigiyae ng’ony ak barak eng’ mat ne korom?" 
2Peter3:13 Ago, kigeni kipsengwet ne leel ak ng’onyut ne leel ko u arorutiennyi, ole menyei imanda." 
2Peter3:14 Noto anyun, chamanichu, amu ogeni tuguchoto, ogiilge si tun kenyoruok omi eng’ kalyet ko motinye tisia amotinye lelut eng’ tainnyi." 
2Peter3:15 Ak oiit ole muitaetab Kiptaiyandennyo ko yetunet; ko u ye kisirwak agine Paulo, tupchennyo ne kechame, ko u ng’omnatet ne kigigochi;" 
2Peter3:16 ko u eng’ baronokyik tugul agichek, kong’alal agobo tuguchuto eng’ baronochoto; ole mi tuguk alak che uuen kiguiyo, che igunuri che maingen kiy, ak che ma tononiotin, ko u ye itoi sirutik chun alak, kot koit ng’emisienywa." 
2Peter3:17 Ko okwek anyun, chamanichu, amu kaosib onai tuguchuto, oripge, si maichuutok kachiliiletab bistoik, ak obutye eng’ tononeng’wong’." 
2Peter3:18 Ago onerie eng’ mieindo ak naet ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindennyo Jesu Kristo. Nenyi torornatet nguno agoi koigeny. Amen. 
1John1:1 Noto ne kimi koboch taunet, noto ne kigegas, noto ne kigegeer eng’ konyekyok, noto ne kigesue, ak konam eunekyok, agobo Ng’olyotab sobondo," 
1John1:1 Noto ne kimi koboch taunet, noto ne kigegas, noto ne kigegeer eng’ konyekyok, noto ne kigesue, ak konam eunekyok, agobo Ng’olyotab sobondo," 
1John1:2 (ak king’ang’ak sobonoto, ak kigegeer, ak kebaoriani, ak kiboruok sobonoto bo koigeny, ne kimi koboto Kwanda, ak kiging’ang’wech;)" 
1John1:2 (ak king’ang’ak sobonoto, ak kigegeer, ak kebaoriani, ak kiboruok sobonoto bo koigeny, ne kimi koboto Kwanda, ak kiging’ang’wech;)" 
1John1:3 noto kigegeer ak kegas ko noto ne keamwok ak okwek, si kobiit osich ak okwek yamdaet kobotech: ee, mitei yamdaennyo koboto Kwanda, ak koboto Werinnyi Jesu Kristo:" 
1John1:3 noto kigegeer ak kegas ko noto ne keamwok ak okwek, si kobiit osich ak okwek yamdaet kobotech: ee, mitei yamdaennyo koboto Kwanda, ak koboto Werinnyi Jesu Kristo:" 
1John1:4 ak kesirwok tuguchuto, si kobiit kosulda boiboiyennyo." 
1John1:4 ak kesirwok tuguchuto, si kobiit kosulda boiboiyennyo." 
1John1:5 Ak ni ng’olyot ne kigigas eng’ inendet, ak keamwok, kele lapkeiyet Jehovah, ama mi mesundeito eng’ inendet agot kitigin." 
1John1:5 Ak ni ng’olyot ne kigigas eng’ inendet, ak keamwok, kele lapkeiyet Jehovah, ama mi mesundeito eng’ inendet agot kitigin." 
1John1:6 Ngot kemwa kele kitinye yamdaet koboto inendet, ak kebendoti eng’ mesundeito, kegenu, ama kiyae imanit:" 
1John1:6 Ngot kemwa kele kitinye yamdaet koboto inendet, ak kebendoti eng’ mesundeito, kegenu, ama kiyae imanit:" 
1John1:7 ago ngot kebendote lapkeiyet, ko u ye mi inendet eng’ lapkeiyet, keting’ege yamdaet, ak kotililech korotikab Jesu Werinnyi eng’ tengekwogikyok tugul." 
1John1:7 ago ngot kebendote lapkeiyet, ko u ye mi inendet eng’ lapkeiyet, keting’ege yamdaet, ak kotililech korotikab Jesu Werinnyi eng’ tengekwogikyok tugul."
