Jude1:1 Juda, otwogindetab Jesu Kristo, ak ko tupchetab Jakobo, asirjini che kigeguur, che chamotin eng’ Jehovah Kwanda, ak ko ribotin agobo Jesu Kristo:" 
Jude1:2 Ingotesak rirenet eng’ okwek ak kalyet ak chamnyet. 
Jude1:3 Chamanichu, ye kiagiilige mising’ asirwak agobo yetunet ne kiyamdoi, ageer ale nyoljina asirwak ateeiywok ale ogiiljige mising’ kayanet ne kigigochi che tililen konyil agenge kityo." 
Jude1:4 Amu mi bik alak che kichut orit eng’ ung’ot, ichek che kigichopchi kiruogoni koboch keny, bik che maiywei Jehovah, che walei mieindab Jehovah nenyo koek maget ne ya, ak koesioi Laitoriandennyo, ne inegei, ak ko Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Amache anyun abwatwok, agot nganda kionai komie tuguchu tugul, ale kingosor Kiptaiyat bik komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ let kobar ichek che kima iyan." 
Jude1:6 Ak kiinde malaikaisiek che kima rib bounatenywa, ago kibagakta meng’otet ne ki nenywa, kiinde kotebe ratisiosiek che bo koigeny eng’ mesundeito kot koit kiruogetab betut ne o." 
Jude1:7 Ko u noto, agot Sodom ak Gomora, ak nganasok che kiga yiem, kingo kagogochigei sokset, ko u chuto, koba kosub borwek che ma kergei ak chechuak, ko kiginde koek kaborunet, konyalilso eng’ kiruogetab mat ne bo koigeny." 
Jude1:8 Imuruoni agichek chuto ko u noto borwek eng’ karuotitaosiekwak, ak kosasei kiptainatet, ak kochubei che tororen." 
Jude1:9 Ago ye kingobaregei Mikael, malaikaiyat ne o, ak oindet, kotiitos agobo mustab Musa, ko ma kany koipchi inendet kiruogetab chubet, ago kile, Ingogerin kong’ Kiptaiyat." 
Jude1:10 Ago chubei bichu tuguk alak tugul agot che maingen: ak tuguk che kiguitos ichegei ko u biteenywa, ko u tiong’ik che matinyei ng’omnatet, king’emei eng’ tuguchuto." 
Jude1:11 Bwa ichek! Amu kiisub oretab Kaen, ak kogochigei mastaetab Balaam komach melekto, ak kilusyo eng’ ngelelnatetab Kora." 
Jude1:12 Bichuto ko ruandosiek che ung’otin eng’ igorwekwok che bo chamnyet ye oamisiei tugul, mestowek che amisiei ichegei ama iyweisiei; bolik che matinyei beek, che iboti usonaik; ketik che matinyei logoek, che kigobek konyil aeng’, che kigitut ak tigitik;" 
Jude1:13 mildaetab ge ne korom ne bo nyanjet; che igutu kalilanenywa; kecheik che ombenioti, che kigigonorji tuuindab mesundeito ne bo koigeny." 
Jude1:14 Ak kimaoten Enok agine, chito ne bo tisab koboch Adam, koamdochi bichu kole, Ogeero, kinyo Kiptaiyat koboto bikyik che tililen elfusiek ng’isiat," 
Jude1:15 konyo koyachi kiruoget tugul, ak koruokyi tugul che maiywei Jehovah eng’ boisionikwak tugul che yaachen che kigoyai ko maiywei Jehovah, ak ng’alekwak tugul che uuen che kimwa kiptengeginik che maiywei Jehovah, agobo inendet." 
Jude1:16 Chuto ko che ing’unyng’ung’dos, kiptiyotinik, che isubi magutikwak che yaachen (ak komwaei kutuswekwak ng’alek che koromen che bo menotet), che tiytii bik si konyor kelunet." 
Jude1:17 Ago okwek, chamanichu, obwat ng’alek che kigomwa eng’ tai che kiyoktoi che bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo;" 
Jude1:18 ko u ye kimwawok, kole, Tun biitu chombilik eng’ betusiekab let, che isubi magutikwak che yaachen che ma bo kaiyweetab Jehovah." 
Jude1:19 Chuto che ibu kabesiosiek, che isubi borwek, che matinyei Tamirmiriet." 
Jude1:20 Ago okwek, chamanichu, ogimitge eng’ kayaneng’wong’ ne tilil mising’, ak osae eng’ Tamirmiriet ne Tilil," 
Jude1:21 oripge eng’ chamnyetab Jehovah, ogeni rirenetab ge ne bo Kiptaiyandennyo Jesu Kristo kot koit sobondab koigeny." 
Jude1:22 Ak orire alak che tinyei saget; 
Jude1:23 ak osoru alak, ong’usu komong’ eng’ mat; ak orire alak eng’ kaiyweisiet; ye oweche agot ngoriet ne kagomuruonit eng’ borto." 
Jude1:24 Ingobunji anyun nguno inendet ne imuchi koribok si mobutye, ak kondeak taitab torornatennyi eng’ boiboiyet ne o ko motinye tisia," 
Jude1:25 kobunji Jehovah ne inegei, ne Yetindennyo, eng’ Jesu Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo, torornatet, etunatet, bounatet ak kimnatet, koboch keny, ak nguno, ak agoi koigeny. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Ng’ang’utiet ne bo Jesu Kristo, ne kiigochi Jehovah inendet koborji otwogikyik tuguk che biitu kochogu, ne matiny: ak kiiyok ak koborji kiboitiondennyi Johana eng’ malaikaiyandennyi;" 
Revelation1:2 ne kibaorian agobo ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak baornatetab Jesu Kristo, ak tuguk tugul che kigeer." 
Revelation1:3 Baibai inendet ne somani, ak ichek che kasei ng’alekab maoinatoni, ak koribei tuguk che kigisir eng’ maoinatonito: amu kagorik betut." 
Revelation1:4 Sirjin Johana kanisosiek tisab che mi Asia: Ingoteb mieindo kobotok, ak kalyet, che bunu inendet ne mi, ago kimi, ago tun nyonei; ak che bunu Tamirmirik tisab che mi taitab ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet;" 
Revelation1:5 ak che bunu Jesu Kristo ne baoriat ne bo iman, taita ne bo che kigobek, ak ko bounindetab laitorinikab ng’ony. Ingobunji inendet ne chamech, ne kiitiachech eng’ tengekwogikyok eng’ korotikyik;" 
Revelation1:6 ak koyaech keegu bororiet, ak keegu tisiik eng’ Jehovah nenyi, ak ko Kwanda; nenyi torornatet ak kimnatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Ogeero, nyonei koboto bolik; ak tun keerei inendet konda age tugul, koboto ichek che kiga toor inendet; ak koteiyo bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony amu inendet. Ee, u noto, Amen." 
Revelation1:8 Ane ko a Alpha ak ko a Omega, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ne mi ago kimi ago tun nyonei, Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation1:9 A Johana, tupcheng’wong’ ak ko a ne kiyamdoi tugul nyalilda ak bounatet ak muitaet eng’ Jesu, kiami emet ne kiikwen beek ne kiguure Patmo, agobo ng’olyotab Jehovah ak baornatetab Jesu." 
Revelation1:10 Kiami eng’ Tamirmiriet eng’ betutab Kiptaiyat, ak kiagas kutit ne o eng’ batennyu, ko u ne bo iriaget" 
Revelation1:11 kole, Sirji bukuit tuguk che igeere, ak iyokyi kanisosiek tisab; iyokyi Epeso, ak Smurna, ak Pergamo, ak Tuatera, ak Sarde, ak Piladelpia, ak Laodikia." 
Revelation1:12 Ak kiawelelge ale ageer kutinato king’alalwa. Ak kingo kaawelelge ageer kelyek tisab che bo taisiek che bo tahabu; 
Revelation1:13 ak eng’ kwenutab kelyechoto bo taisiek, ageer chito ne kergei ak weritab chi, kolaachi ngoriet ne itei kelyek, ak koratategei birenetab tahabu eng’ teget." 
Revelation1:14 Ak ki leel metinnyi ak ki leelach sumeekyik ko u kororik che leelachen, ko u teluchi; ak ki u konyekyik liblibenetab mat;" 
Revelation1:15 ak ki u kelyekyik sugunwet ne sitat mising’, ko u ne kigitilil eng’ mat; ak ki u tugennyi cheetab beek che chang’." 
Revelation1:16 Ak kitinyei kecheik tisab eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai: ak kimong’une kutinnyi rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai: ak ki u togennyi asista ne iluu eng’ kimnatennyi. 
Revelation1:17 Ak kingageer inendet, abutyi kelyekyik ko u chito ne kagome. Ak kiigonoora eunnyi ne bo tai, ak kole, Ameiywei; anendet ko a ne bo tai ak ne bo let," 
Revelation1:18 ak ko a ne Sobei; ak kiga amei, ak keero, asobe koigeny ak koigeny, ak atinye yateiywekab meet ak che bo oldab che kigobek." 
Revelation1:19 Sir anyun tuguk che kaigeer, ak tuguk che mitei, ak tuguk che tun biitu eng’ let;" 
Revelation1:20 ung’otietab kecheik tisab che kegeer eng’ eunnyu ne bo tai, ak kelyek tisab che bo taisiek che bo tahabu. Kecheichoto tisab ko malaikaisiekab kanisosiek tisab: ak kelyechoto tisab bo taisiek ko kanisosiek tisab." 
Revelation2:1 Sirji malaikaiyat ne bo kaniset ne mi Epeso, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne namei kecheik tisab eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai, inendet ne wendote kwenutab kelyek tisab che bo taisiek che bo tahabu:" 
Revelation2:2 Angen boisioniguk, ak boisieng’ung’ ne nyigis ak muitaeng’ung’, ak angen ale memuchi imuite agobo bik che yaachen, ak kiitiem ichek che kuuregei che kiyoktoi, ago ma choto, ak kiinai ile kiplembechonik;" 
Revelation2:3 ak itinye muitaet ak kiimuite agobo kainennyu, ameng’ete." 
Revelation2:4 Ago ating’enen ng’olyot, ale kiimete chamnyeng’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Revelation2:5 Ibwat anyun ole kiibute, ak isigu, ak iyai boisionik che bo tai; anan anyonjin, ak anemu keldab taing’ung’ eng’ komostanyi, ngot ko mesigu." 
Revelation2:6 Ago itinye ni, ale iweche boisionikab Nikolaitik, che aweche agane." 
Revelation2:7 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek. Inendet ne iterteri, agochini koam che bo ketitab sobondo ne mi Paradis ne bo Jehovah." 
Revelation2:8 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi Smurna, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne bo tai ak ko ne bo let, ne kime, ak kosob kogeny:" 
Revelation2:9 Angen nyalildang’ung’, ak banandang’ung’ (ago i magoriot), ak chubisietab ichek che mwaei kole ki Yahudik, ago ma ichek, ago sunagogitab Setani." 
Revelation2:10 Ameiywei nyalilwogik che negit inyoru: ogeero, machei oindet kotoorji korgoret alak eng’ okwek, si kobiit ketiemak; ak osich nyalilda eng’ betusiek taman. Egu ne kiyani agoi meet, si agonin kutwet ne bo sobondo." 
Revelation2:11 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek. Inendet ne iterteri ko manyoru ng’wanindo eng’ meet ne bo aeng’." 
Revelation2:12 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi Pergamo, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne tinyei rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai:" 
Revelation2:13 Angen ole imenye, ole mi ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Setani: ak iname kainennyu mising’, ama iesie kayanennyu, agot eng’ betusiekab Antipa baoriandennyu, nenyu ne bo iman, ne kigibar eng’ kwenung’wong’, ole menyei Setani." 
Revelation2:14 Ago ating’enen ng’alek tutigin, amu itinye alak eng’ oloto che isubi konetisietab Balaam, ne kiinet Balak konde kanagutiet taitab lagokab Israel, si koam tuguk che kigochin kanamonik, ak kosokso." 
Revelation2:15 Itinye aginye ko u noto alak che isubi konetisietab Nikolaitik. 
Revelation2:16 Sigu anyun; anan anyonjin achogu, ak anyo aborie ichek eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo kutinnyu." 
Revelation2:17 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek. Inendet ne iterteri, agochini che bo mana che ung’otin, ak agochi koita ne leel, ak kigisirji koyata kainet ne leel, ne maingen chi kobate inendet ne taachei." 
Revelation2:18 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi Tuatera, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu Weritab Jehovah, ne tinyei konyek che u liblibenetab mat, ak ko u kelyekyik sugunwet ne sitat:" 
Revelation2:19 Angen boisioniguk, ak chamnyeng’ung’ ak kayaneng’ung’ ak otisieng’ung’ ak muitaeng’ung’, ak angen ale chang’ boisioniguk che bo let kosiir che bo tai." 
Revelation2:20 Ago ating’enen ng’olyot, ale ichamjini kobogoriot Jesebel, ne kuuregei maotio; ak koneti otwogikyuk ak kogoigoi kosokso, ak koam tuguk che kigochin kanamonik." 
Revelation2:21 Ak kiagochi boroindo ale si kosik; ago machamei kosik eng’ soksennyi. 
Revelation2:22 Ogeero, awirjini itogut, ak ichek che ibegei koboto inendet koba nyalilda ne o, ngot ko masik eng’ boisionikyik." 
Revelation2:23 Ak abare lagokyik meet; ak konai kanisosiek tugul kole anendet ne isiachi kabwatutik ak mugulelwek: ak agochini age tugul eng’ okwek ko u boisionikwok. 
Revelation2:24 Ago amwawok okwek che o ng’etunotin eng’ Tuatera, tugul che matinyei konetisioni, che maingen tuguk che bo orit che bo Setani, ko u ye mwaei ichek; ale maandook milet age." 
Revelation2:25 Ago onam mising’ noto otinye kot aitu. 
Revelation2:26 Ak inendet ne iterteri, ak koribei boisionikyuk agoi kagesunet, kotun agochini kimnatet koboi bororiosiek:" 
Revelation2:27 ak koboi eng’ koroktab karnet; ko u ye kituei terenikab cheptereniot komengegitu; ko u ye kiataach agane eng’ Baba: 
Revelation2:28 ak agochini inendet taboiyat ne bo karon. 
Revelation2:29 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek." 
Revelation3:1 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi Sarde, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne tinyei Tamirmirik tisab che bo Jehovah, ak kecheik tisab: Angen boisioniguk, ale itinye kainet kele isobe, ago kaimei." 
Revelation3:2 Egu ne ripsei, ak igimit tuguk che ng’etunotin, che machei kobek: amu tom anyoru boisioniguk che kigosulda eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyu." 
Revelation3:3 Ibwat anyun ole kiitaakte, ak ole kiigaste; ak irib, ak isigu. Ngot ko meripse anyun, anyone ko u chorindet, amenae sait ne anyonjinenen." 
Revelation3:4 Ago itinye kainaik che ng’ering’ eng’ Sarde che ma imuruon ngoroikwak: ak tun bendoti ichek kobota kolaagoti ngoroik che leelach; amu nyolu ichek. 
Revelation3:5 Inendet ne iterteri kotun kilaakyin ko u noto ngoroik che leelach; ak magoi abuch kainennyi eng’ bukuitab sobondo, ago ang’anye kainennyi eng’ taitab Baba, ak eng’ taitab malaikaisiekyik." 
Revelation3:6 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek." 
Revelation3:7 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi eng’ Piladelpia, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne tilil, inendet ne bo iman, inendet ne tinyei yateiywotab Daudi, inendet ne yatei, ama kerei chi, ak ne kerei, ama yatei chi:" 
Revelation3:8 Angen boisioniguk (keero, kaande taing’ung’ kurget ne yatat, ne maimuchi chi koger), ale itinye kimnatet ne ming’in, ak kiirib ng’olyondennyu, ama iesie kainennyu." 
Revelation3:9 Keero, agochini che bo sunagogitab Setani, icheget che mwaei kole ki Yahudik, ago ma ichek, kenu, keero, agochini ichek kobwa kogutuny eng’ kelyeguk, ak konai kole kiachamin." 
Revelation3:10 Amu kiirib ng’olyotab muitaennyu, aribin agane eng’ saitab yomset, ne nyonjin ng’ony komugul, si kotiem ichek che menyei ng’ony." 
Revelation3:11 Anyone achogu: nam mising’ noto itinye, si marebenen chi kutweng’ung’." 
Revelation3:12 Inendet ne iterteri, ayae koek toloita eng’ hekalut ne bo Jehovah nenyu, ama komandoi sang’ kogeny: ak asirjini inendet kainetab Jehovah nenyu, ak kainetab nganasetab Jehovah nenyu, noto Jerusalem ne leel, ne chorugei eng’ kipsengwet kobunu Jehovah nenyu, ak kainennyu ne leel." 
Revelation3:13 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek." 
Revelation3:14 Ak isirji malaikaiyatab kaniset ne mi Laodikia, ilenji: Mwaei tuguchu inendet ne Amen, baoriat ne kiyani ak ko bo iman, taunetab yaetab Jehovah:" 
Revelation3:15 Angen boisioniguk, ale ma i kaitit ametinye mat: kata achame nda kai kaitit anan itinye mat." 
Revelation3:16 Noto anyun amu i lalang’, ametinye mat anan kaititindo, ang’ung’doin eng’ kutinnyu." 
Revelation3:17 Amu imwae ile, A magorio, ak kiasich magornatet, ama abanani kiy; amengen ile i chito ne i kimnyaliliat ak itinye rirek ak ko i kibananiat ak ko i kipkoratiat ak imi ach ngor:" 
Revelation3:18 aborun ale ialena tahabu ne kigitilile mat, si iegu magoriot; ak ngoroik che leelach, si ilaaige, si matook kalilanetab ach ngoring’ung’; ak kerichekab konyek che iile konyeguk si igeerte." 
Revelation3:19 Agere kong’ tugul che achame ak atigoni: igiilge anyun, ak isigu." 
Revelation3:20 Keero, atononi eng’ kurget ak agongonyi: ngo kas chi kutinnyu ak koyat kurget, awendi ole mi inendet, ak aamisie koboto inendet, ak koamis inendet kobota." 
Revelation3:21 Inendet ne iterteri, kotun agochini kotebi kobota eng’ ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet, ko u ye kiaterter agane, ak ketebi ak Baba eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet." 
Revelation3:22 Inendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kit ne mwachin Tamirmiriet kanisosiek." 
Revelation4:1 Kingobata tuguchu, ageer, ogeero, kiyatak kurget eng’ kipsengwet, ak kutit ne bo tai ne kiagas ko ki u ne bo iriaget, ne king’alalwa kole, Togosu oli, si aborun tuguk che tun biitu eng’ let matiny." 
Revelation4:2 Ak kiami anyun eng’ Tamirmiriet eng’ yoto: ak ogeero, kiginde kipsengwet ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak kimi chito ne kitebe ng’echeranato;" 
Revelation4:3 ak inendet ne kitebyei ko kingegeerei, ko u koitab jasipi ak sardio: ak kimi chemng’isiriet ne kiyiem ng’echeretab laitornatet, ne kingegeerei, ko u sumaragdo." 
Revelation4:4 Ak kiyiem ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, ng’echerok tiptemu ak ang’wan che bo laitornatet: ak kitebe boisiek tiptemu ak ang’wan ng’echerochoto, kolaachi ngoroik che leelachen; ak kotinyei eng’ metowekwak kutonok che bo tahabu." 
Revelation4:5 Ak mong’une ng’echeranato kalyelet ak kutuswek ak tulosiek. Ak kilaldos taisiek tisabu che bo mastinwek eng’ taitab ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, choto ko Tamirmirik tisab che bo Jehovah;" 
Revelation4:6 ak ki u taitab ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, nyanjet ne bo glasit, ne u krustalo; ak kimi kwenutab ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, ak kiyiem komoswek tugul che bo ng’echeranato komuut, tuguk ang’wanu che soptos che nyiitotin konyek tai ak let." 
Revelation4:7 Ak ki kergei tiondo ne bo tai ak ng’etundo, ak ki kergei ne bo aeng’ ak moita, ak kitinyei ne bo somok toget ne u ne bo chito, ak ki u ne bo ang’wan kipsichit ne tirireni." 
Revelation4:8 Ak nyiitotin tiong’ichoto ang’wan soptos konyek, komoswek tugul ak orit, kotinyei age tugul kebebaik lo: ama imuunyi ichek bet ak kemoi, komwaei kolen, Tilil, tilil, tilil, Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet, ne kimi ak komi ak kotun nyonei." 
Revelation4:9 Ak ye igochi tuguchoto soptos torornatet ak teegisto ak kongoi inendet ne tebe ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, inendet ne sobei koigeny ak koigeny," 
Revelation4:10 kobutyi anyun boisiechoto tiptemu ak ang’wan taitab inendet ne tebe ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, ak kogutung’ji inendet ne sobei koigeny ak koigeny, ak kowirji ng’ony kutonokwak che bo tahabu eng’ taitab ng’echeret, kolen," 
Revelation4:11 Nyoljinin, Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Jehovah nenyo, itaach torornatet ak teegisto ak kamuktaet: amu kiitau iyae tuguk tugul, ak kibiit amu mageng’ung’, ak kigiyai." 
Revelation5:1 Ak kiageer eng’ eutab tai ne bo inendet ne kitebe ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, bukuit ne kigisir orit ak batai, ne kiging’och kogerak eng’ ng’oksosiek tisab." 
Revelation5:2 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat ne kim komwaitoi eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ng’o ne nyolu koyat bukuit ak kotiach ng’oksosiekyik?" 
Revelation5:3 Ak kima komi chi kipsengwet, anan ng’ony, anan kureret ne bo ng’ony ne kiimuchi koyat bukuinoto, anan kogeer orit." 
Revelation5:4 Ak kiarir mising’, amu kima biit chi ne nyolu koyat bukuinoto, anan kogeer orit:" 
Revelation5:5 ak kilenja age eng’ boisiechugai, Merire: keero, kigoterter Ng’etundo ne bo oretab Juda, Tigitiot ne bo Daudi, si kobiit koyat bukuinoto ak ng’oksosiechoto tisab." 
Revelation5:6 Ak kiageer eng’ kwenutab ng’echeranato bo laitornatet ak tiong’ichoto ang’wan soptos, ak eng’ kwenutab boisiechoto, kotonone Aruet, ko u ne kageeny, kotinyei kuinoik tisab, ak konyek tisab, che Tamirmirik tisab che bo Jehovah, che kigiyokto koba ng’ony komugul." 
Revelation5:7 Ak kinyo, ak koib bukuit eng’ eutab tai ne bo inendet ne tebe ng’echeranato bo laitornatet." 
Revelation5:8 Ak ye kingo kagoib bukuinoto, kobutyi taitab Aruet tiong’ichoto ang’wanu soptos ak boisiechoto tiptem ak ang’wan, kotinyei age tugul ketubet, ak tabok che bo tahabu che nyiitotin nyamdutik che kebeelei, che choto ko sautikab bik che tililen." 
Revelation5:9 Ak kotieni tiendo ne leel, kolen, Nyoljinin inam bukuit, ak iyat ng’oksosiekyik: amu kigibarin, ak kiialji Jehovah eng’ korotiguk bik che bo bororiet age tugul, ak che bo kutit age tugul, ak che bo bik alak tugul, ak che bo emet age tugul," 
Revelation5:10 ak kiiyai ichek koek bororiet ak tisiik eng’ Jehovah nenyo; ak kobounisiei eng’ ng’ony. 
Revelation5:11 Ak kiageer ak agas kutitab malaikaisiek che chang’ ko kayiem ng’echeranato bo laitornatet ak tiong’ichu kasoptos ak boisiechugai; ak koitenywa ko ki elfusiek taman konyil elfusiek taman, ak elfusiek konyil elfusiek;" 
Revelation5:12 komwaei eng’ kutit ne o kole, Nyoljin Aruet ne kigibar konyor kimnatet, ak magornatosiek ak ng’omnatet, ak kamuktaet, ak teegisto, ak torornatet, ak kaberuret." 
Revelation5:13 Ak kiagas kit age tugul ne kigiyai ne mi kipsengwet, ak ne mi ng’ony, ak ne mi kureretab ng’ony, ak eng’ nyanjet, ak tuguk tugul che mi orinywa, kolen, Ingobunji inendet ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak Aruanato, kaberuret, ak teegisto, ak torornatet, ak bounatet, koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation5:14 Ak kimwa tiong’ichoto ang’wanu soptos kole, Amen. Ak kobutyi ng’ony boisiechoto ak kolos." 
Revelation6:1 Ak kiageer ye kingoyat Aruet age eng’ ng’oksosiechoto tisab, ak kiagas age eng’ tiong’ichoto ang’wan soptos komwaei eng’ cheet ne u tulet, kole, Nyo." 
Revelation6:2 Ak kiageer, ogeero, mbartanyit ne leel, ak kitinyei kwanget inendet ne kitebe; ak kigigochi inendet kutwet: ak kiwa eng’ katerteret, ak koterteris." 
Revelation6:3 Ak ye kingoyat ng’okset ne bo aeng’, agas tiondo ne bo aeng’ ne sobei kole, Nyo." 
Revelation6:4 Ak kimong’ mbartanyit age, ne birir: ak kigigochi inendet ne kitebe, koisto kalyet kobet eng’ ng’ony, si kobiit kobargei ichegei: ak kigigochi inendet rotwetab chok ne o." 
Revelation6:5 Ak ye kingoyat ng’okset ne bo somok, agas tiondo ne sobei ne bo somok kole, Nyo. Ak kiageer, ogeero, mbartanyit ne tuui; ak kitinyei ratilit eng’ eunnyi inendet ne tebe." 
Revelation6:6 Ak kiagas ne u kutit eng’ kwenutab tiong’ichoto ang’wan soptos kole, Kialdae kibabetab nganok denarit agenge, ak kialdae kibabok somok che bo sairik denarit agenge; ameng’em mwaita ak divaik." 
Revelation6:7 Ak ye kingoyat ng’okset ne bo ang’wan, agas kutitab tiondo ne sobei ne bo ang’wan kole, Nyo." 
Revelation6:8 Ak kiageer, ogeero, mbartanyit ne talelyo: ak kainetab inendet ne kitebe ko ki Meet; ak kiisub inendet oldab che kigobek. Ak kigigochi ichek kimnatet koboi kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo ng’ony, kobare rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak meet, ak tiong’ikab timin che bo ng’ony." 
Revelation6:9 Ak kingoyat ng’okset ne bo mut, ageer eng’ kureretab kaptisisio sobonwekab ichek che kigibar amu ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak baornatet ne kitinyei:" 
Revelation6:10 ak kimwa eng’ kutit ne o kole, Tianitu, ee Kiptaiyat, ne tilil ak ko bo iman, si iruokyi ak iyaaktoiywech mugetut agobo korotikyok eng’ ichek che menyei ng’ony?" 
Revelation6:11 Ak kigigochi age tugul eng’ ichek ngoriet ne leel; ak kelenji ko ta komuuny ne matia, kot kosulda koitetab che otwogik koboto ichek, ak tupchosiekwak, che tun kibarei ko u icheget." 
Revelation6:12 Ak kiageer ye kingoyat ng’okset ne bo lo, ak kibiit botanet ne o ne bo ng’ony: ak kituuiit asista ko u kuniet ne kigiyae kororik, ak kiigei arawet komugul korotik;" 
Revelation6:13 ak kotururjigei ng’ony kecheikab barak, ko u ye ibutos eng’ mogoiywet logoekyik, kotom korurio, ye itumdumi usonet ne o." 
Revelation6:14 Ak kigiisto kipsengwet ko u kartasit ne kimamani; ak kigiisto eng’ komoswekwak tulwet age tugul ak emet age tugul ne kiikwen beek. 
Revelation6:15 Ak kiung’gei eng’ kebenonik ak ruandosiek che bo tulonok, laitorinikab ng’ony, ak bounik, ak kiptainik che eechen, ak magorek, ak che kimen, ak chi age tugul ne ratat ak chi age tugul ne itiagat;" 
Revelation6:16 ak kolenji tulonok ak ruandosiek, Oluuljech, ak ounyech eng’ togetab inendet ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak eng’ neregekab Aruet:" 
Revelation6:17 amu kagoit betut ne bo neregekwak; ak ng’o ne imuchi kotonon? 
Revelation7:1 Kingobata nito ageer malaikaisiek ang’wan kotonondos eng’ luukwek ang’wan che bo ng’ony, konamei usonaik ang’wan che bo ng’ony, si mata kousyi usonet ng’ony, anan nyanjet, anan ketit age tugul." 
Revelation7:2 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat age kotogosta kobunei kong’asis, kotinyei ng’oksetab Jehovah ne sobei: ak kimwachi malaikaisiek ang’wan eng’ kutit ne o, che kigigochi kong’em ng’ony ak nyanjet," 
Revelation7:3 kolenji, Among’em ng’ony, anan nyanjet, anan ketik, kot kinde ng’okset togochikab otwogikab Jehovah nenyo." 
Revelation7:4 Ak kiagas koitetab icheget che kiging’och, ko kiek elfusiek bogol ak artam ak ang’wan, che kiging’och eng’ oret age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel." 
Revelation7:5 Kiging’och elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo oretab Juda; Ak kiek che bo oretab Reuben elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Gad elfusiek taman ak aeng’; 
Revelation7:6 Ak kiek che bo oretab Aser elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Naptali elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Manase elfusiek taman ak aeng’; 
Revelation7:7 Ak kiek che bo oretab Simeon elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Lawi elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Isakar elfusiek taman ak aeng’; 
Revelation7:8 Ak kiek che bo oretab Sebulun elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiek che bo oretab Josep elfusiek taman ak aeng’; Ak kiginoch che bo oretab Benjamin elfusiek taman ak aeng’. 
Revelation7:9 Kingobata tuguchu, ageer, ogeero, tuiyet ne o, ne kima komuchi chi koiit, che bunu bororiet age tugul, ak oret age tugul ak bik ak kutuswek, kotonondos eng’ taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet ak eng’ taitab Aruet, kolaachi ngoroik che leelach, ak kotinyei temenikab sosik eng’ eunekwak;" 
Revelation7:10 ak komwaei eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Bo Yetunet Jehovah nenyo ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak ko bo Aruet." 
Revelation7:11 Ak kitonondos malaikaisiek tugul ko kayiem ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak boisiek, ak tiong’ik ang’wan che soptos; ak kiibutyi ng’ony eng’ taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak kolos Jehovah," 
Revelation7:12 kole, Amen; Bo Jehovah nenyo kaberuret, ak torornatet, ak ng’omnatet, ak kongoi, ak teegisto, ak kamuktaet, ak kimnatet, koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Revelation7:13 Ak kimwawa age eng’ boisiek, kolenja, Chu ilaachi ngoroik che leelachen ko ng’o, ak kobunu ano?" 
Revelation7:14 Ak kialenji inendet, Kiptaiyandennyu, ingen inye. Kolenja anyun, Chu ko ichek che bunu nyalilda ne o, ak kigomwet ngoroikwak koleelagitu eng’ korotikab Aruet." 
Revelation7:15 Mi anyun ichek taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah; ak koboisiechin inendet bet ak kemoi eng’ hekalunnyi: ak koiito inendet ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet emainnyi eng’ baragunywa. 
Revelation7:16 Ma kogasei rubet kogeny, ama koamei melelda kogeny; ama kobirei ichek asista, ama kobeelei ichek mat age tugul:" 
Revelation7:17 amu egu Mestowondenywa Aruet ne mi kwenutab ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak kondochin ichek koba kong’ikab beek che soptos: ak kouus Jehovah beekab kong’ alak tugul eng’ konyekwak." 
Revelation8:1 Ak ye kingoyat ng’okset ne bo tisab, kosis kipsengwet olo bo kebebertab sait." 
Revelation8:2 Ak kiageer malaikaisiek tisab che kitonondos eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kigigochi iriagok tisab. 
Revelation8:3 Ak kinyo malaikaiyat age konyo kotonone ole bo kapkorosut, kotinyei teret ne bo tahabu; ne kibeele nyamdutik; ak kigigochi nyamdutik che chang’ che kibeelei, si kotese sautikab che tililen tugul eng’ kapkorosutab tahabu, ne kimi taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet." 
Revelation8:4 Ak kitogosta iyetab nyamdutik che kibeelei, koboto sautikab bik che tililen, eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ eutab malaikaiyat." 
Revelation8:5 Ak kiib malaikaiyat teronoto; ak konde matab kapkoros konyi, ak kowirji ng’ony: ak kibiit tulosiek, ak kutuswek ak kalyelosiek, ak botanetab ng’ony." 
Revelation8:6 Ak kochopgei malaikaisiek tisabu che kitinyei iriagok tisab si koguut. 
Revelation8:7 Ak kiguut malaikaiyat ne bo tai, ak kibiit koikab ropta ak mat, che burugotin ak korotik, ak kigiwirji ng’ony: ak kilal kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo ng’ony, ak kilal kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo ketik, ak kilalyo suswek tugul che tuonen." 
Revelation8:8 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab aeng’, ak kigiwirji nyanjet kit ne u tulwet ne o kolalei: ak kiek korotik kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo nyanjet:" 
Revelation8:9 ak kime kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo tiong’ik che kimi nyanjet, che kisoptos; ak kiging’em kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo melisiek." 
Revelation8:10 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab somok, ak kirorok kecheiyat ne o eng’ kipsengwet, kolalei ko u tait, ak kiibutyi kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo ainosiek, ak kondametusiekab beek;" 
Revelation8:11 ak kigiguure kainetab kecheiyandanato Ng’wanindo: ak king’wanit kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo beek, ak kibek bik che chang’ eng’ beechoto, amu kiga kiyai kong’wonegitu." 
Revelation8:12 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab ang’wan, ak kigikwer kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo asista, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo arawet, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo kecheik; si koimenit kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo tuguchoto, ama iluu betut eng’ kebeberta agenge eng’ somok, ak koigei noto agine kemout." 
Revelation8:13 Ak kiageer kipsichit kotirireni eng’ kwenutab kipsengwet, ak agas, kolen eng’ kutit ne o, Bwa, bwa, bwa agobo ichek che menyei ng’ony, amu cheosiek alak che bo iriagok che bo malaikaisiek somok che ta koguutei!" 
Revelation9:1 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab mut, ak kiageer kecheiyat kobunu kipsengwet kobutyi ng’ony: ak kigigochi inendet yateiywot ne bo keringet ne maigoksei." 
Revelation9:2 Ak kiyat keringonoto; ak kitogosta iyeto komong’une keringonoto, ne u iyeto ne bo mat ne o mising’; ak koimenit asista ak soet amu iyetab keringonoto." 
Revelation9:3 Ak kimong’une chereng’enyinik iyeto kobwa ng’ony; ak kigigochi ichek kimnatet, ko u ye tinyei kimnatet melmelwekab ng’ony." 
Revelation9:4 Ak kigimwachi ichek kelenji amat kong’em suswekab ng’ony, anan kiy age tugul ne tuon, anan ko ketit age tugul, ago bichoto ichegei che matinyei ng’oksetab Jehovah eng’ togochikwak." 
Revelation9:5 Ak kiging’at ichek kelenji amat kobar bichoto, ago si kobiit kinyalil ichek arawek mut: ak ki u kanyalilenywa kanyaliletab melmeldo, ye kauut chito." 
Revelation9:6 Ak tun cheng’ei bik meet eng’ betusiechoto, ak magoi nyor; ak machei kole kobek, ak komweei meet eng’ ichek." 
Revelation9:7 Ak ki u itonwekab chereng’enyinichoto mbartanyisiek che chobotin koba luget; ak ki u yo mi metowekwak kutonok che kergei ak tahabu, ak ki u togochikwak togochikab bik." 
Revelation9:8 Ak kitinyei sumeek che u sumeekab kwonyik ak ki u kelekwak kelekab ng’etunyik. 
Revelation9:9 Ak kitinyei tuguk che kiilaakyi teget ko u che bo karik; ak ki u cheetab kebebaikwak cheetab karisiek, che bo mbartanyisiek che chang’ che ruaei kobendi luget." 
Revelation9:10 Ak kotinyei katutaik che u che bo melmelwek, ak utet; ak mi kimnatenywa katutaikwak ne inyalile bik eng’ arawek mut." 
Revelation9:11 Ak kitinyei ichek laitoriat ne bou, noto ko malaikaiyatab keringet ne maigoksei: ne kainennyi eng’ kutitab Hebranik ko Abaddon, ak eng’ Yunanik ko Apollyon." 
Revelation9:12 Kagosiirto Nyalilda ne bo tai: ogeero, ta kobwanei Nyalilwogik alage aeng’u." 
Revelation9:13 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab lo, ak kiagas kutit ne mong’une kuinoikab kapkorosutab tahabu ne mi taitab Jehovah," 
Revelation9:14 komwachin age malaikaiyandanato bo lo, ne kitinyei iriaget, kolenji, Itiach malaikaisiek ang’wan che ratotin eng’ ainet ne bo Euprate." 
Revelation9:15 Ak kigitiach malaikaisiechoto ang’wan, che kiga kechob agobo sait ak betut ak arawet ak kenyit, si kobar kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo bik." 
Revelation9:16 Ak kiek koitetab lugosiek che bo bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek elfusiek taman konyil elfusiek taman konyil aeng’: kiagas koitenywa. 
Revelation9:17 Ak kiageer ko u noto mbartanyisiek eng’ ng’ang’utiet, ak icheget che kilanyei, kotinyei tuguk che kilaakyin tegetik che u mat ak che u huakinto ak che u koik che laldos: ak ki u metowekab mbartanyisiek metowekab ng’etunyik; ak komong’une kutuswekwak mat ak iyeto ak koik che laldos." 
Revelation9:18 Ak kigibar korotwechoto somok kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo bik, eng’ mat ak eng’ iyeto ak eng’ koik che laldos, che kimong’une kutuswekwak." 
Revelation9:19 Amu mi kimnatetab mbartanyisiek kutuswekwak, ak katutaikwak, amu kergei katutaikwak ak erenok, ak kotinyei metowek; ak konyalilsie tuguchoto." 
Revelation9:20 Ak ma sik bik che kiga ng’et, che kima kibar eng’ korotwechoto, eng’ boisionikab eunekwak si mata kosa oik, ak kanamonikab tahabu, ak che bo feda, ak che bo sugunonik, ak che bo koik, ak che bo ketik; ak maimuchi kogeerto, anan kogasta anan kobendat:" 
Revelation9:21 ama sik eng’ rumisiosiekwak, anan eng’ banisiosiekwak, anan eng’ soksenywa, anan eng’ chorsosiekwak." 
Revelation10:1 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat age ne kim kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet, kolaachi boldet; ak kimi chemng’isiriet metinnyi, ak ki u togennyi asista, ak ki u kelyekyik tolochikab mat;" 
Revelation10:2 ak kitinyei eng’ eunnyi bukuit ne ming’in ne yatat: ak kiinde keldanyi ne bo tai nyanjet, ak kiinde ne bo katam emet;" 
Revelation10:3 ak kitwek eng’ kutit ne o, ko u ye morori ng’etundo: ak ye kingo kagotwek, kobolyo tulosiek tisabu." 
Revelation10:4 Ak ye kingo kagobolyo tulosiek tisabu, amach asir: ak kiagas kutit ne bunu kipsengwet kole, Ng’och tuguk che kamwa tulosiek tisabu, amesir." 
Revelation10:5 Ak kinamji barak eunnyi ne bo tai kotokyi kipsengwet malaikaiyat ne kiageer kotonone nyanjet ak emet," 
Revelation10:6 ak kiiyosio eng’ inendet ne sobei koigeny ak koigeny, ne kitau koyaei kipsengwet ak tuguk che mitei oloto, ak ng’ony ak tuguk che mi oloto, ak nyanjet ak tuguk che mi orit, kole ma komi kagaetab ge:" 
Revelation10:7 ago eng’ betusiekab kutitab malaikaiyatab tisab, ye tun machei koguut, kogesgei ung’otietab Jehovah ko u logoiywek che miachen che kimwachi otwogikyik maotik." 
Revelation10:8 Ak kutit ne kiagas kobunu kipsengwet, ko king’alalwa kogeny, kole, Ui nam bukuit ne yatat eng’ eutab malaikaiyat ne tononi eng’ nyanjet ak eng’ ng’ony." 
Revelation10:9 Awe anyun ole mi malaikaiyat, ak alenji kogona bukuinoto ming’in. Ak kolenja, Nam ak iam; si kogochi kong’wanit moeng’ung’, ago anyinyitu eng’ kuting’ung’ ko u kumiat." 
Revelation10:10 Ak kianam bukuit ne ming’in eng’ eutab malaikaiyat, ak aam; ak ki anyiny eng’ kutinnyu ko u kumiat: ak kingo kaam, kong’wanit moennyu." 
Revelation10:11 Ak komwawa, kole, Kanyol imaoten agobo bik che chang’ ak bororiosiek ak kutuswek ak laitorinik." 
Revelation11:1 Ak kigigona tegat ne u kirokto: ak kilenja age, Ng’eet, ak ikwa hekalutab Jehovah, ak kapkorosut, koboto icheget che saei eng’ oloto." 
Revelation11:2 Ago bagakte, amat ikwa seremut ne mitei hekalut sang’; amu kigigochi Bororiosiek: ak kotiechei eng’ kelyekwak nganaset ne tilil eng’ arawek artam ak aeng’." 
Revelation11:3 Ak agochini baorinikyuk aeng’ komaoten betusiek elfut agenge bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik lo, kolaachi kuniok." 
Revelation11:4 Choto ko ketik aeng’ che bo emitik, ak kelyek aeng’ che bo taisiek, kotonondos eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat ne bo ng’ony." 
Revelation11:5 Ak ngot komachei chi konyalil ichek, komong’une mat kutuswekwak, ak kobar bunikwak: ak ngot komachei chi konyalil ichek, kebarei ko u nito matiny." 
Revelation11:6 Tinyei chuto kimnatet koger kipsengwet, si marobon eng’ betusiekab maoinatenywa: ak kotinyei kimnatet kowal beek koek korotik, ak kobir ng’ony eng’ koroita age tugul, kotugul ko u ye machei." 
Revelation11:7 Ak ye tun kagoges baornatenywa, koyai luget tiondo ne mong’une keringet ne maigoksei, ak koterter ichek, ak kobar ichek." 
Revelation11:8 Ak tebyei muswekwak eng’ oretab nganaset ne o, ne kiguure eng’ tamirmiriet Sodom ak Misri, ole kiga kigartate Kiptaiyandenywa agine." 
Revelation11:9 Ak keerei muswekwak alak eng’ bik ak ortinwek ak kutuswek ak bororiosiek eng’ betusiek somok ak kebebertab betut, ama chamdoi ketub muswekwak eng’ kererit." 
Revelation11:10 Ak boiboitu ichek che menyei ng’ony agobo icheget, ak kogasegei; ak koyokyingei konunoik, amu kiinyalili maotichuto aeng’ ichek che menyei ng’ony." 
Revelation11:11 Ak ye kingobata betusiechoto somogu ak kebeberta kochut ichek kabusetab sobondo ne bunu Jehovah, ak kotononio eng’ kelyekwak; ak konam kaiyweisiet ne o ichek che kigeer." 
Revelation11:12 Ak kigas kutit ne o ne bunu kipsengwet kolenji ichek, Otogosu oli. Ak kitogosta koba kipsengwet eng’ boldet; ak kogeerot ichek bunikwak." 
Revelation11:13 Ak kibiit eng’ sainato botanet ne o ne bo emet, ak kilul kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo nganaset; ak kigibar eng’ botanonato bik elfusiek tisab; ak kiarogenso che kiga ng’et, ak kiigochi torornatet Jehovah ne bo kipsengwet." 
Revelation11:14 Kagosiirto Nyalilda ne bo aeng’: ogeero, nyonei Nyalilda ne bo somok kochogu." 
Revelation11:15 Ak kiguut malaikaiyatab tisab; ak kibiit kutuswek che eechen eng’ kipsengwet, ak kimwa kole, Kagobunji bounatetab ng’ony Kiptaiyandennyo, ak Kristo nenyi: ak kobou koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation11:16 Ak kiibutyi ng’ony boisiek tiptemu ak ang’wan, che tebe taitab Jehovah eng’ ng’echerokwak che bo torornatet, ak kolos Jehovah," 
Revelation11:17 kole, Kimwaun kongoi, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet, ne imi ak kiimi; amu kainam kamuktaeng’ung’ ne o, ak ibou." 
Revelation11:18 Ak kinerekso bororiosiek, ak kinyo nereknateng’ung’, ak betut ne kiruokyine bik che kigobek, ak betut ne kigochine otwogiguk maotik melekwekwak, ak bik che tililen, ak ichek che iywei kaineng’ung’, che mengechen ak che eechen; ak keng’em ichek che ng’emei ng’ony." 
Revelation11:19 Ak kigiyat hekalutab Jehovah eng’ kipsengwet; ak kitook eng’ hekalunnyi moingetab arorutiennyi; ak kibiit kalyelosiek, ak kutuswek, ak tulosiek, ak botanetab ng’ony, ak koik che eechen che bo ropta." 
Revelation12:1 Ak kitook kaborunet ne o eng’ kipsengwet; kwondo ne kiilaachi asista, ak komi arawet keldebesaikyik ng’ony, ak kimi metinnyi kutwetab kecheik taman ak aeng’." 
Revelation12:2 Ak ki tamono: ak kowaachei, kotinyei ng’wanindab sigisiet, ak eng’ ng’wanindo komachei kosigis." 
Revelation12:3 Ak kitook kaborunet age eng’ kipsengwet; ak ogeero, maswetit ne o ne birir, ne tinyei metowek tisab ak kuinoik taman, ak kimitei metowekyik nariosiek tisabu." 
Revelation12:4 Ak ichuuti katutiennyi kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo kecheikab kipsengwet, ak kowirji ng’ony: ak kitonon maswetit eng’ taitab kwonyoto ne kimachei kosigis, kole si ye sigis, koam lakwet." 
Revelation12:5 Ak kisich lakwet ne werit, ne tun bou bororiosiek tugul eng’ koroktab karnet: ak kigimut lakwennyi kwo ole mi Jehovah, agoi ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet." 
Revelation12:6 Ak kimwei kwonyoto kwo surkwen, ole kiting’e komosta ne kiga kochopchi Jehovah, si kobiit kobai inendet eng’ oloto betusiek elfut agenge bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik lo." 
Revelation12:7 Ak kibiit luget eng’ kipsengwet: kiwa Mikael koboto malaikaisiekyik kobargei ak maswetit; ak kiyai luget maswetinoto ak malaikaisiekyik; 
Revelation12:8 ago ma iterteris, amata kosich oldanywa kogeny eng’ kipsengwet." 
Revelation12:9 Ak kigiturur maswetinoto o konyo ng’ony, erenet ne bo keny, ne kiguure Oindet ak ko Setani, kaberberindetab ng’ony komugul; kigiturur konyo ng’ony, ak kigiturur malaikaisiekyik koboto inendet." 
Revelation12:10 Ak kiagas kutit ne o eng’ kipsengwet, kole, Kagonyo nguno yetunet, ak kamuktaet, ak bounatetab Jehovah nenyo, ak kimnatetab Kristo nenyi: amu kagetururto kataamindetab che kitupche kwo ng’ony, ne itaami ichek eng’ taitab Jehovah nenyo bet ak kemoi." 
Revelation12:11 Ak kiiterter inendet amu korotikab Aruet, ak amu ng’olyotab baornatenywa; ama cham sobonwekwak agoi meet." 
Revelation12:12 Noto anyun oboiboitu, okwek kipsengwetisiek, ak okwek che omenye oloto. Bwa agobo ng’ony ak nyanjet: amu kachorgei oindet konyo ole omi, kotinyei nereknatet ne o, amu ingen kole tinyei betusiek che ng’ering’ kityo." 
Revelation12:13 Ak ye kingogeer maswetit kole kageturur konyo ng’ony, kous kwonyi kasichei werit." 
Revelation12:14 Ak kigigochi kwonyoto kebebaik aeng’ che bo kipsichit ne o, si kobiit kotirirene kwo ong’atet agoi oldanyi, ole kibae, eng’ betusiek, ak betusiek alak, ak kebebertab betusiek, koistoegei togetab erenet." 
Revelation12:15 Ak king’ut erenet beek eng’ kutinnyi che te ainet, kosube kwonyoto, kole si kobiit koib inendet ainonoto." 
Revelation12:16 Ak kitoret ng’ony kwonyoto, ak kiyat kutinnyi ng’ony, ak kolugui ainet ne kang’utu maswetit eng’ kutinnyi." 
Revelation12:17 Ak kinerekyi maswetit kwonyoto, ak kwo kobargei ak keswekyik che king’et, che ribei ng’atutikab Jehovah, ak kotinyei baornatetab Jesu: ak kitonone ng’aniekab nyanjet." 
Revelation13:1 Ak kiageer tiondo kotogosu eng’ nyanjet, ne tinyei kuinoik taman ak metowek tisab, ak nariosiek taman eng’ kuinoikyik, ak kimi metowekyik kainaikab chubisiet." 
Revelation13:2 Ak ki u tiondo ne kiageer cheblanget, ak ki u kelyekyik kelyekab tiondo ne u keerit, ak ki u kutinnyi kutitab ng’etundo: ak kiigochi maswetit inendet kamugennyi, ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kimnatet ne o." 
Revelation13:3 Ak kiageer age eng’ metowekyik ko u ne kagikwer kebar; ak kigisoob ole kiga kikwer kome: ak kikwong’ ng’ony komugul agobo tionyoto; 
Revelation13:4 ak kiilos ichek maswetit, amu kiigochi kimnatennyi tiondo, ak kiilos ichek tiondo, komwa kole, Ng’o ne kergei ak tionyito; ak ng’o ne imuchi kobargei ak inendet?" 
Revelation13:5 Ak kigigochi inendet kutit kong’alal tuguk che eechen ak chubisiosiek; ak kigigochi inendet kimnatet koboisie arawek artam ak aeng’. 
Revelation13:6 Ak kiyat kutinnyi kochub Jehovah, ak kochub kainennyi, ak gonnyi, ak ichek che menyei kipsengwet." 
Revelation13:7 Ak kigigochi inendet kobargei ak bik che tililen, ak koterter ichek; ak kigigochi inendet kimnatet koboi oret age tugul ak bik alak tugul, ak kutit age tugul ak bororiet age tugul." 
Revelation13:8 Ak kolos inendet tugul che menyei ng’ony, che ma kisirji kainaikwak bukuitab sobondo ne bo Aruet ne kigibar koboch taunetab ng’ony." 
Revelation13:9 Ngo tinyei chi itit, kogas." 
Revelation13:10 Ngo luulis chi, keluulei inendet: ngo baris chi eng’ rotwetab chok, kobare inendet rotwetab chok matiny. Mi yu muitaet ak kayanetab bik che tililen." 
Revelation13:11 Ak kiageer tiondo age kotogosu eng’ ng’ony; ak kitinyei kuinoik aeng’ che u che bo aruet, ak king’alal ko u maswetit." 
Revelation13:12 Ak koboisie kimnatet tugul ne bo tiondo ne bo tai eng’ tainnyi. Ak kogochi ng’ony ak che menyei ng’ony kolos tiondo ni ka bo tai, ne kigisoob ole kiga kikwer kome." 
Revelation13:13 Ak koyaei inendet kaborunoik che eechen, kot koyaei mat kochorgei eng’ kipsengwet kobutyi ng’ony eng’ taitab bik." 
Revelation13:14 Ak kiiberber ichek che menyei ng’ony eng’ kaborunoik che kigigochi inendet koyai eng’ taitab tiondo; kolenjin ichek che menyei ng’ony koyachi kanamwet tiondo, ne tinyei berutietab rotwetab chok, ak kisob tionyoto." 
Revelation13:15 Ak kigigochi inendet kogochi kabuset kanamwetab tiondo, si kobiit kong’alal kanamwetab tiondo, ak kong’at kebar tugul che mailosu kanamwetab tiondo." 
Revelation13:16 Ak ng’atei tugul, che mengechen ak che eechen, ak magorek ak kibananok, ak che itiagotin ak che ratotin, kinde berutiet eng’ eunekwak che bo tai, anan ko eng’ togochjikwak;" 
Revelation13:17 ak kole maimuchi chi koalis anan koaldais, kobate inendet ne tinyei berutiet, noto ko kainetab tiondo anan ko koitetab kainennyi." 
Revelation13:18 Mi yu ng’omnatet. Inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, koiit koitetab tiondo; amu noto koitetab chi: ak koitennyi ko Bogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Revelation14:1 Ak kiageer, ak ogeero, tononi Aruet eng’ tulwetab Sion, ak komi koboto inendet bik elfusiek bogol ak artam ak ang’wan, che tinyei kainennyi, ak kainetab Kwandanyi, che kigisirji togochikwak." 
Revelation14:2 Ak kiagas kutit kobun kipsengwet, ne u cheetab beek che chang’, ak ko u cheetab tulet ne o: ak cheonoto kigagas ko ki u ne bo butik che butei ketubosiekwak:" 
Revelation14:3 ak kotieni tiendo ne leel eng’ taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak eng’ taitab tiong’ik ang’wan che soptos ak boisiek: ama mi chi ne imuchi konetgei tienoto kobate bichoto elfusiek bogol ak artam ak ang’wan, icheget che kigial eng’ ng’ony." 
Revelation14:4 Chuto ko icheget che ma imuruongei eng’ kobogorisiek; amu bergeinik icheget. Chuto ko icheget che isubi Aruet eng’ oldo tugul ole wendi. Kigial chuto eng’ kwenutab bik, koek tongoanik eng’ Jehovah ak eng’ Aruet." 
Revelation14:5 Ama kinyorji kutuswekwak lembeita: ama tinyei tisia. 
Revelation14:6 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat age kotirireni eng’ kwenutab kipsengwet, kotinyei logoiywek che miach che bo koigeny koamji ichek che menyei ng’ony, ak bororiet age tugul ak oret age tugul ak kutit age tugul ak bik alak tugul;" 
Revelation14:7 ak komwaei eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Oiywei Jehovah, ak ogochi torornatet; amu kagoit saitab kiruogennyi: ak olosu inendet ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony ak nyanjet ak kondametusiekab beek." 
Revelation14:8 Ak kosub malaikaiyat ne bo aeng’, ne len, Kagolul, kagolul Babulon ne o, ne kiigochi bororiosiek tugul koee divaik che bo koromnatetab soksennyi." 
Revelation14:9 Ak kosub ichek malaikaiyat ne bo somok, ne mwaei eng’ kutit ne o kole, Ngot kolos chi age tugul tiondo ak kanamwennyi, ak konyor berutiet eng’ togennyi, anan eng’ eunnyi," 
Revelation14:10 koeei agine divaik che bo koromnatetab Jehovah, che kigichob ama kiburuch eng’ kikombetab nereknatennyi; ak kinyalili eng’ mat ak koik che laldos eng’ taitab malaikaisiek che tililen, ak eng’ taitab Aruet:" 
Revelation14:11 ak kotogostoi iyetab ng’wanindanywa koigeny ak koigeny; ama tinyei kamuung’et bet ak kemoi, ichek che ilosu tiondo ak kanamwennyi, ak age tugul ne nyoru berutietab kainennyi." 
Revelation14:12 Mi yu muitaetab bik che tililen, icheget che ribei ng’atutikab Jehovah, ak kayanetab Jesu." 
Revelation14:13 Ak kiagas kutit kobunu kipsengwet kole, Sir ile, Boiboen ichek che begu eng’ Kiptaiyat koboch nguno: ee, mwaei Tamirmiriet, kole si kobiit komuuny eng’ boisionikwak, amu isubi ichek boisionikwak." 
Revelation14:14 Ak kiageer, ak ogeero, boldet ne leel; ak kitebe boldanato chito ne u weritab chi, kotinyei eng’ metinnyi narietab tahabu, ak kimi eunnyi chepkeswet ne ng’atib." 
Revelation14:15 Ak kimong’ malaikaiyat age eng’ hekalut, komwachin eng’ kutit ne o inendet ne tebe boldet, kolenjin, Iyokte chepkesweng’ung’, ak igesisie: amu kagoit saitab kesisiet; amu kigosiirto kesetab ng’ony." 
Revelation14:16 Ak kiwirji ng’ony chepkeswennyi inendet ne kitebe boldet; ak kigiges ng’ony. 
Revelation14:17 Ak kimong’ malaikaiyat age eng’ hekalut ne mi kipsengwet, kotinyei agine chepkeswet ne ng’atib." 
Revelation14:18 Ak kimong’ malaikaiyat age eng’ kaptisisiet, inendet ne tinyei kimnatet ne boune mat; ak kiguur inendet eng’ kutit ne o, ne tinyei chepkeswet ne ng’atib, kolenji, Iyokte chepkesweng’ung’ ne ng’atib, ak iyum sabibukab ketit ne bo ng’ony; amu kagoruryo sabibukyik." 
Revelation14:19 Ak kiwirji malaikaiyat chepkeswennyi ng’ony, ak kiyum sabibukab ng’ony, ak kowirji ole kitue sabibuk, kenut ne o, ne bo neregekab Jehovah." 
Revelation14:20 Ak kigitiech ole kitue sabibuk eng’ nganaset sang’, ak komong’ korotik eng’ ole kituisie, kot koit karikab kutitab mbartanyisiek, ne itei olo bo maelisiek bogol aeng’." 
Revelation15:1 Ak kiageer kaborunet age eng’ kipsengwet, ne o ak ko bo kwong’et, malaikaisiek tisab che tinyei korotwek tisab che bo let, amu kigesune choto neregekab Jehovah." 
Revelation15:2 Ak kiageer kit ne u nyanjetab glasit ne burugot ak mat; ak icheget che kigoterter tionyoto ak kanamwennyi, ak koitetab kainennyi, kotonondos eng’ ye negite nyanjetab glasit, che tinyei ketubosiekab Jehovah." 
Revelation15:3 Ak kotieni ichek tiendab Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, ak tiendab Aruet, kolen, Eechen boisioniguk ak ko bo kwong’et, ee, Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet; bo imanda ak ko bo iman ortinweguk, inye Laitoriatab bororiosiek." 
Revelation15:4 Ng’o ne maiywei kaineng’ung’, ak kotorori, ee Kiptaiyat? Amu i tilil inyege; amu bwanei bororiosiek tugul kogutung’so eng’ taing’ung’; amu kagong’ang’ak boisioniguk che bo imanda." 
Revelation15:5 Ak kingobata tuguchu, ageer, ak kigiyat hekalut ne bo emaitab baornatet eng’ kipsengwet:" 
Revelation15:6 ak kimong’une hekalunato malaikaisiek tisabu che tinyei korotwechoto tisab, kolaachi ngoroik che tililen, ak kolile bich, ak koratatagei birenoikab tahabu eng’ tegetikwak." 
Revelation15:7 Ak kiigochi age eng’ tiong’ik ang’wan che soptos malaikaisiek tisab tabok tisab che bo tahabu che nyiitotin neregekab Jehovah, inendet ne sobei koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation15:8 Ak kinyi hekalut iyeto ne kibunu torornatetab Jehovah, ak kamuktaennyi; ak kima imuch chi kwo hekalut orit, agoi kogesgei korotwek tisabu che bo malaikaisiek tisab." 
Revelation16:1 Ak kiagas kutit ne o kobunu hekalut, kolenjin malaikaisiechato tisab, Oba, orong’ji emet tabok tisab che bo neregekab Jehovah." 
Revelation16:2 Ak kiwa malaikaiyat ne bo tai, korong’ji emet tabennyi; ak kiek mook che yaach ak ko ng’wonen eng’ bik che tinyei berutietab tiondo, ak che kisaei kanamwennyi." 
Revelation16:3 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo aeng’ tabennyi nyanjet; ak kiek korotik, ko u che bo chi ne kagome; ak kime age tugul ne sobei, agot tugul che mi nyanjet." 
Revelation16:4 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo somok tabennyi ainosiek ak kondametusiekab beek; ak kiek korotik. 
Revelation16:5 Ak kiagas malaikaiyat ne bo beek komwa kole, I bo imanda, inye ne imi, ak ko kiimi, Inye ne Tilil, amu kiiruoch ko u noto:" 
Revelation16:6 amu kitumda korotikab bik che tililen ak che bo maotik, ak kaigochi ichek korotik koe: amu nyoljin ichek ko u noto." 
Revelation16:7 Ak kiagas kaptisisiet komwa kole, U noto, ee, Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet, bo iman ak ko bo imanda kiruogutiguk." 
Revelation16:8 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo ang’wan tabennyi asista; ak kigigochi kobeel bik eng’ mat. 
Revelation16:9 Ak kigibeel bik eng’ beelet ne o: ak kichub kainetab Jehovah ne tinyei kimnatet koboi korotwechuto; ak ma sik si kobiit kogochi torornatet. 
Revelation16:10 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo mut tabennyi ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo tiondo; ak koimenit bounatennyi; ak kinyei ng’elyebwekwak amu ng’wanindo," 
Revelation16:11 ak kichub Jehovah ne bo kipsengwet amu ng’woninwekwak ak mookwak; ama sik eng’ boisionikwak. 
Revelation16:12 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo lo tabennyi ainet ne o, noto ko Euprate; ak kiyaamnyo beekyik, si kobiit kochobok oretab laitorinik che bunu kong’asis." 
Revelation16:13 Ak kiageer tamirmirik somok che muruonen che u mororochik, komong’une kutitab maswetit, ak eng’ kutitab tiondo, ak eng’ kutitab maotiot ne bo lembech:" 
Revelation16:14 amu choto ko tamirmirikab oik, che yaei kaborunoik; che bendi oldab laitorinikab ng’ony komugul, si koyum ichek koba lugetab betut ne o ne bo Jehovah, Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation16:15 (Ogeero, anyone ko u chorin. Baibai inendet ne ripsei, ak koribei ngoroikyik, si mawendot ach ngor, ak kegeer kalilanennyi.)" 
Revelation16:16 Ak koyum ichek eng’ ole kiguure Har-Magedon eng’ kutitab Hebranik. 
Revelation16:17 Ak kirong’ji malaikaiyat ne bo tisab tabennyi soet; ak kimong’ kutit ne o eng’ hekalut, kobun ng’echeretab laitornatet, kole, Kagosulda:" 
Revelation16:18 ak kibiit ilotik, ak kutuswek, ak tulosiek; ak kibiit botanet ne o ne bo ng’ony, ne kitomo kobiitu koboch ngobiit bik eng’ ng’ony, botanet ne o, ne kim kot." 
Revelation16:19 Ak kipcheak nganaset ne o koek kebeberwek somok, ak kilulyo nganasokab bororiosiek: ak kigibwat Babulon ne o eng’ taitab Jehovah, si kobiit kigochi inendet kikombet ne bo divaikab koromnatetab neregekyik." 
Revelation16:20 Ak kimwei emet age tugul ne kiikwen beek, amata kegeer tulonok." 
Revelation16:21 Ak kororokyi bik koik che eechen che bo ropta che rorogu eng’ kipsengwet, che te nyigisindanywa talentait: ak kichub bik Jehovah amu koroitab koichato bo ropta; amu o mising’ koroitanyi." 
Revelation17:1 Ak kinyo age eng’ malaikaisiechato tisab che kitinyei tabok tisab, ak konyo kong’alalwa, kole, Nyo yu, si aborun kiruogetab chepkugoniot ne o ne tebe beek che chang’;" 
Revelation17:2 ne kiyai sokset laitorinikab ng’ony ak inendet, ak kibogityo ichek che menyei ng’ony, eng’ divaikab soksennyi." 
Revelation17:3 Ak kiimuta eng’ Tamirmiriet agoi surkwen: ak kiageer kobogoriot kotebe tiondo ne birir, ne nyiitat kainaikab chubisiet, ne tinyei metowek tisab ak kuinoik taman." 
Revelation17:4 Ak kiilaachi kobogoriot ngoroik che arusen ne birir ak che biriren, ak kigilelesonjine tahabu ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o mising’ ak sonoek che kororon, ak kotinyei eng’ eunnyi kikombet ne bo tahabu ne nyiitat tuguk che kiwechei, tugukab simdo che bo soksennyi," 
Revelation17:5 ak kigisirji togennyi kainet kele, UNG’OTIET, BABULON NE O, KAMETAB CHEPKUGONIK AK NE BO TUGUK CHE KIWECHEI CHE BO NG’ONY." 
Revelation17:6 Ak kiageer kwonyoto ko kagobogit eng’ korotikab bik che tililen, ak eng’ korotikab baorinikab Jesu. Ak ye kingageer inendet, akwong’ eng’ kwong’et ne o." 
Revelation17:7 Ak kilenja malaikaiyat, Kekwong’ amu nee? Amache amwaun ung’otietab kwonyito ak ne bo tiondo ne keseni inendet, ne tinyei metowek tisab ak kuinoik taman." 
Revelation17:8 Tionyi kegeere komi, ama komi; ak ko negit komong’ eng’ keringet ne maigoksei, ak kwo luset. Ak kwong’dos ichek che menyei ng’ony, che kima kisirji kainaikwak bukuitab sobondo koboch ngab kelumda ng’ony, ye keer tiondo, amu kimi, ama komi, ak kota konyonei." 
Revelation17:9 Mi yu kaguiyet ne bo ng’omnatet. Metowechoto tisab ko tulonok tisab, che tebe kwonyoto:" 
Revelation17:10 ak choto ko laitorinik tisab; kogobutyo mutu, mitei agenge, tomo konyo age; ak ye nyo, konyoljin koteb ne matia." 
Revelation17:11 Ak tionyoto kimi, ama komi, inendet ko ne bo sisiit, ak ta ko agenge eng’ chun tisab; ak kowendi luset." 
Revelation17:12 Ak kuinoichoto taman che kegeer ko laitorinik taman che tom konam bounatet; ak konyoru kimnatet ko u laitorinik, koboto tiondo, eng’ boroindab sait agenge." 
Revelation17:13 Tinyei chuto kabwatet agenge, ak kogochin ichek kamugenywa tiondo ak kimnatenywa." 
Revelation17:14 Baregei chuto ak Aruet ak koterter Aruet ichek, amu inendet ko Kiptaiyatab kiptainik, ak ko Laitoriatab laitorinik; ak icheget che mi koboto inendet, che kigiguur ak che kigilewen ak che kiyani." 
Revelation17:15 Ak kilenja, Beechu kegeere, che katebe chepkugoniot, ko bik, ak tuiyosiek, ak bororiosiek, ak kutuswek." 
Revelation17:16 Ak kuinoichu kegeere taman, ak tiondo, ko tun wechei chepkugoniot, ak kometo kotebi inegei, komi ach ngor, ak koam banyekyik, ak kobeel inendet eng’ mat kogesgei." 
Revelation17:17 Amu kiinde Jehovah mugulelwekwak koyai ko u ye ibwati, ak kosich tugul kabwatet agenge, ak kogochi tiondo bounatenywa, agoi kosulda ng’alekab Jehovah." 
Revelation17:18 Ak kwonyi kegeere ko nganaset ne o, ne bou laitorinikab ng’ony." 
Revelation18:1 Kingobata tuguchu, ageer malaikaiyat age kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet, ne tinyei kimnatet ne o; ak koluu ng’ony eng’ lilindanyi." 
Revelation18:2 Ak kiwaach eng’ kutit ne kim, kole, Kagolul, kagolul Babulon ne o, ak kagoek ole menyei oik, ak irimetab tamirmiriet age tugul ne muruon, ak irimetab tarit age tugul ne muruon ak ne kiwechei." 
Revelation18:3 Kagobutyo bororiosiek tugul amu divaikab koromnatetab soksennyi; ak kisokso laitorinikab ng’ony ak inendet, ak kiek magorek chemung’arainikab ng’ony eng’ kimnatetab kaseretab tugukyik." 
Revelation18:4 Ak kiagas kutit age kobunu kipsengwet, kole, Omong’une inendet, okwek bikyuk, si moyamde tengekwogikyik, si monyoru korotwekyik:" 
Revelation18:5 amu kigoit tengekwogikyik kipsengwet, ak kagobwat Jehovah tengekwogikyik." 
Revelation18:6 Oweekyi inendet ko u ye kigoyai, ak oyaakyi inendet konyil aeng’ ko u boisionikyik; kikombet ne kiburuge, oburukyi inendet konyil aeng’." 
Revelation18:7 Ko u ye kiilosgei ak koser tugukyik, ogochi inendet ng’wanindo ak arogenet ko u noto: amu mwaei inendet eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Atebye ko a laitoriat ne kwondo, ma a mosok, ak magoi ageer rirek." 
Revelation18:8 Noto anyun itu korotwekyik eng’ betunak, meet, ak rirek, ak rubet; ak kebeel inendet eng’ mat kogesgei; amu kim Kiptaiyat Jehovah ne kiiruokyi inendet." 
Revelation18:9 Ak rirtos ak koteeitos agobo inendet laitorinikab ng’ony, che kisokso ak kotebyei koboto inendet eng’ kaseretab tuguk, ye keer iyetab lalennyi," 
Revelation18:10 kotonondos eng’ ole loo amu kaiyweetab ng’wanindanyi, kolen, Bwa, bwa wee, nganaset ne o, Babulon, nganaset ne kim! Amu kait kiruogeng’ung’ eng’ sait agenge." 
Revelation18:11 Ak korirtos chemung’arainikab ng’ony ak koteeitos agobo inendet, amu ma koalei chi kogeny tugukwak che aldoi:" 
Revelation18:12 tugukab tahabu, ak feda, ak koik che bichien eng’ alet, ak sonoek che kororon, ak katanisiek che kororon, ak ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak aririsiek, ak ngoroik che biriren; ak ketit age tugul ne nyamdut, ak kit age tugul ne bo kelekab belek, ak kit age tugul ne kigiyae ketit ne bo kamanutiet ne o, ak che bo sugunonik, ak karik, ak koik che leelachen;" 
Revelation18:13 ak kinamon, ak nyamdutik, ak nyamdutik che kibeelei, ak mwanik che kiilegei, ak tuguk che nyamdut, ak divaik, ak mwanik, ak busiek che tambulul, ak nganok, ak tuga, ak kechirek; ak mbartanyisiek ak karisiek ak mutwarik; ak sobonwekab bik." 
Revelation18:14 Ak kigobetenen logoek che kigase miat sobondang’ung’ ak kigobetenen tuguk tugul che anyiny ak che miachen, ama kenyoru kogeny agoi." 
Revelation18:15 Tonondos eng’ ole loo chemung’arainikab tuguchuto, che kiek magorek eng’ inendet, amu kaiyweetab ng’wanindanyi, ak korirtos ak koteeitos;" 
Revelation18:16 kolen, Bwa, bwa wee, nganaset ne o, ne kiilaachi katanisiek che kororon, ak ngoroik che arusen ne birir ak che biriren, ne kigilelesonjine tahabu ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o ak sonoek che kororon!" 
Revelation18:17 Amu kabetyo eng’ sait agenge magornatosiek che eechen che u choto. Ak kitonondos eng’ ole loo kiptaiyat age tugul ne bo melit, ak age tugul ne bunei melit kowendi oldo tugul, ak bik che boisiei eng’ melisiek, ak tugul che nyoru borotenywa eng’ nyanjet," 
Revelation18:18 ak koririo ye kingogeer iyetab lalennyi, kole, Mi nee ne kergei ak nganasani o?" 
Revelation18:19 Ak kolakyin temburiek metowekwak, ak kowaachei, korirtos ak koteeitos, kolen, Bwa, bwa wee, nganasani o, ole kiegune magore bik tugul che kitinyei melisiekwak eng’ nyanjet amu oindab kamanutiennyi! Amu kait ng’emisiennyi eng’ sait agenge." 
Revelation18:20 Baibaitu eng’ inendet inye kipsengwet, ak okwek che o tililen, ak okwek che kiyoktoi, ak okwek maotik; amu kagoruokyi Jehovah inendet amu okwek." 
Revelation18:21 Ak kisut malaikaiyat ne kim koita ne u koitab bai ne o, ak kowirji nyanjet, kole, Kiwirtoi Babulon nganaset ne o, kobut ko u noto eng’ kabutet ne o, ama kenyoru kogeny agoi." 
Revelation18:22 Ama kegasei kogeny eng’ inye butikab ketubosiek ak che tiendos ak butikab ndurerusiek ak che kuutei iriagok; ama kenyoru musogindet ne bo musoknatet age tugul eng’ inye kogeny agoi; ama kegasei cheetab koitab bai eng’ inye kogeny agoi; 
Revelation18:23 ama kokweng’sei lapkeiyetab tait eng’ inye kogeny agoi; ama kegasei kutitab sandet ak mureret eng’ inye kogeny agoi: amu ki bik che eechen che bo ng’ony chemung’arainiguk; amu kigiberber bororiosiek tugul eng’ banisieng’ung’. 
Revelation18:24 Ak kiginyorji inendet korotikab maotik ak che bo bik che tililen, ak che bo tugul che kigibar eng’ ng’ony." 
Revelation19:1 Kingobata tuguchu, agas kit ne u kutit ne o ne bo tuiyet ne o eng’ kipsengwet, kole, Haleluya. Bo Jehovah nenyo yetunet, torornatet, ak kamuktaet;" 
Revelation19:2 amu bo iman ak ko bo imanda kiruogutikyik; amu kagoruokyi chepkugoniot ne o, ne kiimuruon ng’ony eng’ soksennyi, ak kagoyaakta mugetut ne bo korotikab otwogikyik eng’ eutab kwonyoto." 
Revelation19:3 Ak kimwa kogeny ne bo aeng’ kole, Haleluya. Ak togostoi iyetanyi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation19:4 Ak kiibutyi ng’ony boisiek tiptemu ak ang’wan che soptos ak kolos Jehovah ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, komwaei kolen, Amen; Haleluya." 
Revelation19:5 Ak kimong’ kutit eng’ ng’echeretab laitornatet, kole, Olosu Jehovah nenyo, okwek tugul otwogikyik che oiywei inendet, che mengechen ak che eechen." 
Revelation19:6 Ak kiagas kit ne u kutitab tuiyet ne o, ak ko u cheetab beek che chang’, ak ko u cheetab tulosiek che kimen, kole, Haleluya: amu laitorani Kiptaiyat Jehovah nenyo, Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation19:7 Ongeboiboitu ak kigasge mising’, ak kigochi torornatet inendet: amu kagoit katunisietab Aruet, ak kagochopgei osotiondennyi." 
Revelation19:8 Ak kigigochi inendet kolaach gei eng’ katanit ne kararan, ne leel kot ak ko tilil; amu katanit ne kararan ko boisionikab imanda che bo bik che tililen." 
Revelation19:9 Ak kolenja, Sir ile, Boiboen ichek che keguurjin igortab katunisietab Aruet. Ak kilenja, Chu ko ng’alekab iman che bo Jehovah." 
Revelation19:10 Ak kiabutyi kelyekyik alosu inendet. Ak kolenja, Ameyai ko u noto: ki otwogik tuwai koboto tupchosieguk che tinyei baornatet ne bo Jesu. Ilosu Jehovah: amu baornatetab Jesu ko tamirmirietab maoinatet." 
Revelation19:11 Ak kiageer koyatak kipsengwet, ak ogeero, mbartanyit ne leel, ak inendet ne kitebe, ko kigiguure Ne Kiyani ak ko Iman; ak koruochi ak koyaei luget eng’ imanda." 
Revelation19:12 Ak ki u konyekyik liblibenetab mat, ak kimi metinnyi nariosiek che chang’; ak kotinyei kainet ne kigisir, ne mami chi ne ingen kobate inendet inegei." 
Revelation19:13 Ak kiilaachi ngoriet ne kigirong’ji korotik: ak kiguure kainennyi NG’OLYOTAB JEHOVAH. 
Revelation19:14 Ak kiisubi inendet lugosiek che mi kipsengwet che lanyei mbartanyisiek che leelach, kolaachi katanisiek che kororon che leelach kot ak ko tililen." 
Revelation19:15 Ak kimong’une kutinnyi rotwetab chok ne ng’atib, si kobiit kobire bororiosiek: ak koboi ichek eng’ kiroktab karnet: ak kotiech sabibuk eng’ ole kituisie che bo koromnatet ne bo neregekab Jehovah ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Revelation19:16 Ak kotinyei eng’ ngoriennyi ak eng’ kubestanyi kainet ne kigisir kole, LAITORIAT NE BO LAITORINIK, AK KIPTAIYAT NE BO KIPTAINIK." 
Revelation19:17 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat kotononi eng’ asista; ak kiwaach eng’ kutit ne o, kolenji taritik tugul che tirirendos eng’ kwenutab kipsengwet, Obwa otuiyechi igorta ne o ne bo Jehovah;" 
Revelation19:18 si kobiit oam borwekab laitorinik, ak borwekab kiptainikab luget, ak borwekab bik che kimen, ak borwekab mbartanyisiek ak che bo che lanyei ichek, ak borwekab bik tugul, che itiagotin ak che ratotin, ak che mengechen ak che eechen." 
Revelation19:19 Ak kiageer tiondo, ak laitorinikab ng’ony, ak lugosiekwak, ko kaiyomogei koyai luget ak inendet ne kiga tebe mbartanyit, ak lugennyi." 
Revelation19:20 Ak kiginam tiondo, koboto maotiondonoto ki bo lembech ne kiyaei kaborunoik eng’ tainnyi, ne kiiberberi che kiga kinde berutietab tiondo, ak ichek che kiilosu kanamwennyi: kigiwirji choto tuwai kosoptos araraita ne bo mat ne lalei eng’ koik che laldos:" 
Revelation19:21 ak kigibar ichek che king’et eng’ rotwetab chok ne kimong’une kutitab inendet ne kitebe mbartanyit, ak kibiyong’so taritik tugul eng’ borwekwak." 
Revelation20:1 Ak kiageer malaikaiyat kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet, kotinyei yateiywotab keringet ne maigoksei ak sirimdo ne o eng’ eunnyi." 
Revelation20:2 Ak konam maswetit, erenet ne ki bo keny, ne inendet ko Oindet ak ko Setani, ak korat inendet kenyisiek elfut agenge," 
Revelation20:3 ak kowirji inendet keringet ne maigoksei, ak koger, ak kong’och baragunnyi, si mata koberber bororiosiek kogeny, agoi kogesgei kenyisiek elfut agenge: ye ibata noto kitiach ne matia." 
Revelation20:4 Ak kiageer ng’echerokab laitornatet, ak kitebe ichek, ak kigigochi ichek koruoch: ak kiageer sobonwekab ichek che kigitil metowek amu baornatetab Jesu, ak agobo ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak ichek che kima kolosu tiondo, anan kanamwennyi, ak che kimanyor berutiet eng’ togochikwak anan eng’ eunekwak; ak kisopcho ak kolaitoran koboto Kristo kenyisiek elfut." 
Revelation20:5 Ma sopcho che kiga kobek agoi kogesgei kenyisiek elfut agenge. Nito ko ng’eetyet ne bo tai. 
Revelation20:6 Baibai ak ko tilil ne tinyei yamdaet eng’ ng’eetyet ne bo tai: mabou ichek meet ne bo aeng’; ago egu ichek tisiikab Jehovah ak ko bo Kristo, ak kolaitoran ak inendet kenyisiek elfut agenge." 
Revelation20:7 Ak ye igesgei kenyisiek elfut agenge, kitiach Setani komong’ eng’ korgorennyi," 
Revelation20:8 ak komong’ koberber bororiosiek che mitei luukwek ang’wan che bo ng’ony, Gog ak Magog, koyumji ichek luget: che te koitenywa ng’aniekab nyanjet." 
Revelation20:9 Ak kotogosta koyom ng’ony ak koyiem oldab che tililen, ak nganaset ne chamat: ak kichorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeel ichek." 
Revelation20:10 Ak kigiwirji oindet ne kiiberber ichek araraitab mat ak koik che laldos, ole mitei agichek tiondo ak maotiot ne bo lembech; ak kinyalili bet ak kemoi agoi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation20:11 Ak kiageer ng’echeret ne o ak ko leel ne bo laitornatet, ak inendet ne kitebe, ne kimwee togennyi ng’ony ak kipsengwet; ama kisikyi ole tebe." 
Revelation20:12 Ak kiageer che kigobek, che eechen ak che mengechen, kotonondos eng’ taitab ng’echeretab laitornatet; ak kigiyat bukuisiek: ak kigiyat bukuit age, noto ko bukuitab sobondo: ak kigiruokyi che kigobek eng’ tuguk che kiga kisirji bukuisiechoto, ko u boisionikwak." 
Revelation20:13 Ak kigon nyanjet che kigobek che kimi orinnyi; ak kigon meet ak oldab che kigobek, ichek che kigobek che kimi orinywa, ak kigiruokyi chi age tugul ko u boisionikyik." 
Revelation20:14 Ak kigiwirji meet ak oldab che kigobek, araraitab mat. Nito ko meet ne bo aeng’, araraitab mat." 
Revelation20:15 Ak ngot kenyor chi age tugul ne kima kisirji bukuitab sobondo, kewirjin araraitab mat." 
Revelation21:1 Ak kiageer kipsengwet ne leel ak ng’ony ne leel: amu kigosiirto kipsengwet ne bo tai ak ng’onyut ne bo tai; ama komi nyanjet kogeny. 
Revelation21:2 Ak kiageer nganaset ne tilil, Jerusalem ne leel, kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet kobunu Jehovah, ko kagechob ko u mureret ne kagelelesonjinechi manong’otiondennyi." 
Revelation21:3 Ak kiagas kutit ne o komong’une ng’echeretab laitornatet kole, Ogeero, mi emaitab Jehovah ak bik, ak kotebyei koboto ichek, ak koek ichek bikyik, ak kotebyei Jehovah inendet ak ichek, ak koek Jehovah nenywa:" 
Revelation21:4 ak kous inendet beekab kong’ alak tugul eng’ konyekwak; ama komi meet kogeny; ama komi kateiyet kogeny, anan rirek, anan ng’wanindo; kogosiirto tuguk che bo tai." 
Revelation21:5 Ak kimwa inendet ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, kole, Ogeero, ayae tuguk tugul koleelagitu. Ak kile, Sir: amu ng’alechu ko che kiyani ak ko bo iman." 
Revelation21:6 Ak kolenja, Kagosulda. A Alpha ak ko a Omega, taunet ak kagesunet. Agochini buch inendet ne amei melelda che bo kondametutab beekab sobondo." 
Revelation21:7 Inendet ne iterteri konamei tuguchu; ak aegu Jehovah nenyi, ak koek inendet werinnyu." 
Revelation21:8 Ago che iyweisiei, ak che maiyani, ak che kiwechei, ak rumik, ak che soksei, ak bonik, ak che saei kanamonik, ak kiplembechonik tugul, kotinyei kebebertanywa eng’ araraita ne lale mat ak koik che laldos; ne noto ko meet ne bo aeng’." 
Revelation21:9 Ak kinyo age eng’ malaikaisiechoto tisab che kitinyei tabok tisab, che ki nyiitotin korotwek tisabu che bo let; ak kong’alalwa, kole, Nyo yu, si aborun mureret, osotiotab Aruet." 
Revelation21:10 Ak kiimuta eng’ Tamirmiriet agoi tulwet ne o ak ko koi, ak kiiborua nganaset ne tilil Jerusalem, kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet kobunu Jehovah," 
Revelation21:11 kotinyei lilindab Jehovah: ne kergei lapkeiyennyi ak koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o, ko u koita ne bo jasipi, ne tilil ko u krustalo:" 
Revelation21:12 ne tinyei irimet ne o ak ko koi; ak kotinyei kurgotik taman ak aeng’, ak mi ormarichochoto malaikaisiek tamanu ak aeng’; ak kigisirji kainaik, choto bo ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo lagokab Israel:" 
Revelation21:13 kimi komostab kong’asis kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab murot ne bo katam kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab murot ne bo tai kurgotik somogu; ak kimi komostab cherongo kurgotik somogu. 
Revelation21:14 Ak kitinyei irimetab nganaset lumeiywek taman ak aeng’, ak kimi kainaik tamanu ak aeng’ che bo che kiyoktoi taman ak aeng’ che bo Aruet." 
Revelation21:15 Ak kitinyei inendet ne king’alalwa tegat ne bo tahabu si kokwae nganaset, ak kurgotikyik, ak irimennyi." 
Revelation21:16 Ak kiaechin irimosiek tugul ang’wanu che bo nganaset, ak kiaechin koindanyi ak tebeesindo: ak kiikwae nganaset tegandanato, koek maelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol mut: koindanyi ak tebeesindanyi ak koindanyi ne wendi barak koaechin." 
Revelation21:17 Ak kiikwa irimennyi, ak kiek kakwautikab eut bogol ak artam ak ang’wan, eng’ kakwaetab chito, noto ko ne bo malaikaiyat." 
Revelation21:18 Ak kigiteege jasipi irimennyi: ak ki tahabu che tililen nganaset, ko u glasit ne tilil." 
Revelation21:19 Ak kigilelesonji lumeiywekab irimet ne bo nganaset eng’ koik alak tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o. Lumeiywot ne bo tai ko ki jasipi; ne bo aeng’ ko sapire; ne bo somok ko kalkedo; ne bo ang’wan ko sumaragdo; 
Revelation21:20 ne bo mut ko sardonukso; ne bo lo ko sardio; ne bo tisab ko krusolito; ne bo sisiit ko berulo; ne bo sogol ko topasio; ne bo taman ko krusopraso; ne bo taman ak agenge ko huakinto; ne bo taman ak aeng’ ko ametusto. 
Revelation21:21 Ak kurgotik taman ak aeng’ ko ki sonoek taman ak aeng’ che kororon; age tugul eng’ kurgotik ko ki bo sonoiyat agenge: ak ki tahabu che tililen oretab nganaset, ko u glasit ne sengelel." 
Revelation21:22 Ama ageer hekalut orit; amu Kiptaiyat Jehovah Kamuktaindet ak Aruet ko hekalunnyi. 
Revelation21:23 Ak mamachei nganaset asista, anan arawet, koluuchi: amu iluuchin lilindab Jehovah, ak tainnyi ko Aruet." 
Revelation21:24 Ak kobendoti bororiosiek eng’ lapkeiyennyi: ak koibu laitorinikab ng’ony torornatenywa konyo orit. 
Revelation21:25 Amagoi kiger kurgotikyik bet (amu mami kemout oloto): 
Revelation21:26 ak ibu ichek torornatet ak teegistab bororiosiek kobwa orit: 
Revelation21:27 ak magoi wa orit kiy age tugul ne muruon, anan ko ne yaei kiy ne kiwechei, ak lembeita, kobate ichek che kigisirji bukuitab sobondo ne bo Aruet." 
Revelation22:1 Ak kiiborua ainetab beekab sobon, ne tilil ko u krustalo, kobunu ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah ak ne bo Aruet," 
Revelation22:2 eng’ kwenutab orinnyi. Ak kimi ketitab sobon ainonoto, komosi ak komosi, ne yiei logoek taman ak aeng’ che terjin, ak koyiei logoekyik eng’ arawet age tugul: ak kisoobi bororiosiek eng’ sogekab ketoto." 
Revelation22:3 Ama komi chubisiet kogeny: ak tun mi orinnyi ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah ak ne bo Aruet: ak yachin boisiet inendet otwogikyik; 
Revelation22:4 ak keerei togennyi; ak mi kainennyi togochikwak. 
Revelation22:5 Ama komi kemout kogeny; ama machei lapkeiyetab tait, anan ko lapkeiyetab asista; amu igochin ichek lapkeiyet Kiptaiyat Jehovah: ak laitorani ichek koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation22:6 Ak kilenja, Ng’alechu ko che kiyani ak ko bo iman: ak kiiyok Kiptaiyat, ne Jehovah ne bo tamirmirikab maotik, malaikaiyandennyi koborji otwogikyik tuguk che sib kobiitu matiny." 
Revelation22:7 Ak ogeero, anyone achogu. Baibai ne ribei ng’alekab maoinatetab bukuini." 
Revelation22:8 Ane Johana ne kiagas tuguchu ak ageer. Ak ye kingagas ak ageer, abutyi ng’ony alosu eng’ kelyekab malaikaiyat ne kiiborua tuguchuto." 
Revelation22:9 Ak kolenja, Amat iyai ko u noto: amu ki otwogik koboto tupchosieguk maotik, ak koboto ichek che ribei ng’alekab bukuini; ilosu Jehovah." 
Revelation22:10 Ak kilenja, Amat ing’och ng’alek che bo maoinatetab bukuini; amu kagorik betusiek." 
Revelation22:11 Inendet ne ma bo imanda, koyai che ma bo imanda kosiir: ak inendet ne bo simdo, ingoek ne bo simdo kosiir: ak inendet ne bo imanda, koyai che bo imanda kosiir: ak inendet ne tilil, ingotililit kosiir." 
Revelation22:12 Ogeero, anyone achogu; ak aibu melektanyu si agochi chi age tugul ko u boisionikyik." 
Revelation22:13 A Alpha ak ko a Omega, ne bo tai ak ne bo let, taunet, ak kagesunet." 
Revelation22:14 Boiboen ichek che mwetei ngoroikwak, si kobiit kosich chamjinet koit ole mi ketitab sobondo, ak kobun kurgotik kobendi nganaset orit." 
Revelation22:15 Mi sang’ sesenik, ak bonik, ak che soksei, ak rumik, ak che saei kanamonik, ak age tugul ne chamei lembeita ak koyaei." 
Revelation22:16 Ane Jesu ne kaayogu malaikaiyandennyu si kobaorianwok tuguchu eng’ kanisosiek. A tigitiot ak keswotab Daudi, taboiyot ne bo karon ne ikwenyi." 
Revelation22:17 Ak mwaei Tamirmiriet ak mureret kole, Nyo. Ak inendet ne kasei, komwa kole, Nyo. Ak inendet ne amei melelda, konyo; ak inendet ne machei, koib beekab sobon buch." 
Revelation22:18 Abaorianjini chi age tugul ne kasei ng’alek che bo maoinatetab bukuini, ale, Ngo tesyi chi age tugul ng’alechu ng’alek alak, kotesyin Jehovah korotwek che kigisirji bukuini:" 
Revelation22:19 ak ngonem chi age tugul ng’alek eng’ bukuitab maoinatoni, konemu Jehovah kebebertanyi eng’ ketitab sobondo, ak eng’ nganaset ne tilil, che kigisirji bukuini." 
Revelation22:20 Mwaei inendet ne baorianjin tuguchu kole, Ee: anyone achogu. Amen: nyo, Kiptaiyat Jesu."
